Comment: Showed more pace from gates, ended up 3Ls back on fence, spent nothing in run, closed behind leader on bend but got no real crack and lost all hope, however looked disappointing when clear last 150 M.
Began in line but mustered pace to take up lead, set a standard pace in mid-section, under pressure on turning, weakened out tamely.
Away reasonably, raced 3Ls back in running line, close enough on bend, made a strong run turning in and hit lead at 200 M, still a chance to 100 M but run ended last bit.
Failed to muster but regathered to settle in midfield 4Ls off pace, lost position on bend, saved ground on rails, in traffic at 300 M, made a little late ground when clear.

Standard jump, drifted back to race behind midfield, shared rear at midpoint 5 to 6Ls back, not really suited by pace, made a 3 wide run on circle, came to middle and closed off strongest to score a shade easily.
Out in line, settled 3 wide in midfield 4Ls back, had an even run given easy pace, had cover on bend and tracked well on turning, made a strong run to challenge at 200 M, overhauled last 100 M.

Made the speed at an even tempo, nabbed in the shadows of the post.
Raced 3 wide in a midfield position. Battled on over the concluding stages.
Throughout the race, from the outside barrier travelled wide and without cover, midfield. Making the home turn hung out. Struggled in the run home.

Slow to begin and raced in last position. Came wide in the straight but just plugged to the line.

Never more than 2Ls off the lead. A length down on straightening. Unable to find more and was swamped final 250 M. (Mucopus.)
Behind midfield. Widest turning for home. Closed the race off fairly despite hanging out.
Unable to find early speed and raced in rear section. Picked up 300 M out and swept past rival to take the lead final 150 M. Won going away.
Trailed field for most of the race. Under the whip making home turn and only ran past a few beaten runners.

Jumped awkwardly and was eased back to race in rear section. Rallied in the straight for a minor placing.
Disputed early tempo out 2-wide, slotted into box-seat position on fence 2Ls back in 4th at halfway, led 150 M out, tidily.
Close-up in 5th on fence about 2Ls from the pace early, held up from top of home straight to the 200 M, unlucky not to place.
Worse than midfield 2-wide and 4Ls from early speed, made a late bid for a place inside final 200 M but never close to the quinella.

3-wide with cover in rear about 5Ls from the early pace, hung out at halfway, 5-wide turning for home, lost further ground.
Raced 3 and 4-back on fence about 5Ls from the front until the final bend, tight for room from 350 M to furlong pole, ran on again, just missed a place.
Hampered at the start, worse than midfield but with cover about 5Ls from the front until final bend, held up from 300 M to 150 M out, no impression once clear.
Checked at the start back to 5Ls last at 1000 M, further back in rear swinging for home, no impression.
In rear but with cover at least 5Ls from the pace until home turn, never likely to improve.
Midfield with cover about 3Ls from the speed from 1000 M to home turn, petered out gradually.
Worse than midfield about 5Ls down at mid stages, slipped further back into home straight, making good late ground when held up through final 100 M and not fully tested.
Mostly trapped 3-wide without cover, about 2Ls from the early pace, 4Ls down in 4th making final turn, kept on well for a place despite the tough trip.
Awkward break, 3-back on fence about 3Ls off pace at halfway, about 5Ls down in 6th turning for home, soon beaten.
2Ls back in 2nd on fence at 1200 M, over 3Ls down in 3rd and under pressure on straightening, had his chance to place.
Towards rear at least 6Ls from the speed until the final bend, made only minor late headway in the stretch.
4-wide no cover down the back straight, pressed on forward at halfway but struggling turning for home, dropped right out final 200 M. (Blood in trachea.)
Fractious at start, one from rear at least 7Ls from the pace from 1000 M to home turn, ran on well through the field, never nearer.
Around midfield about 5Ls from the lead at halfway but a little further back off home turn, ran on well late, nearest at finish.
Bounded at start losing ground, keen on fence when about 5Ls back in 8th at halfway and same off final turn, ran on well to take 2nd inside final strides.
Led by 2Ls on fence 1200 M out, kicked about 3Ls to the good making home turn, headed 150 M out and swamped late.
Impressive debut, 3Ls back in 3rd at 1200 M, about 5Ls back in 5th making final turn, picked up very well to lead 150 M out, easily.
Slowest away and soon detached in rear at least 9Ls from the speed, struggling off final bend, poor debut.
3Ls off pace in 4th at 1100 M, held 2nd about 3Ls from the leader turning into home straight, faded through final 200 M.
3-back on fence in midfield at halfway about 4Ls from the pace, worse off entering final stretch, no impression.

Eased to sit behind midfield, 4-1/2LS off the leaders 2 to 3-wide, harmed by the slow pace, blocked 4-2, little dash when clear.
Not suited by the slow tempo, never competitive at rear.

Eased back, trapped 2 to 3-wide throughout and lost too much ground, 5Ls off the leaders, harmed by the slow tempo, made ground steadily 700 M, dashed well in straight and looked to threaten, however run ended at 100 M.

Pushed early to occupy a midfield position, however trapped 4-wide throughout and lost too much ground, 2-1/2LS off the leaders, not suited by the slow pace, made early move 800 M, ran on well until 150 M when run ended.

Slowly away, hard ridden to keep up in a midfield spot along the rails, 3-1/2LS off the leaders, harmed by the slow pace, momentarily blocked 400 M, demonstrated strong finishing effort when clear and score its 2nd victory.
Behind midfield, 4-1/2LS off the leaders 2 to 3-wide, not suited by the slow pace, ridden along vigorously 600 M but lacked response, no dash in straight, still green.

Prominent early but elected for a trail 1 out 1 back, raced 2 to 3Ls away tracking reasonable tempo, same margin down on turning, stayed on soundly in straight just unable to go up a notch last 200 M.

Standard jump, ended up 6Ls back in running line, a little keen early but suited by tempo, lost spot on bend, well back and switched out on straightening, finished race off well but found winner too handy late.

Towards rear and wide to straight. Ran home one-paced without quickening.
Well there 2-wide to straight. Soon dropped out.

Restrained from outset, ended up 9 or more lengths back, helped by fast tempo, still well down leaving bend, weaved between horses and made up huge amount of ground from an impossible spot.

Restrained to race in rear, raced back with last few 8Ls off lead, kept to fence and saved ground on bend, suited by tempo and should have had something to offer at business end but was instead very one paced.

Out with first few, held a spot 4Ls back in 2 wide line, no excuses on run, came 3 wide on bend, struggled to pick up in straight and just held ground over concluding stages.

5Ls back in 5th on fence at halfway, 4Ls back in 4th at final turn, didn't reach main trio and tired late, only just held onto 4th place.

Led but tied up over the final stages.

Ridden along to be prominent but was caught 3-wide no cover. Stayed on soundly.

Went forward to race behind the leader, 2-wide. Was headed after the 400 M and faded quickly over the concluding stages.

Never more than 3Ls off the lead. Failed to turn up a notch and stayed on same pace in the final stages.

Race along the inside rails in the lead or disputed lead. Stayed on well in the final stages and held off challengers.

3Ls back in 6th at 1000 M, improved out 3-wide no cover from 600 M, led 300 M out, one-paced, tipped out of quinella late, lost 3rd on the line.

10Ls last at the 1200 M, further back and toiling 800 M out, no impression.

Disputed early pace out 2-wide, a neck clear going quick enough at 1000 M, still there at top of homestretch but weakened sharply final 200 M.
4-wide no cover 1400 M out, pressed on 1L down in 3rd out 3-wide no cover 1100 M out, disputing lead at top of home straight, faded final 300 M.
Disputed early pace on fence, had the run of the race in 4th about 2Ls from speed from 800 M to home turn, all out to remain in touch at 200 M, tired late.

Niggled along one from rear about 10Ls from the lead at the 800 M, made some fair late ground down centre of the track, nearest at the finish.
Worse than midfield with cover about 6Ls from the speed at 1200 M, still well back on straightening, made no impact, performance deemed unacceptable.

Messy start, on fence 5Ls back in 8th at the 1200 M, 2Ls down and challenging making final turn, no match for the winner but a comfortable 2nd.

Over 10Ls last at 1000 M, still last but only 5Ls back turning in, ran on past beaten rivals.
2-wide and 4Ls back in 7th at 1200 M, made steady ground and ridden along to be a neck 2nd turning for home, one-paced in the climax but still placed.

Box-seated in 3rd about 2Ls from the speed on fence at 1200 M, remained in front rank until home straight but beaten by the 200 M.
7Ls off pace in 8th out 2-wide at 1000 M, ridden along to take closer order at top of home straight, made only a minor impact.
8Ls down in 9th at 1000 M, still worse than midfield but just 4Ls down off home turn, very one-paced.
3-wide but with cover 3Ls from the speed disputing 4th at 1000 M, hung out as usual, left 4-wide no cover on the circle and petered out in the home straight.
2-wide and 1L down in 2nd 1200 M out, disputing lead at 800 M and a neck clear on straightening, retreated quickly.
Eased to rear, harmed by the slow pace, never competitive.
Eased back, 8Ls behind the leader, trapped 3 to 4-wide throughout and lost ground, harmed by the slow pace, no turn of foot in straight.
Eased back, 6-1/2Ls behind the leader 2 to 3-wide, little dash last 200 M despite not suited by the slow pace.
Jumped very well, eased back steadily to sit behind midfield, 5-1/2Ls off the leader 3-wide, not suited by the slow pace, ran on ok in final stages.
Pushed to obtain a more prominent spot in front of midfield, 3Ls off the leader along the fence, not suited by the slow pace, lacked room in straight to 200 M, just held ground thereafter.
Pushed forward and took rail, then eased to settle in box seat, enjoyed the slow early sectionals, closed the race off strongly and grab 3rd.
Eased back, 5Ls behind the leader 2-wide, dashed well 250 M despite not suited by the slow pace.
Led along the rail easily by 1-1/2Ls at advantageous slow early sectionals. Kicked strongly in straight to defy rivals.
Eased to sit about midfield along the fence, 4-1/2Ls off the leader, harmed by the slow pace, demonstrated strong finishing efforts last 300 M and ran a remarkable 2nd.
Pushed forward and joined the front group, 2-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, favoured by the slow tempo, little dash 400 M but no threat to winner.
Niggled along early, settled behind the pace group, 4-1/2Ls off the leader 2 to 3-wide, harmed by the slow pace, no dash, just held ground in straight.
Eased back, unbalanced 700 M, eased out of race 400 M. (See Racing Incidents.)

Eased to sit behind midfield, trapped 3-wide, moved up 1000 M to sit 4-1/2Ls off the leader, continued to progress steadily 600 M, not suited by the slow pace, lacked turn of foot in straight, just held ground, flattened 100 M.
Always well there on near side. Took over from over 250 M out. Won readily.
Never far off. Fought on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Always prominent on near side. Just failed to feature in the blanket finish. (Mucus.) (Abnormal breathing noise.) noise.)
Prominent in near side group until finding no extra shortly after coming onto the course proper.
Held up to race within 2Ls of leader of near side group. Came to challenge passing 250 M but could only produce moderate impression.
Close up early. Weakened under pressure from 300 M.
Broke well. Held up to race behind midfield in the centre of the track. Came to challenge over 350 M out and ran on steadily under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Chased leader of the small far side group. Came to challenge over 200 M out but could only keep on at the one pace.
Began fairly. Led the small group of three down far side of track. Quickened to hold every chance over 200 M out but unable to sustain effort under pressure nearing home.
Well there with small far side group. Gave ground from over 200 M out.
Began fairly. Raced never far off down centre of track. Just ran home one-paced under pressure.
Raced behind midfield along grandstand rails. Produced good late impression closing stages.
No early pace, took a spot behind mid-division on fence, suited with pace on, saved ground on bend, no clear run early straight, made gradual progress last 300 M to be nearest on line.

First to hit ground, lead them easily racing clear by 5Ls, overraced and kept pace solid throughout, came back to them on circle, under pressure at 300 M and weakened last 200 M after early work told.

No speed from gates, raced 3 wide at tail more than 12Ls from lead, helped by speed in mid-section, tracked wide turning in, made steady ground to 100 M before condition gave out.

Began well, had speed to cross to be first behind leader, did share of chasing with pace on, niggled along turning failed to respond and weakened out easily last 300 M.
Began well, took a trailling role 6Ls off leader but prominent in main group, had a good run to bend, switched out and gradually reeled them in prevailing late under hard riding.
Began well, ended up on rails with cover 5Ls off tearaway leader, in traffic on turning, didn't get a clear crack at any stage in straight and was not properly tested. (See Racing Incidents.)
No speed from outset, ended up sharing rear more than 12Ls off lead, assisted by pace in mid-section, still well back to bend, made gradual progress from well back in straight to be nearest on line.

Reasonable break, took a midfield spot 7Ls from outright leader, tracked up nicely on bend, steadied at 600 M, into clear on turn, didn't have an instant turn of foot but kept on steadily fighting back late for 2nd.
Had speed to cross and race first without cover 5Ls off leader, improved to be 1L down leaving circle, went to front and there to 200 M before hard run took toll and weakened late.
Ordinary getaway, raced 12Ls off hot pace in front, suited b tempo and gradually improved between horses on bend, switched out turning and made a solid bid at 200 M but just came up short late.
Even break, took midfield trail 10Ls off tearaway leader, aided by solid sections, unbalanced at 1000 M, angled 4 wide on bend, closed off fairly but only at same speed without looking likely.
Began reasonably, posted wide when attempting to slot in, 3 wide without cover throughout working with pace on, soon under pressure on straightening, gradually faded in straight.
Raced on rails in midfield. Took closer order rounding home bend. Ran on stoutly under pressure to just fail to get up on line.
Settled in midfield. Jostled straightening. Ran home one-paced.
Very slowly away losing considerable ground. Joined the backmarkers coming out of back straight. Ran past well beaten horses late.
Settled in last few. Finished off race strongly inside final 300 M. Did best work late.
Rear early. Gradually picked up to midfield before home bend. Held rails run until switched out to challenge straightening. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Settled at the back. Trailed the field into straight. No sign of improvement.
Soon took up running and held narrow lead to 400 M. Gradually weakened.
Disputed lead far side. Settled a 1L 2nd around home bend. Renewed effort turning for home gaining narrow advantage only to be headed 200 M out.
Slightly slow into stride. Soon picked up to one-back position on rails in 3rd. Stalked leader into straight but failed to quicken under pressure.
Settled mainly in one-out-one-back position in 4th within 2Ls of pace. Came to challenge upon straightening, gaining upper hand over 150 M out. Just held on to finish.
Midfield throughout. Fought on steadily without quickening.
Settled just better than midfield. Soon weakened after straightening.
Raced wide behind midfield. Kept on steadily at the same pace without quickening.
Settled in last few. Inconvenienced and switched out for a run 300 M out. Made up some late ground closing stages.

Began well, took a prominent spot 1 out 1 back, tracked moderate tempo with run of race, eased out leaving circle, looked a threat at 300 M but unable to close off in usual fashion just holding ground late.
Slowly away and lost considerable ground, raced at tail 8 or more lengths back, pace against in middle stages, couldn't find extra in straight and gradually lost touch.
Nicely away, took up running easily and controlled pace in middle stages, held a narrow break on turning, headed at 250 M but fought back strongly to hold off all but winner.

Standard jump and lost ground shortly after, ended up 5Ls back on rails, had an easy time in mid-section, travelled well turning in, in traffic to 200 M but dashed sharply when clear to score nice win.

Slowly into stride, drove up to recover into a midfield role, raced 3 to 4Ls back closer than usual, had a suitable run with lack of pace on, in traffic from turning to 200 M, closed soundly when clear to be nearest late.

Fast into stride, took a prime position on leaders back, enjoyed ideal trip with steady sections, right there rounding bend, didn't get a clear crack at them for most of straight and not really tested.

Lacked pace from jump and allowed to position further back than usual, failed to settle racing 7Ls back behind steady tempo, back in traffic on turning and didn't really have much room thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Had speed, worked across from a wide alley to race outside the leader, travelled well with easy pace, applied pressure on turning in, hit lead at 250 M but unable to go on with it late.

Away in line, pressed on but unable to slot in from an awkward gate, raced outside leaders 3 wide without cover however suited by tempo, challenged leaders on turning, held on until 100 M when began to tire.
Jumped well enough, ended up just in front of midfield 4Ls away in running line, travelled well throughout, eased 4 wide on straightening, made steady ground without looking likely.
Restrained from an outside alley, ended up 7 to 8Ls away in two wide line, not suited by tempo and keen throughout, still had job to do on bend, made some headway in straight without threatening.

Restrained from a wide alley to race at rear 8Ls back on fence, pace against in middle stages, still well back when improving, made up solid ground without much clear running in straight, flying late when clear. Unlucky.
Began in line, outpaced early and posted 3 wide in midfield 6Ls back, did it tough with pace against, improved gradually on bend, 5 wide turning in, run ended before checked at 150 M.
No real early pace and drifted back to behind midfield, raced 3 and 4 wide 8Ls back, not helped by steady pace, made a 5 wide run off bend, only held ground in run to line.
Settled wide behind midfield. Took off from Rock circling the field to lead passing 500 M. Went 2Ls clear into straight and hung on steadily to finish.
Settled outside leader. Dropped to 4th within 2Ls of pace rounding stable bend. With tiring leaders briefly coming off Rock. Soon dropped out. (Mucus.)
Midfield to halfway, dropping towards rear. No further impression.
Never far off. Chased leaders in 3rd into straight. Fought on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Well back. Dropped out from home bend.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Raced on rails in forward of midfield. Gained 4th into straight. Fought on steadily for a long way 3rd.
Attempted to make all and led to 500 M. Weakened noticeably from 2nd into straight.
Raced 3-wide in midfield most of way to straight. Weakened.
Midfield most of way. Found nothing in straight.
Settled behind midfield. Commenced run rounding home bend but could only keep on steadily for a remote 4th.
Settled at the back. Kept on one pace.
Began on terms but throughout the race travelled 3-wide and without cover outside the leaders. Ran out of fuel over the concluding stages.
A little slow to begin, then shortly afterwards lost further ground when checked as a result of being crowded. Settled midfield on the fence. Railed up in the run home but only plodded to the line.
From the outside barrier was allowed to drift back to a position to obtain cover near the rear of the field. Making the turn after the 600 M hung out came widest in the straight. Failed to run on.
Raced midfield, 2-wide with cover. Stayed towards the inside in the final stretch, ran on strongly to come up just short.
From a wide gate was taken back to a position at the rear of the field. Closed off well.
Positioned near the rear of the pack 1 off with cover. Battled away when under pressure in the run home.
Raced handy to the leaders, 2-wide with cover. Struggled over the final 300 M.
Had the run of the race behind the leader, given every chance. Failed to find any extra.
Made every post a winner. Led easily, kicked in the run home to hold neck advantage.

Travelled keenly on the back of the speed, 3-wide with cover. Jockey's saddle shifted forward on top of the horse's wither near 1000 M, and as such he was disadvantage in riding. Dropped out in the straight.
On jumping shifted out abruptly and when being straightened lost ground. Raced 3 deep, midfield with cover. Didn't quicken appreciably in the straight.
Began awkwardly then was ridden along to race outside the leader. Compounded inside the furlong.
Jumped well from widest draw but was taken back. Towards the rear on straightening and made up some ground in the straight.
Settled on the fence at midfield. Switched out and quickened on straightening. Took the lead final 100 M and kept on well to hold off late challenger.
Raced 2-wide behind the pace. Took the lead 300 M out but unable to find extra to remain in contention thereafter.
Lacked speed and raced towards the rear. Trailed field into home straight and only ran past beaten runners.
3-wide without cover at midfield in back straight. Never quickened and remained on same pace in the home straight.
Took the early lead. Settled in a prominent spot behind the pace at home turn. Took the lead 200 M out but unable to sustain effort in the final stages.
Off slowly and raced in rear section. Hugged the rails at home turn and remained near the back on straightening. Checked 300 M out and dropped to last place. Closed the race off strongly.
Taken back and raced 2-wide behind midfield. Swung widest turning for home. Rallied strongly in the straight despite hanging and was closest at finish.

Ridden early and was 3-wide in a forward spot at 1000 M. Took sole possession of the lead at the Rock and remained in front into the straight. Headed 300 M out and then dropped quickly after crowding 150 M out.

On the rails and better than midfield. 3Ls off the lead at the Rock and improved to within 2Ls turning for home. Held up behind traffic early straight and then was checked at 150 M. Closed off strongly for a minor placing.
Jumped fairly. Raced 2-wide at midfield. On the rails and behind midfield at home turn. Didn't find much in the straight.
2-wide and better than midfield. Swung out turning for home and ran on well. Unable to find enough to chase down winner.
Taken back and about 8Ls last on fence at 1000 M, a little closer on straightening, made no impact.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
3-back on fence about 5Ls from the pace at 1000 M, a little closer on straightening, chequered passage though beaten rivals, just missed quinella. (See Racing Incidents.)
Quick to lead on fence, taken on briefly down the back but ahead again by 1L turning for home, overhauled by winner inside final 100 M and just hung onto 2nd.
7Ls off pace out 2-wide in 9th or 10th early, over-raced in middle stages, never likely to figure in the finish.
Caught 3-wide no cover at 1200 M in 5th, pressed on to lead briefly in middle stages, headed again before home turn and one-paced on the run-in.
Very messy start, 2-wide and 5Ls back in 7th at 1200 M, over-raced repeatedly in midfield, went on 3-wide no cover at 400 M, dropped out.
Raced in 'one-out-one-back' position in 4th at 1000 M, still right there entering homestretch, in the mix but couldn't find that extra gear.
Hampered at the start, 4-back on fence about 6Ls behind at midpoint, finished off fairly well out wide, never nearer.
One from rear about 8Ls from the lead at 800 M, marginally closer turning in, held up until the 200 M, too late to recover.
Run of the race on the fence in 4th or 5th no worse than 2-1/2Ls from the speed until the home turn, peeled out, led inside final 100 M, cosy win.
Towards rear trapped 3-wide no cover down backstretch when about 7Ls off speed, 5-wide (widest) turning in, bumped wider 250 M out, little threat.
Nicely placed 2-wide and 2Ls back in 5th at the 600 M, quickened up off home turn to lead 150 M out, ousted by the winner in final strides.
4-back on fence 6Ls from speed at halfway, edged into the clear 300 M out when 4Ls down, dashed home very strongly out wide, to lead close home.
5Ls back in 9th out 2-wide from 800 M to home turn, widest swinging for home, stayed only fairly down the centre without much menace.
Raced 3-wide but with cover down backstretch when about 4Ls back in 9th, ran on very well down the centre to sneak into a place in final strides.
On the pace, led by a neck on the circle, faded thereafter.
Very wide throughout, 3-wide no cover trying to force the issue until circling for home, not much more to offer.
Raced 3-wide but with cover down backstretch just 2Ls from the pace in 4th, ran on well in the finish but lacked the kick of the principals.
Tidy spot 3Ls back in 6th at halfway with cover, closer on straightening, didn't quicken up and no excuses.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Disputed early speed, had the box-run until the home turn when leading marginally, headed 150 M out, tired late.
8Ls last on fence at halfway and only a little closer making final turn, ran on fairly along the inner without threatening.
Over-raced through first half when 4Ls off pace in 8th or so and 2-wide, briefly steadied 250 M out, stayed on without really threatening.

Eased back, 7-1/2Ls off the good pace along the fence, moved 2-wide at home bend to make its run, however held up and checked 400 M, progressed steadily 200 M and closed off strongly, just missed win by a narrow margin.
Pushed early to keep up a rail spot just behind midfield, 5-1/2Ls off the good pace, swept forward 2 to 3-wide at home bend, held up and checked 400 M, ran on, leave in last quarter.
Pushed early but lacked natural speed, crossed to 2-wide about midfield, 4Ls off the good pace, never progressed and flattened in straight.

Eased to sit behind leaders early, trapped 3-wide and raced too keenly, allowed to stride forward in back straight and took rail and lead 800 M, hung on until 100 M when overhauled, just ran on for 3rd.
Just worse than midfield, 5-1/2Ls off the good pace 2-wide, swept 3 to 4-wide at home bend making run, however failed to deliver its usual strong finish, only made up some ground 200 M.
Eased to sit behind the pace group, 3Ls off the good pace 2-wide, travelled nicely throughout, progressed steadily 300 M to win by a short head.
Settled nicely in box seat until 500 M was carried back and lost ground, only ran on fairly when clear in straight.
Eased to sit just behind the leaders 2-wide, travelled well until 200 M, weakened easily.
Pushed to take the rail and led by 1L at good pace, pressured and crossed 800 M, dropped off rapidly 500 M.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Eased at start, more than 9Ls off the good pace 2-wide at rear, swept forward 4 to 5-wide at home bend but lost too much ground, lacked turn of foot in final stages.
Eased back, 8Ls behind the good pace 2-wide, swept 3 to 4-wide at home bend for the run, made ground 250 M but never really threatened.
Settled in rear. Made no show in the run home.
Settled in last few. Dropped to tail-end into straight. Never seen with a chance.
Began fairly. Disputed lead early. Crossed to lead rounding stable bend and made rest. Just held off late challengers.
Raced outside leader. Still 1L off turning in. One-paced inside 200 M when jostled and inconvenienced. No further impression. (Lost plate.)
Travelled in no better than midfield position. Saved ground on rails turning in. No clear run on inside early in straight. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Settled at the back. Commenced move rounding home bend. Made steady headway down straight to be nearest at finish.
Swiftly shifted to rails from poor draw to race in midfield. Improved to 4th on rails turning in. Tight on rails early in straight. Ran on under pressure inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Settled towards rear. Took closer order to midfield going up Rock. Lost ground when wide turning for home. Found nothing from behind midfield into straight.
Led early. Settled one back in 3rd on rails coming out home straight. Switched out to challenge turning for home. Fought on steadily without quickening.
2-wide in midfield. Switched out behind horses for a run after straightening. Fought on dourly under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Never far off in one-out-one-back position in 4th about 2Ls off the lead. Slightly worse in 5th turning in but fought on under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Raced 2-wide in rear of midfield. Lost position turning into back straight. Towards rear and very wide turning in. Ran home one-paced.
Began with rest, took on ideal spot 3-4Ls off speed in running line, travelled well in midfield on bend, ridden along turning, made gradual progress without threatening.
Began nicely, slotted across in behind pace 2-3Ls back, had a reasonable run tracking hot pace, niggled turning, gradually progressed to 150 M before losing clear running and was not tested late.
Jumped in line, ended up 3-wide in front of midfield, hung on bend 4Ls off lead, scouted wider turning in, kept on well down middle to be not far away in finish.
Showed pace from outset, pushed on from a wide alley to challenge for front, kept pressure on at a solid speed in middle stages, there on turning but just peaked on run last 50 M.
Fast into stride pressed on to tackle first few for front, did plenty of work with fast pace, took a trail on first two on bend, moved wider on turning, finished off well missing place in a 3 way go.
Well enough away, allowed to drift back into midfield raced 2 to 3-wide 7Ls back, helped by solid tempo but hung off on bend, condition gave out in straight and just held ground in run to line.
Began in line, outpaced early and settled midfield on rails 5Ls back assisted by solid speed, angled wide leaving bend, made solid progress in straight doing best work late to snatch 3rd.
Tardy into stride, ended up behind midfield 7Ls back, suited by the solid sections in front, continued to improve on bend, kept taking ground off leaders before running into traffic last 100 M.
No pace from outset, ended up at tail 10 or more lengths back, always struggling in run, rearward turning and dropped right out in straight. (Soft palate displacement.)
Began well, displayed usual early pace to hold lead, pressured throughout at a solid speed, still in battle for front on bend, shook off challenge at 100 M and held on narrowly when all out late.
Average to begin, didn't go early and settled 10Ls or so off lead, helped by pace however niggled along throughout, still well back to bend, made a little late ground but never really likely.
Allowed to drift back after racing with them, ended up 7Ls back in running line, suited by solid tempo in front well back turning, flew home last 200 M making many lengths to just miss.
Out in line, took a spot in middle of pack 3Ls off lead, made run from 400 M, took gradual ground off leaders last furlong without really threatening.
Bounced out, shared lead towards middle of course at a sensible tempo, failed to quicken from 400 M, condition gave out late.
Modest break, ended up towards last few on outside 4Ls off pace, back behind horses at midpoint, angled into clear at 250 M and did best work late to make frame.
Away fairly, raced in midfield on outside, 3Ls back at midpoint, shifted out to make run at 400 M, closed race off soundly for a placing.
Showed natural pace and led field on outside rails, kept pace reasonable without exerting, kept on soundly last 200 M but proved no match for inside horse.
Out in line, raced in midfield well off rails, ridden along when 3Ls down at 400 M, offered little over concluding stages.
Showed usual pace, took a trail behind leader on outside rail, hung from 600 M point, struggled when sprint went on, same pace late.
No early toe, ended up towards rear 4Ls off pace, raced greenly and shifted at 400 M, offered little thereafter.
Tardy to begin, recovered at came across to be 2Ls down in middle of course, overraced and raced keenly in middle stages. Compounded quickly last 300 M. (Lame morning after.)
Slow into stride, raced in midfield 3Ls back towards middle, travelled reasonably at 400 M but lacked extra gear and struggled late.
Out smartly, raced solo on inside rails, always level with leaders on outside, began to assert authority last 200 M and scored comfortably in finish.
Well enough to jump, raced close to lead towards outside rail, close enough at 300 M but had nothing to offer when they sprinted gradually fading out.
Began well, had enough pace to race 1L back a few horses from outside rail, still there at 300 M before condition gave out and weakened late.
Not much early pace, ended up 4Ls back at tail on stand side, niggled along from midpoint, got going from 200 M and closed off evenly late. (See Racing Incidents.)
From an outside barrier was taken back to settle in 2nd last position, 1 off with cover. Made some late ground in the run home.
Parked behind the leader along the fence, kept on at the same speed in the run to the wire.
Settled in last position. Not suited by the manner in which the race was run and therefore didn't run on.
Raced close to midfield, the fence. Never likely.
Went forward early to race outside the leader at a standard tempo. Was pressured by another runner rounding the home turn, but responded to the rider's urgings to draw away and win easily.
Weakened passing the 500 M after leading.
Travelled midfield 2-wide with cover. Rolled out to be 3-wide with cover to improve after the 600 M, failed to close off.
Settled midfield early, 1 off with cover. Went forward mid-race when the tempo steadied to race outside the leaders, 3 deep, no cover. Stayed on satisfactorily.
Raced along the fence at midfield. Kept on well after straightening but unable to sustain effort closing stages and missed a minor placing.
Raced along the rails behind the leader. 3Ls off the pace in 4th place making home turn. Stayed on well in the straight for a minor placing.
2-wide behind the leaders. Quickened on straightening and took the lead 200 M out. Opened up a clear advantage and stayed on well final stages to maintain a comfortable margin to the line.
Jumped awkwardly and was outpaced. Trailed field until straightening. Only ran past a couple of beaten runners.
3-wide and no worse than midfield. 5 to 6Ls off the lead at home turn. Lacked a response and weakened in the straight.

Crowded on jumping and dropped to rear section early stages. Improved to midfield 800 M out but was wide and without cover at the turn. Kept on same pace in the straight.
Showed good speed from widest draw and took the lead. Remained in front before tiring over the final 200 M.
No worse than midfield and was 4Ls off the pace 800 M out. Ran on well in the straight. Kept chasing but unable to gain ground on eventual winner final stages.
Off slowly and raced along the fence in behind midfield. Switched out after straightening and made up ground in the straight.
Botched the start and raced behind midfield. Near the back on straightening and ran on without threatening.
Behind midfield. 4-wide turning for home and only ran past a beaten runner.
Raced towards the rear. Hugged the rails at home turn and made up ground in the straight.
3-wide and no better than midfield. Took some time to find daylight after straightening and made up some late ground.
In 10th about 7Ls adrift of the early tempo, no closer taking final bend, steadied 300 M out but never likely to pose a serious threat.
Cushy 'one-out-one-back' spot at the 900 M and within about 2Ls of the speed until home bend, found nothing off the bit and beaten 200 M out.
Restrained in rear at least 9Ls from the speed down backstretch and similar on straightening, dashed home well down the centre to nick 3rd on the line.
Slowly away but soon recovered to hold the box-seat position until the 600 M, led about 300 M out and always in charge.
Slow to begin, 8Ls behind pace in 11th early on, 7Ls down in 10th turning in, still 4Ls down in midfield at 200 M, stayed on well to take 2nd close home.

3-back on fence at 1000 M in 5th when 3Ls off speed and same turning for home, given every chance to at least place but found wanting again.
Niggled along through early stages when 4Ls back in midfield, same position entering straight, broke down at 300 M.
Checked early on when 4-back on fence, ridden along when 6Ls down in 8th swinging for home, threatened to place but lacked the gears.
Trapped 3-wide no cover early on, pressed on to be 2-wide about 1L down in 2nd at final bend, led 500 M out but headed 300 M out, faded.
Led by 1L at 1100 M, clear until being ahead before the final bend, weakened further final 200 M.
In 12th about 8Ls adrift of the opening speed, even further back cornering for home, ran on strongly down the centre and just missed a place.
Went back from a wide gate, no better than 8Ls from the speed until final turn, never landed a blow.
3Ls back in 4th at 1000 M, headway on the circle to lead at top of home straight, headed by winner 250 M out, always just held thereafter. (Distressed.)
Disputed early tempo, 1L back in 2nd at the 600 M, a neck down in 2nd or 3rd turning in, steadily ceded ground.
Worse than midfield with cover 7Ls from the speed at halfway, 4Ls behind on straightening in midfield, couldn't make up enough ground.
Settled in 3rd about 2Ls from the front down backstretch, vying for lead on straightening out 3-wide, led by a neck 250 M out, kept on for pressure.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Led early on, disputed the pace at halfway but 1L clear at 600 M, headed again at top of home straight, stayed on admirably for a place.
Worse than midfield with cover 7Ls from the speed at halfway, still well back and forced wide turning for home, ran on strongly, nearest at finish.
On fence 6Ls back in 6th at the 800 M, progress on the circle to be just 2Ls off the lead making final bend, found zero under pressure and soon beaten.
3-wide no cover down backstretch when 5Ls or 6Ls back in 8th, closer but 5-wide turning for home, never dangerous from then on and yielded ground.
Keen at the 1000 M when about 6Ls back in midfield, headway at top of home straight but failed to sustain the bid and weakened final 200 M.
Went back from wide gate, about 9Ls last early on, about 6Ls down in rear on straightening, never on terms.
Went back from a wide gate, soon one from rear about 8Ls from the pace, improved on the circle and 4Ls back turning for home, soon beaten.
4-wide no cover worse than mid-div 6Ls from the speed down the back, 6-wide (widest) and beaten turning for home in rear, soon eased down.
On fence about 7Ls off pace at 1000 M, advanced to midfield about 4Ls down making final turn, failed to sustain the bid and beaten by the 200 M.
Eased at start to cross to the fence at rear, more than 10Ls off the good pace, never progressed.
Trapped 3 wide early, hard ridden to share the lead 2 wide at good pace, dropped back 1.5Ls off the leader from 1000 M, checked 400 M, insufficient room in part of straight, no progress.
Very slow away, at rear, 6.5Ls off the good pace, progressed around the field about 5 wide from 800 M, kept closing the race off strongly until 100 M when run ended.

No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Eased back, 8Ls behind the good pace 2-3 wide early, swept forward 3-4 wide at home bend to run home, however no dash.
Pushed to sit just behind the pace group 3 wide early, moved up 1000 M to share the lead at good pace outside the leader, soon out of fuel 300 M.
Parked 1.5Ls off the good pace 2 wide, swept 3 wide at home bend, ran on well until 250 M, weakened.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Eased to sit about midfield, 3Ls off the good pace 2 wide, travelled well until 600 M when carried back and lost ground, blocked 4-2, made ground when clear but too late.
Bumped start, at rear, 8Ls off the good pace 2 wide, progressed along the rails at home bend, lacked room in straight, however finished off fairly wen clear.
Settled along the fence in midfield, 3Ls behind the good pace, enjoyed ideal trip in early stages without being made used of, closed the race off steadily in straight to score a narrow victory.
Just behind midfield, 5.5Ls off the good pace 2 wide, made 4 wide a move from 500 M, finished off nicely to grab 3rd.
Took box-seat easily, travelled well behind the good pace, had every chance in top straight but no turn of foot, soon emptied 300 M.
Began fairly. Disputed lead. Hit front momentarily passing 200 M but soon swamped.
Soon tailed off. (Saddle shifted.)
Began fairly. Soon gained narrow advantage under pressure. Led or disputed lead until swamped over 200 M out.
Behind midfield early. Dropped out of contention rounding home bend.
Never better than midfield before home turn. Switched off rails to challenge upon straightening. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Broke well from poor draw and had to settle wide in midfield. Lost position rounding home bend and yielded more ground in straight.
Settled on rails just behind leaders. Obtained split shortly after straightening and ran on to gain upper hand over 100 M out. Just held on to the line.
Blundered badly jumping out losing considerable ground. Quickly recovered to midfield before home bend. Within 3Ls of pace turning in but soon weakened.
With leaders early from wide draw. 3-wide chasing leaders rounding home bend. Fought on steadily to just fail to get up on line.
Slightly slow out. Well back into straight. Ran on past beaten horses closing stages.
Mainly in one-out-one-back position to straight. Weakened.
Began awkwardly, ended up 4Ls away in midfield, suited by tempo in middle stages, same margin back turning, kept on soundly in stretch closing to make frame late.
Standard jump, drifted back to race 3 wide in rear division 6 to 7Ls back, aided by reasonable tempo, angled 4 wide on straightening, did best work late making good ground in straight.
No real early pace and restrained from a wide gate, ended up 3 wide at rear 8Ls or so from speed helped by fast tempo moved 4 wide on bend, made some late headway but not really likely.
Displayed usual pace to press on instead of lead, posted 3 wide without cover throughout, did share of work on circle, niggled along on turning, run ended at 200 M.
First to hit ground, took expected role in front however didn't have things own way with pressure from outside horse, kept pace genuine to bend, under siege turning, faded quickly last 300 M.

Reasonable jump, unable to get close to rails from an awkward draw, raced 3 wide with cover 4-5Ls back. Continued to cover ground on circle, finished off well in straight making gradual progress to be nearest on line.
No real pace, ended up at rear 8Ls back on fence, helped by tempo, niggled along to improve on bend, made no progress in run to line.
Away fairly, took a spot on rails 4Ls from lead, had a desirable run in mid-section with pace on, improved on fence turning, held up slightly at 300 M, shifted in and closed well last furlong.
Flat-footed at start and lost 5 lengths, regathered to race at rear on rails, shifted 2 wide but still 8Ls back at midpoint, improved on bend, passed a few tired runners in straight.

Knuckled on on jumping, taken back from a wide gate ended up 5Ls back in running line, appreciated fast pace on at top end, still back between horses leaving bend, came with a strong sprint last 200 M to score with authority late.

Displayed usual pace, unable to lead with fast early pace however camped 2Ls back with ideal trail, saved ground on rails on bend, angled clear on turning, went to them quickly at 250 M. No match for winner late.
Began well, took a prominent role 1 out 1 back 2Ls off solid tempo, travelled well in mid-section, moved 3 wide on bend, lacked a turn of foot and just plugged away in straight.
Fast into stride, showed plenty of pace to challenge for lead, kept pace genuine pressurizing leader, right there on turning and took over briefly at 400 M, workload took toll and faded out late.
Prominent. Loomed up to hold every chance over 200 M out but unable to sustain effort closing stages. (Blood in trachea.)
Settled in midfield. Commenced run upon straightening. Fought on under pressure to hit front close to home. Just held off late challengers.

Away reasonably, slotted in nicely behind pace group 4 to 5Ls back in 2 wide line, had an ideal trip in mid-section, between horses on turning, gave leader a reasonable start but stuck to task closing off nicely for 3rd.

Began evenly and ridden along to take closer order, posted 3 wide before obtaining spot outside leader, raced 1L away doing a bit with even pace on, ridden along on bend, quickly faded to be beaten a long way.

Restrained from a wide gate to take usual role at rear, raced 11 to 12Ls back, suited by tempo in middle stages, saved ground on rails on bend, made ground along inside to 100 M but couldn't close further late.
Moderately into stride, ended up 3Ls away on fence trailling a solid pace, niggled along on bend, didn't have much to offer and eased out by jockey. (See Racing Incidents.)
Attempted to restrain but pulled way forward in midfield, did it hard way without cover 4Ls off leaders, suited 4 wide leaving bend, didn't have much to offer in straight and weakened out tamely.

Showed early pace to take up a prominent role on back of leader, had a reasonable run although pace was even, eased out on turning, went to lead quickly at 300 M and drew clear, held off fast finisher late.
Didn't have much pace from gate, raced nearly 10Ls away in 2 wide line, pace helped in mid-section, switched 3 wide on bend, made gradual progress down middle in straight to be nearest on line.

No early pace and ended up more than 10Ls back at rear, pace played into hands in mid-section, same margin back making a 3 wide run on bend, came wider into straight and closed hard from impossible spot for 4th.

Slow into stride, settled behind midfield 7Ls back in running line, helped by reasonable pace on, still back between horses turning, into clear at 300 M and flashed home last furlong to go down by narrow margin.

Fastest out, crossed to take up running, kept pace genuine carving out even sectionals, held a length on circle and still just in front turning, didn't have another dash from 300 M and was one paced in straight.
Began well then settled 2-wide in midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Soon took up running and attempted to make all. Came under pressure to hold advantage in straight only to be caught final strides.
Began fairly then failed to muster. Raced wide in midfield. Took closer order at Rock. Soon weakened after straightening.
Very slowly away losing many lengths. Trailed the main field to straight. Only ran past well beaten horses.
Reared at start and left the gates awkwardly. Never in contention.
Travelled behind midfield on rails. Saved ground on inside turning in. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Broke well. Settled 2-wide in 4th within 3Ls of pace. Similar turning in. Kept on steadily under pressure early in straight before finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Raced wide just worse than midfield. Took closer order at Rock and still wide turning in. Plugged on under pressure.
Raced in forward of midfield on rails. Commenced run upon straightening. Fought on well down inner inside final 300 M to just fail to get up on line.

Began well from poor draw. Taken back to race wide without cover in prominent positions early. Improved to hold 1L 2nd outside leader passing 800 M. Similar turning in but soon gave ground in straight.
Broke well and led briefly, settling just off the pace in 3rd on rails. Came to challenge upon straightening and fought on to just gain upper hand in the shadows of the post.
Began fairly. Travelled in last few. Only produced moderate effort in straight.
Was slow to begin then worked hard from a wide gate to go forward. Caught wide making the first turn. Was able to assume the lead soon after, 1 off, find little in straight, then handed up at 600 M.
Was slow to begin, then from a wide gate was taken to the rear and settled a long last. Stayed on the paint in the straight and went to the line strongly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced on the back of the leaders along the fence. Hit the lead near the 200 M and drew a margin to score in good fashion.

Went forward however was caught wide making the first turn after the 1000 M. Raced handy to the leaders, 3-wide with cover. Was left racing 3 deep without cover passing the 600 M, and struggled thereafter.

Was joint leader in the early stages before being headed near the 900 M. Rolled to lead after the 700 M & maintained that position until near the 200 M. Didn't offer much resistance thereafter and faded in the latter stages.
Camped on the back of the speed, 2-wide with cover. Gave in quickly in the run to the post.
Travelled in 2nd last position, 1 off with cover. Improved 3-wide with cover approaching the home turn and ran on well.
Up with the leaders early however was checked near the 1000 M after being 3-wide. Settled midfield 2 off. Was a beaten horse before the home turn.
Raced behind midfield the fence & copped a check near the 900 M. Ran on without threatening.
Settled midfield the fence. Made some ground in the run to the wire along the inside.
Ridden along out of the gates and was among early leaders. 3-wide no cover and better than midfield in back straight. 3Ls off the leader turning for home. Only kept same pace in the straight.
Jumped well and raced in a forward spot. 2-wide and within a length of the leader back straight. Took the lead on straightening but was headed final 50 M.
Crowded on jumping and raced towards the rear. Swung widest turning in and rallied for a minor placing.
Better than midfield. 3-wide and 3Ls off the leader making home turn. Remained on same pace in the straight.
Settled in rear section. Hugged the rails at home turn and made up some ground in the straight.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Raced along the rails at midfield. Made a ground saving trip around home turn and was 2Ls off the pace turning in. Kept on well in the straight but was unable to keep pace with winner final stages.
Missed the jump and raced at the rear. Became detached and finished tailed out.
Jumped fairly but unable to find enough speed to obtain a forward spot. Raced wide and without cover at midfield. Remained wide making home turn and weakened in the straight.
Raced 2-wide and no better than midfield. Pressured at the home turn to keep pace. Ran on only fairly in the straight.
Raced in a prominent spot behind the leader. Switched out and quickened on straightening. Among contenders 200 M out but unable to find enough to remain in the hunt final stages.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Caught 4-wide no cover early but eased into 2-wide position disputing the speed until final bend, tired through final 200 M.
10Ls last early on and 8Ls adrift off home bend, ran on past a few tired rivals late.
3-back on fence in 5th about 3Ls or 4Ls from the pace through to homestretch, had his chance to place but lacked the acceleration.
Disputed early tempo on fence and same through to homestretch, weakened out before the 200 M.
Box-seated on fence 2Ls back in 3rd or 4th until home straight, poked through to lead 250 M out, did enough to win.
3-wide with cover early and slotted into one-out-one-back position 2Ls back in 4th until home turn, dropped out very tamely.
About 4-back on fence in 7th at halfway and same turning for home, not much room 150 M out, ran on well for a place once clear.
Held 7th or 8th place about 4Ls or 5Ls from the lead at halfway when hanging in, never troubled principals.
Worse than midfield about 6Ls from the speed early, hung out at halfway, not much room 150 M out but never likely to figure anyway.
Got back about 8Ls from the speed in rear, under pressure to try and improve 500 M out, very one-paced. (Saddle shifted.)
One from rear about 10Ls from the initial speed, still well back on straightening, made some decent late ground, nearest at the finish.
2Ls or 3Ls back in 5th from early stages until homestretch, ran on strongly but just short of catching the winner.
8Ls back in 10th at 1200 M and much the same swinging for home out 4-deep, ran on well late, nearest at the finish.
Midfield on fence about 5Ls back in 6th at the 1200 M, tight for room and unbalanced into home straight, closed off tamely.
Nicely placed about 2Ls from the pace on fence in 2nd or 3rd until taking final turn, given every chance to place but could only stay on at same pace.
2-wide and 3Ls back in 3rd at 1200 M, kicked on to lead 600 M out and 1L clear turning in, headed inside final 50 M and lost 2nd in shadows of post.
On fence and 6Ls down in 7th at 1200 M, hindered before turning 3-wide for home, ran on very strongly down the centre to lead in final strides.
Checked exiting gates, 7Ls back in 8th out 2-wide at 1200 M and only marginally closer off home bend, kept on without quickening.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Over-raced early on, in rear on fence about 8Ls or so from the lead until the home straight, made some late ground but posed no great threat.
Pressed on out wide to lead on fence by 2Ls at 1200 M, slowed tempo and headed 600 M out, 1L down in 2nd off final turn, swamped at the 200 M.
4Ls down on fence in 4th at 1200 M, keen in places, same margin off in 5th swinging for home, very one-paced.
10Ls last at 1200 M and not much better when turning for home out widest (5-wide), made up only moderate ground late.
5Ls back in 5th out 2-wide at 1200 M, 4Ls back in 4th on straightening, picked up well to lead briefly inside final 50 M but headed in final strides.
Eased back and took rail, on heels early and dropped to rear 9Ls behind the leader, favoured by the fast pace, swept forward 2 to 4-wide at home bend, made ground 250 M. (See Racing Incidents.)

Very slow away, pushed immediately to gain a midfield spot, 3Ls off the leader along the fence, favoured by the fast pace and the rails-run, made ground steadily 300 M to run 2nd, just missed in a ding-dong finish.
Eased back, 6-1/2Ls behind the leader 2-wide, benefited by the fast pace, lacked room at 400 M, progressed steadily when clear, closed off strongly for 3rd.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Pushed early, lacked early speed, 4-1/2Ls off the leader, trapped 3-wide throughout and lost too much ground, suited by the fast pace but ran on only fairly in final stages.
Easily obtained the box seat, not suited by the fast early sectionals, ran on well and held ground in straight despite hanging.
Pushed early but failed to muster speed, 4-1/2Ls off the leader in midfield 2-wide, helped by the fast pace however flattened in straight.
Slowly away, hard ridden to keep up in midfield along the rails, 4-1/2Ls off the leader, benefited by the fast tempo, checked 350 M, lacked its usual strong dash, made ground last 150 M.
Eased to rear, took rail 8Ls off the leader, benefited by the fast pace, progressed steadily 250 M along the fence to win by a narrow margin.
Hard ridden to go forward, 1-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, harmed by the fast pace, faded 400 M.
Held the fence and led by 1L at disadvantageous fast early sectionals, under pressure throughout, hung on until 50 M when overhauled, beaten in 4th but kept on well to the line.
Prominent, eased to sit 1L off the leader, trapped 3-wide throughout and lost too much ground, not suited by the fast tempo, dropped off 600 M.
Broke well. Settled one back on rails in 2nd, travelling in steady pace despite tearaway leader far side. 1L 3rd turning in and hit front briefly inside 200 M. Winner too strong.
Prominent. Improved to 1L 2nd into straight. Faded under pressure.
Mainly in forward of midfield to straight. Soon weakened.
Travelled better than midfield. Similar turning in. Fought on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Settled in rear. Ran home one-paced.
Swiftly obtained rails run in midfield after beginning from poor draw. Held similar position far side and slightly worse around home bend. Burst through runners inside 200 M to lead late. Won well.
Well back. Commenced move around home bend. Widest runner turning for home. Ran on down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Soon took up running. Went over 4Ls clear of rest far side. Came back to field around home bend. Headed and dropped out under pressure inside 150 M.
Settled just behind midfield. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Midfield early. Wide towards rear far side. Effort rounding home bend. Gradually faded.
Settled towards rear. Ran on well down straight to be nearest at finish.
No early pace and assumed role towards rear 8Ls back, pace against with steady sections, still well back on bend in difficult position, didn't make impression in straight lacking usual close.

Began with more purpose and hit ground first, raced in 1 out 1 back spot with an ideal run, helped by little pace on to bend, angled out into better ground, hit lead at 150 M and kept finding extra to score.
Out with rest, taken back to slot in on rails 6Ls back, unsuited by tempo in mid-section, still well back on turning, made some even headway between horses in straight to be nearest on line.
Began in line, caught wide and drifted back to race 6Ls back in 2-wide line, not helped by speed, made a run between horses in straight but had no turn of foot and faded out last bit.
Showed usual pace to hold leaders back, had a quiet run with steady sections, travelled well on bend, cut back to inside and made solid progress to go down by a narrow margin.
Began fairly, took a nice trailing position 3Ls back on fence, had a dream run in mid-section, in some traffic on turning but had chance in straight and couldn't find enough to be a factor.

Out in line, took a midfield berth and angled to rails 4-5Ls back, saved ground on bend without a clear run and unbalanced at 200 M, make even progress at same speed before getting on heels very late.
Began well, sped across from an outside gate to race outside leader, had a soft run with steady tempo, still 1L away passing Rock, came with the contenders at 200 M but just flattered last 50 M.

Restrained from a wide draw, ended up 7-8Ls back on rails, unsuited by slow pace, made some improvement passing Rock, still in impossible spot turning, closed hard making many lengths to just miss place.

Reasonable break, pushed on to take up running leaving straight, dictated terms to suit with leisurely sections, held on length advantage on turning, gave in quickly last 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
No early speed, drifted back to race 6Ls back in running line, not helped by steady pace throughout, switched 3-wide on bend, switched to better ground and made plenty of ground for 3rd.
Began nicely, up sharing lead 3 wide without cover, travelled well throughout with pace to suit, took over at 400 M, put a margin on rivals and kept on well last 200 M to score comfortably.
No pace as expected, took up usual spot 5Ls back 2 wide sharing tail, slow sectionals against, still 4Ls down on turning, made even progress between horses in straight to make frame.

Failed to muster and was allowed to drift back towards rear, raced 5Ls back 3 wide with cover, pace didn't help, made a 4 wide run on circle, progressed gradually in straight before closing nicely late for 2nd.
Reasonable break, raced 3 wide with cover 2Ls back, hung out and ran wide leaving bend, never likely thereafter and weakened out of it.
Out with line, pressed on to race outside leader, helped by pace but joined inside horse throughout, struggling on turning in, gave in weakly in straight to be beaten a long way.
No early pace, mustered to race 3Ls back behind leader, there to bend, found little turning and weakened badly to be beaten a long way.

Only standard to jump but soon mustered to share lead, travelled evenly but on bridle with pressure from outside horse, set sectionals to suit, tackled on turning and gave in easily fading out late. (Mucus.)
Began in line, slotted into ideal trail 1 out 1 back, had a reasonable run on the back of the speed. Still right there on bend, produced only a one-paced finish holding ground in run to line.
Standard jump, took a spot in midfield 2 wide 3 to 4Ls back, pace not a benefit, came 3 wide on bend 2Ls down turning, finished race off evenly to take 3rd.
Tardy to begin, ended up 4Ls back on rails, not helped by pace but saved ground on bend, lacked usual close only making ground to 200 M before flattened.
Amongst first to jump, pressed on to race 4 wide outside leaders, did it tough without cover but aided by speed, 1L down turning, had run took toll fading out last 300 M.
Slow into stride, ended up amongst last few 4 to 5Ls off lead, racing 2 wide, not helped by tempo, last on turning and held up early in straight, made even progress last 250 M from impossible spot.
Raced wide and without cover, midfield for the major part of the race. Struggled over the last 200 M.
Travelled midfield, 4-wide no cover for most of the trip. Hung out near the 700 M, and was checked. Was last turning for home, made some late ground on weakening runners.
Slow to jump and raced back in the race along the fence. Kept to the inside but didn't run on.
Positioned near the tail of the field, 3-wide with cover. Shifted out & went forward after the 800 M, 4 deep no cover, went to the line one paced.
Parked on the back of the leader. Peeled out early in the straight and gave plenty under strong riding to hold off rivals.
Travelled behind midfield, 1 off with cover. Rolled out to have plenty of galloping room in the straight but failed to find any extra when asked and finished off moderately.
Slow to begin and settled 1 off, 3 back with cover. Came wide turning for home and ranged up to challenge the leader but came up marginally short at the post.
Raced 3/4 of a length back & to the leaders outside until obtaining cover near the 800 M faded quickly passing the 200 M. Had every chance.
Travelled in last position. Never likely.
Led at even clip. Kept on soundly in the run to the line.
Slowly away and raced near the rear of the field 1 off with cover. Commenced to work into the race near the 600 M, straightened up 3-4 deep, ridden vigorously, worked to the line fairly.
Was caught 3-wide & without cover while going forward. Folded over to race upsides the leader near the 800 M, hung out rounding the home turn commenced to tire inside the furlong.
Settled in rear section. Steadily made up ground in the straight.
Took the lead near 1000 M. Continued to hold a 1/2L lead 200 M out but unable to find more to remain in contention final stages.
Settled 2-wide at midfield. Spent some time looking for a clear run after straightening. Closed the race off only fairly once finding daylight.
Dropped to rear from widest draw and trailed field until straightening. Rallied and swept past the entire field to win with some ease.
No worse than midfield but was 3-wide and without cover. Hampered and carried wider at 800 M. Unable to quicken after straightening and weakened in the final stages.
Jumped awkwardly and raced towards the rear. Made a ground saving trip around the circle but didn't find much in the straight.
Pushed along to get to a forward spot. Raced outside the leader making home turn. Kept chasing but unable to turn up a notch. Remained on same pace final stages.
Settled 3-wide behind midfield. Rallied in the straight but unable to keep pace with eventual winner final stages.
Led briefly at the start. Settled in a prominent spot behind the pace. Switched out on straightening kept on fairly for a minor placing.
Raced along the fence at midfield. 3Ls off turning for home, in traffic at 300 M but only kept on same pace in the straight.
Among early leaders. Hanging around the turn, 3-wide and a length off the pace turning for home. Steadily faded in the home straight. (Restricted action morning after racing.)
Slow to start, 1L back in 5th early on, still thereabouts at halfway but gave ground in final 400 M.
Nicely placed on stands' rail about a neck down in 2nd or so through first half, struggling to lie up at 200 M and beaten when checked 100 M out.
On stands' rail in midfield about 2Ls from the pace through first half, switched right to challenge 200 M out and only just missed a place.
Led early on, clear by about a neck before being headed 200 M out, petered out in final furlong.
Always in front rank within 1L of the speed, led about 200 M out, driven out to hold a neck margin, gamely.
Midfield within 2Ls of the speed nearest the far rail down centre of the track until halfway, steadily lost touch through latter stages.
On stands' rail worse than midfield about 3Ls from the early pace, ran on well for a place while hanging in.
Soon racing about 5Ls last, still well back at 200 M, stayed on fairly past a few beaten rivals but posed no threat.
Niggled along at halfway when towards rear about 4Ls from the speed, faded out.
Under pressure at halfway to maintain midfield position, didn't succeed and very weak final 200 M.
Checked at the start, midfield no better than 2Ls from the pace early, struggling to make a serious impact at 200 M, always held thereafter.
Switched from far side towards stands' rail and 1L off speed from 600 M to vie for the lead 200 M out, always just held by the winner.
On terms within about 2Ls of the pace until halfway, weakened sharply final 250 M.
Within 2Ls of the early speed, 1L down in 5th at the 400 M, gave ground thereafter.
Best away, 2Ls down in 2nd at the 800 M, 1L back in 2nd on straightening and travelling well, weakened as soon as briefly hitting the front 250 M out.
Held up in midfield about 6Ls off pace at halfway and edged a little closer at top of straight, stayed on okay to nick 4th close home.
Always in rear bunch at least 7Ls from the pace, never got any closer.
Slowest away and no early pace, always rear and 8Ls back one from rear turning in, made only very minor late ground.
Trapped 3 and 4-wide no cover throughout, was at least 7Ls off the pace until home turn, made no impact.
Fractious in the gates, pressed on out wide to lead by 2Ls on fence at 800 M, 1L clear entering final 400 M, wilted once headed 250 M out.
Settled in 3rd about 3Ls behind the early pace, 2Ls down in 3rd on straightening, dug in well to lead 150 M out, ridden out.
In 4th between 3Ls and 5Ls behind the speed through to home straight, stayed on fairly for a place.
Towards rear about 8Ls off the early pace and much the same swinging for home, no impression while hanging out badly on the run-in.
Last throughout, with 10Ls to make up turning for home, left further behind and eased down a long way out.
Raced on fence in 5th about 4Ls or 5Ls from the speed until home turn, ran on well for 2nd but never likely to grab the winner.
Slowly away, on fence 6Ls back in 6th at halfway, failed to get any closer.
Eased to sit behind the lead, 2Ls off the leaders 2-wide, helped by the slow tempo, however just held ground in straight.
Very slow away, pushed forward to hold a spot behind midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the leaders along the fence, harmed by the slow tempo, held up for running 4-2, ran on well when clear, checked 100 M.
Pushed to occupy the box seat, favoured by the slow early tempo, ran on well and threatened at top of straight until 150 M emptied.
Eased early to sit behind the lead, however raced keenly, allowed to go forward at 1000 M and led by 1/2L, favoured by the slow early sectionals, dominated rest of the trip to score nicely.
Hard ridden to sit 1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, helped by the slow tempo, soon out of fuel 300 M.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Eased at start to cross the rails towards rear, 6Ls behind the leaders, not suited by the slow pace, closed only fairly in final stages.
Eased to sit worse than midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the leaders, trapped 3-wide and lost ground, raced keenly, harmed by the slow pace, no turn of foot in last quarter. (Mucopus.)
Slow away, but soon gained a midfield spot, 3Ls off the leaders 2-wide, dashed strongly 250 M to finish 2nd despite harmed by the slow pace.

Eased back, checked early, 8Ls off the leaders, trapped 3 to 4-wide throughout, lost too much ground on bend and harmed by the slow pace, ran on ok in final stages. (Restricted action morning after racing.)
Eased to sit about midfield, 3Ls off the leaders, trapped 3-wide without cover, raced keenly, not suited by the slow pace, unbalanced 300 M, stayed flat until 100 M to demonstrate little dash.
Midfield, 3Ls off the leaders along the fence, not suited by the slow early sectionals, dashed well 200 M to grab 3rd.
Very slow away, eased to sit at back, 6-1/2Ls off the leaders, not suited by the slow pace, ran on ok in straight.
Hampered at start. Never far off the pace in main group on stands side. Quickened to hit front inside 200 M but caught close home.
Began well, then adopted patient tactic near the centre of the straight stalking SACRED KINGDOM. Produced for a run inside 300 M and fought on doggedly under pressure to just get up on line.

Badly squeezed at start, dropping to rear. Quickly shifted to stands rails and raced in rear. Commenced move coming onto course proper only to obtain split inside 300 M. Fought on steadily without quickening.
Ploughed a lonely furrow along inside rails and within 2Ls of main group leader on grandstand side. Weakened over 300 M out.
Began well to lead alongside stands rails, holding narrow advantage before headed about 300 M out. Kept on under pressure for a placing.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Chased leader along stands rails. Weakened out of contention inside 400 M.
Broke well and gradually crossed to outside rails to race to race inside leader. Weakened from over 200 M out.
Even getaway, took a nice spot 4Ls of early speed, enjoyed run of race in mid-section, angled 3 wide leaving bend, made plenty of ground in straight to narrowly go down. Well clear of 3rd.
Fast away, went forward to look for lead, sat 1L back 2 wide, enjoyed an even trip when pace slackened, same margin back turn, went to lead at 200 M and fought strongly to hold off late challenger.
Slowly away and lost considerable ground, ended up 8Ls back near rear, pace against and made a 3 wide move on circle, came 5 wide turning and worked home evenly down centre to be nearest on line.

Began well and soon after took up running, pressured a little early but had an easy time thereafter when pace slackened, controlled race to bend, 1L clear turning, there to 250 M but had no dash and just held ground late.
No pace as usual, raced in rear division 7Ls back on rails, not helped when pace slowed in mid-section, saved ground on bend, worked home nicely along fence making good ground for 4th.
Out with rest, ended up in midfield 5Ls back, advantaged early but unsuited when tempo slowed, shuffled back on bend, made solid progress when clear at 250 M but couldn't match first two.
Bounced out, had a look for lead but settled for trail 2Ls away on rails, had an even run after working early, same margin back on turning, no dash in straight and plugged home last 300 M.
Slow to begin and lost ground when checked, raced 10Ls back at rear, unsuited by tempo in mid-section, still well back to bend, found little in run home just battling in straight.

Standard beginning, ended up behind midfield 6Ls back, not helped by standard speed, made a move 3 wide on bend, within striking distance but lacked usual finishing burst and weakened out tamely in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Standard jump, raced 3 wide in midfield without cover 5Ls back, improved when pace slackened, 3Ls back turning, couldn't dash and weakened out after a hard run.
Even getaway, slotted in to a spot 4Ls back on rails, had an even run in middle stages, angled 2 wide on bend, no turn of foot in straight and just stuck on at same speed.
Settled in midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Raced in rear. Made up good ground down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Raced mostly 3-wide in midfield. Commenced move 300 M out and responded well to take charge close to home.
Raced one-back in 3rd on rails about 2Ls off the pace. Similar turning in and kept on until overhauled inside final 200 M.
Slightly slow at start. Trailed the field most of way. Made no show.
Began well to lead and gradually crossed to rails. Made running, driven 2Ls clear 200 M out before worn down when tiring badly closing stages.
Settled in last few. Saved ground on inside turning in. Made good impression between runners to be nearest at finish.
Began well from poor draw and raced in 2nd outside leader. Yielded ground gradually after straightening.
Broke well. Settled in one-out-one-back position in 4th. Lost position when slightly wider turning in. One-paced when slightly inconvenienced 300 M out. No further impression.
Travelled in better than mid-division on rails in 3L 5th. Similar turning in but soon swamped.
Began fairly. Raced on rails in midfield. Gave ground from home bend.
Raced wide in rear of midfield to straight. Ran on steadily under pressure down centre of track without threatening.
Settled in rear from poor draw racing wide. Took closer order around field making home bend. Kept on well in straight.
Towards rear. Not much room between and behind runners early in straight. Ran home well enough to reach 3rd closing stages.

First to hit ground, took prominent role outside leader 1/2L back, had an easy time with slow tempo, same margin down turning, kept to task and drew level at 200 M, held advantage to line to score solid win.
Tardy to begin, ended up in rearward spot as usual, raced 6Ls back on rails, found pace unsuitable throughout, saved ground on bend, made many lengths from an impossible spot to just miss 3rd.
Slow into stride, raced behind midfield 5Ls from leaders, travelled fairly despite not being run to suit, used little to bend, progressed steadily in straight but offered little last 200 M.
Failed to muster from jump, settled in running line 5Ls off pace, not helped when pace steadied in traffic, on bend, not clear until 250 M and finished off fairly before peaking last 100 M.
Well enough to begin, took a prominent spot on leaders back, had run of race but travelled a bit keenly with slow pace, struggled when they sprinted and dropped right out late.
Allowed to drift back from a wide draw, ended up 4-wide behind midfield 5-6Ls back, pace against in mid-section, still well back on turning, made solid progress last 300 M to be nearest on line.
Had natural speed to lead them easily, set tempo to suit 1/2L clear in front, increased speed on turning, joined at 200 M but fought on strongly to hold 2nd strong effort.
Even getaway, ended up 3Ls back on fence, enjoyed a soft run with steady pace on, close enough 2-wide 2Ls back turning, didn't find a great deal and struggled last 200 M.
No pace, ended up 3-wide sharing rear 6 or more lengths back, slow sections played against, still well back on turning, finished off reasonably down centre but set too great a task.
Out well, raced keenly early and pulled way into forward spot 3-wide without cover, helped by pace, still 2Ls back turning, found little when they sprinted and weakened easily.
Standard jump, settled 3-wide in midfield 4Ls back with cover, not helped by steady pace, travelled well on bend, eased wider turning and closed race off nicely in straight to take placing.
No early toe and took a spot near rear 6Ls back in 2-wide line, slow pace harmed chances in middle stages, still had job to do approaching bend, made only minor headway in straight.
No early speed, took a spot 3-wide in midfield 5Ls back, forced 4-wide on circle and not helped by slow pace struggling on turning in, dropped out tamely.
Raced wide without cover in prominent position far side. Gave ground around home bend. Towards rear into straight. No further impression.
Towards rear. Saved ground on inside turning in. Produced some late impression closing stages.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Settled in midfield far side. Improved to 3-wide position within 3Ls of pace in 5th rounding home bend. Had no more to give under pressure in the straight.
Raced in midfield on rails. Took closer order after Rock improving to one-back position in 4th around home bend. Sustained progress along rails to lead inside 200 M and soon drew clear.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Began fairly settling wide in midfield. Slightly further behind turning in. Made no progress in straight.
Niggled at early to hold rails run in close-up 2nd. Disputed lead entering straight, hitting front when straightened. Headed inside 200 M when tiring.
Behind midfield early. Dropped out noticeably from Rock. Tailed-off home bend.

Always well there settling mainly in one-out-one-back position to straight. Soon came under pressure to challenge upon straightening and ran on steadily to claim 2nd inside 100 M. (Rider lost whip 250 M.)

Began with others but threw his head about and lost considerable ground. Trailed the field before making headway up the Rock. Towards rear turning in and ran home one-paced. (Abnormal breathing noise.)
Slightly slow out and remained in rear throughout. Never seen with a chance.
Ridden along early & took up leading duties on the rail. Kept leading well into the straight but faded on its run over the concluding stages.
Raced 1 off on the back of the speed. Had every chance.
Raced behind midfield, 2-wide with cover. No petrol left in the straight weakening noticeably.

For the major part of the race travelled wide and without cover outside the leaders. Finished tailed out before being permitted to race again must perform to the satisfaction of the Stewards in an official barrier trial.
Travelled 2-wide in a midfield position. Was steadied rounding the home turn, gave ground thereafter.
Slow into stride and settled 1 off in 2nd last position. Ran on well.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Settled midfield the fence. Stayed on the paint in the straight, responded valiantly when placed under pressure to get the prize on the line.

As the start was effected put its head down and as a consequence lost a considerable amount of ground settling last on the fence. Was checked near the 1000 M, and despite this ran on satisfactorily over the final stages.
Camped behind the leader along the fence, drew clear after the 150 M, but was caught on the post.
