In the early and middle stages travelled in a handy position but wide and without cover and commenced to give ground at the 500 M. Struggled in the run to the line.
From an outside barrier was taken back to a position behind midfield along the fence. Didn't make much impact in the run to the finish.
Behind the pace early stages. Settled in midfield after 1200 M. Improved to within 2Ls of the leader turning for home but only remained on same pace the rest of the way.
Lead or disputed lead until 1200 M. Raced behind the pace in back straight. Struggled to keep up 600 M out and weakened in the home straight.
Taken back to a rearward spot. Made progress from 800 M out and improved to within 3Ls of the leader at home turn. Ran on fairly in the straight.

Wide without cover at midfield early stages. Allowed to stride forward to be outside the leader 1500 M out. Took the lead at 1100 M and maintained advantage until final 250 M. Unable to find more to stay in contention.
Raced in rear section. Had a ground saving trip around home turn. Ran on well and continued to make up ground in the straight.
Raced outside the leader early stages. 2-wide behind the pace in the back straight. Struggled to keep up at the home turn and weakened in the home straight.
Raced at midfield. Swung wide turning for home, kept on fairly and made up ground in the early part of the straight. Unable to sustain effort over the final stages.
Jumped well but allowed to slide back. Behind midfield early stages and slipped to the rear upon entering back straight. Trailed field on straightening and only ran past beaten runners.
Soon trailed field. Towards the rear at the home turn and switched out on straightening. Rallied and closed the race off strongly.
Behind the pace early stages. 3 to 4Ls off the lead in 4th position back straight. Improved to within a length on straightening. Took the lead 250 M out and kept on well to hold off late challengers.
Began with them, took up coveted 1 out 1 back spot, had run of race however niggled along on bend, clear running appeared on turning but lacked on extra gear and just held ground in run to line.
Moderate getaway, ended up at tail 5 or so more lengths back, never really travelled in run, struggling on bend and made no impression in straight.
Fast into stride, took a forward position outside the leader, suited when pace steadied, still 1L down on turning, had no extra when they dashed and closed at same rate to line.

Restrained from outset, ended up 6 to 7Ls away on rails, harmed when speed slowed, continued to improve on circle, made good headway in straight before being held up at 100 M. Not fully tested. (See Racing Incidents.)
Showed plenty of dash to lead them from widest gate, slackened speed to suit after early burn, controlled race to bend, held a 1L advantage turning and kicked but struggled last 150 M when run ended.
No pace as usual, settled behind midfield 5Ls back in 2-wide line, not helped when pace slowed, travelled soundly to take placing.
Out with them, pushed on but unable to slot in, posted 3-wide without cover 2Ls back, pace helped but kept working to bend, offered little in straight dropping out late.
Began well, took a sit on leaders back, enjoyed an easy run when pace slowed, close enough on turning in, run opened on straightening in and threatened to 100 M but condition gave out last bit.

Out in line, took a trail on rails 3Ls off pace, enjoyed ideal run saving ground throughout, held up at 400 M, dashed smartly from 200 M to have race in keeping by 100 M holding rivals safely thereafter.
Slow into stride, took up spot 8Ls back sharing rear, not helped by steady pace, still had job to do on bend, couldn't find enough to be in contention.
Failed to muster, ended up 5Ls back in running line, unsuited when pace steadied, had something to offer on bend but didn't let down in straight producing a only one-paced effort.
Began only fairly, outpaced early, settled 4L or so back on fence, had an easy time in middle stages, ridden along on bend, wound up late charging between horses to take 2nd.
Settled in midfield. Commenced move when wide at top of home bend. Kept on same pace to finish.
Prominent. Badly hampered passing winning post the first time. Never far off on rails improving to one-back position after Rock. In similar position in 3rd into straight. Soon found no extra.

Began fairly. Held rails run in 2nd before leader crossing to rails coming out of home straight. Renewed effort rounding home bend sharing pace into straight. Hit front 200 M out but unable to sustain effort and swamped 100 M.
Travelled mainly in forward of midfield on rails. Similar turning for home. Came to challenge upon straightening and responded well to take charge closing stages.
Raced just worse than midfield. Steadied for a run inside 250 M. Kept on to finish.
Raced wide in midfield to 400 M. Weakened.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Settled in last few. Came to challenge turning in. Ran on steadily under pressure down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Began fairly. Settled mainly in rear of midfield on rails. One-paced under pressure in the run home.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Settled at the back. Last into straight. Finished off race strongly inside final 200 M. Did best work late.
Prominent to straight. Soon weakened after straightening.
Prominent, 1-1/2Ls off the good pace 2-wide, travelled well until 300 M faded rapidly.
Pushed forward and took rail, then eased to settle in box seat, 1-1/2Ls off the good pace, led 200 M, ran on strongly to the line, just missed win by a narrow margin in last few strides.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Settled behind the front running group, 3Ls off the good pace along the fence, momentarily held up 400 M, progressed steadily 300 M to win by a short head.
Eased to sit about midfield, 3Ls off the good pace 2-wide, no turn of foot in straight, weakened 200 M.
Eased back, 7Ls off the good pace 2-wide, raced keenly, made ground 200 M lately.
Eased back, trapped 3-wide throughout and lost ground, never better than midfield.
Midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the good pace 2-wide, blocked and checked 300 M, ran on ok when clear.
Hard ridden to take the rail and led at good pace, hung on until 200 M overhauled, ran on well for 3rd.
Eased to rear, never competitive.
Eased to rear, 8-1/2Ls. off the good pace, trapped 3-wide throughout, lost too much ground at bends, no progress.
Eased at start and crossed towards rails, 5Ls off pace about midfield, helped by the rail-run, but just held ground in straight.
Jumped best and ridden along to maintain early speed. Ceded advantage turning into far side to be one-back on rails. Similar turning in and hit front briefly over 200 M out but caught closing stages.
Travelled in forward of midfield to straight. Only produced moderate headway without ever threatening.
Niggled at to muster early pace after beginning fairly. Travelled towards rear and wide and dropped to last into straight.
Tight at start. Settled in midfield or slightly worse 2-wide down far side. Went wider around home bend and into straight. Fought on under pressure without quickening.
Settled in rear. Made ground steadily down inner of straight to be nearest at finish.

Began well. Settled 3-wide in midfield early. Drifted backward along far side dropping to last few. Renewed effort coming out circling field around home bend and wide into straight. Produced moderate impression in straight.
Sluggish at start. Soon picked up on rails to be just worse than midfield. Saved ground turning in. Worked home nicely to be nearest at finish.

Broke fairly from wide draw. Soon ridden to take up running turning into far side, crossing to rails approaching Rock. Held 2Ls advantage around home bend and into straight. Soon found nothing under pressure.
Always well back. Did nothing in the straight.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Settled in 4th or 3rd mostly about 3Ls off the speed far side. Not much better turning in and soon weakened.
Settled in first few within striking distance. Came to challenge upon straightening hitting front under hands and heels riding about 100 M out. Won well.

Standard jump, ended up in rearward division 5Ls back in 2-wide line, aided by reasonable tempo, carted back by tiring horse on rails before bend, finished off nicely along inside but no match for winner.
Displayed usual pace to challenge for front, unable to lead but continued to apply pressure to leader, kept pace genuine to bend, still challenging turning but peaked on run last 100 M.
Average getaway, raced 5-6Ls away in running line, travelled well with pace on, made a 3-wide run passing Rock, kept to task in straight doing best work late to make frame.
Slow to begin, raced detached 9 or so lengths back, niggled along to improve throughout, still well back on bend, only passed tired runners and was well beaten.

Allowed to drift back from an awkward alley, posted 3-wide with cover in midfield, did share of work and hampered badly by tiring horse at 400 M, got going again late making some headway when race was over.
Out with rest, ended up 3-4Ls back in 2-wide line, urged along at mid-point, didn't travel and weakened noticeably from 500 M point. (See Racing Incidents - never comfortable.)
Began in line, slotted in nicely to 1 out 1 back spot, had an even run but did share of work with solid pace, niggled along on bend, one-paced in straight and just battled last bit.

Began in line, taken down to fence, had an ideal run 4Ls back on fence, benefitted with pace on, tracked into race on bend, came to middle and asserted authority last 200 M to draw away and score comfortably.

No early pace, assumed spot 5Ls back on rails, helped by pace in mid-section, crowded at 800 M, improved on bend outside runners, switched out in straight and made good late progress to just miss 2nd.
Showed usual turn of foot to look for a forward spot, pushed on but caught 3-wide 2Ls back, did plenty of work with solid pace, dropped out tamely from bend.

Even jump, held a prominent role behind leader, struggled to go speed 2Ls back on rails, urged along on bend, close enough on turning, took inside runs and slightly crowded at 250 M, no finish thereafter.
Bounced out, pressed on to lead, worried throughout by outside horse, set an honest speed racing keenly, still in battle for front leaving bend, workload took toll and weakened last 150 M.
Out in line, took a close up spot 2Ls behind leaders on outside rail, inconvenienced when improving at 300 M and again at 150 M, dashed sharply when clear to win with some authority.
Showed pace to come across and share lead towards outside rail, kept pace genuine in middle stages, under pressure at 400 M, dropped out tamely in run to finish.
Out in line, had enough pace to race 1L back along outside rail, close enough at 400 M but pushed along, condition began to give out and steadied at 200 M but was weakening regardless.
Away reasonably, raced 2 to 3Ls off pace in centre of course, improved approaching 400 M but lacked usual finishing burst.
Awkwardly away and lost ground, raced solo along inside (poorest part of course) about 3Ls off pace by mid-point, lo more ground as race went on to be well beaten.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Standard jump, settled 4Ls back close to inside, always appeared to be struggling, dropped further behind last 400 M and was never a factor.
Out in line, took a trail 2Ls off leaders near to outside rail, followed pace to 400 M, a little one paced when placed under pressure, kept on just holding ground in run to line.
Little early pace, raced back with last few 4 to 5Ls back, suited by speed, began improving from 400 M, worked home nicely last 200 M charging late to snare 2nd.
Even getaway, raced 2 to 3Ls back behind midfield, had a decent run despite being towards centre of course, found little when asked and not knocked around when fading out.
Awkwardly away, difficult to settle early, raced towards outside of course 4Ls from leaders, had a fair run tracking pace, worked home stoutly last 300 M to be closest on line. (Steadied late.)
Slow to begin, raced towards rear 4 or more lengths back, raced ungenerously, struggling from mid-point, no extra late. (Bled both nostrils.)
No pace from outset, raced at rear nearly 5Ls back, urged along at 400 M, picked up strongly at 200 M and closed nicely late to be nearest on line.
Showed speed to cross and share lead, ran freely keeping pace genuine, drifted about with inexperience, condition gave out last 100 M but still on held well for 3rd.
Began awkwardly & lost ground settling 2nd last. Never likely.
Raced outside the leader. Extended well early in the straight to win nicely.
Raced keenly while parked behind the leader. Kept to the inside in the straight but was never in the hunt.
Began awkwardly then in the early stages hung in badly settling 1 out 1back. Had every chance.
Slow to begin & raced in last position. Never a factor.
Positioned midfield the fence. Tired noticeably over the last 400 M.
Raced handy to the leaders, 2 deep with cover. Kept to the inside in the run home and finished off soundly.
Settled near last then after hanging out went forward midrace running wide. Kept on well in the run to the post.
Couldn't muster early speed and settled near the rear of the field. Made late ground.
Compounded quickly in the straight after leading along the fence.
Travelled near the tail of the field, made some ground approaching the 200 M. Struggled in the final stages. Pulled up lame.
Received interference near the 1500 M and settled in front of midfield the fence. Was a beaten horse turning for home.
Raced 2-wide midfield. Improved turning into the straight but weakened after the 200 M.
Raced 3-wide without cover in a handy position. Stayed on well in the straight.
Hard pressed out of the gates to take the lead. Disputed lead on home turn. Held a slim advantage 200 M out but couldn't find more to hold off top pair in the closing stages.
Midfield. 4-wide turning for home. Remained on same pace before checking at 200 M. Showed nothing thereafter.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Jumped awkwardly and took some time to muster speed. Raced behind the pace before taking the lead 1000 M out. 2-wide disputed lead turning for home and weakened after straightening.
Behind midfield. Took a wide turn home and made up ground in the early part of the straight. Unable to sustain effort final 100 M.
Jumped awkwardly and raced wide and without cover at midfield. Allowed to go forward in the back straight and was 3-wide behind the pace home turn. Outpaced after straightening.
Settled at the rear and trailed field into the home straight. Made up ground by running past beaten runners.
2-wide and better than midfield. 4-wide and gaining ground making home turn. Stayed on well in the straight but unable to match winner's stride in the closing stages.
On the fence at midfield. Slipped to rear section in the back straight. Only ran past beaten runners in the straight.
Pushed along in the early stages and never far off the lead. Kept within 3Ls of the pace back straight and was a length off at home turn. Ran on fairly in the straight but unable to turn up a notch.
Raced towards the rear. Widest turning for home. Ran on well but unable to sustain effort last 50 M.
Very slowly away, 12Ls last at the 1000 M, 9Ls back turning for home, made some minor late ground through beaten rivals.
Hung out as usual, 3-wide no cover throughout also, 4Ls back in 5th and niggled along at 1000 M, yielding ground before final bend, folded.
One from rear about 10Ls off pace at the 1200 M, midfield and 6Ls back turning in, one-paced thereafter.
3-back on fence about 4Ls back in 6th at 1200 M, headway to be 2Ls back in 3rd swinging for home out 3-wide, tired in the latter stages.
Switched inside from wide gate to sit 5-back on fence about 8Ls down at 1000 M, ran on well down the centre through final stages for a distant place.
Soon led on fence by 1L, headed at top of the home straight and faded out very quickly.
6Ls or 7Ls back in midfield at halfway, hard pressed to take closer order turning for home, dropped out.
Slowly away, 10Ls back towards early on, 5Ls down in midfield off final bend, couldn't progress much further.
Always in the rear, about 11th and 10Ls off pace at 1000 M, under pressure to improve at the 600 M, always well held in home straight.
Trapped 4-wide no cover at 1000 M, dropped rapidly through the field and beaten 800 M out, performance deemed unacceptable.
4-back on fence 6Ls off pace in 9th at 1200 M and much the same turning for home, dropped out further.
Box-seated on fence 2Ls back in 3rd at 1200 M, 4Ls down in 3rd at 800 M, 4th turning for home, back-pedalled.
5Ls back in 8th out 2-wide at 1200 M, 3Ls back in 5th at the final turn out 4-wide, kept on best of the rest for a remote 2nd.
Raced 2nd no worse than 2Ls from the early pace, travelled well when leading at top of home straight, forged clear, very easily.
Crossed quickly from wide gate to lead by 3Ls on fence at 1000 M, still over 2Ls clear 200 M out, kept up to his work but always in command.
Midfield about 3Ls from the speed until the home straight, given every chance to be in the finish but was a bit too one-paced.
2-wide and 3Ls back in 5th at 1000 M and similar position taking final bend, plugged on at the same pace in the finish.
Box-seated in 4th through to home straight between 2Ls and 4Ls from the speed, kept on fairly for 2nd.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Checked early on, caught 4-wide without cover in places, prominent role about 2Ls or 3Ls from the front until the 600 M but weak in homestretch.
Around midfield in 3-wide position with cover about 4Ls from the speed until home turn, found nothing under pressure.
Checked at 1200 M and 4-wide no cover throughout, within 3Ls of the early speed, soon struggling and beaten before the homestretch.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
2-wide and 1L down in 2nd at halfway, struggling to maintain this proximity off final bend, fizzled out.
Checked at the start, 3-back on fence about 4Ls behind early tempo in midfield, ridden along to improve on straightening, all out to run a moderate 3rd.
In 12th early on about 8Ls off the pace, veered towards stands' rail from top of home straight, nearest at the finish.
3-wide no cover throughout, 1L off the pace in 3rd at the 1000 M, still close-up turning for home but wilted final 200 M.
In rear about 8Ls off early pace, only marginally closer turning for home, never really in the hunt.
Midfield, 4Ls off the leader 2-wide, not suited by the slow pace, dashed well 300 M to finish 2nd.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, not suited by the slow tempo, blocked 4-2, little dash when clear.
Eased back, 7Ls off the leader 2 to 4-wide, harmed by the slow pace, no progress in straight.
Eased to sit 2-1/2Ls off the slow pace 2-wide, no turn of foot in straight, just held ground.
Settled 2Ls off the leader 3-wide without cover, helped by the slow pace, ran on well to the line and run 3rd.
Settled 1Ls off the leader 2-wide, favoured by the slow early sectionals, dominated from 300 M to score easily.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
At back, 5-1/2Ls off the leader along the rails, checked 900 M and lost considerable amount of ground, harmed by the slow pace, flattened 400 M.
Eased back, 5-1/2Ls off the leader 3-wide, dashed well 250 M despite not suited by the slow pace.
Hard ridden to take the rail and led at advantageous slow early sectionals, soon overhauled 300 M, but ran on ok to the line.
Hard ridden to take the box seat, enjoyed the slow early tempo, lacked room 400 M, totally emptied 300 M.
Eased to sit worse than midfield, 5-1/2Ls off the leader along the fence, not suited by the slow tempo, momentarily held up 400 M, no dash when clear.
Settled in rear of field. Tailed-off home bend. (Heart irregularity.)
Settled towards rear in 7th about 6Ls off the pace. Commenced move approaching home straight and burst through runners over 200 M out to score convincingly.
Travelled behind midfield of the small field. Ran on steadily down centre of the straight without ever threatening winner.
Raced two off the rails just behind leaders in 3rd. Similar turning in but unable to sustain effort inside final 300 M.
Travelled on rails in mid-division of small field mainly in 4th. Came within 2Ls of pace turning in. Baulked for a race early in straight but could make no impression inside final 200 M.
Raced in the middle of the pack mainly in 4th or 5th about 3Ls off the pace. Similar turning in. Fought on without quickening under pressure.
Driven to race up with the pace, racing outside leader rounding home bend. Shared the lead after straightening until tiring over 200 M out.
Began awkwardly, losing considerable ground. Never in contention.
Led or disputed lead to 250 M. Weakened under pressure.
Standard jump, soon mustered and drove up to take lead, held inside running throughout despite being shaded by outside horse, held a 1/2L turning, showed good fight to hold on for a deserved victory.
Slow into stride, settled well back 8 or more lengths from lead, continued to improve on inside saving ground on bend, switched out turning and made plenty of late progress to be nearest on line.
Standard beginning, pressed on from an awkward alley to tuck into a 1 x 1 trail, had an even trip thereafter, within striking distance 2Ls back on turning, run ended at 100 M. (See Racing Incidents.)

Jumped well, took a midfield trail 2 to 3Ls back, suited by tempo, travelled well on bend, couldn't dash with them at 400 M but stayed on soundly to 150 M before steadied when run ended (swollen left fore morning after).
Showed natural speed to race outside leader, kept pace on shading inside horse throughout still challenging on turning, couldn't sustain effort last 200 M and dropped out easily.
Lacked speed and unable to take usual prominent role, raced 5 to 6Ls back on fence, had a soft run to bend, continually progressed in straight closing off hard late to take place.
Lost ground at jump, soon at rear 10 or more lengths back, never looked comfortable throughout, made no impression in straight.
No early pace, ended up 3 wide behind midfield 7Ls back, hung on bend and didn't look at home in conditions, struggled in straight.
Standard jump, settled 3 wide in midfield without cover, did share of work 4 to 5 lengths back with pace on, struggling on turning, couldn't make much gain in straight just battling away.
Well enough away, took a hold when couldn't slot in, ended up 2 wide 4Ls back, travelled well on bend, switched wide and finished hard reducing margin with every stride until 50 M when run ended.
Broke with them, took an ideal spot 2Ls back on fence, raced a little off leaders to bend, kept giving in straight but just lacked extra gear to be a factor.
Slightly sluggish at start but quickly recovered to prominent position. Travelled 2 wide in 4th about 2Ls off the pace rounding home bend. Similar turning in but gradually weakened.
Raced wide behind midfield. Effort rounding home bend and 4-wide in midfield turning in. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Raced 3-wide in midfield early. Took closer order coming out of back straight. Gradually faded from prominent position into straight.
Always struggling at the back. (See Racing Incidents.)
Travelled in rear of midfield. Baulked for a run early in straight. Kept on well to finish.
Gradually settled in the lead setting a steady pace. Narrowly headed straightening and unable to draw level despite coming under pressure the length of the straight.
Began fairly. Trailed the field to straight. Switched out for a run upon straightening and produced a strong late finish inside final 200 M.
Slightly slow out. Soon picked up along rails to midfield. Similar position turning in but baulked for a run briefly early in straight. Obtained rails run over 250 M out and one-paced late.
Close up to straight. Soon dropped out tamely.
Began fairly settling in last few. Quickened upon straightening and ran on to narrowly miss a placing.
Broke well from poor draw. Gradually settled outside leader before coming out of back straight. Hit front upon straightening and fought on gamely to maintain narrow advantage to the line.

Began only fairly, mustered to race on leaders back, had an even run despite useful first section, in a strong position on bend, held up behind slower horses in straight but not really going well enough to be a factor last 200 M.
Out well, worked forward to race outside the leader, didn't relax in mid-section, continued to challenge on turning, found little when asked at 400 M and weakened right out in straight.

Away only fairly, settled 7Ls back on rails, moved 2 wide on circle, aided by tempo, switched to outside in straight, let down nicely to hit lead at 200 M but couldn't hold off finish of winner late (5Ls clear of 3rd).
Amongst first few to break, ended up in ideal spot 1 out 1 back, right there on turning and looked a chance briefly at 300 M, lacked the finish of first two and was a long way back in 3rd.
Began with purpose, pressed on but unable to slot in, ended up 3 wide without cover 1L away, did share of work to bend, close enough turning but hard run took toll and dropped right out.
No pace from outset, raced amongst last few 8Ls back in running line, trailed 3 wide on circle, gave too much start straightening, made some late progress passed tired horses.
Began well, assumed usual role in front, set a fair tempo in middle stages, worried by outside horse on bend, beat off challengers at 400 M, unable to find last 200 M and weakened out late.
Unable to take a forward spot and drifted back to race 5 to 6Ls back, had cover but did work to bend, angled into clear running but couldn't bridge margin just holding ground last furlong.
Began awkwardly and drifted to tail, ridden along 8 to 9Ls back at rear, helped by early pace, switched 2 wide on circle, still well back turning, and unable to get closer.

Out in line, ended up in midfield when unable to go early speed, had a soft run in mid-section, saved ground on bend, stuck to fence in straight but lacked usual finish and just held ground (never comfortbale).
Standard jump, took up a spot behind pace in midfield 3 to 4 Ls from top end, had a good run to bend, had chance in straight but didn't let down as normally would, just holding ground in straight.

No early pace, settled 8Ls back on rails, suited by an even tempo in front, took short cut on bend, angled out between horses on bend, came with a strong finish digging deep to score narrowly - well clear of 3rd.
Took time to muster and pressed forward to position 3 wide in midfield, had trail but did share of work covering ground, eased wider turning but didn't have extra gear, just battled away late.
Moderate break, soon mustered to roll forward and race outside leader, raced 1L back and suited by slow sections, found little when placed and pressure on turning and faded right out.
Standard jump, parked in midfield 5 to 6Ls away in 2 wide line, made a 3 wide run on circle, into clear at 350 M, closed evenly taking gradual ground off winner last 100 M.
Taken back at start, raced 7Ls back in 2 wide line, unsuited by tempo, found little when asked for effort on turning and only plodded in stretch.
Broke well, took up a prominent spot 1 out 1 back, appreciated speed, eased 3 wide leaving circle, cruised up to hit lead at 300 M, kept going to score a comfortable win.
Standard beginning, mustered to race 4Ls back in 2 wide line, raced keenly in mid-section, close enough coming 3 wide 2Ls back turning, didn't have extra gear but held ground creditably late.

Lost ground on jumping, ended up at tail, raced 8 or more lengths away, harmed by tempo, saved ground on rails but still rearward turning, closed evenly to 200 M before run closed, no impression thereafter.
No early pace, urged along to hold a spot 6Ls off leaders, on fence, disadvantaged by standard tempo, eased wide turning but always in traffic, closed evenly to 200 M before just holding ground late.

Away in line, slotted in nicely on fence, 3 to 4Ls back, had a soft run with leisurely sections, made some progress in restricted room at 400 M, lacked required dash when in clear and struggled last furlong.
Out reasonably, took up ideal position on leaders back, travelled well with standard sections, without a clear run on turning, very one-paced when run emerged.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Began awkwardly, ended up at tail 9 or more lengths back, raced untractably hanging throughout, never a chance and made no impression in straight.
Away fairly, settled 4Ls back but forced to race 3 wide without cover, crept close on bend, 2Ls back turning, lacked a dash but kept on at same pace to make frame.

No real pace from outset, situated 8Ls back on rails, not helped by steady tempo in mid-section, back in traffic on turning and still not clear to 250 M, made plenty of late ground to snatch 2nd (dropped whip).
No Comments on Running information for this horse.

Ridden along early and pressed forward along the back straight whilst caught wide & without cover. Raced close to the speed and rolled in to be 2 deep with cover at 600 M. Went to lead early and held off late challengers.
Positioned on the fence behind midfield. Tired sharply passing the 300 M whilst reaming to the inside.
Raced midfield 2 to 3-wide with cover, went forward after the 800 M, remained with cover. Struggled in the run home.
Travelled in 2nd last position on the fence. Was steadied & shifted out early in the straight, closed off strongly.
Pressured early and raced at the leaders girth. No petrol left inside the furlong.
Raced in last position after being slow to begin. Made run widest in the straight and commenced to run on but levelled out on its run over the concluding stages.
Enjoyed a nice run behind the speed, 2 deep with cover. Weak the last 200 M.
Stalked the leader along the fence. Was held up until the 300 M, and once in the clear stayed on soundly.
Faded from the 250 M, after leading along the rail.
Settled behind midfield and by the 800 M, raced 3 deep with cover. Kept to the inside in the straight and finished off fairly.

Raced 2-wide early then went forward when the pace slackened near the 900 M. Was then forced out to race 4-wide without cover from that point on and dropped out noticeably over the final stages. (See Racing Incident - Epiglothic Enlapment.)
Slow to begin & raced near the rear of the field, 1 off with cover. Came wide turning for home & ran on well to be right there in finish.
Travelled midfield on the fence. Remained racing to the inside in the run home and made little impression at the business end.
Better than midfield early. Gradually improved and was racing 2-wide behind the leader at the turn. Unable to keep up 300 M out and steadily dropped out.
Settled in rear section but was hard to settle. Made up ground saving trip around the turn and remained towards the rear on straightening. Only ran past a beaten runner.
Settled behind midfield. Improved to midfield and was widest turning for home. Ran on fairly in the straight and made up ground in the closing stages.
Missed the jump badly. Trailed field into home straight and only ran past a pair of beaten runners. (Blood in trachea.)
Settled towards the rear and was near last on straightening. Rallied in the straight but unable to sustain effort final stages.
Taken back from a wide draw and raced towards the rear. Improved to midfield in the middle stages. Held up for some distance after straightening but closed off strongly once traffic cleared.
2-wide and raced behind the leaders. Ran on same pace in the straight.
Settled in rear section. Made up ground in the straight.
Soon led. Maintained advantage until final 200 M. Unable to find more in the closing stages to remain in contention.
Better than midfield. No more than 3Ls off turning for home. Quickened nicely after straightening but was badly checked 200 M out. Ran on fairly thereafter to salvage a minor placing.
On the fence at midfield. Held up for some distance final 300 M and ran on fairly once finding a clear run.
2-wide at midfield. Switched out 5-wide turning for home and showed a nice turn of foot on straightening. Took the lead final 200 M and stayed on strongly to deny a late challenger.
Disputed lead early stages and settled behind the leader after 1200 M. Failed to keep pace final 300 M and weakened.
In rear bunch about 5Ls back early, keen and unbalanced at 700 M, 5-wide (widest) turning for home, made only a fair late impact.
With cover around midfield through opening exchanges, 4-wide and 2Ls down turning for home, kept on well as usual but couldn't grab leading trio.
4-wide with cover in rear about 5Ls off pace early on, left 4-wide no cover on the circle and just 1L back in 4th at top of stretch, beaten 200 M out.
Towards rear about 5Ls from speed at halfway and about 4Ls down turning for home, brief traffic problems at 300 M but always outpaced.
Slowest out, trailed field by 6Ls at 800 M, shifted very wide off final bend, posed little danger down centre of track.
Prominent but 3 and 4-wide no cover down backstretch, advanced to dispute lead on straightening, no extra final 200 M but still placed, big run.
Soon led on fence, about a neck clear early but joined for the lead turning in, dropped out rapidly, bled.
Always close-up around midfield and no worse than 2Ls down until home turn, chased well but never likely to reel in the winner.
Had the box-seat position on fence 2Ls back in 4th or 5th until the home turn, steadily faded out of the picture.
3-back on fence in midfield 3Ls or so from the speed before cornering for home, ran on well enough without threatening to place.
Crossed from wide gate to flank leader 2-wide in 2nd at 800 M, shared lead turning in and kicked 1L clear at 200 M, responded well to pressure.
3-wide with cover about 3Ls back in midfield, much too keen in middle stages and weakened out tamely in the straight.
Switched inside from widest gate, 4-back on fence at 1200 M when 6Ls behind, about 4Ls down on straightening, stayed there.
Over-raced in midfield about 4Ls off pace at 1000 M and able to edge a little nearer off home bend, 2Ls down in 4th at 200 M but wilted late.
Kicked on from wide gate to dispute early tempo while hanging in, struggling to keep up before final turn and dropped out very quickly.
2Ls down in 3rd 1000 M out, kept on to lead at 300 M only to be overhauled inside final 100 M, much improved.
Caught 4-wide no cover in midfield early on when 3Ls down in midfield, pressed on to be 1L down in 3rd entering stretch, one-paced thereafter.
10Ls last at 1000 M, 6Ls last and 4-wide swinging for home, stayed on well down centre of track to reach a place late.
3-wide with cover about 6Ls off pace in 11th at 1200 M, niggled along to make an impact before the final bend, didn't succeed.
3-back on fence about 5Ls off pace at 1000 M and a little closer turning for home, never likely to improve much more.
One from rear about 9Ls behind early pace, 6Ls down off home bend, stayed on fairly through beaten rivals, never nearer.
2-wide and 3Ls down in 6th at 1200 M and much the same off home turn, soon outpaced.
2-wide and 5Ls down in 9th at the 1000 M, similar position off final turn, stayed on well and only barely missed a place.
Close-up down backstretch, on fence 2Ls back in 5th making final turn, found zero off the bridle.
About 5Ls adrift and 3-wide with cover in 10th at 1000 M, improved but out 5-wide (widest) into straight, led inside final 100 M, progressive.
Set a pretty steady pace, led or disputed lead until straightening, petered out once headed from top of home straight.
Eased back for cover, 7Ls behind the leader 3-wide, not suited by the slow pace, stayed flat until 200 M, delivered strong finishing efforts and closed off well.

Eased to sit behind midfield, 5Ls off the leader along the fence, momentarily held up in early straight, finished the race off strongly when clear despite harmed by the slow pace, just beaten in 2nd by a short head.
Eased back, 5Ls off the leader, trapped 4-wide, harmed by the slow pace and lost too much ground on bend, no progress.
Jumped a lot better than in previous runs, eased to sit about midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, showed little dash in straight despite not suited by the slow early tempo.
Eased to sit in midfield, raced 5-wide throughout and lost too much ground, never competitive.
Eased to sit about midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the leader 3-wide, not suited by the slow pace, ran on ok until 200 M emptied.
Box seat, suited by the slow tempo but soon dropped off 300 M.
Hard ridden to take the rail and led by 1L at advantageous slow sectionals, kicked early from 500 M, hung on until 200 M, out of fuel late.
Pushed forward, 1Ls off the leader 2-wide, helped by the slow tempo, kicked with the leader from 500 M, ran on well until 100 M, run ended.
Eased to rear for cover, 9Ls behind the leader, harmed by the slow early tempo, swept forward 3-wide on straightening to make run, however dashed only fairly.
Eased back and crossed the rails, 7Ls off the leader, harmed by the slow pace, blocked 4-2, dashed strongly when clear but too late, just grabbed a minor 3rd.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Eased to sit behind the pace group along the fence, 3-1/2Ls off the leader, not suited by the slow pace, dashed well 300 M to win by a narrow margin.
Better than midfield, 3Ls off the slow pace 2-wide, weakened 400 M.
Broke well. Soon ridden to lead and crossed to rails coming out of back straight. Went 2Ls clear around home bend and into straight. Tiring when headed over 150 M out but plugged on for 2nd.
Raced in rear of midfield. Hampered 900 M out. Just worse than mid-division turning in. Ran home one-paced.
Never better than midfield. Kept on well down centre of straight without quickening.
Broke well, settling on rails mainly in 3rd some 3Ls off the speed. In similar position in 4th turning in. Gradually faded under pressure.
Raced in last few. Switched out for a run upon straightening but could only run home one-paced.
Broke well from middle draw. Taken back to race 3-wide in midfield. Slightly closer up turning in. Soon weakened.
Settled at the back and waited with. Commenced move turning in. Made significant progress in straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled in midfield. Fought on determinedly under pressure to narrowly miss 2nd.
Sluggish at start. Raced in rear of field. Found nil in straight.
In forward of midfield far side, improving to 3L 3rd coming onto home bend. Similar turning in. Fought on steadily closing stages without threatening.
Began fairly but soon picked up to close-up position. Stalked leader rounding home bend and into straight. Responded well to take charge over 150 M out. Won convincingly.
Slightly slow out, travelling in towards rear position. Held up for a run briefly passing 400 M. Ran home one-paced.
Began fairly, travelling on rails in forward of midfield and somewhat keenly. In 6th position turning for home and continued to produce good impression closing stages.
Began fairly. Raced wide in midfield. Went off the track passing 500 M. Ran past well-beaten horses inside final 200 M.

Standard jump, ended up in usual spot towards rear 7 or so lengths back on rail, had a quiet run and aided by tempo, made solid progress between horses in straight and charged late to narrowly go down.
Away with first few, held leaders back early before drifting back to race 4Ls back on fence, enjoyed a reasonable run in mid-section, stayed on nicely in straight to finish on heels of first four.
Began in line, pressed on from a wide alley to trail leader, followed genuine tempo 1 to 2Ls back, 3Ls down on turning, gradually overhauled leader and held off late challengers to score a solid win.
Fastest into stride, led them easily, set solid sections to suit 2Ls clear, extended margin on turning and kicked well clear, run ended at 200 M and faded thereafter. (Bled both nostrils.)
Ordinary beginning, shared rear some 10Ls off speed racing 2 wide, pace to suit but got no closer in middle stages, no extra in straight.

Failed to muster, ended up 9Ls back on rails, suited by pace in middle stages, still well back with job to do on bend, made some progress to 200 M before being checked, couldn't manage to fight thereafter.
Jumped in air, held a prominent role 3Ls back first without cover, did share of work carting field up to leader, kept on well in stretch making steady headway to make frame.
No early pace, posted 3 wide 7 to 8Ls back in main pack, did it tough with pace on, switched to middle and closed off evenly in straight taking steady ground off leaders to be not far away on line.
No early speed, raced 3 wide at rear some 10Ls back, pace advantageous in mid-section, still well back to bend, struggled in straight.
Began only fairly, raced in rearward position 2 wide some 7 to 8Ls off speed, aided by tempo, still well back to bend, switched out and made gradual progress in straight to be nearest on line.

Even getaway, ended up in a midfield role 2 wide 4 to 5Ls back, had an even run with cover throughout, suited by tempo, made solid ground in straight and was pegging back margin late despite rider dropping reign at 100 M.

No pace as expected and faded back from a wide alley, ended up 4 wide at rear without cover, did it tough throughout 8Ls back, attempted to improve on bend, hard run took toll and had no extra in straight.
Began nicely. Prominent on rails early. Steadied and lost position coming out of back straight. Midfield turning in. Kept on steadily under pressure in straight.
Well there. Travelled in 2nd on rails inside leader rounding home bend and into straight. Unable to sustain effort inside final 200 M.
Raced in rear of midfield to straight. Ran home nicely.
Gradually picked up from moderate start from wide draw to take up running 800 M out. Led field into straight and fought on doggedly under pressure only to be caught final strides.
Settled at the back from wide draw. Made no impression in straight.
Prominent early. Gradually shuffled back to rear of field after two interferences on rail far side. Towards rear turning in and produced good late impression closing stages.
Always struggling in last few. Never seen with a chance.
Raced prominently and keenly 3-wide far side. Close-up 4th turning in and soon became 3rd but unable to sustain effort inside final 200 M.
Midfield far side. 3 wide rounding home bend. Gained closer turning in. Fought on steadily without threatening.
Always well back. Never seen with a chance.
Broke well to lead. Taken back to settle just off the pace on rails coming out of back straight. Obtained split inside 200 M and fought on nicely to prevail late.
Not far off far side. In 6th just better than mid-division around home bend. Just kept on steadily without quickening.
Raced wide behind midfield. Quickened well inside final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Raced wide in midfield. Took closer order around home bend to be close-up 3rd turning in. Soon weakened.
Reasonably away, couldn't slot in, posted 3 wide with cover 6Ls back, did share of work to bend, couldn't find extra on turning, hard run took toll and battled to line.
Crowded early, took a role behind midfield in 2 wide line 6Ls back, steadied at 800 M, back amongst horses on turning, found little when pressured and just kept on at same speed.
Out with rest, slotted into prominent position 1 out 1 back, suited by even sections, travelled well 3Ls back on turning, into clear at 300 M but only managed to hold ground in run to line.
Steadied early, ended up 6 to 7Ls back on fence, had an even run in mid-section, saved ground on fence, on worst going in straight but made some minor headway under hands and heels riding.
Saddle shifted and raced detached at rear, never a winning prospect thereafter.
Began with rest, shuffled back on fence to be 4 to 5Ls back, travelled strongly throughout, trapped on fence, rails bias against on turning but never saw daylight and was not properly tested.

Fast into stride, crossed to front but content to take a sit on leaders back, enjoyed easy time thereafter, angled 2 wide on turning, looked a hope at 300 M but just couldn't go with them and lost place late.

Jumped in line, pressed on to assume a prominent spot first without cover, had a nice run with even sections, travelled well leaving bend, took over quickly at 200 M and went away to score a comfortable victory.

Showed some pace but elected to take a trail, had a soft trip, 3Ls back on fence, used little to bend but rails bias against, shifted out on turning but couldn't dash with them just holding position on concluding stages.
Standard jump, faded back to rearward spot 7 to 8Ls back racing 2 wide, not harmed by tempo, still last turning with big task in front, passed a few tired runners in straight.
Fair beginning, posted 3 wide without cover in midfield, had a hard run to bend, struggling on turning in, weakened out in straight.
No pace from outset, shared rear 7Ls back in running line, speed even enough to suit, still well back on turning, switched out to middle at 400 M, only warmed up last 200 M charging late for placing.

Began nicely, gradually worked forward to race outside leader, took over after 300 M, set tempo to suit in mid-section, held a 1/2L on turning, passed easily by winner at 200 M but stuck on evenly for 2nd.

No pace from outset, ended up 3 wide at rear 7Ls from leaders, covered ground throughout, made a 4 wide run without cover on bend, came to middle in straight and closed off well enough to be nearest on line.
3-back on fence in midfield about 4Ls back at 1000 M, closer on straightening and a place chance at 200 M, failed to sustain the bid in final 200 M.
Trapped 3 and 4-wide no cover down backstretch, 1L down in 3rd from halfway to home turn, gave way before the 200 M.
Squeezed out at the start, on fence about 5Ls behind early speed and marginally closer turning for home, never dangerous.
Much too keen early on when 3Ls down in midfield, same position turning for home, all out to remain in touch at 200 M, gave ground final 200 M.
5Ls off pace when 3-wide with cover at 1000 M, 4Ls back in mid-div taking last turn, only just missed the money.
With cover within 3Ls of the speed in midfield until the homestretch, steadily lost ground.
Too keen 900 M out when 4Ls back in midfield with cover, no better off making final turn and always held.
Fractious in gates and missed the start, worse than midfield at least 4Ls behind leader until straightening, stayed on very strongly for 2nd, very good run.
Held 2nd within 1L of the speed until the home straight, failed to quicken up and retreated final 200 M.
In rear between 5Ls and 6Ls off the pace until home straight, never likely to improve better than midfield.
Got back as usual, 5Ls last and 6-wide (widest of all) turning for home, failed to advance any further.
Switched inside from wide gate, at least 6Ls last until home straight, ran on well through the field to nick 3rd.
Box-seated in 3rd or 4th about 2Ls behind leader on fence until the 600 M, led over 300 M out and in command by 2Ls at 200 M, ridden out.
Led by 1L out 2-wide at 1000 M, hung out at halfway and joined at top of home straight, soon capitulated.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Began well from wide draw. Ridden to travel outside leader. Chased along in 2nd 2-wide turning in. Unable to sustain effort inside final 200 M.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Began fairly. Travelled prominently in one-out-one-back position. Gave ground from 400 M. (Bled.)
Began fairly holding rails run from the one draw. Travelled in 3rd 2Ls back around home bend. Soon weakened after straightening.
Travelled on rails in midfield. Failed to quicken under pressure in straight.
Broke well from wide draw. Soon travelled wide in midfield. Lost position rounding home bend. Dropped further back turning in.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Travelled in last few. Held rails run turning in. Sneaking up to midfield upon straightening. Sustained progress down straight to be nearest at finish.
Raced 3-wide in prominent position. Yielded ground from around home bend.
Settled in midfield. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Soon took up running and held narrow advantage to straight. Fought on well to defy challengers.
From an outside barrier worked hard and coursed wide to race outside the leader near the 600 M. Faded quickly in the straight.
Parked on the rails behind the leader. Given every chance.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Travelled midfield the fence. Railed up in the run home but came to the end of its run passing the 200 M.

Held wide early before shifting in and racing back in the field 1 off with cover. Raced on the fence approaching & rounding the home turn, came wide in the straight, closing off strongly to snatch victory on the post.
Led along the fence but was always keen and kept honest by runners to its outside. Faded over the final stages when workload took toll.
Settled midfield 1 off with cover. Struggled over the last 300 M.
Parked 2 deep with cover, in front of midfield. Kept on one paced in the straight.
Settled around 3rd last position along the fence. Made a forward move inside runners passing the 600 M. Peeled out turning into the straight and looked the winner before being collared on the wire.
Camped behind the speed, two wide with cover. Was 3 back after the 600 M, finished off satisfactorily.
Ridden along early from a wide gate sat outside the leader for some distance before racing 1 out, 1 back near the 600 M. Completely gassed inside the furlong.
Settled close to second last position, some distance off the main bunch of runners. Ran on strongly after coming wide in the straight. (See Racing Incident.)
Slow into stride and was hard ridden. Raced 2Ls back on the fence. Weakened in the home straight.
Jumped awkwardly and raced at the rear. Near last on straightening and made up ground in the closing stages. (See Racing Incidents.) (Rider reprimanded.)
Jumped only fairly. Raced 2-wide at midfield. Niggled along to improve position around home turn and kept on only fairly in the straight.
Jumped well but was allowed to drift back to rear section. Towards the back turning in and steadily made up ground in the straight to be closest at finish.
Jumped awkwardly and raced at the rear. Checked badly at 600 M and was last on straightening. Only ran past beaten runners.
Travelled nicely in a 2-wide spot behind the pace. Lacked a response when asked 250 M out and faded thereafter.
Raced along the fence and never better than midfield. Ran on fairly in the straight. (Inconvenienced at 100 M.)
Ridden out of the gates and took the lead. Had a length's advantage final 100 M but was caught by winner near the post.
Unable to keep pace in front and raced 2 to 3Ls off the lead 3-wide without cover turning in and weakened in the straight.
Jumped well and allowed to drift back to behind midfield. Quickened nicely after straightening and ran down early leader near the post.
Raced behind the leader until home straight. Kept on nicely for a minor placing.
Raced wide and without cover behind midfield in back straight. Remained widest turning in and made up good ground late in the straight.
3-back on fence about 4Ls down in midfield through to final turn, always chasing the leading players.
About 5Ls back with cover early on, crept closer out 3-wide with cover, 4-wide turning in, hit the front 150 M out while hanging, kept on.
Squeezed out at the start, 7Ls down in 10th at 1000 M, struggling turning for home, never remotely dangerous.
Lost ground at the start, about 9Ls last at 1200 M, marginally closer on straightening but never truly on terms.
2-wide and 4Ls back in 4th at 1200 M, still thereabouts turning for home, much too one-paced.
Trapped 3-wide no cover at 1200 M in midfield, pressed on out deep and was 2Ls back in 3rd at final turn, swamped before the 300 M.
Towards rear, about 8Ls last at the 600 M, made some minor late ground.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
9th with cover about 5Ls off speed until home turn when under pressure, plugged on past a few spent rivals late.
Keen when 1L back in 2nd at 1000 M, about a neck down swinging for home, given every possible hope but couldn't produce.
Led by 1L on fence passing the post first time round, headed about 150 M out and lost 2nd in final strides.
4Ls back in midfield with cover at 1200 M and much the same turning in, burst clear and led about 200 M out, comfortably.
Covered up in 4th or 5th between 2Ls and 3Ls from the speed until home turn, without clear running turning for home but always well held anyway.
Taken back from wide gate, 2-wide in rear about 6Ls off speed until home turn, stayed on dourly down the centre to nick a place late.
Caught 3-wide no cover throughout, about 2Ls or 3Ls back in 5th or so until home turn, extra work took its toll on the run-in.
3-wide with cover in midfield at 600 M and 4Ls down turning for home, one-paced thereafter.
Disputed early running, over-raced at halfway when 1L down in 2nd, hard pressed to remain in touch turning for home, beaten before the 200 M.
Led by 1L on fence at 1100 M, headed by the winner about 200 M out and one-paced thereafter.
3-wide with cover towards rear initially, 5Ls down turning for home off final turn, hung in late, mediocre performance.
3-back on fence in midfield about 4Ls off the speed until home straight, kept on fairly without threatening a quinella finish.
4-back on fence in 9th or 10th at least 4Ls from the speed until home turn, stayed on best of the rest but no chance with the winner.
Disputed early tempo but settled into box-seat position from 1000 M until home turn, petered out tamely in the finish.
One from rear about 7Ls behind early tempo and 6Ls behind cornering for home, plugged on through some tired rivals late.
Led easily along the fence by 1L, dictated the race at slow early sectionals, hung on until 200 M overhauled, still ran on ok to the line.
Settled 1Ls off the leader 2-wide, suited by the slow tempo, dropped off steadily 400 M.
Eased to sit in midfield, harmed by the slow pace, trapped 3 to 4-wide throughout and lost too much ground, faded 300 M.
Eased back, 2-wide, not suited by the slow pace, never competitive.
Hard ridden to take a forward spot 1Ls off the slow pace, however trapped 3-wide throughout and lost too much ground, ran on until 200 M, out of fuel.

Slow away, pushed to obtain a spot just better than midfield, 2-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, harmed by the slow pace, demonstrated strong finishing efforts as usual last 250 M and grabbed a close 3rd.
Midfield or worse, trapped 3 to 4-wide 4Ls off the leader throughout and lost too much ground, harmed by the slow pace, lacked dash but ran on well to the line despite all negative racing situations.
Eased back, 4Ls off the leader 2-wide with cover, harmed by the slow early sectionals, blocked 4-2, little dash when clear.

Eased early to cross the rail behind the pace group, dug forward and occupied the box seat, travelled nicely, helped by the slow tempo, closed the race off strongly whilst hanging in, led 200 M, just missed win.
Eased to rear and got the rail, 5Ls behind the leader, harmed by the slow pace, lacked room at top straight, stormed home strongly when clear and just scored in last few strides.
Hard ridden early to hold a rail spot about midfield, 3-1/2Ls behind the leader, dashed well 300 M despite not suited by the slow pace, however held up and checked badly 100 M.
Hard ridden early to take a position just better than midfield, 2-1/2Ls off the leader 2 to 3-wide, raced keenly, not suited by the slow tempo, flattened in straight.
Settled at the back. Badly baulked for a run throughout closing stages. (See Racing Incidents.)
Trailed the field to straight. Made significant progress down centre of the track to be nearest at finish.
Settled on rails in midfield. Kept on same pace under pressure in straight.
Settled just off the pace in 3rd and 2-wide. Commenced move rounding home bend but gradually faded after straightening.
Raced 3-wide in prominent position home bend. Dropped out.
Raced in midfield and keenly at times. One-paced after straightening before finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Led from wire to wire. Drew clear inside final 200 M to win convincingly.
Settled on rails behind midfield. Saved ground on inside turning for home. Fought on under pressure to snatch 3rd late.
Began well, settling in 2L 4th on rails. In similar position far side. Gained 2nd on rails turning in. Kept on same pace without quickening.
Raced 3-wide in midfield. Kept on steadily in straight without quickening.
Settled just behind midfield. Travelled between runners early in straight. Ran home one-paced closing stages.
Raced wide towards rear. Made no impression in straight.
Showed usual pace to challenge for front, forced to face breeze 3-wide without cover 1-2Ls back, struggling on bend, dropped out when hard run took toll to be well beaten.

No pace from jump, mustered to take a spot 6Ls back on fence, aided by tempo in mid-section, saved ground on bend, switched out and made even progress to line without threatening. (Injured tendon morning after.)
Out in line, assumed a midfield position 4Ls back on rails, had a soft run in mid-section, found little when asked on straightening and weakened tamely. (See Racing Incidents.) (Not comfortable.)
Began well, elected for a trail and ended up with 1 out 1 back position 1-2Ls back, had a reasonable run on back of speed into clear on turning in, lacked a dash and faded out late.
Began in line, used some resources to cross to 1 out 1 back slot, angled onto rails 2Ls down on bend, tracked leader on turning, bumped when drifting in at 200 M, just held ground thereafter.
Displayed customary pace to race to lead, set a solid tempo throughout with pressure from outside horse, still held a 1L advantage turning, kicked strongly to 100 M when run ended.

Lost ground on jumping, settled 9-10Ls back, advantaged by fast tempo in mid-section, saved ground on circling and kept to fence turning, made good progress to 200 M before being badly checked. Not fully tested thereafter.

Began reasonably however drifted back to race 5-6Ls away in running line, aided by solid speed, still well back turning, made many lengths down middle to hit lead at 100 M, collared late by fast finishing rival.
Fast into stride, took a trailling spot in midfield 5Ls back in running line, race run to suit, made ground between horses leaving circle, gradually progressed in straight to be nearest on line.

Began fairly, ended up 7-8Ls back near to last racing 2-wide, suited by pace up front, gradually improved on bend, switch 3-wide nearing turn, descended quickly to finish over the top of rivals late to score a big win.

No early pace and lost considerable ground when failed to muster, more than 12Ls back at tail, gave a big start on turning in, made good late progress passing some tiring runners. (See Racing Incidents.)

Fast into stride, applied pressure to leader throughout ensuring a fast tempo, continued to shade leader on circle, unable to sustain effort turning in and dropped out quickly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Fair to begin, ended up 3Ls back on fence, had a soft trip with slow speed, in behind horses turning and didn't have a clear crack until 200 M, stayed on evenly thereafter.
Began with rest, assumed a midfield role 3 to 4Ls back in 2 wide line, not helped by slow sections, dropped but on turning, showed nothing and weakened in straight.
Slow into stride, raced on fence 6Ls back at rear, unsuited by pace in mid-section, still well back with, tracked wide leaving bend, hung and difficult to ride in straight but run ended at 200 M.
No pace from jump, raced 5 or so lengths back in 2 wide line, disadvantaged by slow pace, made a 3 wide run on circle, switched out in straight but unable to produce required finish, flattened 200 M.

Not much early speed, ended up 4 to 5Ls back on fence, pace against and travelled strongly throughout, used nothing to bend, progressed nicely before being held up at 200 M, kept making ground before steadied at 50 M.
Amongst first to break, took up running shortly after, controlled race to suit with steady sections, began to increase speed turning, didn't have extra late but kept on well to make frame.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Out in line, move up swiftly to race outside leader, enjoyed easy time with slow pace, 1/2L down on turning. Stayed on soundly in straight just unable to go with winner last 150 M.
Began with rest, posted 3 wide in midfield, had cover 3 to 4Ls back, not asked to work in mid-section, continued to improve turning and took gradual ?? off leaders without looking a winning chance.

Well enough away, slotted into ideal spot 1 out 1 back, had run off race in mid-section, close enough on bend but found little when pressured, made no impression thereafter. (Jockey reported respiratory noise.)

Began nicely, assumed a prominent role on leaders back, had run of race in mid-section with standard pace on, angled into a gap shortly after straightening, wound up strongly accounting for rivals comfortably last 150 M.

Began only fairly, then despite being ridden along took time to muster speed. Near the 800 M was left racing 3-wide and without cover just behind the pace. Went forward after the 700 M and crossed to a 2-wide position. Never likely.
Raced in last position and made little impression in the straight.
Raced 2-wide with cover behind midfield. In the straight hung out and battled to the line. (Mucopus.)
Raced in about 2nd last position along the fence. Railed up in the straight & closed off soundly despite being inconvenienced at 200 M.
Travelled 3-wide, was left racing without cover after the 600 M. Worked to the line dourly.
Led early & middle stages before box seating around the 600 M, had every chance.
Positioned behind midfield the fence. Made some ground on tiring runners.

Showed good early speed to go forward and race outside the leader. Rolled on after the 800 M while racing 1 off to take the lead approaching the 600 M. Extended well early in the straight and sustained the effort to the post.
Enjoyed the run of the race behind the speed on the fence. Compounded quickly after the 300 M.
Settled near the rear of the field 2 deep with cover. Kept to the inside in the run home & ran on well. (Bled.)
Positioned midfield the fence. Ran on nicely although over the concluding stages was inclined to hang in.
Began awkwardly and lost ground settling, travelled 2-wide with cover, 3 back. Closed off well in the straight despite racing greenly and shifting ground on a number of occasions.
Settled 1 out 1 back, peaked on its run just short of the line. Reasonable debut.
Positioned behind midfield 3-wide with cover, struggled over the final furlong.

Settled behind the pace early stages. Raced 4 to 5Ls off the lead in 3rd back straight. Improved to be alongside the leader turning for home and had a short-lived lead 200 M out. Only kept same pace thereafter. (Saddle shifted)
Dropped back from widest draw and raced at the rear. Trailed field on straightening and never picked up.

Raced in midfield or behind. 4Ls off the lead turning for home. Kept on fairly after straightening. Found some difficulty getting a clear run but unable to sustain effort when clear in the final stages.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield. Progressed to midfield but was 3-wide at home turn. Ran on fairly in the home straight but had to be steadied 100 M out.

Led briefly in the early stages but unable to cross to the rails. Settled behind the leader in back straight. Remained in a prominent spot turning for home but never got a clear path in the home straight. (See Racing Incidents - mucopus.)
Settled towards the rear and was near last on straightening. Rallied in the straight for a minor placing.
Urged forward with the stick and took the lead 1600 M out. Held a narrow advantage into the home straight but was swamped after being headed 200 M out.

Settled on the fence at midfield. 2-wide and 2Ls off the pace making home turn. Had some trouble getting a clear run in the early part of the straight. Charged through rivals once finding daylight and took control final 150 M.
Raced along the rails in rear section. 2-back on the fence turning for home. Had trouble finding a clear path in the early part of the straight. Closed off the strongly but unable to threaten winner.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield. Made progress 800 M out and was 3-wide in a forward spot turning for home. Stayed on fairly but unable to turn up a notch in the final stages to remain in contention.
Disputed early tempo out 2-wide and a neck clear at 800 M when a bit too keen, still on terms off last bend but swamped inside final 200 M.
'One-out-one-back' position in 3rd at 1100 M, maintained strong tempo by leading before the home turn, no extra when grabbed by the winner 50 M out.
12Ls last at 1000 M and struggling to draw any closer making the home turn, became detached from the remainder.
Got well back, about 11Ls down in 11th at 800 M and with at least 8Ls to make up turning in, helped by fast pace to lead 50 M out, tidily.
Never landed a blow, about 9Ls back in 9th at halfway, slightly closer turning for home but remained in slower half of the field.
6Ls down in 7th on fence at 900 M and marginally closer taking final bend, had his chance to place but didn't find enough.
Trapped 3-wide no cover along backstretch before getting in 2-wide and 5Ls back in 4th at 800 M, one-paced in the homestretch.
4Ls back in midfield with cover at 1000 M, under pressure to remain involved 600 M out, checked off the final bend but outpaced anyway.
At least 10Ls back in 12th early on and 8Ls down swinging for home, always chasing at least half the field.
Tame performance, box-seated in 4th at 1100 M, 4Ls down in 4th turning for home, found nothing under pressure and eased late.
One from rear at least 11Ls behind pace at 800 M and still well back off final bend, made some fair late ground down centre of track, never nearer.
Led by a neck on fence 1200 M out, forced the speed until 500 M out, tired gradually in the home straight and eased close home.
Covered up 10Ls back in 10th at 800 M and 1L in front of the winner off final bend, ran on well but lacked the dash of KING OF SPADES.
Fractious in gates and lost ground at start, 2-wide and 7Ls back in 8th at 900 M, 4-wide and closer on straightening, tired final 200 M.
Nicely placed in 3rd through early stages but lost position on the circle and weakened out sharply from top of home straight.
3-wide with cover worse than midfield at 800 M about 5Ls from the speed and about 3Ls down making final turn, stayed on pretty well to nick 2nd late.
Kicked on out wide without cover to lead on fence by 1L at 800 M, headed by winner 500 M out and swamped passing the 200 M.
5Ls behind the early running with cover and headway to be 3Ls down in midfield at last bend, ran on okay without threatening.
Awkward break but raced outside pace 1L back in 2nd at 800 M, led 500 M out and pushed clear, had more in reserve.
4Ls down in midfield or worse when 4-wide but with cover on the circle, failed to improve from centre field.
Fractious in gates and slowly away, in rear bunch about 6Ls off speed in middle stages, remained there in the stretch.
One from rear about 6Ls from the pace at halfway, outpaced in the home straight.
Trapped 3-wide no cover at 800 M when 1L back in 4th, hung out on the circle and 5-wide turning for home, gave ground by the 200 M mark.
Settled 4-wide with cover in rear between 5Ls and 7Ls from the pace through to final bend, ran on strongly down centre of the track to be nearest at the close.
2-wide and 2Ls down in 5th at 1000 M, about 1L down in 3rd or so on straightening, couldn't sustain the run in final 200 M.
3-back on fence in mid-division about 4Ls from early speed, 2Ls down off final turn, given every chance to at least place but came up short.
Covered up in midfield early, headway to be a close 4th turning in, gave vain chase to the winner and tipped out of 2nd final strides.
7Ls last at the 800 M and still at tail end about 5Ls behind at final bend, made no impact.
Crossed to sit outside the leader easily, favoured by the slow pace, however stayed flat in straight and out of fuel 200 M.
Very slow away, at rear more than 11Ls off the leader 2 to 3-wide, harmed by the slow pace, lacked room at top of straight, little dash 200 M.
Rolled forward, eased to occupy the box seat, enjoyed the slow early sectionals, ran on until 200 M weakened.
Eased to sit about midfield, 7Ls behind the leader 2-wide, made the move round the field 4-wide, dashed well 300 M despite harmed by the slow tempo.
Eased to sit about midfield, 5Ls off the leader 2 to 3-wide, raced keenly, not suited by the slow pace, moved forward 600 M, showed little dash in straight, however run ended 100 M.
Eased at start, got cover at back, 9Ls off the leader 2 to 3-wide, not suited by the slow tempo, dashed strongly last 300 M and briefly had threats, but run ended 100 M.
Settled just behind the pace group, bumped 900 M, 3Ls off the leader on the rails, momentarily blocked 400 M, harmed by the slow pace, dashed strongly when clear to finish a remarkable 2nd.
Behind midfield, 8Ls off the leader along the fence, not suited by the slow tempo, held up 4-2, dashed fairly when clear, just ran on.
Eased at start to cross to the rail, 10Ls off the leader, harmed by the slow early sectionals, blocked 4-2, finished the raced off strongly when clear.

Eased to rear, more than 11Ls off the leader 3 to 4-wide, held up for running 5-3, harmed by the slow pace, demonstrated strong finishing efforts when clear despite all negative racing situations and got 3rd.
Midfield on the fence, 6Ls behind the leader, not suited by the slow pace, did not pick up until 300 M, but soon checked 250 M, reproduced strong dash 100 M and made up plenty of lost ground.
Eased back, 9Ls off the leader 3-wide, raced keenly, hung out at home bend, 5-wide on straightening, harmed by the slow pace, ran on ok in final stages.
Eased to sit just behind the pace group, 3Ls off the leader 2-wide, helped by the slow tempo but soon emptied 300 M.
Hard ridden to take the rail and led by 1-1/2Ls at advantageous slow sectionals, kicked away by more than 2Ls 400 M, just made it by a narrow margin.

Raced in mid-division of small field on rails inside ABSOLUTE CHAMPION. Commenced move shortly after straightening and obtained split 300 M out. Showed a great turn of foot to take charge inside 200 M. Comfortably.
Raced in mid-division of small field outside SACRED KINGDOM. Quickened well upon straightening but had no answer to winner's late burst of speed 200 M out. (Lame next day.)
Chased leaders in 2L 3rd most of way. Failed to quicken under pressure but fought on steadily to the line.
Began fairly. Soon under urge to muster pace. Took up running while racing keenly coming out of back straight. Led until headed passing 300 M. Weakened.
Travelled in last few. Jostled with runner early in straight. Commenced to race awkwardly 300 M out and dropped out.
Broke well to lead. Held a length's advantage before headed coming out of back straight. Renewed effort turning in and hit front momentarily passing 300 M. Soon overhauled.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Began fairly from widest draw of small field. Raced wide towards rear most of way and failed to respond in straight.

No pace as usual, ended up sharing rear, advantaged by reasonable tempo, still 2 wide 1 out back on circle, made a run between horses on turning, didn't have clearest running to 200 M, closed off well late when clear.

Standard jump, drifted back to race 8 to 9Ls back in rearward division, helped by solid tempo, made a 3 wide run on circle without cover, ground away in straight at same pace holding ground in run to line.
Out fairly, assumed spot 4Ls back on fence, enjoyed easy time despite pace on, angled 2 wide leaving circle, offered little when they sprinted and dropped out.
Began with move purpose, settle much closer 5Ls away on fence, no excuses in run, conserved energy on bend, 2 wide turning but lacked usual finish and weakened over concluding stages.
Didn't have early pace, ended up well down 10Ls or more back 3 wide, tracked up with cover on bend, last and widest turning for home, made good headway last 400 M doing best work late for a place.
Had natural pace from gates, pushed on to race handy to lead, raced 1L back at a solid speed, crept closer on bend, struggled from 300 M and weakened out late.

Jumped in the line, soon mustered to drive through and lead, kept pace genuine throughout, held a length advantage on bend, displayed a sharp turn of foot to space rivals holding them to score comfortably.

Fair to begin, settled in 2nd half of field 8Ls back on rails, had a suitable run with pace on, eased 2 wide on circle but lost position, steadily gained ground in straight without really threatening.
Showed plenty of speed, took a prime position on leaders back, didn't have a rest with solid speed on, eased out to challenge on turning in, looked a place chance at 300 M but run ended last furlong.
Standard jump, drifted back to race behind midfield, ended up 8 to 9Ls back on rails, suited by sections in middle stages, switched 3 wide leaving bend, made good ground down middle to make frame.

Out reasonably, ended up in a midfield role 6Ls back in 2 wide line, tracked into race nicely on bend, into clear at top of straight and continued to close to 100 M before run ended and lost place chance.
No pace from outset, back with last few 10Ls back on rails, saved ground and used little with solid pace on, inconvenienced at 250 M and lost run, just held position thereafter.
Waited with. Commenced move around home bend, improving to rear of midfield turning in. Held up early in straight. Quickened well inside final 250 M to take charge close to home.
Raced in midfield 4-wide. Widest runner home turn. Dropped out upon straightening.
Held rails run in rear of midfield. Shuffled back to last few coming out of back straight. Found nil in straight.
Raced wide in last few. Fought on well down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Raced keenly in 4th on rails within 3Ls of pace. In similar position but slightly closer up turning in. Fought on steadily without quickening.
Well back. Ran on steadily down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.

Refused to settle in rear of midfield racing keenly. Took closer order around home bend moving to 4-wide in 2L 5th turning in. Came to challenge and hit front momentarily over 100 M out only to be swamped close to home.
Travelled just worse than midfield. Effort 3 wide rounding home bend. Kept on before fading inside final 200 M.
Raced keenly in 2nd position on heels of leader. Came to challenge upon straightening and hit front briefly inside 200 M. Unable to sustain effort and swamped close to home.
Raced wide just better than midfield. Dropped to midfield around home bend. In box seat early in straight. One-paced closing stages.
Midfield far side. Lost position around home bend. Saved ground on inside turning for home. Found no extra inside final 200 M.
Broke well to lead. Made running to 200 M. Found no extra under pressure.
Prominent to 300 M. Gradually weakened.
Began with rest, posted 4 wide from an awkward alley, always working but had cover in mid-section, 3Ls down on turning, began to struggle at 300 M and faded out when emptied at 200 M.

No pace and drifted back from a wide gate, raced at rear 8Ls away racing 2 wide, suited by solid pace on, switched to centre on turning and made fair progress but gave too much start. Nearest on line.

Began in line, went forward to race outside leader, kept pace genuine 1/2L away in middle stages, crept closer on turning, continued to challenge in straight and right in it to 100 M when couldn't match first two.
Away with first few, pressed on but caught 3 wide without cover 1L back, did plenty of work with fast sections, struggling on turning in and soon faded out in straight. (Blood in trachea.)
Ok jump, pushed up to race 3 to 4Ls back on rails, had a soft run to bend, angled 2 wide however caught in traffic for most of straight and was not properly tested.
Out in line, attempted to steady however raced keenly and pulled way forward, raced 4 wide without cover 2Ls back, close enough on turning however hard run took toll and weakened out.
Well enough away, assumed prime spot on back of pace 1 out 1 back, did a little bit of work with speed on, close enough on turning, didn't have a dash and struggled in straight.
Standard jump, settled in behind midfield racing 3 wide 5 to 6Ls back, had cover and suited by pace, found little when asked on turning and gradually lost touch.

Standard getaway, raced 5 to 6Ls back in racing line, suited by fast sectionals and tracked well if not a little keenly on bend, still back between horses turning, only clear at 250 M and closed off well to be nearest on line.
Fast out, assumed spot on leaders back, didn't have an easy time with pace on, still there on turning, found nothing and dropped out easily. (Irregular heart beat.)

No early pace, back with last few soon after, raced 6Ls back on rails, had race run to suit in middle stages, saved ground on turning, held up from turning to 200 M and lost momentum, only fair close thereafter.

Allowed to drop out to rear, suited by fast sections racing 7 to 8Ls back in 2 wide line, travelled well on bend, eased to centre in straight and let down nicely sprinting over the top of rivals to score easily.

Began with usual pace, led them easily, challenged throughout and set solid pace, got a brief break on circle, still 1L clear turning, fought on to 100 M before overhauled. Solid effort with workload.

Away with them, ended up in a midfield position 2 wide 3 to 4Ls back, 3 wide approaching turn but had cover, still keen on bend, into clear running at 300 M and kept finding last furlong but no match for winner.
Slightly slow into stride. Quickly pulled forward to race in 5th within 3Ls of pace coming out of back straight. Similar turning in and fought on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Raced wide down far side in midfield. Still held midfield turning in. Gradually weakened after straightening.
Niggled at early, settling one-back on rails. Gained 3rd turning in. Quickened well to hit front over 150 M out. Won well.
Soon dropped to rear. Hugged inside rails turning for home. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Began well to lead and made most to 150 M. Found no extra nearing finish.
Broke well from wide draw. Raced wide in prominent position, disputing lead around home bend. Fought on under pressure early in straight but unable to sustain effort inside final 200 M.
Began only fairly. Improving along rails towards prominent position when baulked 800 M out. Settled for rear of midfield position thereafter. Made no impression in straight.
Raced in forward of midfield. Dropped out tamely after straightening.
Midfield early. Steadied and slightly lost position approaching Rock. Dropped to last few turning in. Produced moderate late impression.
