Began well, settled at the back. Came under pressure when outpaced approaching Rock. Last into straight. Made significant progress past beaten runners down centre of track. Did best work late.
Always prominent, settling in one-out-one-back position from Rock. 4th and swung under turning in but failed to quicken under pressure.
Didn't enjoy an easy time in the lead after being pressured early and mid race. Faded over the concluding stages.
Settled in last position. Kept towards the inside in the straight and ran on well.
Ridden along vigorously from a wide barrier to be equal leader in the early stages before handing up after the 1200 M to take a trailing position on the fence. Completely gassed in the straight.
Raced handy to the leaders, about 3 back along the fence. Approaching the home turn was carried back through the field, finished off soundly once in the clear.
Raced near last early but commenced to pull mid race and after being caught wide went forward along the back straight & joined the leaders near the 600 M. Stuck to its task well in the run home.
Positioned 2 deep, midfield. Came wide on straightening and finished off solidly.
Began awkwardly and lost ground settling behind midfield on the fence. Peeled out turning for home, struggled thereafter.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Landed in third position, 1 off before improving after the halfway mark to race alongside the leader. Repelled challengers passing the 600 M, kicked on straightening and held rivals at bay.
Began awkwardly & lost ground. Travelled along the fence midfield. Kept on one paced in the straight.
Positioned just off midfield, 3 deep no cover for most of the journey. Never a factor.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Wide at midfield early stages. Allowed to go forward 1000 M out and raced behind the pace. Ran on well in the home straight but unable to threaten winner.
Raced behind midfield. Rallied in the straight and was closest at finish.
Raced along the fence in a rearward spot. Trailed field and had to be pushed to keep pace 700 M out. Last on straightening and never picked up.

Off slowly and was checked to the back. Raced wide and without cover towards the rear, allowed to stride forward 1000 M out. Raced alongside leader on turn but unable to keep pace on straightening and weakened.

Charged forward from widest draw to take the lead. Took a 1L lead into the home straight and extended its break final 200 M. Kept on well closing stages holding comfortable margin to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began fairly but gradually dropped to rear section. Checked at 1200 M and slipped further back. Near last turning for home and made up ground in the straight.
Raced behind the leader in a prominent spot. Remained on same pace in the straight.
Settled on the fence at midfield. Found nothing in the home straight.
Raced in rear section. Made up ground in a 3-wide spot in the back straight. 4-wide behind midfield turning for home. Ran past a few beaten runners in the straight.
Botched the start. Raced 2-wide at midfield. Over-raced in the middle stages and was widest turning for home. Unable to quicken and failed to finish the race off.
3-wide behind midfield early stages. Made progress in the back straight and was 3 to 4Ls off the pace at home turn. Ran on fairly in the straight.
2-wide in a forward spot. 3Ls off the pace at home turn and ran on fairly in the straight.
Box-seated on fence 2Ls back in 3rd or 4th until home turn, stayed on okay without really looking the winner.
Soon led fence, held a slender margin before being headed 300 M out, tipped out of the money final furlong.
3-wide with cover when 1L off pace in 3rd at the 800 M, under pressure and losing prominence making final turn, yielded further ground.
Trapped 4-wide no cover when 2Ls back in 5th at the 800 M, hard pressed to remain in touch turning for home, soon beaten.
3-wide with cover in rear about 4Ls or 5Ls from the lead through to home turn, no impression.
Fractious in gates, flanked leader out 2-wide a neck or so back in 2nd until home straight, led 300 M out, driven out.
Had the 'one-out-one-back' position 2Ls back in 4th till home turn, stayed on fairly well for a place.
Always wide and in rear, about 4Ls behind at the 800 M but more distant on straightening, never on terms.
In rear but just 4Ls down at 800 M and similar margin back turning for home, outpaced by the leading quartet.
Keen when about 5Ls last at 1000 M, 4Ls down in 7th turning for home but very one-paced in the finish.
Slowly away, 10Ls last at 1000 M, niggled along 600 M out, plugged on past a few tired rivals in the home straight.
3-wide no cover throughout, 2Ls back in 3rd at halfway and much the same off home turn, petered out by the 200 M.
Disputed early pace, box-seated from 1000 M to home turn, briefly led 200 M out but couldn't follow through and faded.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Held the 'one-out-one-back' slot in 5th at the 1000 M, enjoyed a cushy trail before straightening and finding very little off the bit, no excuses.
4-back on fence in 8th or so about 5Ls from the pace until final turn, always held by the principals.
Midfield with cover between 3Ls and 5Ls from the pace through to final bend, stayed on pretty well but lacked the winner's kick.
Worse than midfield 6Ls from the speed at halfway, a little closer and 4-wide turning in, quickened up well to lead 150 M out, stayed on well.
Worked hard from wide gate to lead on fence 1100 M out, headed about 200 M out and dropped out quickly.
Slowest away, 8Ls down in rear at the 1000 M and about 5Ls behind off home turn, made some fair late ground down centre of the track.
8Ls back in 10th at 1000 M, one from rear about 6Ls down turning for home, stayed on well down centre of the track for a place.
Disputed early pace out 2-wide, tended to over-race when 1L down in 2nd at 1000 M, vying for lead again off last turn, one-paced and very weak final 200 M.
Eased at start to cross to the rails at rear, suited by the fast pace but never competitive.
Box seated without being made much used, not suited by the fast early sectionals, ran on until 200 M when flattened.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Pushed forward to share the lead with red-hot tempo, trapped 2-wide throughout, faded immediately after straightening.
Always prominent, 1-1/2Ls off the leaders 2-wide, not suited by the fast early tempo, closed the race off strongly to score.

Slow away, pushed along to gain the rail and shared the lead at fast early sectionals, under pressure throughout and used up much more fuel than usual, hung on strongly until 100 M overhauled, still ran on well to the line, solid effort.

Eased at start to cross behind the field and got the fence before the first turn, then pushed along to obtain a midfield spot, 5Ls off the leaders, benefited by the fast pace, made ground steadily 400 M to finish 2nd.
Eased back, raced 3-wide throughout and too keenly, helped by the fast pace but lost too much ground on bend, never a factor.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Trapped 5-wide first bend, then eased further back 7-1/2Ls off the leaders, swept steadily forward on the rails at home bend, suited by the fast tempo but never progressed in final stages.
Midfield, 3Ls off the leaders 2-wide, helped by the fast pace, made ground steadily in straight but not much threats to winner.
Eased to sit behind midfield, 6Ls off the leaders 2-wide, travelled nicely, favoured by the fast pace, stayed flat until 200 M before making some late ground.
Began fairly. Held rails run within 2Ls of pace most of way to 400 M. Gradually faded after straightening.
Broke well and with leaders for first 400 M. Gave ground up Rock.
With leaders briefly, racing wide down far side. Gradually taken back to race in rear before home bend. Made no impression thereafter.
Began fairly, settling in last few on rails. Gradually took closer order around home bend. Gained midfield turning in and sustained effort in straight to take charge over 100 M out. Won comfortably.
Raced wide in midfield down far side after beginning from poor draw. Covered ground on outside making home bend. Ran home one-paced.
Began well. With leaders early, racing very wide without cover. Still 3-wide when one-back in 3rd around home bend. One-paced before finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Broke well. Close up. In similar one-back position turning in. Ran home one-paced.
Soon outpaced to last few. Commenced move around home bend. Finished off race strongly inside final 200 M.
Sluggish at start. Behind midfield of bunched field when checked and lost position coming out of back straight losing many lengths. Never recover.
Led or disputed lead on rails to 250 M. Soon weakened.
Disputed lead throughout far side and around home bend. Got the upper hand of co-leader over 200 M out only to be collared by winner soon afterward.
Raced wide throughout. Began fairly, settling just worse than midfield. Effort rounding home bend. Sustained progress down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Not much early pace, settled well back on fence 10Ls back, aided by pace with leaders 4Ls clear, made progress on bend, held up turning to 150 M, just held ground thereafter.
Restrained from outset, swiftly took a spot on rails 7-8Ls back, had race run to suit with pace on, made improvement on bend, finished race off well making good ground to be nearest on line.
Began with them, slotted into midfield 6Ls away, had a reasonable run with break away leaders putting pace on, close enough on turning, lacked a dash and proved disappointing struggling to line.

No early pace, allowed to settle at tail racing 12Ls back, appreciated fast sections in mid-section with leaders well clear, saved ground on bend, made many lengths from last turning to finish a remarkable 4th.
Away nicely, ended up 6Ls back on rails in midfield, had a reasonable run in middle stages, looked to improve on straightening but held up behind a tiring horse, didn't get going thereafter.
Moderate jump, ended up in midfield 7Ls away on fence, had a soft run in middle stages, in behind horses turning, dashed well when split emerged and finished well for 2nd.
Began with purpose, went forward to race outside leader, refused to settle, kept fast pace on shading leader throughout, under pressure on turning, dropped out quickly.

No early pace and drifted back from a wide alley, ended up nearly a dozen lengths back sharing rear, still well back on bend, made a wide run turning and did best work late to be not far away in finish.

Began with them, took a spot on rails behind leader, allowed first two to get well in front, improved on bend, came with a solid run to hit lead at 150 M, kept grinding away to hold off challengers for deserved win.
Showed customary pace to lead, taken on in front, set frantic sections 5Ls clear of rest, still under siege on circle, weakened on straightening when hard run took toll.
Fairly away, taken back to find cover, ended up behind midfield racing 8Ls away, aided by solid speed at top end, made a 3-wide run turning, closed hard down centre to take placing.

Moderate getaway, showed some pace to take a prominent spot, ended up leading main bunch 5Ls from leaders, made run on inside turning and was a brief chance on straightening, soon faded when couldn't find extra gear.
Showed speed, took up running but worried throughout by outside horse, didn't relax with solid pace on, under pressure on turning, lacked usual finish and faded easily in stretch.
Away well, showed plenty of pace to challenge for front, kept pressure on racing outside leader ensuring genuine tempo, still right there on turning, hard run took toll and weakened last 200 M.
Even jump, pushed along but had to settle for spot behind speed 3Ls back on rails, improved on bend, made nice progress in straight to just miss 2nd.
Tardy to begin, ended up racing in rear half of field, seemed uncomfortable on surface racing 5 to 6Ls back, found little in straight and got further behind in straight.
Showed speed, posted 4 wide 1L back without cover, always working from a wide gate, moved up to share lead leaving bend, held a brief advantage to 200 M before run ended and winner drew away.
Fast away, slotted in on leaders back, had run of race thereafter, tracked well into straight, into clear running at 350 M, went to them easily and went on to score a comfortable victory.
Well away as usual, outpaced and tucked in 3 wide 2Ls back, had cover behind leaders to bend, niggled along turning, failed to respond and dropped out in straight.
Taken back from a wide gate, ended up 7Ls back, aided by tempo, raced 3 wide 7 or more lengths back, continued to improve on bend, made even progress without really being a chance in straight.
No early pace, raced at rear 6 to 7Ls back, helped by speed on, still well back to bend, kept to rails and passed a few tired runners late.
Useful beginning, raced 3 wide 1L back outside leaders, did share of work without cover with the pace on, struggling on turning and weakened out tamely when hard run took toll.
Away nicely, ended up 1x1 on back of pace, had even trip but lost ground at 700 M, urged along turning, never looked a threat in straight but did fight back late to take 4th.
Slow into stride, raced 7Ls away in 2 wide line, helped by pace in mid-section, still well back turning, made limited progress in straight.
Parked behind the speed along the fence. Hit the lead near the 200 M, was given every hope.
Parked at the rear of the field, 2 to 3-wide with cover. Closed off soundly out wide.
Travelled midfield the fence. Became badly unbalanced near the 800 M and was a spent force soon after, compounding easily in the straight. (Bled)
Travelled in last position, never looked a chance.
Travelled 1 out 1 back, had every chance but folded tamely.
Travelled midfield 3-wide with cover. Made a short dash early in the straight but run ended after the 200 M.
Was slow to begin and then was ridden along to go forward travelling in a handy position, 3 deep with cover. Ran on satisfactorily despite being bumped early in the straight.
Travelled in 2-wide position with cover, close to midfield. Took a narrow split on straightening & let down strongly to win effortlessly.
Worked hard to go forward and led from after the 800 M 2-wide no cover. Struggled in the run home.
Raced behind midfield 2 to 3 off with cover. Finished off dourly.
Raced along the rail at the rear. Made no impression in the final stages.
Parked midfield on the fence. 1 off with cover. Closed off well through the middle of the field in the straight.
Raced on the speed along the fence and handed up the lead near the 800 M. Made a dash clear early in the straight but was headed near the 200 M & faded thereafter.
For the major part of the race travelled 3-wide and without cover on the speed. Was a beaten horse before the 400 M.
Dropped back to a rearward position. Had a ground saving trip around the turn and was 4 to 5Ls back on straightening. Steadily made up ground but unable to sustain effort final 100 M.
Midfield without cover early stages. Eased further back after 1200 M to rear section. Near last on straightening and showed nothing the straight.
2-wide at midfield. 3Ls off the pace turning for home. Kept on without threatening.
Niggled along early to be among leaders. Held a narrow advantage turning into home straight but weakened thereafter.
Taken back to race at the rear. Trailed field into the home straight and closed the race off strongly.
Raced along the rails behind midfield. Remained on the fence and 3Ls off the pace at home turn. Kept on same speed in home straight.
2-wide behind the leaders. Quickened when asked 400 M out and charged to the lead final 200 M. Kept on gamely final stages to hold off rival.
Jumped well from widest draw and raced in a disputed lead. Raced keenly 2-wide alongside the leader turning for home. Stayed on same pace and faded final 200 M.
Raced in a prominent spot behind the leaders. Responded well when asked on straightening but unable to find enough to match strides with winner in the closing stages.
2-wide behind midfield. Near last on straightening. Rallied home and made up good ground in the straight.
On fence but about 10Ls back in 10th at 1000 M, closer but without a clear passage turning for home, could only stay on one-paced.
Mostly midfield with cover about 6Ls or so off the pace through to 600 M out, ran on okay for a place.
Worse than midfield at least 10Ls early on, headway about 8Ls back turning for home, ran on past several spent rivals to nick 2nd late.

About 4Ls back in 3rd at 1000 M, struggling to maintain this proximity before the home turn, dropped out.
Very slowly away about 7Ls behind, a good 16Ls last 900 M out, still a long way back on straightening, no impression.
Never travelled well out wide, over 10Ls back in 11th at 1000 M, widest and struggling entering homestretch, eased down soon after.
Dwelt, losing about 8Ls and raced about 15Ls adrift of the leader 1000 M out, never likely to finish better than midfield.
Led on fence at 1400 M, soon 3Ls to 4Ls clear, faded once grabbed by the winner 200 M out.
Awkward break, worse than midfield about 8Ls from the speed from 1200 M to home turn, plugged on dourly late, never nearer.
6Ls down in 4th at 1000 M and 4Ls back in 5th swinging for home, given every chance to place but lacked the gears.

No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Trailed leader by 2Ls on fence in 2nd at 1400 M, 4Ls back in 2nd at 1000 M, assumed the lead 200 M out and punched out to score.
Led by 1L on fence at 1000 M and set a sedate pace, still going well turning in but headed by winner 250 M out, couldn't respond.
6Ls behind with cover in 10th at 1000 M, out deep and hard pressed to improve making last turn, offered very little.
Keen when 4-back on fence in midfield about 4Ls from speed until straightening, 1L down vying for 3rd at 200 M, fell out of the money late.
Keen 2-wide in midfield about 4Ls back early on, similarly placed at last turn, checked when tight for room at 200 M, no further impact.
One from rear about 9Ls off early pace, slow tempo worked against him and never on terms.
Slow away and further back than usual, in 12th out 2-wide, not helped by slow pace, never got into it.
5-back on fence towards rear at least 6Ls from the heat, marginally closer taking last turn but never on terms with principals.
3-back on fence about 4Ls down in midfield until the 600 M, quickened up nicely off last turn to lead 250 M out, driven out.
Mostly 3-wide but with cover about 5Ls back at halfway, under pressure out 4-deep trying to draw closer off last turn, didn't succeed.
3Ls back in 4th out 2-wide at 1000 M, close up through to homestretch, battling for a minor placing when hindered 200 M out, faded final 100 M.
Box-seated in 3rd about 2Ls off pace at 1200 M and still there turning in, found disappointingly little given the cushy trip and slow tempo.
Midfield but left 3-wide no cover at 1000 M when 4Ls off pace, 4-wide on straightening, kept on pretty well for a place despite tough trip.
Went back from widest gate and 9Ls last at 1200 M, a little closer but still at the tail 400 M out, made some minor late ground.
Trapped wide through initial stages, 1L back out 2-wide in 2nd from 1000 M until straightening for home, swamped insider final 200 M.
Pushed to secure the box seat from the rail-draw, not suited by the fast early tempo, finished the race off strongly in straight and ran 2nd.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Pushed to obtain a position better than midfield, 4Ls off the leader 2-wide, benefited by the fast pace, however soon emptied 500 M.
Eased to sit in midfield, 6Ls off the leader along the fence, helped by the fast pace, progressed steadily 600 M, but made no more ground in last quarter.
Eased back, hung out badly on bends and raced extremely wide throughout, never competitive.
Pushed to occupy a prominent spot as in its last start, 2 to 3-wide on bend, not suited by the fast pace, faded last 400 M.
Hard ridden early but failed to muster speed, only be able to take a midfield spot, 6Ls off the leader 2 to 3-wide, helped by the fast tempo, but made no ground in straight.
Hard ridden to take the rail and lead by 2Ls, clocked disadvantageous fast early sectionals without any other pressure, never had challenger and scored a stylish victory.

Eased at start to get across closer to the rail behind the field, then hard ridden to regain a midfield spot, 3-1/2Ls off the leader, benefited by the fast pace, ran on well to the line to secure placing.
Eased back, 7-1/2Ls off the leader, helped by the fast pace but trapped 3 to 5-wide and lost ground, no progress in final stages.
At rear, never travelled on the bridle, was carried out to 7-wide at 1st bend and on straightening, lost too much ground, never a factor.
Eased to sit just off the leader 2 to 3-wide, harmed by the fast early sectionals, soon out of fuel 400 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Hard ridden to take a forward spot, not suited by the fast pace, trapped 4 to 5-wide throughout and lost too much ground, dropped off 500, tailed out.
Eased at start to cross to the rails at rear, 9Ls behind the leader, favoured by the fast pace, made some ground 400 M without threatening placegetters.
Travelled in 6th just behind midfield of small field. Took closer order around home bend. Quickened well from midfield into straight to take command over 200 M out. Convincingly.
Travelled in rear. Ran on steadily after straightening. Lost 2nd late.
Settled in rear of midfield. Slightly worse upon straightening but fought on dourly to snatch 2nd final strides.
Stalked leader to 400 M. Came to challenge upon straightening but failed to respond under pressure inside final 200 M.
Began fairly. Travelled in 3rd within 4Ls of pace far side. Became 2-back on rails turning for home but in box seat upon straightening. Soon weakened. (Blood in tracha.)
Began fairly from wide draw. Took up running around stables bend and led until tiring noticeably over 300 M out.
Raced 2-wide in midfield of strung-out small field. Commenced move turning for home and held good place chance when amongst leaders early in straight. Soon found no extra.
Settled at the back. Came to challenge late inside final 300 M. Ran past beaten horses.
Standard jump, raced 8Ls back in 2 wide line, helped by fast pace, same margin back turning, switched out at 300 M, made many lengths late to overhaul leader right on line.

Showed early pace, took a trail on first two but still worked tracking solid pace, 2Ls back on rails on circle, switched out turning, challenged at 300 M, led briefly at 150 M but couldn't repell challengers late. (Solid effort.)
Not much early dash, raced 9 to 10Ls back in 2 wide line, suited by solid pace in middle stages, still well back despite improving on bend, made even ground in straight to be nearest on line.

Fast beginning pressed on in search of lead, raced 1/2L away outside leader, kept speed solid in mid-section, loomed closer leaving bend, took over on turning and then to 200 M before workload took effect. Held on gamely.
Showed early pace, raced just off leaders 2Ls back following a hot pace, did share of work to bend, couldn't dash again in straight and gradually faded out.
Standard jump, ended up with 10 or so lengths back behind midfield, niggled along on circle, kept to rails saving ground on straightening, never got in touch and made only minor late ground.

Out first, allowed to relax 5Ls back trailling pace group, had a good run in mid-section, made gradual progress on bend, went to them easily passing 150 M and kept going strongly before being just caught on line.
Awkwardly away, ended up 7Ls back in midfield, suited by solid sections, still had job to do leaving bend, switched to middle and made plenty of ground to 100 M before run ended.
Restrained from outset, ended up next to last 10 or so lengths pack, aided by solid pace, still well back in impossible spot on bend, made a little late ground passing tired horses.
Moderate jump, ended up 6 to 7Ls back in midfield on fence, had an easy time with pace on, saved ground on bend, made plenty of headway in straight to be nearest on line and made frame.
Reasonable jump, posted 3 wide without cover 6Ls back, did plenty of work with pace on in mid-section, capitulated easily in straight to be well beaten.
Showed plenty of pace, led them and set a solid speed throughout, held a 1/2L advantage on bend, couldn't find when challenged turning and weakened out tamely.
No early pace and restored from an outside draw, raced 12Ls away in mid-section, helped by pace in mid-section, didn't find when asked and only beat tired runners to the line.
Taken back from gate, raced rear to last 10Ls of pace, saved ground on rails and aided by pace, still had plenty to do turning, found little and battled away in straight.
Began well from poor draw. Raced wide without cover in prominent position. Still 3 wide disputing 3rd around home bend and into straight. One-paced.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Broke well from middle draw, settling 3 wide without cover just off the speed. Improved to 2nd outside leader turning for home and soon hit front. Won easily.
Close up early, settling wide in forward of midfield. Similar position turning in. Kept on before finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Settled at the back. Briefly baulked upon straightening. Made up good ground inside final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Mainly in midfield far side and around home bend. Commenced run shortly after straightening and could only produce moderate headway without quickening.
Broke well. Prominent far side. Gained narrow advantage coming out of back straight. Led to 400 M and gradually weakened.
Never better than midfield on rails. Stumbled around home bend and baulked on rails early in straight. No further impression.
Raced wide in last few. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M down centre of track.
Prominent to straight. Dropped out.
Moderate start. Soon picked up to lead on rails. Taken back to hold one back position on rails coming out of back straight. Similar turning in. Soon dropped out tamely.
Began fairly. Taken to rear from widest draw before moving back up to rear of midfield shortly after. Similar turning in. Produced moderate late headway inside final 200 M.
Settled on rails in forward of midfield. Came to challenge under pressure upon straightening. Ran on to reach 2nd passing 200 M but safely held throughout closing stages.
Niggled at early. Raced mostly 3 or 4 wide behind midfield. Ran home one-paced.

Jumped well despite a bump, assumed coveted 1 out 1 back role, had ideal run 2Ls back on circle, made a 3 wide bid on turning in, took over at 300 M and continued to line strongly despite 2nd getting close late.

Standard jump, settled closer than usual 5Ls away on fence, still a little keen and hung in on bend, travelled well enough turning, didn't have extra dash and just held ground between horses in straight.
Lacked early pace, assumed spot 8 to 9Ls away on fence, didn't settle in mid-section, saved ground on rails rounding bend, lacked extra gear and just battled.

Fast into stride, pressed on to lead, rolled along at an even pace, backed off on circle before quickening up from 600 M, still 1L clear on turning, kept kicking to 250 M before overhauled, couldn't find extra level.
Made at beginning, settled 10Ls back in 2 wide line, had a reasonable run, still back between horses on turning, made genuine progress from impossible spot but peaked on run last 100 M.
No pace from outset and soon towards rear, raced 2 wide 10 to 12Ls away, still well back last on bend, switched between horses turning and only warmed up late making good ground when race was over.

No early pace, settled in behind midfield 7Ls back in 2 wide line, came 3 wide with trail on bend, made even progress between horses to do best work late under hands and heels. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well, assumed a prominent role on leaders back, had even run with fair pace on, right there on turning, took gap at 300 M, kept on strongly for 3rd.

Drifted back from an awkward alley, raced 5Ls back in 2 wide line, travelled well tracking eventual winner on bend, shifted on numerous occasions over last 400 M and steadied twice, charged late and unlucky not to win.
Standard jump, went forward to race, outside leader, did some work with even sections, right there 1L down on turning, didn't have a dash and just plugged on holding ground in straight.
No early toe and restrained from a wide gate, ended up 12Ls back, proved difficult to settle racing 3 wide at rear, had job to do on turning, made some progress passed tired runners in straight.
Ordinary jump, posted 3 wide with cover 9 to 10Ls back, always working in run, came 4 wide on circle, no impression in straight, well beaten.
Fair to begin, slotted into spot on fence, raced 4Ls away on bend, had a quiet run until turning, made some ground at 300 M, didn't finish off and dropped out tamely thereafter.
Fair to jump, attempted to slot in but posted 3 wide without cover 6 to 7Ls back, improved on bend 4 wide, 3Ls down on turning, kept on nicely in straight and made plenty of ground to make frame.
Began well. Settled on rails in midfield. Commenced run around home bend, gaining 3rd some 2Ls back shortly after straightening. Continued to close on leaders only to lose out on a placing late.
Settled at the back. Made steady headway down inner of straight to be nearest at finish.
Began fairly. Soon dropped to rear of field. Kept on one pace in straight.
Mainly around midfield to straight. Shifted out for a clear run upon straightening and ran on steadily under pressure.
Began early. Soon picked up to race just outside leader. Quickened upon straightening to nearly draw level holding every chance only to fail by a narrow margin.
Well there to straight. Dropped out.

Broke well. Soon taken back to race towards rear but was wide without cover early far side. Obtained rails run up Rock and similar turning in. Finished off race strongly inside final 200 M to snatch victory near line.
Raced in 5th in better than midfield position. Dropped to midfield around home bend. Ran home one-paced.
Jumped best to lead. Attempted to make all. Fought on dourly to hold slender advantage throughout straight only to be pipped at post.
Slightly sluggish at start. Quickly driven from wide draw to race in prominent 4th within 2Ls of pace. Similar turning in but soon weakened under pressure.
Soon in rear. Always struggling.
Raced mainly 2-wide in midfield. Lost position turning in but produced good late headway inside final 200 M.

Landed 1 out, 1 back. Peeled out turning for home and raced clear after the 200 M to win convincingly.
In the early and middle stages proved difficult to settle and raced without cover, 3-wide close to the speed then in the straight gave ground.
Positioned 3 deep midfield with cover. Found little after shifting wide in the straight.
Raced outside the leader. Faded over the concluding stages.
Was slow to begin and lost a considerable amount of ground settling last. Railed up in the straight and closed of strongly.
Tracked the leader on the fence and enjoyed the run of the race. Ran to the post honestly after having every conceivable chance.
Led along the fence. Overhauled near the 200 M, and weakened thereafter.
Began awkwardly and took up a position on the fence just off midfield. Worked home well enough without ever threatening.
Covered ground at the rear of the field, 3 deep with cover. Struggled under pressure.
Throughout the race travelled on the speed however was 4-wide and without cover. Gave ground after the 500 M and finished tailed out. To Trial.
From a wide barrier was taken across behind runners in the early stages and raced near the tail of the field. Made reasonable ground late.
3Ls off the lead in 4th place in back straight. Continued well in the home straight and came up just short in catching the winner.
Jumped awkwardly and was taken back. Raced along the rails behind midfield. Kept on steadily in the straight and made up some ground.
Raced along the rails at midfield. Switched out on straightening and steadily made up ground to be closest at finish.
Led field until 200 M out. Unable to find extra final stages to hold off placegetters.
Raced at the back and trailed field into the home straight. Ran home without threatening.
2-wide behind the leader. 1/2L off the pace turning for home and was in a disputed lead 250 M out. Unable to find more to remain in contention final stages.
2-wide behind midfield. Widest turning in and made up a bit of ground in the final stages.
Taken back from widest draw to race in rear section. Unable to get a clear run for the majority of the home straight.
Raced on the fence and better than midfield. Unable to turn up a notch in the straight and continued to run on same pace to the line.
Boxed-seated behind the leader. Quickened after straightening and took the lead inside final 150 M. Kept on well latter stages to deny rivals.
2-wide at midfield. Remained on same pace in the home straight and weakened final stages.
Taken back to race in rear section. Near last turning in and ran home without threatening.
4Ls back in 4th passing post for first time, same margin behind when 3-wide turning for home, had his chance to place but was tipped out on the line.
10Ls last early on and similarly placed making final turn, made some minor late ground but posed little danger.

Under pressure from the off, midfield position about 5Ls back with cover at halfway, beaten at the home turn.
2-wide 1L back in 2nd 1400 M out, struggling to remain in touch turning for home, steadily yielded ground.
Never better than midfield, in 8th about 6Ls down early on and worse off turning for home, clawed back some minor late ground.
Box-seated in 3rd on fence 2Ls from the front until straightening for home when under pressure, dug in to lead 150 M out, kept on dourly.
In rear about 8Ls behind early pace, tried to press forward from the 600 M and 4-wide turning for home, failed to make an impact.
Led by 1L on fence passing post first time round, set a slow pace, joined for the lead 500 M out, weakened out of the money inside 150 M, no excuses. (Sore tendon next day.)
4-back on fence about 5Ls off pace around midfield until final bend, ran on well despite hanging out to nick 3rd on the line.
Held up 3-wide but with cover in rear before looping field to dispute the lead 500 M out, had every chance but outpaced final 200 M.
3-back on fence about 4Ls down through to final turn, had his chance to place but lacked the turn of foot.
Led early on before ceding the advantage 1100 M out, box-seated down backstretch but was left behind when tempo quickened 600 M out.
8Ls back in 10th at 1200 M, marginally closer swinging for homestretch, never likely to make an impact. (Lost plate.)
Worse than midfield at least 5Ls from the pace until straightening, remained a good distance from the firing line.
2-wide in 7th about 4Ls or 5Ls down through to final bend, ran on okay but he just lacked the dash of the leading trio.
4-back on fence in 8th about 5Ls or 6Ls from the speed from 1200 M to final bend, always well outpaced.
Restrained in rear between 8Ls and 10Ls from speed until home turn, found no room until inside the 200 M, never got a proper crack at them.
3-back on fence in 6th about 4Ls back at halfway, closer when 4-wide turning for home in 5th, stayed on well to join VIVA FIGHTER on line.
9Ls back in 11th early on and still one from rear off last turn, very one-paced.
Midfield early, hung out at halfway, made a forward move to lead by a neck 500 M out, kept on gamely, joined by MASTERY on the wire.
1L back in 2nd at the 1000 M, tended to over-race, unbalanced 600 M out, 4th but still close-up turning in, hung in and soon beaten.
4Ls back in mid-division in middle stages, pressed forward on the circle to be a neck down off final bend, had his chance to win but outpaced final 200 M.
Pressed on out 3-wide no cover to lead on fence by 1L at the 1000 M, headed 500 M out and dropped out from the top of the home straight.
Pushed to cross to the rails and take the box seat, failed to accelerate as the pace went on from 600 M, just held ground in final stages.

Eased back as usual, 7Ls off the leader 2-wide, followed the eventual winner to make an early move from 800 M around the field, finished the race off strongly despite harmed by the slow pace and being wide at home bend.

Eased to rear but failed to get cover, trapped 3-wide throughout and lost too much ground, made steady move from 800 M, joined lead 600 M, benefited by the slow pace, dashed well in straight and won by a narrow margin.
Eased to sit in midfield, 4Ls behind the leader along the rails, on heels 1000 M then swept to 2-wide, disadvantaged by the slow pace, just ran on ok in final stages.

Pushed to take a prominent spot on the rails early, swept forward 2-wide as the pace slowed down in mid-sections, picked up and tackled the leader from 600 M, ran on strongly to the line, just beaten by a neck.
Awkward away, at back, 6-1/2Ls behind the leader 2-wide, harmed by the slow pace, little dash 200 M, but help up and checked 100 M.
Pushed to take rail and led by 1-1/2Ls at advantageous slow early sectionals, received pressure from 600 M, hung on until 200 M when overhauled, still ran on well to the line although unplaced.
Eased to sit about midfield, 4-1/2Ls behind the leader 2-wide, dashed strongly 200 M despite not suited by the slow pace.
Pushed to occupy a spot behind the pace group, 3Ls off the leader 2-wide, not suited by the slow pace, just held ground in straight.
Midfield, 5Ls off the leader along the fence, harmed by the slow tempo, stayed flat until 200 M delivering little dash.
Eased to sit behind the pace group, 3Ls off the leader along the fence, not suited by the slow tempo, very one paced, no progress in the fast-running last quarter.
Eased to rear and secured a rail-run, 7-1/2Ls off the leader, harmed by the slow pace, no turn of foot in straight.
Settled in rear of midfield. Commenced move after straightening and forged into the lead nearing finish. Won well.
Trailed the field throughout. Never seen with a chance.
Raced 3-wide in prominent position to home bend. Dropped out.
Midfield when checked and lost position 1000 M out. Travelled behind midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Prominent in one-out-one-back position. Fought on steadily under pressure to hold a place the length of straight.
Began moderately. Raced in one-back position on rails. Kept on under pressure before finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Midfield most of way. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Towards rear. Ran home well, doing best work late.
Broke best to lead and attempted to make all. Went 1L clear inside 200 M only to be collared by fast-finishing winner close to line.
Raced outside leader, led or disputed lead around Rock. Just a neck off the pace turning in but could only keep on at the same pace without quickening.
Always in last few.
Travelled on rails in midfield. Came under pressure rounding home bend. Worked home steadily to be nearest at finish.
Began with rest, faded back to slot into running line 6-7Ls away, not helped by slow tempo, improved 3-wide with cover passing Rock, made some late progress down middle without threatening.

Reasonable jump, ended up posted 3-wide 4-5Ls back in midfield without cover, did it tough despite modest tempo, improved on bend to be 3Ls back turning, stuck to task and finished creditably despite covering ground.
Slow into stride, ended up sharing near 7-8Ls on fence, unsuited by slow tempo, still last turning, battled to line. (Roarer.)
Began nicely, took up a prominent position, had an easy time with slow sections, still 1L back on bend, couldn't respond when sprint went on and dropped out of it late.

No early toe, drifted back to rear racing 7-8Ls back, unsuited by slow sections, tracked up 3-wide with cover along back, kept improving on bend, made gradual progress down middle to be nearest on line.

Average jump and failed to muster, settled further back than intended 3-4Ls away in running line, slow pace not ideal, tracked well between horses on bend, made even headway in straight to finish not far away.

Began with more purpose, settled closer than usual, ended up 3-4Ls back on rails, used nothing with lack of speed on, tracked into clear making on straightening, came with well timed run to hit lead late and score narrowly.

Out well, pressed on from widest alley to eventually lead on first bend, controlled race perfectly with slow speed, 1L clear on turning, made rest chose and kept on strongly before being overhauled late.
Out fairly, ended up 6Ls back in running line, raced keenly with slow tempo, race not run to suit, flat footed when they sprinted, unable to make progress in straight.
No pace from outset, ended up 5Ls back on rails, had a quiet trip but raced keenly, gained ground on bend, made plenty of progress along inside in straight to make frame. (Bled both nostrils.)
Well enough to begin, slotted into prime position, 2Ls back in running line, had ideal run thereafter with slow pace, niggled along to go with them on turning, found little and dropped out easily.
Displayed expected speed to take lead, elected for a trail leaving first turn, had soft run throughout, angled out to challenge on turning, kept coming when hard riding and went down in 3 way go.
Led comfortably, rolled along setting pace to suit 2Ls clear, began to increase tempo from midpoint, same margin in front turning in, accelerated away last 200 M to score with ease.
Little pace from jump, ended up at rear of small field 4 to 5Ls back, not suited by average early pace, set a task when pace improved, still at rear switching at 350 M, closed evenly for 3rd.
Jumped OK, settled in 1 out 1 back spot, travelled well throughout, niggled along to improve on bend when pace quickened, offered little and dropped out tamely in straight.
Out evenly, took a spot outside leader racing 1 to 2Ls back, had an easy run with steady pace to midpoint, made to chase on circle, kept on gamely but no match for winner who drew away late.
Out fairly, landed spot 3 to 4Ls back on fence, used little in run, unsuited when asked to sprint from 600 M, steadily improved but run ended at 200 M and struggled thereafter.
Raced 2 deep midfield. Pressured from the 600 M to improve but failed to do so finding nothing extra at the business end.
Raced midfield the fence. Rolled off fence after the 500 M and ran on fairly once in the clear.
Began awkwardly and raced on the bridle midfield 3 deep, obtained cover after the 800 M. Ran to the line well.
Travelled in 2nd last position 1 off with cover. Dropped out in the straight.
After the 900 M while racing in 2nd position was carried wider by another runner. As a result then travelled wide and without cover for the remainder of the race and weakened in the run home.
Stalked the leader early before shifting out and taking up a 2-wide line near the 800 M. Had every chance.
Travelled handy to the leaders, 2-wide with cover, while over racing. Ran into small traffic problems early in the straight but was never likely when clear.
Travelled 2-wide midfield with cover. Made ground without threatening.
Shot straight to the lead from wide alley and made every post a winner. Won in good fashion.
Raced near the rear of the field 1 off with cover. Came widest in the straight but peaked on its run inside the furlong.
Began awkwardly and raced in last position. Made some ground on tiring runners late.
Midfield position 3-wide with cover. Stayed on dourly.

Was slow to begin, then lost further ground when being steadied away from heels settling behind midfield the fence. Ridden along from the 600 M, but made no appreciable ground along the rail in the straight.
Settled 3 back the fence early and tracked the leader by the home turn. Kept on fairly over the final stages.
Raced in a prominent spot behind the leader. Switched out and quickened nicely on straightening. Ran down early leader to take control final 200 M. Scored well.
Wide at midfield early stages. Taken further back to rear section to find cover 1200 M out. Towards rear on straightening and didn't find much in the straight.
Better than midfield and never more than 3Ls off the lead. Remained on same pace in the straight.
Dropped to the rear and trailed field until home straight. Rallied home and was closest at finish.
Raced along the fence at midfield. Hard ridden to keep up at home turn and found nothing in the straight.
Took the lead shortly after start. Held a length's advantage on straightening but was caught by eventual winner 200 M out. Continued well in the final stages and held on for 2nd.
Taken back across to the fence and raced in rear section. Ran on only fairly and never threatened.
3-wide in a forward spot. A length off the leader turning for home but remained 3-wide. Unable to keep pace and faded final 200 M.
Off slowly and was ridden along to be at midfield. Raced keenly throughout and remained in midfield turning for home. Made up some late ground in the home straight.
Wide and without cover at midfield. Pushed along making home turn and unable to quicken on straightening. Checked 200 M out and found nothing thereafter.
Allowed to drop back to rear section. Towards the back on straightening and ran into some trouble 300 M out. Closed the race off well.
2-wide behind the leader. Kept pace with eventual winner in the early part of the straight but unable to turn up a notch to remain in contention final stages.
Off slowly and was niggled along to be behind midfield. Made an impressive rally through traffic in the home straight to grab a minor placing.
Switched inside from wide gate to be 10Ls last at the 1000 M, about 8Ls back making final turn, made zero impression.
About 5Ls back in 6th at the 800 M and 3Ls down in 5th off last turn, had his opportunity to place but failed to take advantage.
Box-seated disputing 2nd place at 1000 M, hit the front turning for home but headed again by the 200 M, dropped out rapidly.
3-wide no cover in midfield about 6Ls from the lead at halfway, closer still in midfield turning for home, petered out by the 200 M.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Slowest out, always in rear, between 5Ls and 8Ls from the speed through to final bend, never genuinely competitive.
7Ls back in about 8th or 9th through early stages, closer turning for home, vying for the lead 200 M out but outpaced thereafter.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
On the rail but well back early on, about 7Ls behind in middle stages, ran on well late but failed to get to grips with the winner.
No cover (3 and 4-deep) early on, 4-wide and about 10th and hung out towards stands' rails off last bend, stayed on okay without matching leading trio.
Led early on by 2Ls, set a brisk tempo before being headed at entrance to home straight, fizzled out and eased down late.
One from rear about 10Ls behind at 1000 M and much the same turning in, remained among the stragglers in rear.
On fence in midfield about 5Ls back at halfway, good progress saving ground along the inner to lead 200 M out, kept up to his work.
Disputing 2nd about 2Ls off the pace at 1000 M, 1L back in 3rd at the last bend and still right there 200 M out, very tired thereafter.
3-wide with cover about 3Ls down in 6th at 1000 M, loomed 4-wide off last turn for a clear lead 300 M out, driven out for another decisive win.
Close-up throughout, 2-wide and 2Ls back in 4th at 1000 M, 1L back in 2nd at last bend, no chance with winner but stayed on best of the rest for 2nd.
Slowly away, 3-back on fence about 4Ls from the speed at 1000 M and similar taking last bend, well held but plugged on dourly for a place.
Raced and 3 and 4-wide (sometimes without cover down backstretch), 5Ls down in 9th at halfway, couldn't draw any closer in final stages. (Mildly lame next day.)
Never better than midfield or 4Ls or 5Ls from the pace, posed no great threat in the concluding stages.
In rear early on about 7Ls from the speed, same position and driven along turning for home, made minor late ground through spent rivals.
Midfield about 4Ls from the speed at 1000 M and same taking last bend, had his chance to place but lacked the follow-through.
Worse than midfield about 6Ls behind with cover at 1000 M, 5-wide (widest of all) from the 600 M, didn't find much off the bridle.
A neck 2nd out 2-wide 1100 M out, lost this position at top of home straight and swamped final 200 M.
Best away, settled nicely on fence about 2Ls back in 5th at the 800 M, still thereabouts making last turn but failed to remain in touch.
Worse than midfield about 6Ls off speed in middle stages, about 4Ls down in mid-division at last turn, never dangerous.
Fractious in gates and slowest out, 3-wide no cover when 2Ls back in 3rd at 1000 M, struggling to lie up 700 M out, beaten turning in.
Fractious in gates, one from rear about 8Ls last at 1000 M, still well back when short of room at 200 M and 100 M out, never likely to figure.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Shared the lead with disadvantageous fast early sectionals on the inside part of track, not suited by the racing situation, still ran on well to the line.
Slow away, pushed to secure a forward spot close to the outside fence, 1-1/2Ls off the fast pace, progressed steadily 300 M to win.
Soon crossed towards the outer part of track and shared the lead, not suited by the fast early sectionals, faded 300 M.
Eased back, 4-1/2Ls off the leader close to the outer part of track, favoured by the fast pace, but no progress in final stages.
Eased to sit in midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the leader on inside part of track, helped by the fast pace, however never progressed, flattened 250 M.
Eased to sit in midfield on the inside part of track, 3-1/2Ls off the leader, suited by the fast tempo, but no progress in last quarter.
Shared the lead along the outside fence, harmed by the fast early sectionals, dominated 400 M, hung on until 100 M when overhauled, ran on for 2nd.
Eased back to cross towards the outer part of track, 4-1/2Ls off the leader, suited by the fast pace, blocked 4-2, lacked turn of foot and just ran on when clear.
Just behind the pace group, 2Ls off the leader close to the outside fence, favoured by the fast pace, held up for running 4-2, no turn of foot when clear.

Hard ridden to obtain a prominent spot close to the outside fence, 2Ls off the fast pace, ridden along vigorously from 500 M to hold position but never responded. (Nasal discharge and throat inflamation.)
Eased back, 4-1/2Ls off the leader along the outside fence, benefited by the fast pace, made ground steadily 250 M.
Eased to sit just behind the pace group, 2Ls off the fast pace in middle of part of track, no turn of foot in last section, raced flat.

Eased back to cross towards the outside part of track, 6Ls off the leader, helped by the fast pace but failed to find clear running until 200 M, swept back to the inside of track, dashed well when clear to grab 3rd.
Just behind the pace group on inside part of track, 2-1/2Ls off the fast pace, made some ground 450 M, but soon out of fuel and flattened 250 M.

Began well from wide draw. Quickly into the lead despite staying wide. Crossed to rails approaching home bend and led field until narrowly headed upon straightening. Fought on dourly before finding no extra 150 M out.
Slowly away. Gradually picked up to just behind midfield position on rails. Briefly baulked for a run early in straight but could make no impression inside final 200 M.
Prominent. Travelled in 2L 4th 2-wide most of way. Gradually faded after straightening.
Began well from middle draw. With leaders early. Gradually taken back to race wide in forward of midfield. Weakened under pressure after straightening.
Sluggish at start. Always struggling in last few.
Slightly slow out. Soon picked up to one-back position on rails. Remained same turning in but soon dropped out tamely.
Began well. Settled in last few. Responded well down centre of straight to do best work late.
Began only fairly. Travelled wide towards rear after beginning from poor draw. Remained wide around home bend. Tight behind runners upon straightening. Kept on without quickening.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Behind midfield early. Improved to forward of midfield before home bend. Briefly baulked after straightening. Ran on under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Settled mainly in 5th in better than midfield. Commenced move turning in gaining a 2L 3rd early in straight. Fought on steadily without threatening.
Soon taken back to rear from wide draw. Behind runners early in straight. Obtained a clear passage passing 200 M. Ran on. Never nearer.
Began fairly. Raced mainly 3 wide in midfield. Lost position slightly turning in and raced tight between and behind runners early in straight. Fought on steadily without threatening.

Began fairly. Midfield early but soon picked up to 1 out 1 back position approaching home bend. Gained narrow advantage upon straightening and hung on well to the line despite hanging in all the time.
Began in line, ended up 2 to 3Ls back in 2 wide line, had a suitable run behind pace, travelled well on bend, lacked usual dash in straight but still managed to make steady headway to find frame.
Bounced out, held lead however pressured throughout by outside horse, still kicked back underneath to be 1/2L down turning, kept finding but just lacked extra to go with first two late.

Began well enough, up challenging early before dropping into a 1 out 1 back slot, had run of race thereafter, in mix at 300 M, just unable to lift last 200 M but held ground creditably in run to line.
Ordinary jump, ended up detached at rear, was too far away to be competitive, got no closer in run to line. (Rider reported didn't handle track.)
Average jump, ended up in behind midfield but lost position to be 10Ls or so back, kept to rails, never really looked comfortable and struggled in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Out with rest, allowed to slot in for a trail 3 to 4Ls back on rails, enjoyed an easy time in the middle stages, held up turning in, made even progress however lacked usual finish late.
Amongst first to hit ground, raced 3 wide outside leaders without cover, did it tough throughout with solid sections, still there on turning, faded out quickly from 300 M.
Reasonable jump, took a trailing position on leaders 1L back, enjoyed an easy time to bend, eased 2 wide tracking eventual winner, had a chance to 200 M but failed to find extra late.
Began only fairly, ended up 5Ls away in 2 wide line, suited by reasonable pace, improved 3 wide on circle, switched out in straight and closed off nicely making many lengths for 2nd.
Moderate jump, raced more than 10Ls back, made ground on circle however hung dramatically making bend 5 wide, made some ground in straight but run ended at 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)

Out in line, drove up to race outside leader sharing lead, continued to shade inside horse throughout, 1/2L clear on turning, held advantage most of straight and drew away late to score a shade easily in finish.
No early pace, ended up well back 10 lengths away, made gradual progress on bend, still had job to do on turning, passed some tired runners in run to line.
Broke well. Settled 2-wide just off the pace. Dropped to 2L 4th rounding home bend. Cruised to lead inside 200 M. Unchallenged.
Never better than midfield. Kept on well without quickening.
Rear early. Gradually picked up to just worse than midfield on rails. Kept on until steadied passing 200 M.
Very slowly away. Trailed the field to straight. Only ran past beaten horses.
Broke well. Settled at the back. Ran on strongly inside final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Raced inside in prominent position to straight. Gradually weakened.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Always struggling at the back. Never seen with a chance.
Gradually improved to prominent position, stalking leader around home bend. Came to challenge upon straightening but unable to quicken under pressure.
Travelled in forward of midfield. Ran on steadily in straight without threatening.
Broke well to lead from widest draw, crossing to rails passing 1200 M. Headed 200 M out and soon swamped.
Travelled on rails just better than midfield. Took closer order turning for home but baulked for a run until 200 M. Sustained headway to finish.
Towards rear. Making good progress when tightened for a run over 100 M out.

Slow away, re-gathered to be 6 to 7Ls back on rails, not asked in mid-section however disadvantaged by pace, saved ground in bend, made ground inside horses in straight (steadied 150 M) making good progress from impossible spot.
Jumped sharply, took ideal spot 1 out 1 back, travelled keenly with steady pace, still right there rounding bend, failed to accelerate when they sprinted and lost touch over concluding stages.

Not much early pace, allowed to drift back and race 3 wide behind midfield 6Ls back, unsuited by speed and pushed 4 wide turning, set impossible task on turning coming widest, run ended at 200 M after workload took toll.
Standard jump, ended up sharing rear 6 to 7Ls away in 2 wide line, not helped by steady pace, still well back at 400 M, lacked a finish and struggled in run to line.
Only fairly away, ended up racing 3 wide with cover 3Ls back in midfield, pace suitable however covered ground throughout, made a 4 wide bid on turning in, nothing extra when asked and folded tamely.

Began with rest, held a position 3 to 4Ls away in running line, had a reasonable run thereafter, switched 3 wide leaving bend, responded to urging to 200 M but weakened badly last 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
No pace from outset, took up usual role in rear division, raced 2 wide 6Ls back, raced keenly moving 3 wide on bend, moved 4 wide and closed off hard last 200 M making many lengths to be in frame.

Began well, pressed on using some resources to race outside leader, shaded inside horse throughout however suited by standard sections, still there but lost lead on turning in, unable to find extra last 300 M.

Began well, took a prominent role on leaders back, suited by steady pace, no excuses in run, close enough on straightening, clear running emerged but only had 1 gear and just struggled in run to line.
Bounced out, pressed on from a wide alley, unable to slot in and raced 3 wide without cover 1L back, aided by tempo, still looked a threat at 300 M but hard run took toll and just struggled last bit.

Average jump, hard ridden to drive through and take up running, pressured by outside horse throughout but still able to control the tempo, tucked in turning to retain lead, fought hard and just caught right on line.

Slow to muster after bumping, ended up 5Ls away on rails, had a quiet trip in mid-section, saved ground on bend, held up to 200 M, continued to improve along inside making gradual headway to be nearest on line.

Bumped on jumping, unable to take usual spot and ended up 3 to 4Ls back on fence, had an easy run thereafter, tracked strongly on bend, eased into clear at 300 M, kept closing in straight for a solid 3rd.

Out in line, settled in behind midfield 5Ls back racing 2 wide, not really suited by pace, still back behind horses on bend, travelled well but in amongst horses to 200 M, sprouted wings when clear last furlong to score narrowly.
Soon took up running but drifted off the track going up Rock. Went further wider around home bend. Recovered some ground in straight down stands' side.
Settled towards rear. Took closer order rounding home bend. Hampered 200 M out. Kept on same pace to the line.
Began well. Settled behind midfield. Fought on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Began fairly. Ridden along to retain rails run with leaders. Hit the front around home bend and went over half a length clear early in straight, but only to be swamped close to home.
Broke well. Settled wide without cover in midfield or slightly better around home bend. Found no extra after straightening.
Well there to straight. Gradually weakened.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Settled in forward of midfield. Improved along rails rounding home bend to be one-back in 3rd turning in. Kept on before dropping out tamely inside final 200 M.
Broke well. Taken back to settle just off the pace. Held 2L 4th around home bend but lost position slightly after that. About 5th and 2Ls off pace turning in. Fought on steadily without threatening.
Very awkward start losing considerable ground. Trailed the field to straight. Improved well along rails in straight despite held up momentarily passing 200 M. Could have finished closer.
Raced wide just worse than midfield. Similar turning in. Sustained effort down straight to hit front close to home.
Soon dropped to tail-end, racing in last but one to straight. Made significant progress down centre of track inside final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Positioned 2-wide in midfield. Kept on one paced in the straight.
Raced 3 back, midfield the fence. Was tight for room in the run home along the inside, ran on well to come up marginally short.
Camped behind the leader on the fence. Weakened after the 150 M, no excuses.
Parked outside the leader. Led the field approaching the 200 M, but faded thereafter.
Settled behind midfield, 2 deep with cover. Came wide swinging into the home straight and looked the likely winner only to be nailed in the shadows of the post.
Led, but was completely gassed by the furlong.
Travelled handy to the leaders, 3-wide and without cover. Finished distanced. To trial.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Travelled at the rear of the field, 1 off with cover. Came widest in the straight and made some ground without threatening.
Raced at the tail of the field along the rails. Ran into traffic problems in the straight, closed of soundly.
Travelled 1 out 1 back, had every chance.
3-wide behind the pace early stages. Took over the lead after 800 M and held a 1/2L advantage on straightening. Kept on well but unable to find extra to hold off top pair in the final 50 M.
4-wide in rear section. Widest turning for home and only ran past a beaten runner.
Raced along the rails behind midfield. Closed the race off fairly.
2-wide no better than midfield. Unable to quicken in the home straight and remained on same pace to the line.
Taken back from a wide draw and raced at the rear. Trailed field turning in and made up some good ground in the straight.
Raced 3-wide at about midfield. Only kept on same pace in the straight.
Raced behind the pace in 2-wide spot. Lacked a response when asked on straightening and weakened. (See Racing Incidents - not comfortable.)
Wide and without cover in a forward spot. Improved to be alongside the leader at home turn. Kept on fairly in the home straight but unable to turn up a notch in the final stages.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.

Ridden out of the gates from widest draw and took the early lead. Took a sit behind the leader 800 M out. Trapped from straightening until 200 M. Closed off strongly once finding daylight and scored in a close one.

Jumped well and was among early leaders. Took a sit at 1000 M and raced 2 back on the rails. Switched out on straightening quickened nicely. Narrowly beaten after dueling with eventual winner in the final stages.
Taken back to race in rear section. Near last on straightening and closed off strongly over final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
1L back in 2nd behind a sedate tempo at 1200 M and still there making last turn, weakened quickly, poor effort.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Hung out as usual but particularly wayward on this occasion, without cover throughout, struggling before the home turn, unacceptable.
One from rear about 8Ls off speed at 1200 M, not much closer and struggling turning in, found zero off the bit.
Soon led on fence setting a steady tempo, about 1L clear until straightening, headed by winner 150 M out and lost 2nd on the line.
2-wide in midfield about 4Ls off pace until home turn, one-paced and didn't trouble the principals.
4-back on fence towards rear, with over 4Ls to make up swinging for home, failed to reduce the margin.
Box-seated in 3rd on fence about 2Ls from the front until home turn, hit the front about 150 M out and driven out to score.
One-out-one-back about 2Ls behind in 4th until home turn, given every possible hope to win but once again failed to follow through, just nicked 2nd.
3-back on fence about 4Ls back in midfield until home straight, had his chance to place in the straight but lacked the dash.
5Ls back in 8th at 1200 M, forced 4-wide turning for home in similar position, made some fair late ground, nearest at finish.
Raced and 3 and 4-wide without cover when 5Ls off pace down the backstretch and similar turning for home, made no impact.
Raced 3-wide no cover about 4Ls back in midfield until the home straight, broke down 300 M and pulled up.
2-wide and 3Ls down in 3rd at halfway, 1L down in 3rd at 200 M with every chance, failed to capitalize.
4-back on fence between 4Ls and 5Ls from the pace until home straight, didn't find much clear room until inside final furlong, might have been closer.
2-wide back in midfield about 4Ls at 1200 M, similarly placed but 3-wide turning in, led for a few strides about 50 M out only to be headed on the line.
4th about 3Ls back in fence through to final turn, kept on well to poke his head in front inside final bounds.
3-wide with cover in rear at halfway about 5Ls from the front, still in rear when very badly hampered 300 M out, eased out of the race. (Lame next day.)
Squeezed out at start, 6Ls back in 8th in middle stages and in rear off final bend, one-paced thereafter.
Switched inside from wide gate, 6Ls down in rear at halfway, blocked for a run from 250 M to 100 M, kept on well once clear, very unlucky.
Worked hard to cross from wide gate and lead by 1L at halfway, headed about 150 M out and dropped away.
Led early on but handed up advantage to sit 1L back in 2nd until the 300 M, briefly led again 150 M out, no extra and missed the quinella final 50 M.
Eased to sit behind the pace group, 3-1/2Ls off the leader, trapped 3-wide throughout and lost ground, not suited by the slow tempo, emptied 300 M.
Slow away, 6-1/2Ls off the leader at rear but on the rails, harmed by the slow pace, blocked 300 M, little dash when clear.

Eased to sit behind midfield, 5-1/2Ls off the leader on the fence early, swept forward 4-wide and made the move from 500 M around the field, dashed strongly to finish a close 3rd despite harmed by the very slow pace.
Pushed forward to cross and take the rail, then eased into the box seat, benefited by the slow pace, just held ground in final stages.
At back, 6-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, harmed by the slow pace, swept forward 3-wide at home bend attempting to run home, however never made ground.
Pushed early to secure a midfield spot, checked 1100 M, trapped 3-wide afterwards, 5Ls off the leader, harmed by the slow pace, no progress.
Pushed early to grab a prominent spot, pushed back 1100 M, 4-1/2Ls off the leader along the fence, not suited by the slow tempo, no dash, flattened in straight.
Easily crossed to 2-wide in front of the field, then eased to sit 3Ls off the leader, not suited by the slow early sectionals, flattened 250 M.
Eased to sit about midfield, got its head on the side at 1100 M, 4-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, not suited by the slow tempo, lacked room 300 M, dashed well.
Hard ridden to take the rail and led by 1-1/2Ls at favourable slow early sectionals, hung on strongly until last few strides, just beaten in 2nd by a narrow margin.
Awkward away, hard ridden to go forward, 1-1/2Ls behind the leader 2 to 3-wide, helped by the slow early tempo, held ground and ran on well to the line.
Eased to rear, 7-1/2Ls off the leader 2 to 3-wide, harmed by the slow pace, demonstrated very strong finishing efforts last 300 M to win by a neck.
Never better than midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Driven to close up position, settling one-out-one-back. Closer up turning in. Commenced move shortly after straightening but just held by winner throughout closing stages by a narrow margin.

Began fairly, settling on rails in forward of midfield. In similar position in 5th into straight. Fought on steadily without threatening.
Began fairly, settling in 4th within 3Ls of pace. Commenced run upon straightening and quickened well to gain upper hand over 100 M out. Just held off challenges to the line.
Chased leader on rails to straight. Slightly held up on rails when rider dropped rein 200 M out. Kept on same pace finish.
Began slowly. Quickly picked up to midfield. Fought on determinedly in closing stages to reach 3rd late.
Jumped best to lead from wide draw. Crossed to rails after 1000 M bend, maintained 1-1/2Ls advantage to straight when gradually worn down. Tired noticeably.
Towards rear throughout. Unable to quicken under pressure in straight.
Settled at the back. Produced moderate late impression inside final 200 M.
In last few to straight. Made modest progress without threatening.
Towards rear. Produced moderate late impression closing stages.
No early pace, took a spot on rails 5Ls back, pace against in mid-section, saved ground on bend, made solid headway without going round a horse in straight to take 3rd.
Began well, slotted into ideal spot 1 out 1 back, had desirable run with modest pace on, right there easing 3-wide on turning, one-paced in straight and only managed to hold ground in run to line.

Taken in behind runners from the outside alley, ended up 6Ls back in running line, harmed by slow tempo in middle stages, improved 3-wide on bend making solid progress, kept closing to be nearest on line.

Fair getaway, assumed a midfield position in running line 3-4Ls from front runners, travelled well in run, urged along turning, progressed to 200 M when run closed however only held ground when clear thereafter.
No pace from break, ended up 6Ls back on rails, shared rear throughout and disadvantaged by slow pace at top end, still well back making bend, made good progress along inside from impossible spot.
Away well, rolled forward to take up running, set a slow tempo to suit, held a 1L advantage on bend, tried to kick in straight but caught at 150 M, fought on strongly to line.
Broke nicely, assumed a prime position on leaders back, had run of race but travelled a little too keenly with steady pace, ready to strike on turning but couldn't get closer inside 200 M.
Even jump, unable to slot in and posted 3-wide without cover 5Ls back, did it tough covering ground with pace against gradually improved on bend, unable to sprint turning and faded out in straight.
Lacked early pace, positioned behind midfield 5Ls back in running line, didn't have race run to suit, still had job to do well back leaving bend, only struggled in straight.

Out in line, ridden move forward than usual racing outside leader, suited by leisurely sections throughout, 1L off leader on circle, responded well turning to take over at 150 M and keep margin in run to line.

Began with more purpose, obtained a more prominent position than usual 3Ls away on fence, had an easy run with below average sections, tracked well on bend, took inside runs and kept on soundly to make frame.
Began awkwardly, had little pace and raced at rear 4Ls back, niggled along throughout, didn't have an extra gear and just went to line at same pace.
Standard jump, mustered to race 1L away close to outside, tracked leader at 400 M, kept closing nicely last 300 M but unable to match winner last bit.
Broke best, showed natural speed from jump, led them comfortably 1L clear at midpoint, layed in from 400 M, found little under pressure and laboured last 200 M.
Lost ground at jump, settled 3Ls back along outside rail, raced greenly throughout and steadied at 500 M, closed race off well before run ended at 100 M. Better for outing.
Slow into stride, took a spot 2 to 3Ls back towards middle, travelled reasonably at midpoint, a bit flat-footed when they dashed at 400 M, struggled thereafter when only able to finish at same rate.
Bounced out fairly, didn't have much pace and settled 2 to 3Ls back close to middle, continued to improve from midpoint, went to leader at 200 M and held on well late to score an upset win.
Awkwardly away, regathered to sit 1L off leader on stand side, kept within striking distance at 400 M, made run with winner and kept on well despite condition giving out last 200 M.
Raced close to midfield, made no impression.
Travelled midfield before making ground after the 400 M. Gave ground after its run ended passing the 200 M.
Showed nice early speed to race 3/4 of a length inside the leader. Stuck on gamely in the run to the post.
Settled near the rear of the field along the outside fence. Never in the hunt.
After beginning well was ridden patiently, behind midfield. Made some late ground.
Raced on the speed but struggled in the run to the post.
Began awkwardly then raced in midfield, compounded quickly after the 200 M.
Camped behind the leader, shifted in passing the 450 M, picked up well to win in good fashion.
Faded over the concluding stages after leading.
Raced behind midfield along the centre of the track although hanging in during the early & middle stages. Closed of satisfactorily.
Began to tire near the 200 M after camping behind the pace.
Followed the speed down the outside fence. Commenced to make ground near the 350 M, but peaked on its run inside the final furlong.
Became fractious in the barriers, threw its head up repeatedly after the start was effected and as a consequence lost a considerable amount of ground settling last. No impression down the centre.
Bounded in the air at the start and was crowded for room shortly afterwards settling in 2nd last position. Not likely.
Worked hard to take the lead. Held a narrow advantage turning in and was headed 200 M out. Faded thereafter.
Raced along the fence at midfield. 3 to 4Ls off the lead turning for home, shifted out twice in straight but unable to quicken last 200 M.
Taken back to behind midfield for cover. 3-wide turning for home and steadily made up ground in the straight.
Off slowly and raced along the rails behind midfield. 5 to 6Ls off the pace turning for home. Closed the race off well and was nearest at finish.
Raced on the fence and better than midfield. 2 back on the rails turning for home. Slightly held up 300 M out and closed off only fairly thereafter.

Hard ridden and contested for the lead. Kept alongside the leader in a 2-wide spot at the turn. Disputed lead on straightening and was headed final 200 M. Stayed on fairly final stages to make the frame.
Raced 2-wide at midfield. Quickened nicely 400 M out but couldn't find enough to chase down winner over the final stages.
Botched the start and was hard ridden. Raced wide and without cover at midfield. Only remained on same pace in the straight.
Best out but was taken back to get cover. Raced near the rear until straightening. Rallied in run home and was closest at finish.
Jumped awkwardly and raced at the rear. Trailed field into the home straight and found nothing thereafter. (Irregular Heart Rhythm.)
Raced 2-wide behind midfield. Towards the rear on straightening and made up ground in the straight.

Pushed along from widest draw and raced behind the leaders. Box-seated behind the pace at the turn and switched out on straightening. Responded nicely and charged through to take the lead 100 M out. Stayed on well to hold off rivals.
Settled in rear section. Made some progress in a wide position at home turn but unable to sustain effort after straightening.
Raced 2-wide and better than midfield. Within 2Ls of the leader at the turn. Kept on well in the straight to make the frame.
Keen early on, 3-back on fence about 4Ls down in 5th at 900 M, closer in 5th entering homestretch, bumped until the 300 M, couldn't find an extra gear.
6Ls back in 9th at 900 M, raced 3 and 4-wide sometimes without cover, thoroughly outpaced by the leading players.
Taken back from widest gate, 10Ls last at halfway, remained in rear.
Crossed from wide gate to lead on fence by 1L at 1000 M, set a fairly steady pace, always holding a nice margin from the top of the homestretch.
Slowly away, midfield 4-back on fence about 5Ls off speed at 1000 M, hard pressed to hold this position turning for home, didn't succeed, very weak.
2-wide and 2Ls back in 3rd at 1000 M, chasing leader 1L back in 2nd turning for home, proximity to steady pace helped him place 3rd.
Slowest away, 2-wide back in mid-division about 5Ls from pace from 1000 M to home straight, very one-paced thereafter.
With cover about 7Ls off the speed in 10th out 2-wide at 1000 M and similar making last turn, never likely to improve better than midfield.
Not the best away, about 8Ls back in 11th at the 1000 M, still 6Ls down off last bend, was the only backmarker to make some late ground, never nearer.
Over-raced early on, handily placed in 4th about 4Ls from speed at 900 M, still well there turning for home, had every chance but failed to quicken. (Abnormal breathing noise.)

1L back in 2nd at 1000 M, under pressure to remain in touch despite handy tempo when 2Ls back in 3rd, dropped out, poor effort.
One from rear about 7Ls from pace at 1200 M, still well back and 4-wide (widest of all) turning for home, plugged on past a few tired rivals.
3-wide no cover when 5Ls back in midfield at halfway, 3-wide and 4Ls back in 6th off final bend, stayed on well to take 2nd inside final 100 M.
Switched inside from wide gate, 7Ls back in 12th early on, mid-division 4Ls back off last turn, stayed on okay late but not likely to place.
Disputed early pace on fence, still on pace but hanging out (saddle also slipped) from 800 M to home turn, soon beaten.
Caught 4-wide no cover early in rear, 7Ls behind at 1000 M, widest (5-wide) and 6Ls back turning for home, no impression.
Box-seated in 4th about 3Ls from speed at 1400 M, under pressure and about to swamped swinging for home, dropped out tamely.
Pressed on from 1200 M when trapped 3-wide no cover at 1000 M, disputed lead 800 M out and 1L clear turning in, soon headed, tired late.
Coldly ridden, 8Ls last at 1200 M closer but still in rear on straightening, 2Ls back and challenging 200 M out, stayed on well to lead on the line.
In 5th about 4Ls off pace out 2-wide at 1200 M, niggled along on the circle to hold this position, fizzled out steadily through final 400 M.
Worse than midfield on fence about 5Ls or 6Ls from the speed until home straight, steadily retreated.
Disputed early speed out 2-wide at 1400 M, 1L back in 3rd from 800 M to home turn, led again 300 M out but found nothing off the bit and very weak final 200 M.
5Ls midfield 3-wide with cover early on, without cover on the circle, 1L down and vying for a place at 200 M, no extra from then on.
Settled in 13th about 8Ls from pace at halfway, closer turning in, tacked across towards stands' rail as usual, kept on strongly, only just failed.
2Ls back in 2nd at the 1400 M, remained in front rank until the homestretch and led 200 M out, tipped out of the quinella inside final 50 M.
