Eased to cross the rails behind midfield, 6Ls off the leader, benefited by the fast early sectionals, progressed steadily 300 M to finish 2nd without threatening the winner.
Settled in midfield, 5Ls off the leader 2-wide, favoured by the fast pace, made ground 300 M, run ended 100 M.
Slow away, eased to rear, more than 10Ls off the leader 2-wide, benefited by the fast pace, lacked room 400 M, made ground steadily when clear.
Eased to sit behind the leader, 3-1/2Ls off the fast pace 2-wide, faded 400 M.
Bumped start, more than 9Ls off the fast pace 3-wide, blocked 400 M, clipped heels and rider dislodged 250 M.
Pushed to occupy the box seat, not suited by the fast early sectionals, pressured the leader from 600 M, led 400 M, hung on until 100 M when flattened.
Pushed forward, 3-1/2Ls off the leader, trapped 3-wide throughout, lost ground and not suited by the fast pace, dropped off quickly in straight.
Awkward away, hard ridden to keep up with the field at rear, more than 10Ls off the leader along the fence, suited by the fast tempo, however never progressed.

Blundered after start then failed to muster speed, 5Ls off the leader in midfield, 3-wide, helped by the fast pace, but never progressed.
Eased at start to get cover behind midfield, 6-1/2Ls off the leader 3-wide, favoured by the fast tempo, progressed steadily 250 M despite still racing greenly.
Settled 4-1/2Ls off the leader along the fence, travelled nicely throughout, favoured by the fast pace, progressed steadily 400 M to score its first victory without much threat.
Pushed to take the rail and led by more than 2-1/2Ls at fast early sectionals, pressured from 600 M, soon out of fuel 350 M.
Eased to sit just worse than midfield, 6-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, helped by the fast pace, closed the race off strongly last 250 M to grab 3rd.
Raced on rails behind midfield. Gradually shifted out rounding home bend for a clear passage down centre of straight. Made significant progress to just fail by a narrow margin.
Given reminders for sluggish start. Picked up to race wide just worse than midfield. Circled field around home bend and gained prominent position 5-wide turning in. Soon dropped out.
Tracked leader on rails. In box-seat after straightening. Obtained split passing 200 M but failed to quicken in a tight run throughout closing stages.
Travelled on rails in midfield. Lost position around home bend dropping to last few turning in. No further impression.
Began only fairly, racing awkwardly early. Travelled in last few to straight. Made moderate progress down centre of track early in straight. Made no impression closing stages.
Began fairly from wide draw. Travelled wide in forward of midfield down far side and around home bend. Weakened into straight.
Led briefly. Settling 2-back in 3rd or 4th on rails. In similar 2-back rails position turning for home but soon faded under pressure.
Settled in last few. Briefly baulked for a run after straightening. Ran on well without threatening.

Raced wide down far side from widest draw. Took up running over 1500 M out crossing to rails shortly after. Led field until narrowly headed over 300 M out. Fought on well and only to be swamped close to home.
Always prominent. Hit front narrowly after straightening but unable to sustain effort inside final 200 M.
Settled in midfield. Hampered upon straightening. Took some time to re-gather momentum and run on under pressure to snatch victory near line.
Settled at the back. Saved ground on rails turning in. Made good progress along rails in straight but badly baulked inside final 200 M. Not tested.
Raced keenly in forward of midfield far side. Moved closer up to 2L 4th position rounding home bend. Gradually faded under pressure after straightening.
Wide in midfield. Short-lived effort turning in. Soon dropped out.
First to hit ground, led easily but elected for a trail when pressured, had ideal run thereafter when pace slackened, improved 2 wide turning and quickly took over lead at 400 M, ran down last 100 M.

Crowded early, ended up sharing rear 8Ls off leaders, not used in run but harmed when pace steadied, still well back leaving bend, set too big a task on turning and only closed at one pace in straight.
Away with rest, slotted into ideal trail 3Ls back in 2 wide line, travelled well and made a 3 wide run turning, advanced with winner and fought on well after being headed to go down in close one.

Awkwardly away, ended up back with last few 7Ls back in running line, pace in middle not to advantage, travelled 3 wide rounding bend, made many lengths widest in straight to be right there in finish.

Began fairly, allowed to relax behind midfield 4 to 5Ls back, travelled comfortably throughout, eased 3 wide on bend, made good ground down centre to hit lead at 100 M and fight off rivals late for a narrow win.

Began with field, posted 3 wide early and passed on to race outside leader, had reasonable run thereafter when pace slackened, niggled on turning, offered little when they sprinted and gradually faded.

No early pace, drifted back to tail, raced 8Ls back unsuited by tempo, saved ground on rails on bend, continued improving into straight and did best work late to be right there in finish. Looking for longer.
Shade tardy to begin, settled 5Ls back on rails, used little in run, saved ground on bend, unable to dash with rest on turning, struggled in run to line.

Began evenly, went forward to challenge for front, raced to lead going 1L clear, set pace to suit thereafter, soon under siege turning in, gave in quickly and dropped right out. (Jockey reported respiratory noise.)

Reasonable getaway, slotted in nicely on fence 3Ls back, used nothing in run with steady tempo, lacked usual close in straight but did hang last 200 M, could only manage 1 speed over concluding stages.
Settled behind midfield on stands rails. Ran home nicely for an excellent debut.
Began fairly. Soon settled in rear. Kept on steadily to finish.
Never far off. Forced to switch out for a run passing 200 M. Fought on steadily without threatening.
Forward of midfield early. Gave ground from halfway.
Always well there. Lost position slightly passing 400 M but fought on steadily for a creditable 5th.
Began fairly. Soon picked up to join leaders. Remained close up onto course proper. Kept on same pace without quickening final stages.
Settled in midfield within 3Ls of pace. Commenced move over 250 M out and ran on well to just fail by a narrow margin.
Behind midfield throughout. Ran home one-paced.
Minor interference jumping out. Settled behind midfield of bunched field. Switched out for a clear run passing 400 M but in vain. Continued to be held up throughout closing stages.
Never far off, settling within striking distance. Commenced move passing 400 M. Gained upper hand final stages.
Attempted to make all holding narrow advantage until headed under pressure final stages.
Slightly slow out. Soon dropped to tail-end and never seen with a chance. Detached from halfway.
Close up early. Lost position approaching course proper. Made no further impression thereafter.
Raced within 2Ls of pace down centre of straight. Gave ground from over 250 M out.

Began poorly and lost 5Ls, re-gathered to drive up when pace steadied to be 6Ls back on rails, not suited by pace and proved difficult to settle, still rearward and in impossible spot turning, just closed at at same speed.

First to hit ground, rolled forward to eventually take spot outside leader, had no excuses with leisurely sections, forced 3 wide rounding home bend, tried hard when they sprinted at 400 M, just held ground evenly to make frame.

Began well, slotted into spot 3Ls back on fence, overraced badly in mid-section, still difficult to settle and steadied on bend, hung in straight and proved difficult to ride, did do best work late closing for an unlucky 2nd.

Out in line, quickly advanced to challenge for front, used a little to take over however dropped anchor and ran race to suit thereafter held a length lead on bend, wound up at 400 M, kicked strongly and defied rivals to a solid win.

Away in line, assumed spot in midfield 1 out 1 back 3Ls away, travelled well despite pace dropping off, lost spot between horses rounding bend, into clear at 350 M, made good progress late to take place.

No early pace, settled at rear 10Ls back, ended up 6Ls back when pace slowed, took a 3 wide trail on bend, kept improving 3Ls back turning, stuck to task down centre holding ground creditably over concluding stages.
Moderate jump, raced in rear division 9Ls back early, caught up when pace steadied, checked at 600 M, made some limited progress between horses in the straight and never really threatened.
Ordinary getaway, posted 3 wide in mid-section 5Ls back, did work without cover, made a 4 wide run on bend, couldn't find extra in run home and dropped out last 200 M when hard run took toll.

Fast into stride, held inside running early before surrendering when pressured, suited when pace slackened, moved 2 wide on circle, challenged at 400 M, there to 200 M when run ended and just knocked up late.

Out in line, assumed a midfield role racing 6Ls away early, 4Ls back when pace steadied, raced too keenly in mid-section, awkwardly placed at 600 M, unsuited when they sprinted and simply held ground in run to line.
Prominent early but trapped 3 and 4-wide without cover along backstretch, 4-wide about 1L down off home turn, extra work soon took its toll. (See Racing Incidents.)
Set a decent pace on fence, clear by a neck from 1000 M to homestretch, headed over 300 M out but did quite well to cling onto 4th.
Settled in rear, 9Ls last at halfway, outpaced once the tempo quickened 500 M out, never on terms.
Covered up 2Ls back in midfield at 1000 M, within 2Ls of the lead turning in, led 200 M out, always in charge.
Slowly away, a neck 2nd out 2-wide from 1000 M to homestretch, all out at the furlong pole when about to be swamped, yielded ground.
Hugged rails 9Ls from the pace in 10th with 600 M to race, always chasing without threatening, tight for room final 50 M.
About 2Ls off pace in 4th at 1000 M and ideally placed until home straight, disputing the lead from 300 M to 200 M out but faded late on, no excuses.
Worse than midfield about 7Ls behind pace at halfway, still around 10th but closer at last turn, stayed on well through the pack to clearly take 3rd.
9th about 5Ls from speed with cover at 1000 M, closer but 5-wide (widest of all) turning for home, ran on best of the rest, winner was too strong.
Fractious in gates and slowest out, on fence 5Ls back in 8th at 1000 M, 3Ls back in mid-division but hurried along turning for home, beaten by the 200 M.
2-wide and 9Ls off pace in 11th at 1000 M, one from rear about 6Ls down turning for home, never likely to get further forward than midfield.
3Ls back on fence in 6th at 1000 M, unbalanced on straightening when within 1L of the lead in 4th, no extra thereafter, lame next day.
On fence in 9th about 9Ls from the front at 1000 M, with about 4Ls to make up turning for home, failed to make a significant impact.
Midfield or better within 3Ls of the speed with cover through to home turn, had his chance, petered out final 200 M.
Raced wide in midfield. Gave ground from home bend. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never seen with a chance racing in last few throughout. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced "one-back" 3-wide in prominent position early. Dropped away from approaching home bend.
Settled in "one-out-one-back" position. Came to challenge upon straightening. Ran on to grab lead over 100 M out. Readily.
Raced wide behind midfield. Lost position around home bend and in tail-end into straight. Only ran past well-beaten horses.
Settled at the back. Commenced run rounding home bend. Sustained modest headway down straight without threatening.
Travelled in midfield. Given reminders upon straightening. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Began fairly but gradually picked up along rails to share the lead. Gained 1L advantage coming out of back straight. Unable to sustain effort and headed over 100 M out.

Soon ridden to lead but not clear enough to cross to rails. Settled 2-wide sharing pace before going one-back around home bend. Weakened upon straightening.
Soon in rear. Given reminders rounding home bend. Ran home one-paced.
Camped midfield on the fence. Worked through to the outside in the run home and finished strongly to take victory.
Raced at the rear, 2-deep with cover. Made no impression.
Travelled in last position, 3-wide with cover. Made some late ground without threatening.
Raced midfield but was always wide and without cover. Never a factor.
Parked 1 out 1 back. Snuck through on the inside turning for home but was a spent force soon after. Pulled up mildly lame.
Ridden along hard early from a wide gate to take a position outside the leader. Hung out rounding the home turn and dropped out over the final furlong.
Settled near the rear on the paint. Kept to the inside in the straight and ran on fairly after getting into the clear after the 300 M.

From a wide barrier was allowed to drift back into a rearward position. Was wide for most of the circle and although copping interference at the entrance to the straight, was a beaten horse long before.
Tracked the leader and had every chance, folding tamely at the business end.
From an inside draw was able to lead and set a solid tempo. Stole a break on the field in the final stretch but was collared over the final stages.
Settled 1-off, midfield with cover. Struggled in the straight.
Raced on the speed, 3 wide no cover. Challenged the leader near the 200 M, but faded on its effort in the run to the line.
Jumped well and was allowed to sit behind the pace. 4 to 5Ls off the lead in 4th place making home turn. Kept on well after straightening but unable to sustain effort in the closing stages.
Settled behind midfield. Responded only fairly and kept on same pace in the home straight.
Failed to find early speed and raced at midfield. Widest turning for home and was near the back on straightening. Ran home without quickening.
Raced in rear section until straightening. Closed off well to finish a distant 2nd.
Slow into stride. Raced 2-wide at midfield and kept on fairly in the home straight.
Jumped only fairly and led by a narrow margin early stages. Widened its lead at the turn and was ahead by 4 to 5Ls on straightening. Cruised home and won easily.

Jumped well from widest draw and was in a disputed lead early stages. 2 to 3Ls off the leader in 2nd making home turn but tired and dropped out quickly final 200 M.
Off slowly and lost ground. Raced at the rear and found nothing in the straight.
Settled in rear section and was last on straightening. Made up ground by running past tired runners.
Niggled along and was behind the leaders early stages. 3-wide at midfield making the turn. Ran on fairly and made up a bit of ground in the straight.
Raced along the rails behind the leaders. 3 to 4Ls off the leader in 2nd place turning for home. Kept on steadily in the home straight but lost a minor placing in the closing stages.
Box-seated on fence 2Ls back in 4th until the 600 M, 1L down in 2nd off last bend and led 200 M out, stayed on well but thwarted in shadows of the post.
Always niggled along, 3-back on fence 4Ls from the speed at halfway, hard ridden when 2Ls in 3rd at final turn, very tired final 250 M.
Held "one-out-one-back" position 2Ls back in 4th at 1200 M, pushed out 4-wide no cover on the circle, beaten soon after turning for home. (Blood in trachea.)
Settled 6th out 2-wide and 4Ls back in 6th at 1000 M, 3Ls back and going well turning in, stayed on strongly to lead final strides.
Soon 10Ls last and under pressure, driven along to be 6Ls back in 10th cornering for home, plodded on past a few stragglers.
Close 2nd out 2-wide through early stages, pressed on to lead by 2Ls at 900 M, all out when headed at the 200 M, run out of a place final 30 M.
In rear, blundered and almost fell 800 M out, still at least 8Ls down turning for home, eased down soon afterwards.
5-back on fence in 10th or so through first half, checked when trying to draw closer off last bend, failed to quicken up with the main players.
Taken back from wide gate, 8Ls behind the pace in 10th at halfway, progress out 4-wide turning for home, ran on well to figure in the money.
Cut out the early running, no more than 1L clear before being headed about 900 M out, struggling when 2Ls down in 4th entering homestretch, wilted.
7Ls back in 10th at the 1000 M with cover and similarly positioned making last turn but without clear running, no danger once clear.
4-back on fence about 6Ls back in midfield at 1000 M, drew 3Ls closer on straightening, ran on okay without quite troubling the principals.
Trapped 3-wide no cover through first half, 6Ls back in 8th at the 1000 M, lost his position from top of the home straight.
Went back from gate, at least 8Ls behind early pace, shuffled back to 7Ls last off final bend, made no impact down centre of track.
Enjoyed the run of the race in 4th from very early on despite exiting gate 10, picked up well from top of stretch to lead 200 M out, pushed out.
3-wide no cover 1L back in 2nd at 800 M, wide throughout, over 3Ls down turning for home, faded out steadily.
3-back on fence about 5Ls through initial exchanges, travelled well turning for home, didn't find very much off the bridle but enough to just nick a place.
Slowest away but recovered to race 3Ls back in 5th at 1200 M, began to lose touch from the 600 M, hung out and beaten soon after straightening.
Best away and led by 2Ls on fence at 1200 M, same margin clear entering the straight but headed about 200 M out, tired and lost a place in final 50 M.

Around midfield about 6Ls behind early tempo, not going well when 6-wide (widest of all) turning for home despite exiting gate 4, faded.
Towards rear as usual, at least 6Ls off the speed through to final bend, stayed well back.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Over-raced in rear when 10Ls last at 1200 M, 7Ls down and still in rear off last bend, made only very minor late ground.
Raced and 3 and 4-wide without cover despite exiting gate 6, towards rear until the 800 M and turning for home, ran on past a few tired rivals late. (Lame.)
2-wide and 1L back in 2nd at 1200 M, struggling to lie up when over 3Ls back in 3rd at final bend, dropped out tamely.
Midfield on fence about 5Ls from early pace, similar position but under pressure 600 M out, responded well to stay on and grab 2nd close home.
Eased to rear, raced 4-wide throughout and lost too much ground, hung out at bends, never competitive and tailed out.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Pushed to sit outside the leader, trapped 3-wide and lost ground, ran on strongly until 150 M when run ended.
Hard ridden to obtain a prominent spot, 3Ls off the leader 2-wide, struggled throughout to keep up with the good pace, no progress in final stages.
Blundered badly at start and lost ground, eased to rear, more than 8Ls off the good pace, raced 3 to 4-wide throughout, progressed steadily 400 M.
Settled outside the leader without being made used, however soon out of fuel 350 M, lost action when changed legs and eased down.
Very slowly away, pushed forward to obtain a midfield spot along the fence, 4-1/2Ls off the good pace, made ground steadily in straight and grabbed 2nd without threats to winner.
Hard ridden to secure the box seat, soon emptied 350 M.
Hard ridden early but failed to cross in front, then eased to sit in midfield, 3Ls off the leader, trapped 3-wide and lost ground, faded 500 M.

Awkward away, attempted to push forward but did not had enough speed, then eased to get closer towards the rail behind midfield, 4-1/2Ls off good pace 2-wide, ran on fairly in straight, only made ground on some tiring horses.
Hard ridden to take the rail and led by 1/2L at good pace, under pressure throughout, hung on until 200 M when overhauled, ran on well to the line for 3rd.
Pushed forward, 2Ls off the good pace 2-wide, closed the race off strongly 250M and drifted away to win with some ease.
Tracked leader in 2L 3rd on rails. Switched out to challenge over 200 M out. Hit front 100 M out but grabbed close to home.
Trailed the field to halfway. Never in contention.
Stalked leader throughout. Hit front briefly passing 200 M before swamped under pressure.
Ridden to take up running and led until fading 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear to straight. Made steady headway down centre of track.
Began fairly. Held rails run in midfield. Closer up in 2-back 4L 5th turning for home. Gradually faded under pressure.
Settled in rear of midfield on rails. Commenced move shortly after straightening. Responded well to snatch victory final strides.
Travelled wide without over towards rear. Gradually improved to midfield coming out of back straight. Similar turning for home. One-paced without quickening under pressure.
Wide in prominent position around stables bend, not helped by wide draw. Gradually settled in forward of midfield far side. Midfield rounding home bend. Soon weakened in straight.
Never far off one-out-one-back in 4th. Just over 2Ls off turning in but could only kept on steadily without quickening under pressure.
Slightly slow out. Travelled in last few. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Taken to rear after beginning from widest draw. Remained there throughout. Never seen with a chance.
Midfield to home bend. Lost position approaching straight. Produced good late finish inside final 200 M. Did best work late.

Reasonable jump, adopted a midfield position after easing out of early pace battle, raced 6Ls from leader with run of race improved 3-wide on bend, made a strong run to hit lead 100 M but caught near to line.
No pace from outset, drifted to tail more than 12Ls back in running line, never really appeared comfortable, struggling on bend, produced no extra and was beaten a long way.
Began in line, unable to slot in, posted 3-wide without cover 7Ls back in mid-division, niggled along on circle, gradually lost touch when hard run took toll.
Missed start by a considerable distance, retired in back straight. (See Racing Incidents.)

Began in line, assumed spot on rails 8Ls off solid pace, saved ground with a quiet trip throughout, progressed between horses in straight, picked up nicely late to hit lead last 50 M and score narrowly.
No pace from outset, ended up amongst tail-enders 12Ls back, never suited by surface, checked at 700 M, couldn't hold position in run home and struggled to line.
Began well, pushed on from a wide alley to slot into 1 out 1 back spot, used a little with pace on, 2Ls down on turning in, progressed to 200 M but lacked extra gear of first few last furlong.

Restrained from a wide alley, trailed field more than 12Ls back on rail, aided by solid tempo, improved position on bend, passed a few tired ones before losing some late momentum when steadied but never really likely.
Fast away, took up running easily, kept pace reasonably solid in mid-section, held a 1L advantage on bend, kicked 2Ls clear turning, held break to 100 M when chasers closed over the top.
Showed customary pace to race outside the leader, worked in mid-section with solid tempo, raced 1L away on bend, pushed along on turning when leader slipped clear, weakened easily final 300 M.
Even jump, ended up behind midfield 7-8Ls back in 2-wide line, aided by tempo, made a 3-wide run without cover on circle, looked at chance turning in but peaked on run last 200 M.

No dash for outset, landed a position in rear of field 9-10Ls off pace, suited by pace and gradually improved on bend, tracked nicely turning and closed race off well to be nearest on line.

Failed to show immediate dash from gates, ended up on leaders back, didn't have easy time with pace on, still there on turning in, didn't respond in straight and gradually lost touch. (Jockey reported "flat")

Standard beginning, drifted back to race 7Ls away 3 wide, aided by early pace, tracked well on bend, gradually improved in straight until steadied at 300 M, didn't produce thereafter. (Blood in trachea and lame day after.)
Began in line, drifted back to settle in rear division, raced 3 wide 8Ls back, aided by speed, still had job to do on turning, lacked a response and didn't run on in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Slow into stride, settled next to last nearly 8Ls from lead, suited by fast early pace, still well back to bend, weaved between horses in straight and closed race off best to make frame.
No early toe, ended up in rearward division 7Ls of pace, suited by speed of race, improved between horses on turning, made many lengths from an impossible spot to take 3rd placing.
Began reasonably, settled close up but drifted back behind pace group, raced keenly 4Ls back thereafter, same margin back on turn, didn't have extra gear in straight and just held ground late.
Began fairly, ended up in decent position 4Ls away on rails, used little thereafter, ridden along on bend, failed to find in straight and struggled away at same speed.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Well enough away, slotted in to 1 out 1 back spot, raced keenly after pace slackened on bend, made a 3 wide run on turning, took over at 350 M, run ended at 200 M and faded last bit.
Restrained from a wide gate, ended up racing 9Ls back in running line, aided by pace early, well back last on turning, made some even progress in straight passing a few tired runners late.

Standard jump, ended up 3 wide in midfield without cover, 5 to 6Ls back at midpoint, improved gradually on bend, 4Ls down turning, produced a strong burst down centre to hit head at 200 M and hold a narrow margin to line.

Began with more purpose, pressed on to race outside leader, did share of work with solid pace, improved to challenge leader on turning, took over briefly at 450 M, stayed on at same pace when headed after 300 M.

Well enough to begin, assumed a midfield position 5 to 6Ls away, had a fair run throughout, ridden along on turning, checked when didn't appear to be a chance however lost all prospect thereafter. (Lame day after.)

Ordinary getaway, soon mustered to drive through and take a sit behind leader, carted along on back of a solid speed, held up behind horses at 350 M, dashed well to get close late finishing an unlucky 2nd.
From the outside gate was taken back behind runners to settle last. Made satisfactory ground without threatening in the straight.
Stalked the leader along the fence. Had every possible chance.
Raced 4-wide midfield with cover. Finished off well in the run home.
Camped behind the speed, 3 deep with cover. Didn't quicken in the straight.
Travelled keenly 3-wide with the leaders, no cover. Faded inside the final furlong.
Raced behind midfield but covered ground in the run although having cover. Made no progress after turning for home, compounding in the run to the wire.
Went forward to take up leading duties early. Was never headed, kicked clear early in the straight to hold a margin on late challengers.
After being crossed near the 900 M, settled outside the leader. Hung in early in the straight and worked to the line soundly.
Raced behind midfield, 3-wide with cover. Made nice late ground.
Missed the kick, then was ridden along to race midfield, 4-wide no cover. Completely gassed early in the straight.
Proved difficult to settle while racing 2 deep in midfield. Held up until the 200 M, ran to the line strongly once in the clear.
Raced midfield the fence, was a beaten horse near the 400 M, gave ground soon after.
Was crowded at the start then was taken back behind runners to settle in 2nd last position with cover. Came to the outside in the straight and closed off strongly.
Camped off the pace, 2-wide with cover. Tired in the run to the post.

Raced on the fence behind the leaders. Steadied near 900 M in an attempt to shift away from the rails. 2 to 3Ls off the pace and switched out on straightening. Steadily made up ground but unable to sustain effort final 150 M.
Raced behind midfield. Ridden along to keep pace at home turn and was last on straightening. Made up ground by running past tired runners.
Settled at midfield. 4-wide and was 3 to 4Ls off the leader turning for home. Rallied and took the lead final 200 M. Unable to hold off the eventual winner last 50 M.
Raced alongside the leader for majority of the race. Disputed lead on straightening but weakened final 300 M.
Botched the start and raced at the rear. Trailed field until straightening. Swept past the field and ran down rival final 50 M to clinch the race.
Raced 2-wide behind the leaders. Kept on same pace in the straight.

Raced along the fence behind midfield. Made progress along the rails at home turn and was behind the leader turning in. Checked at 400 M and then was held up after that. Made up ground once finding daylight.
Raced 3-wide behind the leaders. Hard ridden to keep pace turning for home. Kept on before dropping out quickly final 200 M.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield. 4Ls off the lead turning for home. Ran on well in the straight and finished with a minor placing.
Ridden out of the gates and soon took the lead. Held a slight advantage turning in but weakened and dropped out quickly final 300 M.
Settled towards the rear. Commenced to make progress after 1000 M and was 4-wide among leaders turning in. Took the lead 300 M out but unable to find enough to stay in contention thereafter.
2-wide and 1L down in 2nd at 1000 M, ridden along to try and lead wheeling for home, all out to remain in touch 200 M out, tired late. (Mucus discharge.)
Over-raced in rear when 10Ls last at 1000 M, still in rear 8Ls back off last turn, failed to improve.
Close-up but 3-wide no cover throughout, 3Ls back in 4th from halfway to home turn, stayed on pretty well despite the tough trip for a place.
Box-seated in 3rd about 2Ls down at 800 M, within 1L of lead in 2nd entering homestretch, upsides with every chance 200 M out, no extra.
2-wide and 3Ls back in 5th at 1000 M, closer and going very well off last bend, led 200 M out and pulled clear for a nice win.
8Ls back in 12th at 1000 M, unbalanced when bumping rail at 600 M, 6Ls down in 11th off last bend, without much room late but always held anyway.
Led on fence by 1L at the 1000 M, half a length clear turning for home, headed about 200 M out but hung onto 2nd easily enough.
One from rear about 9Ls behind early pace, 7Ls down in 12th turning for home, remained in rear.
4Ls back in midfield at 1000 M with cover, same margin back in 10th off last turn, never likely to improve position much. (Lost a plate.)
4-wide no cover in rear down backstretch, 7Ls down at the 800 M, under pressure turning in, made only very minor late ground.
3-back on fence about 4Ls down in mid-division at halfway, 3Ls down in 6th off last bend, couldn't get much closer and one-paced final 200 M.
Didn't break well, very keen for most of backstretch in 8th or 9th about 6Ls off pace, struggling turning for home and soon gone. (Abnormal breathing noise.)
4-back on fence 5Ls off pace at 1000 M, midfield and 3Ls down into straight, without clear running final 100 M, possibly unlucky not to place.
Worse than midfield and 3-wide with cover about 5Ls down at 1000 M, a little closer on straightening but could only hold his ground thereafter.
Slowest away, 10Ls last at the 800 M, hung out and 5Ls down into stretch, ran on fairly well down centre of track, never nearer.
One from rear about 8Ls off pace in middle stages, 4Ls last at the 200 M, always chasing the majority of the field.
Box-seated 2Ls off pace in 4th from the 800 M to home straight, one-paced thereafter.
Very keen and 4-wide no cover at 1000 M, 4-wide turning for home when over 2Ls back in mid-division and soon beaten.
5Ls back in 9th at 800 M, closer and 4-wide turning for home, picked up well to dispute the lead 100 M out, couldn't go with the winner.
Led by a neck on fence from the 800 M but headed at top of the home straight and steadily fizzled out.
5Ls down in 10th at the 800 M, 5-wide (widest of all) entering home straight when 3Ls off the pace, couldn't improve much further.
2-wide and 3Ls back in 6th at 800 M, 2Ls down in similar position taking last bend, held same position on the run-in.
Went back from wide gate, 7Ls off pace in 12th in middle stages, 5Ls down turning in, continued to make good headway out wide.
Mostly 3-back on fence and 4Ls off pace in midfield until home turn, without clear running until the 200 M, might have finished marginally closer.
Better than midfield and 3-wide with cover within 2Ls of the pace until home turn, had his chance to place, not ridden out final 50 M.
3-wide no cover about half a length from the pace at the 900 M, led at top of home straight and headed inside final furlong, tired inside final 100 M.
Towards rear about 6Ls off pace at 700 M, accelerated well from top of the homestretch to lead at the 50 M, stayed on well.
2-wide a neck back in 2nd at the 800 M, vied for the lead until the 200 M, kept on and only just missed out on 2nd.
Eased back, 8Ls off the leader 3 to 4-wide, harmed by the slow pace and lost ground at bends, blocked most straight, demonstrated good finishing efforts under limited clear running.
Slow away, pushed to keep up with the field at back, 9Ls off the leader along the fence, not suited by the slow tempo, little dash in straight.
Pushed to occupy the box seat early, swept up 2-wide as the pace slowed down from 800 M, favoured by the slow tempo, ran on well until 150 M out of fuel.
Pushed to take the rail and led by 1-1/2Ls, made too much use of in second quarter, soon dropped off 350 M.
Pushed forward and settled in a prominent spot, made the move from 600 M around the field, trapped 3 to 4-wide and lost ground, never accelerated in last quarter but still held ground to the line.
Eased to sit behind midfield, 7-1/2Ls off the leader 2 to 3-wide, not suited by the slow pace, crowded for room and bumped 400 M, dashed strongly 250 M to grab a close 3rd.
Eased to rear, more than 10Ls off the leader 2-wide, harmed by the slow pace, swept 5-wide on straightening, little dash in straight.
Eased to sit in midfield, 5-1/2Ls off the leader, moved forward 800 M around the field, raced 4 to 5-wide and lost too much ground, faded quickly 400 M.
Behind the pace group along the fence, 4-1/2Ls off the leader, not suited by the slow pace, flattened 250 M.
Settled 2-1/2Ls off the leader, made the move from 600 M, benefited by the slow tempo, led 300 M, closed the race off strongly and scored.
Eased to sit about midfield, 6-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, harmed by the slow early sectionals, dashed strongly 300 M.
Eased to rear, raced 2 to 4-wide, not suited by the slow pace, never competitive.
Eased to get across to the rail in midfield, 5-1/2Ls off the leader, harmed by the slow pace, lacked turn of foot in straight and just held ground.

Eased to rear for cover, more than 10Ls off the leader on the rails, swept steadily forward 2-wide on straightening, however held up 4-2, dashed impressively when clear despite harmed by the slow pace, finished a remarkable 2nd.
Settled mainly in midfield despite minor interference coming out of back straight. Badly baulked for a run in straight until after 100 M. Finished off race strongly.
Gradually improved to prominent position far side, held one-out-one-back position around home bend. Came to dispute lead after straightening but soon swamped.
Always struggling in last few. Never seen with a chance.
Settled behind midfield. Soon obtained split after straightening but could only keep on at the same pace under pressure without quickening.
Travelled mostly within 2Ls of pace on rails to straight. Baulked for a run in straight until 200 M. Made no impression closing stages.
Settled well back. Commenced move around home bend. Widest runner turning in. Ran home well to take charge passing 200 M.
Broke well from iwde draw. Remained wide in prominent position before taking over coming out of back straight and led until overhauled inside final 200 M.
Settled at the back. Baulked for a run in straight until 200 M. Ran home strongly to do best work late.
Close up early. Lost position passing 1000 M dropping to midfield. 3-wide turning for home. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Sluggish start, but quickly picked up to lead. Ceded advantage coming out of far side and stalked leader to straight. Gradually weakened under pressure.

Broke well and in front early. Settled just off pace before shuffled back to 2-back position in 4th or 5th. Improved to hold slight chance when among leaders early in straight but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Raced wide in midfield to straight. Dropped out tamely. (Mucus in trachea.)

Taken back from a wide alley, ended up well back 15Ls from speed, aided by fast sections, gradually made run from 400 M, closed well from rear on turning but set a huge task peaking on efforts last 100 M.

No real pace and allowed to position 10Ls back in running line, suited by solid tempo and travelled comfortably throughout, held up at 400 M, dashed sharply when clear levelling up at 200 M but beaten by a better horse.

Out with them, pressed forward from wide gate, 3 wide no cover, engaged in 3 way pace battle running 1600 M to 800 M 2 secs faster than standard, still challenging on bend, dropped out quickly after hard run. (See Racing Incidents.)
Even break, settled closer than expected 7Ls away on rails, helped by fast tempo, saved ground on bend with an ideal run in, held up at 300 M, didn't let down as usual and struggled last furlong.

Began with move purpose, held spot outside leader in 3 way battle, ran 16 to 8 in 2 secs faster than standard, eventually took hold at 1000 M, ridden along thereafter, failed to finish off and weakened badly in straight.

Reared on jumping, ended up 12Ls away behind midfield, suited by fast pace, had a reasonable run in mid-section, still had job to do on turning, made even headway between horses last 300 M to be closest on line.

Even jump, took a midfield spot 7Ls off fast pace, suited by solid section, chased along to improve on bend, came 4 wide turning, took front at 300 M, briefly challenged but asserted authority last furlong for a solid win.

Well enough away, pressed on to settle 5 to 6Ls away in 2 wide line, had a fair run but forced to follow a strong pace, pushed along to turn, made brief claims at 400 M but had no extra last 300 M. (Checked on line.)

Away nicely, slotted in on rails however ended up 5Ls back in 4th when pace went on, had to cart rest up but saved ground on circle, made a useful run at 300 M but didn't run out trip and failed to factor late.

Slow into stride, positioned behind midfield 9Ls of fast pace, saved ground and suited by speed, improved between horses on bend, continued making ground and did best work when clear from 250 M to make frame.

No early pace, allowed to settle 15Ls away at rear, helped by solid sections, still well back in impossible spot on turning in, made some progress past beaten runners. (Jockey reported abnormal breathing.)

First to hit ground, led easily however pressured throughout, set fast tempo with 1600 to 800 secs faster than standard for a Derby, still under siege on bend, found little on turning and quickly lost touch late.

Standard jump, settled behind midfield 8Ls off lead, helped by solid speed at top end, steadied at 500 M, made a quick burst on turning and briefly threatened but didn't see out journey fading out from 250 M.
Well there on rails. Settled in one-back position coming out of back straight. Gradually faded after straightening. (Mucus in trachea.)
Broke well. Taken back gradually to midfield on rails. Shuffled back further rounding home bend. Produced good impression in straight.
Broke well, settling in last few. Never nearer.
Missed the break slightly. Soon picked up to better than midfield position. Similar turning in and ran on steadily to gain upper hand close to home.
Slightly slow out. Soon picked up to prominent position. Chased leader 2-wide rounding home bend. One-paced in straight.
Travelled in forward of midfield early. Remained in midfield throughout after finding nothing under pressure in straight. (Mildly distressed.)
Mainly in forward of midfield to straight. Gradually weakened.
Wide in prominent position early. Dropped back to midfield coming out of back straight. Tired noticeably after straightening.
Raced wide behind midfield throughout. Ran home one-paced.
Settled at the back. Widest runner when last turning for home. Made up good ground down centre of straight.
Towards rear. Kept on well in straight.
Amongst leaders. Took up running 1200 M out and soon crossed to rails. Led and drew 1-1/2Ls clear early in straight and only to be collared close to home.
Waited with. Ran home strongly down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Began well. Settled 3-wide one-back without cover. Gradually shifted back to 2L 4th behind runner around home bend. Made no impression in straight.

Slow to begin, ended up 6 to 7Ls away in usual spot near rear, helped by early pace but not so when they steadied, still well back in traffic turning, into clear at 250 M and closed best of rest to make frame.
No early pace, raced at tail of field 8Ls back in a 2 wide spot suited early but not really aided when they steadied, still well back on circle, set a big task but only struggled in run to line.
Allowed to drift back from a wide alley, raced 3 wide behind midfield 6Ls back with cover, improved on circle however forced very wide on bend, unable to make impression in straight.

No real early pace, ended up in rearward division, raced 7Ls back in 2 wide line, still back amongst horses on circle, bumped on turning, lacked usual close and just held position inner to line. (Jockey reported "flat".)

Moderate beginning, raced 6Ls back on fence, enjoyed a soft run but proved difficult to settle when pace slowed, made progress between horses in straight and looked a place chance before run ended at 250 M.
Fair to begin, assumed a midfield spot 4 to 5Ls back, used little in run, niggled along on turning, without a clear run until 300 M out but found little thereafter and faded out late.

Fastest away, displayed good pace to cross from an outside alley, backed off tempo after early burn, held 3/4L lead on bend, wound up on turning in, kept fighting impressively to go down narrowly in finish.
Out in line, lacked through to hold position on leaders back, had a fair run in middle stages, kept on soundly at same pace just failing to quicken to be a factor in finish.

Showed early pace, restrained to take cover 3 wide 3Ls back, had even run despite covering extra ground, asked to make run turning but lacked sprint of rivals and didn't close at required rate, tired late.

Began well, pressed on to race outside leader, had a fair run after pace slackened, sat 3/4L off leader on bend, stuck with leader throughout length of straight gaining ascending late for a deserved win.
Well enough away, slotted into prime position 1 out 1 back, enjoyed run of race in mid-section, close enough on turning in, lacked turn of foot but kept on soundly to be not far away on line.
Reasonable break, pushed on in search of spot however posted 3 wide without cover, did share of work throughout close enough making turn, hard run took toll and dropped out in straight.
Tardy into stride, regathered to take a spot 3Ls back on rails, had a quiet run throughout, still in behind horses turning and held up at 300 M, closed race off fairly when clear.

Lacked usual pace, settled behind mifield 5 to 6Ls back in running line, proved difficult to settle, made a 3 wide run on bend, bumped 4 wide in straight, chased hard final 300 M to be not far away in finish.
Making steady headway towards midfield when steadied at Rock. Remained behind midfield around home bend and into straight. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Jumped best to lead. Made running until joined up Rock. Found no extra and overhauled inside final 200 M.
Travelled in one-out-one-back position. Commenced run rounding home bend. Failed to quicken to challenge in straight.
Began okay. Travelled wide in midfield before taking closer order after Rock. 3-wide one-back rounding home bend but lost position into straight. No further impression.
Raced 2-wide 2-back just better than midfield. Ran on steadily under pressure in straight without threatening.
Settled on rails in midfield. Just 2-back turning in when switched out for a run. Quickened well inside final 200 M to take charge shortly after.

Settled on rails in midfield. Forced to steady and lost position approaching 1000 M. Steadied again passing 600 M. Saved ground on inside turning in. Made modest headway early in straight before finding no extra final 200 M.
Trailed the field to straight. Ran home well from last place passing 200 M.
Began in rear, settling in last few. Went widest turning for home. Made up good ground down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled one back on rails. Switched off rails for a run after straightening only to be held up behind runners until 200 M. Ran home one-paced.
Slightly slow out. Raced wide mainly in rear of midfield to straight. Soon weakened.
Began fairly. Raced one-back 3-wide before moving up to join leader approaching Rock. Disputed lead to 200 M. Dropped out tamely.
Took some time to take up the lead, eventually doing so near the 1200 M. Was under siege by challengers near the 200 M eventually tiring inside the 100 M.

From a wide gate didn't have the early speed and was allowed to shift back with cover near the 1600 M. After the 1200 M, was left racing 3-wide without cover, midfield. Vied for the lead near the 200 M, but faded soon after turning.
Began awkwardly, lost ground and then despite being ridden along failed to muster speed settling near to the rear on the rails. Worked home soundly.
Settled 3 back the fence. Peeled out turning for home but struggled in the straight.

Travelled comfortably in a midfield position, 2-wide with cover. When the tempo quickened after the 600 M shifted 3-wide to improve. However responded only fairly, then after straightening did not lengthen stride and battled on.

Was forced to work early to stay with the early pace, after being 3-wide no cover near the 1600 M pressed forward to settle outside the leader a length back. Was still in contention at the furlong but weakened soon after.
Raced near the tail of the field 1 off with cover. Failed to quicken over the last 300 M.
Steadied early to race midfield the fence. Kept to the inside in the straight and after obtaining clear running near the 200 M, picked up strongly to win well.
Slow to begin and raced in last position. Still well back turning. Made some late ground in the run home to be nearest on line.

From the outside barrier was taken across behind runners in the early stages and raced towards the rear, 3 deep with cover. Made its run around the field after the 800 M, however was posted 4-wide with the leaders. Stayed on well.
Raced handy to the speed, 1 off with cover. Was a beaten horse passing the 500 M. (See Racing Incident.)
Began well and went forward to race behind the leader on the fence near the 1200 M. Hit the lead after the 200 M, but was mowed down in the run to the post.
Trailed field for most of the race. Made up ground by running past beaten runners in the home straight.
Boxed-seated behind the leader until straightening. Failed to turn up a notch and remained at same pace in the straight.
Ridden early and was racing behind leaders early. Taken back to get cover 1300 M out. Raced towards the rear in back straight. Ran on without threatening in the straight.
Jumped well and was allowed to drift back to behind midfield. 4 to 5Ls off the lead turning for home. Closed the race off with a strong rally and ran down rival at the line.
Raced wide and without cover at midfield. Lacked a response at home turn and found nothing in the straight.
Eased back to a rearward spot early stages. Raced behind midfield back straight. 3-back on the fence at home turn and kept on steadily in the straight.
Jumped well and ridden along to take the lead. Maintained a clear advantage heading into the home straight. Kept on well final stages but was caught at the post.
2-wide and no worse than midfield. Within 3Ls of the leader in 4th at home turn. Unable to quicken and weakened in the straight.
Botched the start and raced along the fence at midfield. 2Ls off the leader on home turn and switched out on straightening. Ran on well in the straight to grab a minor placing.
Raced 2-wide behind the leader. Only kept on same pace in the straight.
On fence back in 7th at 1000 M, 4-wide back in midfield turning for home, stayed on for a remote 2nd.
6Ls down in 6th out 2-wide at 1200 M, about 4Ls back in 6th at last bend, failed to quicken up sufficiently to place.
4Ls back in 4th on fence at 1200 M, closer on straightening, had every chance to at least place but disappointed.
Box-seated on fence 2Ls back in 3rd at 1200 M, shuffled back a little turning for home and without much room in the straight, was held anyway.
2-wide and 8Ls back in 8th at 1000 M, looped field from 500 M to lead at top of home straight, pulled right away, easily.
Worked hard to lead on fence by half a length at 1200 M, headed 900 M out and petered out from top of home straight.
5Ls back in 5th on fence at 1200 M, outpaced when tempo quickened before home straight, plugged at same speed for a place.
3-wide no cover early on, one from rear about 11Ls behind pace at 1000 M, closer but still last turning in, remained there.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
9Ls back on fence at 1000 M in 9th place, about 6Ls down off last turn, held up until the 200 M, unlucky not to finish a little closer.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Slowly away, 12Ls last at 1000 M and with 7Ls to make up turning for home, ran on past some beaten rivals, never nearer.
4-back on fence 5Ls from the front at 1000 M and midfield at the last turn, never troubled the principals.
Had the run of the race 2Ls off pace in 3rd from 1100 M to home straight, failed to capitalize.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Solid effort to place despite being 3-wide no cover the trip throughout, 4Ls back in midfield until home straight, stayed on best of the rest thereafter.
Led on fence by 1L at 1200 M, headed at the entrance to home straight and fizzled out inside final 200 M.
Slowest out, one from rear 7Ls off pace at 1000 M, headway to midfield and 4-wide turning for home, one-paced in the finish.
3-back on fence 4Ls back in 5th at 1100 M and much the same turning for home, failed to make up any further ground despite cushy passage.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
8Ls last on fence at 1000 M, 7Ls last turning for home, made some minor late ground past beaten rivals.
6Ls back in 10th on fence at 1000 M, pressed forward out wide from 600 M to lead 400 M out, headed 100 M out but rallied to get back up on line.
Held 4th in 'one-out-one-back' position from 1100 M to 500 M, 3-wide turning for home, led 100 M out but could not follow through, remains frustrating.
2-wide and 1L back in 2nd at 1100 M, relegated to 4th turning for home and very weak inside final stages.
At back, 7-1/2Ls behind the good pace, lacked turn of foot, ran on only fairly over the final stages.
Settled just behind midfield, 5-1/2Ls off the good pace, benefited by the rail-run, dashed well 300 M, dominated 100 M.
Eased to rear, more than 9Ls off the good pace 2-wide, lacked turn of foot, ran on fairly in straight.
Pushed to occupy a more prominent spot along the rails, 4Ls off the good pace, made ground steadily in straight to grab 3rd.
Eased to sit about midfield, 5Ls off the good pace 2-wide, badly bumped and checked 350 M, just ran on afterwards.
Eased at start to cross the fence at rear, more than 9Ls off the good pace, never progressed in final stages.
Eased to sit just behind midfield, 6Ls off the good pace 2-wide, progressed steadily 250 M.
Pushed to obtain the box seat, travelled nicely 2Ls off the good pace, swept forward 2-wide home bend to make run, closed the race off strongly and ran 2nd.
Bumped start, eased to sit behind the pace group, 3-1/2Ls off the good pace, trapped 3-wide and lost ground, raced flat in straight, no progress.
Bumped start, pushed forward, 2Ls off the good pace 2-wide, carried out to 3-wide at home bend, soon weakened in straight.
Hard ridden to take the rail and led by 2Ls at good early sectionals, soon emptied 300 M.
Eased back, 7Ls off the good pace along the fence, made some ground 400 M, but no threat at the finish.
Well back. Ran on down centre of straight past beaten horses.
Raced 3-wide in midfield. Found no cover in similar position down far side. Weakened into straight.
Raced 3-wide behind midfield. Ran home steadily without threatening.
Settled one-out-one-back in 4th about 2Ls off pace. Came under pressure rounding home bend and ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Gradually settled outside leader. In similar position in 2nd turning in. Kept on in straight until finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Settled just worse than midfield. Commenced move approaching home turn and switched wide into straight. Fought on steadily to narrowly miss the placegetters.
Settled in last few. Ran on after straightening only to find himself behind a wall of horses 200 M out. Not properly tested.

Began fairly from poor draw. Gradually took up running and crossed to rails passing winning post the first time. Set steady pace from stables bend and led field to finish. Just held on under pressure.
Settled well back. Never nearer.
Broke well. Settled one-back in 3rd on rails. Chased leader into straight. Ran home steadily under pressure without threatening.
Settled on rails just worse than midfield. Similar turning in but ran home one-paced.
Settled 2-back on rails in 5th just better than midfield. Fought on well under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Out only fairly, outpaced and ended up 6Ls back in 2-wide line, pace to an advantage but lost spot and nearly last on bend, made only fair headway in straight.

Away well, had good pace to race outside leader, engaged in a 3-way battle for front at a strong pace, continued to apply pressure on bend, quickly in trouble on turning and couldn't sustain effort last 200 M.
Began reasonably, with them early before racing behind leader, did share of work on back of solid pace, checked at 900 M and 600 M, ridden along on bend, faded out from turn.

Restrained from a wide gate, ended up 3-wide at rear 8Ls off pace, improved 3-wide on bend, suited by fast tempo, nearly last on turning, produced a smart dash in straight to finish all over the top of rivals last 50 M.
Standard jump, allowed to settle in mid-division but always caught wide without cover, began to struggle on bend, weakened out tamely thereafter to be well beaten.
Away with them but couldn't take a forward slot, challenged 3-wide outside leaders without cover, applied pressure assuring a solid pace, right there turning, weakened from 150 M after a hard run.

Standard getaway, improved into a midfield spot 3Ls back, kept progressing on bend, 2Ls down turning and came with strong run and looked a certain chance before breaking down at 50 M. (Fractured sesamoids. Later destroyed.)
Bounced out, ridden up to maintain lead, pressured by outside horses throughout setting a solid tempo, niggled to shake off challengers turning, run ended when emptied at 100 M.

Out fairly but soon recovered to slot into 1 out 1 back spot, had an ideal trail on bend, helped by pace, gained split turning and challenged strongly, briefly hit lead at 100 M but overhauled by fast finishing rivals.

Taken back from an outside alley, settled 6-7Ls back in 2-wide line, helped by solid sections in middle stages, shifted out with a 3-wide run on bend, charged last 200 M coming with winner but couldn't hold rival last 50 M.
No pace from jump, ended up back with last few 7-8Ls down on rails, helped by strong pace in mid-section, lacked usual finish and hardly progressed from near last position turning to be well beaten.

Began in line, allowed to settle in an ideal spot 3-4Ls back in midfield, had an easy time but was a little difficult to settle, saved ground on bend, made gradual progress at same pace in straight. Nearest on line.
Began well, had enough pace to be up sharing lead, raced greenly towards centre, hung when placed under pressure, could only hold ground over the concluding stages.
Showed speed, raced prominently before leading outright on outside rail, always travelled well, held a 1L advantage at 300 M, pushed out to score in good fashion.
Showed some early pace, held position behind leader towards outside rail, urged along at 400 M to hold spot, stayed on at same pace to be not far away in finish.
Unbalanced early, crossed to set behind midfield close to outside rail, kept on evenly under urging from 300 M, in traffic at 100 M, never really threatened thereafter.
Began well enough, up close to front 1L off pace, under pressure at 400 M, quickly surrendered and dropped right out late.
Fair getaway, sat behind pace closer to middle of course, shifted into clear running at 300 M, finished race off nicely to take 2nd place.
No pace from jump, settled a clear last 6Ls away, improved from midpoint, steadied and lost run at 200 M when making solid progress, kept on evenly thereafter to be closest at finish.
Not much early pace, raced 4Ls away on outside rail back with last few, urged along at midpoint, kept improving and did best work late to make frame.
Fractious in gate, showed usual pace to be up sharing front, right there at 400 M still challenging, had little to give late and faded last furlong.
Moderate beginning, raced at rear 5Ls back towards stand side, made a run from 500 M, kept closing to 100 M before steadied, just held ground thereafter.
Jumped in air, mustered to race in behind leaders 2Ls back, always travelled in mid-section, kept progressing last 300 M when in clear to finish a nice 3rd.
Out well there, raced greenly behind pace close to middle, 2 to 3Ls back at midpoint, condition soon gave out and lost touch from 300 M.
Modest beginning after being crowded, pushed on to be up sharing lead at midpoint, under pressure soon after 400 M, gave little and weakened out. (See Racing Incidents - "not comfortable".)
Raced 1 out, 1 back, was given every chance, produced a one-paced finish in straight.
Made every post a winner by leading from outset. Stole a break early in the straight and managed to hold on by a neck margin.
Raced behind the speed, 3 deep with cover. Stayed on one paced in the run home.
Slow to begin and settled in last position along the fence. Angled out in the straight and after obtaining clear running near the 200 M, worked to the line well.

Began awkwardly, got its head up and was then taken across behind runners to settle behind midfield along the rails. Took inside runs in the straight and after obtaining clear running near the 200 M, closed off well.
Pulled hard and took some time to settle, racing near the rear of the field, 3-wide with cover. Came wide in the straight and ran on one paced.
Positioned midfield 3-wide with cover. Kept on one paced when placed under pressure in the straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced 2 deep midfield with cover. Failed to find any extra in the run to the line.
Raced outside the leader and was battling to hold its position turning for home eventually fading inside the furlong.
From the wide barrier was taken across behind runners in the early stages and travelled in 2nd last position. Failed to run on and struggled in the run home.
Tracked the leader along the fence. Posed a serious challenge inside the final furlong however hung out and proved difficult to ride in the straight, coming up just short.
Raced on the speed but was wide and without cover for most of the trip. Was eased down in the straight.

Travelled close to midfield 2-wide with cover although proved difficult to settle in the early and middle stages losing its position near the 600 M. Struck some traffic problems in the straight, finally working home nicely.
Settled midfield on the fence. Kept to the inside in the straight and closed off soundly.
Raced in a prominent spot behind the lead. Kept on fairly in the straight but unable to turn up a notch.
Taken back from a wide draw. Made a ground saving trip around the turn and was 3 to 4Ls off the lead on straightening. Ran on only fairly thereafter.
Ridden out of the gates and raced behind the leaders. 2-wide and no more than 2Ls off the pace turning for home. Unable to quicken and stayed on one pace to the line.
Settled at midfield. 2-back on the fence turning in. Ran home strongly and posed a late threat.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground. Raced in rear section and trailed field on straightening. Had some trouble finding daylight near 300 M. Made up some late ground over beaten runners.
Jumped well and was allowed to drift back to midfield. 2-wide and 3Ls off the lead at the turn. Made up some ground in the straight.
Ridden out of the gates to a forward spot. Raced outside the leader rounding the turn. Kept pace before tiring final 300 M.
Failed to muster speed and soon trailed field. Remained in rear section turning for home. Crowded on straightening and then was held up for some distance. Ran home strongly over the last 200 M.
Soon in the lead. Held a narrow advantage on straightening. Kept on well in the final stages to deny late challenger.
Steadily improved into a forward position. 3-wide among leaders turning for home. Contended for the lead with eventual winner 300 M out but unable to find extra to keep pace in the final stages.
3-wide at midfield. 2 to 3Ls down on straightening. Weakened thereafter.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Box-seated in 2nd or 3rd about 1L or 2Ls behind NATURAL ECHO until entering stretch, lacked the acceleration to overhaul the winner.
4-back on the fence 5Ls from the pace at halfway, 4Ls back swinging for home, outpaced.
Ridden very quietly in rear and still with 10Ls to make up 600 M out, widest and 7Ls last turning for home, stayed on strongly for a place.
2-wide in midfield and 5Ls back in 6th at the 1000 M, steadied turning for home but was left flat-footed in any case.
Messy start, 4Ls back in 5th out 2-wide at the 1400 M, 4-wide on straightening when 3Ls down in 4th, wilted rapidly.
Slowest out, 5-back on fence in 9th about 6Ls from the speed at the 800 M, remained in a similar position until the winning post.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Went back from wide gate, 7Ls down in 11th or so at 1400 M, 3-wide no cover from the 600 M and never likely to advance much.
Failed to muster any early dash, one from rear and 8Ls down in middle stages, made some minor late headway in the stretch without posing any danger.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Without cover early before getting in 2-wide and 6Ls back in 8th at the 1200 M, marginally closer turning in, ran on only fairly.
Always worse than midfield, on fence about 9Ls down at halfway, found very little off the bridle in latter stages.
Worse than midfield about 6Ls from the speed until the home straight, emptied out, performance deemed unacceptable.
Settled 3-back on fence about 4Ls off pace in 5th down backstretch, 2Ls back in 3rd into home straight, one-paced and hung in under pressure.
Led by 1L on fence at 1000 M, headed by winner from 800 M to home turn, got upsides 50 M out but couldn't follow through to score.
Prominently placed but niggled along to remain in touch at halfway when 2Ls back in 5th, failed to get any closer in the stretch.
Caught wide early on, 4Ls behind in midfield with cover at halfway, soon lost this position and tailed out unacceptably in the stretch.
Keen early on, 2-wide around midfield 4Ls from the pace through to the 600 M, ran on okay but lacked the dash to fill a place.
In rear throughout, 8Ls last and struggling taking final bend, well beaten.
Left 3-wide no cover at 800 M when 2Ls back in 3rd and same turning for home, run peaked by the 200 M and eased down late when beaten.
Held a nice position on the fence in 4th or so between 2Ls off the pace until the last bend, given every chance to fill quinella but was too one-paced.
Awkwardly away, very keen down backstretch on fence when 5Ls behind, only a little closer turning in, one-paced thereafter. (Bled.)
Went back from a wide gate, 8Ls behind and one from rear at halfway, made some minor late ground past tired rivals.
Caught 4-wide no cover early on, pressed on to lead out 2-wide by about 1L from 800 M to stretch, joined by runner-up 50 M out, rallied again to get up final strides.
Taken back from wide gate and raced about 7Ls off speed in 12th until the final bend, made zero impact.
3-back on fence about 4Ls down in midfield until halfway, edged wider on straightening, gave vain pursuit of the leaders.
5Ls back in 9th at the 800 M, struggling to lie up at the 500 M, gave ground steadily from top of homestretch.
Slowest away, towards rear and 2-wide about 7Ls from early tempo, never likely to improve better than midfield.
Hard ridden early but failed to muster speed, just able to obtain a midfield spot along the fence, 3Ls off the leaders, not suited by the fast tempo, ran on until 250 M when emptied.
Eased to sit about midfield, 5-1/2Ls off the leaders 2-wide, benefited by the fast tempo, only ran on fairly in last quarter.

Crossed to the rail behind the field soon after the start, 7-1/2Ls off the leader at rear, helped by the fast pace, but blocked most of straight, made up lots of ground under limited clear running for unlucky 4th.

Hard ridden to take the rail and led by 1L early, pressured from 800 M and took sit in 2nd, closed the race off strongly from 300 M despite harmed by the fast pace, dominated 100 M, not fully ridden out.
Hard ridden but no early speed, 7-1/2Ls behind the leaders at rear, trapped 3-wide and lost ground, helped by the fast tempo, however no progress in final stages.
Hard ridden to occupy the box seat early, not suited by the fast pace, never had chance to take a breath, still ran on well until 100 M, out of fuel.
Eased to sit about midfield, 5-1/2Ls off the leaders, trapped 3-wide and lost ground, favoured by the fast tempo, progressed steadily 300 M to finish 3rd without threat.
Hard ridden to press forward, 2-1/2Ls off the leaders 2 to 3-wide, not suited by the fast pace, faded rapidly 450 M.
Jumped fast and prominent, however checked early, just better than midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the fast pace on the rails, ran on fairly in straight.
Prominent, just off the leaders 2-wide, harmed by the very fast early sectionals, dropped off quickly in straight.
Travelled in 6th just better than midfield. Moved closer turning in. Soon weakened after straightening.
Began fairly from wide draw. Settled wide towards rear. Made moderate headway down centre of straight without threatening.
Only a fair start. Soon picked up to prominent position. Chased leader around home bend. Disputed lead into straight. Gave the leader half a length advantage inside 200 M and unable to peg him back.
Began fairly from widest draw. Worked his way to prominent position coming out of back straight. Similar turning in. Gradually weakened inside final 300 M.
Away slowly. Trailed the field to straight. Ran past beaten horses closing stages.
Began well and quickly into lead. Gained a length advantage around home bend before joined into straight. Kicked clear under pressure passing 200 M to win readily.
Broke well. Settled mainly one-out-one-back in 4th. Similar turning in. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Settled in last few. Made steady headway down inner of straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled on rails in forward of midfield. Obtained split over 300 M out. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Midfield to straight. Failed to quicken under pressure to threaten.
Raced wide and just behind midfield most of way to straight. Weakened.
Never seen with a chance. Always struggling at the back.
Settled just behind midfield. Baulked for a run inside final 200 M. Fought on steadily to the line. (Mucus.)
Slightly sluggish at start but soon picked up to one-back position on rails. Similar in box seat turning in and early in straight. Kept on steadily without threatening.
Even jump, raced 3Ls back on rails, enjoyed an easy time following a hot speed, close enough on turning, unable to take opportunity at 400 M and failed to finish race off as normally would.
Out with rest, in running line before forced 3 wide, had cover 2Ls back just behind pace but doing some work with pace on, challenged on bend but soon under pressure and gave in easily.
Began in line, pressed on to take closer order, ended up 3 wide without cover, did it tough with strong pace on, right there on turning but hard run took toll and dropped out in straight.
First to hit ground, went to lead easily enough but challenged from that point, held inside keeping a solid pace, under pressure turning and weakened right out in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)

Fast into stride, applied pressure to lead and shaded inside horse throughout, kept pace solid in mid-section, held a narrow advantage on turning, quickly overtaken and knocked up badly last 200 M. (Muco in trachea.)
Away fairly, ended up 5 or so lengths back 3 wide in midfield, did have cover but did share of work with pace on, made a wide run on bend, struggled to pick up and just kept on at same pace late.
Standard jump, took a midfield position in running line, suited by pace 4L back by bend, travelled well on turning, in traffic at 400 M and badly held up to 250 M, never a live prospect thereafter.
Tardy into stride, settled at rear 8Ls off pace, had a good run with pace on, still last on turning with field to beat, made good progress down centre to be closest on line. Creditable effort.

Out in line, went forward to take a prominent role, raced in 1 out 1 back spot, had to trail behind a solid pace in mid-section, challenged on bend but lacked dash of winner and was no match last 300 M.
Restrained from a wide alley, ended up back with last few 6Ls off speed on line, aided by solid tempo, saved ground on bend, made some gradual progress in straight, however never really threatened.

Began fairly, drifted back to race towards rear 6 or so lengths back, aided by pace but not assisted by bias, swept closer 4 and 5 wide on bend, shot clear at 350 M, eased down late for a comprehensive win.
Mostly in one-out-one-back position to straight. Weakened after straightening.
Stumbled after jumping out losing ground. Remained well back to straight. Made no impression. (See Racing Incidents.)
Stumbled jumping out. Never far off in 4th far side. 5th entering straight. Ran home one-paced.
Broke well. Forced to check on heels of leader 800 M out. Chased leader into straight, then gradually weakened.
Close up early, settling 2-back in 5th. In similar position but 3-wide turning in. Kept on before finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Travelled in last few. Charged home strongly to do best work late.
Broke well. Raced wide in midfield. Soon weakened after straightening.
Soon dropped to last few. Never nearer.
Racing keenly far side. Travelled wide in midfield to straight. Responded well to take command inside 200 M. Won well.
Forward of midfield when steadied coming out of back straight. In similar position on rails around home bend and into straight. Obtained a run over 200 M out and ran on steadily to reach 3rd late.
Travelled on rails behind midfield. Similar turning for home. Did not find much room the length of straight. Not tested.
Soon took up running from widest draw and led at steady pace to 200 M. Dropped out.
Slightly slow out. Travelled towards rear. Ran on well inside final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Began fairly, settling wide towards rear. Ran home steadily without threatening.
Out in line, took a prominent role 3 to 4Ls back on rails, had a soft trip on bend, lacked a dash at business end and dropped off last 200 M.
Standard jump, drifted back to settle 8Ls or so back in running line, bias against, still well back on bend, held up at 300 M, made good progress from an impossible spot to be closest at finish.
Standard jump, raced 6Ls back on rails, used little in run but bias against, on bridle on bend, still in behind horses on turning, never improved in straight and just battled away late.

Ordinary jump, ridden along early just to hold spot at rear, 10 or so lengths back by midpoint, still well down on turning, made plenty of ground between horses in straight reeling off fast sections for a remarkable 5th.
Tardy to begin, ended up racing 3 wide behind midfield, bias against, 5 to 6Ls back on bend, struggling on turning, never posed a threat in straight simply battling to line.

Wasn't great to begin, pressed on and worked across to settle without cover 3 wide 3Ls back, always working in run, improved on turning, stuck to task in straight doing best late to finish a handy 2nd. Nice debut.
No early pace, posted 4 wide without cover, 5Ls back always working in mid-section, under pressure on turning, faded out easily after a tough run.
Fast away, led them with ease as usual, kept a solid pace on, advantaged by bias towards leaders, held a 1L break on turning, quickly overhauled and dropped right out late.
Allowed to drift back from a wide alley, posted 3 wide 8Ls from pace, couldn't get closer in mid-section, forced 4 wide on bend, made good ground against bias down middle to be closest at finish.

Began in line, took a midfield role 4 or so lengths back, travelled keenly between horses throughout, close enough on turning, cut back to inside and made good progress to 200 M but could only hold ground last bit.
Awkwardly away, ended up first without cover 2 to 3Ls back, progressed gradually on bend, made a challenge at 400 M with winner but outsprinted, stuck to task and kept giving to hold a solid 3rd.

Lacked early pace after jumping with them, faded to race in rearward division 8Ls back on fence, not helped by bias but pace suited, took inside runs turning, held up significantly to 200 M, too late to be a factor when clear.

Out fast, took a trail on noted speedster, always travelled in run, aided by bias, loomed up 2 wide at 400 M, dashed fast and soon put paid to rivals, took it a bit easy last 200 M in scoring a comfortable win.
Out in line, proved difficult to settle in a midfield role 5Ls back in 2 wide line, back between horses on bend, took run at 300 M, made even progress down middle to make frame.
Lost ground at jump, raced 2Ls back furthest from outside rail, showed inexperience racing a little awkwardly when placed under pressure, condition gave out quickly from 300 M.
Reasonable jump, positioned behind leaders 2Ls back, had a fair run behind leaders, continued to travel well at 300 M, held ground evenly late to be not far away in finish.
Slow to jump, settled in behind leaders, 2 to 3Ls back, had even run to 400 M, shifted into clear and challenged quickly shortly after, closed best despite hanging to score.
Standard jump, struggled from outset 4Ls back, ridden along at rear, never really travelling, weakened in the run to line.
Well enough away, shared lead on outside, set even tempo, travelled well at 300 M, stuck on gamely when sprint went on but just lacked dash of winner late.
Began with purpose, led comfortably on outside rail, set an even tempo with a little pressure from outside horse, kept on well last 300 M and just edged out in 3 way go.
Went forward from barrier rise but was posted 3 deep without cover behind the speed. Made gradual progress in straight and got the verdict right on the line for a grinding win.
Parked midfield the fence. Worked home soundly without threatening.
Raced with the back markers, 2-wide with cover. Battled away in the run home.
Raced just in front of midfield, 1 off with cover. Closed off well.
Positioned close to midfield but was always 3 to 4-wide, gained some cover after the 700 M. Failed to quicken in the straight.
Faded passing the 200 M after leading.

Travelled 3 back on the fence before shifting out to race 1 out 1 back after the 800 M. Worked to the lead passing the furlong and looked the likely winner until being collared in the shadows of the post.
Camped behind the leader along the fence. Had every chance.
Parked outside the leader at its girth. Didn't find any extra when pressured over the final 150 M.
Travelled wide for most of the trip near the tail of the field 3 to 4-wide, no cover. Was carried widest turning for home and struggled in the straight.
Travelled midfield, 2 to 3-wide with cover. Failed to improve and battled to the line.
Positioned at the rear, 2 deep with cover. Shifted to the outside of the field after the 300 M, but didn't respond to pressure.
Was allowed to drift back early in the race and settle near the rear of the field, 3 deep with cover. When under pressure in the straight raced greenly whilst making satisfactory ground.
Raced in last position on the fence. Never likely.
2-wide and settled behind the leaders. Quickened on straightening and took control final 200 M.
Raced along the rails behind midfield. Made a ground saving trip at the turn. Rallied for a minor placing.
Raced on the fence at midfield. Ran on only fairly in the straight.
Raced in rear section until straightening. Had trouble getting a clear run in early part of straight. Closed off strongly final 300 M.
Hard ridden to be in a forward spot. Disputed lead until home turn and held a narrow advantage into the home straight. Headed 300 M out and gradually weakened.
Raced in rear section and was wide turning for home. Only ran past beaten runners in the straight.
Settled at midfield. Only remained on same pace in the straight.
Tracked leaders in a 2-wide spot early stages. 2 to 3Ls off the lead at home turn. Weakened shortly after straightening.

Taken back to a rearward spot. 3-wide making the turn and was widest turning in. Rallied and made up ground in the home straight.
Lacked speed from widest draw and raced behind midfield. Never quickened in the straight and ran home on same pace. (Mucopus.)
Raced 3-wide without cover behind the pace early stages. 3 to 4Ls off the lead at home turn. Made a brief dash in the early part of the straight. Unable to sustain effort in the final stages.
Unable to muster speed and raced towards the rear. Near last turning for home. Took some time to get a clear run. Closed off strongly final 200 M.
Better than midfield. 2-back on the fence turning for home. Kept on only fairly in the straight.

2Ls back in 5th early, a little further back on the circle and hard pressed to improve entering stretch, one-paced thereafter.
2-wide in 10th or so about 5Ls from early pace, crept closer turning for home, 1L down in 4th at furlong pole, ran on well to lead final strides.
4Ls behind along backstretch, 3-back on fence on circle when 2Ls down, took time to balance up in the straight, ran on well late to nick 2nd.
Disputing or setting a fast early pace, 1L clear turning for home but headed 250 M out and quickly swamped.
