Went back and inside from widest gate, 10Ls down in 12th at 1000 M, checked soon after straightening when 5Ls down, made some minor late ground.
3Ls back in 6th out 2-wide at 1400 M, 2Ls back in 4th out 3-wide and pressured ridden into straight, clear 2nd at 200 M but no extra and fell back to 3rd.
3-back on fence 5Ls off pace at 1200 M in mid-division, 3Ls down in same position off last bend, plugged on at home at the one speed.

Closer than usual 3Ls back in 5th on fence at 1400 M, closer again at last turn and at 200 M but tired close home. (Blood in trachea.)

Settled 3rd at 1400 M when 1L back, box-seated 2Ls back in 3rd at 800 M, all out to maintain this proximity into straight, faded tamely.
Slowest out and 14Ls last 1000 M out, 7Ls back and 5-wide (widest of all) off last bend, made only a little more ground.
In 8th about 5Ls off pace when 2-wide at 1200 M, closer turning in and a rough place chance at 300 M, found little response to pressure.
One from rear about 12Ls back at 1000 M, with 7Ls to make up into home straight, made some minor late ground despite being steadied 100 M out.
9Ls back in 11th out 2-wide at 1000 M, 4-wide and 5Ls down in midfield turning in, had his chance to place but lacked the gears.
Pushed to take the rail and led by 1-1/2Ls at very slow early sectionals, hung on until 300 M when overhauled, just ran on to the line.
Very awkward away, dropped to rear, 9Ls off the leader, raced 3 to 4-wide and lost ground at bends, harmed by the very slow pace, lacked turn of foot in final stages.

Eased to sit about midfield, 4Ls off the leader 3-wide, no cover, not suited by the very slow pace, dropped off quickly in straight.

Pushed to obtain a more prominent spot in midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the leader along the rails, not suited by the very slow pace, delivered strongly finishing efforts 300 M to win without using all fuel in the tank.
Pushed to occupy the box seat, 1-1/2Ls off the slow pace, blocked whole straight, just ran on, checked 30 M. Not fully tested.
Pushed to sit outside the lead, benefited by the very slow early tempo, led 300 M, ran on strongly to the line, overhauled 100 M, kept running on well for 2nd.
Settled in midfield along the fence, 5Ls off the leader, showed little dash 200 M despite not suited by the very slow tempo.
Bumped start, eased back, 6Ls off the leader, trapped 3 to 4-wide and lost ground, harmed by the very slow pace, ran on ok in last quarter.
Broke well, settling at the back. Trailed the field into straight. Made significant progress inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Midfield far side. Yielded ground gradually around home bend. (Throat inflammation.)
Slightly slow out. Soon picked up to rear of midfield before taking closer order around home bend. 3-back in box-seat turning in. Obtained split 200 M out to finish off race nicely under pressure.
Broke well. Settling outside leader. Disputed lead into straight. Fought on under pressure early on but had no more to give inside final 200 M.
Began only fairly settling in midfield on rails. Raced keenly at times around home bend. Not clear run early in straight until after 300 M. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Began with field from wide draw. Remained wide in forward of midfield to straight. Ran home one paced and slightly inconvenienced 200 M out.
Settled in rear. Held rails run to straight. Ran home nicely to produce good late impression at the finish.
Broke well settling just off the pace on rails. In box-seat early in straight. Broke through to hit front passing 200 M only to be collared final few strides.
Began fairly. Travelled in last few. Ran on steadily down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Began well from wide draw. Travelled wide in prominent position far side. One-back 3-wide in about 6th turning for home. Faded gradually. (Lost plate.)
Broke well from poor draw travelling mainly 3-wide outside leader. In similar position in 3rd turning for home. Fought on dourly to hit front late.
Slightly slow to begin. Travelled wide in rear of midfield. Awkwardly placed behind horses early in straight. Obtained clear passage 200 M out and ran on well.
Began fairly. Soon took up running and led until joined after straightening. Dropped out tamely passing 200 M.
Began awkwardly losing a little ground. Travelling in forward of midfield before racing keenly in one-out-one-back position onto home bend. Weakened noticeably after straightening.
Lacked early pace, ended up 5Ls back behind midfield, tracked well but set a bit to do from midpoint, closed well last 400 M but couldn't pair back margin last 400 M.
Began well, went to inside of track, raced solo on far side of course, about midfield or better at midpoint, gradually lost touch in run to line.
Well enough away, raced 3 to 4Ls back a few horses from outside, began to feel effects at 400 M and stopped quickly weakening to be well beaten.
Standard jump, settled back with last few 6Ls away, niggled to hold position at midpoint, responded well from 400 M and finished reasonably well despite never looking a winning chance.
Standard jump, raced towards rear 6Ls back close to stand side, shifted into clear running from midpoint, did best work last 300 M making some late headway.
Showed plenty of pace, took a sit behind leader 1L back, improved at 400 M, challenged passing 200 M, accelerated sharply and went on to score comfortably in finish.
First into stride, led easily along outside rail, kept a solid pace on 1L clear, still defied rivals to 200 M, no match for winner final furlong but stayed on well late for another placing.
Began awkwardly, failed to muster and became detached from the field, didn't stride out and not ridden along thereafter. Never a factor. (Lame in left hind and abnormal breathing.)
Tardy into stride, took a position in behind midfield 5Ls off pace, had a trail to midpoint, moved to centre and finished off nicely for 3rd but outclassed by first two.
Away evenly, raced 4Ls back along outside rail, jockey kept mind on job from midpoint, didn't offer much in run to line just holding ground late.
Slow into stride, recovered to race 4Ls back in midfield, had a fair run to 400 M, couldn't keep up when they sprinted and folded tamely thereafter.
Began well, raced 2 to 3Ls back off outside rail, had a reasonable run to 400 M, didn't respond when placed under pressure, checked at 100 M but was weakening regardless.
Began in line, positioned behind pace 3Ls back behind pace, had no excuses in run, found little when placed under pressure and struggled over concluding stages.
Moderate jump, back behind midfield 5Ls back, travelled fairly throughout, under pressure at 400 M, checked at 250 M when weakening and never a factor thereafter.
Always in last few.
Prominent to straight. Gradually weakened.
Settled on rails in midfield. Gradually shifted off rails for a run after straightening, coming into contact with a runner over 300 M out. Fought on steadily to the line.
Travelled in 7th in forward of midfield far side. 3-wide in midfield turning for home. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Settled behind midfield. Made good progress down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled in rear from poor draw. Always struggling.
Settled just behind midfield. Only produced moderate impression late.
Ridden for pace early and raced 3-wide in prominent position around stables bend. Raced one-out-one back far side before joining leader into straight. Weakened under pressure passing 300 M.
Soon took up running from wide draw and attempted to make all. Headed under pressure inside final 100 M.
Held better than midfield position to straight. Kept on before making steady late headway under pressure inside final 200 M.
Broke well from low draw. Held rails run inside leader before gaining box-seat over halfway out. 2L back in 3rd turning in and quickened well to take charge inside final 100 M.
Always in last few. Never seen with a chance.
Mostly in midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Never far off mostly 2Ls back in 5th on rails. Did not find much room early in straight until 200 M. Ran on to be nearest at finish.

Slow into stride, raced at rear 7 to 8Ls away in 2 wide line, disadvantaged by tempo, still well back on circle making 3 wide run, didn't let down and turned in a disappointing effort over closing stages.
Fairly away, posted 3 wide without cover from an awkward alley, always working 4 to 5Ls back, improved gradually on circle, produced a strong finish despite pace bias making many lengths for 3rd.

Standard jump, worked forward wide early to race outside leader, applied pressure to leader thereafter, headed inside horse on bend, took over on turning, fought hard length of straight going down narrowly. (Protest 2nd vs 1st.)

No early pace, raced 5Ls back in 2 wide line behind midfield, travelled well despite pace against, improved on turning in, let down with a late finish making good ground to be on heels of placegetters.
Lacked pace from jump and allowed to drift back behind midfield 5 to 6Ls back, unsuited by pace, still well back turning, closed off fairly without looking a threat holding ground in run to line.

Moderate beginning and failed to muster, ended up 5 to 6Ls back on rails, had easy time but pace not helpful, back in behind horses turning, closed fairly and steadied at 200 M but never going to be a factor regardless.
Well enough to jump, positioned nicely behind leader 2Ls back, had an ideal run with steady pace, pushed along to make a challenge turning, failed to respond and dropped right out late.

Out in line, assumed a spot on fence 4 to 5Ls back, used little in run however not helped by steady pace, back in behind horses turning, shifted on two occasions sourcing a clear run, hit line nicely late.
Tardy to begin, ended up 7Ls back on rails, not helped by steady tempo at top end, still well back on turning in, made fair progress from an impossible spot to be closest on line.
Began fairly, took a midfield spot 4Ls back in running line, had a reasonable run in mid-section, eased 3 wide on turning, lacked required extra gear and simply held position last 300 M.
Fast out and led field, pressured throughout by outside horse, not overly taxed with fair tempo, again challenged on turning in, there to 300 M but quickly tired and didn't see out trip late.

Standard jump, hard ridden to take closer order, ended up in prime position 1 out 1 back, suited by pace, advanced on turning in, took a narrow lead at 300 M and held on well despite racing greenly to score and survive protest.

Well enough to begin, pressed on wide early and eventually took spot in 2 wide line before bend, had a good trip 2 to 3Ls back, tracked well turning, continued to close off nicely to be right there in finish.
Crossed from widest gate to lead on fence by 1L at 1000 M, headed at the top of the home straight and soon beaten.
2-wide and 4Ls back in 6th at 1000 M, challenging when less than 3Ls behind into home straight, stayed on well but out classed by the winner.
1L back in 2nd and a bit keen at 1000 M, soon disputed lead and 1L clear from 600 M until being headed by winner 200 M out, missed a place late on.
5Ls back in midfield at 1000 M, closer turning in and with place prospects at 200 M when about 2Ls down in 5th, couldn't take advantage.
9Ls back in 12th on fence at 1000 M, about 6Ls down in 12th off last bend, found nothing under pressure and eased down late.
9Ls down in 11th out 2-wide at 1000 M, 5-wide (widest of all) turning for home in 10th, ran on well down centre of the track for a minor share.
Caught 3-wide no cover when 1L back in 3rd at 1200 M, never got in and beginning to struggle at top of home straight, one-paced and lost ground.
3 and 4-back on fence around mid-division from back to homestretch between 4Ls and 5Ls off pace, always outpaced and tired final 200 M.
Travelled well on fence in the box-seat in 4th until home turn, accelerated well to lead 200 M out, always in charge.
Close-up 2-wide and 3Ls back in 4th at 900 M, over-raced shortly afterwards, 1L down in 3rd off last bend, one-paced and lost a place final 150 M.
Awkward break, on fence 6Ls back in 9th at 1000 M, 4Ls back but still worse than midfield swinging for home, made no impact.
Got back as usual, 7Ls back in 10th at 1000 M, 5Ls down off final bend, ran on pretty well, never nearer.
Never travelling well, 10Ls last at halfway and detached turning for home, poor performance.
Went back from wide gate, one from rear 9Ls off pace at 1000 M, 6Ls back into stretch, twice chopped out of a run by 200 M mark, not fully tested.
Worse than midfield. Made modest headway down inner of straight.

Began only fairly settling one-back on rails. A 2L 4th around home bend before shifting out for a run turning in. Fought on steadily to reach 2nd late.

Always in last few. (Mucus.)
Mainly in rear of midfield to straight. Kept on steadily down centre of track.
Soon took up running. Led until joined 500 M out. Gradually weakened under pressure after straightening.
Began with field from widest draw. Travelled wide in prominent position down far side. Crossed to rails to trail leaders coming out of back straight. Ran home one-paced under pressure.

Raced wide in 5th just better than midfield. One-paced in straight before finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Began okay but gradually dropped to last few. Trailed the field from Rock and never threatening.
Travelled 3 back the fence. Was shifted out into a run between horses near the 200 M and looked to have the race in its keeping soon after but was mowed down inside the 100 M.
Tired after leading when challenged near the 200 M.
Travelled near the rear for the duration of the race. Never likely.
Began awkwardly and travelled in midfield one the fence. Worked to the line dourly.
Raced 1 out 1 back, no excuses.

Unable to muster sufficient speed in the early stages and raced near the rear of the field on the fence. Never appeared to travell comfortably and when placed under pressure after the 600 M did not respond. Not likely.
Travelled in last position, made some ground in the run home but peaked on its efforts well before the post.
Camped outside the leader, had every possible chance, found little in run to line.

Was checked at the start, settling behind midfield 1 off with cover. Rolled out to race 3-wide without cover after the 700 M and commenced a sweeping run. Came wide in the straight to finish strongly over rivals.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield, struggled in the straight.
Stalked the leader along the fence. Railed up turning for home and despite hitting the front after the furlong, came up short in the run to the line.
Raced midfield, 2 deep with cover. Loomed up approaching the 200 M but failed to find any extra in the run to the wire.
Best out but unable to cross to the rails. Raced 2-wide behind the leader. Weakened final 200 M.
Raced ungenerously at midfield. Commenced to weaken at home turn and found nothing in the straight.
Jumped awkwardly and trailed field early. Behind midfield at home turn and never quickened in the straight.
Soon led. Maintained a length's advantage final 200 M but unable to find extra to hold off winner final stages.
Found the rails early and raced at midfield. 2 back on the fence turning for home. Ran on well and chased down early leader final 50 M to take the race.
Settled at midfield. Kept on one paced in the straight.
3-wide and kept within 2Ls of the leader. Stayed on fairly in the straight to make the frame.
Wide at the rear early stages. Had trouble keeping up at home turn and found nothing thereafter.
Taken back from wide draw and settled in rear section. Hard ridden at home turn and made up ground in the straight by running past beaten runners.
Raced in a prominent spot behind the pace. Kept on fairly in the straight but unable to turn up a notch to trouble first two.
Lacked speed and raced towards the rear. No improvement in the straight.
Wide and without cover at midfield early stages. 3-wide and 2Ls off making home turn. Weakened on straightening.
10Ls down and under pressure at the 1000 M, still hard at it 600 M out, aided by the solid tempo to finish close up without threatening. (See Racing Incident.)
Went back from widest gate, 8Ls down in 7th at 1000 M and 5Ls down into straight, good pace to briefly lead at 100 M but tipped out final strides.
Box-seated in 2nd or 3rd on fence about 2Ls off speed until final bend, vying for the lead 150 M out but couldn't follow through.
Slowly away and no response to hard riding early, detached in rear down the back, aided by decent tempo to make some very minor late ground.
6Ls back in 6th at 1000 M, checked turning for home when 5Ls down, ran on well down centre of track for a place.
5Ls down in 5th on fence at 1000 M, similarly positioned at the final bend but disputing the lead 150 M out, couldn't take advantage.
5Ls back in 4th out 2-wide at 1000 M, about 4Ls back in 4th into home straight, very one-paced.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
One from rear about 11Ls off pace at 1000 M, improving but 5-wide (widest) off the last bend, ran on well, nearest at finish.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Led on fence by 1L at the 1100 M, 2Ls clear off the last corner but found absolutely zero off the bridle and swamped 150 M out.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Led on fence by 1L at 1200 M, uncontested lead by 1L until home straight and at 200 M, just lasted home for the win.
Towards rear as usual, 3-wide with cover and 7Ls back at 1000 M, closer on circle but 4-wide (widest) turning in while hanging, nearest finish.
Slow away and switched in from wide gate, 9Ls back in rear at 1000 M, still well back turning for home, always chasing majority of the field.
2-wide and 2Ls back in 3rd at the 1200 M, over-raced down the back, 3Ls down on straightening, failed to quicken up sufficiently.
One from rear about 8Ls off the pace at 1200 M, 3-wide turning for home when 6Ls back, went inside finishing strongly, post came a touch too soon.
On fence in 2nd at 1200 M, 2Ls back in 3rd on straightening, ran on at the one pace and nudged out of the money final strides.
3-back on fence in midfield about 5Ls off pace at 1100 M, lost this position and worse off in rear turning for home, one-paced thereafter.
Fractious in gates, 3-wide no cover despite gate 4 from 1200 M, sent on to be a close 3rd at 600 M, and a neck 2nd into stretch, tired late but not beaten far.
2-wide around midfield about 5Ls behind leader through to final bend, petered out tamely.
Towards rear on fence through first half, shuffled back to 7Ls last at 600 M, ran on strongly in final stages and unlucky not to at least place.
Slow away, 3-wide with cover 5Ls back in 8th at 1000 M, left without cover from 700 M and closer but unbalanced on straightening, soon beaten.
4Ls back in 4th at 1100 M, enjoyed a nice run close-up until the home straight, finished fairly well and just about sneaked into the placings.
Hard ridden to press forward and sit outside the leader, benefited by the slow tempo, ran on until 150 M when flattened.
At back, 6-1/2Ls off the leader along the fence early, swept forward 2-wide at home bend to make run, dashed strongly 200 M to share 2nd despite harmed by the slow pace.
Midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, harmed by the slow pace, bumped and carried out 400 M, dropped off afterwards.
Eased to sit just worse than midfield, 5-1/2Ls off the leader, trapped 3-wide throughout and lost too much ground, harmed by the slow pace, ran on ok in straight.
Pushed to take the rail and led by 1L at advantageous slow early sectionals, hung on until 200 M overhauled, ran on well to the line and shared 2nd.
Eased to sit in midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the leader along the fence, travelled nicely throughout, pushed the button 300 M, dashed strongly to win without much threats.
Eased at start, 6-1/2Ls off the leader 2 to 3-wide, not suited by the slow pace, never competitive.
Eased to sit behind the lead, 2-1/2Ls off the slow pace 2-wide, lacked turn of foot, just held ground in straight.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Eased to rear for cover, 8Ls off the leader 2-wide, not suited by the slow pace, stayed flat until 100 M showing little dash.
Hard ridden to occupy a midfield spot along the fence, 5Ls behind the leader, not suited by the slow pace, little dash in final stages.
Pushed to secure the box seat, helped by the slow pace and the rail-run, however soon emptied 200 M.
Settled in rear from wide draw. Made no impression in straight.
Trailed the field to 400 M. Fought on under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Never far off in one-out-two-back position in 5th. Came under pressure upon straightening but failed to quicken to threaten.
Began slightly slowly. Soon picked up to prominent position along rails. Raced 2-back on rails from Rock. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Midfield to straight. Kept on steadily. Slightly hampered about 100 M out.
Began well. Settling wide behind midfield. Made no show in straight.
Ridden for pace and in front briefly. Gave up advantage turning into back straight. Chased leader into home straight but soon outsprinted.
Driven to muster pace early. Took over turning into back straight. Careered away after straightening for a comfortable victory.
Began fairly settling in midfield. Commenced run home bend and went wide into straight. Ran home one-paced.
Slightly sluggish at start. Raced wide just worse than midfield far side. Dropped to rear turning in.
Settled in one-out-one-back position. Similar turning in. Ran home one-paced to lose placings late.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Began well, slotted into coveted 1 out 1 back role, had a fair run on back of pace, still 2Ls down turning, made some progress to 200 M but unable to go on with it late and just battled last furlong.

Away only fairly, drifted back to race 5Ls back in 2-wide line, pace not ideal early but helped when it picked up in mid-section, made a wide run leaving on circle, came widest in straight and closed off best of rest for a placing.

Out well, didn't possess usual pace and ended up in midfield 3-4Ls back, tracked reasonably in middle stages, same margin down turning, didn't produce a finish and just battled in run to line. (See Racing Incidents.)

Began in line, pressed forward from a wide gate using plenty to eventually race 3rd outside leader at mid-point, didn't rest on circle, struggling on turning and only plugged on at same pace after hard run.
Showed good pace, pressed on to take up lead, set an even tempo in front, challenged on circle, kicked 1L clear turning, soon overtaken at 200 M, kept on reasonably thereafter to hold spot in frame.

Restrained from a wide gate, dropped to rear 6Ls off pace, conditions not ideal and set a task leaving bend, still last turning, took inside runs and made plenty of late ground but unable to challenge winner.
Slowed customary pace to race outside leader, held spot despite pressure from outside horses, 1L down on turning, unable to offer a finish in straight and weakened tamely late.
Away only fairly, pressed on 3-wide without cover 2Ls back, did plenty of work in run, had a trail from mid-point, urged along turning, gradually dropped out when hard run took toll.
Out in line, checked shortly after and ended up 5Ls back on fence, had a quiet run thereafter, still well back on bend, run closed at 200 M and lost all chance thereafter.

Began in line, lacked usual pace, settled 3Ls back on fence, never comfortable on inside horses rails, same margin down on turning, didn't finish of as usual and weakened out late. (Jockey reported didn't handle course first time.)

Hit ground first and lead them with ease, took a sit behind leader, always travelled comfortably, plenty to offer on bend, took inside runs and took over at 200 M, eased down to score comfortably. (See Racing Incidents re tactics.)
Awkwardly away and failed to muster, ended up 7 to 8Ls back at rear, helped by tempo, still well back approaching bend, made limited headway in straight.
Well enough away, took a prominent spot after racing wide early, had a fair run 2Ls back 2 wide thereafter, close enough on turning, loomed up at 300 M but lacked extra gear and weakened last bit.
Moderate jump, ended up behind midfield on rails, had a fair run suited by speed, had job to do on turning, made no impression straight.
Unable to go forward from a wide alley, ended up 10Ls back in running line, still well back on turning, made many lengths in straight to be not far away in finish.
Worked from a wide alley to cross 3 wide to be outside leaders, kept pressure on thereafter, still the 1L down turning, hard run took toll last 300 M and faded from contention.
Standard jump, positioned nicely on back of speed 3Ls back, no excuses in run, took inside runs on turning, made nice progress to narrowly miss place.
No early pace, raced 3 wide 7Ls back, gradually made ground in mid-section, improved 4 wide on turning, finished well to end up a close 3rd.

Standard beginning, slotted into running line 3Ls back early, took a 3 wide position without cover at midpoint, gradually crept closer on bend, had nothing to offer in straight and weakened right out.
Began with more purpose, raced prominently outside leader, took a sit behind leader in back straight, tracked well thereafter, eased out turning and went to front, fought off challengers late.
Well enough away, took a nice position 3Ls back, lost spot in back straight, in between horses on turning, into clear at 300 M and closed hard late to just miss.
No early pace, ended up well back 6Ls off pace, niggled along to hold spot in back straight, back with last few turning, made some late progress without threat.
Restrained from a wide gate, raced 6Ls back 3 wide behind midfield, had cover throughout, continued to improve on bend, made solid ground late to be beaten for a place in 4 way go.
Began well, showed usual pace to take up running, ran field along at a decent tempo, 1/2L clear on turning, stopped quickly soon after straightening, beaten a long way.
Was crowded at the start and settled close to midfield. Ridden along passing the 400 M, improved position and picked up well running to the wire strongly.
Raced behind the speed, kept on one paced in the run to the line.
Failed to muster speed and travelled near the rear throughout the event. Never likely.
Crowded at the start then settled with the midfield bunch towards the centre of the track. Struggled home.
Steadied on jumping and settled well back in 2nd last position. Failed to find any extra over the final furlong.
Couldn't match the early speed and got well back in the race. Closed off strongly to be nearest on line.
Travelled along the outside rail, ran on well when the event was over.
Stalked the quick tempo but plugged away at the same pace at the finish. (Mildly lame day after.)
Raced well off the outside fence, stalking the early pacesetters. Despite racing greenly and being inclined to shift inwards over the concluding stages, responded well to pressure score nicely.
Went to the front quickly and raced along the outside fence, was then pressured from the about the 800 M onwards. The tank was empty tiring inside the 100 M.
Raced behind midfield, 1 off the outside fence. Ran into traffic problems close to the line while making some late ground despite hanging in.
Raced back in the field along the outside fence. Shifted in searching for a clear passage after the 400 M, but peaked on its run passing the 200 M.
Travelled towards the rear of the field, failed to quicken when asked for an effort after the 200 M.
Worked hard from an inside gate to lead along the grandstand side. Was out of gas in the run to the line.
Did not show early speed and raced 2-wide at midfield. 2 to 3Ls off the pace making the turn. Lacked the needed response and ran on same pace in the straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Missed the jump badly and was detached until the turn. Remained towards the rear on straightening and made up ground in the final stages. Pay to forget.
Behind midfield. 4-wide and 3Ls off the lead turning for home. Ran on strongly in the straight but came up a neck short after duelling with eventual winner over the final stages.
Jumped well from widest draw but lacked early speed. Steadily slipped to a rearward spot. Never travelled trailing field and widest turning for home. Only ran past a beaten runner.
Wide among early leaders. Drifted back and raced 3-wide better than midfield in middle stages. 2Ls off the lead turning in but unable to keep pace final 300 M.
Botched the start and trailed field early. Behind midfield and 5Ls off the lead turning for home. Ran on same pace in the straight.
Ridden along to be among early leaders. Behind the pace in a prominent spot making the turn. Failed to keep pace after straightening and weakened.
Hard ridden to take the lead. Took a length's advantage into the home straight but was headed 200 M out and faded thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Hard ridden to be in a forward spot. 2-wide and just a length off the lead turning for home. Ran down early leader 200 M out and kept on strongly to hold off rival in the final stages.
Raced among frontrunners early stages. Steadied to allow leader cross 800 M out and slipped to midfield. 2-back on the fence turning for home and never quickened in the straight.
Behind leaders early. Squeezed and lost ground 800 M out. 2-wide and 4Ls off the lead turning for home. Rallied in the straight for a distant 3rd.
Lacked early speed and raced in rear section. 3-wide and 5Ls off the lead turning for home. Steadily made up ground in the straight.
Led but couldn't cross to fence early on, less than 1L in front out 2-wide through to home straight, always doing enough for a comfortable win.
Mostly trapped wide without cover, 7Ls down in 9th at halfway, 4-wide and hard ridden turning for home, soon beaten and eased down.
3-wide no cover throughout and keen early, 3Ls back in 4th at the 800 M but dropped through the field from the 600 M and gone by the home turn.
Disputed early pace on fence, about half a length back in 2nd on inside through to home straight, stayed on pretty well but couldn't grab the winner.
5Ls back in 6th out 2-wide at 1000 M, 3-wide and ridden along to draw nearer making last turn, didn't succeed and eased late.
Slowest away, went inside from wide gate, 9Ls back in 12th at 1000 M, still with 6Ls to make up at 200 M, ran on strongly late and just missed a place.
Didn't break well, on fence about 8Ls back in 11th at 1000 M, edged a little closer at top of straight, made some minor late ground.
One from rear about 9Ls behind leaders at 1200 M, niggled along to lie up soon afterwards, improved in the stretch but much too late.
In 3rd throughout, 4Ls back on fence early on and 2Ls down in 3rd off last bend, all out to just about hang on for a place.
Settled 4th or 5th between 3Ls and 4Ls from the speed through to home straight, given every chance to at least place but found zero off the bit.
3-back on fence in midfield about 5Ls from the speed from 1000 M to straightening, kept on only fairly and never really threatened a place.
7Ls back in 10th out 2-wide at 1000 M and similarly placed off last turn, made a decent last dash, never nearer.
Detached through initial stages, 12Ls last at the 1000 M, never really got involved.
6Ls back in 8th at 1000 M, under pressure to lie up at the 600 M and 3-wide and struggling turning in, soon beaten and eased down.
Slowly away, on fence back in 9th at 1000 M, 5Ls back at top of stretch when a little short of room, chased on well, never nearer.
6Ls back on fence in 7th at 1200 M, about 4Ls down in 7th off last bend, ran on well for a place but ran out of ground in trying to figure in the quinella.
3Ls back in 5th on fence at 1200 M, niggled along to maintain this proximity off last turn, faded out gradually.
8Ls behind in 10th out 2-wide at 1000 M, about 5Ls back swinging for home, couldn't draw any closer.
Slowly away, 4Ls back in 6th out 2-wide at 1200 M, closer and challenging in 3rd at top of straight, couldn't get to the winner but did well to hold 2nd.
10Ls last out 2-wide at the 1000 M, checked 600 M out and struggling in rear turning for home, well beaten.
Couldn't lead as usual and instead caught 3-wide no cover about 2Ls back in 3rd through to the 600 M, under pressure turning in and gave ground steadily.
Led out 2-wide before crossing to fence 1300 M out, clear by 1L until the 200 M, found plenty for pressure and always holding a margin.
Mostly 2nd out 2-wide and 1L behind through to home straight, briefly upsides 300 M out but one-paced inside final furlong and missed the money.
Box-seated in 3rd or 4th about 2Ls from the front from 1200 M to entering the straight, had his chance but lacked the acceleration.
10Ls back in 11th on fence at 1000 M, 6Ls down in 10th and hard ridden at top of straight, made no impact and eased down late.
6Ls and 2-wide in 8th at 1100 M, broke down 600 M out and pulled up immediately.
Better than midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the fast pace 2-wide, never travelled like a factor, no dash, run soon ended 250 M. (Rider reported "raced flat".)
Pushed along to join the leading group, trapped 3-wide outside the lead and harmed by the fast pace, ran on well to the line and finished a remarkable 3rd.
Eased at start to get cover at rear, more than 9Ls off the leader 2 to 4-wide, benefited by the fast pace, progressed well 250 M making many lengths to finish 2nd.
Prominent, 2-1/2Ls behind the leaders 3-wide, not suited by the fast pace, out of fuel 200 M.
Hard ridden to go forward and maintained pressure outside the leader, not suited by the fast early sectionals, led 300 M, kicked away 200 M to score well.
Eased back and crossed towards the rail behind midfield, 6-1/2Ls off the leaders, helped by the fast pace, lacked room 400 M, progressed steadily when clear.
Hard ridden to take the rail and led by 1L at fast early sectionals, hung on until 300 M overhauled and weakened.

Raced wide throughout, never better than midfield, tailed out in straight.
Midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the leaders 2-wide, carried back near 800 M, favoured by the fast pace, made ground 300 M without threats to the winner.
Eased to sit behind midfield, 5Ls off the leader 3-3 wide, favoured by the fast pace, just ran on ok in final stages.

Very slow away, hard ridden to obtain a midfield spot along the fence, 4-1/2Ls off the leader, suited by the fast pace however overraced, checked 800 M and again in straight, held up until 250 M, flattened when clear.
Behind the pace group, 2-1/2Ls off the leaders, trapped 4-wide without cover throughout and lost too much ground, harmed by the fast early tempo, done 250 M.
Hard ridden to take the box seat, not suited by the fast pace and raced keenly, dropped off 400 M.
Close up, settling 2-wide in 5th about 2Ls behind pace. In similar position in 4th around home bend and turning in. Quickened up well to hit front 200 M out. Hung on well.
Broke well. Raced 3-wide without cover with leaders. Just 2-wide and half a length behind leader around home bend. Unable to sustain effort inside final 200 M.
Settled wide behind midfield. Ran home solidly down centre of straight.
Broke well. Soon took up running and led to 300 M. Gradually faded.
Waited with. Held up in running after straightening. Obtained a clear passage over 200 M out. Ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Settled in forward of midfield. Within 3Ls of pace on rails turning in. Baulked for a run at 300 M and hampered 200 M out. Finished off race okay.
Raced wide in midfield. Gave ground under pressure from 300 M out.
Well there. Chased along within 2Ls of pace entering straight. Ran home one-paced. (Lame next day.)
Began well settling just worse than midfield. About 3-back in midfield turning in. Fought on dourly to do best work late.
Soon dropped to the tail-end and trailed the field to straight. Fought on under pressure for an encouraging finish.
Out in line, pushed up to hold a spot behind leader, tracked well thereafter, right there turning, eased out at 300 M, accelerated sharply despite big weight and dashed clear for an easy win.
Allowed to drift back from a wideish gate, raced 6Ls away in running line, back with last few on circle, made good progress from tail at 600 M to finish in front of a few.
Away nicely, slotted into 1 out 1 back role, unable to settle on back of speed, still right there 2Ls back on turning, didn't offer much in run home turning in a one paced effort.
Lost considerable ground at start, re-gathered to race 3 to 4Ls back on rails, had a soft run thereafter, followed winner turning in, couldn't find extra gear and just plugged away in straight.
Lacked early speed, allowed to settle back 4Ls of pace, had a reasonable run with pace on, tracked well on bend, into clear at top of straight and kept trying but unable to match.

Began in line, attempted to take closer order, unable to slot in and raced 3 wide without cover 1 to 2Ls back, did share of work throughout, hard ridden approaching 400 M, soon struggling and dropped out.
No speed from barriers as expected, ended up 5 or more Ls back at rear, aided by tempo early, saved ground on rail on bend, well back on turning, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Moderate pace from outset, settled 4Ls back on rails, had a suitable trip with sectionals even, saved ground on bend, switched wider at 400 M, made a strong run to 200 M but just peaked last 100 M.

First to hit ground, took up running easily, set even tempo early before controlling race on bend, 1L clear and kicked nicely on turning, collared at 250 M and fought on well despite being no match for winner late.
Little pace from gates, ended up behind midfield 3 wide 5Ls back, did have cover in mid-section, still back between horses turning in, produced only a one paced effort in straight.
Out in line, pushed on but unable to get close to lead, posted 4 wide without cover throughout, 2Ls down on bend but ridden along, quickly under pressure and folded tamely.

Began with purpose, took a close-up berth outside leader, didn't have an easy time with solid sections, close enough turning but lacked a finish and weakened out last 300 M. (Mucopus and jockey reported didn't fully stride out.)
Began fairly. Raced keenly 2 or 3-wide in midfield far side. Slightly worse turning in and failed to make any impression in straight.
Raced 2-wide in midfield. Ran on steadily in straight but out-sprinted by winner closing stages.
Broke well from wide draw to lead, crossing to rails 1100 M out. Held clear advantage to straight and headed over 200 M out. No extra.
Taken back to rear on rails. Raced in last few to straight. Soon weakened.
In rear to straight. Failed to make any impression in straight. Slightly inconvenienced 200 M out.
Tracked leader. Came to challenge upon straightening hitting front over 200 M out only to be swamped inside final 100 M.
Settled in 2L 3rd to straight. Gradually faded.
Settled at the back. Finished off race strongly from 300 M down centre of track. Did best work late.
Driven to midfield run on rails. Raced just better than midfield in 4th rounding home bend. Ran home one-paced.
Settled in rear of midfield on rails. Did not find much room early in straight. Responded well to assert authority inside 100 M.
Standard jump, ended up in midfield 3 wide 4Ls back early, overraced in mid-section, dropped in 2 wide on bend, made a run on straightening however lacked usual dash and peaked at 200 M.

Fast away, took a close up spot 1 out 1 back 2Ls away, always travelling well in mid-section, made run turning in and let down swiftly, soon had race in keeping and went on to score on effortless victory.
Showed good early pace, unable to get in and posted 3 wide without cover, did plenty of work in mid-section, struggling on turning in, folded tamely in straight.

Standard jump, ended up 5 to 6Ls away in running line, overraced in mid-section, not used in middle stages, improved between horses turning, produced usual solid finish doing best work late to be nearest on line.
Began with purpose, raced outside leader 1L back on solid pace, didn't have an easy time to bend, unable to find extra when they sprinted at 400 M, lost touch last furlong.
Began with them, settled closer than usual 3Ls back on fence, had a soft run thereafter, angled into clear running at 350 M and closed off reasonably without looking a winning hope.
Began well, settled in a prime position on leaders back, enjoyed a reasonable run with even speed, run emerged on turning, kept to task well holding ground for a solid placing.
Moderate getaway, raced behind midfield 5 to 6Ls away in 3 wide line, still well back leaving bend, didn't produce usual close and failed to make any real impression.
Bounced out well, took up running, kept sections even 1L clear throughout, kicked 2Ls clear on turning, tried hard when challenged at 200 M but couldn't go up extra notch last bit.
Away in line, went forward however posted 3 wide without cover 3 to 4Ls back, did it tough with even pace on, ridden along on turning, hard run took toll last 300 M and dropped out late.

Moderate jump, didn't have early pace and ended up 4Ls back on rails, not used in middle stages, took inside runs on turning, steadied at 200 M and again at 100 M, kept closing late for an unlucky 4th.

Restrained from a wide gate, raced 6 to 7Ls away at rear racing 2 wide, proved difficult to settle in middle stages, still well back to bend, didn't run on with usual purpose and only beat tiring runners.

Restrained from a wide gate, settled 6 to 7Ls away at rear, travelled well however had a big job to do even by midpoint, saved ground turning, made plenty of ground between horses in straight finishing fastest for a remarkable 2nd.
Began in line, slotted in behind midfield 4 to 5Ls back overraced in mid-section, well back and switched widest on turning in, made even headway in straight without ever looking in contention.
Broke well from middle draw, settling 3-wide just worse than midfield. Dropped out into straight. (Lost plate.)
Always struggled in last few.
Broke well. Settled one-out-one-back in 3rd. Commenced move turning for home hitting front briefly before overhauled inside final 200 M.
Broke well. Settled for 4th on rails 2 off the leader after driven along. Came to challenge upon straightening but failed to draw level throughout closing stages.
Soon in rear. Took closer order rounding home bend. Made modest headway inside final 200 M without threatening.
Soon in rear. Saved ground on rails turning in. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Raced wide in rear. Always struggling.
In similar position in midfield to straight. One-paced under pressure.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.

Ridden for pace early, racing 3-wide with leaders before losing position around 1000 M bend. In 3L 5th just better than midfield going up Rock. Improving but not much better turning in. Fought on to gain narrow advantage 150 M out.
Moderate jump. Midfield early before improving wide down far side to lead over 800 M out. Led the field to 300 M and dropped out tamely under pressure.
Soon took up running and led to 800 M. Settled one back on rails to straight. Forced to switch out for a run 250 M out. Failed to quicken to threaten closing stages.
Slow into stride and settled in last position. Came wide on straightening and made some late ground without threatening.
Raced 3 back along the fence. Was briefly held up approaching the home turn but after obtaining clear running soon after went to the post one paced.
Raced in second last position on the rails. Failed to quicken in the run home.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Settled back in the field, 2-wide with cover. Was pressured to stay in touch with the field a long way from home and never looked likely.
Travelled 2 deep in a midfield position. Made a sweeping run around the field after the 600 M, but was unable to sustain the momentum in the straight.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Camped midfield the fence. Commenced to peel out and improve after the 500 M and in the straight responded well to win by a solid margin.
Ridden along in the early stages and found the lead into the straight on the first lap. Quickened tempo prior to the home turn and stayed on dourly in the run to the line.
Led soon after the start then handed up early to park off the speed. Weakened inside the furlong.
Jumped best from widest draw and raced 3-wide no cover in a forward spot. A length off the lead on straightening but weakened thereafter when hard run took toll.
Raced 2-wide at midfield. Hampered at 600 M and lost some ground. Near last on straightening and only ran past a beaten runner.

Jumped well and settled 2-wide behind the pace. Behind the leader in a prominent spot turning for home. Kept on well and ran down early leader 150 M out and was not threatened thereafter coming easily.

Went back, disputing the rear about 7Ls off the speed at the 600 M, made some moderate late ground, never nearer.
3-back on fence about 4Ls back in 4th at 1200 M, 3Ls down into home straight, couldn't find an extra gear.
Box-seated in 4th on fence about 2Ls off pace until home turn when going well, all out to bob his head in front on the line.
3-wide no cover throughout, within 1L of the speed in 3rd out deep before leading at top of home straight, faded out almost as quickly.
Settled 4Ls back in midfield out 2-wide, 3-wide turning for home, stayed on well in the straight and only just came up short.
In 2nd flanking the pacesetter within 1L of the speed until the 600 M, began to fade before the final bend, dropped out.
Worse than midfield about 5Ls back out 2-wide at 1200 M, never looked like improving into the front half of the field.
Always ridden along towards the rear, 7Ls back at halfway, never in the hunt.
Slowest away, 4-back on fence about 6Ls from early speed, a little closer turning for home, stayed on fairly down the centre and nearest at finish.
Soon 8Ls last, about 7Ls back at 600 M, always chasing the majority of the pack.
Caught 3-wide no cover throughout for the second successive time, within 2Ls of the speed until the final 500 M, very weak final 200 M.
2-wide and 2Ls back in 3rd at the 1200 M, just over 1L back from 800 M to home turn, given every possible hope but too weak in the finish.
Slow to muster pace, 6Ls back in 9th on fence at 1000 M and marginally closer turning in, always comfortably held.
Crossed to lead on fence from wide gate at 1300 M, over 1L clear until the 200 M, no response when headed by the winner 50 M out.
6Ls off pace out 2-wide in 8th at 1200 M, improving but out 4-wide turning for home, did enough to creep into a place late on.
Did well to get into the box-seat from middle gate, enjoyed a cushy trail until the home straight, led 50 M out and did enough to score.
Slowest away, 7Ls down in 10th out 2-wide at 1000 M, 6Ls back into home straight, posed little danger.
Knuckled at the start, 2-wide and 4Ls back in 5th at 1000 M, closer and well within striking range turning for home, plodded home very one-paced.
Slowly away, 8Ls last out 2-wide at 1000 M, 5-wide (widest of all) and still last off last turn, tepid finish.
3-back on fence early on, hard ridden to lie up 600 M out and looked very vulnerable, but kept on dourly to sneak into 4th, improved run.
Poor effort, 3-wide with cover about 5Ls back in 7th at 1000 M, struggling on the final turn, dropped out rapidly.
Eased at start to cross the rails at rear, 7-1/2Ls off the leader, not suited by the slow pace, demonstrated strongly finishing efforts in straight, particularly in last 200 M.

Hard ridden early, only managed to keep up a spot behind midfield, 4Ls off the leader, trapped 4-wide throughout and lost too much ground, harmed by the slow pace, dashed strongly 200 M despite all negative racing situations.
Hard ridden to secure the box seat, travelled nicely throughout, benefited by all the positive racing situations, ran home strongly, led 150 M, however just missed win in last few strides.

Hard ridden to occupy a prominent position, 1-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, helped by the slow early tempo, just held ground in straight and hung on for a minor 3rd.
Hard ridden to press forward and sit outside the lead, favoured by the slow early sectionals, ran on until 100 M flattened.
Pushed early but failed to cross in front, then eased to sit in midfield, 3Ls off the leader, trapped 3-wide, not suited by the slow pace, weakened 200 M.

Hard ridden early but failed to muster speed, only managed to take a midfield spot 2-wide, 3-1/2Ls off the leader, harmed by the slow pace, blocked most straight, dashed well to the line under limited clear running.
Hard ridden to obtain the rail and led by 1/2L at slow early sectionals, hung on until 200 M, out of fuel thereafter.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Eased to rear and got the fence, 6Ls off the leader, helped by the rail-run but not suited by the slow pace, little dash in straight.
Eased back, 6Ls behind the leader 2-wide, blocked 4-2, dashed strongly when clear despite harmed by the slow early tempo.
Broke with the field and driven to contest early lead. Raced outside leader down far side. Began to tire turning in and soon yielded ground.
Settled towards rear on rails. Saved ground on rails rounding home bend. Ran on well under pressure to do best work late despite tight between runners.
Made all. Held narrow advantage far side breaking 2Ls away passing 200 M. Just held on to the line.
Chased leaders on rails in 2L 3rd. Fought on steadily to hold quinella chance but pipped for 2nd at post.
Settled in 4th 2-3Ls back. Ran on dourly under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Began fairly, then squeezed and lost position shortly after straight dropping well back. In last few into straight. Fought on nicely past well-beaten horses.
Broke well with line. Settled wide in prominent position before shuffled back to worse than midfield passing Rock. Made no impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never better than midfield. Rider did not do much in straight, reporting saddle shifted shortly after start.
Raced very wide without cover down far side. Similar around home bend and into straight. Kept on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Broke well. Contested early leader but soon shifted backward to rear of field. No further impression.
Showed moderate pace under urge from widest draw. Gradually dropped back to last approaching home bend. No further impression.
Very slow out losing many lengths. Taking his time to recover and joined backmarkers 400 M out. Continued to make steady headway in straight for a creditable effort considering the bad start.

Showed speed from outset, held a prominent role behind the leader, had a reasonable run despite even sections, eased out and briefly took over on turning, unable to sustain effort last 200 M just holding ground in run to line.
Out in line, lacked early pace and drifted back to be with last few 6 or so lengths back, raced 3-wide with cover, still well back to bend, lacked a finish and struggled in run to line.
No early pace, unable to slot in and posted 3-wide without cover, crept closer to race 3Ls back, always working throughout, began to give ground on and dropped out easily in straight.

Bumped at jump, taken in behind and ended up sharing rear 5-6Ls back racing 2-wide, had a fair run throughout, well back with field to beat on turning, shifted out and charged last 200 M to narrowly miss.
First to hit ground, pushed on working hard to take up running, set a reasonable speed in front, held a narrow advantage on turning, quickly overhauled and dropped out easily thereafter.

Began with first few, pushed on to take prominent role 2Ls back in 2-wide line, travelled well throughout, closer enough on turning in, threatened at 150 M but unable continue run and just plugged last bit.
Standard getaway, settled in a midfield spot on rails 3Ls back, had an ideal run throughout, saved ground on bend, held up to 200 M, made even progress once clear.

Fair to jump, settled 6Ls back in running line, sectionals standard but had reasonable run, took off 3-wide passing Rock, loomed 4-wide turning and came with a strong run down middle to take lead and hold off late challenger.

Out well, pushed on in search of prominent spot, 5-wide early before using reserves to race outside leader, had a fair run thereafter, struggling on bend, weakened easily in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)

Began well, prominent early racing 4-wide leaving straight, raced 3-wide with cover 5Ls back thereafter, shuffled back approaching bend, made some headway down middle before run ended at 100 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Only fairly away, angled into a midfield spot 4Ls away in running line, had an easy run thereafter, in between horses turning, lost run at 200 M, recovered well to close off evenly to match frame.
No pace early and allowed to drop in at rear, raced on rails 5Ls back behind midfield, not asked in mid-section, saved ground on bend, held up to 200 M but closed nicely when clear to secure a place.
Broke nicely, slotted into coveted 1 out 1 back slot 2Ls away, had a fair run behind speed on bend, took run between horses at 300 M and closed off nicely for a narrow 2nd.
Out in line, settled 3Ls away on rails, not used in middle stages, continued to save ground turnig in, took inside runs and did best work late for 3rd.
Restrained from a wide gate, ended up 6Ls back racing 3 wide, had a reasonable run to bend, still back between horses on bend, made good ground in straight but gave too much start to threaten.
Out with rest, trapped 3 and 4 wide in midfield, pressed on to be outside leaders always working without cover, right there on turning but soon under pressure and weakened quickly from 300 M.
Away in line, obtained a forward spot 3 wide close to lead, did work without cover in mid-section, still there on turning, couldn't turn up a notch and weakened out in straight.
Fair beginning, raced 3 wide amongst horses, 4Ls back in midfield, had cover throughout, didn't settle and struggling on bend, found little in straight.
Away well enough, took up spot 3Ls back in 2 wide line, travelled strongly on bend, into clear at 400 M, came with a strong run down middle to hit lead at 100 M and hold margin to line.
Jumped with them, took a midfield spot 4Ls back in running line, shifted back in mid-section, 6Ls down on turning, unable to make much progress in straight but did pass a few late.
Began in line, raced 4 wide early and pushed 5 wide on bend, always working 3 to 4Ls back without cover, offered little in straight when hard run took toll.
Away in line, pressed on to cross outisde leader, applied pressure throughout, continued to share lead on turning, couldn't find extra gear on turning and just kept on at same pace.
Easily fastest out, led with ease, pressured throughout and kept pace honest, still in contest for lead on circle, kicked to 250 M but ran out of petrol and dropped off last furlong.
Standard getaway raced 4 to 5Ls back on rails, raced greenly throughout and was difficult to settle, still back behind midfield turning, made limited progress in straight.
Tardy to begin, raced 7Ls back 2 wide, very green in middle stages, made a 3 wide run from 600 M, carried 6 wide turning, made plenty of ground down outside in straight to make frame. Solid debut.
Slow into stride, settled towards rear on rails racing 8Ls back in last spot, still well back on bend but saved ground on inside, made many lengths along rails to be closest on line.
Raced midfield on the fence. Never likely.
Took up front running duties and led at an even clip. Soon faded inside the 150 M.
From a wide barrier was taken back to a position with cover, 3 deep behind midfield. Came 4-wide no cover after the 600 M, failed to run on.
Travelled in last position. Made some late ground after working away from the rail but never threatened.
Began awkwardly and lost ground settling on the fence near the rear of the field. Kept to the inside in the straight and made good ground before ending its run short of the line.
Raced 3 back on the fence. Kept on one-paced in the final stages.
Raced 2 deep with cover, midfield. Improved into a 3-wide trailing position after the 600 M. Hit the front near the 200 M and was never headed.
Raced near the tail of field 3-wide with cover. Came wide turning for home but failed to show any dash. (See Racing Incidents.)
Parked behind the leader along the rails. Gave in quickly after the 200 M.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Raced 1 out 1 back, had every chance.
Settled back in the field, 1 off with cover. Shifted out to improve and raced 3-wide with cover after the 600 M. Closed off well.
From the outside barrier was taken back to settle in 2nd last position. Ran on well making up solid ground.
Camped outside the leader, however was overhauled near the furlong. Stuck to task gamely in the run to the wire.
Behind the pace early stages. 4Ls off the lead in 3rd place turning for home. Quickened on straightening and ran down early leader 200 M out. Had no answer when challenged by top pair final stages.
Pushed to the lead. Set a fast speed throughout, ahead by 2Ls turning in but was headed 250 M out. Weakened thereafter.
Midfield or better. 4 to 5Ls off the lead in 4th place turning for home. Continued well in the home straight but unable to keep strides with winner final stages.
Raced along the rails at midfield. Unable to quicken when asked on straightening and stayed on same pace. Faded final stages.
Raced 2 to 3Ls behind the leader in 2nd place overraced on a solid tempo, Closed-in on leader after straightening and assumed the lead briefly 250 M out. Faded final stages.
Off slowly and raced in rear section. Near last turning for home and found nothing after that.
Slow into stride and raced in rear section. Ran on without threatening in the straight.
No worse than midfield. 6Ls off the lead at home turn and responded well when asked on straightening. Kept on strongly and took control final 100 M for a convincing victory.
On the fence and better than midfield. Ran on only fairly in the straight.
Taken back from wide draw and trailed field early. Remained towards the rear turning in. Made up ground over beaten runners in the straight.
Jumped well but was taken back to behind midfield suited by solid pace, rallied on straightening for a distant 4th.
Allowed to drop back to the rear. Trailed field turning for home and only ran past a beaten runner.
Behind midfield. 3-wide making home turn and never quickened in the straight.
2-wide at midfield. Ran on fairly in the straight.
Trapped 4-wide no cover throughout, 5Ls back in 9th in middle stages, closer but 6-wide (widest of all) off last bend, faded final 300 M.
Restrained to rear from a wide gate, 7Ls last entering straight, didn't have the clearest passage down the centre of the track, nearest at finish.
Went back from a wide gate, 8Ls last at halfway, crept a little closer turning in, burst through a gap 200 M out, finished very strongly, only just failed.
Didn't break well and checked early on, 5Ls down in rear at top of stretch, ran on well down centre of the track to nick a place late.
Slowest away, worse than midfield about 6Ls off pace at 1000 M, ran on well in the straight and only just missed the money, never nearer.
Away well, 2-wide and 2Ls back in 3rd at 1000 M, 1L down and asked to quicken turning for home, one-paced in response.
Midfield with cover about 5Ls behind early pace, over-raced at halfway, never likely to threaten the principals.
Around midfield but far too keen and unruly until the 600 M, about 4Ls back turning for home, one-paced in the finish.
3-wide without cover all the way, about 3Ls back in 6th in middle stages to home turn, fizzled out final furlong.
Led by 1L early on, held a similar break setting a steady pace until the 200 M, all out to barely cling on for the win.
Nice position on rails about 2Ls or 3Ls better than midfield until home straight, given every opportunity to at least place but lacked the kick.
Box-seated on fence between 1L and 2Ls off speed until the straight, still on the premises 300 M out but weakened final 200 M.
Wide early but gained cover 3Ls back in 5th at the 800 M, going well turning for home, every chance to place, carried head a little awkwardly.
3-back on fence in 10th or so about 5Ls from the speed early on, similarly placed turning for home, surrendered tamely.
Disputed early pace out 2-wide, led by half a length middle stages, headed by the winner 350 M out, couldn't find any extra.
Had the run of the race in 4th or so on the fence within 2Ls of the speed until home turn, lacked any acceleration in the straight.
4Ls or 5Ls back around midfield with cover until home straight, ran on pretty well without really troubling the leaders.
Set early tempo on the fence, headed at halfway but still within a neck of the lead off last bend, petered out steadily.
6Ls back in 11th early on, 3Ls back in 9th or so making last turn, always chasing the majority of the field.
Switched inside from wide gate, 7Ls back in 12th at the 1200 M, closer but still rearward turning for home, failed to make an impact.
Trapped 4-wide no cover throughout, 3Ls back in mid-division at halfway, pressed forward on circle, just held by principals, commendable run nonetheless.
Worse than midfield about 5Ls back early on, 2Ls behind on straightening, ran on well final 200 M but couldn't reach the winner.
Over-raced when 2Ls back in 4th at 1000 M, thereabouts turning in, found nothing off the bit and eased when beaten final 100 M.
Close-up but 3-wide no cover throughout, led about 350 M out, entitled to fade after the tough trip but battled on gamely for a highly creditable win.
Restrained to race 7Ls off pace in rear at the 1000 M, edged closer but 6-wide (widest) off last turn, made some fair late ground.
Midfield but sometimes without cover in 3-wide position, challenging when 1L down off last bend, stayed on well for a place.
3-back on the fence about 4Ls from the speed from halfway to home turn, no impression.
9Ls last at the 1000 M, 5Ls last turning for home, made up eye-catching late ground, nearest at the finish.
Settled 2-1/2Ls off the leaders 2-wide, not suited by the fast early sectionals, ran on until 100 M flattened.
Slowly away, eased to sit about midfield along the fence, 6Ls behind the leaders, helped by the fast tempo, blocked 400 M to 200 M, just held ground when clear.
Pushed early but not quick enough to take a forward spot, 6Ls off the leaders 3-wide, benefited by the fast pace, made ground 400 M without threats, run ended 100 M.
Pushed to share the lead, used up lots of fuel in the fast early sectionals, kicked away 400 M and won impressively despite the negative racing situations.
Slow away, eased to sit at rear, more than 11Ls off the leaders 2 to 4-wide, benefited by the fast early tempo, made some ground last 300 M.
Eased back, 10Ls off the leaders 2-wide, helped by the fast pace, swept 5-wide on straightening to make run, progressed steadily 300 M.
Slowly away, pushed to take a 2-wide position in front of midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the fast pace, no dash in straight, weakened 250 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Pushed early to obtain a midfield spot, checked 900 M, 6Ls off the leaders 2-wide, helped by the fast pace, momentarily held up 400 M, no progress when clear.
Eased at start to cross the rails at rear, more than 11Ls off the leaders, favoured by the fast pace but blocked most straight, ran on only fairly when clear.
Worse than midfield, 8-1/2Ls off the leaders along the fence, favoured by the fast pace, lacked room 400 M, progressed steadily when clear.
Pushed to occupy the box seat, not suited by the fast early tempo, dropped off 300 M.
Hard ridden to hold the rail and shared the lead, harmed by the fast pace, ran on strongly to the line to secure 2nd.
Better than midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the fast pace 3-wide, soon weakened in straight.
Hard ridden early but failed to muster speed, behind midfield, 8Ls off the leaders 2 to 4-wide, benefited by the fast tempo, made ground steadily 400 M to grab 3rd.

Broke well, settling 3-wide in midfeild of the small 10-runner field. Quickened to challenge upon straightening to hit front briefly over 200 M out before easily grabbed by GOOD BA BA. Hung on well for 2nd.
Began only fairly but soon recovered to a prominent spot, racing keenly 2-wide within 2Ls of pace most of way to straight. Baulked early in straight. Found nothing inside final 200 M.
Held up in rear racing mostly 2 off the rails far side and around home bend. Gradually shifted out for a run while straightening. Cruised to lead 200 M out. Comfortably.
Settled just worse than midfield. Fought on dourly under pressure to reach 3rd inside final 200 M.
Jumped best from widest draw to lead crossing to rails approaching 1200 M. Held half a length's advantage rounding home bend and into straight. Soon dropped out tamely.
Broke well, settling at the back. Trailed the field to 300 M. Made good progress near centre of track without threatening.
Began fairly. Soon picked up to prominent one-back position but 3-wide. Moved closer around home bend and still there early in straight. Faded under pressure passing 250 M.
Tracked leader on rails. Did not find much room in box-seat early in straight. Run came late passing 200 M and could only keep on same pace to the line.
Clipped heels early. Travelled on rails in rear of midfield of small 10-runner field. Found no room early in straight and could only make impression late.
Slightly sluggish at start. Raced wide in midfield far side before taking closing order approaching home bend. One-back 3-wide around home bend. Dropped out under pressure passing 300 M.
Standard jump, angled in from a wide gate to race 8Ls back in racing line, suited with strong pace on, made a run from 500 M, closed well to 200 M but peaked on run and lost 2nd late.
No early gate speed, ended up 8Ls back sharing rear, helped by solid pace in mid-section, still well back on bend, only managed to pass tired runners late.
Began smartly, took a spot behind leader, always chasing a strong gallop, improved to leaders girth from 700 M, struggling on turning and soon gave in dropping out in run to line.
No early pace, settled 7Ls back on rails, aided by solid tempo, not used on bend, back in traffic turning. Held up for a cleare run to 200 M, made nice ground when clear last furlong.

Fair to begin, pressed forward to race first without cover 2 to 3Ls back, did share of work on pair wide from 600 M, gradually improving quickly took lead at 100 M, unable to find extra gear at 200 M, flattened late.

Began in line, trapped a little wide early but slotted in nicely 1 out 1 back 3 to 4Ls back, appreciated the genuine speed, pushed along on bend, picked up nicely under riding at 300 M to draw away from rival's last furlong.
Standard jump, ended up in a midfield role 4 to 5Ls back on rails, not asked in middle stages, eased wide to make run at 500 M, didn't have turn of foot and simply held ground in run to line.
Bounced out, took a spot 3Ls back on fence behind pace pair, had a good trail in middle stages, saved ground on bend, kept on steadily along inside in straight to make frame.

Out on terms, assumed a midfield spot 5Ls back in running line, had an ideal run with speed on, struggling when asked to make run from 500 M, lacked usual dash and just battled in straight. (Abnormal breathing.)
Out OK and soon ridden along to take up running, ran field along 2Ls clear at a solid tempo, joined from 700 M, held a narrow lead on turning, soon passed and dropped out thereafter.
No early pace, hampered early when jostling for spot raced 7 to 8Ls back, aided by solid tempo, still well back on bend, in traffic to 200 M, charged late when clear to produce a fast closing 2nd.
Began fairly from poor draw but caught racing very wide in midfield throughout. Ran home one-paced.
Jumped in air at start missing a couple lengths. Remained in rear to straight. Made no impression in the run home.

Sluggish start when a bit tight early. Quickly picked up 4-wide to be prominent coming out of back straight. One-back 3-wide rounding home bend. Gradually dropped out of contention after straightening.
Not far off on rails early. Shifted back to rear of midfield before making home bend. One-paced in the run home.
Settled one-out-one-back in 4th. In similar position but 3rd turning in. Fought on well and quickened alongside winner only to lose out in the bobbing of heads.
Began from poor draw. Travelled wide well back in field and awkwardly at times far side. Similar position turning in. One-paced in straight.
In rear of midfield most of way to straight. Baulked for a run early on before running on steadily under pressure without threatening inside final 250 M.

Led by half a length outside the second early. Gave up lead but gained rails run approaching home bend. Renewed effort straightening and hit front over 250 M out. Died on his run and swamped passing 150 M.
3-wide in midfield far side. Took closer order to be 4th around home bend. Lost a bit of position home turn. Ran on steadily from 3Ls down to only lose 3rd late.
Raced well in last few. Dropped out after straightening.
Settled towards rear. Shifted out for a run turning for home. Ran on well down centre of straight to snatch 3rd late.
Prominent early from poor draw. Worked his way to the front 900 M out and led narrowly around home bend. Headed under pressure about 250 M out and weakened.
Slightly slow out but quickly picked up to forward of midfield far side. Minor interference on home bend and in midfield turning in. Kept on steadily in straight without quickening.

Close up early. Taken back to about 2Ls off the speed coming out of back straight. In box-seat early in straight before pushed his way out for a run over 250 M out. Ran on well alongside runner-up to just prevail narrowly.
Standard jump, assumed a midfield role 4Ls away on rails, not used in mid-section, still in traffic on turning, lacked room for most of straight and wasn't fully ridden out.
Out with rest, posted 3 wide in midfield, raced 5Ls back but did not have cover, kept working on bend, kept giving to 200 M but wide run took toll and weakened late.
Out in line, posted wide and used up to work across to race outside leader, continued to apply pressure, still there at 300 M but run ended soon after and dropped out.
No pace from outset, raced 8 to 9Ls back in running line, helped by tempo however urged along on circle, still last on turning, lacked usual finish and only passed tired runners late.
Lacked early speed, ended up 8Ls back on fence, helped by fast pace in mid-section, still well back on turning, made limited progress in straight.
First to hit ground, ended up in 1 out 1 back spot, did share of work on back of a solid speed, into clear on turning, flattened at 250 M, no extra late.
Fast out, won speed battle to take lead, pressured throughout and set solid sections, still disputing lead on bend, defied rivals to 200 M but unable to lift last furlong and tired last bit.
Out with speedy beginners, took a position behind leader, followed a strong pace throughout, eased out at 350 M, looked a threat to 200 M but unable to lift and tired late.

Out with rest, ended up 3 wide with cover in midfield 5Ls back, gradually improved on bend, produced a strong finishing effect to hit lead at 150 M held margin in run to line to score a shade comfortably.
Slowly away, positioned in rearward division as usual, ended up 6Ls back on rails, assisted by solid speed, again gave a big start on turning, closed off hard between horses to be nearest at finish.
Standard jump, settled 6Ls back in running line travelled well and suited by solid tempo, back with last few on turning in, made good ground between horses in straight to be nearest on line.
Lacked early pace, settled 4 to 5Ls back midfield in 2 wide line, travelled well in mid-section, tracked 3 wide turning, produced usual honest close to be not far away in finish.
Out in line, took a spot in front of midfield after unable to get close early, travelled well 2 to 3Ls back, eased out on turning, made good ground down middle but just peaked on run at 100 M.
Well enough to begin, up in pace battle early before settling behind speed 3Ls back on rails, took inside runs in straight and made good progress late to finish a solid 2nd.
Equal fastest out, ended up with 1 out 1 back trail, had ideal run to bend, 1L down turning, struggled to pick up and just kept on at same pace late.
Began well enough, gradually drifted back to trail pace in midfield, had a fair run 3Ls back despite difficult to settle, hampered at 400 M, struggled over concluding stages.
Tardy to begin, failed to muster and raced 4Ls back in running line, not helped by tempo, unbalanced on bend, lacked usual finish and just struggled in straight.
Modest jump, ridden along to take a midfield spot 3Ls back, used little in run, bumped into clear at 400 M, still green however stuck to task well closing nicely last furlong.
Fair to begin, lacked early pace and settled towards rear 4Ls back, raced greenly throughout, made even progress behind them to 200 M but didn't find extra thereafter. (Steadied 100 M.)
Bounced out, took a sit on leaders back, no excuse in run, still right there turning, kept with them to 200 M but just lacked a turn of foot to be a factor late.
Standard jump, mustered to go forward and race outside leader, sat level throughout although pace only steady, still sharing lead turning, didn't have a sprint and just battled last 200 M.
Little pace from outset, raced 5Ls back at tail, pace against in mid-section, made a run from 400 M, closed best down outside in straight to just miss.
Began with them, led them with ease, set terms to suit with a steady tempo, shared front on turning, kicked too strongly at 350 M and did well to hold off a late challenger to score narrowly.
Travelled with cover early in a midfield position, 3 deep. Kept on well in the straight despite racing wide and without cover after the 800 M.
Camped midfield, 1 off with cover, was checked near the 800 M and lost its position. Commenced to give ground after the 200 M.
Settled in 4th position, 1 off with cover. Lifted well in the final stages to finish over the top of its rivals.
Travelled near the rear of the field. Never likely.
Raced 3-wide early and was pressed to go forward to the lead. Quickly surrendered near the 400 M and finished well back.
Raced in midfield the fence. Ranged up to challenge early in the straight but failed to sustain effort late.
Raced in last position, shifted out wide in the straight but made no impression.
Raced behind midfield, 2-wide with cover. Peeled out turning for home and ran on smartly over the latter stages.
Travelled in 2nd last position some distance off the leaders made fair ground out wide in the straight before peaking on its run short of the line.
From an outside gate was taken back to settle near the tail of the field. Closed off fairly.
Parked outside the leader, was a beaten horse turning inside the furlong.
From a wide barrier took up a midfield position on the fence. Ran on well and looked the likely winner only to be collared close to the line.
Couldn't match the early speed and settled behind midfield on the rails. Struck traffic problems in the straight and was obliged to alter course on a couple of occasions, went to the wire strongly.
Stalked the leader along the fence. Hit the lead early in the straight and had every chance tiring on its run short of the post.
Dropped to the rear and trailed field turning in. Steadily made up ground in the straight and was closest at finish.
Raced alongside the leader. Travelled nicely in a disputed lead on straightening. Showed good response when asked near 200 M and took control thereafter holding rivals late.
Lacked speed to keep strides with leaders. Settled 2-wide at midfield. Made a dash on straightening but unable to sustain rally in the final stages.
3-wide among leaders 800 M out. Disputed lead turning in but unable to find extra to keep up with eventual winner over final 200 M.
Botched the start and failed to muster speed. Raced behind midfield and was pressured at home turn. Rallied in the straight for a minor placing.
Dropped to rear section from a wide draw. Near the back on straightening but closed the race off with a strong rally.
Better than midfield. 3 to 4Ls off the pace turning for home. Stayed on one-paced in the straight.
Settled in a prominent spot behind the pace. 2Ls off the lead turning for home and only kept on same pace thereafter.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Settled towards the rear. Only ran past beaten runners in the straight.
Raced along the fence and never better than midfield. Lacked the needed response in the straight and remained on same pace to the line.
Raced wide and without cover in a forward spot. 2Ls behind the leaders but raced in wide on home turn. Ran on only fairly thereafter.
Raced 2Ls behind SILENT DRAGON on stands' rail around midfield until the 200 M, dropped by the winner final 200 M but did just enough for 2nd.
Prominent but furthest across the track early on, still in the front rank 400 M out but dropped out very quickly in final stages.
Bounded at the start losing 3Ls immediately, 7Ls last 700 M out, never on terms despite running past a few stragglers late. (See Racing Incidents.)
On the stands' rail about 4Ls from the front until halfway, surrendered tamely once off the bridle.
Worse than midfield about 5Ls of pace through initial stages, under pressure at halfway, failed to make an impact.
Among the principals early on but under pressure to keep up at halfway, steadily slipped out of contention.
Among leading players on far side until halfway when 1L behind, soon under pressure and retreated rapidly final 300 M.
Disputed early pace down centre of track and still bang there 400 M out, couldn't keep up with the winner and narrowly missed the money.
Checked after an awkward break losing 3Ls immediately, never closer than 5Ls to the pace after the 800 M.
Disputing 3rd early a neck behind the speed, vying for the lead 400 M out, kept on at same pace late and only just tipped out of quinella.
Led by half a length early on, always travelling very well on stands' rail, pulled clear under gentle riding, easily.
3Ls behind leaders in midfield until the 400 M, soon under pressure and soon yielded ground.
Always outpaced, never better than 4Ls from the front, dropped out final 300 M.
Checked at the start, always well back at least 5Ls from the speed until halfway, eased down final furlong.
Awkward break, flanked leader 2Ls back in 2nd at 1100 M, hung out turning for home when 1L down, tired late but just about hung on for 3rd.

6Ls back in 12th at the 1000 M, 3-wide with cover 600 M out, 6Ls back turning for home, one-paced thereafter.

Nicely placed 4Ls back in 4th with cover at 1000 M, struggling to lie up turning for home, plodding finish.
3-wide with cover 900 M out when 3Ls back in midfield, shuffled back and tapped for toe off last bend, disappointing finish.
3-wide with cover in 9th at halfway about 4Ls off pace, 4-wide (widest of all) turning for home when 5Ls down, one-paced in the finish.
Midfield with cover 900 M out, about 5Ls down and starting to toil off last bend, found zero under pressure.
Crossed from wide gate to lead on fence by 2Ls at the 1100 M, over-raced early in places, headed by winner 250 M out, all out to hang on for 2nd.
