Lost 3Ls at the start with a very messy break, 4-back on fence when 5Ls off pace at halfway, struggling turning in, dropped right out. (Lame next day.)
Box-seated in 3rd or 4th on fence through to home straight when going well, peeled out to lead 250 M out, went clear, comfortably.
No early pace, about 5Ls back in 10th at the 1000 M and slightly further back on straightening, did little to reduce the leeway.
Eased to rear, 10Ls off the leader, trapped 4-wide throughout and lost ground, harmed by the slow pace, dashed well 200 M.

Took up a spot in front of midfield without using much, 4Ls off the leader on the rails, favoured by the slow early tempo, however lacked turn of foot, flattened 250 M.
Slow away, pushed to hold a rail spot behind midfield, 7-1/2Ls off the leader, not suited by the slow pace, no turn of foot in final stages.
Pushed to obtain the box seat, helped by the slow tempo, however just held ground in straight.
Eased at start, 10Ls off the leader at rear 3 to 4-wide, harmed by the slow pace, no dash in straight.
Pushed early but failed to muster speed, then eased to sit behind midfield, 7Ls off the leader 2-wide, harmed by the slow pace, demonstrated strong finishing efforts 200 M.

Slow away and bumped, immediately hard ridden to take a more prominent spot, 5Ls off the leader 3-wide, not suited by the slow pace, bumped 400 M, dashed strongly 250 M to finish a remarkable 2nd despite all negative racing situations.

Pushed forward to cross in front of the field, then settled nicely 3-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, benefited by the slow early tempo, closed the race off strongly 250 M, dominated last 100 M to score comfortably.
Eased to sit behind midfield, 7-1/2Ls off the leader 3 to 4-wide, dashed well 400 M despite not suited by the slow early sectionals.
Bumped start, pushed to occupy a midfield position, 5Ls off the leader 2-wide, not suited by the slow pace, shifted ground when being hard ridden and bumped another runner in straight, ran on ok.
Lacked early speed, at rear, not suited by the slow pace, never competitive.
Eased back for cover, 8-1/2Ls off the leader 3-wide, checked and lost ground 800 M, harmed by the slow pace, ran on only fairly in final section.
Eased to sit about midfield along the fence, 6Ls off the leader, harmed by the slow tempo, never progressed.
In last few. Saved ground on rails turning in. Kept on steadily in the run home.
Prominent, settling one-out-one-back. Soon came to challenge upon straightening and hit front passing 200 M, only to be run down by fast-finishing winner close to home.
Broke well. Settled 3-wide in midfield. Quickened well inside final 250 M to snatch victory close to home.
Began smoothly, settling 2-back on rails disputing 5th. Similar turning in and not much room early in straight. Ran home one-paced inside final 200 M.
Broke well. Amongst leaders, gradually crossing to rails. Held up for box-seat run on rails 1200 M out. Dropped out tamely upon straightening. (Abnormal breathing noise.)
Raced wide in prominent position. Moved up to dispute lead 1000 M out. Gave ground from 200 M.
Prominent early. Soon dropped to midfield. Hampered and lost position approaching 1000 M. Weakened from towards rear into straight.
Raced behind midfield on rails. Switched out for a run upon straightening but could only run home one-paced under pressure.
Raced wide in front rank after beginning from wide draw. Crossed to lead passing 1200 M holding narrow advantage. Fought on dourly but unable to sustain effort inside final 200 M.
Soon in rear. Trailed the field most of way.
Slightly slow out. Raced wide behind midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Settled on rails in midfield. Ran home nicely inside final 300 M without threatening.
Began well, settling one-out-two-back in 5th. Soon came under pressure after straightening but could only produce one-paced effort.
Raced wide in last few. Made significant progress inside final 300 M down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.

Out with them, slotted in to race 3Ls back on rails, had a soft run in mid-section, angled 2-wide on bend, shifted out on turning and quickly descended to have them covered at 200 M and draw away to win in style.

Fair to jump, angled into 1 out 1 back spot 2-3Ls away, no excuse in run, made a 3-wide run approaching turn, headed leaders at 250 M but found winner too good late, fought on bravely all the same. (Lame next day.)
Slow into stride, settled 6Ls back at rear, pace against in mid-section, made a 3-wide run on circle, made good progress to 200 M but run ended after being set a big task.

Showed pace from outset to cross them easily, took a trail behind leader, enjoyed run of race in mid-section despite being difficult to settle, didn't get a clear run until it was too late and just held ground last 200 M.
Out in line, pushed forward to take up running, set a steady tempo in mid-section, held a 1/2Ls advantage on turning in, soon under pressure at 350 M, responded to 200 M but no extra late.
Began well, pressed forward to race outside leader, helped by steady sections throughout, 1/2L down on turning in, couldn't find extra gear and produced a one-paced finish.
Standard jump, raced 4Ls back on fence, didn't use much in mid-section, saved ground on bend, weaved between horses turning in and closed off strongly doing best work late.
Ordinary jump, raced 5Ls back in 3-wide line, improved 3-wide on bend, 4-wide 2Ls down turning in, unable to offer much dash and quickly under pressure, dropped out tamely.
Remained wide throughout far side after beginning from poor draw. Midfield before moving up to dispute lead 800 M out. Lost position shortly afterwards and gradually faded in straight.
Began fairly but sluggish early. Raced in rear to straight. Ran on well under pressure along rails but in traffic and blundered over 100 M out.
Never far off. Chased leading trio in 2L 4th on rails. Still only 2Ls down turning in but soon weakened. (Blood in trachea.)
Began awkwardly losing ground. Trailed the field before running off making home bend. Never recover. (Blood in trachea.)
Niggled at early, settling outside leader before home bend. Unable to sustain run shortly after straightening and folded up quickly inside final 200 M.
Broke well. Raced on rails in rear of midfield. Responded well inside final 250 M to take charge over 150 M out.
Settled in forward of midfield. Came to challenge under pressure upon straightening and ran on steadily without threatening.
Broke well from poor draw. Settled wide in midfield. Found nothing under pressure in straight.
Settled behind midfield. Made significant progress between runners from last few into straight to be nearest at finish.
Raced wide in last few. Commenced move turning in. Ran on well in straight to only find winner too strong.
Broke well to lead. Obtained rails run 300 M after the start. Gained a length's break 200 M out and flattered. Overhauled nearing finish.
Broke well but failed to muster under urge. Raced wide in midfield far side before hanging out making home bend. Never recover.
No pace as usal, raced 3-wide behind midfield 6Ls back, aided by tempo, improved 4-wide on circle, 4Ls back turning just plugged away in straight with hands and heels riding.
No early pace, settled midfield on rails 6Ls off pace, aided by useful tempo in middle stages, saved ground on bend, made steady progress along inside to be nearest on line.

Displayed more pace than usual to settle outside the leader, elected for a trail 2Ls back by mid-point with solid pace, up challenging and took lead on turning, fought strongly but no match for winner.
Fast into stride, won pace battle and took up running, kept pace on with pressure from outside horse, struggling at 500 M, soon beaten and dropped right out in straight.
Ordinary getaway, shared rear some 8Ls off pace, suited by pace, still well back on leaving bend, lacked usual turn of foot and only passed tired runners in finish.
No early pace, raced back with last few 7Ls back in 2-wide line, helped by tempo, still had job to do on turning, didn't dash in stretch and just closed at same speed.

Began with rest, took a forward spot on back of pace, raced 2-3Ls back in 2-2ide line, not used througout, improved 3-wide on turn, right there sharing lead at 400 M but flattened at 250 M and dropped out late.

Allowed to slide back and take a spot behind midfield 6Ls from top end, advantaged by reasonable speed on, tracked 3-wide with cover on bend, looked a strong chance at 400 M but unable to lift and plugged last bit.
Ridden out to take a prominent spot behind leader, suited when pace slackened after early burn, right there on turning but without a run early in straight, closed off reasonably to make frame.

No early pace, settled back with last few 8Ls away, aided by pace in mid-section, near last switching out on turning in, came with huge run down middle to sweep past them at 100 M and win running away.

Restrained from a wide gate, posted 4-wide without cover in midfield, pressed on to race outside leader, held a narrow margin without crossing to 500 M, fought back strongly when headed to be in mix to 200 M, just held ground late.
Reasonable jump, drove through to take ideal trailing position 3-4Ls back on fence, not asked in run, same margin down on turning, lacked usual finish last 400 M and just battled away in run to line.
Out in line, assumed a midfield spot 5Ls back, had a fair run in mid-section, progressed to be 2Ls down making a 4-wide run on turning, looked a threat at 400 M but peaked on run last furlong.
Out in line, posted 3-wide without cover, did share of work 3-4Ls back, improved on bend, 4-wide on turning, threatened at 400 M but hard run took toll and just held position last 200 M.
Went back from widest gate, 8Ls down at 1000 M, 6-wide (widest of all) and closer but still rearward off last bend, nearest at the finish.
3-back on fence 4Ls back in midfield at halfway, 3Ls down entering home straight but one-paced thereafter.
Slowly away, 7Ls back towards rear early, about 4Ls back turning in and without clear running 300 M out, kept on okay but no great danger.
2-wide and 2Ls back in 5th at halfway, closer in 3rd but 4-wide turning in, dug in well to lead 50 M out, kept on.
2-wide and 5Ls back in 11th at the 600 M, no clear passage off home turn, switched inside 200 M out, ran on pretty well without threatening to place.
A neck back in 2nd out 2-wide at the 1000 M, struggling to remain in touch by the final turn, dropped out.
Trapped 4-wide no cover early and pressed on to lead on fence by 1L at the 800 M, headed about 350 M out and tired final furlong.
With cover 4Ls back in midfield at 1000 M and much the same off last turn, stayed on well for pressure, never nearer.
6Ls back in 9th out 3-wide with cover at the 1000 M, 5-wide turning for home when 4Ls behind, ran on strongly for a place.
Tracked the pace but left 3-wide no cover from the 800 M, pressed on to lead 350 M out, headed about 50 M out, no extra close home.
Midfield down the back, left 4-wide no cover along the circle when about 3Ls off speed, 5-wide swinging for home, always chasing a number of others.
Disputed early pace on fence, headed 900 M out, steadily lost his position on the circle and weakened out in the straight.
Failed to muster any early pace and soon 7Ls last, 5Ls last turning for home, ran on strongly late, nearest at the finish.
Slowest away, mid-division 4-back the fence 5Ls off pace at 1000 M, checked at 400 M and 300 M, eased down once chance had gone over 200 M out.
Began with rest, assumed a midfield position, 3Ls back in 2 wide line, improved 3 wide with cover on bend, made a strong bid at 300 M, held rivals easily in run to line.
No early pace, settled back towards rear 7Ls away racing 2 wide, pace against in mid-section, well back turning, only passed tired runners in straight.
Bounced out, assumed prominent spot outside leader, had an easy time to bend, forced to hold spot from 500 M, there to 300 M but unable to lift a notch and faded out late.
Shade tardy to break, raced in rearward division 2 wide 6Ls back, pace not really to suit, made solid progress between horses in straight to be nearest on line.
Out well, unable to slot in and forced to race 3 wide without cover 2Ls back, did share of work to bend, challenged on turning but hard run took toll from 300 M and didn't finish off last furlong.
Began swiftly, took up running soon after, led at even sections, 1/2L clear on bend, raced greenly and hung in straight, condition gave out last 200 M.
Slowly away, settled a clear last 8Ls off lead, saved ground on rails and tacked on at bend, made plenty of ground between horses in straight to finish a remarkable 2nd.
Even beginning, settled 3 wide behind midfield 4 to 5Ls back, covered ground throughout, tracked eventual winner on bend, stayed on soundly in straight to finish a handy 3rd.
Out with rest, soon drifted back towards rear, raced 5 to 6Ls away on rail, used little in mid-section soon struggling and dropped out tamely.
Away in line, took up a prominent spot on leaders back, had ideal run with favourable tempo, urged along on turning, didn't respond and faded from 300 M.
Well enough to begin, settled in coveted 1 out 1 back spot, no excuses to bend, found little under pressure and dropped off from 300 M.
Jumped with rest, settled in midfield on rails 3 to 4Ls back, didn't use much in mid-section, stayed on evenly along inside (steadied 350 M) but just held ground late.
Worked forward from an outside ally to race in 2nd position, 1 off. Kept on one paced in the straight.
Positioned behind midfield the fence. Shifted out into clear running near the 300, made a short dash before ending its run well short of the line.
Raced about 4 back on the rails. Plugged away in the run home dourly.

Received interference at the start and settled back in the field, 2 deep with cover. Peeled out turning for home and ran to the line well.
Raced keenly early and travelled outside the pace setter before taking up a trailing position along the fence near the 800 M. Had every chance from that point on.
Began awkwardly, shifted in and became unbalanced. Was then hard ridden to take up the lead early along the fence, kicked turning however commenced to fade inside the furlong.
Travelled close to midfield on the fence. Came under pressure to retain its position after the 500 M, made no headway along the inside in the run home.
Was inconvenienced soon after the start whilst in a rearward position and settled last. Made some ground early in the straight when racing along the inside and was one paced close to home.
Landed on the back of the speed, 1 off with cover. Travelled easily, 1/2 carting from the 600 M, rolled out on straightening and drew away to win in convincing fashion.

Raced 3 deep without cover for most of the circle, around midfield. Finished well back.

Mostly behind the pace. Unable to keep up on straightening and faded thereafter.

Off slowly and raced in a rearward spot. Rallied and made some progress in the straight.
No worse than midfield. 2 to 3Ls off the lead making home turn. Unable to quicken in the straight.

Led early stages. 2-wide and a length off the lead making home turn. Kept same pace in the straight.
Raced along the fence at midfield. Checked 600 M out and was 3Ls back on straightening. Had trouble finding daylight for some time after straightening. Closed off fairly and made up some late ground.
Raced at midfield. 3-wide and 3Ls off the lead making home turn. Quickened nicely on straightening and kept on fairly final stages.
Led early. Took a sit after 1400 M and raced 3Ls off the lead. Broke down 600 M out.

Settled behind midfield. Hampered 600 M out and was towards the rear turning for home. Picked up nicely on straightening but was checked when crowded 300 M out and lost all momentum. Unable to threaten thereafter.
3-wide without cover at midfield. Made up ground at the turn and was a length off the lead turning for home. Weakened and dropped out thereafter.
Settled towards the rear and trailed field into home straight. Only ran past beaten runners.
5Ls back in 6th out 2-wide at 1200 M, advanced to be 1L back in 2nd from 800 M to home turn, briefly led about 100 M out, foiled final strides.
Slowest out, 8Ls last at the 1400 M, still in rear about 6Ls back making last turn, retrieved a little late ground down the centre of the stretch.
4-wide no cover early, pressed on to lead on fence by 1L from 1000 M to home straight, headed about 100 M out and run out of place.
4-back on fence in midfield about 4Ls from the early pace, shuffled further back turning in, made some fair late ground, never nearer.
Mostly 5th or 6th about 2Ls from the speed through to the home turn, outpaced thereafter and no excuses.
Midfield with cover about 4Ls off pace at 1000 M, without a clear passage from top of stretch until 250 M out, no impact once clear.
Slightly worse than midfield about 5Ls from the early pace, 5-wide (widest of all) in same position off last turn, finished well, nearest at finish.
Messy start, always in rear, on the fence at least 5Ls down turning for home, very weak in the home straight.

Keen early on, 3-wide no cover throughout, 2Ls back in 3rd out 2-wide at halfway, struggling to lie up off last bend, dropped out very quickly. (Jockey was told his riding in early stages had come under notice.)
Went back from wide gate and raced with head up early on, always worse than midfield at least 4Ls from the speed, posed no danger.
2-wide in rear about 6Ls behind early pace, without running room at top of home straight when 5Ls back, stayed on past a few beaten rivals.
Mid-division 3-wide with cover 4Ls back at halfway, same margin back turning in, upsides and with every chance 100 M out, couldn't sustain the run.
Led early on before settling into a 3-back on fence position around midfield, under pressure to keep up 600 M out, no impression in the straight.
Always in front rank, 2Ls back in 3rd in box-seat turning for home, soon came under pressure but responded gamely, all out to score.
4Ls back in 6th at halfway, loomed closer and going well turning for home, led 250 M out, always repelling the challenge of BEST FRIEND.
2-wide and 3Ls back in 4th at the 1000 M and closer turning for home, disappointingly one-paced given his soft passage.
Squeezed out at start, worse than midfield on fence about 6Ls behind through to home straight, offered very little.

Restrained in rear as usual, about 7Ls down turning for home, made some decent late ground for 4th.
3 and 4-wide no cover throughout, 3Ls back in 5th at halfway, under pressure entering the straight and found nothing.
Midfield about 5Ls back at halfway, 4Ls back off final bend, headway to dispute 3rd about 1L down at the 200 M, never got to grips with quinella pair.
Worse than mid-division about 6Ls down along back straight, 4-wide (widest of all) turning for home, headway to be 2Ls back at 200 M, no extra late.
Towards rear with cover about 7Ls down early on, ridden along but closer turning in, a neck down in 2nd at 200 M, couldn't overhaul the winner.
Crossed to lead on fence by 1L at the 1000 M, same margin clear turning for home, faded once headed 250 M out.
Went back from widest gate, 7Ls back in rear bunch at halfway, ran on past a clutch of spent rivals in the home straight, no threat overall.
Box-seated 2Ls back in 3rd on fence from 1000 M to home turn, without clear running around the 200 M but disappointing overall given his easy run.
Always in last pair and never closer than 5Ls from the front at any stage.
Tended to hang throughout, 2-wide and 1L back in 2nd from 1000 M to home straight, soon beaten and eased down final 200 M.
Settled in midfield along the fence, 5-1/2Ls off the good pace, carried towards 3-wide at home bend, checked 400 M, then weakened.
Eased to sit about midfield, 7Ls off the good pace, trapped 3-wide throughout and lost ground, checked badly 700 M, lost spot approaching turn, dashed well 200 M to run a remarkable 2nd.
Eased back, 8Ls off the good pace 2-wide, swept towards 4-wide at home bend, made ground from 600 M, sustained its run until 100 M ended.
Eased back, 9Ls off the good pace, trapped 3 to 4-wide throughout and lost too much ground, hampered 700 M, progressed steadily 400 M.
Steadily crossed towards the rails in front of midfield, 4Ls off the good pace, travelled nicely, however soon dropped off 300 M.
Eased back, 9Ls off the good pace along the rails, ran on fairly in final stages and passed a number of weakened runners.
Eased to sit about midfield along the fence, 6-1/2Ls off the good pace, swept forward 3-wide at home bend, made ground from 800 M, weakened 300 M.
Eased back and took rail, never competitive.
Eased to sit about midfield, 4-1/2Ls behind the good pace 2-wide, made the move steadily from 700 M, closed off strongly and kicked away last 200 M to win easily.
Eased at start to cross towards the rails at rear, more than 10Ls off the good pace, made up some late ground 300 M without threats.
Hard ridden to take the rail and led by 2Ls at good pace, used up too much fuel in first two sections, weakened quickly 350 M.
Eased back for cover early, 2-wide throughout, moved up 1200 M to sit 2Ls off the good pace, ran on well to the line for 3rd.
Eased to rear, more than 10Ls off the good pace 2 to 3-wide, checked severely and almost fell 700 M, regained balance in straight and made some ground last 200 M.
Box seat, 2Ls off the good pace, no turn of foot, flattened 200 M.
Soon taken back to rear of field after beginning from widest draw. Remained similar in straight. Ran home one-paced. (Lame.)
Sluggish at start. Remained well back most of way. Ran past well-beaten horses closing stages.
Held rails run in prominent position. About 3L 4th rounding home bend. Switched off rails for a run turning in. Kept on same pace in the run home.
Raced wide in forward of midfield. Gained 2L 3rd around home bend. Similar turning in. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Settled on rails in midfield. Saved ground on rails turning in. Ran on steadily from 3L 4th into straight despite briefly baulked 200 M out.
Broke well to hold prominent position early, gradually settling in forward of midfield. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Broke well to lead early from middle draw. Settled one-back on rails approaching home bend. Tracked leaders into straight and hit front passing 200 M. Caught close to home.
Travelled behind midfield. Dropped out tamely shortly after straightening.
Driven along in midfield eventually taking lead coming out of back straight. Broke over 2Ls clear at one stage around home bend. Unable to sustain effort and overhauled inside final 200 M.
Settled mostly 3-wide in midfield. Finished off race well inside final 250 M to gain upper hand close to home.
Towards rear to straight. Made good progress under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Niggled at early. Raced wide towards rear early, dropping to last coming out of back straight. Made good progress down centre of track inside final 200 M.
Fast away, taken back but unable to slot in, raced 3 wide without cover proving difficult to settle, some 6Ls back by midpoint, faded in straight after a hard run.
No pace from outset and assumed usual role at tail 8 to 9Ls off pace, harmed by slow tempo, progressed 4 wide from 700 M and raced very wide on bend, got to 3rd at 400 M but peaked on run at 200 M.
Well enough away, took a spot behind leader, helped by slow pace, right there 2Ls down on bend, took run between horses at 200 M and gradually overhauled leader to score with a shade of authority.
Away only fairly, drifted back to a midfield spot a little closer than usual, still 4Ls back on bend, made good progress between horses to make frame on heels of placegetters.
Out in line, slotted in to running line 4Ls back, not aided by tempo in mid-section, still back behind horses on turning, picked up nicely late finishing well for 3rd.
Moderate jump, raced behind midfield 7Ls back on fence, used little however pace against, had job to do last on turning, made no headway in straight.
Standard jump, ended up 8Ls back on rails, slow pace a disadvantage in mid-section, saved ground on bend, stuck to inside and made good progress in run to line from an impossible spot.
Began well, pressed on to race outside leader, helped by a slow tempo, 1 to 2Ls down turning, stuck to task overhauling leader, kept with winner and put up a good fight to go down by a narrow margin.
Out in line, taken back from a wide gate, showed rear 8Ls off pace in 2 wide line, not helped by speed, well back on bend, made limited ground in straight.
Began with rest, ridden up to drive through and lead, set a steady tempo 2Ls clear throughout, held 1-1/2Ls advantage when dashing for home, had no extra from 200 M and just held ground late.
Well enough away, assumed prime position 1 out 1 back 3Ls off leader, suited by tempo to bend, made only fair progress in stretch holding ground in run to line.
Moderate beginning, difficult to settle racing 5 to 6Ls back in 2 wide line, not suited by tempo, angled wide turning in, made good progress in straight to be closest on line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced 2-back on rails just better than midfield. Came under pressure passing 300 M but could only run home one-paced.
Wide in midfield far side and around home bend. Faded under pressure after straightening.
Broke well. Settled one back in 3rd. Ran on inside final 250 M to assert authority close to home.
Well back. Ran on between runners inside final 200 M.
Broke well settling 3-wide in midfield. Ran home one-paced under pressure without quickening.

Mainly in forward of midfield to straight. Kept on before fading inside final 200 M.
Raced wide without cover in midfield. Gradually improved towards prominent position before home bend. Kept on in straight before finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Soon in rear. Similar on rails turning in. Fought on steadily to reach 5th late.
Slightly slow out losing a little ground. Improving in rear of midfield when checked and lost position coming out of back straight. Towards rear turning in and ran home one-paced.
Raced wide towards rear. Ran on steadily down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Soon led holding narrow advantage to 250 M. Soon folded up quickly.
Raced wide in rear of field throughout. Made nice impression down centre of track closing stages.
Slightly slow at start. Soon recovered to rear of midfield along rails. Saved ground turning in. Kept on steadily to reach 4th late.
No pace from gate, shared rear 7Ls away from pace, always well back but saved ground on bend, lacked usual finish and just plugged away in straight.
Allowed to drift back from a wide gate, ended up 5Ls back, raced 3 wide with cover throghout, tracked into race on bend, made solid ground from impossible spot to be nearest on line.
Had pace from outset, worked across to race outside lead helped set a fast early section before backing off on bend, matched rivals to 200 M but couldn't find extra at business end.
Lacked pace from jump, shared rear racing 2 wide 7Ls back, not helped when pace slackened on bend, still well back on turning, unable to produce usual close and just struggled in straight.
No speed from outset, back with last few racing 3 wide 7 to 8Ls from top end, covered ground on bend, no impact in run to line.
Showed usual pace to take up running set a reasonable early pace before backing off on bend, held a narrow lead on turning, there to 200 M but faded thereafter when early work.
Began well, took up ideal spot 1 out 1 back 2Ls away tracked well on bend, angled into clear at 400 M, got to within a length but just closed at the same pace thereafter.
Standard jump, ended up racing behind midfield 4 to 5Ls back on rails, didn't use a lot to bend, angled wide on turning, steadied at 300 M, dashed sharply from 200 M to just miss.

Travelled mainly in midfield on rails. Fought on steadily but not getting too much closer.
Towards rear. Kept on past beaten horses closing stages.
Sluggish from wide draw. Settled at the back. Rear into straight when not clear run early. Made up some late ground.
Behind midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Driven from widest draw to gain one-back position 3-wide into back straight. Remained similar till home turn. Dropped out.
Began fairly then restrained to race behind midfield, mainly 3-wide without cover far side when keenly. Made no impression in straight.
Raced 3-wide in midfield down far side. Kept on well in the run home.
Trailed field into straight. Fought on under pressure. Did best work late.
Tracked leaders in 1L 3rd. Commenced move turning in. Took charge passing 200 M. Won convincingly.
Broke well from wide draw. Settled in 2L 4th one off the rail. Came under pressure home turn and soon weakened.
Travelled 3 back the rails. Ran on well despite being tight for room in the straight and experiencing traffic problems inside the last 50 M.
Raced 4 back the fence and had to be checked near the 600 M. Kept to the fence in the straight and closed off satisfactorily, didn't obtain clear running over the final 100 M.
Box seated and had every chance in the race.
Settled in 2nd last position, 1 off with cover. Finished off somewhat one paced.
Crossed to race outside the leader, tired over the concluding stages.
Didn't muster early and raced 4 back with cover 2-wide. Made some headway at the business end of the race.
Raced in a 1 out 1 back position. Hit the lead midway in the straight but was overhauled in latter stages.
Camped 3 back, 2 deep with cover. Responded nicely when asked for an effort to score a comfortable win.
Faded passing the 100 M after leading.
On jumping was eased and settled back in the field from an awkward gate. Travelled 3-wide and without cover from the 800 M, battled away in the straight.
With the intention of being ridden quietly was taken back in the early stages and settled in a reward position. Travelled keenly in the middle stages and closed off strongly down the outside.

From a wide barrier was taken back behind runners to settle in last position along the fence. Struck trouble near the 600 M, made some ground in the straight and finished behind a wall of horses. Not fully ridden out.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Jumped fairly but checked shortly after start and was racing at the back. Trailed field into home straight and ran home without threatening.
Raced at midfield. 3-back on the rails turning for home and kept on fairly in the straight.
Jumped well from a wide draw and was in a disputed lead early stages. Settled behind the pace in back straight. Kept on fairly in the straight to make the frame.
Led briefly early stages. Took a sit behind the leaders turning into back straight. 2-back on the fence turning for home but unable to find more in the home straight.
Hard pressed from widest draw and took the lead 900 M out. Had a length's advantage turning for home. Maintained lead before fading final 100 M.
Checked shortly after start and raced behind midfield. Closed the race off fairly and made up some ground in the straight.
Improved steadily and was racing 2-wide behind the leader at 800 M. Remained a length off the lead turning in but faded over final 200 M.
Raced 2-wide at midfield. 3 to 4Ls off the lead at home turn. Charged home strongly and won by a narrow margin.
Taken back from a wide draw and raced in rear section. Rallied and made up ground in the straight.
Settled 2-wide and 3Ls off the leader. 2Ls down turning for home. Quickened on straightening and took the lead 100 M out. Kept on gamely final stages but was caught near the line.
Slow to muster speed and raced 2-wide behind midfield. 4 to 5Ls off the lead at home turn. Went stride for stride with eventual winner final stages but came up short in a photo finish.
10Ls back in 10th at stables bend, much closer on the rails at last turn but very lacking in the straight.
9Ls back in 9th at the 1200 M, 6Ls back and flat out swinging for home, no impression.
2-wide and 4Ls back in 5th at 1000 M, same position but struggling to keep up 500 M out, wilted.
Enjoyed a soft lead by 1L or 2Ls until the home straight, soon headed and zero excuses.
Had the run the race on the rails in 4th until home turn, 1L back in 2nd at the 200 M, couldn't follow through.
3-back on fence about 4Ls from the lead until home turn, staying on when 2Ls behind and with every chance 200 M out, run soon peaked. (Lame next day.)
