No Comments on Running information for this horse.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
2Ls back in 2nd at 1000 M, led off the home turn, looked like hanging on at the 200 M but outstayed in closing stages.
3-wide no cover early, 2-wide and 2Ls or 3Ls back in 3rd from 1000 M to home turn, still right there 200 M out but faded in the finish.
12Ls last early on, still adrift and treading water on the circle, no response.
Never going well, worse than midfield and keen early, left 3-wide no cover from the 800 M, hard ridden 500 M out, disappointing performance.
10th about 7Ls behind at 100 M, still with plenty ground to make up on straightening, stayed on fairly well, never nearer.
Towards rear about 8Ls down through initial stages, no closer off home turn, never on terms. (Tactic questioned.)
Soft passage 2Ls back in 3rd on rails until the home straight, led about 150 M out, just hung on.
2-wide and 1L back in 2nd at 1100 M, lost this position circling for home, dropped out like a non-stayer.
3-back on fence 4Ls back in 6th from 1100 M until straight when going well, 1L down in 3rd and dangerous at 200 M, post came too soon.
4-back on rails about 6Ls behind from 1200 M to final turn, ran on well on inside in the straight without quite reaching the front three.
In 4th at 1200 M but 3-wide no cover despite gate 5, 1L back in 2nd but toiling off the last bend, gave way quickly.
2-wide and about 3Ls back in 5th or so at 1200 M, 4-wide and midfield off last turn, very one-paced.
Soon led on the rails, 1L clear until the home straight, headed 150 M out and one-paced closing stages, may not have fully stayed the trip.
Never in touch, 8Ls last 1200 M out and still rear turning for home, tepid finish. (Lame.)
2-wide and 5Ls back in midfield until final bend, couldn't quicken.
Hard ridden early to get closer towards the rail in front of midfield, then eased to sit 4Ls behind the fast pace 2-wide, held up and checked 400 M, no turn of foot when clear, flattened 200 M.
Hard ridden early but failed to muster speed, favoured by the fast pace and the rail-run, however never competitive at rear.
Very slow away, taken back to rear, 7Ls off the fast pace 2-wide, moved up quickly around the field 4-wide from 800 M, weakened before straightening, checked 350 M.
Awkward away, hard ridden to take the rail and shared the lead at fast sectionals, pressured throughout, used up too much fuel in early stages, 250 M emptied.
Hard ridden to share the lead 2 to 3-wide, harmed by the fast early tempo, faded 400 M.
Pushed early but no speed, trapped 2 to 3-wide throughout, suited by the fast pace, but never better than midfield and tailed out from 300 M.
Eased to sit about midfield along the fence, 5Ls off the leaders, helped by the fast pace, lacked room in straight, just ran on ok.
Eased to sit behind midfield along the fence, 6-1/2Ls off the leaders, benefited by the fast pace, progressed steadily 300 M whilst hanging out, just scored on the line by a neck.
Pushed to occupy a midfield position, 5-1/2Ls off the leaders 2 to 3-wide, favoured by the fast pace, made ground steadily 400 M, just beaten in 2nd by a neck.

Hard ridden to join the leading group, 1-1/2Ls behind the leaders, trapped 2 to 3-wide, harmed by the fast early sectionals, made early move 600 M, led 400 M, hung on until 100 M overhauled and flattened.
Pushed early, insufficient speed to take a forward spot, then eased back for cover on the rails, 8Ls off the leaders, swept 3-wide at home bend, progressed steadily 250 M to grab a late 3rd.
Prominent, 3-1/2Ls off the leaders along the rails, not suited by the fast early tempo, just held ground in straight.
Always in last few.
Close up. Hit front briefly entering home straight. Fought on under pressure without pegging back the winner the length of straight.
Not far off to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Settled in midfield. Weakened into straight.
Restrained to race in rear. Found nothing in straight. (Tactic questioned.)
Virtually made all while momentarily headed turning for home. Fought on dourly to retain advantage to the line.
Chased leader one-back in 3rd on rails. Weakened upon straightening.
Raced 3-wide behind midfield. Took closer order down far side. Made moderate progress in straight.
Prominent early. Travelled in forward of midfield on rails far side. Made up good late ground inside final 200 M.
Soon crossed to rails behind runners. Trailed the field to 200 M.
Raced very wide in midfield around stable bend and 3-wide without cover down far side. Made steady headway from Rock to be close-up 3rd turning in. Fought on determinedly to snatch 2nd late.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.

Away only fairly, drifted back from an awkward draw, raced 6Ls back in running line, travelled well to bend, weaved between horses in straight, dashed sharply inside furlong to hit lead and score comfortably.
Broke nicely, showed usual speed to challenge for early lead, kept working shading inside horse setting genuine tempo, struggling on turning, workload took toll and run ended at 200 M.
Moderate getaway, settled 8Ls back on fence, ridden along to keep position, saved ground on bend, took inside runs turning, made even headway without looking likely.

Fast into stride, elected for a sit behind leader, did share of work on back of fast pace, right there and angled to centre on straightening, in mix at 200 M but lacked dash of placed trio last 100 M.
Bounced out, took a trail 3Ls back on fence, not asked in mid-section, 1L down on bend, pushed into gap between horses turning, made solid progress in straight but found winner too classy.

Tardy into stride, outpaced early and hard ridden at rear 10Ls back, gradually tacked on, aided by tempo, still well back on bend, made good progress in straight under hands and heels to be nearest on line.

Began with purpose, engaged in pace battle and drove through to lead, forced to work with pressure from outside horse, still held a 1L advantage turning, kicked to 200 M but effort told and faded out.
Restrained from a wide alley, ended up 6Ls back on rails, aided by solid pace on, kept to inside saving ground on bend. Responded well along inside doing best work late for 3rd.
Out in line, pressed on but unable to slot in, posted 3-wide without cover racing on a fast pace, struggling to sustain effort on bend, soon weakened after a hard run.
Standard getaway, jostled for a midfield spot at 1000 M, raced 4Ls back, had a suitable run with pace on but didn't produce a finish in straight.
Amongst first to break, steadied to obtain 1 out 1 back spot 2Ls away, shuffled back approaching bend, drifted out into centre of course, couldn't produce usual dash and struggled in straight.
Began fairly, bumped at 1000 M, ended up in a 3-wide spot 4Ls away, did have cover but worked throughout, switched wider in straight, closed okay to 150 M but flattened thereafter.
Showed early pace, led them early along outside rail, sat 1/2L back from pace trio, pushed along at midpoint, couldn't find extra gear and lost touch from 300 M.
Slow into stride, made way across from inside racing at rear 6Ls off pace, urged along from 500 M, lost touch gradually to be beaten a long way.
Ordinary getaway, ended up behind midfield close to middle of course, 7Ls down by midpoint, made some steady headway late without threatening.
Had early pace, shared lead throughout racing well off outside rail, went to front at 400 M, continued on nicely but proved no match for winner late.
Began only fairly, ended up 4Ls back towards middle, drifted back to be 7Ls down at 400 M, struggled from that point but wasn't knocked around.
No early toe, pushed along racing at tail 8Ls off lead soon became detached and well back by midpoint, found nothing after concluding stages.
Away in line, elected for a trail 3Ls or so away on rails, had a reasonable run thereafter, stuck on well late without threatening.
Began reasonably, ended up in midfield 4Ls back in centre of course, held position to 300 M, lacked a finish and faded final furlong.
Reasonable jump, pressed on to share lead by midpoint, still right there at 400 M, unable to sprint at business end and dropped out.
Bounced out, raced in first few, travelled well in 3 way go for lead, headed at 400 M, fought on soundly but didn't have extra last 200 M.
Jumped well, took a sit behind pace 2Ls back, travelled well throughout, held up 400 M, lacked an extra gear and just held ground late.
Began well, sat 1L off lead 3 to 4 off rail, trailed nicely to 400 M, switched to middle and accelerated sharply at 300 M, drew away to score effortlessly.
Tardy into stride, ended up back near rear or more lengths back along outside rail, pushed along to 400 M, did make some late progress to be nearest on line.

Shortly after the start when being taken back from a wide barrier, became unbalanced when crowded for room and settled at the rear of the field, 2-wide with cover. Made up some ground in the straight on tiring runners.
Travelled kindly outside the leader. Was quickly claimed before the 200 M and commenced to tire soon after.
Throughout the race travelled wide and without cover in a midfield position and in the Straight gave ground.
Travelled midfield 3 deep without cover. Struggled in the run home.
Blundered at the start then raced in front of midfield, 1 off with cover. Closed off fairly.
Slow into stride and travelled in midfield on the fence. Made some ground early in the straight before ending its run well short of the post.
Began awkwardly then was ridden along to take up the lead near the 900 M, along the fence. Faded quickly inside the furlong.
Travelled near the tail of the field 3-wide with cover. Was taken wider after the 600 M racing deep thereafter without cover. Weakened in the run home. Pulled up lame.
Raced in a rearward position along the fence. Kept to the inside in the straight but failed to run on.
Slow into stride and settled behind midfield, 2 deep with cover. Kept on one paced in the run to the line.
Stalked the leader along the fence. Peeled out turning for home and lengthened nicely to score running away.
Began awkwardly and lost ground settling close to midfield, 2-wide with cover. Responded well to pressure running on soundly.
Failed to find early speed and raced towards the rear. Near last on straightening and lacked a response in the straight.
Taken back from a wide draw and raced behind midfield. Rallied and made up good ground in the straight.
Soon at the back. Trailed field throughout the race and made no impression in the straight.
Jumped fairly but allowed to slip back. Raced 3-wide behind midfield. Made up some ground at the turn and early part of the straight. Unable to sustain run final 200 M.
Raced wide at midfield. Hung out for most of the race and went wide around the turn. Ran on a bit in the straight.
Raced on the fence at midfield. 4Ls off the lead making the turn. Kept on same pace in the straight.
Jumped awkwardly and then was crowded. Raced along the rails behind midfield. Checked at the turn and slipped further back. Near the back on straightening and ran home without threatening.
Settled at midfield. 2-wide and 3 to 4Ls off the lead at home turn. Stayed on same pace in the straight.
Niggled along to be among early leaders. Settled in a prominent spot behind the pace making the turn. Kept on well in the straight but unable to find more to chase down winner in the final stages.
Ridden out of the gates and raced behind the pace. A length off the lead turning for home but dropped out quickly after straightening.
Settled 2-wide and better than midfield. 2Ls down turning for home. Kept on well in the straight for a minor placing.
Jumped well from widest draw and soon racing in the lead under a comfortable pace. Opened up a 2L advantage shortly after straightening and kept on well final stages to hold rivals at bay.
On the rails and better than midfield. 3Ls down turning for home. Kept on fairly in the straight.
2-wide and 4Ls or 5Ls back in 6th down backstretch, hard ridden to improve from same position turning for home, made some fair late ground.
One from rear about 7Ls behind early tempo, further back turning for home, dashed very strongly to lead inside final strides for an improbable victory.
Soon 8Ls adrift in rear, never on terms at any stage.
2-wide and 6Ls behind in 8th early on, 8Ls behind in 8th off last turn, made some good late ground, never nearer.
In 2nd about 2Ls back until straight, led 200 M out, 2Ls clear and seeming certain to win at 100 M, tired and hung out late, headed final strides.
6Ls back in 10th at 1000 M, further behind in rear turning for home, failed to land a blow, flat performance.
3rd about 2Ls behind early speed, still 3rd but under pressure about 3Ls back turning for home, one-paced in the finish but held on for a place.
3-back on fence in 5th about 4Ls behind initially, under pressure to lie up turning for home, never troubled principals.
Led as usual, 2Ls clear from 800 M to home straight when travelling well, found nothing off the bridle, however, and headed 200 M out, weakened. (Blood in trachea.)
Trapped very wide (4 and 5-wide) without cover throughout, about 10Ls behind in rear off last bend, stayed there.
About 3Ls behind in 4th or so until home straight, had his chance to place but his run petered out inside final 200 M, still a good debut.
Last early on, 4-back on rails about 6Ls back in 7th at halfway, always among the second half of the field.
Pressed on out 4-wide no cover to track leader out 2-wide at the 900 M, 2Ls back in 2nd and struggling turning for home, weakened rapidly. (Tactic questioned.)
Box-seated 2Ls back in 3rd at 1000 M and much the same turning for home, still 3rd at the 200 M but weak and run out of the money thereafter.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Slowly away and hampered early on, one from rear from 1200 M to home straight when 7Ls behind, no impression.
Always towards rear, 8Ls behind in 10th early, hard pressed to take closer order swinging for home, did not succeed.
3-back on fence about 5Ls behind the speed early on and same position turning for home, failed to quicken up.
6Ls back in midfield on the rails at halfway, ran on okay in the straight for a place without testing the quinella pair.
Towards rear about 9Ls behind speed at halfway and a little closer turning for home, stayed on pretty well in the finish, may need more ground.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
6th with cover about 4Ls or 5Ls from the front until home straight, had his chance to place but lacked the acceleration.
3Ls back out 2-wide in 4th at 1000 M, same margin behind turning for home and edged towards stands' rail, ran on well to lead final strides.
Squeezed out on jumping, midfield about 6Ls back early, keen at halfway, posed little danger in the stretch.
Slowly away, checked at 1300 M and about 7Ls back in 9th at 1000 M, 4-wide (widest of all) when 5Ls behind turning for home, tame finish.

Pushed for a few strides, but soon took back to sit in midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the leaders 3 to 4-wide, raced keenly, not suited by the very slow pace, moved up steadily 600 M, ran on ok until 250 M flattened.
Pushed to occupy the box seat, travelled nicely throughout, benefited by the very slow early tempo and the rail-run, closed the race off strongly to run a close 3rd.
Slow away, eased back, 5Ls off the leaders 2 to 3-wide, harmed by the very slow pace, faded 400 M.
Midfield along the fence, 3-1/2Ls off the leaders, not suited by the very slow tempo, no turn of foot, weakened 300 M.
Hard ridden early to keep up with the field at rear, 7Ls off the leaders 2 to 4-wide, dashed strongly 200 M despite harmed by the very slow pace.
Pushed to sit outside the lead, enjoyed the very slow early tempo, however soon weakened 350 M.
Very slowly away, at rear and trapped 4 to 6-wide throughout, lost too much ground at bends and harmed by the very slow pace, never competitive.
Very slow away, hard ridden but failed to muster speed at back, 6-1/2Ls off the leaders 3 to 4-wide, harmed by the very slow pace, demonstrated strong finishing efforts 200 M.
Took the rail easily and led by 1/2L at very slow early sectionals, made all.
Eased back, 4-1/2Ls off the leaders 3-wide, not suited by the very slow early sectionals, blocked 4-2, little dash when clear.
Eased to sit behind midfield, 5Ls off the leaders along the fence, harmed by the very slow pace, dashed strongly 400 M to finish 2nd , just beaten by a narrow margin.
Pushed for a prominent spot, 2Ls off the leaders 2 to 3-wide, helped by the very slow tempo, however never showed turn of foot, flattened 250 M.
Pushed early but failed to muster speed, trapped 4 to 5-wide throughout and lost too much ground, not suited by the very slow pace, dropped off rapidly 500 M.
Broke well to hold rails run in the front. Shared pace with two others around home bend. Went away for a 2L advantage 200 M out but soon died on its run and swamped.
Prominent early, then steadied and lost position 1200 M out. Gradually recovered from midfield to be one-out-one-back in 5th rounding home bend. Kept on steadily in straight without quickening.
Settled behind midfield from a wide draw. Commenced move upon straightening. Ran home nicely to hold every chance but pipped at post.
Waited with. Briefly baulked before obtaining a clear run over 350 M out. Responded well to snatch victory near the line.
Ridden along to match pace of leaders far side racing wide. 3-wide rounding home bend when lost position. Dropped away quickly when straightening.
Raced wide in prominent position early. Gradually taken back to behind midfield but still wide without cover before home bend. Made no show in straight.
Settled on rails in midfield about 3Ls off the pace. Switched off rails for a run upon straightening but could only produce moderate progress while hanging out away from the whip to reach 3rd late.
Broke with the rest from a wide draw. Settled 3 wide in midfield. Lost position entering straight when wider. Ran on steadily down centre of track without threatening.
Tight between runners at start and squeezed. Settled behind midfield. Snuck up along rails early in straight. Briefly baulked 100 M out. No further impression.
Broke with field from widest draw. Quickly taken to race in rear. Baulked for a run after straightening until 200 M mark. Rattled home late.
With leaders. Folded up quickly after straightening. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Slightly slow out, quickly picked up to 3-wide position with leaders. Shifted back to be one-back in 3rd rounding home bend. Gave ground quickly passing 500 M.
Niggled at early but had to settle for one-back position on rails. Still in the box-seat run turning for home but unable to quicken to challenge.
Mainly in midfield. Always under urge to hold midfield position. Minor interference approaching home turn. Soon dropped out while hanging in in straight. (Mucus.)
Showed pace to be close to lead 1L back well off stand side, still in mix at 300 M but didn't let down and dropped out quickly late.
Reasonable jump, raced amongst first few towards centre of course, right there at 400 M, kept finding in run to line and just lost 2nd late.
Standard beginning, raced 3Ls away behind most of field, improved towards outside rail from 400 M, made some headway late to be nearest on line (on heels late.)
Hit ground first and shared early lead racing towards centre of course, always prominent and kept with them to 200 M, run ended and faded out.
Missed start by 8Ls, raced detached at rear, never a factor.
Standard jump, settled at rear of main bunch 4Ls back, still back behind horses at 400 M, failed to produce usual close and simply struggled over concluding stages.
Average jump, raced in middle of pack 2 to 3Ls back, had cover throughout, still in behind horses at 200 M, closed well when clear to make frame.
Away in line, raced in centre of course 3 to 4Ls away, further back than usual, didn't have an extra gear and just struggled late.
Even getaway, settled 2Ls of lead closer to stand side, not far away at 1000 M, didn't sprint but stuck on evenly late.
Jumped well, raced 1L off speed along outside rail, levelled up at 300 M, continued strong finish to hold a margin last furlong and score nicely.
Displayed early pace, led easily and kept pace genuine holding a narrow advantage, urged along at 300 M, run ended at 200 M and compounded rapidly soon after.
Ordinary jump, ended up 4Ls down in middle of track, improved from 400 M, dashed smartly last 200 M to finish a promising 2nd.
Away only fairly, ended up 2Ls away between horses in centre of course, not far away at 400 M, didn't produce usual finish but made steady ground in run to line.
Jumped with rest, didn't have early pace, raced 4Ls back behind most of field, didn't sprint but was able to pull some margin back from leaders late.
Restrained to race behind midfield. Took up midfield position rounding home bend. Failed to quicken to challenge while hanging in behind runners early in straight and slightly hampered passing 200 M.
Broke well from poor draw. Soon took up running from 3 or wide. Gained rails run about 1100 M out and led to 200 M. Weakened.
Raced 2-wide in midfield. Slightly closer order rounding home bend in 5th. Not much room early in straight. Fought on steadily to the line.
Began awkwardly losing ground. Travelled in last few. One-paced under pressure in straight.
Settled at the back. Commenced move rounding home bend. Sustained progress from 4-wide in midfield into the straight. Gained 2nd 150 M out without ever threatening.
Began well. Soon taken to rear. Last rounding home bend and into straight. No further impression.
Began well. Amongst leaders before shifting to one out one back position. Similar turning in. Gradually faded in straight.
Settled at the back. Switched wide into straight. Ran on under pressure down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Prominent early. Shuffled back to midfield around home bebnd. Made no impression in straight. (Lame next day.)
Held box-seat run on rails behind leader. Had a tight run up the straight along the rails. Steadied on the line.
Broke well. Gradually settled 3 wide just better than midfield. 2-back 2-wide in 4th or 5th rounding home bend. Quickened well to assert passing 200 M.
Held rails run in midfield far side, racing awkwardly behind runner 800 M out. Gradually faded from home bend.

Jumped nicely, took a prominent spot behind leader, tracked speed throughout, 2Ls down turning, made a run between horses on straightening, kept on soundly in straight finishing right behind placegetters.
No early pace, taken back from a wider alley, raced 6Ls back in 2 wide line, pace not to suit in mid-section, in traffic turning and made ground to 200 M when steadied, held ground thereafter.
Lost ground at jump, settled in rear division 7Ls back on rails, pace not ideal but saved ground throughout, still had job to do turning, made some headway in straight without really looking likely.
Taken back from a wide alley, settled 7Ls back in running line, pace against but travelled well in mid-section, made a 3 wide run at 500 M, made many lengths in straight to be nearest at finish.

First to hit ground, took up lead and set terms to suit throughout, still held an advantage on bend despite worry from outside horses, kicked 2Ls clear turning and defied rivals to 100 M when run peaked.
Even break, drifted back to be 5Ls back in running line, had a fair trip but slow sections against, same margin down on turning, made strong progress in straight to finish a remarkable 4th.
Well enough to begin, slotted into coveted 1 out 1 back spot, had even run trailing a moderate pace but did overrace, made a 3 wide run turning, eventually overhauled leader only to be caught late.

Slowly into stride and lost further ground when checked, travelled at tail 9 to 10Ls off front-runners, pace against in mid-section, still last turning, reeled off sharp sections to make huge amount of ground late.
Jumped in line, proved difficult to settle racing 3 wide outside leaders, helped by steady tempo, did work without cover there on turning but had run soon took toll and weakened out.
Began well, went forward and raced outside leader, helped by steady tempo, did have pressure from outside horse on bend, 1L down turning, soon under pressure and gradually dropped out.
Standard getaway, restrained for a sit 4Ls back in midfield on fence, had soft run throughout, kept on well without quickening in straight to be not far away in finish.
Out in line, took up a midfield berth 3 to 4Ls back, had nice run throughout, improved on turning, came with strong run down middle in straight hitting lead late for an overdue victory.
Standard beginning, ended up 4Ls back on rails, pace not ideal however used little in run, saved ground on bend, made gradual progress in straight to be closest on line.
5Ls off pace at 1000 M when 3-wide with cover, 6Ls back in midfield off last turn when under pressure, failed to quicken up.
3-wide but with cover in midfield about 4Ls from early tempo, a little worse and ridden along turning for home, very one-paced.
Box-seated about 2Ls off pace in 4th along backstretch, 3Ls back in 4th turning in, one-paced in the finish.
Went back from widest gate, 8Ls last turning for home, ran on well through the field to be nearest at the finish.
Crowded at start, 1L back in 2nd down the back and same entering final 400 M, still 2nd 250 M out but soon tired and ended out of the money. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slowly away, towards rear about 7Ls behind in initial stages, much the same off last bend, no impression.
Handily placed better than midfield about 3Ls from the front until the home straight, failed to take advantage of the soft run and one-paced.
Settled in midfield but over-raced repeatedly when about 4Ls from the speed, losing his position at top of home straight, weakened rapidly.
Close-up in 3rd but posted 3-wide no cover throughout, began to lose this proximity before home turn, faded out further.
One from rear about 7Ls off pace at 1000 M, 5-wide (widest of all) into final 400 M, made no great impact down centre of the track.
Led on fence by 1L at 1400 M, similar margin clear off last bend, grabbed by the winner about 20 M from the line.
Broke down badly out wide after just 200 M.
Awkward break, 4-back on fence about 6Ls behind at halfway and same on straightening, made some good late headway to nick a place in final stages.
Slowly away, 3-back on fence in midfield about 4Ls from the pace until home straight, 2Ls back in 3rd at 200 M, dug in well to lead inside final 20 M.
No pace from outset and allowed to drift back to race 3 wide behind midfield 5 to 6Ls off pace, speed against in mid-section, failed to finish off.
Bounced out well, took a nice position behind leader, had race run to suit in mid-section, struggling on rounding bend, weakened out in straight.
Average jump, taken back to race in behind, raced 6Ls off pace in 2 wide line, pace against in mid-section, still well back to bend, passed only tired runners in straight.
Moderate beginning, raced 7Ls back at rear, 3 wide from top bend, unsuited by tempo, made no progress in straight.
Out in line, restrained to race 3 to 4Ls back on fence, had a soft run on rails with steady pace, improved on bend, kept closing in straight taking 2nd inside 100 M, no match for winner.
Restrained from a wide alley, dropped to rear racing 7Ls back on rails, pace against in mid-section, still well back on turning, made fair headway along inside in straight.
Out in line, assumed a midfield role 4Ls back racing 2 wide, tracked 3 wide with cover on bend, switched out in straight but offered no finish last 300 M.
Began well enough, ended up just behind pace 1 out 1 back, overraced in mid-section, dropped right out. (Bled 2nd time.)
Amongst first few to break, raced outside the lead without cover, did concede position when pressed on bend, struggled to pick up and just battled away in straight.
Showed plenty of early pace to take up running, set speed to suit in mid-section, held a 1/2L lead on bend, found plenty under pressure and drew away last 200 M for an easy win.
Little early pace, settled in midfield 4Ls off pace, not used in mid-section, same margin down turning, didn't close off with much force and just battled last 200 M.
Standard jump, mustered to race 3 and 4 wide, 3Ls back, did share of work racing wide to bend, dropped out quickly in straight.
Away with them, pushed on to race 3 wide outside of leaders, always working in run, right there challenging at 400 M, run ended at furlong mark but stuck on evenly all the same.
Landed midfield but proved somewhat difficult to settle in the early and middle stages. Travelled nicely to take up the running near the 200 M, but its efforts finished short of the post.
Bounded in the air at the start and lost ground and raced near the rear of the field. Battled away to the finish line.
Raced midfield the fence. Made some gradual progress in the straight before tiring on its run before the wire.
From a wide barrier, was taken across behind runners in the early stages, then commenced to travel keenly at the tail of the field, 1 off with cover. Failed to close off.
Raced 1 off with cover behind midfield, kept on the same speed over the concluding stages.
Took up a trailing position just behind midfield. Responded well after the 500 M and commenced to improve its position, finishing over the top of its rivals towards the run to the post.
Travelled in 2nd position and enjoyed the run of the race. Fought strongly under pressure despite wanting to lay out over the latter stages.
Worked forward to the lead and opened up a large break on the field. Commenced to tire passing the furlong.
Settled in 3rd place along the rail. Never seriously challenged however was hampered at the back end of the race.
Travelled 3 wide with the back markers, had cover. Never likely.
Raced midfield 3 deep, no cover. Struggled to the run home.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Settled in last position, made some ground in the run home but never threatened.
Failed to go the early speed of the race and settled behind midfield the fence. Stayed along the inside in the straight however went to the post one paced.
Settled towards the rear. Made a strong rally from the back and swept past the field for an impressive win.
Failed to muster speed and raced in rear section. Made a ground saving trip around the turn and closed the race off fairly.
Botched the start. Ridden along and steadily made up ground to raced 2-wide behind the leader 900 M out. Struggled to keep pace at home turn and dropped out quickly after straightening.
Soon in the lead. Held a clear advantage into the home straight. Headed 100 M out and unable to find more.
Settled in a prominent spot behind the pace. Kept on fairly in the straight and but unable to find extra to remain in contention in the final stages.
Raced along the rails at midfield. Behind midfield at the turn. Kept on same pace in the straight.
Jumped well but was allowed to drift back to behind midfield. 4-wide at the turn and was last on straightening. Only ran past beaten runners in the straight.
Settled behind midfield. Quickened on straightening and closed the race off with a strong rally.
Settled behind midfield. Steadily made up ground in the straight.

Ridden out of the gates from widest draw and raced behind the pace. 4 to 5Ls off the lead in 4th 600 M out. Kept on well in the straight and ran down early leaders 100 M out but was soon overtaken by winner.
Missed the kick but had no trouble finding way back to midfield. 2-wide making the turn and ran on fairly in the straight to make the frame.
Jumped awkwardly and raced along the fence at midfield. 3 to 4Ls down at home turn but only remained on same pace in the straight. Unable to get clear run in the final 75 M.
Raced 3-wide at midfield. Hung out making home turn and found nothing in the straight.
Off slowly and raced at the back. Remained towards the rear on straightening. Closed the race off well but ran into traffic over the final 100 M.
3-wide no cover in 4th early on, closer 2-wide with cover from 800 M to home turn, upsides with a winning chance 250 M out but couldn't sustain the run.
Disputed early pace out 2-wide, 2Ls back in 2nd at 900 M, a neck down in 2nd off last turn, gave ground before the final 200 M.
Slowly away as usual, 11Ls last at the 1000 M, headway out wide from the 800 M to be 5Ls down on straightening, closer 200 M out, tired late.
3Ls back in 4th at 1200 M, further back and beginning to struggle when turning for home, found zero off the bit, unacceptable performance.
7Ls behind in 10th at the 1200 M, 4Ls back on inside in 8th off last turn, ran on fairly in the finish but no threat to quinella pair.
Always towards the rear, about 10Ls back in 12th at 1000 M, 9Ls last at the 600 M, always chasing the majority of the field.
Ignore the run, in front rank until home bend, had no room behind tiring SUPER CHARGE for 300 M of straight, eased when chance had gone.
4Ls back in 6th at 1200 M, pressed on out 3 and 4-wide no cover from 800 M, 1L down in 3rd off last bend, closer 200 M out, very tired final furlong.
Midfield with cover about 5Ls behind leader at 1000 M, 3Ls back in 6th off last turn, all out when 2Ls back at furlong pole, no extra.
Slowly away, one from rear about 11Ls behind early pace, 7Ls last turning for home, ran on past a few tiring rivals in the finish.
Went back, 8Ls behind in 11th early on and about 6Ls adrift turning in, always held.
Pressed forward from wide gate but without cover until crossing to lead on fence by 1L from 900 M to home turn, soon headed and weakened.
Quietly ridden about 6Ls back in 9th down backstretch, smooth headway from top of straight to lead 200 M out, ran on for convincing win.
About 3Ls back in 5th from 1200 M to home turn, quickened up to be within a neck of the lead 200 M out, outpaced thereafter but held 2nd comfortably.
Went back from widest gate, 10Ls in rear at 1200 M, crept within 4Ls of lead on inside turning for home, could have at least placed but no follow-through.
One from rear about 8Ls off pace at 1600 M, still worse than midfield but 4Ls adrift off last turn, one-paced.
3-wide with cover about 4Ls behind in midfield at 1400 M, 4-wide but 2Ls back in midfield off last bend, failed to quicken up.
10Ls back in 12th at the 1200 M, still in rear and 6Ls behind swinging for home, minimal impact and eased late.
5Ls down in 8th on fence at 1400 M, closer and 3-wide off last corner and over 1L back in 2nd at 200 M, kept on to lead 70 M out and won going away.
Disputed early pace out 2-wide, 2Ls back in 4th at halfway and 1L back in 3rd at last turn, lacked the kick of quinella pair and did just enough for 3rd.
5Ls back in 9th at 1400 M, 2Ls off pace out 5-wide into straight, led and looked the winner 300 M out, no answer when grabbed 70 M out.
Left 3-wide no cover from the 1400 M, sent on to race 2Ls back in 3rd at 800 M and 1L down off final turn, extra work soon took its toll.
3-wide with cover at 1200 M a little worse than midfield, under pressure and widest making final turn, very laboured on the run-in.
Slowest away and always rearward, 10Ls off the pace at halfway, marginally closer but still last entering straight, no impression.
Very wide at first bend, kicked on to track leader at 1400 M and briefly led at top of home straight, soon headed and faded very quickly.
Led by 1L on fence at 1400 M, headed at top of home straight, dropped out very tamely.
2Ls off speed in 5th at 1400 M, enjoyed a soft trail on fence and 1L back off last turn, found nothing under pressure and beaten 300 M out.
3Ls down in 6th out 2-wide at 1400 M, 4Ls back at the 800 M and 2Ls down off last turn, every chance and no excuses for not finishing in the money.
Eased to take the box seat, helped by the slow early sectionals, however just held ground in straight.
Eased to sit about midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the leader 3-wide, not suited by the slow tempo, little dash 250 M and no threat.
Eased to sit behind midfield along the fence, 6Ls off the leader, not suited by the slow tempo, no dash.
Took the rail easily and led by 1L at advantageous slow early sectionals, kicked 500 M, hung on strongly until 50 M overhauled, ran on for 3rd.
Pushed to secure a prominent spot behind the leading group, 3Ls off the slow pace 3-wide, lacked turn of foot, out of fuel 300 M.
Hard ridden early but lacked speed, raced at rear 8-1/2Ls off the leader on the rails, harmed by the slow pace, ran on fairly in straight.
Bumped start, eased to rear, trapped 4-wide throughout and no cover, raced keenly, 7-1/2Ls off the leader, bumped and unbalanced 400 M, harmed by the slow pace, never progressed.
Eased to sit about midfield along the rails, travelled nicely 4-1/2Ls off the leader, harmed by the slow pace, dashed strongly 300 M to win.
Bumped start, eased to sit behind midfield with cover, 5-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, not suited by the slow tempo, momentarily held up 400 M, dashed well when clear.
Eased back, 6Ls off the leader 3-wide, raced keenly, dashed strongly 200 M despite harmed by the slow pace.
Awkward away, eased to rear, 8-1/2Ls off the leader 2 to 3-wide, harmed by the slow pace, lacked turn of foot, just ran on ok in final stages.
Pushed to sit about midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, not suited by the slow pace, weakened 300 M.
Pushed to take a prominent spot on the fence, 2-1/2Ls off the leader, benefited by the slow early tempo, closed the race off strongly to grab 2nd.
Taken back to race in rear from poor draw. Took closer order far side improving to midfield home bend. Not clear run and steadied 300 M out. Ran on steadily to reach 3rd late.
Raced 3-wide without cover with leaders early. Gradually shifted back to one off the lead on rails far side. Found nothing under pressure after straightening.

Slightly slow out. Quickly recovered to race outside leader. Gained slender advantage from around stables bend travelling outside 2nd throughout far side. Soon came under pressure upon straightening and headed over 200 M out.
Broke well to hold rails run. Raced keenly early far side when inside leader. Hit front rounding home bend but soon headed turning in. Faded inside 200 M.
Broke well. Raced wide in midfield. Faded after straightening. (Questioned for poor performance.) (Lame next day.)
Well back. Produced good late finish past well beaten horses inside final 200 M.
Prominent early. Settled in forward of midfield far side. Kept on steadily under pressure without quickening.
Niggled at early. Soon obtained rails run in forward of midfield. One back on rails in box-seat turning in. Hit front 200 M out and just held off fast-finishing 2nd at the finish.
Began in line. Travelled in midfield far side. Towards rear into straight. Switched out for a run and only made moderate progress without threatening.
Travelled behind midfield on rails. Gained closer order turning in. Obtained a run 200 M out. Ran on strongly to miss narrowly.
Taken back to race in rear from poor draw. Trailed the field most of way to straight. Baulked for a run early in straight. No impression closing stages.
Began well. Prominent early. Mainly 3-wide in prominent position far side. Gradually weakened after straightening.
Wide towards rear. Soon dropped to tail-end after straightening.
Jockey had to correct his saddle early. Settled in rear. Made steady progress behind runners early in straight. Steadied passing 150 M. No further impression late.
No early pace, ended up 7Ls back in 2 wide line, harmed by tempo, pocketed briefly rounding 600 M, made a sweeping run from 400 M and got level but couldn't find extra last bit well clear of 3rd.
Standard beginning, ended up in rearward division, 8Ls off pace, not suited by speed, still had job to do at 600 M, made no progress in run to line.

Began well, elected for a trail 3Ls back on fence, suited by steady tempo, not used to 600 M, improved 2 wide thereafter, made well timed run at 400 M at pulled out plenty in finish to defy highly fancied rival.

Amongst first to begin took a sit behind leader, had run of race thereafter with slow pace, still there turning and hit lead briefly at 300 M, didn't see out trip last 200 M but held on to make frame.
Standard beginning, ended up 5Ls back on fence, used nothing in run with steady sections, pushed along at 600 M, lacked usual close and just battled away. (Lame.)
Began best, rolled forward to lead, set a more restrained tempo than usual, dictated terms 1L clear to bend, tried to pinch it but collared at 300 M and offered little thereafter.
No early pace, dropped to rear 10Ls off lead, not aided by steady speed, improved 3 wide from 1000 M, unable to sprint with them at 600 M but battled on evenly to take placing late.
Well enough away, drifted back into midfield 5Ls back in running line, pace against in middle stages, didn't dash when pace quickened and made little impression in straight.
Fair to jump, ended up racing 2 wide first without cover 2Ls back, had a suitable run, struggling at 500 M, weakened soon after straightening.
No early pace, drifted to rear 8Ls back in running line, pace against throughout, still well back turning in, never a factor in straight.
Fair start. Travelled 3-wide in prominent position. Some 2Ls off the pace turning in. Fought on determinedly to just get up on line.
Soon taken back from poor draw to race in rear. Trailed the field to straight. Made steady headway without quickening.

Broke well from middle draw to lead. Headed coming out of back straight and travelled one-back in box-seat on rails home bend. Fought on steadily under pressure throughout final 400 M without pegging back first two.
Raced mainly in one-out-one-back position far side. Commenced run rounding home bend joining leader into straight. Hit front over 200 M out. Fought on bravely (despite hanging) but pipped at post.
Raced wide in last few. Made no show in straight.
Broke well. Under urge to hold rails run in front row. Shuffled back to 2-back on rails coming out of far side. Not much better turning for home. One-paced.
Not too far off on rails. Tightened and lost position coming out of back straight. Towards rear rounding home bend. Soon dropped out after straightening. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Midfield throughout. Ran home one-paced.
Forward of midfield. Kept on steadily in straight without quickening.
Well back. Produced some late impression under pressure inside final 200 M.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Niggled at early from wide draw to contest lead. Took over coming out of back straight and led to 250 M. Plodded on for 4th.
Travelled in rear of midfield. Steadied for a stride approaching home turn. Ran home one-paced.
Raced 3-wide in midfield to straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Broke nicely, took up box seat 1 out 1 back, enjoyed an ideal trail in mid-section, improved 3 wide on turning in, let down quickly and drew away last 200 M to score convincingly.
Slow into stride, raced 3 wide 8Ls back behind midfield, did work covering ground throughout, taken wide on bend, lacked required finish and battled to line.
Standard jump, ended up behind midfield on rails 6 to 7Ls away, used little in mid-section, saved ground on bend, made steady progress in straight doing best late to steal 2nd on line.

No pace from outset, in last few 9Ls back in running line, aided by tempo, well back making a 3 wide run on turning in, still in behind horses to 250 M but accelerated nicely when clear to be nearest on line.
Standard jump, ended up 8 to 9Ls back on fence, aided by speed, used little to bend, no response in straight and simply struggled in run to line.
Began well, took a sit off pace 3 to 4Ls back in 2 wide line, ridden along to hold spot on bend, eased out turning but lacked a dash and faded out.
Out in line, elected for a trail and raced 5Ls back along rails in midfield, had a soft run but lost position on bend, got going again last 200 M, closed nicely to make frame.
Showed customery pace to drive forward from a wide gate to race on pegs, did share of work setting even tempo, kicked strongly on turning and only lost 2nd place in shadows of post.

Bounded out, crossed to race outside leader, didn't have easiest time with reasonable sectionals, right there on turning and made bold effort to 200 M but run ended soon after and dropped out after hard run.
Restrained from a wide gate, ended up at rear 10Ls away at tail, aided by even sections in mid-section, kept to rails turning and made plenty of progress in straight to be nearest on line.
Away in line, ended up 5Ls back in running line, had reasonable trip to bend, urged along on turning, failed to respond and simply plodded in straight.
Standard jump, took a position behind midfield on fence 6 to 7Ls back in running line, suited by speed in mid-section, improved 3 wide on circle, made a brief dash but run ended at 200 M.
Began well, pushed up to hold a spot on rails behind leader, did share of work on back of pace, kept with leaders to 300 M but lacked an extra gear thereafter.
Restrained from wide gate, left 3-wide without cover from the 800 M when 7Ls back in 12th, ran on okay in the straight without really threatening. (Tactic questioned.)
Close-up until home straight, 1L back in 4th at the 1200 M and in 3rd just 1L down turning for home, hanging on 200 M out but weak inside final furlong.
Worse than midfield about 7Ls behind at halfway, made some good late ground through the field but too late for a significant impact.
Slowest out, with cover in midfield 5Ls off pace at halfway, flanked winner turning in, led about 100 M out, hung in close home, headed final strides.
Disputed early pace out 3-wide no cover, led by 1L 600 M out, headed 300 M out and weakened rapidly.
Trapped 3 and 4-wide no cover throughout, keen early also, 4Ls back in midfield 900 M out, 4-wide off last bend, soon struggling and beaten 200 M out. (Heart irregularity.)
Taken back from widest gate, towards rear 7Ls adrift at 1000 M and not much closer turning in, made a little late ground, never nearer. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Got back as usual, 9Ls last 900 M out, 7Ls off pace turning for home, made some very minor late progress through beaten horses.
Box-seated in 4th at 1200 M, shuffled back to midfield off last turn, ran on well again in the straight but no chance with leading trio.
3Ls back in 5th with cover at 1000 M, attacked out 3-wide turning for home and led 300 M out, no response to quinella pair when headed about 100 M out.
2-wide and 1L back in 2nd at 1200 M, still close up but under pressure to maintain proximity off last bend, steadily gave ground.
Best away and led early, handed up to race 3-back on fence 3Ls off pace from 1000 M, closer on straightening, battled gamely to wrest the lead final strides.
Didn't break well, keen early when about 5Ls back in midfield, 3-wide no cover from the 800 M, one-paced in the homestretch.
Slightly slow to begin. Ridden to prominent position shortly, settling 2Ls off the speed in 3rd on rails. Found nothing in straight. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Began fairly. Prominent early. Failed to keep up with pace under urge and gradually dropped back towards rear. Lost further ground turning in.
Niggled along from a poor draw to race wide in midfield. Found cover coming out of back straight. Kept on steadily in straight without quickening.
Began well, settling on rails in midfield. Saved ground on rails turning in. Ran on steadily under pressure.
Raced keenly in last few. Remained in rear of straight. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Slowly away. Trailed the field to home bend when commenced move. Made moderate progress after wide home turn. Never nearer.
Quickly driven to lead. Held a length's advantage to home bend when joined. Headed over 150 M out. Kept on well for 2nd.
Broke well. Held rails run inside leader early. Travelled one out one back in 2nd after straightening far side. Disputed lead into home straight and gained upper hand over 150 M out.
Broke well, settling 3-wide in rear of midfield. Similar home turn. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Travelled 3-wide towards rear. Similar turning in. Ran on well down straight to be nearest at finish.
Niggled at for wide midfield position after beginning from poor draw. Took slightly closer order around home bend. Folded up quickly after straightening.
Settled at the back. Fought on steadily in straight without threatening.
Travelled in last position, came wide in the straight and made good late ground.
Was equal leader for most of the trip, weakened noticeably in the straight.
Worked forward in the early stages after racing wide and without cover to settle 1 out 1 back, hit the front near the furlong but was collared late.
Travelled with the back makers and was left racing wide and without cover after the 1200 M, never likely.
Had every chance after box seating, gave ground inside the final 100 M.
Shared front running duties for the bulk of the event faded after the 200 M. Blood in trachea. (Tendon injury morning after.)
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Was allowed to settle near the rear of the field, 1 off with cover. Failed to make any serious impression in the run home. (Raced greenly throughout.)
Raced midfield the fence. Commenced to shift away from the inside after the 600 M, switched out on straightening after being momentarily on heels, fought doggedly to the line.
Raced 2-wide, midfield. Peeled out turning for home but failed to run on.
Travelled handy to the leaders, 1 off with cover. Rolled out to be 3 deep rounding the home turn and sustained its effort to repel challengers in the run to the wire.
Taken back from wide draw and race behind midfield. 2-wide at the turn and made up ground in the straight despite being hampered 250 M out.
Jumped only fairly but was ridden along to raced among early leaders. 2-wide and 2Ls off the lead at home turn. Kept on only fairly in the straight and unable to turn up a notch.
Botched the start and raced towards the rear. Lacked a rally in the straight.
Raced along the rails behind midfield. Had a ground saving trip around the turn but ran on without threatening in the straight.

Ridden along and raced wide and without cover among leaders. 3-wide making home turn and was a length down on straightening. Kept on well in the straight but unable to pull any closer to eventual winner final stages.
Lacked early speed and raced at the rear. Trailed field into home straight and only ran past some beaten runners.
Raced among leaders until the turn. A length off the leader on straightening and failed to keep pace final 200 M.
Jumped well but was allowed to drift back. Rear section at the turn and near the back on straightening. Found nothing thereafter.
Raced among early leaders but took a sit behind them at 800 M. 2Ls back on the fence turning for home. Kept on fairly but unable to draw closer in the final stages.
Crowded shortly after start and was hard ridden to get back to midfield. Switched away from the fence making home turn and rallied in the straight to be closest at finish.
Urged forward with the whip and raced in a disputed lead. Shook off co-leaders on straightening and opened up a clear advantage. Stayed on well final stages to hold off rivals.
Raced at midfield. Stayed on same pace in the straight. (Saddle shifted.)
Always towards rear, 8Ls back in 10th at the 1200 M, marginally closer into home straight but couldn't make any impact.
3-back along rails about 4Ls behind in 5th or so until straightening, 2Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, ran on well but post came too soon for the win.
Always in rear, 9Ls back in 11th at 1300 M, 8Ls last turning for home, remained well adrift.
10Ls last early on, looped field out 3-wide no cover from the 800 M and 3Ls down in 4th entering straight under pressure, yielded ground.
3Ls back in 4th out 2-wide at 1000 M, 4Ls down in 6th off last turn, kept on fairly well but ran out of ground and missed a place.
Box-seated in 3rd on fence about 2Ls behind pace until home straight, 1L down in 2nd at 200 M, just got up inside final strides.
Awkward break, midfield about 4Ls off pace at 1000 M, 5Ls back off final turn, found zero under pressure and faded out.
Led by 1L on fence 1300 M out, set a steady pace throughout, tried to kick clear at top of home straight, headed and tipped out of quinella final 30 M.
Lackluster effort, 6Ls behind in 8th at 1200 M, 3-wide with cover from the 600 M, always at least 4Ls from the front in the home straight. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Slowly away, mid-division on fence 5Ls back until home straight, one-paced thereafter, tight for room late, would not have placed anyway.
5-back along rails 6Ls from the speed in 9th early on, one from rear turning for home, never threatened.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
4-back on rails about 5Ls behind speed in 7th at 1000 M, shuffled back to 10th into homestretch, made some good late ground, never nearer.
Nice position on rails in 4th about 4Ls from early pace, same margin behind but hard ridden turning for home, gave ground.
Box-seated in 3rd at 1000 M, 2Ls back in 4th off final bend, had his chance to place but lacked the dash.
9Ls last 1000 M out, circled the field 3-wide no cover from 600 M to lead at top of home straight, grabbed by quinella pair in final strides.
8Ls adrift in 11th early on, 6Ls last and widest into home straight, stayed on very strongly to get up right on the wire.
On the rails 7Ls down in 9th at 1000 M, shuffled back to second last turning for home, ran on well late, nearest at finish.
Awkward break, 8Ls back in 10th out 2-wide at 1000 M, 5Ls down in 9th entering straight, stayed there.
5Ls back in 6th at 1000 M, ridden along to remain in touch off last bend, dropped out tamely.
4Ls back in 5th out 2-wide at 1100 M, closer on straightening, very disappointing finish and eased late.
Led by 1L from 1000 M, headed just before the turn for home and one-paced on the run-in.
2-wide and 1L back in 2nd at 1100 M, 1L back in 3rd swinging for home, weakened rapidly and no excuses.
6Ls behind speed in 8th out 2-wide at 1000 M, headway from the 500 M, ran on well in the straight but missed the win in last bound.
Pushed early to keep up with the field at back, 5-1/2Ls off the leader along the fence, harmed by the slow pace, dashed well last 200 M.
Settled just behind the leader, 2Ls off the slow pace 2-wide, dropped off quickly 500 M.
Began best, eased to sit in midfield 2-wide, 4Ls off the leader, not suited by the slow tempo, swept 3-wide at home bend, just held ground in straight.
At rear, 7-1/2Ls off the leader on the rails, hard ridden from 800 M, lacked response until 200 M, closed the race off strongly despite not suited by the slow pace.
Eased to sit about midfield along the fence, travelled nicely 4Ls off the leader, not suited by the slow tempo, just held ground in final stages.
Pushed early but lacked speed, then settled behind the pace group, trapped 3-wide, moved forward 1300 M as the pace steadied and took rail and led by 1L, dominated in the rest of trip.
Eased to sit about midfield, raced keenly, progressed around the field from 1000 M, 2-1/2Ls off the leader 3-wide, harmed by the slow pace and lost too much ground on bends, out of fuel 400 M.
Hard ridden to take the rail and lead and clocked slow sectionals, pressured from 1200 M, took seat just off the leader 2-wide, faded quickly in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)

Very slow away, pushed to gain a midfield spot, 4-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, picked up 600 M and swept 4-wide to make early move, dashed strongly 300 M to grab a close 2nd despite harmed by the slow pace.
Eased back, 2 to 3-wide, harmed by the slow pace, never competitive.
Hard ridden to occupy the box seat, benefited by the slow pace and the rail-run, however just held ground in last quarter to finish 3rd.
Eased to rear, 6-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, harmed by the slow pace, swept 4 to 5-wide at home bend and lost too much ground, showed little dash in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield briefly. Soon shifted back towards rear. Made no impression in straight.
Raced wide without cover in midfield. Did nothing in straight.
Slow out from widest draw. Travelled wide in last few. Never seen with a chance.
Began well. Ridden to take up running. Held 1L advantage far side. Similar home turn. Kept on well to win unchallenged.
Close up early, settling in midfield. Badly tightened over 200 M out. Never recovered. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Broke well from wide draw. Remained wide in prominent position, settling a 3L 4th with cover far side. Ran home one-paced. No extra near finish.
Settled at the back. Trailed the field into straight. Ran on past beaten horses down centre of the track. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Began fairly, settling in rear of field. Made up good ground in straight without threatening.
Broke well, settling on rails in midfield. Fought on steadily without quickening.
Broke well. Settled one back on rails in 3rd to straight. Slightly baulked early straight. Unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Settled towards rear. Baulked for a run early in straight. Forced his way out passing 300 M causing interference. Ran home strongly late.
Began well from poor draw. Travelled one-out-one-back in 2nd. Similar turning in. Failed to quicken under pressure in straight to threaten.
Reasonable jump, assumed a midfield role, had an easy time throughout, improved on bend, made good ground down centre for 3rd.
Moderate jump, posted 3-wide 5-6Ls back, had cover but did work throughout, struggling turning and dropped out.
Restrained, raced at rear on rails, not aided by slow tempo, took inside runs on bend, held up on bend, closed off well when clear.
Began well, went to front as usual, set an average speed in front, kicked 1L clear on bend, lost advantage at 150 M, faded thereafter.
Average jump, raced well back on rails 5Ls away, not asked in mid-section, still well back and held up turning, made many lengths late to be not far away on line.
Well away, unable to slot in and raced 3-wide without cover, had a hard run, dropped out in straight.
Away well, took a prominent spot outside leader, had an easy time throughout, 1L down on turning, went to leader at 150 M and rolled away, held on well late.
Began well, raced on leaders back, used little in run, still 2Ls down on turning, kept on nicely on inside to make frame.
Slowly away, raced 3-4Ls back on fence, had a soft run in mid-section, kept to inside and held ground well to be on heels of pacegetters.
Standard jump, raced 1 out 1 back 3Ls back, no excuses in run, same margin down turning, kept giving to be nearest on line.
Restrained to race towards rear, ended up 6Ls back in running line, not helped by slow pace, well back turning. (Tactic questioned.)
Restrained early, overraced 5Ls back in running line, still well back on turning, made no real ground in straight. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Fair start. In rear when minor interference coming out of far side. Dropped to last home bend. Made no impression in straight.
Began well. Contested early lead, settling just off the pace outside leader. Hit front entering straight but worn down 200 M out. Fought on under pressure for 2nd.
Began fairly. Soon settled in rear. Made no impression in straight.
Began well from wide draw of small field. Gradually taken back to race 2-wide in 4th some 3Ls off the pace. Soon came to challenge upon straightening and asserted over 200 M out. Hung on well.
On rails amongst leaders. Ridden to take up running 200 M after the start, holding about a length's advantage around home bend. Gradually worn down into straight. No extra inside final 200 M.
Tardy start. Soon recovered to 2L 3rd approaching home bend. Similar turning in when switched out to challenge. Just kept on steadily under pressure without quickening.
Enjoyed the run of the race on the back of the leader, ran out of condition over the final stages.
Raced 3 back, 2-wide with cover, failed to quicken at the business end.
Bounded in the air and lost ground, travelling about 4 back the fence. Failed to close off.

Travelled towards the rear of the field, 4 back, 2 deep without cover. Commenced to improve 3-wide approaching the home turn and although raced somewhat greenly in the straight managed to finish strongly for convincing win.
Worked forward to cross and lead after the 900 M. Was found wanting when it came to the latter stages of the event.
Raced keenly in the early stages, 3 back on the rails. Weakened noticeably in the run to the line.
Parked in 3rd position, 1 off. Fought soundly to the line after having a nice run in transit.
From the outside barrier settled in last position. Briefly held up on straightening, worked to the post fairly without threatening.
Raced 3-wide at midfield. Kept on well in the straight but unable to threaten winner.
Soon in rear section. Checked 500 M out and was near the back on straightening. Only ran past tired runners in the straight.
Botched the start, lost ground and raced at the rear. Trailed field into the home straight and made up some late ground over beaten runners.
Raced behind the leader. A length off on straightening and ran down early leader 300 M out. Opened up a clear advantage in the final stages and held a comfortable margin to the line.
Botched the start and raced towards the rear. Took a wide turn home. Rallied in the final stages and made up some late ground.
Niggled along early and raced close to the pace. Checked at 800 M. 2-back on the fence turning in. Kept on well but unable to pull closer final stages.
Settled in midfield. Steadied at 800 M and dropped to rear section making home turn. Unable to quicken in the straight and weakened final stages.
Jumped well and raced among leaders. Allowed to drift back after 1000 M but never worse than midfield. 2-wide and 2Ls off the lead turning for home but weakened shortly after straightening.
Ridden along to take the lead. A length in front heading into the home straight but was headed 300 M out. Faded thereafter.
Raced 2-wide at midfield. Steadied at 800 M and lost a bit of ground. Switched out rounding home turn and ran on only fairly in the straight.
4Ls off speed in 10th at 1000 M when 3-wide but with cover and similar taking final bend, made no impact.
Midfield about 3Ls from the speed until home straight, looked held at the furlong pole and broke down very badly soon after.
Crowded at start but recovered to race prominently, wide early but sent on to be 2-wide and 1L back in 2nd at 600 M, very weak in home straight.
Enjoyed the run of the race in 4th about 2Ls from the lead until the home straight, lacked the acceleration to capitalize on his easy passage.
With cover in midfield about 4Ls from speed until home straight, tight for room until the 300 M, found enough to lead at the 50 M, driven out.
Disputed early tempo on the rails, clear by 1L from 1000 M to home turn, headed at the furlong pole and one-paced in conclusion.
3-back on fence about 4Ls down in midfield at halfway, rushed along to be closer off last turn and led 200 M out, grabbed by quinella pair final 50 M.
2-wide and 7Ls last at 1000 M, still last and hanging when 5-wide (widest of all) off home bend, always held.
Pressed forward, 1L back in 3rd at the 1000 M but ridden along to remain in striking range turning in, fizzled out final furlong.
In rear about 7Ls behind early pace, still rearward at home turn, quickened up well to hold every chance 100 M out, outpaced final stages.
Slowest away, 6Ls back in 12th through initial stages, still in rear on straightening, tame finish.
Slow to muster early zip, 5Ls back worse than midfield in middle stages, mediocre finish and posed little threat.
3-wide but with cover in 5th or 6th around 2Ls from the speed until final turn, on terms with every chance at 200 M, lacked the follow-through.
Close enough in mid-division but trapped 3 and 4-wide throughout, 3Ls down making last bend, steadily yielded ground.

Quietly ridden rearward and at least 7Ls from the pace through to home straight, made some minor late ground but always in second half of field.
Keen when 3-wide no cover early, 1L back in 2nd at 800 M, retreated before final bend, eased down a long way out, unacceptable performance.
Unable to muster any early dash, 6Ls behind leader in 9th at 1000 M, came under pressure on the circle, beaten at the top of home straight.
Went back to 9Ls last from widest gate, one from rear but still well adrift into home straight, never a factor.
3-wide but with cover in 8th about 5Ls back at 1000 M, further behind and struggling making final turn, offered little in response.
Trapped 3-wide no cover throughout, around midfield about 3Ls or so from the pace until straightening, paid penalty for extra work in final furlong.
4-back on fence 6Ls from speed at 1000 M, briefly without clear running at top of home straight, over 2Ls behind winner at 200 M, kept on well, just failed.
Box-seated in 4th about 2Ls back on fence at 1000 M, in 2nd at top of home straight, led 100 M out, tired late and barely clung on for the win.
3-back on fence in midfield about 4Ls down at 1000 M, under pressure to improve 600 M out, kept on at the same pace, nearest at finish.
Worse than midfield about 6Ls behind early tempo and a little further behind into home straight, stayed on fairly well final 300 M, never nearer.
Over-raced early when about 2Ls or so back in 3rd or 4th at 1000 M, same position but 3Ls down off last turn, one-paced late and narrowly held 3rd.
Pressed on from wide gate to lead by 2Ls on fence at 1000 M, 2Ls to the good off home bend but headed 100 M out and just missed a place.
3Ls down in 6th out 2-wide at halfway, shuffled a little further back off last turn, rallied well final 200 M and came to close to the money.
Worse than midfield, 5Ls off the leader 2-wide, harmed by the slow pace, just ran on okay in straight, totally held up behind weakening runners 200 M. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Hard ridden early to occupy a more forward spot, 4-1/2Ls off the leader 3-wide, dashed strongly 250 M to finish 3rd despite harmed by the slow pace.
Pushed to take the rail and led by 1L at advantageous slow early sectionals, hung on until 250 M weakened.
Awkward away, worse than midfield along the fence, 5Ls off the leader, harmed by the slow tempo, ran on okay in final stages.
Hard ridden to take a prominent spot, 1L off the leader 2-wide, helped by the slow pace, ran on until 200 M weakened.
At rear, 7-1/2Ls off the leader on the rails, harmed by the slow pace, demonstrated its usual strong finishing efforts 200 M.
Eased back, 5-1/2Ls behind the leader, trapped 4-wide throughout and lost too much ground, harmed by the slow pace, little dash in straight but without threats.
Pushed forward to secure the box seat, benefited by the slow early sectionals, closed the race off strongly, dominated 200 M.
Very slow away, raced 4-wide throughout and harmed by the slow pace, never competitive at rear and tailed out.
Hard ridden early but never muster speed, 6Ls off the leader 3-wide at back, not suited by the slow tempo, no progress.
Pushed early, 3-1/2Ls behind the slow pace 3-wide, dashed well 300 M to grab 2nd.
Dipped start, hard ridden to obtain a midfield spot along the rails, 3-1/2Ls off the leader, momentarily held up 400 M, showed little dash 150 M despite not suited by the slow pace.
Eased to sit about midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, not suited by the slow tempo, hard ridden from 600 M but never responded, flattened 200 M.
Pushed forward, 2-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, favoured by the slow early tempo, however just held ground in final stages.
Raced wide from poor draw. Gradually took up running and crossed to rails 1200 M out. Led to 400 M. Folded up quickly.
Broke well. Settled wide just worse than midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Raced wide in midfield. Made moderate headway early in straight before finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Not far off in better than midfield position. Soon weakened after straightening.
Settled on rails in midfield. Baulked for a run early in straight and lost position. Switched off rails passing 300 M but could only produced moderate impression.
In front early, settling one-back on rails. In box-seat position turning in. Kept on before tightened and lost position 200 M out. Never recovered. (Tactic questioned.)
Settled in midfield. Tightened between and behind runners early in straight. Ran home one-paced inside 200 M. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Wide in prominent position. Settled one-out-one-back approaching home bend. Hit front turning in but unable to sustain effort and overhauled over 150 M out.
Settled behind midfield. In last few rounding home bend. Obtained split over 300 M out. Responded well to assert authority over 150 M out.
Travelled just behind midfield. Switched in for a run upon straightening. Ran on between runners to just fail to peg back winner.
Began with rest. Soon taken to rear with rails run. Struggled from 600 M.
Raced wide from poor draw in prominent position. 3-wide within 2Ls of pace in 4th rounding home bend. Closer order turning in. Kept on under pressure before swamped inside 200 M.
Waited with. Shifted out onto centre of straight turning in. Ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Began fairly. Restrained to race wide in rear of field. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Broke well from poor draw. Remained mainly 3-wide in prominent 4th to straight. Slightly bumped and became 5th when straightening. Fought on steadily without threatening.
Niggled at in midfield early. Lost position coming out of back straight. Dropped to last upon straightening.
Slightly slow out. Settled in midfield on rails. Commenced move turning in and jostled with a runner when straightening. Only produced moderate effort under pressure without quickening.
Raced wide in last few. Kept on past well beaten horses closing stages.
Broke well. Settled one-back on rails in 3rd. Hit front shortly after straightening. Kept runners-up at bay throughout closing stages.
Raced wide in rear of midfield. Faded gradually in straight.
Began well, settling in midfield. Steadied when awkwardly placed behind runners passing 600 M. Obtained clear passage passing 400 M. Ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Among leaders and in front briefly. Gave up lead on rails coming out of back straight before moving up to join leaders 2-wide home bend. Soon weakened after straightening.
Soon in rear and remained same throughout. Steadied 800 M out but of no consequence.
Began fairly. Took up running 1000 M out and obtained rails run coming onto home bend. Led to 300 M and folded up quickly.
Trailed the field most of way until making very good late impression inside final 200 M.
Settled in last few and wide. Quickened well inside 300 M to assert authority close to home. Won cosily.
Raced wide just worse than midfield. Made steady headway under pressure early in straight but unable to sustain run passing 200 M.
Mainly in rear of midfield to straight. Only produced impression under pressure late in closing stages.
Trailed the field to straight. Made up late ground past beaten runners in the run home.
Settled on heels of leader on rails. Baulked for a run most of way in straight.
Raced wide in prominent position from poor draw. Travelled outside leader rounding home bend disputing lead early in straight. Overhauled inside final 200 M.
Niggled at early, travelling about 2Ls off the pace in 4th or 5th. Similar turning in but ran home one-paced. (Tactic questioned.)
Soon took up running and led until joined into straight. Gradually weakened out of contention over 200 M out.
Settled in midfield on rails. Under pressure when slightly worse turning in. Failed to quicken in straight.
Broke well. Settled wide in 5th within 3Ls of pace. Took closer order around home bend to be close up 3rd 3-wide turning in. Hit front inside 200 M only to be worn down late.
Always well back. Struggled in straight.
Broke well from poor draw, racing wide with leaders early. Settled one-out-one-back coming out of back straight. Failed to respond under pressure after straightening.
Settled 2-wide in 4th mainly 2Ls off the speed. Lost position to about 3Ls off in 6th when straightening. Fought on dourly for distant 3rd.
Began moderately. Gradually picked up to prominent position and lead 1200 M out. Held running to 300 M when swooped by winner. Hung on under pressure to just lose a placing late.
Settled in forward of midfield. One-paced in straight.

Ridden to muster pace to the front but looking for cover. Ceded advantage to travel one-back on rails approaching home bend. Still in box-seat position turning in and stuck behind runners until 200 M. One-paced closing stages.
Settled in rear. Ran on stoutly down straight to be nearest at finish.
Always in last few. Never nearer.
Raced 3-wide towards rear. Soon came to challenge turning in. Ran on quite well under pressure down centre of straight to reach 2nd late.
Settled 3-wide in midfield without cover. Kept on early in straight before fading under pressure inside final 300 M.
Slightly slow out but soon raced in slightly worse than midfield. Shifted widest for a clear run turning in. Cantered to lead inside 300 M. Won easily.
Settled at back from widest draw. Never on terms.
3-back on fence 5Ls off the speed at the 800 M and edged a little closer at final turn, ran on okay without troubling the principals.
Slowest away, always last, 8Ls back at 800 M and became further detached in the straight, poor run.
Always rearward, 7Ls or 8Ls behind until entrance to homestretch, always chasing the majority of the field.
4Ls back in 5th at the 800 M and in the same position on straightening, outpaced and yielded ground final 200 M while hanging out.
2-wide and 5Ls behind early speed, similar margin back in 9th into final 400 M, always held.
2 and 3-wide with cover 5Ls off early pace, unleashed a strong challenge from top of stretch and upsides with every chance 50 M out, no extra.
Led by 1L on fence at 1000 M, enjoyed a soft lead and still clear taking final bend, headed 200 M out and surrendered tamely late. (Questioned for poor performance.)
3-wide no cover throughout, midfield early on but advanced to be 3Ls down in 5th swinging for home, tired inside final furlong.
About 4Ls back in 4th on fence initially, closer turning in and briefly led 150 M out, no answer to winner's late swoop but held 2nd gamely.
Between 2Ls and 3Ls from the speed in 3rd through to the home straight, 1L down and with definite place prospects at 200 M, couldn't sustain the run.
Slow away, 4-back on rails towards rear at least 6Ls from the lead until straightening, made a little headway but posed no great danger.
6Ls or 7Ls back in 11th early and still with plenty of ground to make up entering straight, finished very strongly to lead inside final 30 M.
2-wide and 1L back in 2nd at 1000 M and much the same off last corner, briefly led 200 M out but faded out of the placed runners inside final 50 M.
Well enough to begin, lobbed a nice trail 1 out 1 back, no excuses in run, improved 3-wide on turning, was in 3 way battle for length of straight only going down narrowly in finish.
No real pace, ended up 5Ls back on rails in rear division, pace against in mid-section, well back on bend, made limited progress in straight.
Began only fairly, unable to slot in, took a midfield spot early, pressed on racing 3-wide without cover outside of leaders, did it hard to bend, dropped out on straightening.
Showed speed, went on to take up running, set a very slow pace to suit, had all favours to bend, shaded by outside horse turning in, stuck to task and went down in 3 way go.
Even jump, took a midfield break racing 3Ls back in 2-wide line, not helped by speed and closed 3-wide with cover on circle, made a 4-wide run on turning, peaked at 200 M and just plugged thereafter.

Away nicely, took a spot on leaders back, aided by speed raced too keenly throughout, still there on bend, struggling on turning, soon under pressure on straightening and was one-paced late.
Average getaway, settled well back 5-6Ls back in 3-wide line, disadvantaged by tempo, well back and wide on bend, closed hard down outside making many lengths to be best of rest.

Travelled 1 out 1 back, then after the 600 M raced 3 deep. Kept up workload right to the post to score by a narrow margin.
Settled just behind midfield, 2 deep with cover. Worked steadily early in the straight and for a considerable distance after the 200 M had difficulty obtaining clear running.
Raced in midfield on the fence, didn't quicken and finished off at one pace.
Raced in last position, failed to pass another runner.
Slowly away then throughout the race travelled wide and without cover, in a midfield position. Making the turn after the 600 M hung out badly and in the Straight gave ground. To trial.

Didn't go forward from barrier rise and was allowed to drift back to find a position with cover. Travelled 3-wide for most of the trip and raced flat at the business end. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began awkwardly then ridden along to hold the fence and worked forward to lead. Was collared near the furlong, fought on however faded in the run to the line.
Camped on the back of the leader, stayed to the inside in the straight and finished off soundly.
Raced outside the leader and battled well over the final stages to be in a blanket finish.
Raced 2-wide, midfield with cover. No turn of foot in the straight and went to the post without making ground on the principals.
From a wide gate settled around 3rd last. Shifted out slightly after turning for home and ran on strongly.
Ridden along early but lacked speed to keep up with leaders. Gradually slipped back to race behind midfield in back straight. 5Ls down making home turn and made up a bit of ground in the straight.
Raced alongside the leader for majority of the race. Kept on well in the straight for a minor placing.
Lacked early speed and raced at the rear. Held up at home turn and near last on straightening. Closed the race off with a nice rally.
Raced in a prominent spot behind the leader. Kept on fairly in the home straight but unable to turn up a notch.
Raced 2-wide at midfield. Kept on fairly in the straight to make the frame.
Jumped fairly from wide draw. Allowed to drift back and raced 3-wide without cover behind midfield. Near last on straightening and found nothing in the straight.
Raced in the lead for the majority of the race. Fought hard to maintain advantage in the home straight but was caught by winner near the winning post.
Raced along the rails at midfield. Entered home straight with a 2Ls deficit. Kept on well and ran down rival near the post for the win.
Hard ridden out of the gates and raced among leaders. Raced 2-wide behind the leaders back straight. Ridden along to keep pace home turn and faded shortly after straightening.
Taken back from wide draw and raced behind midfield. Kept on steadily and made up some ground in the straight.
Raced among leaders early. Took a sit and raced 3-wide at midfield back straight. Kept on same pace in the home straight.
Lacked early speed and raced at the rear. Made a ground saving trip at home turn and steadily made up ground in the straight.
3-back on fence about 3Ls down in 6th early on and similar until home straight, kept on all right for 2nd but never likely to reel in the winner.
4-wide without cover through first 300 M, mostly 3-wide down back straight, 5Ls down in 8th off last turn and no impact made.
