Within 1L or 2Ls of the pace in 2nd or 3rd until home straight, found just enough to hang on for a place.
4-back on the fence 5Ls back in 9th initially and 7th taking last turn, one-paced when more was required.
2-wide when 3Ls back in 5th at 600 M and in a similar position making final turn, very weak final stages and eased close home.
Caught 3-wide no cover throughout, 3Ls back in 4th early but disputing lead 550 M out, very weak from top of home straight and faded right out.
Held up in rear about 7Ls back at 800 M and not much closer and widest off last turn, never in touch and eased late.

Good speed to cross from gate 8 to lead by 1L at the 700 M and same margin clear turning in, always in command in the closing stages.
Vied for early advantage on the fence, slotted into a trailing position in 2nd or 3rd about 1L back at 800 M, led again 300 M out and pulled away decisively.
7Ls back out 2-wide in 8th at 1200 M, ridden along to be 4Ls down in 6th entering stretch, very flat finish, however.
One from rear about 9Ls off pace out 2-wide at 1200 M, 5Ls back in 8th entering straight, stayed on pretty well for 3rd.
Disputed early tempo out 2-wide before leading by 1L from 800 M to home straight, headed at the 300 M and fizzled out rapidly.
Squeezed out shortly after start, 7Ls back in 9th on fence at 1000 M and not in a good position at final bend, no impression.

Box-seated 2Ls back on rails in 4th at the 1300 M, 3Ls back in 5th on fence off last bend, very tame finish given his cushy passage.

Taken back to race 10Ls last at 1200 M and still last but 7Ls back turning for home, ran on okay past spent rivals late on for 4th, never nearer.
2Ls back in 4th out 2-wide from 1000 M to home straight, gave vain pursuit of the winner but still held a clear 2nd.

Hard ridden to obtain a midfield spot along the fence, helped by the fast pace, momentarily held up 300 M, flattened 200 M.
Always prominent, 1-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, harmed by the fast pace, ran on until 250 M weakened.
Hard ridden to take the rail and led by 1-1/2Ls, clocked fast early sectionals, soon emptied 300 M.
Eased to rear, 9Ls off the leader 2-wide, benefited by the fast pace, swept towards 4-wide and made ground around the field at home bends, closed the race off strongly 200 M.
Pressed forward and crossed to 2-wide just behind the leading group, 3Ls off the fast pace, blocked 4-2, just held ground when clear.
Hard ridden early but lacked speed, checked 1400 M, 7-1/2Ls off the leader 2 to 3-wide, suited by the fast tempo, however ran on only fairly in final stages.
Slow away, took rail at rear, 9Ls off the leader, favoured by the fast pace, lacked room in straight, made ground last 100 M.

Pushed early to hold the rails and keep up in midfield, 5-1/2Ls off the leader, benefited by the fast pace, progressed steadily 300 M to win by a narrow margin.
Pushed to occupy the box seat, not suited by the fast early sectionals, weakened 250 M.
Very slow away, crossed the rails at back, 7-1/2Ls off the leader, helped by the fast pace, progressed steadily along the fence in straight to be nearest on line.
Pushed early, only managed to take a midfield spot, 4-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, favoured by the fast tempo, made ground steadily 500 M to finish 3rd.
Little pace from outset, soon at rear 7Ls back on fence, helped by pace, still well back on bend, made limited progress but did pass a couple late.

Ordinary getaway, ended up 5-6Ls back sharing rear, aided by tempo, still well back 2-wide on bend, made many lengths between horses in straight to finish a nice 4th. (Steadied 100 M.)
Slow to begin, settled 6Ls back with last few on rails, aided by pace, not travelling well on bend, didn't make headway in straight and battled in run to line.
Standard jump, ended up 5Ls back on fence, not used in middle stages, took inside runs on bend, lacked a response on turning and struggled in run to line. (Didn't handle surface.)
Away in line but soon drifted back to race with last few, raced 3-wide with cover, still well back and pushed along turning, made some ground before run ended at 200 M.

Fair to begin, went forward in search of spot, raced untractably 3-wide outside leaders, always working without cover, under pressure rounding bend, drifted out and gradually tired in straight when workload took toll.
Well enough to begin, ended up behind pace 3Ls back in 2-wide line, had fair trip trailing speed, pushed along approaching bend, dropped out tamely lacking usual finish.
Bounced out, lead easily at a reasonable tempo with pressure from outside horses, continued to defy them on turning, kicked strongly and only lost top spot last 50 M.
Standard jump, held spot on leaders back, had ideal trail in middle stages 2-3Ls back, close enough on bend, switched on turning, gradually overhauled leader and held off a late challenge to score.
Out in line, ended up 3Ls back on fence, had a quiet time in run, travelled well on bend, took run between horses and made good impression last 200 M going down narrowly in finish.
Began well, raced outside leader on solid speed, always pressured by outside horse, kept working on bend, struggling to pick up turning and folded from 150 M.
Fair to begin, posted 3-wide early, worked forward at 1200 M to race outside of leader, had cover from mid-point, ridden along on bend, failed to lift and weakened in run to line.

Out in line, eased for a midfield trail 3Ls away in 2-wide line, travelled well despite slow pace, in behind horses on bend making a 3-wide run, held up briefly on turning in, closed well last 200 M to take 2nd late.
Away in line, took nice spot 3Ls back on fence in midfield, saved ground on rails on circle, took inside runs in straight but lacked usual finish and just held ground late.

Slow into stride, failed to muster and raced 3-wide behind midfield, disadvantaged by slow pace, moved forward 3-wide in mid-section to race outside leader, 1L back on turning, faded at 100 M when work took toll.
Out in line, settled behind midfield 4-5Ls away in running line, pace against and raced keenly, made a 4-wide run on circle, made good progress down centre to take 3rd.
Showed early pace, crossed to race outside lead early gradually shuffled back to midfield, began to struggle on bend, battled in straight before being checked at 200 M.
Standard beginning, ended up 5Ls back on fence, harmed by steady tempo, saved ground on bend, still last turning, stuck to inside and made solid progress from impossible spot to make frame.

Began well, took up running and slowed pace to suit, dictated terms 1L clear throughout, still held advantage on bend, wound up strongly turning and kicked clear, did too well in run to line scoring easily.

Out only fairly, ended up 3-wide with cover 5Ls back, pace against in mid-section, did share of work to bend, switched wide and made some ground to 150 M before tiring late.
Away well, pressed on to hold leaders back, had an ideal trip with steady sections, right there on turning, kept on evenly without quickening to be not far away in finish.
Moderate beginning, settled at rear, 5Ls back on rails, shifted ground on bend, cut back to inside and made some minor headway without looking likely.
Began in line, pushed along to race outside leader 1L back, pressured throughout by outside horse, ridden along on leaving bend, run ended at 300 M and dropped out.

Fair to begin, didn't muster early and raced at rear 8 to 9Ls back, pushed along throughout, last turning, passed a few tired runners in run to line.

Away with them, took a position 2 to 3Ls back behind pace racing 3 wide with cover, pushed along on bend, not travelling and dropped out in straight.
Slowly away and lost ground, raced detached at rear early, improved wide approaching circle, 7Ls off lead, kept improving 4 wide on bend, struggled last 300 M.
Showed speed from outset, led easily and rolled 1L clear, allowed to control race in mid-section, skipped away on turning in, kept a comfortable margin in run to line to win with something in hand.
Amongst first few to break, took up a prime position 2 to 3Ls back in running line, struggling and not comfortable on circle, didn't respond in straight.
Moderate beginning, faded back to race behind midfield 6Ls back, still well down on turning, lacked a finish and just struggled in straight.

Travelled 2-wide with cover on the back of the leaders. Never quickened in the straight but held its ground all the way to the line.
Raced behind midfield along the fence. Kept on somewhat one paced along the inside in the home stretch.

Botched the start and had to be hard ridden to make up lost ground. Raced along the rails behind midfield and was 4Ls off the lead at the turn. Never had a clear run until final 200 M. Closed off fairly and made up some late ground.
Behind the pace early and moved into the lead 1000 M out. Held a length's advantage into the home straight but was headed 200 M out. Unable to find extra to contend in the final stages.
Raced 2-wide at midfield. Kept on well in the home straight but not enough to threaten winner.
Jumped well from a wide draw and was allowed to drift back to race behind midfield. Rallied and made up ground in the straight.
Settled in rear section. Quickened and steadily made up ground after straightening. Unable to sustain effort in the closing stages.
Raced 2-wide behind the leaders early stages. 3Ls back making home turn and weakened after straightening.
Raced 3-wide with cover at midfield. Failed to quicken in the straight and weakened.

Ridden along to race behind the pace. Gradually drifted back 1000 M out and was at midfield making the turn. Lacked a response when asked turning for home and weakened in the straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Hard ridden from a wide draw and raced wide in a forward position. 2-wide and a length off the lead making the turn. Remained on same pace after straightening and weakened final stages.
Led early stages. Took a sit and raced behind the pace 1000 M out. Switched out from behind the leader on straightening and easily regained lead near 200 M. Stayed on well to take the win.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Raced 3-wide in rear section. Near last on straightening and rallied in the home straight to be closest at finish.
3-wide without cover at midfield. 3Ls behind the leader turning for home and weakened thereafter.
Lacked early speed and raced towards the rear. Only ran past beaten runners in the straight.
Unbalanced very early on and 10Ls last at 1100 M, not at all helped by slow pace and never in the hunt.
2Ls back in 2nd on fence at 1100 M, pressed on to lead at top of home straight, headed by the winner at 200 M, tired late and just held onto a place.
Pressed on out wide to lead by 2Ls on fence at 1100 M, set a steady pace before being headed at top of home straight, one-paced late on.
Slowly away, 3-wide with cover when 6Ls back in 8th at 1000 M, a little closer turning in and at the 200 M, very one-paced in the end.
Slow to muster early pace, 7Ls adrift in 9th at 1000 M, harmed by slow pace, never likely to get any closer than midfield.
Over-raced early, 7Ls behind speed in 10th at 1000 M, tight for room off final bend, couldn't edge across to stands' rail as usual but well held anyway.
5Ls back on rails in 6th at 1100 M, 3Ls down into straight, darted inside to challenge 200 M out, ran on well but couldn't quite grab the winner.
Waited with, 8Ls behind pace in 12th at 1000 M, not in any way assisted by the slow tempo, made some late ground through beaten rivals in the straight.
Away well, handily placed on the fence no worse than 3rd or 4th, picked up well enough to lead 200 M out, pushed out to score narrowly.
3-wide no cover throughout, 5Ls back in 7th at 1000 M and much the same turning in, always well held.
Not remotely competitive, always one from rear and at least 7Ls from the pace.
2-wide and 5Ls off pace in 5th at 1100 M, 3Ls back in 6th off final turn, found zero under pressure and eased late, very tame finish.
2-wide and 3Ls down in 3rd at 1100 M, just 2Ls behind off final turn, outpaced by the winner thereafter, also had his chance to place.
Keen early on, posted out 4-wide no cover for most of backstretch, worse than midfield at least 5Ls from the speed throughout.
4Ls back in 7th out 2-wide at 1000 M, improved to a more threatening position into straight, nothing there when asked to pick up, eased late.
Box-seated in 4th about 2Ls behind early pace on fence and still right there entering homestretch, failed to find another gear, weakened late.
2Ls back in 5th at 1000 M, steadily lost this position on the circle, very poor ending, unacceptable.
On fence but worse than midfield 9Ls behind pace at 1200 M, 6Ls back off last bend, always chasing at least half the field.
Trapped 3-wide no cover throughout, between 1L and 2Ls back in 3rd from 1200 M to home turn, yielded ground after extra work in final 300 M.
Hard ridden to lead by 1L from 1400 M to home turn, headed 200 M out and gradually slipped out of the money.
9Ls off pace in 12th at 1000 M, improved to be 4Ls down off final turn and kept on to briefly lead 200 M out, couldn't sustain the bid but held a place.
4-back along rails, 7Ls adrift in 9th at 1000 M, progressed on the circle and poked through to lead 150 M out towards inner, driven out to prevail.
6Ls back in 8th out 2-wide at 1000 M, 4Ls back but briefly held up at top of home straight, stayed on well for 2nd without really testing the winner.
Devoid of early pace, detached in rear 14Ls from the pace at 1000 M, ran on pretty well through final 600 M to take an unlikely 4th, never nearer.
Slow to muster early pace, one from rear about 12Ls last at 1000 M, 5-wide off last bend, ran on okay through a few tiring rivals.
Enjoyed a soft run on fence 4Ls behind speed around midfield from backstretch to home turn, held up for a run at 200 M, didn't recover.
8Ls back in 10th out 2-wide at 1000 M, still worse than midfield about 6Ls down off last bend, retrieved a little late ground, nearest at finish.
2-wide and 1L back in 2nd at 1200 M, under pressure to retain this proximity into home straight, dropped out very quickly.
Eased back, 7-1/2Ls off the leader along the fence, harmed by the very slow pace, blocked 4-2, dashed strongly when clear.
Midfield, 5Ls off the leader 2 to 3-wide, not suited by the very slow pace, lacked turn of foot in straight.
Pushed to sit in midfield along the fence, 4Ls off the leader, not suited by the very slow tempo, dashed strongly to run 2nd, just beaten by a narrow margin.
Hard ridden to take a prominent spot, 1-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, favoured by the very slow tempo, however soon weakened 300 M.
At rear, 9-1/2Ls off the leader 2 to 4-wide, dashed well 200 M despite not suited by the very slow pace.
Midfield, trapped 3 to 4-wide and lost too much ground, 4-1/2Ls off the leader, harmed by the very slow tempo, just held ground in straight.
At back, 7-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, harmed by the very slow pace, raced flat until 200 M showed little dash.
Slowly away, pushed to obtain a midfield spot along the rails, 5-1/2Ls off the leader, blocked most straight, delivered strong finishing efforts when clear despite harmed by the very slow pace.
Hard ridden to hold the rail position inside the leader, benefited by the very slow early sectionals, closed the race off strongly to win by a neck. (Dropped whip.)
Hard ridden early, just worse than midfield, 6-1/2Ls off the leader, trapped 3 to 5-wide and lost too much ground, harmed by the very slow pace, ran on ok in straight.
At rear, 8Ls off the leader 3 to 4-wide, harmed by the very slow pace, just ran on ok in final stages.
Hard ridden to occupy the box seat, 2-1/2Ls behind the very slow pace, lacked room 400 M, no progress when clear, checked 100 M.
Hard ridden to cross in front and led by 1/2L 2-wide, enjoyed by the very slow tempo, overhauled 400 M, ran on until 200 M flattened. (Tendon injury day after race.)
Settled just behind the pace group, 3-1/2Ls off the leader 2 to 3-wide, favoured by the very slow tempo, little dash in straight.
Travelled 2-wide in midfield. Fought on steadily in straight but winner too strong.
Raced 3-wide in better than midfield in 5th. Similar turning in. Faded steadily.
Travelled in better than midfield to straight. Dropped out tamely. (Blood in trachea.)
Travelled mainly 3-wide in midfield. Briefly held up after straightening. Ran on steadily under pressure in straight without threatening.
Never far off to straight. One-paced.

Began fairly from middle draw, settling at the back. Given reminders turning in. Made significant progress from last into straight down centre of track to snatch victory late. (Questioned for improved performance.)
Settled on rails in midfield. Slightly worse in 3-back position around home bend. Did not find much room on inside throughout straight. Not tested.

Taken back from worst draw to cross to rails at start. Travelled in last few before circling field home bend. Ran on well from wide in midfield into straight to hit front 200 M out. Headed when no extra 100 M out.
Broke well from poor draw. Circled the field around stables bend to settle outside leader far side. Folded up quickly inside final 300 M.
Raced wide in midfield to straight. Folded up quickly after straightening.
Broke well. Gradually crossed to rails. Settled one back in 3rd far side. Held up in box seat early in straight and steadied 300 M out. One-paced closing stages.
Settled just worse than midfield. Switched wide for a run upon straightening but could only run home one-paced.
Never on terms.
Began moderately in middle draw. Gradually took up running around stables bend and led to 200 M. No extra.
Slow into stride, regathered to drive up and race 4 to 5Ls back in midfield to midpoint, pushed along at 400 M, lacked a dash and faded when fitness took toll.
Ordinary jump, raced at rear 7 to 8Ls away, still well back at midpoint, made plenty of progress last 400 M closing nicely from impossible spot.
Well enough away, raced solo along inside rail, about 4 to 5Ls from lead by midpoint, clearly not best going and never factored last 400 M.
Standard getaway, raced at tail well back in centre of course, hard ridden from midpoint, showed nothing and beaten a long way.
Moderate beginning, raced well back 6Ls away on outside rail, gradually progressed to 400 M, kept closing despite steadied at 200 M, only warmed up late.
No pace from gates, ended up at rear 8 or more lengths back, never in a position to factor, warmed up late and made solid progress last 300 M. Better over longer.
Showed usual speed, shared lead towards outside rail, raced on an even pace throughout, took clear lead at 300 M, held on to 200 M but lacked finish of first two, stayed on.
Away fairly, raced in midfield, eased out at midpoint, bled both nostrils.
Away nicely, sat behind pace 3Ls back in midfield on outside rails, stuck to task when they sprinted and finished nicely on heels of placegetters.
Out in line, sat 3 to 4Ls back in middle of pack, shifted to middle to make run at 300 M, accelerated nicely and closed race off well final furlong to score with authority.
Began well, raced close to front 1 to 2Ls back a few horses from outside, always prominent, couldn't sprint with winner but kept on nicely to hold 2nd.
Out with rest, ended up settling 4Ls back in midfield, had an even run to midpoint, progressed well from 300 M doing best work late to make frame, nice debut.
Ordinary jump, raced behind midfield, 6Ls away, never really comfortable, struggled from 400 M and made no impression. (See Racing Incidents.)
Fast into stride, shared lead on stand side rail, kept pace genuine to 400 M, began to struggle and soon dropped out.
Raced wide in prominent position without cover far side. Similar home turn. Gradually weakened.
Made running, going 1L clear rounding home bend. Soon narrowly headed after straightening. Fought on to hold place but unable to sustain effort inside final 200 M.
Settled on rails in midfield. Took closer order coming out of back straight, tracking leader around home bend. Quickened to hit front passing 200 M and soon drew clear.
Behind midfield most of way. One-paced under pressure in straight.
Began with the rest and midfield early. Soon dropped to the rear and remained well back. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M.
Trailed the field throughout virtually.
Raced 3-wide in midfield to straight. Faded under pressure.
Raced wide in midfield. Ran on gamely under pressure down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Raced wide without cover behind midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Travelled in better than midfield. Disputed 5th within 3Ls of pace turning in. Soon dropped out.
Settled 2-wide in midfield after beginning from high draw. No clear run early in straight before making moderate impression inside final 300 M.
Broke well from high draw, gradually crossing to 2-wide outside leader. Hit front narrowly under pressure upon straightening only to be swamped inside 200 M.
Towards rear early. Picked up along rails to forward of midfield approaching home bend. Just 2-back on rails turning in. Fought on steadily for a placing but without threatening.
Settled in rear from poor draw. Ran past well beaten horses closing stages.
Showed more initiative than usual, raced 4Ls back in midfield, keen in mid-section, 3Ls down but ridden along at 400 M, lacked usual finish and battled in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Reasonable jumjp, slotted in to race behind leader, had good trip throughout, tracked leader on bend, lacked pickup when they sprinted but held on nicely late.
Fair to begin, took a position 5Ls back in running line behind midfield, had an even run with pace on, well back turning, made solid progress between horses to be nearest on line.
No early pace, settled 7Ls back at rear in running line, helped by pace but faced a task with track condition, still last turning, switched out but only passed tired runners late.
Fair to jump, ended up 3Ls back on rails, enjoyed a quiet trip to bend, lacked extra gear in straight and just kept on at same pace in run to line.
Standard getaway, ended up 7Ls back sharing rear on rails, had pace to suit but conditions against, same margin down turning, struggled to clash and simply battled in run to line.
Showed expected speed to be prominent early, shaded inside horse throughout in lead, still there on bend, niggled along turning, lacked usual tenacity and weakened quickly, just battled in straight.
Out in line, pressed on in search of a prominent spot, raced 3 wide without cover outside leaders, did it tough to bend, soon under pressure and gradually faded out in straight.
Fast away, took up running and set a good pace with pressure from outside horse, kicked through to retain lead by 500 M, dashed sharply at 400 M, held an advantage in run to line to win with ease.
Away in line, ended up 3 wide in midfield 4Ls back, had cover to bend, improved 4 wide on turning, made gradual headway to 200 M but just couldn't peg back margin thereafter.

Restrained for cover from a wide alley, raced behind midfield 3 wide with cover 5Ls back, travelled keenly in run, improved wide on turning in, made progress to 300 M before run ended (didn't handle conditions).
Taken back from an awkward alley raced 5 to 6Ls back in running line, aided by pace, still had job to do turning, struggled in finish making no real impression.
Restrained from gates, raced further away than usual, back with last few racing 3 wide with cover, set a task in conditions, still well down turning, offered nothing in run home.
Amongst first to hit ground, ended up with ideal spot 1 out 1 back, had nice run to bend despite reasonable tempo, angled out on turning, couldn't match dash of winner but kept giving all the same.
No early pace, 6Ls behind in 10th at 1000 M, edged closer turning in when briefly without clear running, stayed on well, just missed 2nd.
Slowly away, 8Ls back in 12th at the 1000 M and still well back and widest (5-wide) into last turn, never likely to play a significant role.
Went back from wide gate, 9Ls off pace when one from rear at 800 M, in 10th about 5Ls behind off last bend, closer at 200 M but no extra late on.
No early pace, 3-wide with cover about 6Ls behind early pace, 11th turning for home, made some minor late ground without threatening principals.
Led by 1L out 2-wide at 1000 M, crossed to fence 800 M and still 1L clear off last turn, headed 300 M out and yielded ground.
Went back to 11Ls last from widest gate, still struggling in rear turning for home, offered very little.
Box-seated in 2nd or 3rd just 1L or so behind the speed until home straight, led 300 M out, grabbed by winner 50 M out and just held 2nd.
On fence 7Ls off pace in 11th at 1000 M when ridden along and 6Ls down into home straight, one-paced in the finish.
Slowly away, on fence 4Ls behind speed at 1000 M, 2Ls back in 4th at top of straight, 1L back in 3rd at 200 M but his run soon peaked.
5Ls off pace in midfield out 2-wide at 1000 M and similarly placed into final stretch, never likely to get much closer.
In 5th between 3Ls and 4Ls from the speed out 2-wide through to home straight, under pressure turning in, one-paced when it mattered.
Caught 3 and 4-wide no cover throughout, 2Ls back in 4th at halfway and further behind entering home straight, weakened final 200 M.
3-wide with cover around midfield and 3Ls or 4Ls behind pace until home straight, quickened up well down centre of track to lead 50 M out, readily. (Lame next day.)
1L back in 3rd at 1000 M, 2Ls down in 3rd off last bend, given every chance to at least place but lacked the acceleration.
Broke well from middle draw. Chased leader on the wet track to straight. Soon weakened.
Broke well and driven to lead. Held half a length advantage earlier, extending to a length home bend. Hung on well to keep runner-up at bay throughout straight on the very wet track.
Began well from widest draw. Settled 3-wide without cover in 3rd or 4th within 2Ls of pace on the wet track. Similar turning in. No extra inside final 200 M.
Broke fairly. Settled on rails in 3rd or 4th on heels of leader. Fought on nicely over the wet track the length of straight but failed to peg winner back throughout.
Lacked early speed in heavy rain. Took closer order 3-wide coming off Rock. Widest in midfield around home bend. Folded up quickly in straight.
Slow out. Driven to hold rails run in rear of midfield. Gave ground quickly around home bend. Made no impression on the wet track at the finish.
Settled in midfield on the wet course. Weakened in straight.
Broke well from high draw. Settled outside leader. Became one-back around around bend and similar into straight. Gave ground noticeably after straightening on the very wet surface.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Began fairly. Niggled along but failed to muster, settling just better than midfield within 3Ls of pace on the wet track. Made no impression in the straight.
From a wide gate was taken back early then soon improved to settle on the back of the front division. Was in front at the 200 M, but was collard soon after.
Parked outside the leader. Had every chance.
Led along the fence. Was quickly overhauled in the early part of the straight.
Raced midfield but was wide and without cover for most of the trip, tired quickly in the straight.
Bounded in the air at the start and lost ground settling 3rd last. Improved strongly mid race and looked the likely winner approaching the furlong before ending its run over the concluding stages.
Camped midfield the fence. Was under pressure a long way from home.
Raced near the rear of the field, began a sustained run passing the 600 and finished over the top of its rivals down the outside in the straight to land the prize.
Raced handy to the front runners but wide and without cover, giving ground quickly after the 400 M.
Raced 3-wide and without cover just off the leaders, struggled turning for home.
Travelled in 2nd last position, never a factor.
Travelled on the fence behind the leader. Peeled off turning for home but failed to close off.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Raced behind midfield. Ran on fairly in the straight for a distant 4th.
Raced 3-wide at midfield. 4 to 5Ls off in 4th place turning for home. Kept on steadily for a minor placing.
Ridden along from a wide draw and was 3-wide in a forward position 800 M out. 3Ls off the lead in 3rd place making home turn and remained on same pace in the straight.
Soon in the lead. Held a length's advantage final 200 M but unable to find more in the closing stages to hold off rival.
Hard ridden early stages and raced wide without cover at midfield. Struggled to keep pace at home turn and didn't find much in the home straight.
Raced 2-wide at midfield. Lacked a response when asked at home turn and weakened in the straight.
Checked shortly after start and then raced behind midfield. Pressured but lacked a response at home turn. Weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Allowed to drift back to race at the rear. Near last on straightening and made no impression in the straight.
Raced in rear section. Took a wide turn home and only ran past beaten runners in the straight.
Raced 2Ls behind the pace in early part of back straight but gradually slipped back and was in rear section at home turn. Remained on same pace in the straight.
Off slowly, then was checked and raced at the back throughout. Found nothing in the home straight. (Lame morning after.)
Tracked leader for most of the race. Kept on well in the home straight and ran down leader in the final stages to take the race.
Led by a length on fence over a mile out, headed about 700 M out, one-paced thereafter.
Disputed early tempo, 2-wide and 1L back in 2nd at 600 M, very weak final stages.
Box-seated initially, 1L back in 4th in middle stages, steadily lost touch from the 600 M, tired finish.
Last early on, pressed on out 4-wide no cover along back straight, couldn't sustain the bid and well beaten before home turn.
Never travelling well, midfield through first half but under pressure 600 M out and gradually retreated.
Restrained at first but advanced out very down backstretch to midfield, kept on to be a neck 2nd off last bend, always held by the winner.
4-back along fence, 8th or so and 4Ls adrift at 1000 M, steadily yielded ground. (Lame next day.)
2-wide and 3Ls back in 4th at halfway but soon struggling and gone before the final bend.
3-back on fence at halfway, 5Ls back in midfield entering home straight, plugged on dourly for a place.
7Ls off pace towards rear at 1000 M, no better off on straightening, never likely.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Last early on, 5Ls behind pace at 800 M, worse off entering home straight, found nothing off the bit.
3-back on fence at 1000 M when 4Ls from speed, back-pedalling on the circle, eased out final stages.
Never better than midfield, no cover down back straight, slipped out of contention before last turn.
Disputed early tempo, sent on to lead by 2Ls turning for home, headed just before the furlong pole, no chance with winner but held 2nd easily.
Detached when 8Ls back at halfway, never really on terms with main players.
Disputed pace at 1200 M but elected to box-seat soon after, going well turning in and led 200 M out, ran on well.
4Ls back in midfield at halfway, under pressure at 600 M, one-paced, plodding finish.
3-wide no cover at 1100 M when close up, under pressure in 2nd at 500 M, wilted in home straight. (Lame next day.)
One from rear at 1200 M, always a long way detached and nearly out of sight in latter stages.
Worse than midfield about 5Ls from the pace at halfway and further adrift entering home straight, no response.
Became well detached from the field and still at least 10Ls behind turning for home, ran on through several beaten rivals to snatch unlikely placing.
3Ls down in 5th early on, losing touch on the circle and faded out.
Without cover throughout, in touch at the beginning but extra work on a very wet track saw him struggle well before final bend.
Eased to rear, raced 3 to 4-wide and lost ground, harmed by the track pattern that favoured leaders, never competitive and tailed out.

Eased at start to cross the rails behind the field, pushed along to grab a midfield spot, 3Ls off the leaders, not suited by the track pattern favouring leaders, closed off strongly 400 M and had threats, but run ended 100 M.
Pushed to occupy the box seat, benefited by the track pattern that favoured leaders, made early move 600 M, led 400 M, just beaten by a short head in last stride.
Hard ridden early but not muster speed, never better than midfield 2-wide, not suited by the track pattern that favoured leaders, tailed out from 500 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Hard ridden to hold and rail and led by 1/2L, benefited by the track pattern that favoured leaders, overhauled 400 M, out of fuel 250 M.
Eased back, 5Ls off the leaders 2-wide, dashed strongly 300 M to run 3rd despite harmed by the track pattern that favoured leaders.
Pushed to occupy a prominent spot, 1-1/2Ls off the leaders 3-wide, however soon dropped off 500 M and tailed out.

Pushed to sit in midfield in early stages, 2-1/2Ls off the leaders, trapped 3-wide throughout and lost ground, moved up 800 M and tackled the lead, helped by the track pattern favouring leaders, closed the race off strongly to just win.
Pushed to sit outside the lead, helped by the track pattern that favoured leaders, checked badly 600 M, tailed out afterwards.

Hard ridden early but never mustered speed at back, 5-1/2Ls off the leaders, harmed by the track pattern that favoured leaders, attempted to make ground around the field 4-wide at home bend, only ran on fairly in final stages.

Pushed to sit in front of midfield, 2-1/2Ls off the leaders 2-wide, not suited by the track pattern that favoured leaders, tried to make early move around the field 4 to 5-wide from 800 M, however soon weakened 500 M.
Chased along in 2 to 3L 3rd. Gradually yielded ground after straightening.
Travelled in midfield. Shifted wide turning for home. Finished home one-paced.
Raced in midfield or just worse far side. Lost position into straight. Couldn't make ground.
Broke well from the one draw. Tracked leader. Came to challenge upon straightening. Gained upper hand about 100 M out.
Began fairly. Settled on rails in midfield. Plodded on in straight.
Raced wide off dug up rails run towards rear. Made no impression in straight.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Always struggling at the back.
Began fairly. Settled in 4th on rails 3 to 4Ls off the lead. Fought on steadily in straight for remote 3rd.
Ridden to lead from widest draw. Held a length plus advantage to 300 M. Unable to sustain effort and caught 100 M out.
Never better than midfield. Towards rear into straight nearly 10Ls off the lead. Fought on steadily past well beaten runners.
Never in contention.
Began better than usual, raced 3Ls or so away on rails, had an easy time in mid-section, saved ground on bend, progressed evenly to 200 M but couldn't finish off and stayed on at one speed.

Failed to muster, raced 3 or 4-wide 5Ls back at rear, made a wide run from 700 M point, 2-3Ls down on circle, kept progressing to be in mix on turning, flattened at 150 M and just held ground thereafter.
Away nicely, took up box seat 1 out 1 back, no excuses in run racing behind pace, still 1L back leaving bend, came with promising run at 250 M but couldn't sustain effort inside final furlong.

Moderate jump, settled in rearward division 5-6Ls away on fence, pushed along in mid-section, improved between horses on bend, went to inside but didn't close off with usual dash. (Didn't handle conditions.)
Began smartly, assumed ideal spot behind leader and aided by on pace bias, enjoyed run of race to bend, gained split on turning in, drove through at 200 M and drew away to score convincingly.
Restrained, back with last few 6Ls back in 2-wide line, gradually improved 3-wide from mid-point, 4Ls down on turning, didn't respond in home straight.

Well enough to begin, drifted back to midfield racing 2 to 3-wide 4Ls back, didn't seen comfortable and began to lose position on bend, last on turning and not ridden out in conditions. (See Racing Incidents.)

Standard getaway, ended up 3-wide at tail 6Ls away, made a 5-wide move at 700 M, did plenty of work without cover to bend, 1L down turning, switched wider in straight and there to 150 M before run ended and lost place.
Amongst first few to break, raced 3-wide without cover, did it tough in mid-section, lost position at 600 M, 2-3Ls away on bend, switched out and came again late for place.
Standard jump, ended up well back 6-7Ls back on rails, always well back in run, improved from 500 M 3-wide without cover, switched wider in straight but couldn't wear down margin.

Away well, pressed forward to take up running aided by pace bias, set an even tempo with close company from outside horse, shaded at 500 M, 1L down on turning, stuck to inside and fought back strongly late.

Began nicely, showed good pace to take position outside leader, did share of work applying pressure at even sections, took lead at 500 M, held advantage turning in, workload took toll and weakened inside furlong.
Away in line, held a close up spot on leaders back, had run of race despite rails bias, eased out on turning, hit lead briefly at 250 M but couldn't go with winner.
Began fairly, took up a prominent role 1 out 1 back, followed speed nicely in run, same margin down on turning, closed race off best last 300 M scoring a shade comfortably in finish.

Standard jump, unable to hold spot early, faded back to race 6Ls or so away on rails, didn't use much in run but not helped by bias, pushed along turning very one paced in straight and failed to close.
Out in line, adopted midfield position on fence 4Ls away from lead, had a soft run in mid-section, but rails not place to be, turned in a one-paced finish in straight.
Best to begin, went on to take lead, pressured throughout by outside horse, still shaded by challenging horse turning, looked beaten but fought back well to be not far away on line.
Moderate getaway, raced behind midfield 5Ls back in 2 wide line, struggling at 500 M, didn't produce in straight and just battled to line.
Jumped in line, slotted in to running line 3Ls back in midfield, had an even run throughout, close enough on turning, made steady progress last 300 M to be nearest on line.
Away well, pressed forward to race outside leader, applied pressure to leader in run, continued to shade inside horse on circle, still sharing lead at 400 M, run soon ended and dropped out easily.
Average jump, failed to muster soon after start, raced 6Ls away in rear division, always well back, switched out in straight, closed nicely from rear making many lengths last 200 M.
Began well, went forward but posted 3 wide without cover, did it tough 2 to 3Ls back to bend, gradually dropped out from 400 M (tendon injury discovered day after).
Restrained from a wide gate, raced 6 to 7Ls back at rear, moved 3 wide on circle, still sharing tail at 400 M, made good progress in straight to be closest at finish.
Out with rest, ended up 3 wide in midfield 4Ls back with cover, did share of work to bend, lacked a turn of foot and just plugged steadily until run ended at 200 M.
Raced in last position. Came widest in the run home and finished off well.
Was steadied soon after the start and settled near the rear of the field, 2 deep with cover. Came wide in the straight and plugged way to the post.
Faded inside the final furlong after leading.
Bounded in the air at the start, then on landing stumbled. After this, in the early stages proved difficult to settle when racing 3-wide with cover behind midfield. Worked to the line well.
Raced with the backmackers along the fence. Made some late ground.
Slow to begin then improved to be midfield the fence. struggled over the concluding stages.

Raced on the bridle early before settling on the back of the speed, 1 off with cover. For a considerable distance after straightening was held up and once clear running was obtained, powered to the finish to snatch victory.
Camped behind the pace, 3-wide with cover, hit the lead by the 200 M and looked all over the winner before being mowed down close to home.

Away nicely, took up a spot on leaders back, had an easy time in middle stages with standard pace, tracked well but still 1 to 2Ls back when winner sprinted, kept coming in straight to go down in 3 way go.

First to hit ground, challenged for lead early before electing for 1 out 1 back trail, had a fair run throughout, unable to quicken when they sprinted, stuck to task at same pace to be not far away on line.

Taken back from a wide gate, ended up 5Ls back on fence, had a soft run yet not helped by speed, saved ground on bend, took inside runs in straight, wound up strongly late finishing best to score right on line.
Began with first few, pressed on to race outside leader, worried inside horse throughout, began to struggle at 350 M, dropped out tamely in straight.
No real early pace, ended up 4 to 5Ls back in running line, speed against in mid-section, still had job to do from bend, steadied turning but only managed a one paced finish.

Out in line, assumed a midfield role, 4Ls from front runners, had a reasonable run, gradually improved between horses on bend, into clear on turning and closed well to 100 M but just held position thereafter.

Jumped well but eased back to midfield position. Taken wide to challenge. Progressed steadily but could not match the winner.
Moderate jump. Raced along the fence 2 to 3Ls off the leader before turning in, held up at 200 M and unable to obtain clear running.
Fast away. Settled 2 to 3Ls back behind the leading group with cover. Made some ground in the straight without threatening.
Taken to a rearward position soon after start. Travelled 9 to 10 Ls behind leader along rails. Made even progress towards the line.
Standard jump. Took a position behind leader without cover. Unable to quicken up when pressured. Dropped out last 100 M.
Began well. Settled in midfield but had to be pushed to maintain position. Crowded for room early in the straight. Struggled to pick up.
Began OK but was purposesly taken to the rear. 7 to 8Ls off the leader. Taken wide during home turn to avoid traffic, passed some rivals but no threat overall.
Slow to start. Settled towards rear. 5 wide turning home. Fought on steadily in the straight. Just ran out of gas in the last 100 M.
Taken to the lead and raced freely. Began to fade 300 M out despite urging from rider.
Began fairly. Eased to sit about midfield 5Ls off the leader. Quickened up nicely in the straight. Came through horses to win.
One of the first few to jump, tracked leader along rails. Found no extra in the straight and eased down final 100 M.
Settled near the rear of the field, 3 wide and never recovered after receiving a check near the 800 M.
Raced in 6th position 3 back along the fence. Closed off without threatening.

Settled 2 wide in 8th position about 4 1/2L back with cover. Failed to quicken in the straight.

Caught wide early, settling in 9th spot about 5Ls back, 3 deep. Gained cover after the 700 M but did little from then on.

Settled 2-wide better than midfield. 2Ls off the pace turning for home. Closed off strongly in the final 200 M to score a close one.
Settled in a prominent spot behind the leader. Weakened and dropped out after straightening.
Ridden along from a wide draw to take the lead. Fought hard to maintain advantage in the straight but was caught few strides before the post.

Behind the pace early stages and but was wide without cover. 3-wide among leaders making home turn. Ran on same pace in the straight and unable to turn up a notch.
Botched the start and lost ground. Steadily made up ground and was at midfield 800 M out. Kept on same pace in the straight.

Broke best but handed up the advantage to track leading pair, cruising in 3rd turning for home and hit the front 200 M out, pulled clear decisively.

Raced prominently in 3rd or 4th early, 2-wide and 4Ls back in 6th at 600 M, faded out steadily inside final two furlongs.
3-back on fence within striking range early on, over-raced at halfway, lacked the dash to quicken through a gap on the rails from top of stretch.
Worse than midfield initially, left 3-wide without cover from the 700 M and petered once straightened for the line, eased down late.
Unacceptable display, slow out and one from rear, struggling 700 M out and became further detached in home straight.
7Ls behind steady tempo in 10th early on, well back and without room off final bend, let down strongly to lead in final strides, highly creditable effort.

Rearward 7Ls off pace when 3 and 4-wide but with cover, plenty to do off home turn out 4-wide, made no real impact down centre of homestretch.
About 9Ls last early on, 5-wide (widest) and still a long way behind the leader spinning for home, had little chance with the way the race was run.
Hard ridden to take a prominent spot in main bunch, 3-1/2Ls off the good pace 2-wide, ran on ok in final stages.
Eased back, 6Ls off the leader in main bunch, trapped 4-wide throughout and lost too much ground, stayed flat in straight until 100 M, picked up some late ground.

Very slow away, never competitive at rear, tailed out.

Eased to rear for cover, 7-1/2Ls off the good pace in main bunch, 3-wide, made ground steadily 300 M.
Eased to sit just worse than midfield, 6Ls off the good pace in main bunch, 3-wide, progressed steadily 300 M.
Hard ridden to lead in main bunch by 2-1/2Ls at good pace, ran on until 200 M emptied.
Very slow away, raced along the rails, never better than midfield.
Very slow away, hard ridden but no response at rear, never competitive.
Awkwardly away, eased to sit about midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the good pace in main bunch, 2-wide, progressed steadily 250 M to grab 3rd.
Led easily by more than 3Ls at fractionally fast pace, never tested, made all and scored easily.
Settled in last few. Ran home steadily. Never nearer.
Sluggish at start. Failed to muster speed and raced at the back throughout back straight. Trailed the field until 400 M when produced for a late surge to do best work late. (See Racing Incidents.)
Soon in clear despite coming under urge. Raced wide in rear of field far side and remained same into straight. Made no progress.
Settled in midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Began fairly but failed to muster early. Travelled towards rear on rails. Produced moderate impression late.
Began only fairly from widest draw. Soon improved to first few 2-wide in 3rd within 3Ls of pace around home bend. Became 2nd turning in but unable to quicken to threaten.

Broke well from a high draw. Restrained from leading to obtain coveted run 2 back in 4th on rails 1100 m out. Commenced move when about 5Ls down upon straightening and took charge from diminishing leader over 100 M out.
Began well. Settled in forward of midfield. Ran on steadily without threatening under pressure inside final 300 M.
Travelled just worse than midfield. Commenced move upon straightening. Ran on steadily under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Began well. Raced wide without cover in rear of midfield. Kept on steadily without threatening.
Began only fairly. Soon moved up to be amongst leaders breaking some 3Ls away around home bend. Tired noticeably over 200 M out and swamped closing stages.
Jumped with the rest. Taken back to a rearward spot 5Ls behind the leader and well covered. No room for a run until 200 M. Made limited progress thereafter.

Jumped fairly. Travelled along the outside rails at the back of the field. Struggled to keep pace with others and dropped out quickly from 500 M.
Lost ground when bumped on jumping. Travelled in midfield without cover on the outside of the pack. Fought on steadily without threatening.
Began fairly. Settled midfield but never far from the leader. Improved position gradually. Ran on strongly to hold off rival for a narrow win.
Standard jump. Settled towards the stand rails not far off from the pace. Could not find another gear when asked. Made no further impression.
Slow to begin. Settled behind midfield but not far off from the pace. One of the first to launch a challenge. Failed to quicken and gradually drifted out towards the centre of track.
Shifted on jumping. Reigned back to the last 7Ls behind the leader. Looked out of contention in early stages but showed remarkable acceleration from 300 M to take 2nd. Just failed to catch winner.
Began awkwardly. Allowed to relax behind midfield 4 to 5Ls back. Made good ground from 300 M. Stayed in pace with the winner and not beaten far.
Jumped well. Showed early pace to lead towards middle of course. Kept on soundly and just failed to take a minor placing.
Became unbalanced soon after jumping. Taken to a spot alongside the leader. Came under pressure 400 M out and made no show in the home run. (Mucus.)
Encountered slight interference after jumping. Well covered and travelled within 3Ls from the leader. Crowded for room near 500 M. Ran on strongly to take 3rd once clear.
Began awkwardly and shifted in. Taken to a forward spot just behind the leader. Faded in the home run. Dropped out quickly after 200 M.
Failed to muster, ended up 6 to 7Ls away on fence, enjoyed a quiet run throughout, made run between horses at 400 M, made some headway without threatening.
No early pace, settled best part of 10Ls back in 2 wide line, suited by pace, still rearward on turning, made solid progress in straight to be nearest on line.
Allowed to slide back from a wide gate, ended up 8 to 9Ls back in running line, travelled fairly to bend, improved 3 wide to 400 M, made some progress down middle before peaking on run at 200 M.
No speed from gate and soon last, raced 11 to 12Ls away in mid-section, under pressure to stay with them turning, found nothing in run to line.
Jumped nicely, pushed on to race in first few, ended up 5Ls back 2 wide without cover, ridden along to improve from 400 M, there to 300 M but couldn't respond.

Not much early pace, best part of 8Ls away on rails, had eas time and saved ground on bend, stuck to fence turning but unable to pick up and struggled in finish.

Out in line, posted 3 wide in midfield 4Ls away, gradually improved 4 wide with cover on bend, continued to progress to 200 M, let down nicely late to hit lead and score narrowly.
No pace from jump, settled at tail 7Ls back on rails, unsuited by speed, still well back on turning, unable to improve and just held position last 200 M.
No pace from jump ended up 6Ls away on rails, pace didn't really suit, well back on bend, held up to 200 M, made some minor late progress without threatening.

Jumped with rest, taken back to race 6Ls away in 3 wide line, improved on bend, came widest in straight, did best work last 200 M and was denied narrowly despite a late surge.
Well enough to begin, trapped 4 wide without cover 3Ls back, always working on bend, 1L down turning, kept coming in straight to be not far away in finish.
Began with first few, had ideal spot 1 out 1 back with cover, tracked a steady pace to bend, didn't let down on turning and faded out easily.

Awkwardly away, ended up 6Ls back in running line, tracked 3 wide between horses at 400 M, didn't see much daylight but did do best work late when clear.

Standard jump, pushed on to take up running, set pace to suit in front, worried in front by outside horse, tackled at 250 M and gave little dropping off last furlong.

Off slowly. Raced along the rails and no better than midfield. Steadily made up ground in the straight and was closest at finish.
Better than midfield but was caught wide without cover. Allowed to stride forward at 800 M and was racing alongside leader at home turn. Ran on fairly in the straight but unable to turn up a notch.

Box-seated in 3rd or 4th on fence through to home straight, took a while to wind up, strong in final 100 M and only just missed quinella.

Awkwardly away, unbalanced its riders and ended up at a rearward spot 5Ls behind the leader. Made steady ground from 600 M, dashed home on the outside, just ran on.
Pushed along after a good start to obtain a forward position just behind race leader, had every chance in the straight but weakened 150 M out.
Bounced well, showed its usual early speed to take an uncontested lead, hung on until 150 M when overhauled and flattened.
Ran very green on its debut, didn't handle the track causing interference to others, raced very wide in the home bend and dropped out quickly in the straight.
Moderate jump, settled towards the rear 3-4Ls behind the leader. Improved nicely along the rails, produced a strong finish to take 2nd.

Taken back from widest draw and raced behind midfield. 3-wide at midfield around the turn. Didn't show much in the home straight.
Crowded at the start and raced in rear section. Near last on straightening. Rallied strongly in the straight and made many lengths to be closest at finish.
Raced along the rails and never worse than midfield. 2Ls down turning for home. Switched out to find daylight after straightening and closed the race off well.
Jumped only fairly. Ridden along to a forward spot and held a length's advantage into the home straight. Headed 250 M out and tired thereafter.
In 12th about 7Ls off the pace initially and 6Ls away swinging for home, made a little headway late but no great danger overall.
In rear, about 8Ls last at halfway, 5-wide (widest of all) turning for home, retrieved some minor late ground.
Settled in 5th or so on fence about 2Ls or 3Ls off lead through to final turn, held up until 250 M out, lacked a decisive response once clear.
Around 4th and 2Ls or 3Ls from the speed until straightening, every chance when 1L down in 3rd at 200 M but could not follow through.
4-wide no cover and worse than midfield down back straight, 6Ls down turning for home, remained in latter half of the field. (Tactic questioned.)
Crossed from wide gate to slip into 3rd about 2Ls off pace with cover at halfway, led 300 M out but grabbed by quinella pair inside final 50 M.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Disputed the lead on fence from the 1000 M, headed at top of home straight and petered out rapidly. (Abnormal breathing noise.)
Patiently handled towards rear about 5Ls or so from the speed, ran through the field to lead close home.
Disputed pace out 2-wide until taking up the lead turning for home, headed just over 200 M out and faded late.
Bounded at start and slowest away, 7Ls back and one from rear making final bend, no impression.
Travelled well enough in midfield about 4Ls from the pace at 1000 M, ridden along to stay in touch at top of home straight, very weak final 200 M.
Around mid-division and 5Ls from the front until final bend, always held by the majority.
3-back on fence about 4Ls or 5Ls from the front in midfield until home straight, finished well but bettered only by the winner in final strides.
Tame effort, in rear bunch throughout and at least 5Ls from the pace, yielded further ground in the home straight.
Wide but with cover about 4Ls from the front until home straight, went 2nd about 1L from the winner at 200 M, no extra but held onto runners-up spot.
Keen down the back straight but 6Ls adrift at halfway and worse off on straightening, never involved.
Outpaced from the start and always at least 10Ls last from the speed, poor.
Led by 2Ls at 1000 M but raced too freely with head up, joined soon after, faded out once headed at top of home straight.
Midfield about 3Ls off the speed with cover, going well turning for home, led 250 M out and always holding a break from then on.
Soft passage on fence 2Ls back in 4th until home straight and travelling well, found zero off the bit and beaten by the furlong pole.
Better than midfield 2Ls from the front early, 1L down in 2nd swinging for home, all out to stay in touch at 200 M, faded.
Slowest away, recovered to be 3-back on fence, pressured turning for home, stayed on okay for a place.
Raced 3-wide with cover despite exiting gate 4, midfield about 3Ls down at top of home straight, one-paced thereafter.
Close-up but 3-wide without cover for the duration, 2Ls back and hard pressed to stay in touch at 200 M, wilted late on.
Keen early and tended to hang, joined pacesetter out 2-wide at 800 M but left behind from top of home straight.
Slow break, 4-back on the rails in 10th at halfway, stayed on fairly well in the straight but no danger to the winner.
Eased to sit 2Ls off the good pace 2-wide in main bunch, made ground final 200 M.
Eased back, raced 4-wide throughout, never better than midfield, hung in abruptly when whipped in straight.
Pushed to sit 1L off the good pace in main bunch, 2-wide, ran on until 150 M flattened.
Pushed to take the rail and lead, pressured by the riderless runner, then led by more than 4Ls at fast sectionals, steadied the tempo from 700 M, emptied 250 M.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Rider became unbalanced and dislodged shortly after the start.
Pushed early, sat 2Ls off the good pace 2-wide in main bunch, moved up 600 M and joined the lead, dominated from 400 M.
Very slow away, at back 5Ls off the good pace 2-wide in main bunch, progressed steadily 250 M, flat 100 M, on heels 50 M.
Took rail and led easily by 1L at good pace in main bunch, progressed steadily 300 M, lacked room 200 M, stayed on.
Midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the good pace in main bunch, trapped 3-wide and lost ground, made up some ground 300 M, but run ended 100 M.
Eased to rear for rail and cover, 7-1/2Ls off the good pace in main bunch, blocked most straight, dashed well to the line, on heels 50 M.
Pushed to sit 1-1/2Ls off the good pace in main bunch, suited by the rail-run, just held ground in straight, lack room 200 M.
Eased to sit about midfield along the fence, travelled nicely 3Ls off the good pace, lacked room 400 M, progressed steadily when clear and finish 2nd.
Worse than midfield, 5-1/2Ls off the good pace in main bunch, trapped 3-wide and lost ground, dashed well 200 M to grab a remarkable 3rd.
Always well behind until making modest effort under pressure in straight.
Broke well from a high draw. Shifted back from prominent position to race 3-wide in midfield. Kept on steadily early in straight before coming one-paced inside final 200 M.
With leaders early. Travelled in 4th within 3Ls of pace around home bend. Checked and lost position passing 400 M. Never recovered.
Ridden along from a wide gate to join leaders. Gained narrow advantage around home bend. Soon weakened out of contention after straightening. Checked when beaten 200 M out.
Midfield early, settling wide towards rear. Similar turning in but could only run home one-paced.
Sluggish at start. Soon ridden forward to rear of midfield position. Baulked for a run until after 350 M out. Ran on well to just fail to get up on line.
Broke well from a wide draw. Raced wide and prominently down far side. Crossed to rails for 3L 3rd position rounding home bend. Took lead from tiring leaders 350 M out. Just held on to the line.
Settled mainly in forward of midfield. Quickened up under pressure upon straightening. Closed nicely.
Soon taken back to race in rear from a wide draw. Still well back on rails turning in. Ran on under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Soon in last few. Ran past well beaten horses inside final 200 M. Finished race okay.
Settled towards rear. Made steady progress inside final 300 M.
Soon took up running holding rails run. Disputed lead home bend but soon weakened after straightening. Well beaten when hampered 200 M out.
Not far off early. Forward of midfield on rails rounding home bend. Renewed effort upon straightening but ran into tiring pacemakers and badly baulked around 300 M out. No further impression.
Quickly taken to the front from a wide alley, set a fast pace alongside joint race leader, hit the front 200 M out, kept on strongly all the way to the line.
Began well, taken back but couldn't slot in and ended up 3 wide behind midfield, rounding the bend without cover, taken to outside on straightening, finished the race strongly.
Began in line, difficult to settle, raced keenly in a spot 2 wide and 3Ls behind leaders, unable to sprint with them as tempo quickened, just held ground over concluding stages. (Lame.)
One of the first to jump, held a spot 5Ls back in 3 wide line, travelled wide and without cover throughout, under pressure as they turned, found nothing when asked, dropped off quickly last 200 M.

Away with them, taken back to a rearward position 7Ls behind the leaders, showed remarkable acceleration down the inside rails on straightening, finished the race fastest, unlucky not to take a place.
Lacked early pace, ridden to maintain a rearward position 7 to 8Ls behind the leader, 2 wide turning in, switched wider on straightening, never able to pick up.
A little slow to begin, had no speed to keep up with the rest despite jockey's effort, soon detached, 10Ls to make up as they came out of the turn, ran home one-paced, soon dropped out.

Jumped with the rest, showed pace to cut across from outside and lead along the fence, still travelling nicely as they came out of the bend, under pressure 300 M out and faded gradually towards the line.
Began awkwardly, settled in mid-division 5Ls off the pace, 2 wide and covered on turning, held up at 400 M, demonstrated strong finish effort when clear.
Quickly away, soon taken to a midfield spot 3 to 4Ls behind leader, 2 wide coming out the bend, made good progress under a strong ride, powered home in the last 200 M, just touched off at the line.
Even break, taken to the rails, travelled well enough some 4Ls off the pace, battled at same pace in run to line, no impression.
Jumped fairly from an inside draw, pressed on to a forward spot tracking leaders, angled to the outside on straightening, battled on gamely to snatch victory in a desperately close 4-way finish.
Slowly into stride, soon settled very far at the back around 8Ls off the leaders, saved ground on bend, closed off fairly but only at same speed without looking likely.
Taken back shortly after the start, settled in midfield towards the rear 5Ls behind the leader, made headway despite tight run down straight before being checked approaching the winning post.
Began smartly, took a spot behind pace 7Ls from leader, raced first without cover throughout, gradually improved turning in, kept coming and just lost place battle late.
Well enough away, assumed a midfield role 8 to 9Ls back in 2 wide line, no excuses to bend, lacked a finishing burst and just battled away in straight.
Out with them, took a trail on rails 7Ls off tearaway leader, always in 3rd position, travelled well turning, gradually improved at 300 M, made good ground final 200 M to take lead and score well.
Taken back from widest draw, ended up 3 wide sharing rear, had cover but did share of work to bend, never got into it.
Poor getaway, rushed forward shortly after start, circled field quickly and set up a 6Ls lead, set a solid tempo to bend, still well clear and held advantage to 100 M before tiring. Huge run.
Standard break, ended up 3 wide behind midfield 10Ls off front, did it tough without cover throughout, still well back on turning, made remarkable ground last 300 M to finish 5th.
Away fairly, ended up 8Ls off tearaway leader just behind first few, eased into clear on turning, made good progress final furlong to snatch 3rd late. Nice debut.
Taken back from a wide gate, ended up at rear a long way from front, pace suited but set enormous task still last turning, passed a few beaten runners late.
First to hit ground, forced to follow a hot speed with leader 6Ls clear, kept chasing rounding bend, stuck to task to 200 M but emptied out soon after.
Restrained from outset, raced close to rear on rails, overraced in mid-section, well back turning, made minimal headway in stretch.
Moderate jump, ridden along to race 10Ls back on fence, aided by a strong speed, still had job to do on turning, made some headway but just held ground last 200 M.
Began in line, posted a little wide in midfield 9Ls back, shifted 4 wide on bend, urged along at 400 M, peaked on run at 200 M and battled away thereafter.
Jumped OK but faded back from outset, at rear in 2 wide line 12Ls or more from speed, had pace to suit, too far back on bend, did make a little ground but made no serious impression.
Moderate jump, took a midfield spot, had a fair run with speed on, gave a big start at 400 M, closed soundly without threatening.
Allowed to drift back from an awkward alley, posted wide and improved 3 to 4 wide on bend, always working to turn, didn't close off. (Reported not striding out.)
Began poorly, back with last few 8 or so lengths back, not helped by steady speed, still had job to do turning, made no real impression in straight.
Jumped only fairly, assumed a midfield role 5Ls or so away, not used in mid-section, switched out on turning, closed to 200 M but unable to finish off thereafter.
Ordinary beginning, ended up 3 wide 8Ls back, not helped when pace dropped, well down on turning, battled at business end.
Jumped nicely, ridden along to take a forward spot, raced outside leader 1L back, suited when speed slackened, closed at 400 M, gradually overhauled leader inside 250 M and went on to score nicely.
First to jump, crossed from a wide gate to lead, backed off tempo when passing 500 M, controlled pace well to bend, kicked in straight, overhauled at 200 M but kept on well regardless.
Began nicely, ended up in 1 out 1 back spot 2Ls back, raced keenly in mid-section, same margin down on turning, didn't let down at 300 M and just held spot final furlong.
No early pace, raced 6 to 7Ls away in 2 wide line, not suited when pace slackened, improved between horses in straight, made some late ground without threatening.
Slow into stride as usual, raced at rear 8 to 9Ls back 3 wide with cover, always well back in run and not helped by speed, switched out on turning, made some progress to 300 M but flattened late.
Moderate jump, raced 6Ls back on fence, unsuited when pace slackened, did have cheap run to bend, no pick up in straight.
Average jump, took a spot on rails 4Ls back, saved ground throughout, still in behind runners on turning, did best work when clear from 250 M to be nearest on line.
Began with purpose, pressed on but caught wide when speed steadied, always working 1L back without cover, pushed along at 400 M, gradually faded when hard run took toll.
Well enough away, took spot 2Ls back on fence behind leader, no excuses to bend, no run from top of straight, couldn't sprint when clear last 300 M but did hold ground evenly.
Began with rest, slotted into running line 4Ls off lead, enjoyed a good run to bend, into clear once they sprinted, couldn't pair back margin but kept coming to make frame.

Jumped well from a low draw, eased back to a midfield position towards the rear 5Ls back, difficult to settle and became unbalanced as they turned, made run with winner in straight and just couldn't find extra.
Jumped well from an outside alley, eased back to take a rearward spot on the fence 6Ls behind leaders. Looked comfortable turning in but unable to quicken up in the straight.

Began ok, raced keenly in early stages, later slotted into a midfield spot 4Ls behind the leaders, came 3-wide on the turn without cover, made ground gradually on straightening, grabbed victory 50 M out.
Minor interference after the start, unable to settle in mid-division, advanced forward to race alongside leader before the turn, soon under pressure at 300 M, dropped away quickly.
Standard jump, pressed on to take a forward position just off the leaders, 2-wide with cover turning in, made steady headway in straight before finding no extra in closing stages.
Standard away, faded back to be in rearward division, raced 3-wide 6 to 7Ls back in last few, taken very wide as they came out of the turn, ran home one-paced, never threatened (Blood in trachea.)
Hampered on jumping, soon taken forward to lead on the fence, had a half length advantage on straightening, gave little response when required and faded out tamely from 200 M.
One of the first to jump, showed good speed to be prominent early, rolled along the fence just behind the leader, made some progress down the inside of straight but couldn't keep up with others.

Slow to begin, settled on the fence near the rear, improved along inside before the turn to be 4Ls behind leaders, not much room early in the straight but improved when gap appeared last 250 M, only fair progress late.
Slow to begin, lacked early speed, ridden to keep pace with the rest, last on turning and only made a little ground down the outside.

Broke well from the inside draw, able to settle better than midfield on the fence about 3Ls from the leader, switched out on the turn, responded well under pressure, hit the front briefly before weakening 50 M out.
Travelled wide in the early stages and after the 1000 M was allowed to stride forward to race outside the leader. Stayed on well in the straight.
Fair to begin, was caught 3-wide and without cover from about the 800 M, took a midfield position. Went to the post soundly.
Raced 1 out 1 back, had every chance.
Parked 2-wide with cover midfield. Raced dourly in the straight.
Raced at the tail of the field, failed to pass another runner and was never likely.
Raced towards the rear, 1 off with cover. Didn't quicken in the straight and tired over the concluding stages.
Slowly away then managed to take up a midfield position the fence. Failed to improve at the business end.
Went to the front. Rated well and continued to make every post a winner to hold rivals at bay.
Missed the start after beginning awkwardly and raced back along the fence. Kept to the inside in the run home and closed off fairly.
Tracked the leader along the fence, was held up until the 200 M, couldn't quicken once in the clear to overhaul the defect.
Raced along the rails at midfield. 2-back on the fence turning for home. Ran on same pace in the straight.
Settled in rear section. Near last on straightening. Made up some late ground.
2-wide and better than midfield. 2Ls off the lead turning for home. Quickened nicely and ran down early leader 200 M out. Kept on well final stages to hold off rival easily.
2-wide and a length off the lead in the early and middle stages. Ran on well in the straight and just missed a minor placing.
Raced comfortably in the lead. Took a length's advantage into the home straight but was headed 200 M out. Stayed on well enough in the closing stages for a minor placing.
Trailed field throughout the race. Checked near 200 M while picking up speed and ended its run.
Dropped to rear section. Near last on straightening and steadily made up ground in the straight.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield. Rallied and steadily made up ground in the straight. Came within a length of the eventual winner but unable to draw any closer in the final stages.
Niggled to a forward spot and settled behind the pace. Only stayed on same pace when asked on straightening. Faded final stages.
2Ls off the speed in 3rd or 4th early, stayed on pretty well and wasn't far away at the wire.
Fractious in gates and almost unseated rider as the gates opened, left a long way behind at the start and virtually took no part.
Always niggled along the stands' rail in midfield, hard ridden at halfway, held up about 100 M out, stayed on again but not enough time to recover.
In second half of the field about 4Ls or 5Ls back until home straight, retrieved some nice late ground without quite threatening principals.
Under pressure at halfway in mid-division, made a little late ground without posing any particular menace.
4Ls down in midfield initially, closer but all out to make an impact at furlong pole, could only hold his ground to conclude.
Crowded at the start and 6Ls in arrears early on, headway to go 1L off pace at 200 M, kept on well and only just foiled by the winner.
One from rear about 7Ls off early pace, furthest across the track at halfway, good progress inside final furlong, nearest at finish.
Set the pace on the fence but headed 150 M out and dropped away thereafter.
Tame debut, bounded at the start, never travelled well and always detached of the main group.
Always on the pace, vying for the lead 300 M out and only just passed by the quinella pair inside final 100 M.
Poor debut, crowded at start and soon 8Ls adrift, never on terms.
Midfield about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace through to the furlong pole, always held.
Within 1L of the pace in 3rd or so until the 200 M, found just enough under pressure to lead inside final strides, should appreciate further.
4Ls off speed with cover at the 1000 M, closer but niggled along off home turn, didn't find a great deal under pressure.
Slowly away, one from rear about 9Ls from early pace, 5-wide (widest of all) turning for home and ran on best of the rest for 4th.
Keen early on when wide, 3Ls back in 5th at the 800 M, closer off final turn, one-paced and held when tried to savage a rival 200 M out. (Blood in trachea.)
No early pace and soon a long way back in rear, plodded on through some very laboured rivals in the final stages.
3-wide with cover in 10th or so down the back straight, 4-wide on straightening and midfield 3Ls back at the 200 M, couldn't sustain the run.
5-wide no cover for much of backstretch and 3-deep on pace at halfway, extra work took its toll from the top of home straight.
3-back on the fence about 5Ls off pace in 7th at halfway, hemmed in along the rails for most of home straight and not tested, excuse the run.
Quietly ridden 9Ls back in 12th early on, closer turning in when switched out wider to challenge, good turn of foot to lead 300 M, pulled well clear.
1L back in 4th out 2-wide at 1000 M, ridden along when over 2Ls back in 5th off final bend, weakened steadily.
Endured a wide trip down the back but mostly had cover, 1L down in 2nd entering the stretch but yielded ground very quickly thereafter. (Questioned for poor performance.)
6Ls back in 9th at halfway, flanked winner until home straight but soon outpaced, 2nd when briefly eased down 50 M out, recovered to just hang onto 2nd. (Jockey reprimanded.)
In second half of field until home straight at least 5Ls from the front, held up for about 100 M at top of stretch, one-paced once clear.
In midfield with cover about 5Ls off pace in middle stages, stayed on fairly well for a place in the final 300 M.
Disputed early tempo on the fence, 1L clear turning for home but soon headed and fizzled out rapidly.
Very slow away, progressed steadily to obtain a midfield spot, 2Ls off the good pace, bumped 500 M, ran on fairly afterwards.
Shared lead easily at good pace, ran on well to the line and finished 3rd.
Slow into stride, worse than midfield, 4Ls off the good pace, just held ground in final stages.
Never a factor at rear.
Bumped start, worse than midfield, 4Ls off the good pace, made ground 200 M.
Better than midfield, 2Ls off the good pace, under pressure 500 M and held up momentarily, progressed steadily when clear and ran 2nd, just beaten by a neck.
Settled 2-1/2Ls off the good pace, soon dropped off 350 M.
Midfield, 2-1/2Ls off the good pace, lacked turn of foot and just held ground in final stages.
Bumped start, at back, checked 800 M and lost further ground, 6-1/2Ls off the good pace, no turn of foot in last quarter.
Eased to rear, 7Ls off the good pace, progressed steadily 200 M.
Settled just behind the leaders, travelled nicely, however soon weakened 250 M.
Eased to sit just off the leaders, raced keenly, flattened 250 M.
Pushed forward, shared the lead at good pace, dominated from 300 M, closed the race off strongly to score by a narrow margin.
Shared lead easily at good pace, hung on until 300 M overhauled, emptied 100 M.
Close up early. Gradually shuffled back to midfield position on rails before home bend. Saved ground on inside turning for home. Found nil in straight. (Blood in trachea.)
Began with others. Settled in 3rd on rails about 2Ls off the pace. Came to challenge upon straightening and hit front over 200 M out. Soon headed.

Broke well. Settled 3-wide far side in around midfield. Remained wide but with cover rounding home bend. Ran home well from behind midfield into straight to hit front late. (Questioned for improved performance.)

Raced wide outside leaders after beginning from high draw. Obtained cover one-out-one-back coming out of back straight. Similar in 3L 5th home bend. Held up in box seat early in straight. Obtained split 250 M out and ran on.
Broke well. Raced outside leader to home straight. Weakened under pressure. (Bled.)
Towards rear early. In rear of midfield approaching home bend. Obtained a run shortly after straightening. Ran home nicely.
Broke well from a wide draw. Raced wide without cover in midfield. Took closer order around home bend. Kept on steadily from 2L 4th into straight before fading inside final 200 M.
Settled at the back. Saved ground on rails turning in. Ran home nicely.
Began fairly. Niggled along to hold prominent position on rails. Took up running 1000 M out and held slender advantage to 250 M. Soon overhauled.
Slow away travelling well behind. Widest in last turning for home. Ran on well down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Began with others but soon settled well behind. Remained 3-wide rounding home bend. Ran home nicely behind runners without threatening.
Standard break, taken back to hold a rearward position 6Ls off the pace, 3-wide and last turning in, failed to stride out and did not close the race off. (Jockey reported action unbalanced.)
No speed from outset, ridden along to maintain a worse than midfield position 5Ls off the leaders, raced 3-wide on the bend, showed nothing in straight and was well beaten.

Quickly into stride, ridden along to take up running at a steady tempo, disputed lead with another runner as they turned, hit the front soon after straightening, there until 200 M when overhauled by fast finishers.
Out with them, allowed to slide back towards rear, raced 5Ls away on rails, last turning in, had to be manoeuvred for a run, picked up strongly once clear at 250 M.
Slow to begin, pressed on to move forward, raced keenly on the heels of the leader, kept to rails throughout, couldn't muster on straightening and ran home one-paced.
Take back from a very wide draw, cut across to a rail position at the rear, began to improve round the bend, made up plenty of ground in the straight.
Moderate beginning, settled at the rear 6Ls behind leaders 2-wide, remained there until the home straight, switched to outside for run, couldn't pick up when required, weakened from 200 M.
Jumped ok, positioned in midfield 3-wide 3Ls behind the pace, taken wider on bend, produced good finish in the straight but the first three were too strong.

Away with them, restrained to mid-division towards the rear, eventually settled in a 2-wide position 5Ls back, travelled comfortably on the turn, came with strong sprint and had the race won at 100 M.
Even jump, showed early pace to track leaders in a 2-wide running line, well covered on the turn, crowded for room early in straight but once clear at 300 M unable to quicken.
Slow to begin, soon advanced forward to take a spot on the rails 3Ls behind leader, well covered rounding the bend, eased out for room in straight, ran home strongly.
Fair to begin, went forward but unable to cut inside, raced 3-wide outside leaders 2Ls back, worked hard without cover on turning, had every chance in straight but lacked an extra gear, just kept on.
