Began well, raced in midfield 2-wide 3-4Ls away, used little in run, made dash with the eventual 2nd on straightening, kept going to just go down at the line.
Away quickly, allowed to stride on to tackle race leader, held a narrow lead on bend, found little in straight before dropped out from 300 M.
Jumped with first few, unable to slot in and restrained to midfield but wide without cover, did share of work to bend, flattened at 200 M.
Out only fairly, ended up behind midfield 5Ls or so away, raced keenly in mid-section, still in between horses on turning, made some headway last 300 M but didn't really threaten.
Crowded early, raced 7-8Ls back sharing rear in 2-wide line, pace against in run, last turning, didn't get closer.
Moderate jump, ended up in rearward position 6-7Ls back in 2-wide line, pace against throughout, well back to bend, never factored.
Restrained from an awkward draw, ended up at tail 8Ls back, pace against in mid-section, had job to do on bend, switched out turning, made remarkable ground down centre to be nearest on line.
Began with them, elected for a trail 1 out 1 back in run, had reasonable trip with steady speed, lost position approaching 500 M, moderate effort in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Moderate jump, allowed to settle back with last few, not helped with steady pace on, well back on rails at 400 M, into clear at 300 M and closed late making good ground to take 4th.
Away reasonably, pressed on to race outside leader, had an easy run with steady speed, challenged principal on turning, stuck to task and went down in tight finish.
Fast out, took a prominent spot on leaders back, had a fair run to bend, switched to challenge at 400 M, looked a chance to 200 M but just peaked on run last 100 M.
Slow into stride, ended up back on fence, 4-5Ls away, not helped by tempo, saved ground on bend, made gradual progress along inside to be nearest on line.
Began in line, assumed a midfield role 3Ls back, aided by a soft run, improved into clear on turning, made solid progress final 300 M before condition gave out late.
Out in line, couldn't slot in and forced to race 3-wide towards rear 7Ls back, had cover however overraced throughout, urged along turning, didn't run on in straight.
Showed speed to cross and lead from outside gate, dictated terms to suit throughout, held a narrow advantage on turning, fought on too well to defy rivals in sprint to line.
First to hit ground, led them easily and raced 3Ls away from rest, allowed to travel comfortably clear to bend, still well clear turning and kicked strongly, outlasted rivals for a solid win.
Began well, pushed on to race first behind leader (4Ls away), had to carry field up to leader on bend, kept chasing honestly to 250 M, peaked on run and just held ground thereafter.
Began nicely, slotted into 3rd on fence, had a fair run on back of speed, stuck to rails on bend, kept progressing in straight and pulled many lengths back off leader but ran out of time.
No speed, ended up 10Ls back on rails, helped by speed, still well back turning, made no impression.
Moderate beginning, ended up 10Ls back in 2-wide line, shared rear to bend, had job to do turning, only passed tired runners in straight.
Jumped in air, taken back from an outside alley, raced 3-wide with cover in middle stages, still well back at 400 M, made limited progress in straight.
Began only fairly, taken back to find cover, raced 3-wide 7-8Ls away, did share of work to bend, failed to make any real impression in stretch.
Well enough away, pressed on to race first without cover 4Ls off leader, did some work to bend, pushed along turning but produced only a fair response final furlong.
Away fairly, assumed a midfield position on rails 8Ls off front, made steady headway on bend did best work in straight and closed off well for 3rd.
Out in line, posted 3-wide without cover in midfield, did plenty of work to bend, dropped out easily in straight.
Began in line, positioned just behind midfield, aided by solid tempo, still back in pack and held up at 400 M, improved position when clear but couldn't get nearer late.
Slow to muster, settled closer to rear on rails, raced 8Ls back and was aided by solid speed, kept to fence on bend, made many lengths in straight to make frame. Strong return.
Out with rest, slotted in to midfield role, had fair in mid-section, same margin back on turning, made gradual progress to 200 M but run ended late.
No early pace as usual, ended up 3-wide 8-9Ls off leader, aided by solid tempo, still well back turning, switched widest and made some minor headway late.
Slow to begin, took a spot 5Ls behind leader on rails, angled 2 wide on turning, produced a reasonable finish in straight making good ground from a rear spot.
Jumped with the rest, settled towards the rear 5Ls off the pace, 3 wide on the turn, found nothing under pressure, dropped out tamely towards the line.
Quickly in stride, soon taken to the front leading at a steady tempo, had an uncontested lead throughout, began to struggle at 300 M, weakened last 100 M.
Taken back after jump, raced at the back 7Ls off the pace, pressed on to improve position before the bend, under pressure and very wide turning in, unable to quicken up in the straight.
Away reasonably, raced along the fence 4Ls behind the leader, over-raced passing 1000 M, peeled out rounding bend, showed no acceleration and faded out last 200 M.
Jumped well, settled to race 4Ls behind leaders in a 2 wide line, moved forward when pace slowed in mid-section, hit front from 300 M, kept on steadily to score a comfortable victory.
Away quickly, allowed to stride on for lead, difficult to settle when eased down, raced behind the leader on turning, held up until 300 M before progressing well to take 2nd.
Settled behind midfield, 3 deep with cover. Clipped heels near the 1100 M, and blundered badly. Not likely from then on.
Travelled as the backmacker, failed to make up any appreciable ground over the final 400 M.
Travelled about 3 back with cover, 2 deep. Peeled out on straightening and loomed up as a serious threat before peaking on its run inside the 100 M.
Settled near the rear of the field along the fence. Struggled at the business end of the event.
Parked outside the leader and travelled comfortably in the run. Picked up well when asked for an effort early in the straight to win in fine style.
Caught out on a limb, 4 deep without cover, midfield. Eased down in the run to the line, finishing well back. (Horse found to be lame in left front leg in morning.)
Raced handy in a small field but was obliged to race 3 deep without cover. Stayed on well. (See Racing Incidents.)
Went forward and led on the fence. Faded close to the line.
Enjoyed a saloon passage along the rails after being ridden positively in the early stages. Settled behind the leader but never appeared comfortable in the run and gave ground in the straight.
Tracked leader in a two wide spot. Disputed lead making the turn. Couldn't find enough to keep pace 300 M out and gradually faded.
Behind midfield. Ran on without threatening in the home straight.
No worse than midfield early stages. 2-wide behind the leader making the turn. Kept on fairly in the straight for a minor placing.
Niggled out of the gates from a wide draw to take the lead. Maintained a slight advantage on straightening. Kept on well in the straight but was down by eventual winner 100 M out.
Settled at the rear. Trailed field into home straight and made up some late ground.
No better than midfield and was wide and without cover. Ran on without quickening in the home straight.
No worse than midfield. Box-seated behind leader at the turn. Found a gap towards the inside near 300 M and quickened nicely. Ran down early leader at 100 M to take the race.
Settled towards the rear. Near last on straightening and only remained on same pace in the straight.
3-back along the rails about 3Ls off speed from middle stages to stretch, 1L behind with place prospects at the 200 M but couldn't follow through.
5Ls back in 12th early on, closer but wide off final bend, stayed on quite well down centre of the track to take 3rd inside final 50 M.
7Ls rear at 1000 M and same on straightening, made some minor late ground through beaten rivals, not as bad as some recent runs.
Had the run of the race on the rails in 4th until the home straight, peeled out to lead 250 M out, driven out and always likely to hang on.
Never better than midfield at any point, didn't break well, 4-back along the rails down the back, 4Ls adrift turning for home, no impression.
Sluggish to begin then keen at halfway when about 4Ls or 5Ls back in 10th or so, never remotely dangerous.
Tucked away in mid-division no worse than 3Ls from the speed, briefly held up into home straight, ran ok once clear for 2nd without testing the winner.
2-wide and 2Ls back in 4th at 1000 M, under pressure to keep in touch 500 M out, weakened steadily.
Vied for the lead with PRIMIATA from 1000 M to home turn, all out at the 300 M, soon headed and fizzled out tamely.
3-wide with cover before pressing on out 4-wide no cover from 800 M, 1L back in 3rd into the straight but found nothing and beaten by the 200 M. (Lame next day.)
3-wide with cover in midfield down back straight, 2Ls down and challenging off final bend and closer at the 200 M, couldn't sustain the bid.
Disputed the pace out 2-wide with G-ONE LEADING from the back straight to home turn, headed by winner 250 M out and petered out rapidly.
Caught 3-wide no cover for much of race, midfield about 4Ls behind pace at halfway, very weak in home straight.
Went back as usual, 6Ls behind in rear initially, 5-wide (widest) off final bend, ran on well late to be 4th and never nearer.
Led by 1L on the rails after 200 M, headed about 250 M out and anchored by top weight inside final furlong and missed a place.
With and without cover in midfield until home straight when wide, 4Ls back in 8th and tapped for toe, finished off at same pace.
4Ls behind pace in midfield when 3-wide but with cover, edged closer on straightening, toe-to-toe with runner up from 200 M to line, just prevailed.
One from rear about 6Ls or 7Ls off the pace until home straight, made a little ground but never much of a threat to leading players.
Very tame finish having box-seated behind the pace in 3rd or 4th about 2Ls from the speed until home straight, no excuses.
Did not get as far back this time, 5Ls down at halfway in 8th, made some decent late ground for a place without seriously troubling quinella pair.
Towards rear about 6Ls from the early speed, keen in places, 5Ls back off home turn but very weak on the run-in.
Didn't break well, 3-wide no cover throughout, 1L back in 2nd at the 800 M, extra work exacted its toll and one-paced in final 400 M.
Slowest away, never travelling well, unbalanced at the 800 M when 6Ls back in 10th, soon struggling and left behind.
Within 2Ls of the pace in 4th early on and 1L down in 2nd off home bend, briefly led 250 M out and duelled for the lead inside final 200 M, nosed out on line.
3Ls back in 6th out 2-wide at 900 M, niggled along on the circle and all out to get within 2Ls of the lead at the 200 M, no extra.
Went back as usual and 8Ls behind early pace, 5-wide (widest of all) swinging for home, retrieved a little late ground but of no great consequence overall.
Settled 1-1/2Ls off the good pace along the fence, blocked 4-2, lack turn of foot when clear, just ran on ok.
Hard ridden early to keep up in midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the good pace along the fence, no progress in straight.
Hard ridden to join the leading group, trapped 3-wide throughout, 1/2L off the good pace, dropped off rapidly 500 M.
Pushed to occupy a prominent spot as usual, 1-1/2Ls off the good pace, checked 700 M, progressed steadily 400 M to win by a narrow margin.
Eased to rear, 5Ls off the good pace, trapped 4 to 5-wide throughout and lost too much ground, progressed steadily 300 M without threats.
Hard ridden to go forward, failed to muster speed and trapped 3-wide behind the leading bunch, 2Ls off the good pace, pushed back 500 M and lost ground, just ran on at rear afterwards.
Eased back, 4Ls off the good pace, trapped 4-wide throughout and lost too much ground, made the move early from 500 M around the field, run ended 100 M.
Hard ridden to take the rail and led by 1/2L at good pace, hung on until 50 M overhauled, ran on for 2nd.
Eased to rear and took rail, 5Ls off the good pace, lack room in straight, still made ground steadily and just missed a place. (Not properly tested.)

Slow away, hard ridden forward, 1-1/2Ls off the good pace, trapped 4 to 5-wide throughout and lost too much ground, closed the race off strongly and took 3rd despite all negative situations in the early and middle stages.
1L off the good pace 2-wide, raced keenly, ran on until 100 M flattened.
Eased to sit in midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the good pace 2-wide, no dash in final stages.
Settled in better than midfield in 5th or 6th about 3Ls off the pace. Responded well to take charge over 150 M out. Won readily.
Settled towards rear. Remained wide into home straight. Ran on. (Jockey explanation reported.)
Began with others. Settled 3-wide in forward of midfield. Went wider into straight gradually shifting to stands side. Sustained headway under pressure to narrowly miss a placing.
Missed the break. Soon picked up to wide in midfield. Remained similar turning for home. Kept on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Travelled outside leader. Hit front narrowly after straightening. Died on his run passing 200 M.
Moderate start. Gradually improved along rails to settle in midfield. Dropped out tamely in straight.
Jumped best. Held narrow advantage to straight. Folded up under pressure inside final 200 M.
Soon taken back from wide draw to race in rear. Baulked for a run early in straight until after 300 M. Finished off race nicely. (Abnormal breathing noise.)
Very sluggish at start. Travelled in last few. Produced good impression late.

Raced wide down far side after beginning from poor draw, gradually reaching a prominent spot. Joined leaders 3 wide rounding home bend but dropped out noticeably after home turn. (Abnormal breathing noise.)
Not far off in one-back position. About 2Ls off the speed on rails rounding home bend. Faded under pressure after straightening.
Settled in rear of midfield. Commenced move turning in. Worked home well after awkwardly placed behind runners over 200 M out.
Reasonable jump from the inside draw, steadied when being shifted to middle of track, ended up further back than usual, made some late ground from 200 M.
Even jump, cruised down centre of track within a length behind the pace-setter, moved up to challenge from 400 M, battled on gamely before outrun by the eventual winner inside last 50 M.
Bounced out well, allowed to stride on, led the field at a quick tempo from a position 2 off the stand rails, attempted to make all but was overhauled just inside 100 M.
Quickly into stride, pressed on to maintain a better than midfield position, never far off the pace, held up at 300 M and switched inside for a run, finished off the race well.
Fair to begin, raced close to the pace, commenced running from 500 M, picked up speed gradually, finished the final stages with a powerful surge and won impressively.
Away evenly, raced in a prominent position just off the pace, under pressure at 300 M, found nothing and dropped right out.
Average break from a low draw, kicked on to take up running on inside rails, soon racing clear of others, stayed on well before gradually weakened from 150 M.

A little awkward jump, held running on stand rails, travelled comfortably in a forward position just off the leader, responded well under pressure from 400 M, kept on gamely to finish a creditable 4th.
Began with them, crossed to race near the inside rails away from the main group, found little when asked and ran home one paced.
No speed from outset, raced at the rear about 3Ls from the leader with cover, unable to pick up when asked, dropped out in run to line.
One of the first to jump, soon taken to a forward position close to the pace, slowed down at mid-point, did not respond to jockey's riding and was never competitive.
Slightly slow out, settled near the rear towards centre of course about 2 to 3Ls behind leader, didn't have another gear and just held ground in run to line.

Jumped well, wasn't used as usual to take a spot, ended up 6Ls or so away on rails, didn't really seem comfortable in conditions, saved ground on bend, didn't pick up in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slowly away by 3Ls, raced at rear 9Ls from leader, always pushed to hold spot, still struggling on bend, made little impression.
Average jump, raced 3 wide at tail 8Ls from pace, didn't handle wet going and solid pace, near last turning, battled in straight.
Broke nicely, led early before taking a trail on leader, had a fair run throughout, left flat footed on bend when they sprinted, just battled away in conditions for a well beaten 4th.
Average jump, ended up 7Ls back racing 3 wide with cover, not suited in conditions, still well back to bend, made some late headway towards middle without threatening.
Amongst first for break, raced first without cover 2Ls back, not overly taxed to bend, under pressure to chase on turning, condition gave out late.
Tightened early, shifted back to tail, raced 2 wide 5Ls away, never really travelled in unsuitable position, found no extra in straight. (Resented kickback.)
Out in line, ended up in midfield 5Ls or so away, had an even trip throughout, eased to centre on turning, made some progress but in a different class to winner.
Broke nicely, driven forward to take up running, kept speed genuine racing 1L clear throughout, increase speed on turning, dashed well clear in straight and was eased down late to score effortlessly.
Standard getaway, pushed up to take 1 out 1 back spot, had ideal run in middle stages, still close enough on turning. Didn't respond in conditions and faded out.
Began with rest, ended up camped behind speed 3Ls back on fence, no excuses in run, same margin back turning, made no impression on winner but held even ground late.
Standard jump, drifted back to race 8Ls back at rear, no better than 4 wide throughout, unsuited in conditions and still well back to bend, passed only tired horses in run to line.
Lacked pace as usual, settled back behind midfield 5Ls or so back, not used in mid-section, in traffic rounding bend, still didn't see daylight to 200 M, closed hard late when clear.
Well enough to begin, racing behind leader soon after. Had ideal run on back of even tempo, 1L down turning, made run at 300 M and took over inside furlong, caught on line.
Fairly away, allowed to drift back to settle behind midfield, raced 2/3 wide 8Ls back, had a trail in on bend, switched wide in straight and made some progress without threatening.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Amongst first few to break, took up running comfortably, led them at an even tempo, held a 1/2L margin leaving bend, couldn't respond when challenged at 350 M, weakened out late.
Slow into stride and crowded, lost 3Ls, taken to rails to race 8Ls back, with last few on bend, made up a little ground, pushed along on turning and produced little in run to line.
Fast into stride, pressed on to race outside leader, travelled keenly in run, still right there on turning, took over at 350 M, fought well and just ran out of gas last 150 M.
Jumped well, pushed on to assume position just behind leaders 1 out 1 back, no excuses in run, struggling on turning, soon dropped out and was steadied at 200 M when weakening.
Out in line, slotted into a midfield role 4Ls back, not asked in mid-section, travelled well to bend, didn't let down as usual and just produced a one paced finish.
Taken back from a wide alley, raced 10Ls away sharing rear, still last on turning, responded only moderately and passed tired runners in straight.
Out with them, took a position in front of midfield 3Ls off speed, had no excuses in run, eased 4 deep turning in, produced a strong sprint to take lead in shadows of post.
Out reasonably, unable to slot in from a wide gate, raced 5 to 6Ls back 3 wide without cover, did it tough to bend, urged along turning and made some minor progress despite hard run.

Standard getaway, settled in second half 6Ls or so away in 2 wide line, not exerted throughout, back behind most at bend, made fair progress between horses to 200 M but finished off at same speed thereafter.
Reasonable jump, took a spot on rails 3Ls off lead, had a soft run in mid-section, kept to fence in straight and made some good late progress to make frame.

Reasonable jump from an inside draw, tracked leader on the fence, saved ground and angled into clear on straightening, overtook leader last 100 M, battled on to deny late challenge from the runner-up.
Average break, taken to the fence soon after the start, raced at the back 6Ls behind the leader, closer as they turned, didn't find enough under pressure, just kept on.
Began fairly, cut across field from a wide draw to obtain running in the rear 2-deep, caught wide when improving on the turn, ran home one-paced down the outside of straight.
Moderate jump, showed speed to slot in behind leaders, remained there to bend, lacked a finishing burst and just battled away on straightening.
Quickly into stride, kicked on to take up running on fence, led at a steady tempo, about 1L clear turning for home, kept on till headed final 100 M, no extra near finish.

Standard jump, eased back to park on the fence in mid-division 2-3Ls behind the leader, travelled comfortably before steadied at the bend, had to be shifted near 200 M for a clear run, closest at the finish.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Awkwardly away, soon taken across to fence behind runners, settled towards the rear about 5Ls off the leader, made up ground down the inside of track but not enough to be figured in the finish.
Away in line, restrained to race in a 2-wide position near the back, gradually moved up from midway, caught 5-wide on turning, kept on fairly well without threatening the first three.
Out with rest, pressed on to maintain a midfield position 4-5Ls off the leader, niggled along turning, failed to respond and dropped out last 100 M.
Fair to jump, unable to cut inside and ended up very wide on the first bend, raced alongside the leader down the back straight, under pressure turning in, dropped out from 300 M.
Began with field, travelled the race wide and without cover, made progress towards the bend, weakened soon on straightening as early hard run took toll.
After being slowly away, took up a midfield position, along the fence. Railed up in the straight and closed off soundly.
Covered ground early before settling behind the pace, 2-wide with cover. Raced dourly over the last 400 M.
Raced in 2nd last position. Came wide rounding the home turn but struggled over the final stages.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Travelled towards the rear along the fence. Stayed to the inside in the run home but failed to close off.
Positioned behind midfield, 2 deep with cover. Made steady ground late and near the 50 M was held up and unable to obtain clear running and therefore was not ridden out right to the end of the race.
After passing the winning post on the first occasion, whilst racing wide and without cover, was ridden along to go forward and cross to race outside the lead. Gave ground quickly in the straight.
Bounced straight to the lead and made every post a winner to score well (See Racing Incidents re tactics.)
Couldn't match the early speed despite being ridden along, settling 3 back the fence. Loomed as a contender in the straight but peaked well short of the line.
Camped midfield, 1 off with cover. Was under pressure before the home turn, found little over the concluding stages.
Settled about 7Ls off the lead, 2-wide with cover. Was carried wide without cover near the 500 M and commenced to loop the field, but failed to sustain its run.
Tracked the leader along the fence, had every chance.
Dropped back to a rearward position and trailed field until home straight. Never quickened.
Raced along the rails at midfield. 2Ls off the lead turning for home. Steadily made up ground and ran down early leader near the line.
Jumped well. Stayed within 3Ls of the leader in 3rd back straight. Box-seated turning for home and kept on fairly in the straight for a minor placing.
Sat behind the pace. 2-wide making home turn and gradually faded in the straight.
Ridden out of the gates to be in a forward spot. Stayed 2 to 3Ls behind the pace back straight. Lacked a response when asked 600 M out and dropped out quickly. (Irregular heart rhythm.)
Taken back from widest draw and raced in rear section. Lacked a rally in the straight.
Dropped back to race in a rearward position. Switched out from the rails on straightening and rallied past some beaten runners.
Took the lead at 1400 M. Took a length's advantage into the home straight and stayed on well. Headed by eventual winner near the line.
Raced at midfield. 3Ls down turning for home and ran on fairly in the straight to make the frame.
Settled on the fence behind midfield. Lacked the needed response when asked rounding home turn. Remained on same pace in the straight.
Checked early but recovered to hold midfield spot with cover through to home straight, stayed on fairly but outpaced by front quartet to conclude.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Led by a neck on the rails early on and same into stretch, all out when headed at the furlong pole, one-paced finish and run out of a place final 50 M.
Caught 3-wide no cover before flanking leader out 2-wide from 800 M to stretch, couldn't keep up in the final 200 M.
Close up in 4th initially, 2Ls back in 4th off last turn, snatched the lead fleetingly inside final 200 M only to be overhauled close home.
3-back the rails better than midfield until the 600 M, peeled out 2-wide to challenge straightening for the line, kept on well to get up inside final 50 M.
3-wide but with cover around midfield and 4Ls or so from the pace down the back, never likely to improve a great deal in home straight.
Travelled well in box-seat down the back straight but came under pressure on the circle and steadily yielded ground in the closing stages.
Quietly ridden from wide gate, 5Ls down in 9th off last bend, made minor late ground without bothering the principals.
Didn't break well, 3-wide no cover throughout, 3Ls back in midfield at first but 2Ls back in 4th off last bend, tough run soon told and faded.
Broke well but became disunited in his action for a number of strides shortly after the start, slipped back to 6Ls in 10th turning in, eased down.
Big run, 5Ls back in 10th and dragged back to 8Ls last on straightening, finished very strongly to place, post came a fraction early for the quinella. (Tactic questioned.)
On the rails and 3Ls or 4Ls from the front at halfway, going well and steadied off heels turning in, stayed on well to lead close home.
Nicely placed in 'one-out-one-back' position in 4th or 5th through to straight, was once again found wanting in the finish but did enough to place.
Much more prominent than usual, 2Ls back in 2nd out 2-wide early on and 3rd turning for home, dropped out from top of home straight.
Went back from widest gate, slow-pace disadvantaged, 9Ls last at halfway and soon niggled along, no impression.
Checked at the start, 4Ls back with cover at halfway, 4-wide (widest) swinging for home, had his chance to place but too one-paced in the finish.
7Ls back in 9th at 600 M, not helped by steady tempo, made a little headway but of little concern to main players ahead.
On the fence and 8Ls or 9Ls back in rear until straightening, slow race tempo of no assistance and never got a look-in. (Tactic questioned.)
6Ls behind pace out 2-wide in middle stages and marginally closer off last bend, ran home at the same pace.
Led by 1L at 1200 M on fence but handed up soon after to track in 2nd until home straight, regained lead at the 200 M but grabbed late in the piece.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
4-wide no cover early but pressed on to lead by 2Ls on fence at 1000 M, headed shortly after straightening and one-paced to wind up.
Bungled the start, 4-back the rails in midfield about 5Ls from the speed at halfway, never going well thereafter and very weak to close.
Trapped 5-wide entering first bend, prominent, crossed to 2-wide and sat 2-1/2Ls off the good pace, emptied 200 M.
Eased to rear and took rail, 8-1/2Ls off the good pace, dashed well 200 M.
Eased back, 6Ls behind the good pace 2-wide, progressed steadily 250 M and finished 3rd.
Never competitive at back 2-wide, tailed out from 500 M.
Hard ridden early to cross towards the rail in front, then eased to obtain cover and took advantage in box seat, led 200 M, closed off strongly to win.
Very slow away, hard ridden to maintain a rail spot behind midfield, 6-1/2Ls off the good pace, weakened quickly 250 M.
Was not being made much use early to go forward, raced keenly, stayed 2-wide until 500 M took rail and shared the lead at good pace, hung on until 200 M weakened.
Lacked early speed, at rear, 10Ls off the good pace on the fence, ran on ok and made minor ground in straight.
Hard ridden to secure a prominent rail-spot, 2-1/2Ls off the good pace, made ground steadily 300 M and took 2nd without much threats to the winner.
Settled in midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the good pace 2-wide, lacked room 300 M, made ground when clear.
Hard ridden to hold the rail spot in midfield, 5Ls off the good pace, lack room 300 M, ran on fairly in final stages.
Trapped 4-wide entering the first bend, pushed to cross towards 2-wide in front and shared the lead at good pace, out of fuel 200 M.
Settled at the back. Trailed the field to straight. Made good headway past well beaten horses down centre of straight.
Midfield early. Made swift headway around field stables bend to gain one-out-one-back position into far side. Still chasing leader turning for home but soon weakened under pressure.
Travelled wide behind midfield. Produced for a run over 200 M out. Ran home well to do best work late.
Tucked away on rails in last few. Ran home well to produce good impression late.
Began with others. Restrained to race wide in midfield. Soon came under pressure to challenge upon straightening. Finished off race nicely. (Tactic questioned.)
Settled on rails just better than midfield in 5th. Similar when 3Ls behind turning in. Did not find much room the length of straight. Steadied 100 M out.

Began fairly. Soon in prominent position on rails. Settled within 2Ls of pace in 3rd far side. Slightly tight inside runner after straightening. Soon broke through and took lead over 200 M out. Hung on under pressure.
Broke well from the widest barrier. Settled well behind. Made no impression in straight.
Began well. Soon held back for cover racing in midfield. Remained same into straight. Ran on nicely to be nearest at finish.
Broke well. Held up to race 2-wide in 4th within 3Ls of slow pace. Similar turning in. Could only keep on steadily without quickening.
Gradually moved up from a high draw to take up running coming out of home straight. Set slow second and third quarter sectionals. Tiring badly when headed over 200 M out.
Began fairly, settled in midfield 6Ls back in 2-wide line, unable to settle and was allowed to improve from 800 M, taken wide on turn, finished the race strongly but held by the winner.
Broke well from the inside draw, assumed a spot in mid-division 4Ls behind the leader on fence, shifted to outside for clear run in straight, made some progress but flattened towards the line.
Quickly into stride, pressed forward to a prominent position just behind the leader, under pressure on the bend, found nothing in run to line, dropped out from 200 M.
Fast into stride, had an easy run in mid-division 2-deep from the fence, niggling along on turning, hung out and shifted wide in straight, kept on gamely to finish a close 3rd.
Away with them, back behind midfield 7Ls back, tracked well in middle stages, urged along turning, didn't produce a strong finish and just ran on in run to line.
Slow to begin, settled in behind midfield 7Ls off the leader, enjoyed a ground saving trip on the fence, made good ground in straight without troubling the winner.

Began awkwardly, shared rear 8Ls away from pace, not helped by the slow tempo, still well back on turning, made a run down the fence but was checked near 300 M and 100 M, not fully tested as a consequence.
Began well, unable to cross from wide draw and raced without cover in the early and middle stages, towards the rear as they turned, unable to produce and just struggled in straight.
Began poorly, restrained to settle at rear 8Ls behind the leader 2-wide, hindered by the slow pace early on, still 7Ls down on turning, found little response when asked, only passed beaten runners.
Quickly away, took a sit behind front runner and had a fair run on back of pace, kept up with the leader early in straight but gradually weakened from 200 M.
Ordinary jump, soon taken to the lead, rolled along at a slow pace and travelled comfortably throughout, continued to run strongly despite 2nd getting close late.

Jumped well from the outside draw, wide on the first turn, soon settled in 4th 2-3Ls off the pace, hard pushed as they turned, unable to find an extra gear and just plugged on holding ground in straight.

Standard break, held a better than midfield spot about 2Ls off the pace, 2 wide on the turn with cover, had every chance in straight but unable to quicken up, just kept on to line. (Blood in trachea.)
Began well, positioned 3-wide without cover 2Ls behind leader, improving on turning, hit front 300 M out, kept on to hold off fast finishing rival in a photo finish.
Slightly slow out, soon taken to a midfield spot 3 to 4Ls off the pace, urged along on bend, responded gradually in straight and just lost out to the winner by a short margin.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Average break, eased back to a worse than midfield position some 6Ls back, proved difficult to settle in middle stages, raced wide making the turn, hung out under pressure and didn't close off.
Began OK from an outside draw, taken back and crossed to the fence, had 6Ls to make up on straightening, improved slightly but was never threatening.
Well enough to jump from the inside draw, raced along rails just behind leader, used little on turning, commenced run from 400 M but lacked turn of foot and just battled at same pace to line.
Fractious at start and lost many lengths, hard ridden to make up lost ground, settled on the fence 5Ls back as they turned, faded soon in straight as early hard run took toll.
Out with line, ridden to stay with the pace, raced at the back 3 wide and 7Ls off the leader, carried wider on the turn, under pressure soon after straightening, dropped off 200 M.
Good start, pressed on to a prime position 1 out 1 back right on speed. Closed steadily before run ended at 100 M, held ground thereafter.
Began with rest, pressed on to take up the running at a modest tempo, held a 1L advantage on straightening, soon swamped and gradually weakened 300 M out.
First to jump, eased back to race in mid-division 2 to 3Ls behind leader, travelled comfortably on turning, made good progress to be nearest on line.
Raced at the rear of the filed. Passed a tiring runner in the straight.
Settled behind midfield, about 5Ls back from the lead, 2 deep with cover. Made some late ground without threatening.
Hard ridden early to be prominent, settling behind the pace on the fence. Kept to the inside in the run home but did little.
Went forward to cross and lead on the fence. Was challenged near the 400 M, and gave up lead soon after, just battled away.
Went forward but was caught out on a limb, 3 deep and without cover, positioned close to the speed. Kept on fairly before fading near the 100 M.
Worked forward from a wide draw to settle outside the leader. Was a beaten horse turning into the straight.
Travelled in a 3-wide midfield position with cover. Struggled in the straight giving ground near the final furlong.
Raced 4 wide and without cover, in a midfield position. Plugged on at same pace.
Raced 2-wide with cover midfield. Commenced to roll and improve after the 600 M and kicked well in the straight only to be run down close to home.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Began awkwardly and then for some distance in the early and middle stages proved difficult to settle racing 1 out 1 back. Weakened over the concluding stages.
Slow to begin and settled with the back markers. Took runs through the field in the straight and finished off strongly to gain advantage in the shadows of the post.
Camped behind midfield, 3 deep with cover. Peeled out to be widest rounding the home turn and fought to the line soundly.
Landed near the tail of the field, came wide in the straight and finished off well over the concluding stages.
Settled at midfield. 3-wide and 3Ls off the lead making home turn. Ran home without threatening.
Jumped well and led. Opened up a 2L-advantage on straightening and kept on well final stages to hold off challenger.
Behind midfield early and middle stages. Remained on same pace in the straight.
Jumped awkwardly. Raced along the rails behind midfield. Made a ground saving trip at the turn and ran on fairly in the straight.
No worse than midfield. 2-wide and no more than 3Ls off the lead making home turn. Kept on well in the straight for a minor placing.
Lacked early speed and raced wide behind midfield. Near last on straightening and never quickened.
Settled behind midfield. Rallied and made up ground in the straight to be closest at finish.
Jumped well and drifted back towards the rear. Last on straightening and made up ground over beaten runners. (See Racing Incidents.)
Showed early speed. Raced 3-wide without cover and a length off the lead. Commenced to weaken at home turn.
Raced wide and without cover at midfield. Steadily made up ground in the straight and was closest at finish.
Among early leaders. 2-wide and kept within 2Ls of the pace after 1000 M. A length off turning for home but unable to turn up a notch in the straight. Faded final stages.
Jumped well and raced in a box seat behind the leader. Didn't quicken much on straightening and then was crowded 200 M out. Closed the race off fairly.
Off slowly and trailed field until home straight. Only ran past beaten runners.
Midfield with cover down the back straight, 5-wide (widest of all) swinging for home, never troubled the principals.
Slowest out as usual, about 5Ls back in rear until turning for home, remained a similar margin behind.
4Ls behind early tempo in midfield and a little closer on straightening, picked up to lead 200 M out but hauled back by winner inside final 50 M.
4-wide no cover at halfway when 2Ls off speed, pressed on to be upsides off final bend and at 200 M but ran out of puff in closing stages.
Quietly ridden early on, 3Ls off pace in midfield turning for home, effort evened out over the final 300 M.
Close to pace but wide without cover at first, 1L down in 4th turning for home out 3-wide, beaten by the 200 M marker.
In front rank about 1L from the speed at 800 M and same off the last bend, found nothing under pressure and eased down. (Bled.)
On fence in midfield 3Ls from pace until straight, no clear passage until the 200 M, darted through a gap to lead 50 M out and stay on well.
4-wide no cover disputing early pace before crossing to lead by 1L from 800 M to home turn, headed at furlong pole and tired soon after.
Went back from wide gate, on fence 5Ls off pace in rear until the home straight, soon left behind.
Raced prominently but off the bridle at 500 M, 2Ls down in 5th off final turn but loomed a winning chance again at 300 M, one-paced inside final furlong.
Crowded at start, at least 5Ls back in rear until the home straight, made a short-lived effort to dash through the field but faded inside final 200 M.
Box-seated on the rails from 800 M to final turn, found zero off the bridle and beaten before the 200 M. (Lame next day.)
Towards rear at least 4Ls or 5Ls from the pace until home straight, made nice late ground down centre of the track but post came too soon.
4-wide without cover from the 800 M when 2Ls back in 4th, further back off last bend and steadily slipped out of contention.
Failed to muster any early dash, one from rear about 6Ls back at halfway, very laboured throughout and posed no threat whatsoever.
Midfield about 3Ls back early on, over 4Ls back turning for home, one-paced and posed little threat from then on.
Taken back, 6Ls back towards rear early on, further behind on straightening, made some late ground, never nearer. (Tactic questioned.)
3-wide no cover early, disputing the pace from 800 M home straight, a neck clear at 200 M, soon headed by winner but held 2nd comfortably.
Crossed to lead on fence down back straight, a neck down at top of home straight and soon swamped.
Handy position in 3rd about 1L or so from the front until home straight, within a neck and with every chance at 200 M, could not sustain the bid.
Better than midfield about 3Ls or so from the speed until home straight, had his chance to at least place but failed to take advantage.
7Ls last leaving the back straight and further behind on straightening, never on terms.
4Ls back slightly worse than midfield initially but unable to get closer taking home turn, held up until the 200 M but couldn't improve once clear.
Enjoyed a soft trail on rails in 4th right until the home straight, nice turn of foot to lead 100 M out and pulled clear for tidy win.
4Ls or 5Ls back and no better than midfield until home straight, never likely to take a hand in the finish.
Midfield and wide but with cover about 4Ls behind in middle stages, struggling to make an impact at last bend, continued to yield ground.
Never travelled well, 3-back along rails and always niggled along until home straight, never landed a blow.
Was fractious in barrier and extremely slow away, never competitive at rear and tailed out.
Eased back, 4-1/2Ls off the good pace 3 to 4-wide, kicked strongly 300 M, dominated 200 M, not fully tested.
Settled in prominent spot, 2-1/2Ls off the good pace 2-wide, however soon dropped off 500 M.
Hard ridden to go forward, 2-1/2Ls off the good pace, trapped 4-wide throughout, weakened quickly 400 M.
Pushed to join the leading group 2-wide at good pace, out of fuel 300 M.
Behind midfield, 5Ls off the good pace 2 to 3-wide, momentarily held up 400 M, made some ground when clear.
Pushed to hold a rail spot about midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the good pace, never progressed.
Bumped start, hard ridden to gain a midfield spot, 3-1/2Ls off the good pace, trapped 5-wide throughout, lost too much ground at bends, just ran on fairly in straight.
Slow away, at back, 6Ls behind the good pace 3 to 4-wide, made ground 200 M without much threats.
Eased at start to cross towards rails at rear, 6Ls off the good pace, lacked room 400 M, no progress when clear.
Slow away, hard ridden to obtain a prominent spot, 1-1/2Ls off the good pace 3-wide, ran on until 200 M when emptied.
Pushed to take the rail and led by 1L at good pace, drifted away by more than 3Ls at 400 M, hung on until 200 M overhauled, ran on for 3rd.
Occupied a more prominent spot, 2-1/2Ls off the good pace, lacked its usual turn of foot in straight, just held ground.
Settled in midfield, 3Ls off the good pace 3-wide, progressed steadily 400 M to finish 2nd.
Ridden along from wide draw to hold prominent spot. Remained in centre of back straight before crossed to rails in front approaching 200 M. Held lead until overhauled inside final 200 M.

Raced in forward of midfield and mainly wide without cover down far side. Took closer order around home bend and disputed 2nd into straight. Fought on nicely to hit front briefly over 100 M out. Soon overhauled.
Settled in rear. Produced good impression inside final 300 M. (Tactic questioned.)
Raced wide in rear throughout. Never on terms.
Settled in last few on rails. Angled off rails for a run turning in and ran on well, only to find winner too strong at the finish.
Not far off. Raced one-out-one-back in 4th approaching home bend. Lost position entering straight and soon dropped out of contention.
Broke well from wide draw. Remained wide early before settling outside leader coming out of back straight. Similar turning in but soon weakened under pressure.

Niggled along early and soon gained a forward spot. Quickly obtained one-back position on rails passing 1200 M. Awkward when too close to heels of leader 900 M out. Chased leader into straight but soon weakened.
Settled in midfield. Wide without cover around home bend. Took closer order turning in. Ran on steadily under pressure to hit front briefly inside 200 M.
Settled on rails in midfield. Similar but off the rails turning in. Fought on well under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Waited with. Ran on resolutely down centre of straight to snatch victory final strides.
Travelled in 5th or 6th always within 3Ls of pace. Gradually weakened after straightening.
Settled towards rear. Commenced run out wide rounding home bend. Kept on steadily in the run home.
Began well, settling in midfield. Similar turning in. Fought on steadily in straight without quickening.
Began well, never far off in 4th within 3Ls of pace, accelerated well under pressure, hit front 150 M out, held on to deny the 2nd on the line.

Unable to slot in after the start, had to travel wide and without cover throughout the race, near last on turning, being hampered early in straight and was unable to finish off the race. (Lame after race.)
Began OK, settled on the rails in a prominent position one back in 3rd, soon came to challenge on straightening but could only produce moderate impression, weakened from 300 M.
Assumed a rearward position as expected, travelled 2-wide about 7Ls back, had to be taken wide for a clear run, finished off the race strongly to take 3rd.
Settled in mid-division 2-wide and 4Ls off the pace, niggled along on turning, unable to quicken up in straight and just turned in a one-paced effort.
Restrained from a wide draw, took up a rearward spot about 6Ls off the pace, well covered throughout the race, unable to sprint with them under pressure, steadily weakened to be well beaten.
Settled one out one back in 2nd, travelled OK under the moderate tempo but found little when asked on straightening, faded from 200 M.
Settled on the rails at midfield 4Ls back, used little in running, commenced run from 400 M, kept on well and just missed out on 3rd.
Away with them, took up spot behind midfield about 5 to 6Ls behind leader, 2-wide with cover, similar turning in, made strong run with winner and was just touched off on the line.
Jumped well from an inside draw, took up the running soon and had an uncontested lead throughout, kept on until 150 M when headed, weakened thereafter.
Restrained to race towards the rear, gradually shuffled back to last, remained there till 400 M, made up plenty of ground down the straight to be closest at the finish.
Out in line, ended up 4 to 5Ls away on rails in midfield, saved ground in mid-section, took inside runs turning, finished race off strongly making many lengths to be in frame.
No pace early, soon back with last few, 9Ls off solid speed in mid-section, still well back to bend, made useful progress in straight without the clearest run, not ridden out late.
Jumped with first few, ended up in 1 out 1 back spot, didn't have easy time with solid pace on, had chance turning in but failed to run on and struggled late.
Amongst fastest to begin, pressed on to take up running, forced to do share of work with pressure from outside horse, under siege at 350 M, weakened easily thereafter.
Jumped sharply, took a spot behind leader, forced to follow a solid pace throughout, still right there on turning, got split and briefly hit lead at 200 M, kept on well for 3rd given workload.
Slow into stride, raced back with last few 3 wide with cover, suited by pace to mid-section, still 7 to 8Ls down turning, produced a strong close down middle making remarkable progress last 200 M.
Moderate jump, drifted back as usual to race 6Ls away in running line, came 3 wide at 500 M, gave a big start but made up solid ground last 300 M to be closest on line.
Poorly away, soon last and the best part of 10Ls away, suited by pace, well back and pushed along on bend, made many lengths in straight to be not far behind them in finish.
Began in line, assumed a midfield position 4Ls away in 2 wide line, had no excuses in run, same margin back and urged along on turning, just held ground in run to line.
Away reasonably, worked forward from a wide gate to race outside the leader, did share of work with solid pace on, still there challenging to bend, overhauled at 200 M but held on OK given workload.
Amongst rest to begin, allowed to settle in a midfield role, raced 5Ls back, aided by solid tempo throughout, in behind horses turning, produced strong close when clear and ran winner to a head.
Away well, took a trail behind pace 3Ls back on rails, suited by solid tempo, came around runners at 400 M, came with a strong run to take lead inside 200 M and hold off closing rival.
Ordinary getaway, posted 3 wide without cover 5Ls away in mid-section, had a hard run to turn, unable to keep on in straight and weakened out last 200 M.
Showed usual speed to take up running, set a reasonable tempo throughout, kept honest by outside horse, held a narrow lead turning, overhauled at 150 M but stayed on well to make frame.
Ordinary jump, drifted back to share rear, 7Ls away not helped when pace steadied, still same margin down turning, switched wide but only made fair progress in straight.
Away fairly, crossed to sit before midfield 3 wide with cover 4 to 5Ls back, was difficult to settle, improved 4 wide on bend, 3Ls down turning, made steady progress in straight to just miss frame.
Out in line, soon slotted in the running line, settled well 3 to 4Ls back, had a 3 wide trail to bend, came with a well timed run in straight to overhaul them inside 100 M and score comfortably.
First to hit ground, pressed on to race prominently, raced one out one back, in behind horses turning, didn't respond to urging and just held ground late. (Jockey reported needed run.)
Amongst fastest out, took a spot behind leader, had reasonable run to bend, no response when they sprinted and struggled in straight.
Slow into stride, raced in rearward division 6 to 7Ls off pace in 3 wide line, always covering ground but did have trail, switched wide turning, closed off nicely without looking likely.
No early speed, raced 7Ls back with last few, not helped when pace slackened, still had field to beat on bend, closed off nicely late making good headway final 200 M.
Well enough away, took a midfield position 3 to 4Ls away, difficult to settle in midfield, back behind horses without a clear run, closed only fairly when clear.
Out with them, caught wide and without cover, pushed forward to race 1L off leaders, did work to bend, kept giving in straight producing game finishing effort to be not far away on line.
Began with rest, held a spot 3Ls back on fence, enjoyed a quiet trip to bend, angled 2 wide turning, just held ground behind horses in straight without really threatening.
Tardy into stride, settled 5Ls away on rails, used little in run, saved ground on bend, under pressure at 500 M, faded out easily in straight.

Began well, crossed to race outside leader from awkward alley, had a fair run to bend, applied acid test to leader soon after straightening, got better off front runners at 100 M but no match for winner late.

Restrained from an outside alley, ended up back sharing rear 7Ls off pace, unsuited when pace slowed, trailed 3 wide on bend, had job to do turning, made remarkable ground in straight flashing late for 3rd.
Began well. Soon settled towards rear on rails. Baulked for a run until 200 M. Finished off race strongly.
2-wide in 3L 5th or 6th in better than midfield. Similar turning in. Kept on steadily under pressure without quickening.
Raced wide towards rear. Made significant progress down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled just worse than midfield. Obtained a run over 200 M. Ran home nicely to snatch victory final strides.
Began well. Gradually taken back to a wide position just worse than midfield. Ran on to produce good impression late inside final 200 M.
Soon took up running in contrast to usual tactic. Led to straight and folded up quickly. (Tactic questioned.)
Began slowly. Travelled at the back. Produced good late finish inside final 200 M near the centre of the track.
Broke well. Restrained about 2Ls off the pace on rails. Lost position around home bend. Renewed effort to challenge upon straightening. Fought on under pressure without threatening.
Soon picked up along rails to hold one-back position in 3rd. Tracked leader into straight when soon obtained a clear passage on rails. Broke 1L clear 200 M out but only to be caught close to home.
Settled in midfield. Baulked for a run until after 200 M when hung in making it difficult to be ridden out.
Raced keenly looking for cover in prominent position after beginning from wide draw. Held 4th within 3Ls of pace home bend. Soon weakened after straightening.
Broke well from widest draw. Settled wide in midfield. Made steady late progress closing stages.
Began moderately. Gradually improved to a prominent spot. Settled one-out-one-back in 2nd. Hit front briefly after straightening. Soon headed and faded under pressure inside final 200 M.
Began fairly but found herself in midfield position on rail. Gave ground gradually after straightening.
Began well, always prominent behind leader, had every chance in straight but unable to quicken up, gradually weakened inside 200 M. (Questioned for poor performance.)

Jumped fairly, taken back as expected, raced on the fence 8Ls back down the back straight, asked for effort on turning, ran into traffic 200 M out and didn't have a clear run until last 100 M. Ran home okay.
Modest start, hard pressed to move forward, travelled in 3rd down the backstraight, under pressure turning in, run ended 200 M, soundly beaten.
Away in line, moved forward to take up running on rails, had an uncontested lead at a slow tempo, kept on strongly in straight to hold off late challenge from the runner-up.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Unable to cross from an outside barrier and had to travel wide and without cover, 3Ls behind leader on the turn under urging, made some progress down the straight at an even rate.
Reasonable jump, didn't muster speed early on and was settled in a rearward spot 8-9Ls off the pace, taken wide swinging for home, made plenty of ground down the straight to be closest at the finish.

Jumped okay from the inside draw, had a ground-saving trip along the rails 4Ls back in mid-division, under pressure round the turn, struggled to pick up on straightening, checked at 50 M and finished tailed off.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Slow to begin, soon ended up in rear 9-10Ls off the pace, still well back on bend, switched to outside and finished off fairly after being set a task.
Began well, settled behind midfield one off the fence about 7-8Ls back, closed the race off nicely taking plenty of ground off winner last 200 M, just beaten by a neck.
Away ok, pressed on early to settle in a midfield 2-wide and remained there to the home turn, 6Ls to make up on the leader, made some headway down centre of the course.
From a wide gate was taken back to settle in last position, commenced to improve after the 500 M. Shifted to the outside in the run home and looked the winner before being caught close to the finish.
Enjoyed a nice run in the race behind the leader along the fence. Found little when asked for an effort in the run home.
Wasn't suited by being taken on in the lead along the fence. Was a beaten horse after the 500 M. Pulled up with blood in trachea. To trial. (See Racing Incident.)
Bumped at the start, then recovered to race 1 out 1 back. Had every chance.
Worked forward to race as joint leader, 1 off. Was challenged near the furlong and gave in quickly soon after.

Eased at the start and was taken back behind runners landing midfield the fence. Didn't obtain the clearest of passages early in the straight, but after switching out near the 100 M, went to the line only fairly.
Settled midfield then near the 800 M was left racing wide and without cover, battled away in the straight.
Checked soon after the start then raced 3 back, midfield, 2 deep with cover. Weakened over the final stages. Returned after the race with blood in the trachea.
Patiently ridden in the early stages to settle in 2nd last position. Came to the outside in the straight and closed off strongly to gain an advantage in the shadows of the post.
Taken back from wide draw and trailed field. Made a ground saving trip around the turn and had to switch out at 150 M. Closed the race off strongly.
Jumped well but lacked the needed speed to keep pace with leaders. Raced 3-wide at midfield. Hampered and carried wider when making turn at 600 M and lost all chances. (Epiglottic entrapment.)
Best out from widest draw but didn't have enough speed to cross to the lead. Raced 3-wide and within 2Ls of the lead. Kept pace in the early part of the straight but faded final 200 M.
Led briefly. Took a sit behind the pace at the Rock and box-seated making home turn. Ran on well in the straight but was no match for the winner in the final stages.
Gradually slipped back to race in a rearward position. Lacked the needed rally in the straight.
Lacked early speed and was taken back across runners. Raced in rear section until straightening. Ran on without threatening.
Jumped only fairly but was niggled forward to take the lead. Took a length's advantage into the home straight and kept on fairly. Headed final 100 M and finished with a minor placing.
Bounded in air and lost ground at the start. 2-wide and no better than midfield. Hung badly at 600 M and was near last turning for home. Never quickened.
Raced near the rails at midfield. Swung out turning for home and only kept same pace in the straight.
Better than midfield. 2Ls off the lead and switched out turning for home. Quickened nicely and ran down early leaders final 100 M.
Jumped fairly and gradually made up ground in the back straight. 2-wide and a length off the lead at 600 M. Remained on same pace in the straight.
Slow to break, 3-back along fence and between 4Ls and 5Ls from the front until home straight, always outpaced by most of those in front.
Disputed pace on the fence from the get-go, 2-wide and a neck clear at 200 M, headed first by PALIO KING and the winner, regained 2nd last stride.
Enjoyed a box-seat trail on the rails no worse than 2Ls off speed until stretch, briefly led inside final 200 M but couldn't sustain and lost 2nd on line.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
3-wide no cover throughout, worse than midfield at least 4Ls behind through to the straight, offered little from then on.
Slowly away, at least 6Ls off pace in 10th or so at first and no better off making last turn, kept chasing the majority of the field.
Held the 'one-out-one-back' position in 4th right through to the home straight but found very little off the bit.
2-wide and 6Ls adrift in 9th at the 800 M and not much closer spinning for home, retrieved a little late ground out wide.
2-wide around midfield about 5Ls behind early tempo, began to yield further ground from the top of the straight, very weak and eased final 100 M. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Handily placed 2-wide and 4Ls back in 5th down back straight, a little closer on straightening, stayed on well down centre of the track to lead close home.
Poor start losing plenty of ground, 8Ls last at halfway, made some decent late ground in the stretch but never loomed a serious chance.
9Ls behind in 11th through opening exchanges, still 7Ls last at the furlong marker, nearest at the finish.
About 14Ls last at halfway behind a strong pace, 9Ls down off last turn, ran on well down the centre (apparent bias in favour), never nearer.
At least 10Ls off strong pace at 900 M, pressured on circle, widest turning in, responded well out wide (apparent bias in favour) to lead final strides.
Slowly away and always in rear at least 10Ls off pace until the 600 M, posed no sort of danger in the straight.
Led by 3Ls at the 1000 M and set much too fast a pace until the home straight, headed just inside the final 200 M and quickly swamped.
Clipped heels at the start, always towards rear, 10th and under pressure a long way behind at the 600 M, didn't find much off the bridle.
Disputed early pace, handed up to trail fast-paced leader by 3Ls in 2nd on fence (apparent bias against) until stretch, outgunned final 200 M.
Restrained in midfield behind strong pace, 10Ls back at 600 M but 5Ls off on straightening, made some nice late ground and only just missed 2nd.
On the rails throughout (apparent bias against), midfield at first, 5Ls back taking last bend, made good late ground but couldn't get to front trio.
4-back along the fence initially in midfield, 5Ls down in 5th off the last turn, made a moderate late bid down centre of track.
5Ls back in 3rd on fence at 1200 M, 4Ls down in 4th making last turn, outpaced by the swoopers inside final furlong.
Settled in 3rd at first 6Ls behind strong tempo and 3Ls down turning in, picked up nicely to lead 150 M out but grabbed late by winner.
Pushed forward early, but soon eased to sit just behind the good pace and cross to race 2-wide, lacked turn of foot, flattened 150 M.
Shared lead at good pace 2-wide without much use, raced flat in straight and weakened 200 M.
At rear, 7-1/2Ls off the good pace, aided by the rail-run, but only ran on fairly in straight.
Joined the leading group without much use at good pace, however trapped 3-wide, dropped off 200 M.
Pushed forward, sat just off the good pace, trapped 4-wide throughout without cover and lost too much ground, flattened 200 M.
Bumped start, soon joined the leading group at good pace, trapped 4-wide throughout and lost too much ground, ran on until 200 M emptied.
Pushed to hold the rail and shared the lead at good pace, hung on until 200 M when out of fuel.
Pushed early to secure the rail spot but was checked, then moved forward steadily and regained the box seat, closed the race off strongly along inside last 250 M to win by a narrow margin.
Bumped start, eased to sit in midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the good pace along the fence, made ground steadily 200 M, just beaten by a short head in 2nd.
Eased at start to cross towards rail behind midfield, 5Ls off the good pace, progressed steadily 200 M to finish 3rd.
Slow away, at rear, 8Ls off the good pace 3-wide, no progress.
Eased to sit in midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the good pace along the fence, made some ground in straight.
Settled in forward of midfield in 3L 6th with rails run. Slightly closer turning in. Quickened well to take charge final strides.
Taken back on jumping from outside draw. Remained well behind into straight. Made no impression.
Settled behind midfield in last few. Kept on same pace without quickening.

Began with others but quickly into lead attempting to make all. Narrowly headed passing Rock but re-gained advantage with rails run turning for home. Broke over 1L clear 200 M out only to be collared close to home.
Well-placed in prominent position. Faded gradually in straight. Beaten when tightened passing 200 M.
Settled in mid-division. Angled out onto the centre of track for a run down the straight. Responded well inside final 200 M to snatch 2nd late.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Broke well. Soon taken back to race in 2L 5th with cover down far side. Switched out to challenge turning for home but failed to quicken.
Checked shortly after start. Remained in rear to straight. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M.
Began well. Settled one-back on rails in 3rd or 4th. Similar turning in but failed to quicken to threaten.
Settled towards rear on rails. Never really made much progress. (Riding in the straight questioned.)
Driven from a wide draw to soon pick up a prominent spot. Gained narrow advantage 2-wide about 800 M out. Dropped out under pressure after straightening.
Jumped fairly, unsettled in the rear and was allowed to stride forward, took over the running from 1100 M, struggled on straightening, weakened inside 200 M.
Reasonable jump, unable to slot in and was caught wide making the 1st turn, eventually settled behind midfield 5-6Ls back, switched outside on straightening, closed hard to be nearest at finish.
Jumped well, prominent early on but slowly drifted back to midfield, had a fair trip throughout, lacked room early in straight, made some headway when cleared 200 M out but never threatened.

Away with them, pressed on to lead on rails at a slow tempo until taken over at 1100 M, had a smooth run trailing leader, close enough on turning but unable to quicken up in straight, faded last 100 M.

Began in line, taken wide approaching the 1st turn, raced without cover down the backstraight, gradually moved up towards the turn, briefly hit front 200 M out but was overhauled in concluding stages.
Taken back from a wide barrier, didn't settle due to slow tempo, moved forward from 1200 M to race on the back of the pace, unable to finish the race off as early hard run took toll.
Bounced well, took a midfield position 2-wide 4Ls back, improved on turning, found no extra under pressure in straight, only passed beaten runners.
Ordinary break from the inside barrier, gradually drifted back towards the rear, had nice run to bend, hampered early in straight but made some progress last 200 M, not beaten far.
Away okay, initially settled just behind leader, gradually shuffled back to the turn, checked early in straight but ran on strongly to finish a close 2nd once cleared at 200 M.

Began awkwardly, unsuited by slow pace and was difficult to settle in early stages, raced towards the rear in backstraight, 5-6Ls to make up as they turned, had to be shifted wide for a run, made solid progress inside 200 M.
Taken across from a wide barrier, soon settled in rear, 5Ls to make up on turning, produced a strong finishing effort down the outside to win.
Out nicely, travelled in a prominent position 2 to 3Ls behind leader, ridden along as they turned, lacked extra gear to be a factor but stayed on well to make frame.

Began fairly, pressed on to maintain a rail position tracking leaders, enjoyed a ground-saving trip, peeled out to challenge on straightening, led from 200 M, ran on well to score with something in hand.
Restrained from a wide barrier, taken across to settle in the rear along rails, made a move from 900 M to lead on turning, headed 200 M out, gradually weakened towards the line.
Slow to begin, initially settled behind midfield, surged to the front in back straight, began to struggle near 200 M, weakened thereafter.
Jumped well, led slowly on the fence until taken over near 600 M, under pressure on straightening, found nothing in run to line. (Mucus.)
Settled patiently towards the rear after break, hindered by the slow tempo throughout, commenced move from 600 M, made some headway down the straight but never threatened.
Slightly slow out, soon taken to a midfield position 4 to 5Ls off the pace, had soft run and ideally placed to bend, finished the race well but unable to take ground off the winner.
Away in line, taken across field to race in rear about 6Ls off the pace, remained there to bend, unable to sprint with them, finished tailed-off.
Began well, went forward racing one back one wide, enjoyed early slow tempo but struggled to keep up when pace quickened on the turn, checked near 300 M, ran home one-paced.
Began with rest, difficult to settle in early stages and travelled wide without cover in midfield, shuffled back to the rear on turning, finished off the race fairly without threatening.
Raced near the rear along the fence. Rolled forward away from the rail after the 600 M, and got to the post strongly.

Was able to coast along behind a good tempo in a midfield position, before shifting out to be 3 deep and making a forward move passing the 700 M. Lengthened well to hold a 1/2L advantage in the run to the wire.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Eased early from a wide gate and raced in 3rd last position, 1 off with cover. Made a dash around the field after the 500 M, and ran on nicely down the outside.
Was taken back from the outside gate and settled in last position closed off soundly. (Lame next day.)
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Settled midfield, 1 off with cover. Was able to sneak close coming to the 500 M, but found little at the business end.
Missed the start and soon afterwards was hooked around the field and allowed to stride forward to take up the lead, 1 off near the 1400 M. Was out of gas after the 500 M.

Enjoyed a nice run on the back of the speed along the fence. Rolled out into the 1 off line after the 600 M and commenced to improve, but by the home turn was under pressure and failed to respond thereafter.
Camped behind the speed but for the major part of the race hung out. Kept on despite having to cover ground.
Led early along the rails and settled in 2nd position. Commenced to tire after the 600 M, finishing well back.
Taken back from widest draw and raced at the back. Near last on straightening and made up some ground over beaten runners.
Midfield early but gradually slipped back to a rearward spot. Last on straightening and only ran past a beaten runner.
Settled in midfield. Ran on same pace in the straight.
Wide and without cover in rear section. Ran on without threatening in the straight.
Jumped well to be among early leaders. Took a sit and kept within 3Ls of the pace in the back straight. 3-wide turning for home and kept on fairly in the straight.

Led briefly before taking a sit behind the leader on entering back straight. Travelled nicely behind the pace until the home straight. Kept on well and ran down early leader final 100 M to take control of the race.
Botched the start and was at midfield early. Taken back further to obtain cover after entering back straight. Had a ground saving trip around the turn and steadily made up ground in the straight.
Showed good early speed and took the lead 1000 M out. Remained in front before tiring in the final 100 M.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.

Settled in rear section early stages. Made up some ground in the back straight and was 3 to 4Ls behind the leader rounding the turn. Continued well but unable to pose serious threat to winner final stages.
Raced 2-wide behind the pace. Had difficultly keeping up making home turn and weakened thereafter.
Better than midfield but was wide and without cover. Commenced to fade at home turn and weakened further in the home straight.
4-back along the rails in 8th at first, 3Ls back in midfield turning in, ran on well in the finish but couldn't get to leading trio.
Led by 2Ls on fence at 1100 M, about a neck clear from 900 M to home straight, tried hard but couldn't repel the winner's late dive.
Crowded at start, 6Ls last at the 1200 M, still in rear turning in, made some minor late headway but done no favours by jogging tempo.
2-wide and 1L down in 2nd at 1100 M, flanked the leader until home straight, given every chance to succeed but tipped out of quinella final strides.
5Ls behind the pace in 7th or so at halfway, niggled along to stay in touch at the 600 M, made no impact in the straight
Fractious in gates, 6Ls off speed in 9th at 1000 M, pressured to make ground 500 M out and widest turning for home, no impression. (Questioned for disappointing performance.)
One from rear about 7Ls off pace at 1000 M, a little closer off last bend, ran on okay late but not helped by the steady tempo.
3-wide no cover when 4Ls back in 5th at 1000 M and failed to get in at any stage, struggling in midfield off last bend and yielded ground rapidly.
Best away, disputed slow pace before taking up box-seat role from 1100 M to straight, needed the full length of the run-in to get up in final strides.
2-wide and 3Ls back in 4th at 1000 M, 2Ls off taking last bend, ran on okay late but wasn't helped by trying to quicken up from a slow tempo.
3-back along rails when 4Ls down in 6th at 1000 M, 3Ls off swinging for home, stayed on alright to conclude without posing much threat.
Slow to muster pace, 3-back along the rails about 4Ls from the pace in middle stages and same at halfway, failed to quicken up and tame finish.
Handy position 2-wide and 3Ls back in 4th at 1200 M, remained in front rank, led just inside the 200 M, tipped out of the money inside final 50 M.
Worse than midfield about 5Ls off early pace, improved but wider (5-wide) into home straight, failed to sustain the bid in the straight.
Slow to muster pace in rear, 8Ls last at halfway, never close to landing a blow.
Box-seated on the fence in 3rd about 2Ls from the speed until the straight, lacked a telling response in the straight and no obvious excuse as to why.
5-back on the rails towards rear, about 6Ls behind the leader in middle stages, never on terms with principals and remained in rear.
Switched inside from widest gate, one-from rear 8Ls off pace, peeled out 6-wide (widest of all) turning in, ran on strongly, only just came up short.
In front rank until home straight when 1L to the good but soon headed and fizzled out rapidly.
4-back the rails when 5Ls from the lead at 1000 M, edged out 2-wide before home turn and finished well to poke head in front close home.
Mostly 10th and between 5Ls and 6Ls from the speed through to straight, hanging in at 250 M when unbalanced, closed off strongly and only just failed.
Worked hard on the speed without cover initially, held 2nd out 2-wide from 900 M to home turn, steadily dropped out of the picture in the straight.
2-wide in midfield about 4Ls from the pace at the 600 M, a little closer into straight, had his chance to place, couldn't seal the deal inside final 100 M.
Pushed early but failed to muster speed, trapped 4 to 5-wide throughout and lost too much ground, never better than midfield.
Pushed to take the rail steadily and shared the lead at slow pace, hung on until 200 M flattened.
Slow away, trapped 3-wide at stable bend, pushed forward to share the lead at slow pace, 2-wide at home bend, bumped 300 M and then weakened.

Pushed early to hold the rail in midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the leaders, hard ridden 800 M to find clear running and swept to 2-wide, held up 300 M, dashed well when clear and finished 2nd despite the slow tempo.
Eased to sit in midfield, checked early, 3-1/2Ls off the leaders, trapped 3-wide throughout and lost ground, harmed by the slow pace, lacked turn of foot, just ran on in final stages.

Eased to rear, 5Ls off the leaders 3-wide, harmed by the slow pace, swept forward 5 to 6-wide at home bend and lost lots of ground, still ran on well to the line despite all negative racing situations.
Box seat, raced very keenly, out of fuel quickly on straightening.
Settled in front of midfield, 2-1/2Ls off the leaders 2 to 3-wide, not suited by the slow tempo, closed the race off strongly 300 M and scored.

Pushed early, but soon eased to sit about midfield, trapped 3 to 4-wide throughout and lost ground, again moved up steadily 1000 M, sat 1-1/2Ls off the slow pace, hung in 300 M, ran on well to the line.
Eased back, 5Ls off the leaders, dashed well 200 M to grab a late 3rd despite not suited by the slow pace.
Pushed to occupy a prominent spot 2-wide, suited by the slow pace, but soon weakened 300 M.
Eased to rear and took rail, 5Ls off the leaders, not suited by the slow tempo, little dash 100 M.
Soon taken to rear from wide gate. Remained well back to the turn. Produced moderate headway under pressure in the run home.
Travelled on rails in forward of midfield in 5th. Similar when saved ground on rails turning in. Found nothing under pressure in straight.
Wide in rear of midfield. Widest turning in. Failed to quicken in straight. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Midfield to straight. Faded.
Settled just worse than midfield. Similar turning in. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Settled in rear. Ran home one-paced.
Travelled in last few. Fought on steadily in straight without threatening.
Showed early pace. Moved up to gain a length's advantage at stables bend. Held lead until joined into straight. Headed 200 M out but fought on to retain a placing.
Broke well to share pace on rails. Settled one back in 3rd far side. Came under pressure turning into straight. Found nothing.

Broke well. Raced wide with leaders in first quarter. Tucked in for one-out-one-back position rounding home bend. Hit front upon straightening but unable to sustain effort and overhauled inside final 200 M.
Broke well. Settled for coveted run on rails in 2L 4th. Shifted one off the rail 800 M out on far side. Well poised 3-wide in 2L 3rd turning for home. Responded well to assert authority 100 M out.
Began awkwardly but soon picked up to rear of midfield on rails. Angled off rails for a run turning for home. Ran on nicely but winner too good.

Good break, took up a prominent role, travelled within a length of leader at a moderate tempo, unable to go with them early in straight, folded 200 M out and dropped off quickly over the concluding stages.
Away in line, didn't have much early speed and assumed a spot towards the rear, 4 to 5Ls to make up on leader as they turned, surged after bumping into clear 250 M out, made good ground to take 2nd.
Taken back from a wide barrier, soon ended up in rear racing detached, urged along on the turn, made a strong run down the centre of course to finish closest at the line.
Even jump, took up spot just off pace on rails 2Ls back, had a smooth run to bend, made even progress in the straight but unable to match the first three.
Reasonable jump, pressed on to hold a midfield spot 4Ls back 3-wide, under pressure entering home straight, never able to challenge, simply plugged home last 200 M.
Broke nicely, soon took up running on rails at a steady tempo, travelled comfortably on turning, attempted to make all but was headed 100 M out, weakened over the concluding stages.
Began awkwardly, dropped out next to last 5Ls off pace, came wide on turning, made little in home straight passing tired runners only.

Jumped well, settled nicely in mid-division with cover about 3Ls back, cruising rounding the bend, gradually improved on the inside under hands and heels, hit front 100 M, ran on to score comfortably.
Began well, positioned 2-wide in midfield 2Ls back, had good trail to bend, checked at crucial stage near 300 M, regathered and made up ground inside final 200 M.
Standard beginning, took up rail position in midfield 4Ls behind leader, had relatively quiet time throughout, kept to inside on straightening but unable to quicken up, needed the experience.
Swiftly away, pressed on to race 3 wide alongside leaders without cover. Did work in run, unable to pick up under pressure, ran home one-paced.

Resented being restrained and difficult to settle in early stages, travelled in mid-division 4 wide and without cover, over-raced in back straight, struggled on turning, dropped out early in straight. (Jockey's tactics questioned.)
