Bounced out into a prominent spot, raced 3Ls back on fence, had a soft run to bend, angled 2 wide turning, held up for a considerable distance on straightening, made nice late ground to make frame.
Fast away, used up early to lead, steadied tempo once in front, held a narrow advantage on bend, kicked on turning, overhauled at 150 M but stuck on gamely for placing.
No speed and drifted back from a wide alley, posted 3 and 4 wide at tail 6 to 7Ls back, never likely on bend, no progress in straight.
Taken back from awkward alley, raced 3 wide 6Ls or so away, always well back, made better progress in straight, never threatened.
Standard jump, pressed on from a wide alley, well positioned in running line, 2Ls back, improved 3 wide on circle, kept on gamely in straight but just lacked dash last furlong.
Began well from a low draw, had nice trail on leaders back despite some early pace, right there on turning, didn't dash but simply held ground in straight.
First to hit ground, worked early to hold a spot outside leader, improved to be on terms with leader on bend, folded inside 150 M.
Began evenly, positioned nicely in running line 3 to 4Ls away, always travelling well, made a 4 wide run approaching bend, let down nicely and did it comfortably over concluding stages.
Slow into stride, ended up in running line just behind midfield 5Ls away, made a 3 wide effort on bend, continued on at same pace in straight.
Tardy to begin, positioned in rear division 6Ls from top end, always well back between horses to bend, lacked dash but made steady progress in straight.
Restrained from a wide alley, ended up 5 to 6Ls away on rails towards rear, saved ground throughout and improved on inside of circle, made even progress late without threatening.
Moderate jump as usual, ended up 4Ls away on rails behind midfield, back between runners on bend, followed winner in straight, clear final 150 M and did best work late.
Out in line, worked hard 4 wide early to take up running, attempted to idle once in front, held a 1L advantage straightening, run ended inside 200 M when workload took toll.
Out in line, unable to slot in from an awkward posted 3 wide with cover in midfield, did share of work to bend, came 4 wide into straight and closed hard to only be narrowly denied on line.
Began with rest, slotted in on rails 4Ls or so back, unbalanced at 1100 M, urged along at 500 M, improved between horses on bend, knuckled down to task final furlong finishing off well, useful debut.
Restrained from start, taken to rails and settled at rear, 7Ls away, gradually improved saving ground along inside on bend, bumped into clear at 200 M, closed only fairly thereafter.
Lacked early pace and taken back from a wide gate, raced 8Ls away at tail, aided by a solid pace, clear last turning, made some late ground without looking likely.
Fast out, led early before ending up with a trail behind leader, did share of work on pace, close enough straightening but didn't see much daylight and wasn't really tested in straight.
Average jump, ridden along to hold spot in midfield 4Ls back, had ideal run on back of a solid pace, improved 3 wide rounding bend, fought strongly in stretch to get nod in a tight finish.
Jumped with rest, took a spot 1 out 1 back just behind pace, had a fair run to bend, ridden along turning but severely checked at 150 M, took no part thereafter.
Amongst fastest out, pushed on but trapped 3 wide without cover 2Ls back, always working throughout, still there to 200 M, faded inside furlong and checked at 100 M when tiring.

Swiftly away, took part in early speed battle, raced outside leader 1L away, did share of work in first half, same margin down on turning, couldn't respond but saddle shifted at 200 M and unable to be ridden out.
Restrained shortly after start, raced behind midfield 6Ls away in 2 wide line, aided by solid pace, held up behind horses turning to 200 M, closed nicely late to take 3rd.
Away well enough, ended up drifting back to race 3 wide close to rear, 7Ls back, had cover throughout, steadied at 400 M when held up, made gradual progress without threatening.
Began with others. Soon picked up to one-out-one-back position in 2nd spot. Similar turning in but soon faded under pressure.
Held rails run in midfield. Shifted out but no clearer run turning in. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Began well. Held up in one-back position on rails in 3rd within 2Ls of pace. Commenced move to challenge upon straightening. Fought on steadily but failed to peg back winner the length of straight.
Midfield throughout. Kept on steadily under pressure without quickening.
Soon taken across for rails run behind midfield. Similar turning in. Ran on steadily down inner to be nearest at finish.
Raced 3-wide in midfield throughout. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight. (Questioned for disappointing performance.)
Broke well but soon settled at the back. Never seen with a chance. (Tactic questioned.)
Allowed to stride forward from widest barrier to lead passing winning post the first time. Set a steady pace attempting to make all. Tiring when overhauled inside final 150 M.
Soon taken to rear. Remained well behind throughout.
Began well, settling in 4th within striking distance in 3L 4th. Commenced move turning in and responded well to assert authority over 100 M out.
Always in last few. Dropped out tamely in straight.
Raced wide behind midfield. Wide into straight. Made no impression.
Away in line, pressed on to race on the outside of leader under a moderate tempo, took over the lead on straightening, led until 200 M out, weakened thereafter.
Ordinary jump, taken back to a rearward position about 8Ls off the pace, well back on straightening, kept to inside and made only limited progress.
Began with them, allowed to relax in a midfield role 3 to 4Ls behind leaders, had reasonable trip coming into straight, ran on steadily to take 3rd without threats to the first two.
Began nicely, pressed forward to race behind leaders, niggling along on the turn, didn't really quicken in the straight and produced only a one-paced finish.

Standard break, hard pressed to take up running on fence setting a moderate tempo, challenged for lead on turning, soon under pressure on straightening, faded out from 350 M before dropping out completely inside 200 M.
Broke with rest, parked in a slot worse than midfield and 3 wide, swung wide in straight into middle of track, unable to pick up and just plugged away to line.
Reasonable jump, restrained to settle in rear division with cover, about 8 to 9Ls back in turning, shifted in on straightening for a clear passage, made some headway from a position too far back.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Ordinary break, settled patiently along the fence behind midfield, 7Ls to make up on leader on straightening, quickened reasonably well to finish closest on line.
Broke well, drifted back to hold a midfield spot 5 to 6Ls back, came 3-wide on the bend without cover, peeled out to challenge but unable to find extra gear, kept one-paced to finish.
Tardy to begin, allowed to stride on to a forward position behind leaders, had a fair run with moderate tempo, showed little in straight and was soundly beaten.

Away well from inside draw, soon taken to a midfield spot along rails 4 to 5Ls off the pace, eased out on turning, into clear 400 M, hit front inside 200 M, battled on but was just overhauled in the dying strides.

Jumped fairly, restrained to settle in midfield 2-wide 4 to 5Ls back, had quiet time in middle stages, switched out in straight, closed steadily to fight out finish and managed to outrun the 2nd over concluding stages.
Slow to begin, ridden up to hold spot in mid-division, lost position near 700 M, recovered soon but had to come wide for a run in straight, did not close the race off, dropped away 100 M out.
After settling behind midfield, 3 deep with cover, commenced to yield ground after the 600 M, finishing well back. (Bled.)
Enjoyed a leisurely trip in front, kicked well after the 300 M, to make every post a winner.
Settled midfield, 1 off with cover. Battled away in the run home.
Broke well then was steadied early from a wide gate and settled midfield 4-wide without cover. Weakened over the final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Parked outside the leader. Got to the line dourly.
Bounded in the air at the start and settled midfield the rails. Plugged away in the straight.
Raced in 2nd last position on the fence. Never likely.
Tracked the leader along the fence, fought on gamely in the straight but couldn't quite catch the winner.
Raced just off midfield on the fence. Worked home soundly.
Camped 1 out, 1 back. Had every chance.
Settled in last position. Came wide after the 500 M, but failed to close off.
Travelled behind the speed, but was caught 3-wide and without cover. Was a beaten horse before the home turn.
Settled behind midfield, 3-4 deep with cover. Shifted wide in the straight and closed off strongly despite hanging in.
Settled back in the field, 1 off with cover. Struggled over the final stages.
Lacked early speed and raced in rear section. Took some time to shift out for a clear run after straightening. Closed the race off well and made up some late ground.
Disputed lead until 800 M. A length behind the lead making home turn and in close pursuit of leader in the home straight. Kept on well in the final stages and ran down leader at the line.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield. Rallied in the straight and was closest at finish.
Dropped back and trailed field throughout the race. Never quickened in the home straight.
Raced along the rails in midfield. Checked at 700 M and was 4Ls back making home turn. Never picked up and remained on at same pace.
Raced behind midfield. Checked at 700 M and slipped further back. Made up some ground in the straight.
Ridden along to be among leaders. 2-wide and a length behind the lead making the turn. Ran on fairly in the straight but unable to turn up a notch in the final stages.
3-wide behind midfield. Checked at 700 M. Steadily made up ground after straightening but unable to sustain effort final stages.
Steadily made up ground from a wide draw to take the lead at 800 M. Maintained advantage for majority of the home straight. Unable to find extra in the closing stages and was caught on the line.
Vied for the lead before dropping back near 800 M. 3Ls off the lead making home turn and faded gradually.
Better than midfield. 2-wide and 3Ls off the lead turning for home. Kept on well in the straight for a minor placing.
Raced in rear section. Raced along the rails at the turn and steadily made up ground in the straight to be closest on the line.
No worse than midfield. Severely checked at 700 M and was 4Ls off turning for home. Kept on fairly in the straight but posed no serious threat.
Among early leaders before slipping back to midfield near 800 M. Carried out at 700 M and was widest turning in. Lacked a response and weakened in the straight.
Sent on from wide gate, 1L back in 2nd out 2-wide at 800 M and left in front at point of home turn, headed 300 M out and faded fast.
Led from widest gate and crossed to lead on fence by 1L at 800 M, headed at top of home straight, broke down very badly shortly after.
3-wide with cover in midfield between 3Ls and 4Ls from the pace before straightening, found nothing off the bit.
Worse than midfield about 6Ls behind early tempo, 4-wide off last bend, stayed on pretty well past five or six rivals for a place.
Went back from wide gate and 8Ls behind at the 800 M, 5Ls down swinging for home, retrieved some minor late ground out wide.
A little keen in 9th or so at 1000 M when 5Ls behind leader, made some fair late headway in the straight with really troubling front trio.
Slow to muster pace and 4Ls down in 8th with cover at 1000 M, 2Ls down into the straight but very one-paced when it mattered.
In rear group about 8Ls adrift early on, driven along on the circle and made some minor late ground through the field, nearest at finish.
Keen at 1000 M when 3Ls back in 5th, alongside the winner turning in, always holding 2nd but found MORE BOUNTIFUL too good.
Mustered just enough pace to race 3-back on fence about 2Ls back in 6th at 1000 M, still on terms at last curve but faded soon after.
Another poor run, always rearward and at least 7Ls from the speed until straightening, dropped further behind.
Trapped 3 and 4-wide no cover throughout despite exiting gate 7, about 2Ls behind at halfway and closer entering straight, tired inside final furlong.
Slipped into box-seat at 1000 M despite exiting gate 9, close-up and raced tight turning for home, led 300 M out, always doing enough.
Difficult to load and slowest away, recovered to be 6Ls back in 10th or so on fence at 900 M, struggling on the circle and gone a long way out.
Midfield or better towards stands' rail between 1L and 2Ls from the speed until the furlong pole, ran on well late for a place.
Midfield at first and vied for the front from the 400 M to 200 M, had every chance to win but outpaced by GUNNER MAC late in the piece.
Slowest away, tried to tack across to main body of field from far draw, struggling in rear throughout.
About 4Ls off pace towards rear early on and got within 2Ls of the front at halfway but retreated hastily inside final furlong.
Slow to begin and 5Ls away early on, stealthy headway through to the field to be 1L down at 200 M, kept on well to lead inside final 30 M.
Tacked across to far side, about 1L from the pace at halfway, held by a similar margin to the line despite hanging left inside final 100 M.
Close up before being sent to the front 300 M out, hauled back by the front quartet inside the final 100 M, solid debut nonetheless.
Awkward break and slow to muster pace, 2Ls off pace in a second line of pursuers at the 400 M, outpaced by the majority.
A neck down in 2nd soon after the jump and disputing the advantage 400 M out, swamped at the furlong pole and held thereafter.
Made the early running along the stands' rail, joined at the 400 M and offered little in response as most of the remainder tore past inside the final 300 M.
Veered across to far rail and on terms with the speed at halfway, couldn't lie up when tempo increased again inside final 300 M.
Midfield initially before being sent on to join a line of six vying for the lead 400 M out, fractionally held by the principals inside final 200 M.
Quietly handled in centre at first, headway to challenge 400 M out and given every chance to at least place, tended to hang a little in final stages.
Disappointing run, never really on terms with principals when worse than midfield and at least 2Ls or 3Ls from the speed throughout. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Hard ridden early but failed to muster, behind midfield, 5-1/2Ls off the leader, suited by the fast tempo, but trapped 3 to 4-wide throughout and lost ground, never responded.
Settled 4-1/2Ls off the leader along the fence, benefited by the fast tempo, made ground 400 M, run ended 100 M.
Pushed to take the rail and led by 1L at fast early sectionals, used up too much fuel and weakened quickly last 250 M.
Hard ridden early but no early speed, suited by the fast pace but never competitive at rear.
Settled just behind midfield, 6Ls off the leader, benefited by the fast pace and the rails-run, lacked room in straight, progressed steadily to win.
3Ls off the fast pace along the fence, travelled nicely, closed the race off strongly 200 M, just beaten by less than one length in 4th.
Eased back, 6Ls off the leader, helped by the fast pace, however trapped 4 to 5-wide throughout and lost too much ground, checked severely 500 M and almost fell, flattened afterwards.
Pushed forward, sat 3Ls off the fast pace 2 to 3-wide, very one paced and just held ground in straight.
Pushed to occupy a prominent spot, 1-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, harmed by the fast tempo, dropped off 300 M.
Eased back, 7Ls off the leader 2 to 4-wide, favoured by the fast pace, made ground 200 M.
Eased to sit in midfield, 4Ls off the leader 2 to 3-wide, benefited by the fast pace, held up 4-2, no dash when clear.
Eased back as usual, 9Ls off the leader on the rails, helped by the fast pace, blocked 4-2, progressed steadily and grabbed a close 3rd.
Pushed to obtain the box seat, not suited by the fast early sectionals, led 250 M, ran on strongly to the line, overhauled 50 M, just beaten by a neck in 2nd.
Pushed forward, sat in front of midfield, trapped 3-wide, then moved up 1000 M 1L off the leader 2-wide, harmed by the fast pace, weakened quickly 400 M.
Broke well from the widest barrier. Remained wide in forward of midfield down far side. Effort when 3-wide no cover around home bend. Soon dropped out from midfield into straight.
Began slowly. Quickly recovered to one-back position on rails. One-paced under pressure in the run home.
Jumped best and ridden for early speed. Soon shuffled back to forward of midfield position. Saved ground on rails turning in. Ran home one-paced.
Not far off. In 4th just over 3Ls off the pace rounding home bend. One-paced in the run home.
Did not begin well. Remained in last few to straight. Tight run early in straight. Ran on steadily thereafter to be nearest at finish. (Tactic questioned.)
Quickly picked up down centre of far side for mid-division position. Obtained cover in similar position rounding home bend. Gave ground into straight.
Broke well. Settled in rear of midfield. Commenced move after straightening. Responded well to take charge closing stages. Won convincingly.
Settled at the back after beginning from wide barrier. Trailed the field into straight. Made siginficant progress down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Began only fairly but gradually moved up to lead by home bend. Held clear advantage turning for home and over 3Ls clear 200 M out. No extra under pressure when swooped by winner close to home.
Lacked pace early and remained in last few to straight. Making modest headway when ran out of room inside final 200 M. Not fully tested.
Began fairly. Soon picked up speed before settling 2 wide in 3rd about 2Ls off the pace. Ran home one-paced and quickly overhauled inside final 200 M.
Settled at the back. Making good late progress when tightened for a run close to home. (Bled.)
Settled behind midfield. Minor interference at 250 M. Finished off race strongly down centre of track inside final 200 M.
Began fairly in mid-division. Held similar spot on rails to straight. Soon found no extra.

Slightly slow out, assumed a spot in mid-division 3 to 4Ls off pace with cover, travelled nicely on bend but ran into traffic on straightening, checked severely near 250 M and as a result not ridden out to the end of the race.

Average break, raced behind midfield 6Ls off the pace, had a comfortable trip with cover, held up early in straight, powered home strongly once cleared at 300 M, cut down rivals 50 M out to win with something to spare.
Quickly into stride, urged to take up running on fence at a steady tempo, held slight advantage turning in, soon levelled, unable to keep up and faded inside 200 M.
One of the first to jump, stayed close to the pace and never far off the leader, had every chance in straight but found little under pressure, dropped out quickly passing 200 M.
Fast into stride, taken forward as expected, settled one out one back as they turned, worked from 300 M, hit front briefly before overhauled 100 M out. A game performance.
Away with them, drifted back to a rearward position 6Ls behind leader, 2 wide and struggling on turning in, didn't find and weakened last 200 M.
Began with them, positioned 3Ls behind leader travelling 3 wide without cover, closed enough turning in, lacked usual finish and just ran on to take 5th.
Checked shortly after start, taken to rails racing in mid-division about 4Ls back, difficult to settle in middle stages, kept to inside on straight but was badly held up, not tested as a result.

Jumped fairly, settled in a spot better than midfield 3Ls behind leader, travelled well throughout, kicked home 400 M, stuck to task really well to take 2nd on the line but was no match to the winner.

Began awkwardly, taken back towards the rear on fence 6Ls back, slightly held up early in straight, picked up OK when cleared 300 M out, shifted out in run to line but nevertheless a respectable performance after a long absence.

Purposely taken back from a wide barrier, had a quiet trip in the rear along the fence, shifted out to challenge in straight but was not able to pick up, finished tailed off. (Jockey's tactics questioned.)
Quickly away from an inside alley, rolled forward to position just behind leader, had difficulty obtaining clear running on straightening, not cleared until 250 M, kept on OK without threatening.
Amongst the first few to jump but gradually shuffled back to last, 7Ls to make up coming out of the bend, challenged down the wide outside but couldn't quicken, ran home one-paced.
Even break, assumed a midfield spot 4 to 5Ls back, ran wide throughout the trip, fought on under pressure on straightening and made even progress to the line.
Standard jump and allowed to drift back from an awkward draw, raced 3 wide towards rear 6Ls back, forced 4 wide on circle, made steady headway without looking likely in straight.
Out on line, took a midfield spot on rails 3Ls or so from pace, no excuses in run, still in traffic on turning, into clear at 300 M, didn't dash but worked to line nicely.

Away nicely, assumed ideal spot 1 out 1 back, had fair run when speed slackened, in between horses turning, clear passing 400 M and challenged strongly but couldn't sprint with first two inside final furlong.
Relatively well away, pressed forward but was caught wide without cover 2Ls back, aided by steady pace to bend, challenged soon after turning and in mix to 200 M before run ended.
First to hit ground, went on to take up running easily, ran race to suit in front, increased speed at 400 M, kept on to 250 M before run ended and simply battled away late.

Taken back from a wide gate, ended up 6 to 7Ls away at tail always racing solo at rear, not helped when pace steadied, switched widest turning, closed over the top with breathtaking finish to score easily. Remarkable win.
Began smartly, pushed forward to race outside leader, had fair run once pace steadied, 1/2L down on turning, still in mix at 300 M but couldn't lift a gear after that and faded late.
Away OK, taken back to race 4 wide without cover behind midfield, did plenty of work in run, improved to be 4Ls down turning, held ground evenly in run home without looking likely.

Standard jump, drifted back to race in 2nd half of field, raced keenly when pace steadied, 3 wide with cover on circle held up passing 200 M, closed off reasonably in circumstances to be nearest on line.
Standard jump, ended up 5Ls or so away on rails, had a soft run but not aided by pace, saved ground on bend, made limited progress along inside in home stretch.
Began fairly, positioned nicely in midfield 4Ls off bend, not used in mid-section, not aided by steady pace, couldn't sprint when asked, checked when tiring in straight.

Began well, took a prominent position on back of leader, raced keenly throughout, still in between runners on bend, took inside runs turning and closed nicely when clear but proved no match for winner.
No early pace, raced in rearward division 5Ls off speed, back between horses to bend, made no real progress, just held ground in straight.
Average jump, ended up in midfield 4Ls off pace, enjoyed a reasonable run in mid-section, improved into clear running on turning, looked a chance to 200 M before run ended.
Began with them, drove through to race on the back of leader, had a far run to bend, took inside runs turning, held ground evenly without threatening in straight.
Ordinary getaway, settled closer to rear 6Ls from front, raced keenly throughout, rear last on turning, only passed tired horses in run to line.
Broke nicely, pressed forward however caught without cover 3 wide 2Ls back, had a hard run to turn, soon faded in straight.
Taken back from an awkward alley, raced 3 wide 6Ls back, had trail but forced to cover ground. Still well back on turning, made no serious progress at business end.
Tardy to begin, ended up behind midfield 4 to 5Ls from leaders, no excuses in middle stages held up at 300 M, lacked a response when clear and just battled away in straight.
Amongst first few to break, drove forward to hold a close up spot 2 wide behind leaders, same margin back at 400 M, had clear running from top of straight but peaked on efforts at 200 M.
Standard beginning, ended up a little close the normal 3 to 4Ls away on rails, had a ground saving trip throughout, didn't see daylight until 200 M and closed off nicely for placing.

Began with rest, ended up 4 to 5Ls away on rails, not used in middle stages, same margin down on turn, held up to 250 M, dashed well when clear but winner had gained momentum. Kept on soundly for 2nd.
Out with rest, posted 3 wide with a trail in midfield 4Ls back, did share of work to bend, improved 4 wide passing 500 M, struggled to pick up and couldn't make an impression in run to line.

Began well, assumed a more prominent role outside the leader, did share of work to get there, aided when pace slackened on circle, right there on turning, lacked required response and dropped out tamely. (See Racing Incidents.)
Fastest out, worked early section taking up lead, backed off tempo 1L clear on bend, kicked on turning, held off rivals to 200 M but condition gave out late.
No real pace, drifted back to rear 3 wide behind midfield 5Ls away, had cover but made to travel over extra ground, eased wide at 400 M, just plugged away down middle in straight.

No pace as usual, settled well back 6Ls off pace, suited by solid early pace, same margin back on turning, in traffic to 300 M, let down with a sharp sprint and quickly overhauled rivals, went on to score a soft win.
Niggled at early in midfield. Soon weakened out of contention after straightening.
Broke well. Held up in midfield. Commenced move turning in. Responded well to win readily.
Settled wide behind midfield to straight. Produced some late impression without threatening closing stages.
Soon took up running. Led and raced keenly at times, going some 3Ls clear around home bend. Kept on before tiring and overhauled over 100 M out.
Settled in midfield. Found nothing under pressure in straight.
Slightly sluggish at start. Travelled on rails in rear of midfield. Ran home steadily down straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled wide in rear. Carried wider turning for home. Ran on down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Soon taken back to rear of field. Similar in last few turning in. Made moderate headway without threatening.
Began well. With leaders early. Taken back to stalk leader approaching home bend. Ran on alongside fellow placegetter early in straight. Hit front over 100 M out only to be run down close to home.
Soon taken across from wide barrier to race in rear of field. Made steady headway in straight without threatening. (Tactic questioned.)
Restrained on jumping, settling in last few. Made no impression in straight. (Tactic questioned.)
Jumped best. Soon taken back to travel 2Ls off the speed in 3rd or 4th. Similar turning in. Fought on steadily without threatening.
Wide in midfield to straight. Faded under pressure.
With leaders early. Taken back to race about 2Ls off the speed on rails in 3rd or 4th. Slightly further back turning for home. Fought on steadily in straight. (Jockey to be interviewed.)
Began with rest, in midfield 3Ls off the leader 2-wide, used little in trip, had little room in straight and was checked near 200 M, shifted out to challenge but no progress.
Reasonable jump, drifted back to a rearward spot 5Ls back, taken wide on the turn, picked up gradually in straight, hit lead at 50 M to score a workmanlike victory.
Quickly away, settled 3-wide behind midfield 4Ls off pace, gradually made ground in mid-section, hit front 200 M out, kept on well but unable to sustain effort to line, headed last 50 M.
Even break, moved up gradually to lead on rails under a moderate tempo, unable to sustain effort in straight, headed entering 250 M, weakened towards the line.
Eased back on jumping from the outside barrier, soon racing detached in rear 6Ls back, came very wide on the turn, finished the last 400 M in good time despite jockey dropping his whip in straight.
Jumped fairly, settled better than midfield about 2-3Ls off pace, caught wide and without cover on turning, had every chance in straight but didn't find any. A disappointing AWT debut.
Slightly slow out, ridden forward as expected, about 2Ls behind leader under a moderate tempo, unable to pick up on straightening and just plugged away to line.
Reasonable break, rolled to a rail position in midfield, didn't travel too well on turning, steadied entering 200 M, never a factor.
Began well, positioned in midfield spot 3-4Ls behind, travelled comfortably with cover, made run with the winner in straight, no clear run over concluding stages, could have finished closer.
Away with them, hard pressed to stay close to the pace, responded okay under pressure in straight, kept on before giving ground inside 100 M.
Moderate start, drifted back to near last trailing 5-6Ls behind, made limited progress down the straight getting past beaten runners only.
Good break from the inside barrier, settled in midfield along the rails, unbalanced near 700 M, peeled out to challenge in straight but found little in run to line.
Missed the start and travelled midfield the fence. Never really got into the race from that point on.
Began awkwardly then travelled midfield, 2 deep with cover. Struggled in the straight.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Worked forward to lead on the fence. Faded inside the furlong.
Box seated and loomed a challenger near the 200 M, but weakened over the final stages.
Raced behind midfield, 1 off with cover. Commenced to look for opportunities after the 500 M, switching out before the turn, let down nicely to claim the prize well before the post.

Eased soon after the start to avoid the heels of another runner and settled in the last 3. Was steadied again at the 700 M when buffeted, then was left racing wide and without cover thereafter. Kept on well late.
Raced 1 out 1 back. No excuses.
Raced towards the rear along the fence. Made some steady ground late without threatening and close to the finish had to be eased.
Began well, then was ridden along to be prominent, eventually racing outside the leader near the 700 M. Commenced to tire from the 500 M, and was a spent force in the straight, finishing well back.

Pulled hard early and despite looking for cover was unable to do so, travelling behind the speed, 3 deep out on a limb. Rallied well hitting the front passing the 200 M, but was mowed down close to the wire.
From a wide barrier, in the early stages was taken across behind runners and settled midfield 3-wide with cover. Peeled to the outside in the run home and battled away soundly.
Behind midfield and was wide and without cover for most of the race. Near last on straightening and didn't find much in the straight.
Jumped fairly from a wide draw and allowed to drift back to race at the rear. Ran on without quickening in the straight.
Raced 3-wide behind midfield. Ran on fairly in the straight.
2-wide at midfield. Kept on well in the straight to make the frame.

Jumped only fairly and was behind midfield early stages. Steadily made up ground and was alongside the leader making the turn. Kept on well in the straight but unable to hold off the late charging winner. (Bled.)
Ridden out of the gates. 2 to 3Ls off the lead at 800 M. Remained 3Ls off in 3rd place turning in and kept on steadily thereafter.
Raced along the rails behind midfield. Saved ground making home turn and rallied in the straight. Charged through runners in the final stages to claim the race.
Drifted back from a wide draw. Raced in rear section and trailed field into home straight. Made up some late ground over beaten runner.
3-wide and no worse than midfield. Steadily made up ground in the straight and was closest at finish.
Ridden out of the gates and was racing behind the lead at 800 M. 2-wide and 3Ls off the pace in 4th place turning for home. Weakened in the straight.
Jumped well from widest draw and got the lead. Disputed lead turning for home and regained a clear advantage after straightening. Unable to find extra and faded out of contention final 100 M.
Slow into stride and raced in rear section. Near last on straightening and only ran past some tired runners.
Slowest to start, always well behind and detached from the main body of the field at the top of the home straight, weak run.
Never any better than midfield and always a respectful 7Ls or 8Ls margin from the speed up front, plugged on past a few tired rivals in the straight.
Fractious in gates, led by 1L on the fence at first, headed just before the home turn and dropped out very quickly. (Bled.)
Raced in 4th about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace down the back, a little further back taking last bend, had his chance to place but was outstayed in last few strides.
Settled midfield but between 5Ls and 6Ls from the pace until the straight, watched the winner disappear into the distance, best of the also-rans.
Quietly ridden towards rear at least 7Ls from the speed until the stretch, ran on past tired rivals in the straight to nick a place.
1L back in 3rd out 2-wide at 800 M and 4Ls back in same position into home straight, one-paced thereafter a lost a place in the final 200 M.
Fractious beforehand and very wide down the back straight, steadily slipped further behind from halfway, performance deemed unacceptable.
Midfield at halfway about 5Ls behind leaders but struggling turning for home and yielded further ground.
3-back the rails in 5th about 5Ls from the early pace, hard pressed to hold this position on straightening, didn't succeed.
Performance deemed unacceptable, fractious in gates beforehand and always rearward, eased down from the top of the home straight. (Lame next day.)
Close to pace but very wide along back straight, edged inside on the circle, led turning for home, driven out to pull increasingly clear, very impressive.
Raced with head up early, midfield 2-wide and 5Ls off pace at halfway, closer turning in, led 200 M out, stayed on well for comfortable success.
4-wide no cover throughout, towards rear about 8Ls from the speed at halfway, extra work took its toll in the home straight.
Always worse than midfield, at least 8Ls from initial pace, made some headway on the circle but couldn't sustain the run in final stages.
10Ls last at the 1000 M and 7Ls back at the final turn, made some small late ground but offered no real threat to the principals.
3-back the fence in 5th about 5Ls from pace at halfway, closer at top of the straight but didn't have much room final 300 M and not fully tested.
Slowest away, 4-back the rails about 6Ls from initial tempo, same margin back off last bend inside the winner, had his chance to place, one-paced late.
5-wide no cover looping field at first bend and clear by 1L on fence from 1200 M to 400 M, soon headed but didn't drop away entirely to his credit.
Weak sort of run, close up in 2nd about 2Ls down at 800 M before leading briefly about 300 M out, soon headed again and faded away quite tamely.
Box-seated 2Ls or so from the speed in 3rd on fence until the home straight, tried to challenge on inside and thereabouts 200 M out, weak thereafter.
3Ls back in 4th at the 800 M and just 2Ls behind into stretch, upsides the winner at the 200 M but lacked an extra kick and missed quinella late.
10Ls behind pace in 12th at the 1000 M, still rearward but just 6Ls back off final curve, retrieved a little ground without threatening.
In rear bunch about 9Ls from the speed at 1000 M, checked at the 700 M and 6Ls away spinning for home, no impression on the run-in.
One from rear in 13th about 10Ls from the speed on fence at 1000 M, headway turning for home and ran on well out wide late to nick 2nd.
Caught 3-wide no cover down the back straight when about 6Ls off the pace in 10th or so, failed to be even moderately competitive. (Lame next day.)
Hard ridden to cross and sit outside the lead, enjoyed the slow early sectionals, led 300 M, ran on strongly to the line, just beaten by a nose in last stride.
Hard ridden to keep up in midfield, raced 4 to 5-wide throughout and lost too much ground, harmed by the slow pace, soon dropped off 400 M and tailed out.

Eased to sit behind midfield and trapped 3-wide, 5Ls off the leaders, harmed by the slow pace, swept forward 5 to 6-wide at home bend, lost too much ground, dashed well 300 M despite all negative racing situations.
Eased to sit in midfield, 4Ls off the leaders on the rails, not suited by the slow early sectionals, little dash in straight.
Eased to rear and took rail, 6Ls off the leaders, harmed by the slow pace, momentarily held up 400 M, showed little dash when clear.
Bumped start, at back, 6Ls off the leaders 3 to 4-wide, harmed by the slow tempo, just ran on fairly in final stages.
Bumped start, travelled worse than midfield, 5Ls off the leaders 2 to 4-wide, harmed by the slow pace, no progress in straight.
Hold rail and led easily by 1/2L at advantageous slow early sectionals, however soon weakened 300 M.
Pushed forward, 3Ls behind the leader along the fence, helped by the slow tempo, however just held ground in straight and held 3rd.
Settled just behind the leaders, 3-wide, benefited by the slow tempo, closed the raced off strongly to score its first win by a narrow margin.
Took a more prominent spot in front of midfield, 3Ls off the leaders 3 to 4-wide, not suited by the slow tempo, lacked turn of foot, flattened 250 M.
Worse than midfield along the fence, 6Ls off the leaders, dashed well 250 M despite not suited by the slow tempo.
Not suited by the slow pace, trapped 4 to 5-wide throughout and lost ground, never competitive at rear and tailed out.
Eased to sit in midfield, travelled nicely, 4-1/2Ls off the leaders 2 to 3-wide, not suited by the slow pace, never responded.
Not far off in 4th with rails run. Gained a 2L 3rd round home bend. Soon weakened after straightening.
Raced 3-wide without cover in midfield. Shuffled back to last few around home bend and widest turning for home. Made steady headway down centre of straight past beaten horses.

Jumped well to hold rails run. Soon tucked in behind pace but went one off the rails to avoid heels turning into far side. Lost 3rd coming out of back straight. Fought on nicely after home turn but unable to sustain effort 200 M.
Settled in rear. Made good ground inside final 200 M down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.

Broke well from wide draw sharing early pace 3-wide rounding home bend. Took over and crossed to rails turning into far side but soon slided back to track leader. Similar turning for home. Fought on gamely to assert over 150 M out.
Soon settled near rails in rear of midfield. Did not find much room over 200 M out. Fought on well late.
Always well behind. Failed to make any impression in straight.
Settled one-off in midfield. Looked beaten when coming under strong pressure early in straight. However, fought on doggedly to reach distant 3rd late.
Broke well to contest early lead. Briefly settled for one-out-one-back position around stable bend. Soon took up running 1000 M out and held 1L advantage until swamped over 150 M out.
Soon driven to better than midfield position after beginning from wide barrier. Travelled in 5th about 3Ls off the pace most of way down far side. Similar turning in but ran home one-paced.
Stumbled at start. Soon travelled at the back. Tailed-off from far side. (Lame next day.) (Questioned for unacceptable performance.)
Settled on rails in forward of midfield. Gave ground steadily after straightening.

Missed the break badly losing considerable ground. Joined the tail of the field turning into far side, improving to rear of midfield home bend. Nearest when midfield on rails turning for home. Soon weakened.
Raced wide in rear of midfield after beginning from poor draw. Kept on same pace in straight.
A fair jump, mustered enough speed to secure a position on rails 3-4Ls back, had a ground-saving trip but no extra to offer after straightening, gradually weakened towards the line.
Eased back after start, had a relaxed trip near the rear 9Ls back, taken wide and niggled along on bend, dashed well down the outside but the first two were too good.
Reasonable jump, rolled forward to race just behind leaders on rails, saved ground throughout, found little under pressure and ran home one-paced.

Settled patiently behind midfield 6-7Ls from the leader, had an easy trip along the fence, eased out to challenge on straightening, made a strong rally and swept past the 2nd 50 M out for an impressive victory.
Fair start, pressed on early to race in a forward position just off the pace, 3-wide without cover for most of the trip, under pressure soon into straight, weakened late after hard run.
Began with rest, parked into a 3-wide slot behind midfield 6Ls off the pace, urged along turning in, struggled to pick up and beat tired runners only.
Quickly into stride, taken to a midfield spot about 3Ls off the pace, improving on the turn, struggled to pick up when they dashed and just held ground in straight.
Moderate beginning, soon taken up a spot in the rear far back from the leader, 10Ls away in mid-section, pushed along on turn, found little under pressure and just plugged away to line.
Worked across from an outside barrier to lead at steady tempo, didn't relax with a runner travelling on outside, under pressure turning home, dropped out rapidly from 300 M and finished tailed out.
Away with them, unable to cross from outside and was caught wide on the first turn, settled about 4Ls behind leader, driven to lead entering 150 M, kept on but was just caught over final stages.
Pressed forward to race alongside leader under a moderate tempo, drew clear on straightening, looked a chance but gradually weakened inside 150 M.
Taken back on jumping, raced as the back-marker 11Ls behind leader for the major part of the race, still well back on turning, came challenge on extreme outside but ran home one-paced.
Lost ground after an awkward start, settled towards the rear with cover, tracked nicely to turn, switched wide for a run but failed to muster anything in straight. Disappointing run.
Broke nicely, parked into a slot in mid-division 4-5Ls behind leader, remained there on turning, made even progress down the straight under hands and heels. (Dropped whip.)
Quickly into stride, drifted back to take up a midfield spot 5Ls off the pace, used little in running, picked up very well under hands and heels and had the race won 100 M out. A comfortable victory.
Away with them, taken to a spot better than midfield about 3Ls back, had a smooth trip throughout, not able to quicken under pressure, finished off the race one-paced.
Good start from the inside barrier, rolled forward to lead at a moderate tempo, travelled well enough going into straight but unable to shrug off the field, collared near 150 M.
Nice break, difficult to settle in early stages, rolled on to the front racing prominently behind leaders, unable to go with them under pressure and just plugged away to line.
Lacked early speed and was hard ridden to maintain a position in mid-division, didn't relax throughout the trip, under pressure on turning, dropped out quickly inside 300 M.
Average beginning, pressed on to race alongside leader under a moderate tempo, had every chance in straight but unable to find extra gear, just held ground in run to line.
Reasonable jump, slotted into a position worse than midfield, 7Ls to make up on turn, had little to give and faded towards the line.
Blundered on jumping, soon recovered and settled towards the rear 10Ls back, came to extreme outside on straightening, made very little progress and beat tired runners only.
Quick start, gradually drifted back, ended up racing 9Ls behind leaders, unable to offer a finish in straight and was beaten a long way.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.

Away fairly, taken to a forward position just behind leaders, travelled well along rails and suited by speed, boxed-in on straightening, into clear 350 M but couldn't find extra under a forceful ride, just held ground to line.
Jumped OK, gradually taken back to a rearward position 8Ls back, switched wide to challenge, made slight progress from well back, hung out in run to line.
Very slow to begin and lost ground, regathered to race in a rearward position wide and without cover, dropped out rapidly in straight as early hard run took toll.
Taken back on jumping, raced along the fence about 6Ls behind leader, hung out in running and difficult to be restrained, switched to outside on straightening but found little under pressure.
Showed some early dash to settle on the pace, 2-wide. Had every chance and gave ground near the 200 M.
Settled in a handy position, 1 off with cover. Found the line well.
Began awkwardly and settled midfield the fence. Ran on smartly over the final furlong.
Raced in 3rd last position the fence. Didn't give a lot in the straight.
In the early and middle stages travelled wide and without cover, on the back of the speed. Got to the wire honestly considering the ground covered.
Worked forward from gate 1 to travel 3 back the fence. Rolled out turning for home and closed off strongly.
Led as customary and opened a large break by the home turn. Held together for as long as possible to make every post a winner.
Chased the leader throughout and battled on gamely in the straight.
Was caught wide early before obtaining cover near the 800 M, to race 3 deep, midfield. Struggled over the concluding stages.
Settled in last position. Kept to the fence in the run to the post but failed to deliver when asked for an effort finishing well back.
Failed to muster early speed and after receiving interference near the 800, lost its position and settled in 2nd last position, 1 off with cover. Never recovered and was well beaten.
Positioned towards the rear of the field, 2 deep with cover. Came down the outside in the run home passing tiring runners.
Raced 2-wide at midfield. Quickened 300 M out and closed the race off strongly.
Behind midfield early stages. 3-wide and 4Ls off the lead making the turn. Kept on fairly in the straight but unable to find more in the closing stages.
Niggled forward to take the lead at 1600 M. Had a length's advantage turning for home and kept on well in the straight to hold off late challengers.
Niggled along to a forward position. 2-wide and kept within a length of the leader. Weakened after straightening.
Better than midfield. 2Ls back on the fence making home turn. Kept on steadily in the home straight but was steadied 250 M out. Made up some late ground.
Botched the start and was ridden forward. Raced 2-wide and within 2Ls of the leader. Ran on same pace the straight.
No worse than midfield but was wide and without cover. 3-wide and 2Ls off the lead making home turn. Unable to keep pace after straightening and gradually faded.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.

Raced along the rails behind midfield. 3 to 4Ls back making home turn. Had trouble getting a clear run in the early part of the straight. Quickened once in the clear but unable to sustain rally in the closing stages.
Botched the start and trailed field until the turn. Widest rounding home turn and steadily made up ground in the straight.
Settled behind midfield and was wide and without cover. Allowed to stride forward and was at midfield making the turn. Unable to quicken in the straight.
Failed to muster speed and raced in rear section. Caught in traffic in the early part of the straight. Ran on strongly final 200 M.
Settled at midfield early stages. Commenced to slip back after 1000 M. Trailed field at the turn and was detached thereafter.
Settled in rear section. Remained towards the back on straightening and closed off with a strong rally.
Led by a neck on the fence at 1000 M, going well when clear by 1L turning for home, always holding a decisive break from then on.
Performance deemed unacceptable, trapped 3-wide no cover when 1L back in 3rd at 800 M, hard pressed to lie up turning in, quickly left behind.
Box-seated in 3rd about 2Ls off pace on fence at 1000 M, in 2nd turning for home but lacked any acceleration when the tempo quickened.
Rearward at least 4Ls or 5Ls from the speed until the straight, failed to make much of an impact in the final 400 M.
Over-raced for most of back straight when 4-wide no cover in rear, 5Ls last and 5-wide (widest of all) into the stretch, no impression.
Towards rear at least 4Ls or 5Ls from the pace down the back, without clear running off final curve, soon clear and one-paced on the run-in.
3-wide with cover around midfield in middle stages when 4Ls from the pace, 4-wide off home bend, very weak inside final 200 M. (Tactic questioned.)
3-back on fence in midfield at halfway and similar off last bend, stayed on fairly well along the inner for a place.
Went back from widest gate, never travelling well in rear and 5Ls adrift swinging into the straight, never got to the principals.
Around 10th and 5Ls from the early speed, crept a little closer taking last bend, made some nice late ground out wide and barely missed 4th.
Handy position in 'one-out-one-back' spot through to the 600 M, tight for room on straightening, clear 350 M out but couldn't get to the winner.
Disappointing run, keen at first then niggled along in midfield at halfway, pressured and 4Ls behind wheeling for home, soon beaten. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Midfield with cover no worse than 3Ls or 4Ls from the pace before the home turn, had every chance to place but just scraped in for 4th.
3-wide no cover before slipping in 2-wide and half a length back in 2nd at 1000 M, still close-up at top of home straight but quickly dropped out. (Bled.)
One from rear 8Ls behind leader at 1000 M, steady improvement to be 4Ls back in mid-division at top of home straight, stayed on well to get 3rd on line.
3-wide with cover in midfield about 4Ls from early pace, 3Ls off front spinning for home, briefly held up at 200 M, got up inside final strides.
2Ls back in 3rd on fence at the 800 M when a bit keen, hampered before the home turn and soon struggling, eased some way from the line.
3-back on the fence when 4Ls off speed in midfield at 1000 M, similarly placed rounding home turn, didn't pick up and eased late when beaten.
A little better than midfield with cover about 3Ls or so from the pace until home straight, very one-paced to conclude.
Restrained in 11th initially, headway on the circle to go 2Ls back in 3rd, led 200 M out, stayed on well but grabbed by winner inside final two bounds.
Slow to begin and 6Ls back in 12th at the 1200 M, hardly any closer entering home straight, made only very minor late ground.
5-back on the rails about 6Ls from the pace early on, further back in rear off last turn, made good late headway on outside and just missed a place. (Questioned.)
8Ls last at 1200 M, 6Ls down turning for home out wide, 3Ls back in mid-division at the furlong pole but couldn't draw any closer.
4-back along the fence down back straight in midfield about 5Ls from the speed, slipped back to last on straightening, remained behind.
3-wide without cover throughout, 2Ls back in 4th or 5th at halfway, 1L down in 2nd entering the straight, one-paced inside final 200 M.
2-wide and 1L back in 2nd at halfway, led about 500 M out but headed at the 200 M and missed out on a place in the final few metres.
2-wide in midfield about 4Ls from the speed at first, checked 500 M out, still with 4Ls to make up into straight, couldn't quite reach principals.
Crossed from widest gate to lead by 1L at 1400 M, headed 500 M out and beaten before the straight, later found with irregular heartbeat and distressed. (Lame next day.)
Pushed forward, 3Ls behind the fast pace 2-wide, ran on well to the line and grabbed a close 3rd.
Hard ridden to take the rail and led by 1L at fast early sectionals, hung on until 250 M weakened.
Went forward as usual, sat 1L off the leader 2-wide, not suited by the fast tempo, emptied 200 M.
Eased back, 8Ls off the leader 2 to 3-wide, helped by the fast early tempo, made ground 300 M, run ended 100 M.
Eased back, 9Ls off the leader 3 to 4-wide, helped by the fast early tempo, ran on ok in final stages.
Pushed forward, 4Ls behind the fast pace on the rails, lacked turn of foot in last quarter, just ran on ok.
Hard ridden early but lacked early speed, 8Ls off the leader along the fence, benefited by the fast pace, made some ground in straight.
Pushed early but did not muster, 8-1/2Ls off the leader 2 to 3-wide, favoured by the fast tempo, just ran on fairly in straight.
Midfield, 6-1/2Ls off the leader 2 to 3-wide, favoured by the fast pace, progressed steadily 300 M but without much threats.
Eased to rear, 10Ls off the leader 2-wide, favoured by the fast pace, swept forward 5-wide on straightening to make run, just ran on ok.
Eased to sit about midfield along the fence, 7Ls off the leader, suited by the fast pace, momentarily held up 4-2, closed the raced off strongly when clear, just beaten by a nose in 2nd.
Hard ridden to occupy the box seat, not suited by the fast early sectionals, lacked room 400 M, just held ground in straight.
Eased at start, 10-1/2Ls off the leader at tail, benefited by the fast pace and the rail-run, made ground steadily last 300 M.
Pushed early to obtain a spot just better than midfield, 5Ls off the leader 2 to 3-wide, benefited by the fast pace, progressed steadily 400 M to win.
Settled in rear of bunched field. Produced for a run onto course proper. Kept on steadily without threatening.
Settled in rear of bunched field racing with cover down centre of the track. Produced for a run passing 400 M. Quickened well to assert 200 M out and win easily.
Not far off in the centre of the track. Gradually faded from 400 M.
Within striking distance in midfield. Failed to quicken to threaten inside final 400 M.
Settled in rear of bunched field. Steadied for a stride 200 M out when making ground. Closed off race nicely to do best work late.
Never far off. Kept on without quickening closing stages.
Prominent to halfway. Dropepd out tamely.
Began awkwardly. Lacked pace and soon tailed off.
Always in rear of the field and never seen with a chance.
Prominent. No extra inside final 200 M.
Close up early. Weakened from halfway.
Quickly took up running and attempted to make all, holding 1L advantage most of way before run down by smart winner inside 200 M.
Midfield within 3Ls of pace. Kept on steadily under pressure without quickening.
Well there within 1L of pace. Faded under pressure over 200 M out.
Slow to begin, ridden to stay with the group, settled towards the rear on fence, kept to inside but unable to obtain clear running early in straight, ran on OK once into clear. Needed the experience.
Standard getaway, eased to race behind midfield about 4Ls back, 2-wide with cover, tracked nicely on bend but found little when asked, just kept on at same pace in run to line.
Away with them, taken to a midfield position on the rail 3Ls back, used little in running, didn't get a clear run until 300 M, made solid progress to finish 2nd under hands and heels riding.
Fast to begin, never far off the pace but travelled wide and without cover, moved closer to leaders on turning, made a strong run to hit lead passing 350 M, kept on well to hold off late challenge.
Fair jump, didn't go with the early race and settled towards the rear 6Ls back, 4-wide on the turn, made some headway in straight, tired and hang out inside 100 M.
Fast into stride, gradually shuffled back to race 3-wide in mid-division, under pressure on turning and giving ground, soon out of contention, finished tailed out.
Taken back on jumping, ridden patiently in the rear about 7Ls back, switched wide to challenge but struggled in finish making. No impression.
Reasonable jump, settled in a better than midfield position 2Ls behind leader, well covered on the turn, unable to sprint with them under pressure, dropped out quickly inside 200 M.
Quickly into stride, rolled on to a prominent position one out one back, had a comfortable trip under moderate tempo, gave the eventual winner a run in straight before weakening from 200 M.
Moderate break, settled in mid-division 3-wide and 4Ls behind, improving round the bend, had every chance in the straight but lacked extra gear to feature in the finish.
Began in line, drifted back to take up a spot about 6Ls behind leader, niggling on turn, angled into clear at 400 M, closed hard but ran flat over the concluding stages.
Eased to rear after start and trailed leader 7 to 8Ls, caught wide on the turn, offered nothing in the finish and was beaten a long way.
Average start, pressed forward to take up a spot just behind leader, tracked well on turning, checked early in straight, regathered to make even progress towards the line.
Normal beginning, rolled forward from an outside barrier to lead at a moderate tempo, soon under pressure on straightening and weakened quickly inside 200 M.
Away well enough, raced 3 wide without cover 1L away, did plenty of work on speed, struggling on turning, folded soon after straightening.
Out with rest, caught wide from an awkward draw, raced 3 wide with cover 3Ls back, did share of work to bend, didn't pick up turning, gradually battled at same pace and came again late for 2nd.
Standard jump, positioned behind midfield 5Ls from leaders, travelled well throughout, improved position 3 wide on bend, made good ground down middle to be nearest on line.
Began well, took a spot 3 to 4Ls back in midfield, not asked in run, in between horses same margin down on turning, kept giving once clear at 250 M and gradually closed to make frame.
Began in line, assumed a position not far away 3Ls back on rails, had a soft trip throughout, couldn't pick up turning and battled away in straight.
Allowed to drift back from a wide alley, raced 3 wide 7Ls away, overraced throughout and covered ground, tracked 4 wide turning, made minor headway but run ended at 200 M.

Missed start and lost significant ground, shared rear 8 or so lengths away, 3 wide with cover from mid-point, still well back turning, made a little ground before emptied at 200 M. (See Racing Incidents regarding not striding out.)
Away smartly, pushed forward to race outside leader, had a fair run with standard tempo, still there shading leader on turning, kept in it for a long way but just peaked, made final 200 M.
Began in line, pushed up to race in 5th spot 2 to 3Ls away from lead, travelled well behind speed, eased into clear at 400 M and loomed up at 300 M, went to them easily and kept on for a strong win.
Taken back from outside gate, raced 8Ls off pace along inside, always back with last few, set a task turning, pursued inside runs and made gradual progress without threatening.
Restrained from a wide draw, raced in last few 8Ls from leaders, not used throughout, responded only moderately in straight and battled final furlong.
Out with rest, pushed up to hold a spot on leaders back, had no excuse in run, still right there turning, took inside runs in straight and just kept on evenly to be not far away in finish.

Restrained from a wide alley, ended up well back 6 to 7Ls away on rails, ridden quietly in mid-section, saved ground on inside, made many lengths in straight and snared place despite restricted room late.
showed usual pace to take up running, set speed to suit 1/2L clear throughout, still held a narrow advantage leaving bend, soon overhauled and faded last 300 M.
Standard jump, ended up 5Ls away in 2 wide line, had a fair run throughout, improved inside horses on circle, came with promising run at 250 M and levelled up but went down by a narrow margin late.
Fast away, took up a spot outside leader, didn't have it easy with even speed on, pushed along turning, soon in trouble and gave ground quickly.
Away with them, took a trail 3Ls back behind pace, enjoyed run of race in mid-section, made run at 400 M, kept giving in straight but could not find extra last bit.

First to hit ground, went on with it and took up running, set pace to suit 1L clear, kept increasing speed from 500 M, defied rivals to 200 M when overhauled, battled gamely once headed for a respectable 3rd.
Out in line, ended up 3 wide 3 to 4Ls back with cover, did share of work covering extra ground, urged along on turning, kept giving despite not really threatening and was not far away in finish.

Standard jump, back in rearward division 7Ls away, aided by even tempo, had huge task on bend, searching for runs turning and held up to 300 M, made many lengths between horses to finish an unlucky 5th.
Taken back from a wide alley, settled with two behind 7Ls away in 2 wide line, improved 3 wide on circle, switched widest in straight and made many lengths concluding stages.
No pace from outset, settled behind midfield 5 or more lengths back on fence, enjoyed an easy time to bend, improved between horses at 400 M, closed nicely final 200 M to be nearest on line.
Began with rest, positioned well on fence 3 to 4Ls away, not asked in mid-section, saved ground on rails turning, just closed at same pace in straight.
Standard jump, ended up in midfield 3 wide 6Ls away, drifted back on circle, urged along on turning, produced only a moderate close and struggled late.
No pace from outset, sharing rear more than 8Ls away, not asked to improve until turn, made wide run from 400 M but showed little and stayed rearward in run to line.
Ordinary getaway, soon sharing rear 8Ls away much further back than usual, always well back to bend, set impossible task but did pass some tired runners late. (See Racing Incidents.)
Well enough to begin, pressed on but caught 3 wide without cover 2Ls away, used plenty of petrol to bend, couldn't sustain effort and soon folded passing 300 M. (Mucopus.)

Began smartly, pressed forward to slot in behind leader, followed a solid speed throughout, angled out at top of straight, gradually took control passing 200 M and held off late challenge for an overdue win.

Rolled forward in search for lead, briefly took up running near the Rock, disputed lead on home bend, unable to sustain effort in straight and dropped out rapidly entering 100 M. (Intermittent displacement of the soft palate.)
Good start, drifted back to midfield 3Ls back racing 2-deep, checked near 600 M but quickly regathered, picked up well on straightening, swept into the lead 100 M out, kept on strongly to win.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Laced early speed, had to be ridden to maintain position in midfield 4Ls to leader, forced very wide on home turn, made even progress towards the line without threatening.
Began well, drifted back to race 3-wide behind leading group, forced wide on home bend, couldn't dash with them in straight and ran home one-paced.

Taken back on jumping, raced in a rearward position on the fence about 4Ls off pace, had a quiet run to bend, responded well under pressure but did not have the clearest of run in straight. (Finished 3rd, placed 2nd.)
Reasonable jump, held a midfield spot on the rail 3Ls back, severely checked and lost position near 600 M, taken to outside on straightening but unable to produce a finish.
Jumped well, raced prominently behind leading group, forced wide rounding home bend, made good headway inside 300 M, not far away in finish.

Fair to begin, took a better than midfield position on the rail not far off the pace, lost position when steadied near 600 M, boxed-in passing 150 M and unable to improve from there. Not fully tested.

A little slow to begin, assumed a rearward position trailing 4Ls to leaders, badly checked and lost 3Ls at 600 M, made limited progress from the back before running into traffic last 75 M. Never threatened.

Average start, rolled forward to take up running on the rail near 1100 M, soon pressed by runners on the outside, lost 2Ls when checked at 600 M, fought on gamely in straight and kept giving towards the line. (Finished 4th, placed 3rd.)
Taken back on jumping, taken across to the rail racing 6Ls back in last, steadied passing 600 M, made progress down the inside but didn't have clear passage entering 75 M. Not fully tested.
Pressed forward early then was eased near the 1200 M, to settle in the box seat. Rolled out rounding the home bend, lengthened nicely in the final stretch and cruised to victory.

Held the lead initially along the fence, but began to overrace. Continued to race keenly after being crossed near the 1200 M, then raced 1 out 1 back passing the 600 M, before tiring in the run to line.
Settled in about 3rd last spot, 1 to 2-wide with cover. Made reasonable ground out wide in the straight.
After being caught wide early, was allowed to stride forward and take up the lead passing the 1200 M. Was quickly caught early in the straight and faded in the run to the line.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Settled 2-wide, midfield with cover. Peeled out turning for home to follow the winner through, but couldn't make up the deficit, despite running on well.
Travelled in 2nd last position on the rails. Didn't have a lot of room close to the wire, while running on fairly.
Tracked the leader along the rails, had no excuses.
Whilst being taken back in the early stages was crowded for room and raced in last position. Finished off smartly from well back.
Worked forward to be prominent early before receiving a steady near the 1200 M and eventually settling 3 back on the fence. Stayed on satisfactorily over the concluding stages.
Didn't show a great deal of early pace and was permitted to settle towards the back of the field. Failed to close off. (See Racing Incidents.)
In the early stages travelled 3-wide and without cover before crossing to be joint leader near the 600 M. Kicked strongly over the concluding stages to finish in the frame.
2-wide and no worse than midfield. Never quickened in the straight and faded final stages.
Raced along the fence behind midfield. Made progress at home turn and was 3Ls back turning in. Only kept same pace in the straight.
Raced along the rails at midfield. Popped off the fence on straightening. Ran on fairly in the straight but unable to find enough to challenge top pair final stages.
Best out and raced 2-wide behind the pace. Kept on fairly but unable to turn up a notch in the straight.
Missed the jump and lost ground. Trailed field throughout race and never quickened in the straight.
Hard ridden from a wide draw and took the lead on entering back straight. Maintained a length's advantage into home straight. Kept on well final stages but was caught a few strides before the line.
Raced 3-wide and a length off the speed. Commenced to fade making home turn and weakened in the straight.
2-wide behind midfield. Hugged the rails making home turn and remained on same pace in the straight.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Raced 3-wide in midfield. Widest turning for home and only ran past beaten runners.
Rear section and raced ungenerously throughout. Wide and near last into home straight and only ran past some beaten runners.
Raced in a prominent spot behind the leader until home straight. Kept chasing and ran down early leader close to home.
Mostly 3-back along the rails in 4th until the 600 M, driven along entering homestretch, stayed on fairly well but lacked the dash of the winner.
Crossed to fence to lead by 1L passing winning post for the first time, held a margin until straightening for home straight and weakened late on. (Questioned.)
Cut out the early pace before handing up 1500 M out, box-seated in 3rd down back straight, swamped at the furlong pole and faded out.
On the fence in 7th about 5Ls or 6Ls from the pace at 1200 M, retrieved some nice late ground in the home straight to place.
Settled 2-wide in 8th about 6Ls or 7Ls from the speed until the 600 M, wider turning for home but was too one-paced to figure in the money.
2-wide and 3Ls back in 3rd at 1200 M, 1L down in 2nd from back to home straight, briefly led at the 200 M but couldn't sustain the bid and missed a place.
Very poor start and left 6Ls behind 2nd last runner, always rearward and still 10Ls last at 600 M, tried to loop the field but the run peaked 200 M out.
Went back from wide gate, 9Ls adrift and one from rear at 1200 M, 6Ls behind off last bend, made no impact.
Patiently handled in 9th about 6Ls or 7Ls from the speed, 5-wide turning for home and let down well to lead 100 M out, kept on strongly.
6th and 2-wide roughly 5Ls from the speed at 1200 M and much the same turning for home, tried to challenge along inside but was outpaced. (Riding at 100 M questioned.)
2-wide and 4Ls back in 4th at 1200 M, pressured to maintain this proximity swinging for home, dropped out fast. (Questioned.)
Very tame effort, went back from wide gate, always rearward and at least 7Ls or 8Ls from the speed and offered little or nothing.
Flanked pacesetter 1L back in 2nd out 2-wide from 1200 M to home turn, every chance to at least fill the quinella but one-paced inside final 200 M.
3-back on rails about 4Ls from pace in 5th at 1000 M, 3Ls behind into straight and without clear room until the 150 M, possibly unlucky not to place.
7Ls back in 10th at the 1200 M, still well back behind the steady pace until home straight, very one-paced on the run in.
Went from wide gate to be 9Ls last at 1000 M, 6Ls down turning for home, set a stiff task given the slow tempo up front.
Made all, set steady pace, led by 1L passing post for the first time until the home straight, always doing enough to hang on for the win.
Box-seated in 3rd about 2Ls behind pace from 1200 M to home turn, had his chance to at least fill the quinella but lacked the gears to do it.
Tightened and lost position passing post for first time, 2-wide and 3Ls or 4Ls back in 6th from 1000 M to homestretch when ridden along, held thereafter.
Slowest out by 4Ls, always rearward and no better than 6Ls from the speed at any stage.
Held 'one-out-one-back' position from 1000 M to home straight entrance, stayed on well in the finish without overhauling the winner.
3-wide no cover worse than midfield and at least 4Ls or 5Ls behind until the final bend, fizzled out in the home straight.
Lost ground at the start, 5Ls or 6Ls back in 9th or so through to the home straight, made only minor late headway.
Over-raced early on, 4-back along the rails in 8th or so about 4Ls or 5Ls behind pace until the last 400 M, posed little or no threat.
Pushed early but trapped 5-wide 1st bend, soon eased to rear and crossed toward 2 to 3-wide, 5Ls off the leaders, harmed by the slow pace, dashed strongly 250 M for 3rd.
Pushed to occupy a midfield spot, 3Ls off the leaders 2-wide, clipped heels 800 M, not suited by the slow pace, weakened 400 M.
Hard ridden to secure the box seat, favoured by the slow pace, stayed on until 100 M flattened.
Hard ridden to hold the rail and led by 1/2L at advantageous slow early sectionals, made all without threats.
Pushed forward to sit outside the lead, enjoyed the slow early tempo, ran on until 150 M out of fuel.
Worse than midfield, raced keenly, pushed back to last 800 M, 6-1/2Ls off the leaders 2 to 4-wide, harmed by the slow pace, no dash in straight.
Slow away, behind midfield, 4Ls off the leaders 2-wide, harmed by the slow pace, just held ground in straight.
Pushed for a few strides, then soon eased back, 4Ls off the leaders, trapped 4-wide throughout and lost too much ground, dashed well 300 M despite not suited by the slow pace.
Hard ridden to obtain a prominent spot, 1L off the leaders, suited by the slow pace, but trapped 3 to 4-wide throughout and lost too much ground, flattened 150 M.
Slow away, midfield on the fence, 4Ls off the leaders, not suited by the slow pace, dashed strongly 200 M and got 2nd.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
In front of midfield, 2Ls off the leaders 2 to 4-wide, not suited by the slow tempo, no dash, flattened 200 M.
Travelled 3-wide in midfield. Gave ground under pressure from home bend.
Began awkwardly. Travelled behind midfield. Very wide rounding home bend. Dropped out in straight.
Began with others from wide barrier. Quickly driven to prominent spot in one-out-one-back position. Remained outside leader turning in but soon faded under pressure.
Slowly away. Remained in rear to straight. Fought on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Began with others. Took up running making 1000 M bend. Led until overhauled inside final 100 M.
Settled in midfield. Slightly inconvenienced early in straight. Responded well inside final 200 M to take command close to home.
Broke well from the one draw. Settled one back on rails in 3rd. Kept on same pace in straight but ran out of room close to home. (Blood in trachea.)
Trailed the field. Wide without cover when racing awkwardly far side. In last with rails run turning in. Produced moderate late impression closing stages.
Raced wide in midfield or forward of midfield. 3-wide in 3L 5th turning in. One-paced in straight.
Settled towards rear on rails. Saved ground on inside turning in. Kept on early in straight before making moderate progress inside final 200 M.
Travelled 2-wide in 2L 4th. Carried a bit wide after straightening. Fought on steadily without threatening.

Reasonable jump, rolled on to a prominent position not far off from leader, edged out to challenge in straight, showed remarkable acceleration to take charge 250 M out, pulled well clear for a decisive victory.
Taken to the rail after start, travelled patiently in rear trailing 9Ls to leader, under pressure rounding home bend, found little in straight and beat tired runners only.
Even jump, settled in mid-division about 6Ls from the leader, found little on straightening and just battled away in straight.
Hard pressed early to hold a position better than midfield about 4-5Ls off pace, ridden to stay in touch on turning, couldn't go with them in straight, faded inside 100 M.
Standard getaway, assumed a handy spot on the rail about 2Ls off the pace, cruising to bend, commenced move 300 M, responded well but no match to the winner. A credible 2nd nevertheless.

Hard ridden from the outside barrier in search for lead, taken up running from 1100 M under a steady tempo, held narrow advantage on straightening, headed near 250 M and gradually weakened in run to line.
Awkwardly away, enjoyed a soft run with steady pace on, used little to bend, switched wide to challenge, picked up well and ran on steadily without threatening.
Missed the start and lost ground, ended up racing in rear trailing 10Ls to leader, made move from 500 M, taken extreme wide on straightening, finished the race strongly to be nearest on line.
Taken to a rearward spot after start, overraced in early stages, raced 8Ls behind leader down the back straight, improving on turn, didn't find much under pressure, kept on only fairly.
Broke well from the inside barrier, rolled on to a prominent position just behind leader under steady tempo, travelled well enough but unable to pick up in straight, weakened inside 200 M.
Standard jump, taken a spot in mid-division 5Ls back, creeped closer on the turn, made good progress down the centre of track but never looked like catching the winner.
Jumped well, restrained to race in mid-division about 6Ls back, showed keenness throughout, folded quickly in straight. No impression.
Jumped okay, travelled in midfield 3Ls behind leader, 3-wide on the turn, had every chance in straight but unable to quicken, gradually weakened towards the line.
Slightly slow out, drifted back to a rearward position 5Ls behind leader, not asked in run, made slight progress on straightening, bumped near 250 M and checked, one-paced thereafter.
Slow to begin, took time to muster and ended up racing towards the rear trailing 5Ls. Still well back on turn, found little in straight and beat tired runners only.
Good break from the inside barrier, settled down in mid-division 3Ls back on the fence, had a nice trail to turn but held up badly on the inside for most of home straight, not fully tested.
Lost ground on jumping, soon taken across to the fence racing 6Ls back in last, angled out to challenge, picked up okay but had his run interrupted near 300 M.
Reasonable jump, rolled forward to a prominent position just behind leaders, 3-wide on the turn, took time to gather in straight, ran on okay inside 200 M but unable to step up a gear.
Well enough to begin, rolled forward to race on the outside of leader, folded up quickly after straightening.
Good start, settled in 5th about 2Ls off the pace, 2-wide with cover, didn't see daylight until 300 M, ran on fairly without threatening.
Began with them, restrained to midfield racing 2-wide 4Ls back, had a smooth run to bend, threatened with strong run at 150 M, briefly took charge but had no answer to the winner's turn of foot.
Evenly out, took up running under a slow tempo, had a relaxed run throughout, held 1L advantage entering into straight, headed near 200 M, dropped off rapidly thereafter.
Began well, taken to a spot worse than midfield about 5Ls off the pace, travelled 3-wide with cover, came wide on straightening, couldn't pick up under pressure. Little impression.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Away with them, gradually shuffled back to the rear 6Ls back, caught wide on home turn, taken to challenge on the outside but didn't find. A disappointing run.

Away in line, hard ridden to take up a spot on the rail one back, saved ground on turning, kept to inside on straightening, lacked dash but fought on bravely to finish a credible 4th after a long layoff from track.
Broke well then raced solo along the inside fence. Gave little in the run home.
Travelled early along the middle of the track before diving out in search of running. However after having done so, became held up for the remainder of the event. (See Racing Incident.)

Began on terms and after having travelled about 100 M, was steadied and shifted out to join the bulk of the field towards centre of track. Was under pressure after the 400 M, drifted out slightly, kept on and had every chance.
Raced behind midfield along the rails. Didn't get a lot of room over the final stages and was checked on the post.
Caught behind the front runners, didn't do too much when out into the clear.
Travelled with the main bunch early hard up against the rail. Had well and truly detached from the field by the 800 M. No impression thereafter.
Raced midfield but was disappointing it failure to run on. (See Racing Incident.)
Tracked the leaders early before surging ahead near the 250. Let down strongly be in front , but was mowed down close to the line.
Slow into stride then scooted up a long the rails to chase the leader. Didn't do much thereafter.
Checked soon after the start then travelled well off the outside fence. Moved to challenge the leaders inside the furlong, and found plenty in the run to the wire.
Worked forward to lead.. Failed to quicken when asked for an effort inside 400 M and tired near the final 100 M.
Raced towards the outside fence in a midfield position. Struggled over the concluding stages.
Tracked the speed and (looked likely to figure in the finish) closed off well but received some interference near the final 200.
Raced towards the rear down the middle of the track, weakened soon after the 350 M.
