Led in the early stages. Box-seated behind the leader making the turn. Kept on well in the straight and just missed 2nd place.
Ridden along early and settled on the fence at midfield. Switched off the fence before straightening and ran on only fairly in the straight.
Improved gradually to be racing 2-wide behind the lead. Challenged leader and took the lead briefly after entering home straight. Unable to find more in the final 200 M and faded out of contention.
Soon trailed field. Last to enter home straight and only ran past a beaten runner.
Raced in a rearward position. Widest turning for home and never quickened in the straight.
Behind midfield. Ran into a bit of traffic on straightening. Closed off well and made up ground in the straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Better than midfield. 2 back on the fence turning for home. Switched out and quickened nicely near 200 M. Ran down rivals inside final 50 M.
Behind leaders before dropping back after 1200 M. 3-wide behind midfield at the turn and remained on same pace in the straight.
Jumped well and led briefly. No worse than midfield and was 4Ls off the lead at the turn. Unable to quicken on straightening and faded final stages.

Ridden along to take the lead after 1000 M. Challenged on straightening but still able to maintain advantage 200 M out. Fought hard but was caught by winner close to home. Found enough to hold onto 2nd.
Among leaders early and took a sit 1000 M out. 2-wide and 2Ls off the lead turning for home. Unable to turn up a notch after straightening and remained on same pace final stages.
Raced in rear section until straightening. Ran on same pace thereafter.
2-wide at midfield. Ran on without threatening in the straight.
Settled in rear section. Made progress along the rails at the turn and switched out after straightening. Kept on fairly in the straight but unable to threaten.
Switched inside from wide gate but could only find a 3-wide position with cover in rear, 5Ls down in 10th angling for home but weakened out. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Awkward break, raced 3-back along the rails in midfield about 4Ls from speed until home straight, failed to respond to hard riding in last 400 M.
Better than midfield about 2Ls from the speed down the back, without clear running 300 M out, stayed on well once clear and just missed the win.
Slow to begin, 4-back on fence about 6Ls off speed in 12th at 1000 M and similar on straightening, recovered some solid late ground, never nearer.
Midfield with cover about 3Ls or 4Ls behind pacesetter right until the home straight, disappointing finish after such a seemingly comfortable run. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Went back from wide gate, 8Ls last at 1200 M, still well behind off last bend, ran on fairly well past beaten rivals late on to be nearest at finish.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Flanked leader out 2-wide in 2nd about 1L until the home straight, picked up to lead about 150 M from the line and did just enough to stay ahead.
Trapped 4-wide no cover until the final turn in a mostly midfield position about 4Ls from the pace, extra work quickly exacted its toll.
Set a steady pace in front once leading on fence by 1L at 1300 M, headed about 150 M out and lost out on a place in closing stages.
Always worse than midfield and 4-wide with cover through opening 1000 M, 5-wide (widest) off last curve when struggling, yielded further ground.
One from rear about 7Ls behind steady pace down back straight, 6Ls last swinging for home, never made much of an impact. (Tactic questioned.)
Niggled along in places when 5Ls back in 9th or 10th down back straight, never likely to improve from a worse than midfield position in the stretch.
Box-seated 2Ls off pace in 3rd on fence until home straight, given every possible chance to at least figure in quinella but lacked the gears.
Slowly away, 3-back the rails initially and 4-back when 6Ls down in 9th at 800 M, still with plenty to do off the home turn, one-paced to conclude.
5Ls back in 8th at 1000 M, a little tight for room before home straight but didn't find much when clear shortly afterwards. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Prominent at first but left 3-wide no cover from 700 M to home straight about 4Ls from the speed around midfield, weakened out steadily.
Box-seated at the 1200 M in 4th but slipped back to 4Ls from the front when taking home turn, plodded on home at the one speed.
Hampered early on, got back as usual and 7Ls behind at halfway, retrieved a little late ground in the home straight.
Hampered early on but recovered to race in midfield about 4Ls from speed at halfway, stayed on fairly well in the straight to place.
Didn't travel early on, at least 10Ls adrift at first and detached at point of home turn, ran on quite well in the straight, never nearer.
2-wide and 1L back in 2nd at 1200 M, always prominent and led 300 M out, no answer when headed by the winner about 100 M from the line, just held 2nd.
Led by 1L at 1200 M, headed at 800 M and checked on fence soon after, 3Ls down in 3rd and weakening off last bend, ceded further ground.
Caught 4-wide no cover before pressing on to lead on the rails by 1L at the 700 M, headed about 300 M out and one-paced and tipped out of placings late on.
Awkward break, held 'one-out-one-back' position 2Ls or 3Ls off speed in 4th until home straight, responded to pressure to lead 100 M out, kept on well.
Hung in during middle stages when rearward and about 6Ls behind the speed, very weak from top of home straight.
One from rear about 8Ls from the lead in middle stages and still well behind on straightening, recovered some late headway without really threatening.
Hard ridden throughout, never competitive at rear.
Eased to rear, 8Ls off the leaders 2-wide, not suited by the slow pace, ran on ok in final stages, made ground on several weakening runners.
Midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the leaders 2 to 3-wide, not suited by the slow tempo, no progress in straight.
Eased back, 6Ls off the leaders 3 to 4-wide, dashed strongly 250 M despite not suited by the slow pace.
Behind the leaders, 1-1/2Ls off the advantageous slow pace 3-wide, weakened 250 M.
Eased to rear, 8Ls off the leaders 3-wide, harmed by the slow pace, little dash 200 M.
Eased back, raced 4 to 5-wide throughout and lost too much ground, harmed by the slow pace, never competitive.
Slow away, pushed for a few strides, 4Ls off the leaders, trapped 4-wide in midfield and lost too much ground, not suited by the slow pace, moved up 600 M, ran on until 200 M flattened.
Hard ridden to occupy a forward spot just behind the leaders 2-wide, favoured by the slow early sectionals, led 300 M, overhauled 100 M, ran on well for 3rd.
Pushed forward and shared the lead 2-wide at slow early sectionals, soon dropped off 300 M.
Hard ridden to grab a prominent spot, 3Ls off the leaders 2-wide, raced keenly, not suited by the slow tempo, no turn of foot in straight.
Pushed to take the rail and shared the lead at slow tempo, hung on until 300 M emptied.
Hard ridden to secure the box seat, 2Ls off the slow pace, momentarily held up 400 M, dashed well when clear and scored a comfortable win.
Pushed early to obtain a midfield spot along the fence, 4-1/2Ls off the leaders, harmed by the slow tempo, blocked from 400 M to 200 M, dashed strongly when clear and finished 2nd.
Broke well from wide draw, racing wide with leaders down far side. Crossed to lead coming out of back straight causing interferences. Soon went clear after straightening. Unextended.
Showed good early pace to lead on rails early. Ceded advantage and slightly tightened coming out of back straight. Still in first few turning in but folded up quickly after straightening.
Began fairly. Raced in rear of midfield to straight. Kept on steadily between runners in straight without quickening. Not a bad effort though.
Jumped awkwardly but not losing ground. Remained in last few. Ran on nicely down centre of straight to do best work late.
Towards rear early. Took closer order coming out of back straight. Shifted wide when midfield into home straight. Ran on steadily down centre of straight to finish best of the rest.

Not far off in 5th position on rails, with the eventual winner setting a good pace around the bend. Became 2nd and though remained 3Ls away when others faded out of contention early in straight. Yielded ground quickly after 200 M.
Niggled along in midfield on rails. Tightened and lost about 2Ls coming out of far side. Saved ground on inside turning for home but made no impression in the run home.
Jumped awkwardly. Remained in last few to straight. Kept on only at the same pace without making any real impression.
Amongst leaders early, disputing 2nd when wide in 4th approaching home straight. Soon found no extra after straightening.

Jumped one of the best from wide draw but failed to hold forward position under urge. Soon settled for midfield and raced wide without cover throughout. Hard run took toll and dropped out before reaching straight.
Amongst leaders in a line of three. Lost position when crossed by LUCKY QUALITY coming out of back straight. Dropped out tamely when hung in and a difficult ride in straight.
Soon taken back to race in rear. Trailed the field to straight. Did not find much room early on until after 200 M. Fought on steadily to narrowly miss the placegetters.
Ordinary break, travelled wide and without cover in mid-division, dropped off quickly turning in and was beaten a long way.
Fast away, taken forward to race prominently behind leader under a steady tempo, unable to go on under pressure, checked 200 M out, ran home one-paced thereafter.
Awkwardly away, travelled in rear as expected trailing 8Ls behind leader, saved ground on the rail but unable to improve behind horses in straight, ran on well once into clear 150 M.
Away well enough, restrained to travel in mid-division on the rail about 4Ls back, peeled out coming into straight, took time to muster but picked up really well inside 200 M. Good effort.
Slow to begin, pressed on to take closer order in mid-division, difficult to settle in early stages, made significant progress down the inside of straight to finish a close 2nd.
Began awkwardly, shaken up to hold a position behind midfield 5Ls back, well covered to turn, took time to gather speed on straightening, strong run inside 200 M to take charge close to home.
Quickly into stride, rolled forward to take up running passing 1200 M under a steady tempo, had 1L advantage turning in, kept on well to 150 M, gradually weakened towards the line.
Away with them, settled towards the rear in a 3-wide position, 6Ls to make up turning in, didn't response and struggled in run to line. (Mucus.)
Rolled forward as expected, travelled one-out-one-back from leader under a steady tempo, had every change but unable to sprint with them under pressure, dropped off quickly inside 200 M.
Good start, taken up a prominent position just 2Ls off leader, tracked well on turn, made steady progress to 100 M, kept on in run to line. Not beaten far.
Taken back on jumping, restrained to race in the rear 7Ls back, had plenty to do turning in, switched to challenge down the outside but didn't pick up. No impression.
Broke well from the inside draw, settled 2-back on fence, travelled comfortably throughout, ran into traffic and didn't have a clear run in straight. Not fully tested.

Average beginning, parked into a midfield slot about 3Ls off the pace, used little in running, ridden passing 350 M and threatened with a strong run, briefly hit lead 200 M but was caught over the final stages.

Moderate getaway, settled 5-6Ls back on rails, not used throughout, disadvantaged by average speed, improved on rails on circle, followed eventual winner turning, peaked on run at 200 M and just held ground thereafter.
Began evenly, took a midfield berth 4-5Ls away in 2-wide line, not suited by tempo, improved 3-wide on circle, unable to continue run and just held ground final 300 M at same pace.
Began smartly, took up running easily, backed pace off after early lead battle, set even tempo thereafter, shaded leaving bend, fought on to 250 M before run ended and folded late.
No early pace, ended up 3-wide in rear division, raced 6-7Ls away with cover, not helped by pace, improved 6-wide on bend, spent force by 300 M and battled late. (Blood in trachea.)
Out in line, taken back to race in rear division, ended up 7Ls back in running line, pace not to suit in mid-section, still well back turning, made some steady progress without looking likely.
Bounced out, took prime position 1 out 1 back, no excuses in run, right there on turning, gave little from 400 M and gradually faded. (See Racing Incidents.)
Went forward from a wide gate, 4-wide without cover early, ended up 3-wide without cover outside leaders, did too much work in mid-section, faded out when hard run took toll.
Jumped in line, ended up 4Ls back on rails, had a fair run to bend, improved 2-wide at 600 M, in traffic to 350 M, kept on evenly when clear.
Standard jump, took ideal spot behind leader, had run of race once pace slackened, close enough turning, made strong run final 200 M to take lead inside furlong and went away to score with authority.
Average jump, faded back from a wide alley to race 3-wide behind midfield, had cover 6Ls away, still well back on circle, made no impression in straight.
No early speed, soon at rear 6-7Ls back on rails, tempo against in mid-section, took inside run turning, made fair progress along rails but struggled last 200 M.

Began with first few, pressed on and posted 3-wide without cover early, elected for sit 2Ls back 3-wide with trail, travelled well to bend, made a clear effort in straight and kept coming late to miss 2nd narrowly.

First to hit ground, took a prominent spot outside leader, enjoyed a reasonable run with average sections, made challenge turning, drove to lead at 350 M, couldn't go with winner final 200 M but kept on gamely.
Out with rest, angled into a midfield spot 5Ls back, lost spot in back straight, not helped by speed, well back on bend, lacked usual sprint and just struggled in straight.
Taken back from a wide alley, positioned behind midfield 5Ls off speed on rails, used little to bend, held up and checked badly at 300 M, clear last 150 M and then flew late to just miss. Unlucky.
Out with line, took a spot behind speed 2Ls back 3-wide with cover, travelled well in run, close enough turning and made impression to be in mix at 200 M, peaked on run inside final 100 M.

Began with rest, pressed forward but lost action approaching first bend, dropped back to be 4-5Ls away racing 3-wide, had cover to turn, lost action again at 200 M and eased down late. (See Racing Incidents.)
Out with rest, went forward but posted 3 and 4-wide without cover, used too much in run, still 3Ls down but under pressure on turning dropped out quickly.
Allowed to drift back from an outside gate, ended up 6Ls away in 2-wide line, improved 3-wide on circle, came widest in straight and made solid progress to make frame.
Away sharply, went forward but unable to slot in, faced breeze 3-wide without cover outside leaders, did too much work to bend, emptied 300 M and gradually faded.
Fast into stride, took up running, shaded throughout by outside horse, still held inside 1/2L down on bend, kicked through on turning, in mix to 200 M but lacked a response thereafter.
Jumped well, pressed on in search of lead, lead them but couldn't cross to lead, kept pressure on throughout, still held narrow lead turning, run ended at 200 M.
No early pace and ended up in rearward division as usual, raced 2-wide 5Ls back, still set a task on turning, held up inside horses to 250 M, closed off nicely final furlong once clear.
Began with rest, took a close position from inside alley, had soft run throughout, saved ground turning, no clear running until 200 M, closed evenly once clear holding ground in run to line.
Poorly away, shared rear 7-8Ls back on rails, had an easy time in mid-section, still had field to beat on turning, didn't make any impression in straight.
Ordinary getaway, ended up in rearward division 6Ls back on fence, not asked in mid-section, still well back in traffic turning, held up until after 200 M, not fully tested thereafter.
Jumped away fairly, ended up in midfield 4Ls or so away from lead, travelled comfortably throughout, still in traffic turning and didn't see daylight until 200 M, charged late for an unlucky 3rd.
Began nicely, slotted into prime position 1 out 1 back, had no excuses to bend, in behind horses without clear running to 300 M, dashed well when clear to take lead late and score a narrow victory.
Out in line, ended up racing in midfield 4Ls back, unable to pick up under pressure on straightening, ran home one-paced.
Lacked early pace, settled in the rear 5Ls off the pace, found nothing under pressure in straight, dropped off inside 150 M.
Jumped well, settled in 3rd behind leader, made his run along with the eventual 2nd entering 350 M, was always in command and had the race tidily won inside 100 M.
Fair start, taken up the early running before surrending the lead near 800 M, tracked well on turning, asked for an effort near 350 M, gave the winner a run but found no extra inside 100 M.
Began well, raced on the rail in 4th, showed signs of greeness in running, took time to muster in straight, ran on OK inside 200 M.
Eased on jumping, settled in the rear about 5Ls off the pace, peeled out to challenge in straight, made same headway without threatening.
Moderate beginning, pushed forward to take up running near 800 M, opened up a 3Ls advantage on turn, unable to keep up in straight, headed inside 350 M, faded badly in run to line.
From a wide gate was ridden along early and crossed to camp behind the leader after the 900 M. Failed to quicken early in the straight, had no excuses.
For the major part of the race travelled wide and without cover in midfield, making the home turn was carried wide, kicked strongly in the straight for a solid performance.
Took up 2nd last position and failed to pass another runner for the duration of the trip.
Landed midfield the fence. Rolled out in the straight and let down strongly to be beaten by a narrow margin.
Began well but didn't muster a great deal of speed thereafter and travelled behind midfield, 2 deep with cover. Never likely.
From a wide gate was steadied early and settled 3rd last, 1 off with cover. Never really in the hunt, failing to make up any appreciable ground in the run home.
Settled behind midfield along the fence. Struggled noticeably over the concluding stages.
Hung in during the early stages, however enjoyed the run of the race behind the speed along the fence. Had every chance.
Raced on the back of the speed, 1 off with cover. Cruised up after the 400 M and was in front by the furlong to hold a margin over its rivals.
Travelled with the back markers, 2 to 3-wide with cover. Failed to make any impression in the run to the wire.
Was crowded soon after the start, losing its position and travelling in last spot. Closed off strongly from impossible spot.
Settled midfield 2-wide with cover. Was checked off heels near the 600 M, however recovered well and finished off nicely. (See Racing Incidents.)
Ridden along early to cross from a wide gate and lead along the rails. Challenged early in the straight but fought strongly to stay in touch with the principles.
Slow to begin and settled in 3rd last position on the fence. Commenced to peel out after the 500 M and in the straight made fair ground.
Raced along the fence at midfield. 3Ls down turning for home. Unable to quicken in the straight.
No better than midfield. Checked at 800 M and lost a bit of ground. Near last on straightening and rallied strongly between runners in the straight to score a close one.
Settled behind midfield. Steadied 350 M out, closed the race off fairly.
3-wide at midfield. Kept on fairly in the straight and was closest at finish. Solid for wide run.
Crowded shortly after start and raced at the rear. Remained near the back turning for home and no improvement in the straight.
Kept pace behind leaders early stages. Steadied 800 M out and was at midfield at the turn. Unable to quicken turning for home and remained on same pace thereafter.
Among early leaders. Settled behind the pace making home turn. Regained lead briefly near 200 M but unable to find more thereafter.
Niggled along and raced wide among early leaders. Took sole possession of the lead on the bend and had a length's advantage turning in. Headed near 200 M and faded thereafter.
Raced in a rearward spot. Made up some ground in the straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slow into stride and was ridden along to be at midfield. 3-wide without cover and 3Ls off the lead turning for home. Faded final 200 M.
Ridden along to be near the pace. 2-wide and a length off the leader turning in. Took the lead 200 M out but unable to hold off the top pair in the final stages.
Best out and had the early lead. Took a sit near 800 M and was 2-back on the fence turning in. Had some trouble finding daylight 400 M out. Closed off strongly but was beaten by narrow margin.
Lacked early speed and gradually slipped to a rearward position. Took a wide turn home and was last on straightening. Rallied and made up ground in the straight.
In the second half of the field throughout at least 5Ls from the leaders.
2-wide and 2Ls behind lead in 3rd at 1000 M, closer on straightening but couldn't quite establish a lead, passed by the winner close home.
8Ls behind early pace in rear, edged closer about 4Ls back out wide swinging for home, responded well to pressure to lead inside final strides.
Midfield about 4Ls behind leaders at 1200 M and similar off last bend, never looked likely to improve his position significantly.
4-wide no cover in rear from widest gate early on, 7Ls last and widest of all turning in, remained last.
Led by 2Ls at 1000 M, set a steady tempo until last bend, all out at the 200 M but still 1L in front, just about clung onto 3rd. (Blood in trachea.)
On rails and close up in 4th at 1200 M, 2Ls down in 5th and in need of a gap into homestretch, never found clear running room and not fully tested.
3-wide no cover throughout, better than midfield between 2Ls and 3Ls from the pace through to final 400 M, one-paced to wind up. (Questioned.)
In 6th about 3Ls or 4Ls from the speed until the home straight, held up a little but was outpaced by the principals in the final furlong anyway.
8Ls behind in rear on fence down the back, still well back off last corner, ran on well late to nick 3rd, disqualified for rider weighing in light.
4-back on the rails about 4Ls or 5Ls in 7th or so down back straight, never saw much daylight from 400 M to 200 M and didn't have a hard race.
3-wide with cover towards rear at first, improved to midfield about 4Ls back taking last bend, briefly threatened but run died inside final 200 M. (Questioned.)
Worst to break, 5-back on rails at least 5Ls or 6Ls from the speed throughout and never at all dangerous.
On rails with the run of the race in 2nd or 3rd right until the home straight, very one-paced and no excuses for not doing better.
2-wide and 1L back in 2nd at the 1600 M, 2Ls back in 2nd and hard pressed to stay in touch taking final curve, slipped out of contention.
3-back on fence about 4Ls off pace in 5th at halfway, 3Ls back off last bend and still with work to do at 200 M, kept on to lead inside final 50 M.
Keen early on when box-seating on the rails in 3rd place, pressured to maintain this proximity at the last bend, yielded ground before furlong pole.
Keen early on in 4th about 2Ls from the pace, still 2Ls back in 2nd from last turn to furlong pole, kept on but couldn't match the winner's stamina.
Prominent but keen early, retreated to be 7Ls back in 9th at the 1000 M, briefly loomed a threat at the final corner but the run was short-lived.
7Ls down in 10th or so through first half about 5Ls adrift turning in, stayed on well late and only just missed 3rd, appears better suited to this distance.
Went back from wide gate, still 7Ls away from the pace entering home straight, never likely to figure despite retrieving a little late ground.
Very wide without cover on first bend, 2-wide with cover in midfield down the back about 4Ls from speed, faded rapidly in home straight.
Went to an early lead and well rated in front about 2Ls to the good through to the 200 M, stamina quickly gave way and only barely held onto 3rd.
Slowest away, well behind in rear when checked 1100 M out, one from rear and 8Ls down on straightening, made minor late headway past tired rivals.
Worse than midfield about 7Ls off pace at 1200 M and only marginally closer into last section, didn't find very much under pressure. (Tactic questioned.)
Very poor run, slowly away and always in rear at least 8Ls from the pace, in trouble as far out as the 600 M.
Checked early on, 4-back along the rails about 6Ls from the initial tempo, edged slightly nearer but ridden along wheeling for home, held thereafter.
3-wide no cover throughout and no better than midfield at least 6Ls or so from the speed.
Pushed forward and took a more prominent spot, 3Ls behind the slow pace on the rails, momentarily held up 400 M, dashed well when clear and grabbed 3rd.
Pushed forward to join the pace group, 2-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, suited by the slow tempo, however soon weakened 250 M.
Eased to sit in midfield along the fence, 4-1/2Ls off the leader, not suited by the slow pace, held up 4-2, little dash when clear whilst hanging in.
Pushed to occupy the box seat, favoured by the slow early sectionals, ran on until 250 M weakened.
Eased to rear, harmed by the slow pace, never competitive.
Eased to sit in midfield, travelled nicely 5-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, dashed strongly 400 M to win comfortably despite not suited by the slow pace.
In front of midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the slow pace 2-wide, lacked turn of foot, just held ground in straight.
Eased back, trapped 4-wide throughout and lost ground, harmed by the slow pace, never better than midfield.
Prominent early but trapped 3-wide, then eased back steadily to midfield, 5-1/2Ls off the leader, not suited by the slow pace, no turn of foot in straight, flattened 200 M.
Eased to sit behind midfield, 7Ls off the leader 2 to 3-wide, harmed by the slow pace, little dash 200 M.
Very awkward away, took rail behind midfield, 6-1/2Ls off the leader, harmed by the slow tempo, blocked 400 M, dashed strongly 200 M.
Eased to rear, 8-1/2Ls off the leader 3 to 4-wide, demonstrated its usual strong finishing efforts despite harmed by the slow pace, just missed 3rd.
Very awkward away, 8-1/2Ls off the leader at rear on the fence, harmed by the slow pace, little dash 300 M, but flattened 200 M.
Very slow away, hard ridden to press forward, took rail and led by 1-1/2Ls at slow tempo, soon dropped off 350 M.
Awkwardly away, failed to muster early speed, ended up racing towards the rear about 7Ls back, struggled on turning and didn't pick up under pressure.
Eased to the rear after start, switched wide on turning covering ground, dashed home well down the outside without threat to the winner.
Bounced out well, pressed forward to race alongside leader, struggled to improve at 300 M when they dashed, weakened inside 200 M.
One of the first to jump, pushed forward to take up running on the rail under a steady tempo, had pressure from outside horses on bend, folded up under pressure inside 300 M, dropped out.
Hard ridden to take closer order better than midfield, tracked well on turning, didn't produce a finish in straight and just plugged away to line.
Unable to cross from the outside barrier and was left racing wide without cover in mid-division, ran home fairly under pressure but lacked extra gear.
Began moderately, guided to a more prominent spot in front of midfield, 4Ls off the leader 2-wide, angled into clear inside 400 M, ran on well but couldn't match the winner's turn of foot.
Quickly into stride, taken to a prominent spot behind leaders, travelled well throughout, crept up to lead from 250 M, rapidly accelerated away to win in good style.
Taken back on jumping, settled 5Ls back behind midfield, difficult to settle in early stages, picked up well entering 300 M but run ended when crowded for room inside 200 M. Not fully tested.

Standard beginning, assumed a midfield position 4 to 5Ls behind leader, not suited by the early pace, switched wide to improve on turning, briefly led 350 M out but unable to sustain effort, weakened inside 200 M.
Taken back on jumping, settled towards the rear 7Ls behind leader, delivered a strong finish down the outside of track to take 2nd on the line.
Even back, drifted back to a rearward position 8Ls behind leader, lacked finish and only beat tired horses in run to line.
Standard jump, slotted into a midfield position 3-wide niggling along on turn, fought on strongly under pressure to finish a creditable 4th. (1st start after a long absence from track.)
Slightly slow out, settled 5Ls back along inside, saved ground on bend, made some progress on straightening, checked near 150 M.
Even break, settled in 4th, 5Ls behind leader down the back straight, cruised into the lead from 200 M, drew away to win comfortably.
Jumped awkwardly and lost position, pressed on to lead field from 1500 M at a steady tempo, levelled near 300 M, ridden out but gave only limited response.
Reasonable jump, drifted back to race in rear along the fence, had 5Ls to make up entering home straight, couldn't find extra gear in run to line. No impression.
Quickily into stride, led briefly to 1500 M, settled in 2nd thereafter, taken alongside leader on home turn, hung out in run to line, found no extra last 200 M.
Began with rest, sat patiently in a rearward position 7Ls behind leader, ridden out near 400 M, ran on well and was beaten to 4th by just a short margin.
Taken back to rear on jumping, raced 8Ls behind leader in a 2-wide position, used little in running, picked up well when asked, made good headway over 400 M out. Closest on line.
Jumped well, travelled in 3rd never far off the pace, responded well when driven 200 M out, no match for the winner but found enough to hold off fast finishing challengers.
Ordinary break, travelled in a position behind midfield, enjoyed a ground-saving trip along the rail, chased leaders hard entering home straight, stayed on OK last 200 M, not beaten far.
No real pace from outset, raced 7 to 8Ls back on fence, aided by a decent speed on, raced keenly and checked 700 M, same margin down turning, made no serious progress in straight.

Taken back from a wide gate, ended up more than 10Ls back at tail, not used throughout, well back and in impossible spot turning, made useful progress final 300 M to be closest late. (See Racing Incidents.)
Moderate getaway, ended up best part of 10Ls away racing 3 wide with cover, helped by reasonable speed, still well back and pushed wide turning, made plenty of good progress in stretch.

Slow to jump, ended up racing 2 wide 7Ls away, had reasonable run in mid-section, gradually improved on bend, into clear at top of straight, accelerated nicely to claim rivals at 200 M and draw away easily to score in good time.

Jumped with purpose, went on and took a trail behind leader, had even run but forced to follow a solid speed, urged along to hold spot leaving bend, showed nothing in straight and weakened last 300 M.
Away nicely, held a forward spot before racing behind pace 4Ls back on rails, had a soft run in mid-section, kept coming along inside final 300 M finishing nicely to hold 3rd.
Fast into stride as usual, worked across and took ideal spot 1 out 1 back, forced to track a strong pace throughout, close enough turning, angled out but run was short-lived, battled final 300 M.

Reasonable jump, took a midfield position, had a nice trip 5Ls off pace in 2 wide line, travelled well on bend, loomed up with plenty to offer at 350 M, hands and heels to 200 M, couldn't match dash of winner late.
Moderate jump, unable to muster, posted 3 wide 6Ls back without cover, worked hard with solid speed on, struggling turning, battled at same pace in straight. (See racing incidents regarding tactics.)
Standard getaway, settled 5Ls back on fence, used little on inside, improved spot on bend, held up soon after straightening and lost run, made only minor progress when clear final 200 M.
Began evenly, pressed forward to race outside the leader, shaded inside horse throughout applying constant pressure, still in duel rounding bend, didn't respond and flattened at 300 M.
Jumped with rest, positioned 2 wide behind midfield 8Ls or so away, raced in 3 wide line on bend, made even progress from well back to be nearest on line.
Away in line, ended up drifting back to race nearer to tail 9Ls off speed, had a fair trip but well back turning, made remarkable progress from an impossible spot.

Fastest into stride, soon took up running, set a solid speed when challenged in front, shaded throughout by inside horse, under pressure soon after turning, faded easily at 300 M, didn't see out trip.
First to hit ground, pressed on to take coveted 1 out 1 back spot, had easy run in mid-section, travelled like winner turning, let down strongly at 300 M and dashed away, never in danger.
Ordinary getaway, raced 3 wide 7Ls back, did it tough without cover, showed nothing in straight and was well beaten.
Even getaway, took a nice trail behind speed 3Ls back on fence, enjoyed a quiet trip to bend, made fair progress to 200 M but didn't have extra gear to factor late.
Out with rest, ended up behind midfield 6Ls away in 2 wide line, helped by tempo, carried wider turning, no sprint to speak of and struggled late.
Away fairly, took a midfield position on rails 4 to 5Ls away, had an easy time throughout, angled wide turning, only managed one speed in straight and just held ground late.
Moderate jump, drifted back to tail, raced 8Ls back at rear, had a ground saving trip on circle, made many lengths along rails for a remarkable 3rd.
Restrained from a wide alley, ended up 9 to 10Ls away, helpe by tempo, improved wide on bend, 5 wide at 500 M but still at rear, lacked usual finish and made only minor progress late.
Reasonable jump, took up a midfield role, raced 4Ls back in running line, suited by tempo in mid-section, had something to offer turning but flattened at 200 M and just held ground late.
Tardy into stride, raced behind midfield 7Ls or so back on fence, enjoyed a quiet run to bend, one paced in run to line and didn't threaten.
Promising jump, assumed position behind leader 2Ls back, followed a useful pace throughout, same margin down turning, soon under pressure and didn't respond.
Began slower than usual, positioned 3 wide at rear, had cover 7 to 8Ls back, still well back turning, came wide and made many lengths from an impossible spot to be nearest on line.
Showed speed from outset, soon racing outside leader, did share of work with even speed, levelled up turning, went to front briefly, kept on creditably once headed to make frame.
Fast out, went on to take up running, ran freely in front setting even tempo, still held an advantage on turning, soon under pressure at 350 M and didn't respond, folded final 200 M.
Out in line, took a trailing position behind pace 3Ls or so away, tracked eventual winner throughout, couldn't dash on turning but kept on gradually late. No match for winner.
Slow into stride, urged to stay closer in mid-division, had every chance on straightening but didn't pick up, weakened inside 200 M.

Even break, settled patiently towards the rear 5Ls behind leader, taken wide on straightening, made ground in fine style under hands and heels riding, drew clear inside 200 M to win with real authority.
Pushed forward from the outside barrier, close enough in 3rd but raced wide without cover, ridden 300 M out and responded OK, but gradually weakened inside 200 M.
Standard break, restrained to race in the rear 5Ls off the pace, ran a shade too keen in middle stages, met traffic inside 300 M and never able to obtain clear running. Not fully tested.
Bounced out, positioned just behind leaders, right there on turning, didn't find the extra gear required but rallied well final 200 M.
Out with first few, rolled forward to lead and shaded inside horse throughout, kept on effort early in straight but fizzled out inside 150 M.
Jumped well, drifted back to a position behind midfield 4Ls back, switched to outside on straightening, took time to muster but finished off very well inside 200 M. The winner was however too strong.
Ordinary jump, ridden to maintain a midfield position, ran wide and without cover on turning, under pressure coming out of the bend, unable to quicken up and ran home very one-paced.
Away in line, assumed a spot in mid-division racing 2 deep, difficult to settle in middle stages, held up on straightening and unable to imporve, made some progress once into clear 150 M out.
Began well, gradually moved up along the rail to share lead under a steady tempo, kicked on inside 300 M but found nothing under pressure, dropped off 100 M out.
Dropped back to the rear after start, trailed leader by more than 8Ls, had much to do on straightening, made some late progress but set too great a task.
Restrained from gate, ended up in rear 7Ls away, used little in running, made a strong dash down the outside of track to finish a non-threatening 4th.
Standard jump, ridden to maintain a midfield position 2Ls off the pace, responded well under pressure and was just outran by the 2nd over the concluding stages.
Lacked early speed, ridden along the rail to be prominent behind leaders, briefly held up on straightening, squeezed through a gap inside 200 M, ran on but found no extra.
Hard pressed from beginning to remain in mid-division, shuffled back when steadied near 600 M, bumped 250 M out, never able to pick up.
Bounced out, quickly taken to a prominent position just behind leader, held every chance on straightening, lacked extra gear but kept on right to the line.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Away in line, guided to a position in midfield, hampered near 600 M, unable to quicken in straight, weakened inside 150 M.
Began well, taken forward initially but was steadied to obtain cover, unable to slot in and raced wide on the turn, found nothing when asked on straightening, gave ground 200 M out.
Slowly into stride, patiently held up in the rear, checked near 250 M when commencing his run, picked up strongly once cleared but the first two have pulled away.
Standard break, pushed along to follow leader which set a steady tempo, steadied near 600 M, didn't find much when asked and simply plugged away to line.
Slowly into stride, raced along the rail in a position behind midfield, made some headway down the inside but was checked near 100 M, ran on fairly thereafter.
Hard driven to go forward on the outside, gradually crossed and took up running on the rail near 600 M, had 2Ls advantage turning in, stuck on to task, headed entering 100 M, no extra thereafter.
Standard jump, ridden to maintain a better than midfield position on the rail, travelled well into straight, brought to challenge inside 300 M, picked up gradually to hit front last 75 M.
Drifted back on jumping. Settled in the rear about 5Ls from leader, into clear 250 M, ran on well to chase the winner inside final 100 M.
Even break, eased to sit behind midfield 5Ls off the pace, 3 wide on turning and hanging out, didn't produce a finish in the straight making limited progress.
Raced in 2nd last position, 1 off with cover. Never competitive. (See Racing Incident.)
Raced 2 deep with cover, midfield. Battled away in the run to the post.
Jumped awkwardly but managed to spear along to the inside to settle midfield the fence. Railed up in the run home and got to the wire only fairly.

Set alight from its outside barrier to lead and cross to the fence. Duelled for most of the trip with a challenger to its outside speed slow, however found plenty when asked for an effort and drew away to score well.
Throughout the race, travelled wide and without cover right behind the speed. Kept on gamely in the straight.
Ridden along early to take up a forward position but didn't muster, settling 3-wide with cover midfield. Only travelled fairly and in the straight failed to close off.
From a wide alley was able to park outside the leader. Gave plenty under vigorous riding to hold its position in the frame.
Began awkwardly and travelled in last position with cover. Made some late ground in the straight.
Raced 2 deep, midfield with cover. Had to be checked at the 800 M, and after regaining its balance, forged to the line soundly without threatening.
Tracked the leader along the fence. Had every possible hope.
Proved difficult to settle in the early stages, camping 1 out 1 back. Failed to close off.
Travelled behind midfield, settling 2 deep with cover. Ran on smartly.
Had the early lead before settling in a box-seat behind the pace. Kept on well in the straight but unable to find enough to run down the winner.
Got its head up on jumping and was soon near the rear. Commenced to make up ground at home turn but was carried wider turning in. Lacked a rally in the straight.
Ridden out of the gates and then settled 2-wide midfield. Ran on without quickening in the straight.
Best out but lacked speed to be in the lead. Gradually slipped back and raced 3-wide midfield. Improved to within a length of the pace turning in but unable to find extra in the straight.
Hard ridden from an outside draw to be in a forward position. 2-wide behind the leader in back straight. Kept pace in front until fading out of contention final 200 M.
Botched the start and raced at the rear. Saved ground making home turn but ran on only fairly in the straight.
Botched the start and raced in rear section. Last turning in and made up ground over beaten runners.
2-wide behind the leaders early stages. 2 to 3Ls off the leader heading into the turn. Checked prior to straightening and lost ground. Found nothing in the straight.
2-wide behind midfield. Took a wide turn home and stayed on same pace in the straight.
Pushed along to take the lead 1000 M out. Maintained advantage into home straight and stayed on gamely final stages to deny challenger.
Behind midfield. Made a ground saving trip around the turn and was 2 to 3Ls down turning in. Had some trouble getting a clear run near 200 M but closed off strongly thereafter.
Raced along the fence at midfield. Swung out turning for home and kept on steadily in the straight.
Went forward but never travelling well enough to lead at first, niggled to dispute pace from 800 M until 400 M, dropped out very rapidly. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Settled worse than midfield as usual, only 4Ls or 5Ls from speed from 800 M to last section, failed to produce a late flourish and no excuses.
Close-up but 3-wide no cover throughout, 2Ls back in 5th at halfway and still thereabouts off last bend, soon hit the wall after the tough trip.
Over-racing when 1L in front on fence at 1200 M, still keen joined down back straight, headed and gone well before the home turn, eased down. (Questioned.)
8Ls away in 10th at 1200 M, closer but wider into stretch, went close 2nd with all chances at 200 M, couldn't sustain the run but still placed.
More prominent than normal, 2-wide and 1L back in 3rd at 800 M, ridden to lead from top of straight to 150 M out, retreated quickly once headed.
3-back on the rails about 3Ls behind in mid-division through to home turn, upsides with every chance 150 M out but couldn't match winner's late burst.
Slowest out, 10Ls last at 1200 M and going well when 5Ls down off last bend, quickened through the field to lead about 100 M out, kept on strongly.
2-wide and 3Ls or 4Ls back in midfield through first half, threatened when over 1L back in 4th off last turn, run died rapidly inside final 200 M.
4-back the rails and 6Ls from the speed at 1000 M, 4Ls behind on straightening, stayed on fairly well to be nearest at the finish.
Box-seated between 3rd and 5th about 2Ls from the speed until the home straight, absolutely no excuses for not finishing the race more strongly.
One from rear about 9Ls off speed at 1200 M, 6Ls adrift entering home straight, made some decent late ground but couldn't reach front trio.
2-wide and 6Ls back in 9th at 1000 M and no closer entering home straight, very one-paced to conclude.
Always rearward, 8Ls behind at 1000 M and 7Ls back and one from rear taking last corner, never threatened.
Led by 1L on fence at the 1200 M, set steady tempo, still a neck to the good at last bend and the 200 M, soon headed and did well to just hold onto a place.
In 10th about 6Ls or 7Ls from the lead right until the last bend, ran on strongly out wide and only marginally missed the money. (Questioned.)
2-wide and 4Ls back in 7th at 1000 M, sent on out 3-wide turning for home to quicken up well and lead 150 M out, scored comfortably.
3-back on fence when 4Ls back in 6th from 1000 M to last bend, without clear running until the 100 M and never fully tested, excuse the run.
4-back on the rails about 6Ls from the speed at 1000 M, similar margin back in 8th taking last turn, ran on well late and only just failed to place.
Enjoyed a box-seat trail on fence 2Ls off pace until the home straight, lacked a turn of foot when required.
9Ls last at 1200 M and still last turning for home, never a factor.
Crossed from wide gate to track leader by less than 1L in 2nd from 1200 M to home turn, couldn't quite get to the lead, swamped inside final 50 M.
2-wide and 3Ls back in 5th at 1000 M, closer but briefly pocketed off home bend, ran on well but never likely to match the winner's turn of foot.
3-wide without cover throughout and within 2Ls of the speed from 1000 M to home straight, fizzled out rapidly after the arduous journey.
Eased to sit just off the leader 2-wide, helped by the slow early tempo, ran on ok in final stages without much threat.
Hard ridden early but failed to muster speed, 6Ls off the leader behind midfield 2 to 3-wide, not suited by the slow pace, no turn of foot in straight.
Eased at start, 8-1/2Ls off the leader at rear 2-wide, harmed by the slow pace, swept 4-wide at home bend to make run, just ran on fairly.
Eased back, 7-1/2Ls off the leader 2 to 3-wide, held up and lost ground 500 M, harmed by the slow pace, little dash 200 M.
Eased to rear, 7-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, dashed well 200 M despite not suited by the slow pace.
Eased to sit 2-1/2Ls behind the leader 2-wide, held up 400 M, not suited by the slow tempo, just held ground when clear in straight.
Pushed early to hold a midfield spot along the fence, 4Ls off the leader, harmed by the slow pace, blocked most straight, dashed well when clear and grabbed 3rd.
Settled in midfield, 4Ls off the leaders 2 to 3-wide, progressed steadily 600 M and took advantage of the slow pace, closed the race off strongly to score another narrow victory.
Hard ridden to secure the box seat, no room 300 M, ran on fairly when clear.
Went forward and took rail easily, led by 1L at advantageous slow sectionals, emptied 300 M. (Blood in trachea.)
Eased to sit towards the fence behind midfield, 6Ls off the leader, made the move following the eventual winner 500 M, dashed strongly and just beaten by a neck in 2nd.
Slow away, hard ridden to keep up in midfield, 5-1/2Ls off the leader, trapped 3 to 4-wide throughout and lost too much ground, harmed by the slow pace, bumped 300 M, weakened in straight.
Not far off in 4th on rails. Similar when 2Ls back in 4th turning in. Fought on under pressure without quickening.
Settled just worse than midfield on rails after beginning from poor draw. Similar turning in. Commenced move after straightening, gradually shifting out. Ran home nicely to do best work late.
Broke well from widest draw. Soon driven to share the lead racing 3 wide down far side. Similar turning in. Kept on in straight before fading passing 200 M.
Jumped one of the best. Shared lead to 400 M. Dropped out tamely after straightening.
Settled well behind. Last turning in. Only ran past well beaten horses closing stages.
Settled in forward in midfield, hugging the rails turning in. Responded well to take charge over 100 M out.
Began well. Soon settled in 3L 5th in running line. Shifted out for a run entering straight. Fought on steadily down centre of straight for distant 2nd.
Settled in last few. Given reminders going up Rock taking closer order rounding home bend. Sustained moderate progress down inside of straight but never threatening.
Began well, settling well behind to straight. Never nearer.
Began fairly from bad draw. Settled in midfield in running line. Fought on under pressure without threatening.

Did not jump quickly and found himself in midfield. Ridden along early to gradually join the front-runners. Held rails run sharing pace rounding home bend. Gained minor advantage entering home straight but soon weakened.
Quickly taken to a 3-wide spot in midfield after start, shuffled back coming off the 1st turn, pressed inside 400 M, came home strongly down the outside of track, just got up to take 2nd on the line.
Jumped well from the inside barrier, ridden early to take up running at slow tempo, pressed by outside horse on home turn and struggled, faded rapidly inside 200 M.
Began well, settled prominently in 3rd on the inside, close enough entering home straight, responded well, looked to have place chance 100 M out but was overhauled in the final strides.
Even break, travelled smoothly on the rail in mid-division 3Ls back, taken wide entering home straight, picked up in good fashion and wore down the race leader inside 50 M. Won with a bit to spare.
Taken back on jumping, assumed an usual position in the rear, 6Ls down approaching home turn, kept to inside on straightening, made only limited progress and was never threatening.
Average beginning, rolled forward to chase leader, enjoyed a run under slow tempo, pressed leader on the turn, hit front inside 300 M, all out but effort just flattened 100 M out.
Standard jump, assumed a position in midfield, unsuited by the slow pace and ran a touch keen early, moved closer on turning, threatened with a strong run but the winner had pulled clear.
Settled patiently towards the rear about 6Ls behind leader, saved ground on the rail, asked inside 400 M, made some headway down the inside but found no extra entering final 100 M.
Bounced out, tracked leaders in 3rd, had every chance in the straight but was again found wanting, weakened inside 100 M.

Purposely taken back, travelled in a position towards the rear about 7Ls off the pace, proved difficult to settle, picked up nicely in straight but was held up inside 200 M, full of running over the final stages.
Awkwardly away, travelled in midfield, shuffled back and struggled rounding home turn, never able to challenge, dropped out tamely.
Unable to cross after start and was left racing wide without cover in mid-division, gradually moved up approaching home turn, unable to pick up and was one-paced in the finish.
One of the first to jump, drifted back to hold a position better than midfield, close enough turning in, peeled out to challenge from 350 M, ran home one-paced, weakened inside 100 M. (Bled.)
Standard jump, travelled in midfield 3-deep, 4Ls behind on turning, brought with a challenge 400 M out, ran home strongly but commenced to hang in entering 250 M. Just failed by a diminishing neck.

Began with rest, settled in midfield 3 to 4Ls off the pace, well covered and used little in running, shifted wide in straight for a clear run, steadied near 200 M, ran on well over the concluding stages.
Standard break, parked 3-wide in mid-division, inclined to hang making the turn, found little under pressure and faded inside 100 M.
Awkwardly away and lost ground, moved closer to settle in behind midfield, switched wide in search of daylight in straight, steadied near 250 M, kept on one-paced thereafter.
Average start, ridden forward to take up running 900 M out, led field under a steady pace, kept on effort in straight, headed near 150 M, rallied but found no extra in final stages.
Average jump, hard ridden forward from the outside draw, travelled prominently in 2nd as they turned, made no progress in straight and plugged on from 250 M out. No impression.
Slow into stride, settled towards rear 6Ls off the leader, taken wide entering home straight, had every chance but failed to pick up, stayed on same pace to line.
Away in line, drifted back to a position behind midfield 5Ls from leader, wide and covered extra ground, fought on steadily in straight making some late impression.
Taken back on jumping, patiently settled in the rear 7 to 8Ls behind, brought to outside of track for a run, struggled to pick up and could beat tired runners only.
Quickly into stride, pressed on to a prominent position on the rail one back, had the leader covered coming into straight, hit front 150 M, battled on to deny 2nd horse on the line.
Began well enough, taken a midfield spot along the fence, raced ungenerously in middle stages, kept to inside on straightening, dropped off rapidly inside 200 M.
Broke well, eased back to a rearward position on the rail, saved ground on turning, picked up OK in straight but was steadied near 150 M, not fully tested.
Quickly taken to the fence on jumping, travelled in 5th running a shade too keen, made some progress in straight but failed to deliver a threatening run.

Went forward from a wide gate to race outside the leader in the early stages. Travelled about 3/4 of a length back off the front runner and by the final 200 M had got its head in front and was able to prevail.
Showed good early speed and speared forward to cross to the fence and lead. Was gassed by the furlong and tired quickly.
Travelled about 3 pairs back, 2 deep with cover. Peeled out early in the straight and made a short dash before ending its run well before the wire.
Positioned behind midfield 3 deep with cover. Came wide in the straight and made some ground over the final 300 M without threatening.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Raced midfield 1 off with cover. Failed to quicken when pressured early in the straight and gave ground inside the final stages.
Settled in last position. Obtained runs through the field in the straight and after obtaining clear running near the 200 M, closed off soundly.
Settled behind midfield, 1 off with cover. Improved nicely approaching the home turn and once in the clear showed good acceleration to come up marginally short.
Was posted wide and without cover for the major part of the race, behind the speed. Struggled in the run to the line.
Parked midfield on the fence. Worked into the race gradually after the 500 M. And ran on well despite being briefly held up near the 200 M.
Stalked the leader along the fence. Hit the front by the furlong but was overhauled soon after.
Was slow to begin, then raced in 2nd last position for the major part of the event with cover, but never really travelled and failed to respond to the riders efforts in the straight.

Raced handy to the leaders along the fence. For a considerable distance approaching and passing the 200 M, was steadied when held up and unable to improve. Motored to the line once in the clear. Should be closer.
Travelled with the backmakers along the fence. Kept to inside in the run home but failed to deliver.
2-wide and raced at midfield or behind. Switched out for daylight turning for home. Rallied strongly despite hanging in and ran down rivals near the post.
Jumped fairly and gradually drifted back to rear section. Took a wide turn home and was near last on straightening. Only ran past beaten runners in the straight.
4-wide and 2Ls off the lead at 1000 M . Moved up at the turn to race alongside the leader. Kept on fighting for the lead for most of the home straight but came up short near the post.
Missed the kick and raced at the rear. Near last on straightening and only ran past a beaten runner.
Settled in rear section. Made up ground over beaten runners in the straight.
Jumped well but lacked speed to keep pace in front. Settled in midfield. 2-back on the fence at home turn and ran on same pace in the straight.
Jumped well and raced in the lead. Disputed lead going into the home straight. Engaged in a 4-way battle for the lead in the closing stages, but came up short near the post.
No worse than midfield. 3-wide and 3Ls off the lead making the turn. Kept on well in the straight but was held up and unable to do much in the last 50 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Box-seated behind the leader. Lacked a response when asked in the home straight and weakened.

Raced 3-wide in midfield early stages. Closed-in on the leader making home turn and was a length down turning in. Continued well in the straight but unable to hold off eventual winner last few strides.
Ridden early and raced behind midfield. Made up ground in a 4-wide spot at the turn. Unable to sustain run and weakened after straightening.
Raced keenly behind the pace. Checked off heels 800 M out and was 3Ls off the lead making the turn. Ran on fairly and made up some ground in the final stages.
Off slowly and settled towards the rear. Trailed field turning for home and ran into traffic early straight. Closed off strongly and made up late ground.
Hard ridden to race among early leaders. 2-wide behind the pace at the turn. Failed to keep pace after straightening and faded.
Squeezed at start, 8Ls last at 1400 M, 5-wide and 4Ls down swinging for home couldn't find an extra gear and held 200 M out.
Quietly ridden as usual, 7Ls back at 1400 M, closer but came wide at 600 M, 6-wide (widest of all) turning in but rather one-paced to conclude.
On fence 5Ls off speed in 7th at 1400 M, making headway when checked at 300 M, kept on for a place but had little hope with quinella pair.
2-wide just behind the speed in 3rd, edged out wider at 600 M and led at top of home straight, looked the winner at 250 M but overhauled inside last 30 M.
6Ls back out 2-wide in 8th at 1400 M, improving off last bend but could only make very minor ground in the last section.
3-back on fence about 3Ls back in 5th at 1400 M, 2Ls down at top of stretch and stayed on well inside final 200 M to lead inside final few strides.
Ridden prominently in 2nd out 2-wide at 1400 M, same turning for home, didn't have much left when tempo quickened and lost a place 100 M out.
4Ls back in 6th out 2-wide at 1400 M, a little closer wheeling for home but sorely lacking in acceleration.
3-wide early, taken back for cover at 1200 M and forced 4-wide no cover at 600 M when pressing forward, run died soon after straightening.
Crossed to lead by 1L on fence at 1600 M, a neck clear for most of back straight but headed before home straight and soon swamped.
With cover 4Ls back in mid-division at first, held up from top of stretch to 300 M, ran on well again once clear despite hanging in, couldn't reach winner.
Awkward break, raced prominently out 4-wide no cover from wide gate, back-pedalling before last bend and eased down a long way out, to trial.
Always worse than midfield, one from rear about 8Ls behind leaders off final turn, recovered some minor late ground.
Always worse than midfield and never better than 7Ls from the lead at any stage, run deemed unacceptable and to trial.
Crossed from wide gate to set good tempo by 1L on fence at 900 M, 2Ls up off home turn but headed 250 M out and faded nearer the line.
4-back on fence about 5Ls behind speed from 1000 M to home straight when briefly tight for room, stayed on well along the inner to nick 3rd late.
3-wide with cover close in 4th or 5th to a strong tempo down back straight, nothing more to offer in the final 400 M.
Pressed on from wide gate to race close to strong pace, disputing 2nd at halfway, faded out rapidly from top of straight, unacceptable and to trial. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Midfield with cover about 5Ls from the speed until the straight, briefly loomed a place chance at the 200 M but unable to sustain the run.
Couldn't muster much early pace, towards rear at least 6Ls from the speed through to homestretch, failed to retrieve much late ground.
Best away but handed up early advantage to box-seat from 800 M to home straight, led again 250 M out and always doing just enough to hang on.
Lost ground at the start and 9Ls last at 1000 M, shifted left into clear running 350 M out and let down very strongly in final 200 M, never nearer.
Slow to begin, 5-back along the rails in rear at 1000 M, 6Ls down in 10th or so into final section, never troubled principals.
3-back on fence in midfield until straightening, stayed on fairly well but a little one-paced in final 100 M and tipped out of a place close home.
Secured a rail spot in midfield, travelled nicely 5Ls off the leader, not suited by the slow tempo, dashed well 400 M, steadied 150 M, run ended 50 M.
Awkwardly away, raced at tail 9Ls off the leader 2 to 4-wide, lost ground on bend, harmed by the slow pace, dashed strongly 200 M despite all negative racing situations.
Slowly away, settled at back 7Ls off the leader 2 to 3-wide, harmed by the slow pace, ran on ok in final stages.
Pushed forward to sit just off the lead, raced keenly 2-wide, suited by the slow tempo, soon weakened 400 M.
Hard ridden to take the rail and led by 1L at slow sectionals, pressured from 800 M, hung on until 250 M overhauled momentarily, fought back strongly and just beaten by a head on the line.
Settled in front of midfield along the rails, 3-1/2Ls off the leader, not suited by the slow tempo, just held ground in straight.
Eased to sit behind midfield, 6Ls off the leader 2 to 3-wide, harmed by the slow pace, little dash 200 M.
Hard ridden to obtain the box seat, travelled comfortably throughout and benefited by the slow early sectionals, closed the race off strongly to grab a narrow win.
At rear, 8-1/2Ls off the leader on the fence, no suited by the slow pace, lacked turn of foot, just ran on in straight.
Hard ridden to go forward, raced wide without cover early, pressured the leader from 800 M 2-wide, emptied 300 M.
Eased to sit in midfield, 4Ls off the leader 2 to 3-wide, not suited by the slow pace, dashed strongly 300 M to finish a close 3rd.
Pushed to occupy a prominent spot, 2-1/2Ls off the leader 2 to 3-wide, not suited by the slow tempo, no dash, flattened 200 M.
Eased back, 7-1/2Ls off the leader, trapped 3 to 4-wide and lost ground, dashed well 250 M despite not suited by the slow pace.
Settled in midfield. Obtained a clear run shortly after straightening. Ran on steadily to narrowly miss the placegetters despite a difficult ride hanging in.
Raced wide without cover behind midfield. Did nothing in straight.
Settled 3-wide in midfield or just worse. No better turning in. Only produced moderate impression without quickening.
Midfield to straight. Soon folded up quickly after straightening.
In front briefly after beginning from middle draw. Unable to cross to rail and travelled 2-wide in 4th within 3Ls of pace far side. Similar turning for home but soon found nothing under pressure.
Settled at the back. Obtained a clear passage about 300 M out. Produced moderate impression late.
Soon taken back to rear. Remained in last few to straight. Made modest headway down straight without threatening.
Began with others and niggled at early. Took up running while 3-wide rounding stables bend. Crossed to rails far side and led until tiring 200 M out.
Drawn wide. Trailed the field most of way. Never a factor.
Held rails run in midfield most of way to straight. Gained closer order turning in. Made steady headway without threatening.
Broke well from the one draw. Restrained in 2L 3rd on rails. Shifted out for a run entering straight. Ran on gamely under pressure to assert authority over 100 M out.
Broke well from a high draw racing wide around stables bend. Improved to settle one-out-one-back in 2nd far side. Hit front from tiring leader passing 200 M but soon swamped.
Soon taken back to race on rails. Towards rear most of way down far side. Fought on well down straight to do best work late to snatch 2nd.
Taken back on jumping, settled patiently in rear trailing 10Ls to leader, niggled along on turning, made plenty of ground from the back but never troubled the winner. Hanging in last 50 M.
Travelled better than midfield, 6Ls down coming off the home turn, unable to quicken up, weakened inside 200 M.
Bounced out, quickly moved up to lead field under slow tempo early, opened up 5Ls advantage when pace quickened on the turn, kept on finding plenty to line and won the race in very fast time.
Began well, travelled in 6th about 8Ls back, made some progress down the straight, hampered inside 50 M.
Away in line, restrained to settle in midfield 7Ls off the pace, brought to challenge 400 M out, chased hard down the centre of track and was outran by the 3rd over the closing stages.
Even break, eased back to a rearward position about 9Ls behind leader, unable to find extra gear on straightening, ran on without threatening.
Jumped well, travelled comfortably in 2nd, had 5Ls to make up on leader coming into straight, responded OK under pressure, not able to close the gap on leader but did well to hold on for 2nd.
Standard break, taken a midfield spot on the rail, shuffled back gradually on turning, found nothing when asked, dropped off rapidly inside 200 M.
Allowed to drift back and settle a clear last, suited by solid tempo racing 12Ls off speed, set huge task when last on turning, made remarkable progress final 300 M to be nearest on line.
Out in line, ended up racing behind midfield 7 to 8Ls away on rails, used little to bend, improved steadily along inside in straight, however unable to get closer inside 200 M.
Showed early pace, took a midfield spot 6Ls or so away, not used in mid-section, held up between horses on turning, clear final 250 M and closed fairly without threatening.
Fast into stride, rolled forward and took up running, set a solid pace 3Ls clear, began to come back to field turning, folded soon after straightening.

Awkwardly away, ended up in rear division 10Ls off speed, advantaged by solid tempo throughout, still well back making bend, steadied when improving at 350 M, produced strong finish final furlong to just miss.
Well enough away, took a spot 5Ls away behind speed in 2 wide line, had a fair trip throughout, tracked eventual winner on turning, closed evenly but run ended inside 100 M.
Began smartly, took a spot 4Ls back in 3rd position, 2 wide first without cover, gradually closed from 400 M, hit lead inside 200 M and kept on strongly holding off late challenger.

Amongst first few to jump, positioned 2nd 3Ls off lead on fence, forced to cart field up to leader on a fast pace, improved turning, hit lead briefly pushing 300 M, soon overhauled and one paced final 200 M.
Tardy into stride, assumed usual spot well back amongst last few, 8Ls off strong pace, saved ground on rails throughout, made run on turning, closed off strongly down middle to go under in 3 way go.
Little early pace, raced in rear division 9Ls away in 2 wide line, helped by solid speed at top end, still well back turning, lacked usual dash and just closed evenly to be nearest on line.
Began well, pressed on but caught wide without cover, forced to work 5Ls away facing breeze, urged along turing, couldn't sustain effort and weakened out late.
Standard jump, assumed a role behind midfield 8Ls back in 2 wide line, helped by tempo, ridden along turning, didn't run on in home stretch.
Not fast away, positioned 4 to 5Ls back on rails, had an easy time in mid-section, improved position approaching bend, in traffic early straight but closed well final furlong to make frame.
Amongst first to break, pressed on to race outside leader, applied pressure throughout shading inside horse, held a 1L advantage on turning in, kicked to 200 M before run ended.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Away fairly, slotted in nicely behind pace pack 3 to 4Ls down in 2 wide line, relaxed well in run, stoked up from 300 M, got going final 200 M to take lead in shadows of post.
Moderate break, settled in rearward division on rails, 7Ls off front runners in mid section, never a winning hope and struggled in run to line.
Away well, pressed forward but caught 3 wide without cover, did work outside leader in mid-section, under riding turning, kept on creditably in straight without being a leading chance.
Slow into stride, ended up back with last few 7Ls away, had a fair run to bend, still had job to do turning, came to outside and dashed well final 200 M for a remarkable 2nd.
No early pace, ended up 9Ls back, helped by genuine tempo, shifted 3 wide at midpoint, set impossible task on bend, closed well final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Standard jump, recovered to settle behind midfield 7Ls back in running line, relaxed nicely and travelled well to bend, made some moderate progress to 150 M before run ended.
Fair to begin, settled 5Ls back in midfield, no excuses in run, urged along turning, condition gave out soon after straightening and dropped off.
Speedy beginning, went on to take up lead, did share of work with pressure from outside horse, still held rail but shaded on turning, fought back well in straight to be not far away in finish.
OK jump but faded back to midfield, raced 3 to 4 wide without cover in mid-section, pushed wide on bend, unable to make an impression and well beaten.
Drifted back from an awkward alley, posted 3 wide with cover 8Ls away, did share of work in mid-section, one paced in straight.
Never better than midfield. Gradually shuffled back to last position before home bend. Remained same turning into straight. Only ran past well-beaten horses.
Raced wide with leaders early after beginning from wide draw. Failed to obtain cover and remained wide in prominent position before fading out of contention into straight.
Broke well and soon niggled at. However, settled wide in midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Began fairly. Travelled not far off the speed in 4th or 5th. Commenced good move turning for home to hit front over 200 M out. Responded well to draw clear for a convincing victory.
Soon took up running. Held slender advantage before headed coming out of far side. Re-gained lead turning for home but not for long when swamped over 200 M out.
Raced wide with leaders to straight. Folded up quickly. (Questioned.)

Slightly slow out. Gradually picked up through the field before checked coming out of back straight in midfield. Back in last few straightening and checked again 350 M out before producing good impression late.
Broke well but quite slow to muster. Travelled just better than midfield and under urge at times. Gained 4th on rails some 2Ls back on straightening but could only keep on at the same pace.
Settled on rails in midfield. Lost position coming out of back straight. Still in worse than midfield turning in. Only produced moderate impression in straight without threatening.
Close up. Disputed lead from 1000 M, gaining narrow advantage coming out of back straight. Weakened noticeably upon straightening.
Began moderately. Raced wide in midfield down far side and around home bend. Briefly baulked upon straightening but made no show in straight. (Abnormal breathing noise.) (Roarer.)
Sluggish at start, losing a few lengths. Soon picked up to join rear of field on rails. Similar turning in but had nothing to give in straight.
Began fairly. Travelled mainly in midfield. Similar turning in. Fought on gamely under pressure to grab 2nd late.

Began with others from the widest barrier. Soon taken back to race behind midfield with cover. Remained in last few to home turn. Ran on well down centre of straight to be nearest at finish. (Tactic questioned.)
Slow to begin, settled towards the rear trailing 7Ls to leader, under pressure making the home turn, showed no dash and could beat tired runners only.
Taken back on jumping, settled in rear 3-deep from the fence, improved position down the back straight, 6Ls to make up on straightening, finish off the race well to be closest on the line.
Pressed on early to overcome the outside draw, travelled prominently in a one-out-one-back position, had every chance in straight but didn't pick up, weakened inside 200 M.
Slow into stride, shaken up to maintain a midfield position on the rail 3Ls behind leader, travelled comfortably under a slow tempo, picked up well on straightening, kept on inside 200 M.
Awkwardly away and lost ground, moved up to race in mid-division 2-deep, ran a touch keen in early stages, hard driven on turning, made even progress from 300 M.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Failed to muster early speed and was left racing near the rear about 6Ls from leader, saved ground on inside, gave little response when asked 350 M out and just plugged away to line.
Pressed forward to take up running on the rail. Led field under a slow tempo, found nothing when asked, dropped out rapidly entering 200 M.
Well enough away, travelled behind midfield about 5Ls behind leader, niggling along on turning, couldn't find an extra gear and ran home one-paced.
Taken a spot on the rail. Travelled prominently in 3rd, tracked well on turning, enjoyed a run down the inside, took charge inside 100 M.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Moderate jump, parked on the fence behind midfield 5Ls off the pace, ran on OK in straight without threatening.
Travelled in 2nd last position. Powered to the post out wide.
Stalked the leaders throughout on the fence. Had every possible chance.
Was pushed along early to make up ground after being slowly away, eventually settling 2 deep with cover in midfield. Made some ground over the concluding stages.
Travelled 2 deep with cover, midfield in the early stages. Went forward near the 1000 M when the pace steadied then was posted 3-wide with cover behind the speed. Was a beaten horse after the 500 M.
Went forward and led along the rails at a slow pace. Quickened the tempo after the 600 M however faded over the final stages.
Raced 3-4 lengths back on the rails. Failed to respond to pressure in the straight.
Settled towards the rear along the paint. Kept to the rail in the straight but was unable to obtain clear running over the last 200 M and consequently was not tested.
Raced in back in the field. Ran on soundly without ever threatening the winner.

Ridden along early to park outside the leader. Coursing the back straight was then allowed to track the leader, chased well coming to the home turn and was able to shoot clear after the furlong to score well.
After being caught wide early behind midfield, made a forward move near the 1000 M, to join the leaders, however continued to race wide and without cover. Weakened in the run to the line.

Taken back at the start from the outside gate and settled in a clear last position. Tacked onto the field prior to the home turn and after switching to the outside in the straight, made good headway late.
Didn't quite settle properly in the early stages despite enjoying a nice run in the race behind the speed with cover. Had every chance.
Niggled along and was no better than midfield. 2-wide making home turn and unable to quicken in the straight.
Raced 3-wide at midfield. Quickened nicely and steadily made up ground in the straight. Just missed catching the winner.
Took the lead near the Rock and maintained advantage into the home straight. 2Ls in front final 200 M. Kept on gamely and mustered enough in the final stages to hold off a late challenger.
Jumped awkwardly. Kept within 3Ls of the leader but raced wide without cover throughout. Weakened and dropped out after straightening.
Off slowly and raced in rear section. Closed off strongly and made up good ground in the straight.
Better than midfield. 3Ls off the lead turning in. Kept on well in the straight for a minor placing.
Raced on the rails behind midfield. Steadily made up ground after straightening but was held up in traffic in the final 150 M.
Led early stages. Settled behind the lead 700 M out. Kept on fairly in the straight to make the frame.
Taken back on jumping and raced in a rearward position. Near last on straightening and rallied in the straight to be closest at finish.
Raced 2-wide behind the lead. Kept on fairly in the straight but unable to turn up a notch in the closing stages.
Jumped only fairly. Gradually slipped back and trailed field. Last on straightening and made up ground by running past beaten runners.
Blew the start and was ridden along to make up ground. Raced on the fence and was 2 to 3Ls off. Checked off heels when over-racing 600 M out. Hung in badly in the straight and dropped out.
No excuses having box-seated from 1200 M to the home straight, dropped away rather tamely.
2-wide and 1L back in 2nd at 1000 M and advanced to lead at top of home straight, headed again at the furlong pole and fizzled out soon after.
Ideally placed 2-wide and 2Ls back in 4th or 5th through to home straight, led 200 M out but grabbed by the winner on the line.
Slowest away, in rear duo at least 7Ls from the pace and same on straightening, made some decent late ground for 4th, post came too soon, wants further.
Led by 1L on fence at 1200 M and held a slender margin before being headed at the top of the homestretch, faded quickly. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Went back, one-from rear about 7Ls off pace at halfway and niggled along to improve at the 500 M, made up some late ground but no real danger.
3-back along rails at 1000 M and within 4Ls of the lead off final curve, making headway but briefly held up 150 M out, couldn't recover.
3-wide no cover throughout, prominent from early stages about 1L from the speed but fading at point of home straight entrance, eased down late on.
Settled 4-back along rails about 5Ls behind speed until home straight, weaved a passage first outside and then inside to lead on the line.
Awkward break, 3-wide with cover about 4Ls back in midfield and slightly worse off turning in, didn't find much off the bridle.
2-wide about 4Ls down in midfield from 1200 M to last bend, 1L down at 200 M and kept on finding and only just failed to fill the quinella.
Slow to muster early pace, 2-wide and worse than midfield about 5Ls back through to the straight, made some good late ground, never nearer.
Slowest away and under pressure in rear at the 600 M when 6Ls behind, never on terms with the main body of the field.
4Ls and 2-wide back in midfield at 600 M, held up into straight, not helped by somewhat restricted running in the stretch but still a sound debut.
Close up but 3-wide without cover until the home straight, about 2Ls down and losing ground before home turn, dropped out further.
Held the 'one-out-one-back' position about 2Ls off pace until home straight, 1L back in 2nd at the 200 M, had his chance to place.
Went back from widest gate, 7Ls behind in 10th at 600 M, ran on strongly down the centre to take 2nd place.
4-back on rails in 8th about 5Ls off pace at 700 M and marginally closer off last bend, without clear running at 200 M and kept on again, wasn't far away.
1L back in 2nd out 2-wide at 800 M and in a similar into the last section, surrendered tamely inside the final 300 M.
Led by 1L on fence at 1000 M and similar margin clear entering home straight, quickened up well and always repelling his rivals.
5Ls back in 9th out 2-wide in middle stages, closer out 5-wide (widest of all) turning in, ran on well in the straight and missed the money by a nose.
Box-seated about 2Ls off pace in 3rd until the home straight, had every chance at the 200 M and no excuses for not producing a better finish.
