No early speed, 5-back along the rails in rear, 7Ls behind at halfway, 4Ls back off last turn and at 200 M, tight for room and not tested final 50 M.
3-back on fence between 3Ls and 4Ls off speed in 6th right until being checked turning for home, stayed on well along the rails to just nick a place.
Hard ridden forward, sat 1/2L off and outside the leader, benefited by the slow early tempo, led 250 M, hung on until 100 M flattened.
Eased to sit in midfield, 4Ls off the leaders 2 to 3-wide, dashed well 200 M to finish 3rd despite harmed by the slow pace.
Checked after start and again at first bend, 7Ls off the leaders 3-wide, not suited by the slow tempo, ran on OK in straight.
Pushed to secure the ideal box seat, enjoyed the slow early tempo and the rail trip, closed the race off strongly and just beaten by a neck in 2nd.
Trapped 4 to 5-wide throughout in midfield and lost too much ground, not suited by the slow tempo, made some ground from 500 M, however run ended 100 M.
Hard ridden to take the rail and led by 1/2L at slow sectionals, soon weakened 250 M.
Bumped start, pushed to hold the rail just behind midfield, 5Ls off the leaders, dashed well 100 M despite not suited by the slow pace.
Eased back, 6Ls off the leaders, trapped 4 to 5 wide throughout and lost too much ground, harmed by the slow pace still ran on OK in final stages despite not suited by all racing situations.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.

Bounced very well, eased to sit in midfield along the fence, 3-1/2Ls off the leaders, not suited by the slow pace, demonstrated its usual strong finishing efforts final 200 M and scored another narrow victory.
Very slowly away, checked badly first bend, detached at rear, 9Ls off the leaders, harmed by the slow pace, little dash 100 M.
Pushed to occupy a prominent spot, 2Ls off the leaders 2-wide, favoured by the slow early sectionals, lacked turn of foot, just held ground in straight.
Broke well. Gradually settling towards rear when tightened and checked on rails. Remained in last few to straight. Made late impression running past well beaten horses closing stages.
Raced wide without cover in forward of midfield down far side. Made short-lived effort to take closer order around Rock. Faded from approaching home straight.
Settled well behind. Produced moderate late impression under pressure closing stages.

Soon took up running despite drawn wide. Caused scrimmaging when crossed to rails coming out of home straight. Led until going up Rock and remained in 2nd on rails turning for home. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Settled on rails in forward of midfield. Commenced run turning for home. Ran on well in straight to take charge close to home. Won convincingly.

Niggled along early for a prominent position but tightened between runners coming out of home straight. Settled in 2L 4th far side before taking off approaching Rock to lead around home bend. Flattered 200 M out and soon swamped.
In rear of midfield when involved in scrimmaging passing winning post the first time. Held midfield position to straight and ran home one-paced.

Slow to muster and checked in midfield passing winning post the first time. Settled for rear of midfield on rails and remained similar down far side and at home bend. Gradually faded after straightening. (Questioned for poor performance)
Began with others but restrained on rails for coveted run with cover. Never far off before 400 M but failed to quicken under pressure after straightening.
Settled in rear of midfield after beginning from a high draw Similar turning in. Ran on steadily under pressure despite hanging out in straight.
Soon taken back to race well behind. Widest runner turning in. Ran home one-paced down the centre of straight.
Always in touch. Settled a 2L 3rd before gaining to one-out-one-back position entering back straight. Became 3rd at Rock and remained similar turning in. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Away with them, maintained a position in midfield 3Ls off the pace, niggled along turning for home, steadied near 300M, couldn't pick up in run to line.

Broke well from the outside barrier, drifted back to race behind midfield 5Ls away, had a smooth run throughout, found room on the inside and produced a strong finish to wear down the leader in the dying strides.
Quickly into stride, showed customary early speed to lead, had 2Ls advantage coming into straight, kept on giving until final 100m, weakened and was headed a few strides before the line.
Reasonable jump, hard pressed to go forward, travelled prominently in 3rd under a steady tempo, unable to go with them under pressure 300M out, weakened inside 150M.
Jumped fairly, shaken up to take closer order in mid-division, over-raced in middle stages, wide on turning, no extra inside 150M as early hard run took toll.
Began in line, unable to slot in and was left racing wide and without cover, close enough on turning, didn't find any when asked, dropped out inside 100M.
Well enough away, prominent early but was shuffled back to midfield passing 1000M, under pressure on turning, edged out for clear run, didn't pick up and was one-paced in the finish.
Began awkwardly, taken back to last trailing 8Ls behind leader, made some headway in straight, met minor interference inside 200M, ran on ok to line.
Jumped well, tracked leader in a one-out-one-back position, had every chance in straight but was unable to produce a finishing burst, just battled away to line.
Settled patiently near the back racing 7Ls away, used little in running, taken wide on straightening, dashed well down the outside making late impression.
Even break, taken a position in midfield 5Ls off the pace, saved ground on the rail, kept to inside on straightening, ran on well but couldn't match the winner's turn of foot.
Taken back on jumping, held a position towards the rear on the fence, 7Ls down on turning, made up some ground down the inside to finish a non-threatening 4th.
Average jump, moved up to race alongside leader, gave the winner a race from 400 M, battled on but was gradually outpaced inside 150 M.
Jumped well, showed early speed to lead field under a steady tempo, driven 350 M out, went clear last 150 M, won its debut with something in hand.
Average start, maintained a prominent position close to middle of field, struggled from midpoint, faded gradually in run to line.
Moderate start, travelled behind midfield about 4Ls behind in midpoint, struggled to pick up entering 400 M, never a factor.
Quickly into stride, taken to a prominent position along the stand's rail, under pressure inside 400 M, weakened over the concluding stages.
Began with rest, moved forward to take closer order in 4th, close enough entering 400 M, driven out but unable to close the gap with leaders.
Began with rest, travelled in a handy position not far off the leaders, couldn't pick up under pressure and kept on one-paced towards the line.
Slow to begin, no speed early on, settled in the rear 4 to 5Ls off the pace, displayed signs of inexperience as the race began to get serious, never competitive at the back.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Jumped fairly, lacked early speed and was settled behind midfield 4Ls off the pace, made a run down the outside of field but couldn't quicken up. No impression.
Bounced out, settled in a midfield position 3Ls behind leader, ran on inside 400 M but was never threatening.
Well enough away, settled 4Ls behind leader in midfield, steadied near 500 M, found nothing in run to line and was well beaten. (Saddle shifted.)
Slowly away, lacked early pace, ended up racing towards the rear trailing 4 to 5Ls behind, unable to pick up off the bridle, dropped off inside 100 M. (Bled.)
Began awkwardly, travelled in midfield 3Ls off the pace, found little when asked inside 400 M, never likely.
Parked midfield 2-wide with cover. Worked into clear approaching the home turn and when asked for an effort, breezed up to the leaders to have the race in its keeping by the 200 M.
Worked forward to settle 1 out behind the leader without cover. Dropped right out of contention over the final furlong. To Trial. (See Racing Incidents.)
Was posted wide and without cover throughout the race, handy to the leaders. Stayed on well.
Went forward to take up front running duties. Was a spent force after the 150 M.

Began awkwardly and then took time to muster speed in the early stages and at the 1000 M, was steadied, eventually settling 2 deep with cover, handy to the leaders. Gave ground over the concluding stages. (Blood in the trachea.)
Tracked the leader along the fence. Gave in quickly near the 300 M.
Tracked the leader along the rails. Had every chance but didn't run on.
Settled in 2nd last position, 1 off with cover. Switched to the outside of the field in the straight and ran on strongly.
Bounded in the air at the start and lost considerable ground, settled in last position. At the 350 Metres while closing the race off, was checked and then once rebalanced made good ground.
Raced with the back markers, 2-wide with cover. Found the line soundly.
Positioned midfield on the fence. Commenced to close the race off soundly however experienced traffic problems in the final 100 M.
Travelled midfield, 3 deep with cover. Struggled in the run home.
Raced behind midfield, 2-wide with cover. Kept on one paced.

Travelled towards the rear of the field 1 off with cover. Sought to make ground away from the fence from the 500 M and was held up near the home turn and early in the straight. Worked home well after being checked near the 300 M.

Better than midfield but was wide without cover. 4-wide among leaders turning in. Kept on well after straightening and took the lead briefly inside final 200 M. Unable to find more to hold off top pair closing stages.
Raced along the rails at midfield. 2 to 3Ls off the lead turning for home. Caught in traffic for most of the home straight and was not tested.
Settled in rear section. Rallied and steadily made up ground in the straight despite having trouble finding daylight near 200 M.
Ridden along early to a forward position. 3Ls off the pace in 3rd 800 M out. 3-wide behind the leaders turning in but unable to keep pace thereafter.
Raced wide at midfield. Kept on steadily in the straight but unable to find extra to challenge in the closing stages.
Lacked early speed and raced towards the rear. Made up ground between runners in the straight.
Taken back from a wide draw and trailed field. Remained at the rear and swung out wide turning for home. Rallied in the straight and was closest at finish.
Settled behind midfield. Caught up in traffic for some distance after straightening but charged through strongly once getting a clear run near 200 M to win the race.
Took the lead after 1200 M. Disputed lead turning for home but unable to keep pace in the home straight.
Ridden out of the gates and had the early lead. Headed 1000 M out and raced behind the leader. Regained lead on straightening but unable to find extra last 200 M.
Better than midfield. A length off the lead making home turn. Hung in and proved difficult to ride in the straight. Faded final stages.
Jumped well and was allowed to slip back to midfield. 2Ls off the leader turning for home. Quickened on straightening to contend for the lead 200 M out. Unable to sustain effort final stages.
No better than midfield. Steadily made up ground in the straight but unable to pose serious threat to winner in the closing stages.
Dropped back from a wide draw and raced behind midfield. Near last on straightening and made no impression thereafter.
4-wide no cover throughout, 5Ls off the speed at halfway and further back on straightening, soon beaten.
Ridden quietly at least 7Ls or 8Ls last through to the straight when briefly held up, stayed on strongly out wide to nick 2nd close home.
4Ls behind speed in mid-division at 1000 M, pressured to lie up 600 M out and steadily faded out in the home straight.
Led by 1L at the 1600 M and set an even tempo until being headed 350 M out, one-paced thereafter but out only tipped out of the money in final strides.
Around midfield with cover about 5Ls from the speed until the straight, 3Ls down at the 200 M and given his chance to place in closing stages.
Failed to muster early pace, 5Ls back in midfield at 1000 M and no closer off last turn, always held by the leading players.
2-wide and 1L back in 2nd early on and same margin back turning in, led 350 M out and well in charge final 100 M.
Rearward about 6Ls of the pace before steadying briefly turning for final section, made good late ground to place.
Mostly 3-wide no cover in a better than midfield position throughout, 1L down in 3rd turning in, likely the extra work cost him in the straight.
Never any better than midfield in 3 or 4-back position along the rails, pressured turning for home and lacking in acceleration when tempo quickened.
Never travelling well towards the rear, 12th and 7Ls down at halfway, never appeared likely to draw much closer. (Questioned for poor performance.)
3-back on fence initially, box-seated in 4th on rails from 1000 M to stretch, steadied at the 200 M but had his chance to place if good enough.
4-wide with cover in worse than midfield early on, 8Ls down at halfway, never really in touch.
Another poor run, 2-wide in a handy position at the 1200 M, came under pressure at the 600 M, dropped out feebly in the home straight.
Quietly ridden, 8Ls last at 1200 M, 7Ls down turning for home and made some fair late ground through plodders in the stretch.
Hard pressed to dispute early running but weakened out of prominent role before final bend and dropped out tamely, unacceptably bad effort.
Went back early on, worse than midfield 3-wide with cover at the 400 M when 4Ls down, stayed on fairly well for a place. (Questioned.)
Behind midfield about 4Ls off speed at 1200 M and one from rear turning in, didn't have much room and not fully tested even if he was held anyway.
Disputed early pace at 1400 M and left in front before entrance to home straight, headed at the 200 M and nothing more to offer late on.
4-wide without cover throughout, around midfield and 4Ls from the speed until straightening, extra work exacted its toll in closing stages.
Worst to begin, 13th about 8Ls off early pace, 5Ls down and into clear running at 400 M, stayed on fairly well, never likely to catch winner.
'One-out-one-back' in 3rd at 1400 M, going well when 2Ls back turning for home, didn't find much off the bridle and swamped final 150 M.
3-back on fence about 4Ls down in 6th at 1200 M, never likely to improve this position in the final 600 M.
Midfield about 4Ls adrift with cover at 1000 M and same turning for home, always outpaced.
Somehow ended up 3-wide no cover from gate 3 at 1000 M, close-up in 2nd or 3rd from 800 M to home turn, weakened, later diagnosed a "roarer". (Tactic questioned.)
3-wide with cover in midfield and 4Ls behind at halfway, closer and going well turning in, led 200 M out and never going to be headed thereafter, tidily.
4-back on rails about 5Ls off speed from 1000 M to home straight, behind horses for final 400 M, didn't appear to be going well enough in any case. (Tactic questioned.)
Box-seated in 4th on fence at 1400 M and 2Ls down in 4th turning for home, one-paced on the run-in.
Bumped start, settled in midfield, 2Ls off the leaders, not suited by the slow pace, dashed strongly 200 M, just a nose away from its second consecutive victory.
Bounced well, shared the lead easily at advantageous slow sectionals, hung on until 100 M overhauled, still ran on strongly to the line, just missed win and beaten by a head in 3rd.
Very slow away, but soon moved up to share the lead at slow sectionals, ran on until 250 M weakened.
Eased to sit just off the leaders, held ground until 150 M flattened.
Pushed forward, 2Ls off the leaders, not suited by the slow pace, just held ground in final stages.
At back, 4-1/2Ls off the leaders, dashed strongly 250 M despite not suited by the slow pace.
Midfield, 2-1/2Ls off the leaders, not suited by the slow tempo, flattened 200 M.
Eased to sit in midfield, 2Ls off the leaders, not suited by the slow tempo, soon out of fuel 300 M.
Pushed forward and sat just off the leaders, enjoyed the slow early tempo, closed the race off strongly to score by a narrow margin.
Slowly away, not suited by the slow pace, never better than midfield.
Failed to keep up with the field, more 6Ls off the leaders, harmed by the slow pace, made plenty of late ground final 200 M.
Shared the lead easily at slow sectionals, however soon weakened 300 M, checked 200 M.
Awkward away, at back, 4-1/2Ls off the leaders, harmed by the slow pace, checked 450 M, never progressed.
Slow away, behind midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the leaders, not suited by the slow pace, dashed well 200 M, improving effort.
Slightly slow out and soon ridden to gain rails run in rear of midfield. Gradually faded after straightening.
Settled in forward of midfield. Quickened well inside final 250 M to just fail to get up on line.
Moderate jump but soon recovered to lead on rails. Ceded advantage to hold one-back position around home bend. Kept on before faded under pressure over 200 M out.
Soon taken to last few on rails. Ran on down inner of straight to be nearest at finish.
Broke well to race with leaders far side. Shuffled back to one-out-one-back position coming out of back straight. Similar turning in but soon dropped out tamely.
With leaders racing wide down far side. 3 wide in 2L 4th making home bend. Soon folded up after turning in.
Soon taken to rear from widest draw. Trailed the field to straight. Made modest headway down centre of track past well beaten horses.
Began with others from wide draw. Settled for midfield position two off the rails. Dropped out tamely after straightening.
Jumped well from wide draw and with leaders briefly. Soon taken back towards rear. Ran on well down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.

Never far off, racing 2-back on rails rounding home bend. Closer order on heels of leader turning in before hitting front 200 M out. Unable to sustain effort closing stages and swamped late. Jockey charged for eased up too soon.

Broke well from middle draw. Raced up with the pace before taken back for cover in 6th approaching home bend. Well placed to challenge turning in and quickened nicely to assert authority closing stages.
Began from wide draw and settled wide in last few. Made no impression in the run home.
Settled behind midfield. Kept on well in the run home.
Began with others from wide draw. Well there and soon driven to take up running and cross for rails approaching home bend. Held lead until headed passing 200 M. (Tactic questioned.)
Away with them, assumed a rearward spot on the rail racing 4Ls back, switched out on straightening, picked up well but ran into traffic near 200 M, ran home strongly when cleared inside 100 M.
Away with rest, rolled forward to take up running on the rail at a steady pace, pressed by runner on the outside, all out 350 M but was soon overhauled, weakened inside 100 M.
Broke well, taken forward to share lead on the outside, found nothing when asked 350 M out, dropped off rapidly from 200 M.
Pushed along to maintain a position in midfield 3Ls back, well covered turning for home, had to wait for a gap inside 400 M, found little when asked and could beat tired runners only.

Taken back on jumping, settled towards the rear 5Ls off the pace, travelled smoothly to bend, brought with a well timed challenge on the outside, battled to the front 100 M out, kept on strongly to fend off rival at the finish.
Reasonable jump, ran a touch keen early, up with the pace approaching the turn but was 3-wide without cover, under pressure 300 M out, kept on one-paced to line.
Bounced out, taken to a handy position on the rail just behind leader, found daylight on the inside 300 M out, dashed well to finish a creditable 3rd, not beaten far.
Standard break, parked on the rail in mid-division, shuffled back on turning, kept to inside on straightening, lacked a finishing burst, faded inside 100 M.
Jumped fairly, maintained a midfield position racing 3-wide ridden out from 350 M, took time to gather but no clear passage from 250 M to 50 M. Not fully tested.
Broke well, soon back with last few, raced 4Ls behind leader, moved closer on turning, ridden out inside 400 M, stuck to task well, battled on with the winner 100 M out and was edged out on the line.
Missed the jump and lost many lengths, raced in last detached, 6Ls to make up on straightening, didn't pick up and hung out in run to line.
Well enough away, rolled forward to settle in a prominent 4th, tracked well to turn, brought with a challenge near 300 M, came through between horses but run flattened over concluding stages.

Jumped well from the outside barrier, unable to slot in and was forced wide without cover, within striking distance turning home, threatened with a strong run inside 300 M, briefly led but was outrun last 100 M.
Ordinary jump, ridden hard to get around the field, ended up outside the leader, applied pressure on bend, folded soon after turning and dropped right out.

Taken in for a trail raced 4Ls back in mid-section, had a fair run in between horses throughout, back in traffic turning and made steady ground in straight when running presented to be nearest on line.
No early speed, settled at rear 6Ls away 3 wide with cover, always well back to bend, made no impression in straight.
Jumped in line, assumed a spot 3Ls back in midfield amongst horses in running line, not asked to bend, just produced a one-paced finish.
Amongst first to jump, took a prominent spot on back of leader, travelled well in mid-section, right there turning, held up 300 M to 200 M, closed well when clear to snatch 3rd late.
Out in line, pushed forward but posted 3 wide without cover, raced 2Ls back throughout, moved closer at 400 M, hit front passing 300 M, fought on well however unable to match winner late.
Even break, positioned handily behind speed 3Ls back on rails, used nothing in middle stages, into clear at 400 M, in battle for front at 300 M, peaked on effort at 100 M.
Bounced out with them, couldn't get in, forced to race 4 wide at rear, set big task still well down and wide turning, finished off well making good ground despite negative situation.

Moderate jump, ended up back near last few 6Ls away, not helped when pace steadied, still well back turning, gained split at 400 M and produced very strong sprint to overhaul them. Won with some comfort.
Fast into stride, led easily soon after, set even pace to suit throughout, pressured by outside horse on bend, fought on in straight but emptied inside 100 M.
Taken back from a wide alley, raced at rear but improved 3 wide to be 5Ls down with cover on circle, improved quickly turning, looked a chance before peaking on run late.
First to jump, held spot outside leader before taking 1 x 1 trail, 2 to 3Ls away throughout, made a brief run at 400 M, just plugged final 200 M finding trip a bit far.
Taken back from a wide alley, raced 6Ls back on rails, not used in mid-section, still well back on turning, nothing to offer in straight.
Out with rest, unable to slot in, posted 4 wide without cover in midfield, always working in run, under pressure 3Ls down turning, soon faded when hard run took toll.
Fair to begin, settled 5Ls back on rails, not asked in middle stages, saved ground on bend, made steady headway wi threatening in straight.
Moderate getaway, raced 3 wide 6Ls back in midfield, had cover throughout, pace against in mid-section, improved on bend, made gradual progress to 100 M before run ended.
Began in line, unable to get in and posted 4 wide without cover, set too great a task to bend, couldn't sustain effort emptied at 300 M.
Even break, positioned 4Ls away racing 3 wide without cover, did too much work in run, under pressure soon after straightening, dropped out easily.

Began well, ended up first without cover in running line 1 to 2Ls back, enjoyed easy run with steady tempo, crept close on turning in, stuck to task and chased down leader in shadow to score narrowly.
No pace from outset, settled 6Ls away in running line in midfield, had far trip to bend, kept to task in straight to be not far away in finish.
Average jump, took time to muster, ended up 3 to 4Ls away on fence, enjoyed an easy time with steady speed, kept on at same pace in straight to be on heels of placegetters. (No clear run 100 M.)
Showed plenty of early speed, took up running shortly after break, set steady tempo throughout, held a 1L advantage leav bend, soon headed at 350 M, just kept on at same pace.
Out in line, assumed prime position 1 out 1 back 2Ls away, had ideal run with steady speed, made run on turning and soon challenging leader, in mix for a long way but peaked on run inside 50 M.
Ordinary jump, soon at tail 7Ls back on rails, harmed by slow sections, saved ground taking shortest route made some late headway along inside without looking a threat.
Fair beginning, ended up 3 wide 7Ls back in rear division, had a fair trail throughout, still back in traffic turning, held up at 300 M, dashed hard final furlong to make frame.
Lost ground at jump, settled towards tail 7 to 8Ls away 3 wide, pace against in mid-section, improved 4 wide at 600 M, widest turning, made some ground to 200 M before run ended.
Fast into stride, took a sit behind leader, suited by steady tempo, angled 2 wide leaving bend, showed good turn of foot, soon overhauled leader and held advantage until shadows of post.
Taken back from a wide alley, raced at rear 9Ls or so away on rails, not helped by slow tempo, made some minor ground late.
Pressed on early to take 2nd spot, moved alongside leader when pace quickened in home turn, couldn't find extra and just stayed on in run to line.
Quickly into stride, took up running after the 1st turn, travelled well with an uncontested lead throughout the race, commenced to give ground near 400 M, dropped off rapidly inside 200 M.
Broke well from the inside barrier, travelled prominently in 4th not far off from leader, peeled out to challenge inside 300 M, battled on under pressure but was outrun over the concluding stages.
Rolled forward to hold a prominent position not far off the pace, gave ground from 800 M, soon tailed out and beaten many lengths away.
Assumed a spot towards the rear, travelled 2-deep and 9Ls back, crept up approaching home turn, had every chance in straight but could only run on for a non-threatening 5th.
Settled in midfield 7Ls off the pace, gradually moved up approaching home turn, stayed on strongly under pressure from over 200 M out and took charge close home.
Taken back on jumping, settled last but one, moved up on the outside of field entering 600 M, made some headway in straight to be nearest on the line.
Began in line, restrained to hold a spot in midfield trailing 7Ls to leader, under pressing turning for home, found little response when asked, ran home one-paced.
Travelled in mid-division 6Ls off the pace, shifted outside to improve near 700 M, found nothing under pressure and just plugged away to line.
Eased back after start, parked behind midfield 9Ls back on the rail, remained there to turn, made some late progress inside 200 M.
Jumped well, drifted back to hold a midfield position on the rail, brought with a challenge 300 M out, progress down the inside, not beaten far but was well held at the finish.
Detached in rear, 12Ls back in middle stages, moved closer turning for home, not picked up, no extra inside 200 M.
Raced along the fence, back in the field. Kept to the inside in the straight but struggled over the concluding stages.
Bustled out of the machines to hold the lead on the rails. Didn't enjoy much peace after being pressured throughout However dug deep to find plenty and draw away at the business end.
Raced in 2nd last position with cover. Made little impression over the final 300 M.
Began well then was on terms with the leaders after 900 M, however was wide and without cover and after the 700 M went forward to shift closer to the rail. Struggled in the latter stages.
Travelled 3-wide with cover, in front of midfield. Raced greenly throughout and didn't find any extra in the run home.
Parked behind the leader. Tired towards the winning post. (Bled from both nostrils.)
Travelled midfield 2 deep with cover. Peeled out approaching the home turn to race 3 deep and swung wide on the home turn. Ran to the line honestly.
Raced 2 deep with cover, midfield. Plugged away in the straight.
Began awkwardly and then was taken across behind runners to settle at the rear. Failed to pass another runner.

Was ridden along to go forward but was unable to clear a runner to its inside and raced 1 off throughout. Made the home turn awkwardly and then did not respond when placed under pressure after straightening.
Positioned midfield on the fence. Struck traffic problems near the 200 M and after being checked, rebalanced and got home strongly.
Coursed wide early and along the back straight racing without cover. Gained cover near the 600 M, then after raced 1 out 1 back. Turned in a sound effort.
Niggled along from wide draw to take the lead after 800 M. A length in front heading into the straight but had no answer when challenged 200 M out.
Gradually slipped to rear section. Near the back turning for home and ran on fairly in the straight.
Better than midfield. 2-wide and 3 to 4Ls off the lead making home turn. Ran on same pace in the straight.
Jumped well but unable to keep pace in front and steadily dropped back. Near last at the turn and found nothing in the straight.
Jumped well and had the early lead. Took a sit behind the pace after 800 M. Responded well when asked on straightening, ran down leader and took control final 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly and raced along the fence behind midfield. Switched out making home turn and made up ground in the straight.
Midfield early stages. 2-back on the fence turning for home. Kept on well in the straight for a minor placing.
2-wide and raced keenly behind the pace. Commenced to fade at home turn and found nothing thereafter.
Slow into stride and trailed field until home bend. Only ran past beaten runners in the straight.
3-wide in a forward position early stages. Steadied at 700 M and slipped to midfield at the turn. Became unbalanced 600 M out and weakened thereafter.
Taken back to rear section. Made a ground saving trip around the turn but had trouble finding daylight after straightening. Closed off fairly over the final 200 M.
No better than midfield. Had a ground saving trip around the turn and steadily made up ground in the straight.
Crossed from widest gate to lead by 1L at 1300 M, joined from 1000 M to the 400 M, petered out weakly once headed by the winner at top of stretch. (Tactic questioned.)
3-back along rails in 5th at 1000 M, 3Ls down in 6th off last bend and could only plod on harmlessly.
9Ls last at the 1200 M, 5-wide (widest of all) and one from rear swinging for home, stayed on well to nick a place near the line.
Box-seated early on and still nicely placed in 4th on the rails turning in, lacked any kind of acceleration.
Pressed forward from 3-wide no cover position to dispute pace from 1000 M to home straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Fractious in gates, always rearward and 7Ls back at 1200 M and 5Ls down in 10th off last corner when under pressure, laboured finish.
4Ls back in 6th out 2-wide at 1000 M, closer taking final bend, had his chance but was very one-paced.
5Ls back in midfield at 1000 M, attacked enterprisingly out wide from the 500 M to lead at top of home straight, always holding a break thereafter.
Slow to muster early speed, 4-back along rails 5Ls off pace at 1000 M, made some minor late ground but posed no great threat overall.
Soon well back in rear, struggling when 7Ls adrift at the 500 M, never on terms. (Tactic questioned.)
Best away and held 'one-out-one-back' spot until straightening, left flat-footed by winner's burst forward 500 M out, one-paced to conclude. (Questioned.)
Towards rear tracking winner 6Ls off speed at 1000 M, followed NORDIC STAR'S winning move on the circle and stayed on best of the rest.
Broke better than usual, 6Ls or so off pace at 1000 M on fence, 5Ls down turning in, switched out wide but could make only minor late ground.
Slowly away, always rearward, left 4-wide no cover on the circle for home, beaten by the furlong pole and eased late.
Checked passing post for first time, worse than midfield at first and 4Ls down in 8th entering home straight, hindered 200 M out but well held anyway.
2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd or 3rd from 1200 M to final turn, had his chance to place at least but lacked the gears.
Led by 1L on the fence at 1200 M and held similar break entering homestretch, headed by winner inside 200 M, didn't give up readily and held 2nd.
3-back on rails in 5th or 6th through to home straight when 3Ls behind leader, stayed on fairly to fill 3rd close home. (Questioned.)
4-back along the rails 5Ls from the front at the 1000 M, 4Ls down off last bend, entitled to finish much better than he did, weak effort.
Led early on and ceded the lead at 1200 M to box-seat on rails in 3rd, going well turning for home, led inside the 200 M and did just enough to prevail.
Midfield about 5Ls off pace at 1000 M, sent forward on the circle and 2Ls off in 4th turning for home, run peaked about 150 M, no extra from then on.
Always in last bunch, 8Ls behind early pace and only a little closer turning for home, very one-paced.
2-wide and 2Ls back in 5th at 1000 M, still thereabouts off last bend, made some late ground without threatening.
Went back from wide gate, launched a brief bid to loop field from the 600 M but the run peaked well before the home turn and faded out tamely.
Pushed forward to hold a prominent rail spot, 2Ls behind the slow pace, no turn of foot in straight.
Pressed forward, sat 1/2L outside the lead, suited by the slow tempo, ran on until 50 M flattened.
Eased at start and took rail at rear, 6-1/2Ls off the leaders, harmed by the slow pace, stayed flat until 100 M and demonstrated good finishing efforts.
Hard ridden to take the rail, then immediately steadied the tempo, led by 1/2L at advantageous slow sectionals and dominated onwards.
Gently pushed forward, 1-1/2Ls off the leaders 2-wide, suited by the slow sectionals, however held up 4-2, closed the race off strongly when clear and grabbed 3rd.
Pushed to take a midfield spot, 3-1/2Ls off the leaders, not suited by the slow tempo, trapped 3-wide without cover and lost ground, out of fuel 250 M.
Hard ridden to keep up with the pace in front of midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the leaders 2-wide, not suited by the slow tempo, little dash 200 M.
Very slowly away, pushed to take a spot behind midfield, 5Ls off the leaders 2-wide, harmed by the slow pace, held up 300 M, just ran on ok.
Eased at start, more than 8Ls off the leaders at rear 2 to 3-wide, dashed well 200 M despite not suited by the slow pace.
Settled along the fence in midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the leaders, not suited by the slow tempo, lacked room 300 M, just held ground when clear.
Eased back, 5Ls off the leaders, harmed by the slow pace, trapped 3-wide throughout and lost ground, dashed strongly 250 M to finish a remarkable 2nd despite all negative racing situations.
Slow away, behind midfield along the fence, 5Ls off the leaders, harmed by the slow pace, ran on ok in final stages.
Soon steadied to rear. Remained well back and went widest for a run down centre of straight. Produced nice impression home.
Broke well. Settled in midfield on rails about 3Ls off the speed. Similar turning for home. Fought on under pressure without threatening.
Settled just worse than midfield but closer up early when jostled between runners and lost position coming out of home straight. Similar towards rear turning in. Kept on steadily without threatening.
Settled in midfield in running line. Came under pressure entering home straight but soon dropped out tamely. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Soon took up running but handed up lead around stables bend. Tracked leader to straight. Soon came to challenge and hit front 200 M out. Won well.
Settled just worse than midfield on rails. Briefly held up off the rails shortly after straightening. Fought on steadily without threatening.
Raced tight in midfield coming out of home straight. Remained 3-wide without cover down far side. Took closer order around the Rock but dropped away quickly passing 500 M. (Tactic questioned.)
Soon taken back from the widest draw. Trailed the field to straight. Made significant progress down inside to just fail.
Contested lead from high draw. Crossed to the front passing 1200 M. Led to 200 M when swamped under pressure.
Travelled wide towards rear. Took closer order going up Rock. Went wider around home bend. Made no show in straight.
Close up early but remained wide before back straight, when racing one-out-one-back disputing 2nd. Gradually faded from 400 M.
Taken back on jumping, crossed to the fence and settled in last trailing more than 10Ls, had plenty to do turning in, lacked finishing burst and could beat tired runners only.
Away well enough, rolled forward to be one-out-one-back from leader, tracked well to bend, lacked extra gear but was able to keep steadily to line.
Began in line, ridden forward to take closer order in 4th. Close enough on turning but failed to respond under pressure, gave ground inside 100 M.
Awkwardly away, switched to the rail and settled behind midfield, 6Ls down making home turn, lacked usual finish in straight, faded inside 200 M.
Took time to muster after jumping, settled prominently in 3rd, had to wait for a gap inside 300 M, ran on well inside 200 M and was beaten by a short margin on the line.
Began in line, parked 3-wide in a midfield position 5Ls back, pressed on turning, ran on strongly down the outside and got to the front close home.

Broke well, drifted back to race behind midfield 7Ls off the leader, used little in running, brought with a challenge 300 M out, held up near 200 M before finding daylight on the inside, finished the race full of running.
Started well, eased to travel in a midfield position, had 3Ls to make up on turning, found little when asked, finished the race one-paced.
Slightly slow out, taken to a rearward position 9Ls back, travelled comfortably in running, picked up well inside 300 M, shifted inside for room 200 M out, finished strongly.
Jumped well, taken to the rail racing 4Ls behind leader, angled out on straightening, gave a fair response under pressure, weakened inside 150 M.
Bounced out, took advantage of the inside draw and was soon in front, led comfortably under a steady tempo, kept on strongly in straight but was overhauled in the last few strides.
Eased to sit in mid-division after start, travelled well enough along the rail, kept to inside on straightening, dashed home strongly inside 200 M and was just touched off in a close finish.
Away in line, moved up along the rail and settled prominently behind leader, tracked well to turn, all out inside 400 M but unable to close the gap on leader.
Standard break, lacked early speed and had to be urged, moved closer approaching home turn, angled out into clear 350 M, found little when asked.
Ordinary jump, failed to muster speed and was shuffled back to last, hard pressed on turning, faded out of contention early in straight, tailed-off.
Bounced out, rolled forward to share lead under a steady tempo, cruised into last 400 M, drew clear and had the race won 200 M out, eased to the line.
Began with rest, drifted back to settle towards the rear 5Ls behind leader, made some headway down the centre of track, just missed out on 3rd.
Well enough away, pressed on for the lead initially but eased off near 1000 M to sit behind leaders 3 off the fence, gave limited response on straightening, never likely.
Moderate jump, travelled close enough to the pace just behind leading group, well covered to turn, peeled out to challenge inside 400 M but lacked finishing burst, weakened 100 M out.
Taken forward to share lead on the outside at a steady pace, under pressure on turning, unable to sprint with them on straightening, weakened from 200 M.
Average jump, travelled behind midfield 3Ls off the pace, into clear 400 M out, ran on OK but never threatened the winner.
Travelled towards the rear 3 deep with cover and hung out on the home turn. Struggled in the straight.
Led turning for home but quickly tired approaching the furlong. (Blood in the trachea.)
Stalked the leader along the fence. For a considerable distance after straightening was held up and unable to improve. Got to the line fairly.
Parked midfield, 2 deep with cover. Worked through to obtain a clear passage in the straight and loomed as a serious opponent but wasn't quite up to the mark.
Despite being ridden along in the early stages failed to muster speed, then throughout the race travelled wide and without cover in a midfield position. Never a factor.
Travelled 1 out 1 back. Was in front by the 200 M and was never headed.
Raced outside the leader about 3/4L back. Had every hope.
Raced behind midfield 2 to 3-wide with cover. Failed to quicken at any stage in the run to the line.
Slow to begin and settled back in the field along the fence. Made some ground in the straight despite hanging out.
Began on terms but couldn't go the early speed of the race and settled at the tail of the field. Shifted out early in the straight and closed off well.
From the outside barrier raced midfield but hung out for the major part of the race, making the turns hung out badly and travelled wide and without cover. Finishing well back. (To trial).
Raced midfield 3 to 4-wide without cover. Not likely.
Lacked early speed and raced behind midfield. Ran on well and made up ground in the straight.
3-wide and no worse than midfield. Hung out at 700 M and was wide turning for home. Kept on steadily in the straight but unable to sustain effort final stages.

Ridden along early and was never better than midfield. Made up ground at the bend and was 2Ls down turning for home. Closed to within a length after straightening but unable to sustain and faded in the final 200 M.
Soon trailed field and struggled to keep pace. Last on straightening and only ran past a pair of beaten runners.
Niggled along early and was racing 3-wide among leaders 800 M out. 2Ls off the lead making home turn and started to lose ground. Dropped out quickly after straightening. (Blood in trachea.)
Soon in the lead. Remained in front going into the home straight. Kept on well but was headed final 100 M.
Took time to muster speed. Raced 4-wide among leaders into the turn. Remained wide turning for home and weakened after straightening.
Slow to jump. Raced along the rails behind midfield. Steadied and lost ground 700 M out. Towards the rear turning for home and ran on without threatening.
Taken back from wide draw and raced towards the rear. Rallied and made up ground in the straight.

Better than midfield. Box-seated behind the leader making the turn. Held up after straightening and had to switch out from behind the leader for a clear run. Closed off strongly final 150 M but winning post came too soon.

Best out and was allowed to slip back for cover. Made progress around the bend and was alongside the leader turning for home. Responded nicely when asked at 200 M. Kept on well and held off late challengers. (Bled.)
Raced alongside the leader but hung out badly at the turn. Weakened after straightening.
2-wide 5Ls back in 8th at 1000 M, still well back turning in, quickened well to dispute lead at 200 M, soon no chance with winner but held 2nd ok.
3-wide with cover in midfield about 4Ls or 5Ls back down backstretch, 2Ls down off last turn but very one-paced to conclude.
Slowest out, 4-back on rails in 10th or so about 5Ls from the speed until final bend, stayed on well along inside (tracking winner) for a place.
5Ls off pace in midfield out 2-wide at 1000 M and slightly closer in same position cornering for home, very one-paced.
Went back from wide gate, one from rear on rails about 7Ls or so behind pace in middle stages, always chasing the majority of the field.
Always rearward, at least 7Ls back until the 800 M, tried to loop field on the circle and widest turning for home, run peaked over 200 M out.
Rearward and 7Ls off pace through first half, closer off last bend and loomed menacingly with place prospects 300 M out, couldn't sustain the bid.
Led on fence by a neck at 1400 M, set a solid pace and held a small break before being headed at top of home straight, dropped out late.
Better than midfield within 2Ls or 3Ls of the lead until the final turn, one-paced and held when checked 200 M out, disappointing effort.
Went back from wide gate, 10Ls last at 1000 M, about 5Ls back on straightening, stayed on well enough past tired rivals for 4th.
3-back on the fence about 4Ls behind at the 1000 M, same turning in, didn't find much room until the 100 M, possibly unlucky not to be closer.
2-wide and 1L back in 2nd at 1000 M, soon niggled along to keep up, one-paced and slipped out of the major prizes inside final 150 M.
Caught 3-wide no cover throughout, pressed forward, 2Ls back in 4th out wide at halfway, upsides at the 300 M, no surprise he faded out final 300 M.
Box-seated in 3rd or 4th on fence and going well right until home turn, poked through a gap to lead inside the 200 M and quickly settled matters.
Soon 1L back in 2nd and same turning for home, led briefly about 150 M out but quickly swallowed up by the winner and only just held 2nd.
Slow to muster early pace, 3-wide with cover down the back straight, 3Ls down in 4th turning for home, jockey dropped whip at 300 M, nearly placed.
Midfield and 3-wide with cover at first but lost ground on the circle to be 6Ls down near rear off last bend, no danger from then on.
3-back along rails in 5th or 6th down the back, niggled along 600 M out, all out in the home straight to barely nick a place.
Over-raced down the back straight around midfield, 3Ls down in 3rd on straightening, dropped out quickly in closing stages. (Bled.)
4-wide without cover throughout, 2Ls off speed in middle stages but steadily lost position on the circle and fizzled out tamely.
Lacked early pace, 8Ls back in rear at 800 M and still well back turning for home, made some good late headway, never nearer. (Questioned.)
Worse than midfield on rails about 5Ls from the speed through to home straight, headway before being up 50 M out, may have placed otherwise.
Towards rear, hung out very badly at the 800 M and detached in rear before final bend, never a factor.
Slowest out, held up in rear, going well when 6Ls down 600 M out, stayed on strongly in the straight to lead inside final 100 M, decisively.
Led as usual, about 1L clear on rails until the home straight, headed inside the 200 M and tipped out of a place late on.
Midfield with cover initially, under pressure to lie up turning for home, never dangerous.
Hard ridden forward and took box seat, 2Ls off the good pace on the fence, weakened 250 M.
Fractious in barrier, very slow away, hard ridden to keep up, never competitive.
More than 10Ls off the good pace on the rails, ran on ok in straight.
Settled in midfield, 6Ls off the good pace 2-wide, progressed steadily 400 M to run 2nd, just beaten by a short head.
Eased to sit in midfield, 7-1/2Ls off the good pace 2-wide, tracked the race favourite throughout, dashed well 250 M to win by a short head.
Eased to rear, more than 10Ls off the good pace 2 to 3-wide, made ground steadily 300 M.
Eased back, 9Ls off the good pace along the fence, progressed steadily 300 M without much threats.
Pushed forward, 4Ls off the good pace 2-wide, progressed steadily 300 M to finish a close 3rd.
Pushed early to hold a midfield spot on the rails, 6-1/2Ls off the good pace, blocked 4-2, made ground when clear.
Pushed for a prominent spot along the fence, 4Ls behind the good pace, momentarily held up 400 M, just held ground when clear.
Hard ridden to take the rail and led by 2Ls at good pace, hung on until 100 M when overhauled.
Eased to rear, more than 10Ls off the good pace 2 to 3-wide, made ground 200 M.
Pushed early, midfield, 7Ls off the good pace, trapped 3-wide, lacked turn of foot, just ran on in final stages.
Eased back, 9Ls off the good pace, trapped 3-wide, made ground in straight.
Wide in midfield early. Gradually shifted back to rear of field. Briefly baulked after straightening. Closed off nicely with a late run.
Raced wide without cover in close-up position down dar side after beginning from wide draw. Similar in 3-wide position turning in but soon folded up.
Settled in rear of bunched field hugging inside rails. Did not find much room early in straight until over 200 M out. Produced moderate late impression closing stages.
Blundered at start. Shared pace on rails, gaining slender advantage around home bend. Weakened out of contention passing 300 M.
Led or disputed lead. Hit the front passing 300 M but only to be overhauled closing stages.
Raced wide in midfield. Dropped back to rear approaching first turn. Kept on same pace without quickening.
Soon taken back to rear from the widest draw. Remained in last few of bunched field before commenced move after straightening. Responded well between runners to snatch victory close to home.
Slow to muster. Eventually picked up along rails to track leaders approaching home bend. In box seat in 3rd turning in. Kept on same pace without threatening.
Raced mostly 3-wide in midfield to straight. Dropped out tamely. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Travelled in prominent position. One-out-one-back disputing 3rd turning. Found no response under pressure in the run home.
Settled in midfield. Made steady progress between runners down straight despite a tight run inside final 200 M.
Raced very wide in midfield. Found no cover around home bend. Fought on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Away in line, settled towards the rear in a 3-wide position, remained there to turn, didn't respond under pressure, dropped out inside 200 M.
Out in line, restrained to race behind midfield but unable to slot in, hung out badly in the home turn and covered extra ground, out of contention thereafter.
Standard jump, rolled forward but was beaten for speed approaching home turn, under pressure inside 400 M, failed to quicken, no extra inside 150 M.
Well enough away, drifted back to settle in a rearward spot 6Ls off the pace, had plenty to do going into straight, picked up fairly from 350 M and made even progress to line.
Pressed on early to take a prominent position just off the pace, struggled and lost position on turning, faded rapidly entering 300 M, tailed out.
Taken back on jumping, soon detached in rear trailing 7Ls behind, switched outside coming into straight, delivered a strong run inside 300 M to finish closest on the line.
Jumped well, showed customary early speed to lead field, travelled well coming off the bend, driven out near 300 M and kept on relentlessly to line. Won convincingly.
Settled in midfield about 4Ls behind leader, used little i running, ran on well down the inside but never looked like catching the first three.
Slow to begin, maintained a rail position behind midfield 5Ls back, peeled out to challenge entering 400 M, found little in run to line.
Standard break, tracked leader on the rail, brought with a challenge inside 350 M, ran on strongly but the winner kept finding more. Posted a solid effort in defeat.
Even break, maintained a position in midfield 5Ls off the pace, outpaced on turning, held every chance in straight but lacked a finishing kick, ran home one-paced.

Began with them, rolled forward to race just off the pace, unable to cross and was forced to race wide without cover, chased hard but unable to close in on leader, battled on gamely to take a creditable 3rd.
Little early pace, ended up behind midfield in running line, inconvenienced at midpoint and forced 4 wide, improved around them without cover, 3Ls back on bend, hard run took toll and ended at 200 M.
Taken back to race in rear division, raced 9Ls back in 2 wide line, tracked 3 wide on circle, made solid progress down middle for a place.
Fast away, took up spot behind leader, did some work with even speed on, still there on turning, unable to quicken and just plugged final furlong.
Began evenly, ridden forward to slot into 1 out 1 back spot, had fair run behind pace, 2Ls down on turning, held up until 200 M, clear only when it was too late.
No early pace as usual, ended up at rear best part of 10Ls back, aided by even tempo in front, still well back turning, made many lengths final 300 M to take 2nd.
Out with rest, pressed on to race outside leader, on speed throughout and warned by outside horses, niggled turning, found little and just plugged late.
Average jump, raced 6Ls back on rails, always well back in rear division, struggling on bend, shifted further back and beaten a long way.
Away fairly, took a spot on rails 3 to 4Ls off lead, not asked in mid-section, travelled fairly to bend, didn't respond in straight and gradually faded. (Substantial mucopus in trachea.)
Away evenly, settled 3Ls away 3 wide with cover, checked in back straight when horse came back, bit keen thereafter, close enough turning, lacked a finish and struggled final 200 M.
Pressed forward from outside alley, raced 3 wide and 4Ls back with cover, checked when horse broke down, wide without cover thereafter did plenty of work to bend, couldn't keep going and dropped off.
Eased back from a wide gate, ended up 8Ls back in running line, shifted 3 wide and improved at midpoint, within 4Ls of lead turning, came with big run down middle, drew away final 200 M to win well.
Fast away, went on to take up running, set reasonable pace in front, faced 3 challengers on circle, there to 200 M but couldn't hold on inside final 100 M.
Standard jump, settled in behind midfield 7Ls away in running line, tracked between horses on bend, made gradual progress before steadied at 150 M, just fair thereafter. (Blood in trachea.)
Pressed forward, raced prominently before breaking down in back straight, failed to finish.
Slow into stride, soon in rearward division 6 to 7Ls off pace, raced on rails throughout, back sharing rear turning, made good progress between horses late for an encouraging 4th. Nice debut.
Broke with rest, caught 3 wide early before racing outside leader 2Ls away, aided by steady pace to bend, didn't dash turning and struggled final 250 M.
Lacked early speed, soon sharing rear 7Ls away, not aided by steady speed, well back and took inside runs turning, made steady progress in straight without threatening.
Moderate jump, raced in rear division 7Ls back racing 2 to 3 wide, pace against in middle stages, well back turning, unable to make real impression in straight.
Began with rest, settled just behind pace 3Ls back, 3 wide with cover, helped by steady tempo, improved turning, chased hard in straight running leader to a narrow margin.
Showed more speed than usual, pushed on and raced behind leader, aided by steady tempo, run presented turning, kept coming in straight and held on well for 3rd.
Began with rest, positioned on rails behind midfield 5Ls off speed, had a quiet time throughout, back in traffic turning and held up badly to 200 M, kept on well when clear.

Crowded early, ended up 4 wide without cover, 6Ls back, improved wide on circle, 2Ls down on turning but used petrol to be there, emptied at 200 M when hard run took toll and just held ground thereafter.
Out fairly, assumed a midfield role, 5Ls off speed in between horses throughout, eased wider on turning, produced only a fair response in straight.
Fast away, took a sit 3 horses back on fence, not asked in mid-section, stuck to paint on turning, produced little when clear running emerged and faded late.
Out in line, worked across to take up running, set terms to suit thereafter, controlled race to bend, kicked clear turning, kept on well to hold off late challenge.
First out, pushed on but unable to slot in, posted 3 wide without cover in mid-section, under pressure on turning, dropped out easily. (Rider questioned. See Racing Incidents.)
Away evenly, took a spot 3Ls away just off speed, had a fair run to bend, lacked a dash but kept on soundly behind placegetters in run to line.
No pace, ended up at rear 7Ls back, moved 3 wide at 900 M with cover, pace against in middle stages, set a big task turning, didn't close off. (Never comfortable in action jockey reported.)

Fair jump, drifted towards the rear trailing 7Ls from leader, switched out to improve from 900 M, didn't have the clearest run after straightening, ran on well once manoeuvred into clear inside 150 M.
Average break, settled towards the rear 7Ls back, last turning into straight, checked near 250 M, lacked finishing kick and could beat tired runners only.
Away with them, gradually drifted back to last trailing 8Ls to leader, moved up to midfield passing 800 M, covered ground on turning, found little under pressure, no extra inside 150 M.
Challenged for the lead early, settled prominently just behind leaders, gradually outpaced from 450 M, hampered near 200 M, dropped out thereafter.

Slow to begin, taken to the fence racing 4Ls behind in midfield, peeled out to challenge passing 400 M, made even progress but was steadied near 250 M, recovered quickly but unable to close in on the winner.

Awkwardly away and lost position, taken to the fence and travelled behind midfield 6Ls off the pace, shuffled back to last approaching home turn, made even progress down the inside to be closest on the line.

Bounced out from the inside barrier, held a prominent position on the rail not far off from leader, ready to strike on turning, responded well under urging, hit front 150 M out, dug deep to shake off the eventual runner up.
Began awkwardly, took time to muster speed, led field at a steady tempo from 1200 M, gave little response on straight dropped out rapidly inside 200 M as early hard run took toll.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Quickly into stride, eased to sit in mid-division 4Ls back, came wide turning in, threatened with a strong run down the outside, kept on until flattened 100 M out.
Well enough away, pressed on to take up the early running until taken over near 1200 M, under pressure rounding home turn, battled on in straight, weakened inside 150 M.
Average break, hard pressed to maintain a midfield position 5Ls behind leader, couldn't quicken when asked 350 M out and ran home one-paced only.
Was taken back on jumping from a wide gate and raced towards the rear of the field, 2 deep with cover. Made some ground over the final furlong.

Near the 1000 M, was carried wider to a position without cover, settling behind the pace. After entering the back straight was ridden along to improve, however, continued to race without cover. One paced in the run home.
Tracked the leaders, 1 off with cover. Had every chance.

Fractious in the gates and was slow to begin, settled back in the field along the fence. Was shuffled back to last approaching the home turn. Came to the outside in the straight and closed off strongly.
Began awkwardly and lost a considerable amount of ground settling at the rear. Looped the field after the 600 M, but ended its run well short of the line.
Parked midfield, 2-wide with cover. Took inside runs rounding the home turn and finished off satisfactorily.
Led early then took up a trailing position behind the leader along the fence near the 1400 M. Tailed out in the straight. (To Trial.)
Travelled midfield on the fence. Gave ground quickly in the run home.
Raced keenly in the early stages, settling behind the speed 1 off without cover. Worked forward mid race however, didn't quicken when pressured turning for home.
Raced in 2nd position early 1 off before pressing forward near the 1400 M to take up the lead. Kicked strongly early in the straight to score well.
Raced at midfield. Ran on fairly in the straight and made up a bit of late ground.
2-wide behind the lead early stages. 5Ls off the front in 3rd back straight. Kept on fairly in the straight to make the frame.
2-wide and better than midfield. Kept on well in the straight but unable to match strides with winner in the closing stages.
Settled at the rear. Near last on straightening and made up ground by running past beaten runners.
Opened up a sizeable lead in the back straight. 4Ls in front heading into the home straight. Struggled to pick up its feet in the closing stages but found enough to hold onto 3rd.
Settled behind midfield. Switched out turning for home and quickened nicely. Ran down early leader 50 M.
Jumped awkwardly and raced in midfield. Ridden along 700 M out but unable to quicken. Remained on same pace after straightening and faded final stages.
Settled behind midfield. Struggled to keep pace at home turn and found nothing in the straight.
Allowed to drift back to rear section. Hugged the rails rounding home turn and steadily made up ground in the straight to be closest at finish.
Settled at the rear and was last into home straight. Only ran past a beaten runner late.
Raced along the rails and was no worse than midfield. Gradually faded after straightening.
Raced behind the lead. 4Ls behind the pace in 2nd place making home turn. Kept on only fairly but unable to turn up a notch in the straight.
Went back from a wide gate, in 10th at least 5Ls from the speed until home straight, recovered some good late ground, never nearer.
Always rearward, at least 6Ls from the speed through to the home straight, ran on okay without threatening.
Slowly away, 8Ls last at halfway, never competitive.
2-wide in midfield at first, 4Ls behind with cover turning in, never likely to make much headway.
3-back the fence, in 6th or so 3Ls from speed until the final turn, had his chance to place but lacked the acceleration.
Led by 1L on fence at the 1000 M, made all thereafter and always repelling his pursuers in the straight.
Vied for 2nd place out 2-wide and 1L behind pacesetter until home straight, one-paced and run out of the money closing stages.
Best out and box-seated on fence in 2nd or 3rd about 1L from the pace until home straight, did well to hang on for a place.
Slowly away, around midfield 4Ls from the speed down the back, 5-wide off last bend, very one-paced.
Slowly away, 4-back on the rails and 4Ls down in 8th or so swinging for home, made some good late ground along the rails.
3-wide no cover throughout, 2Ls off pace in 4th from 1000 M to final turn, yielded ground final 200 M after tough passage. (Questioned.)
Travelled nicely in 5th with cover about 2-1/2Ls from the speed until home straight, stayed on well for 2nd but couldn't seriously test the winner.
3-back on fence at first, crept closer on rails down the back and 2Ls down and dangerous on straightening, one-paced thereafter.
On fence in 4th at 1300 M, 2Ls off out 2-wide from back to home straights, flat out to lead 100 M from the line, couldn't repel winner's late thrust.
Worse than midfield and posted 4-wide no cover down the back straight, very weak after tough trip in the straight.
4-back the rails initially and midfield with 4Ls to make up off final turn, didn't have much room in final 200 M, nearest at the finish.
One from rear about 7Ls off early tempo, last turning for home, never really in the hunt.
2-wide and 4Ls off pace at 1200 M, still midfield but pressured into home straight, dropped out.
Squeezed out at start, 6Ls last behind slow pace initially, one from rear turning for home, never really placed to challenge.
'One-out-one-back' at first but forced 3-wide no cover in 3rd and 2Ls down from 900 M to home straight, upsides leader at the 200 M, run peaked.
Pressed on to lead by 1L at 1000 M, headed at top of home straight and surrendered tamely.
4Ls down in midfield at halfway and closer on turning in, stayed on well in the straight without quite reaching the quinella.
Checked passing post for first timer when in rear, 4Ls back in 9th off slow pace last bend, stayed on very strongly to lead inside final strides.
Led by 1L at 1300 M but soon handed up lead, raced 2nd before leading again at top of home straight, run out of the money in final 200 M.
Hard ridden forward, 1-1/2Ls off the leader, trapped 3 to 4-wide throughout and lost ground, used up too much fuel in the fast early sections, soon flattened 200 M.
Hard ridden early to occupy the box seat, not suited by the fast pace, held up for running 4-2, just ran on ok when clear.
Eased to sit in midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the leader, helped by the fast pace, but trapped 3 to 4-wide throughout and lost too much ground, progressed steadily 400 M, run ended 50 M.
Pushed early to hold the rail and sat just behind the lead, carried back to midfield and off bridle 900 M, suited by the fast tempo but never a factor onwards.
Slow away, but soon settled in front of midfield, 3Ls off the leader 2-wide, benefited by the fast tempo, held ground in straight for 3rd.
Slow away, being ridden vigorously to take the rail and led by 1-1/2Ls, pressured throughout and harmed by the fast pace, dropped off quickly 350 M.
Hard ridden forward, 1-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, not suited by the fast early sectionals, ran on until 200 M emptied.
Behind the pace group, 3Ls off the leader, helped by the fast tempo, trapped 3-wide throughout and lost ground, just ran on ok in straight.
Eased at start and got cover at rear, 7-1/2Ls off the leader 2 to 3-wide, favoured by the fast pace, made ground steadily 300 M, led 150 M, overhauled 50 M, beaten by a neck in 2nd.
Pushed early to keep up in midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, suited by the fast tempo, however blocked whole straight, never tested.
Eased at start, settled at rear with cover 2-wide, 9Ls off the leader, benefited by the fast pace, momentarily held up 250 M, closed the race off strongly when clear and scored.
Eased back and took rail, 5-1/2Ls off the leader, favoured by the fast pace and the rail-trip, however no progress in final stages.
Slow out. Settled at the back. Remained last into straight Ran past well-beaten runners in the run home down centre of the track.
Began fairly but soon took up running. Held slender lead to straight when joined by PACIFICO. Unable to sustain effort and folded up quickly inside final 200 M.
Raced wide without cover in midfield to straight. Dropped away quickly.

Raced wide throughout after beginning from the widest draw. Prominent in 3rd and without cover down back straight. Similar turning in but soon lost 3rd. Could only plug on under pressure at the finish.

Began with others. Raced tight on heels in forward of midfield. Shifted out from heels making stables bend. Travelled in midfield in steady paced field. Kept on well in straight without making any serious impression.
Soon taken back to race in rear of midfield. Similar turning in. Only produced moderate headway in the run home.
Settled outside leader mostly in 2nd. Came to join leader turning in holding the slightest advantage in early part of straight. However, dropped out tamely inside 200 M.

Soon taken back to race with cover on rails in midfield. Gradually shuffled back behind midfield down far side. Took his time to find clear passage after straightening but responded well inside 200 M to snatch victory final stride.
Raced wide behind midfield. Hampered stables bend. Took closer order when pace slackened down far side. Dropped back to behind midfield before home straight. No further impression.

Began with others from the one draw. Settled one back on rails mostly in 4th to straight. Came to challenge strongly turning in, hitting front under strong driving about 100 M out only to be overhauled nearing finish.
Soon taken back to race in its usual spot in rear of field. Remained same but went wider for a run turning for home. Failed to show its late turn of foot under pressure.

Tightened jumping out. Midfield on stables bend when carried a bit wide. Quickly recovered to forward of midfield down far side. Minor interference before home turn but made up good ground hitting front close to home. Caught late.
Began with rest, assumed a position better than midfield, never far off from leader, brought with a challenge 400 M out, hit front inside 200 M but weakened over the concluding stages.
Missed the jump and lost many lengths, raced in the rear trailing 10Ls to leader, remained there to turn, unable to quicken on straightening and finished tailed off.
Quickly away, settled in a handy position along the fence behind leader, struggled as they made the home turn, found nothing under pressure and was well beaten.
Taken back on jumping and assumed an usual spot towards the rear, had a relaxed trip throughout, asked for an effort inside 500 M, made some progress down the outside without threatening.
Quickly into stride, travelled in midfield along the fence 3-4Ls back, taken to outside rounding home turn, took time to gather speed in straight and did his best work towards the finish.
Standard jump, rolled forward to settle permanently behind leader, close enough on turning, found his stride in the straight and had a dream run down the inside, took charge last 50 M.
Drifted back after start to race towards the rear, moved forward on the outside approaching home turn, broke down after 400 M and was eased out of the race. (Humanely put down.)
Bounced out, restrained to settle in mid-division 4-5Ls behind leader, shuffled back on home turn, picked up well in straight and closed off the race strongly to be nearest on the line.
Unable to slot in from the outside barrier and was forced wide on the first turn, moved up to 2nd entering back straight, kept on well on straightening, effort just flattened out near the finish.
Well enough away, taken a spot on the fence in midfield, used little in running, 5Ls down coming off the bend, didn't pick up and was one-paced in the finish.

Showed customary speed to take charge early, led field at a steady tempo until taken over near 500 M, came with a challenge 350 M out, found himself readily outpaced inside 150 M, weakened towards the line.

Even break, travelled behind midfield 6Ls off the leader, raced keenly down the backstraight, went forward 700 M out to lead approaching home turn, kept on well in straight, headed but rallied back to take 2nd on the line.
Quickly into stride, rolled along the rail and led field at a steady tempo, enjoyed an uncontested lead throughout, kept on strongly in run to line and was just headed last 50 M.
Jumped well, maintained a position behind midfield 4Ls off the pace, peeled out to challenge in straight, gradually wore down the rivals inside final 300 M to get up close home. (Bled.)
Reasonable jump, drifted back to the rear trailing 5Ls to leader, used little in running, switched to outside entering home straight, made good progress despite hanging in.

Standard jump, taken forward to a handy position one out one back from leader, kept hanging in down the back straight, had every chance in straight, couldn't find extra gear and weakened passing 100 M.
Eased to last on jumping, had a comfortable trip along the fence, 5Ls to make up on turning, raced tight for some distance on straightening, ran on well once cleared inside 200 M.
Bounced out, restrained to maintain a position better than midfield but travelled wide and without cover, struggled when the pace quickened, gave ground from 300 M.
Slightly slow out, settled in midfield 3Ls off the pace, remained there to turn, found little when asked. No impression.
Began in line, took up a prominent position on the rail not far off the leader, shifted out approaching home straight, made good headway 300 M out, kept on well to finish a close 5th.
Parked behind the leader along the fence early before being shuffled back mid-race. Peeled out turning for home to make its run but didn't quicken and weakened noticeably over the final stages.
Began awkwardly and settled along the fence behind midfield. From on straightening until near the 200 M was held up and was unable to improve. Got to the post well once it saw daylight.
Settled around midfield, 2 deep with cover. Lost some ground near the 700 M, however worked home well.
Worked forward to be the early leader before handing up near the 700 M. Ended up racing 3 back the fence and struggled thereafter.
Slow to begin and settled in 2nd last position. Failed to make any ground in the straight.
Settled back in the field from a wide gate, 2 deep with cover. Ran on nicely.
Failed to muster any early speed despite being ridden along and settled with the backmakers, 1 off with cover. Made good late ground.
From a wide gate, settled 1 out 1 back. Stalked the leaders throughout and in the straight let down smartly to find the lead and had the race in its keeping a long way out.
Spent plenty of early petrol in pressing forward from wide out to cross and lead along the fence by the 700 M. Was completely gassed by the home turn. (Blood in the trachea.)
Travelled in midfield on the fence. Commenced to move way from the rail near the 600 M and ranged up nicely early in the straight but failed to sustain its effort late.
Settled early behind the speed along the fence. Commenced to shift away from the rail after the 600 M, ran on soundly.
Began awkwardly, then did not muster speed and travelled wide and without cover for the major part of the race, midfield. Run took its toll over the concluding stages.
Was one of the early leaders, 2-wide but by the 600 M had taken up a trailing position along the paint. Was slightly held up early in the straight but didn't quicken much afterwards.
Slow to begin and raced in last position. Closed off well in the run home.
No worse than midfield. 2-wide and a length off turning for home. Quickened and ran down leaders 200 M out. Stayed on game in the closing stages to hold off a late challenge.
Behind the pace early stages. Got upside the leader turning for home. Remained in contention 200 M out but unable to sustain effort in the closing stages.
Settled in midfield. Lacked a response when asked and weakened in the straight.
Not far off the pace but wide and without cover. 3-wide in a disputed lead turning for home. Faded final 200 M.

Didn't get a clean break and had to be ridden to get to midfield. On the fence and behind the leader turning for home. Showed a brief dash in the straight but unable to sustain effort in the final 200 M.
Blew the start and raced at the rear. Last turning in and only ran past a pair of beaten runners.
Best out but gradually slipped back to behind midfield. Wide turning in and closed the race off nicely.
Settled behind midfield. 2-back on the fence turning for home. Switched out after straightening and ran on well for a minor placing.
At midfield but was wide and without cover throughout. Tired shortly after straightening.
Dropped back to rear section. Remained towards the rear turning for home. Ran on strongly in the straight and nearly caught winner.
Steadied 1000 M out and raced at midfield. 2 to 3Ls off the lead making home turn. Ran on same pace in the straight.
Better than midfield but was wide without cover early stages. 2 to 3Ls off the pace turning for home. Never quickened in the home straight.
Settled at the rear. Near last on straightening. Rallied in the straight and was closest at the line.
Soon in the lead. Remained in front until fading final 200 M.
Went back from wide gate, one from rear about 9Ls behind at halfway, closer but 5-wide off last bend, stayed on strongly down centre to lead on line.
Settled in 11th at first, began to creep closer from the 800 M and dangerous when 2-1/2Ls back in 6th off last bend, outpaced by principals in final 300 M.
Worse than midfield 4-back on the rails initially, one from rear 6Ls from pace 800 M out, challenged out 5-wide turning in, ran on strongly, only just failed.
Taken back to last, 9Ls adrift at 1200 M, forced 6-wide (widest of all) turning for home, never likely to test the main players.
Enjoyed a nice trail in midfield with cover until halfway, 2Ls down in 4th off final bend, stayed on gamely to hold same position in the finish.
Settled 1L back in 2nd at 2000 M, remained close-up and 2Ls back in 4th at 800 M, disappointing finish having had such a soft run close to a slow tempo.
Trapped 3-wide no cover throughout, around midfield 3Ls behind early pace, struggling 600 M out to lie up and steadily faded out of the picture.
Set steady pace and clear by between 1L and 2Ls until the 800 M, headed soon after straightening but stuck on well and only just missed 4th.
Fractious in gates and slow to begin, with cover in midfield about 4Ls from speed at halfway, still midfield and held when checked inside final furlong.
2-wide and 2Ls back in 4th at 1800 M, always close up and led about 350 M out, kept on well and only headed on the line in a bob of heads.
3-wide with cover before pressing on out 4-wide no cover from 1000 M to vie for 2nd at 800 M, struggling to keep up at final turn, faded out.
3-back on the rails in mid-division at first, shuffled back a little at 800 M when 6Ls behind, outpaced in the last three furlongs.
Box-seated on rails early on but tended to over-race until the back straight, 4Ls back in midfield and struggling turning in, faded out.
Within 2Ls or 3Ls of the pace in midfield through to final section, looked held 250 M out but ran on again well inside final 100 M to place.
Good early pace to box-seat within 1L or 2Ls of the speed in 3rd or 4th until home straight, quickly dropped away when tempo increased.
Went back from wide gate, 7Ls back at 800 M, always chasing the majority of the field.
Settled midfield 4Ls from pace at the 800 M, closer and 3-wide off last bend and led 150 M out, kept on digging deep to score.
Never in the hunt, 10Ls last early on and only made minor late ground in the straight.
Niggled along when 3-back on rails in midfield about 5Ls off pace at the 800 M, improved to be 2Ls back at the 300 M, couldn't sustain the effort.
Led by 1L on fence early on, a neck to the good turning in, headed at the 200 M and one-paced to wind up.
Caught wide early on but pressed on to be race 2nd out 2-wide from 800 M to home turn, briefly lead at 200 M but tipped out of a place in final 150 M.
Went back from a wide gate, 7Ls down in 11th at 800 M, 5Ls behind off final bend, stayed on strongly along the rails to be nearest at the finish.
6Ls off pace on fence in 10th at 800 M, closer and going well turning in, pulled out wide to challenge at 300 M, couldn't quite get past the winner.
Raced close-up, 2Ls back in 4th at 800 M, had every chance to top of home straight but swamped by the final 200 M.
Tried press forward but checked at 800 M, very wide without cover on the circle, didn't handle right-handed circuit well at all, without any hope in final 300 M.
Never any better than midfield, 6Ls down at the 800 M and 4Ls down turning for home, couldn't match the principals for speed.
Pushed to sit in front of midfield, 3Ls behind the fast pace 2-wide, soon weakened 350 M.
Hard ridden to take the rail and led by 1L at fast sectionals, under pressure throughout, soon out of fuel 350 M.
Suited by the fast tempo, but never better than midfield along the rails.
Eased at start and crossed at rear, 8-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, benefited by the fast pace, however never progressed.
Eased back, 3 to 4-wide, suited by the fast pace, never competitive.
Eased to sit in midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, helped by the fast tempo, made ground on several weakening runners in straight.
