Pushed forward to sit just off the lead 2-wide, hit the front 250 M, ran on strongly to the line despite much use having been made during the fast early sections, scored by a narrow margin.
Eased to sit 3Ls off the fast pace along the fence, no dash in straight, emptied 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled in midfield along the fence, 4-1/2Ls off the leader, suited by the fast early sectionals, made ground 400 M and grabbed a close 3rd.
Eased to sit in midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the leader 3-wide, benefited by the fast pace, progressed steadily 300 M, just missed win by a short head in 2nd.
Eased to rear, 8-1/2Ls off the leader 3-wide, favoured by the fast pace, progressed steadily 250 M without much threat.
Hard ridden forward, 1L off the leader 2-wide, tackled the lead from 800 M, used up too much fuel in fast early sections, ran on well until 250 M when flattened.
Eased to sit behind midfield, raced keenly 6-1/2Ls off the leader 3-wide, suited by the fast tempo, made ground steadily 300 M without much threats.
Settled 3Ls behind the fast pace 3-wide, travelled nicely, just held ground in straight, flattened 200 M.
Settled in midfield. Gradually shifted out for a run over 300 M out. Responded well to take command over 100 M out. Convincingly.
Slow to muster. Remained in last few most of way. Soon weakened out of contention after straightening.
Fair start. Gradually picked up along rails to race in midfield. Similar turning in. Failed to quicken under pressure in straight.
Hampered at start and soon dropped to tail-end. Virtually trailed the field throughout.
Raced one-out-one-back in 3rd. Kept on before failing to sustain effort inside final 200 M.
With leaders early. Settled one-back on rails approaching home bend. Obtained run from box-seat after turning in but soon folded up.
Broke well and fast into stride. Settled 3-wide without cover in 2-back position sharing 4th. Hung wide making home bend and never recovered.
Broke well. Settled in forward of midfield. Fought on steadily until finding no extra closing stages.
Settled behind midfield. Only produced moderate headway in the run home without threatening.
Not far off in better than midfield position. 2-back in 5th turning for home. Soon faded under pressure.
Travelled towards rear. Finished off race strongly inside final 250 M. Did best work late.
Began only fairly. Gradually improved to take up running 400 M after start, crossing to rails shortly. Held clear advantage to 200 M and swamped but fought on for a placing.
Moderate start. Restrained 2-back with rails run in joint 4th. Soon obtained a clear passage after straightening. Fought on nicely closing stages but found winner too good.
Never seen with a chance always racing well behind.
Even break, settled in midfield 4Ls away from leader, eased out rounding home turn, had a smooth run on straightening, hit front 300 M out, kept on strongly to win in fine style.

Bounced out from the inside barrier, rolled along the fence in a position better than midfield, travelled well enough to turn but unable to obtain clear running on straightening, hampered near 300 M and never recovered.

Showed early speed and quickly crossed to fence, led them slowly before taken over near 1600 M, travelled 1-back from leader going into straight, all out but lacked finishing dash, dropped off inside 200 M.
Quickly into stride, raced in a handy position never far off the leader, shuffled back when checked near 600 M, had a tough run in between horses, badly hampered passing 200 M, not fully tested.
Began in line, settled close enough to leaders, well covered turning in, found little under pressure 400 M out, unable to quicken and remained one-paced in run to line.

Awkwardly away, ridden to maintain a midfield position, forced wide for the major part of the race, gradually moved up down the back straight, struggled early in straight, gave ground rapidly and faded out of contention inside 300 M.

Well enough away, drifted back before the first turn to sit behind midfield 5Ls back, in between horses coming off the bend, unable to improve until 200 M, ran on strongly down the inside to finish an unlucky 4th.

Taken back from the wide barrier, travelled in last but one 7Ls off the pace, remained there to turn, held up behind horses from 400 M until a gap opened up near 200 M, weaved through horses to finish a creditable 3rd.
Standard break, not used early and settled towards the rear 6Ls off leader, had plenty to do turning for home, switched wide out, made good progress until 100 M, weakened thereafter.

Slow to begin, soon raced as the back-marker trailing 8Ls from leader, used little in running, taken wide on straightening to avoid traffic, picked up gradually and did his best work towards the finish.

Began with them, unable to cross from a wide barrier and was caught wide without cover throughout the trip, travelled prominently and briefly led going into 400 M, had every chance, kept on until weakening inside 150 M.
Jumped well, held a rail spot in mid-division about 4 to 5Ls back, saved ground on turning, boxed in on the rail and was not able to improve on straightening, not tested.
Standard jump, pressed on early to take up the running 3-deep from fence, led field under a slow tempo, crossed to fence approaching home turn, didn't respond when asked and faded from 300 M.

Began well in his final start, eased back to midfield 4Ls off the lead, 3-wide turning for home, challenged inside 400 M, ran on gamely but effort just flattened over the final stages. Went out in a blaze of glory.
Ordinary jump, ended up, back with last few, unsuited by steady early pace, still well down turning, made some reasonable headway without threatening.
Average getaway, ended up 5Ls away in running line, improved 3 wide on bend, made fair progress to 200 M before run ended.
Fastest out, took up running, set steady pace in front, raced 1/2L clear throughout, still held a narrow lead turning, weakened rapidly from 250 M.
Standard jump, positioned just worse than midfield in 2 wide line, tracked well on bend, made good ground to 200 M before steadied, kept coming again when clear to make frame.
No early pace, ended up 6Ls away on fence, had a soft trip throughout, saved ground on bend, produced a one paced finish late.
Slowly away, ended up in midfield, just worked 6Ls back and raced 3 wide with trail to bend, closed well despite hanging to finish an encouraging 3rd.
Began well enough, took a prominent spot behind leader 2Ls back, aided by steady pace, had chance when near enough on bend, emptied at 200 M.
Taken back from a wide gate, raced away with rearward division on fence 7Ls away, used little in run but pace against, still had job to do turning, made only average progress.
Out in line, a little wide early before slotting in 4Ls away behind pace, always going sweetly to bend, made run turning and overhauled back inside 200 M for another strong run.
No early pace and bumped soon after, taken back to rear to race 10Ls away on rails, switched out rounding bend, passed a few tired horses late.
Out with rest, allowed to drift back to race in rear division 7Ls away 2 wide, had a fair run to bend, closed well from an impossible spot turning.
No early speed, ended up 8Ls back on fence, gave away a big start and pace not too suit, didn't settle in mid-section, rearward turning and never improved.
Bounced into a prominent spot, raced 2 to 3Ls back behind pace pair, raced too keenly with steady pace, found little turning and faded out in straight.
Began with them, rolled forward to race outside leader when a bit keen, travelled well with steady tempo, hit front at 300 M, showed fight but couldn't hold winner late.
Broke with others. Settled 3-wide without cover in 2L 4th, extending to 3Ls around home bend. Quickened well inside final 300 M to just defy runner-up's strong late surge.
Settled in rail behind midfield after beginning from the one draw. Similar turning in. Shaken up upon straightening and raced tightly along rails until after 200 M. Made good late impression.
Held up in forward of midfield in 4L 5th or 6th. Making ground when forced to steady 200 M out. Produced late impression in closing stages. Tightened close to line.
Very slowly away losing many lengths. Never recovered and trailed the field throughout.
Blundered jumping out and soon taken back to rear. Remained well behind to straight. Only produced moderate progress down centre of track.
Broke well. Soon restrained to rear of midfield but raced keenly far side dropping further back. Towards rear turning for home. Made up good ground down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.

Began with others. Settled in forward of midfield on rails within 4Ls of pace. Saved ground on inside turning in. Soon came to challenge and hit front about 300 M out only to be caught over 100 M out when found no extra.
Settled in 3rd within 3Ls of pace. Kept on steadily early in straight before finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Settled in midfield. Held up for a run early in straight until after 300 M. Fought on well to go down by the narrowest of margins.
Soon taken back from widest barrier to travel wide without cover behind midfield. Remained same throughout. Found nothing in the run home.
Settled in last few. Badly baulked for a run early in straight and forced to check 200 M out. Recovered well late.
Broke well. Soon settled 3-wide in midfield. Ran on steadily inside final 200 M without threatening.
Ridden along for early pace, gaining half a length advantage outside 2nd. Handed up lead approaching home bend but remained outside leader. Hung out turning in and gave ground gradually.
Began fairly in midfield. Soon pulled forward to join leader, taking over rounding home bend. Had 1L advantage straightening but gradually weakened under pressure. (Tactic questioned.)
Slow into stride, pressed on to take closer order in mid-division, niggling along on turning, threatened with a strong looking challenge inside 300 M, chased hard but flattered out near the finish.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Little slow out, pressed on to take up early running along the rail, disputed lead with runner on outside, found little when asked, headed 250 M, got tired inside 100 M.
Even break, hard pressed early, taken to a spot just behind leaders, travelled well enough coming into straight, ran on steadily inside 200 M but able to fend off the fast finishing 3rd.
Hard ridden to go forward from a wide barrier, eased near 1000 M to obtain cover behind leaders, came very wide on turning, didn't respond to riding, dropped out inside 200 M.
Broke well from the inside barrier, ridden to maintain a midfield position on the rail 2-3Ls back, crept closer turning in, quickened well once pressed inside 300 M, kept on strongly to line.

Began awkwardly, patiently held up in a position behind midfield, used little in running, switched to inside on straightening but was momentarily checked near 200 M, took time to regather and ran on OK towards the finish.
Drawn wide and was taken back on jumping, crossed to fence racing 5Ls behind in the rear, kept to inside on straightening, checked near 200 M and not able to improve from that point.
Taken back on jumping, assumed a rearward position 6Ls behind leaders, last turning into straight, picked up in good fashion and made plenty of ground despite being steadied near 100 M.
Well enough away, restrained to settle towards the rear 5Ls off the leader, had plenty to do coming off the bend, made steady progress from 300 M and did his best work towards the finish.
Quickly into stride, moved forward to be prominent alongside leaders, travelled 3-wide throughout, had every chance in straight, kept giving until weakened inside 100 M.
Jumped well, taken forward to share lead with runner on the inside, difficult to settle and used up energy, under pressure on turning, soon beaten on straightening and out of contention.
Raced in a midfield position, 2 deep with cover. Closed off soundly.
Settled behind midfield along the fence. Railed up in the straight and hit the line strongly.
Raced with the backmakers along the fence. Made some late headway in the final stretch after obtaining clear running near the furlong.
Travelled wide and without cover, midfield, and approaching the turn at the 600 M was allowed to stride forward into a 2-wide position behind the speed. Never a factor.
Bounced out of the gates to be handy early, 3-wide without cover. Drifted back mid race, gaining some cover. Weakened noticeably in the straight.
Travelled close to midfield the fence. Had no excuses.
Raced keenly back in the field, 2 to 3-wide with cover. Ran on well down the outside.
From a wide gate was taken back early to settle in a rearward position. Never a factor.
Dictated terms in front and made every post a winner. Pinched a break before the home turn and held on to score victory.
Coursed wide early behind the first 2, before slotting in, to be 1 off near the 700 M. Faded in the run to the wire.
From a wide gate, box seated. Rolled out to travel one off to the leaders outside mid-race. Was given every chance.
Was slow to begin then for the major part of the race travelled wide and without cover behind midfield. Finished tailed out.
Settled 2-wide at midfield. Carried wider rounding home turn and ran on without threatening in the straight.
Raced in rear section. Kept on same speed in the straight.
Jumped awkwardly and was taken back to race at the rear. Took a wide turn home and closed the race off nicely.

Jumped well. Raced alongside the leader before taking sole possession of the lead 800 M out. Maintained a clear advantage into home straight and kept on well in the final stages to hold off a challenge. (Questioned.)
Jumped awkwardly. Failed to muster speed and raced at the rear. Made a ground saving trip around home turn. Ran on fairly and made up some ground in the straight.

Ridden out of the gates from widest draw. 2-wide and no more than 2Ls off the pace in back straight. Closed to within a length of the leader turning for home. Kept on steadily but unable to turn up a notch in the straight.
No worse than midfield but was 3-wide without cover back straight. Within 2Ls of the leader 500 M out but remained wide. Unable to quicken on straightening and weakened final 200 M.
Jumped well and raced in front. Handed up the lead 800 M out and settled behind the pace. Kept on fairly after straightening but unable to turn up a notch final stages. (Questioned.)
Behind midfield. Severely checked 500 M out and dropped to the rear. Found nothing thereafter. (Lame next day.)
3-wide and no better than midfield. Widest turning for home and ran on strongly to be closest at finish.
Jumped well. Settled on the fence in front of midfield. Gradually edged out for clear running making home turn. Ran on strongly and nearly caught winner.
Jumped well but lacked speed and ended up in rear section. Checked badly on two occasions at the turn and near last on straightening. Ran on without quickening.
Squeezed at start, at least 6Ls behind speed until home straight, made some late ground without troubling principals.
Box-seated on rails in 3rd at 1000 M, 2Ls down in 2nd on straightening before briefly leading 200 M out, soon headed, just held down 2nd.
Worse than midfield about 6Ls behind early pace, 5-wide (widest of all) turning for home, no impression.
4-back on fence in midfield until straightening about 4Ls from the speed, very one-paced.
Led by 2Ls on fence at 1200 M, unable to quicken the tempo further off final bend and headed at the 200 M, soon slipped out of the placings.
2-wide and 1L back in 2nd at 1000 M, weakening in 3rd turning for home, surrendered tamely.
Midfield with cover about 5Ls from the front until home straight, ran on well and only just missed the money.
2-wide and 3Ls back in 4th at 1000 M, 4Ls down in 5th off last turn, picked up well to lead 150 M and won comfortably.
Checked in rear at 1300 M, 10th and 7Ls behind at halfway, never likely to get seriously involved.
Went back from wide gate, 8Ls last at 1200 M, never posed much danger.
3-back on fence in 5th about 4Ls off pace at halfway, edged a little closer turning and all out to just get 3rd.
Performance deemed unacceptable, trapped 3-wide no cover down back straight in midfield, faded out in final stages. (Questioned.)
Handily positioned on fence in 3rd and improved to race upsides leaders with every chance at 200 M, no extra and missed a place.
4-back along the rails, 5Ls down in 7th off last bend, stayed on strongly to lead 50 M out, driven out.
Taken back from wide gate and about 7Ls behind turning for home, never dangerous.
2-wide and 1L back in 2nd at halfway, vying for the lead at the furlong pole, couldn't sustain the bid but did just enough to place.
Led on fence by 1L at halfway, headed just inside the furlong pole and weakened.
Over-raced when 3-wide with cover down back straight about 5Ls from the speed, never loomed a threat in the stretch.
5Ls behind early tempo, further back turning for home, very weak to conclude.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
4th with cover within 3Ls of the speed until final bend, had his chance to place but unable to quicken. (Bled.)
3-wide no cover down back straight in midfield, 4Ls down in 6th turning in, one-paced in the finish.
3-back along rails in mid-division about 3Ls or 4Ls from speed until home straight, headway and every chance 100 M, couldn't match winner's late burst.
Went back from widest gate, 9Ls last at halfway when bumping rails, never on terms.
Hard ridden to sit outside the lead, favoured by the slow early tempo, ran on until 250 M weakened.

Pushed early to keep up in midfield, 5Ls off the leaders, trapped 3-wide throughout and lost too much ground, not suited by the slow pace, held ground in straight despite all negative racing situations, improving.
Eased back early but trapped 3-wide first bend, soon pushed along to cross in front of midfield, 4Ls off the leaders 2-wide, dashed strongly 250 M to share 2nd despite not suited by the slow pace.
Hard ridden forward, 2Ls off the leaders 2-wide, benefited by the slow tempo, ran on fairly in straight.
Eased back, 8Ls off the leaders 2-wide, harmed by the slow pace, momentarily held up 300 M, dashed well when clear.
Eased back, 7Ls off the leaders along the rails, not suited by the slow tempo, lack room 300 M, dashed well 100 M.
Eased at start to cross the rails at rear, 9-1/2Ls off the leaders, harmed by the slow pace, little dash in straight, blocked 100 M. (Tactic questioned.)
Eased to sit in midfield, 6Ls off the leaders 2-wide, harmed by the slow pace, lack room 300 M, dashed strongly when clear and shared 2nd without much threats to the winner.
Pushed early, 5Ls off the leaders along the fence, not suited by the slow tempo, dashed fairly in final stages.
Eased at start, more than 10Ls off the leaders at rear, raced 3-wide throughout and lost ground, harmed by the slow pace, stayed flat until 150 M to demonstrate very good finishing efforts.
Pushed to take the rail and led by 1/2L at advantageous slow sectionals, hung on until 200 M, emptied.
Pushed early to take the rail in front, settled nicely in box seat, enjoyed the rail-run and the slow early sectionals, closed the raced off strongly, dominated from 200 M.
Began fairly. Soon settled in rear of field. Remained same into straight. Failed to quicken to threaten. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Soon in rear of bunched field. Took closer order on rails shortly afterwards. Saved ground on inside turning in. Fought on steadily under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Raced 3-wide in one-back position most of way to straight Faded gradually. (Tactic questioned.)
Slightly crowded shortly after start. Not far off in one-out-one-back position to straight. Folded up quickly after straightening.
Soon taken back from widest draw. Trailed the field to straight. Made no progress until late in closing stages. (Tactic questioned.)
Began from high draw in first few early. Remained wide down far side in midfield. Still wide making home turn and failed to make any impression in straight.
Remained wide in midfield far side after beginning from wide draw. Still wide rounding home bend and into straight. Fought on steadily despite hanging in.
Raced very wide down far side in midfield or just worse. Hung badly making home bend and never recovered.

Began with others from the one draw. Held back to travel one back on rails within 2Ls of pace shortly afterwards. Similar position turning in. Fought on determinedly in straight but failed to peg back winner throughout. (Tactic questioned.)
Showed early speed to take up running after beginning from middle draw. Held clear advantage most of way. Held on well under pressure to defy late challenges.
Slightly crowded at start. Quickly recovered to within 3Ls of pace in forward of midfield. Similar in midfield around home bend but saved ground turning in. Failed to quicken to threaten in straight.
Crowded slightly at start. Settled in midfield of bunched field. Lost position rounding home bend. Failed to make any impression in straight.
Restrained on jumping and settled towards the rear about 8Ls off the pace, moved up on the outside passing 500 M, came home fairly strongly despite hanging in under pressure, not beaten far.
Bounced out, hard driven to take up early running at a steady tempo, taken over near 900 M, gave a fair response when asked 300 M out, fought on but no extra inside 100 M.
Broke well from the inside barrier, held a midfield position on the rail 5-6Ls back, shuffled further back as they turned, ran on OK 300 M out but could do no more in the closing stages.
Slightly slow out, unable to cross and was forced wide in the 1st turn, move forward and crossed into lead entering back straight, headed near 300 M and gradually faded towards the line.
Began with them, travelled in a 3-wide position 5Ls back, unable to obtain cover in middle stages, pressed on passing 400 M, struggled to pick up and gave ground from 250 M.

Taken back from the outside barrier, got over to the rail before the 1st turn, travelled smoothly in the rear 9Ls back, weaved his way through in the last 300 M, stayed on strongly to get there just in time.
Average jump, gradually moved up to be prominent behind leaders, had a smooth run to turn, found little under pressure 350 M out, weakened inside 150 M.
Began awkwardly, taken to a rearward position along the fence, remained there to turn, switched wide to avoid traffic, took time to muster speed and was doing his best work inside 150 M.
Away in line, taken forward to track leaders in a handy position, kept to inside on straightening, made some progress without threatening.
Began awkwardly, raced tight towards the 1st turn, assumed a spot behind midfield about 6Ls back, still had plenty to do turning in, held up near 200 M and ran on fairly afterwards.

Well enough away, guided to a position better than midfield, travelled 2-wide and 4Ls back, crept closer making the final turn, hit the front 250 M out, battled on inside 100 M but was caught over the final stages.

Jumped well, took advantage of the inside draw and settled on the rail not far off the leaders, eased out rounding the home turn, gave plenty when asked but was unable to fend off the winner's late challenge.
Jumped well, showed early speed to lead field at a steady tempo, pressed by runner on his inside, ridden out inside 400 M, gave all but was no match to the winner who belongs to a different class.
Reasonable jump, rolled along the stand's rail in a position towards the rear, all out inside 400 M, couldn't pick up and was one-paced in the finish.
Away with them, raced in a position better than midfield 2Ls back, under pressure 450 M out, took time to gather and did his best work near the finish.
Standard jump, lacked early pace and was soon left racing in the back, under pressure 500 M out, lacked a finish and was still green in his running, no impression.
Bounced out, taken to a handy position near the stand's rail, pressed inside 400 M but found little response, got tired towards the line.
Moderate start, settled in a prominent spot just behind leaders, close enough entering 400 M, ran on well but was unable to bridge the gap with the 2nd.
Quickly into stride, soon taken forward to race prominently, unable to go with them as pace quickened inside 400 M, weakened 200 M out and gradually gave ground.
One of the first to jump, pressed on early to race in a handy position 2 off the stand's rail, struggled to keep pace inside 400 M, faded out gradually inside 250 M out.
Began in line, travelled in mid-division 3Ls back with cover, made some headway inside 400 M to finish a non-threatening 5th.
Slowly away, maintained a midfield position 2 to 3Ls off the pace, showed signs of inexperience when the race got serious, ran on OK towards the finish.
Even break, gradually rolled forward to race alongside leader, cruised into last 200 M and quickened up in good style when pressed, drew well clear to win his debut with real authority.
No early speed, settled in the rear 4Ls off the pace, couldn't dash when asked, hung in under pressure, well beaten.
Parked on the speed and hit the front after turning for home. However was overhauled near the final furlong.
Settled handy to the leaders, 2-3 deep with cover. Rolled out near the 700 M to improve and thereafter raced wide without cover. Not likely.
Travelled in 2nd last position. Commenced a sweeping run from the 600 M, and closed off fairly.
Settled in 5th position about 3L from the lead along the rail. Stayed to the inside over the final 400 M and kept on well in the straight.
Raced close to the speed, 3-wide and without cover. Struggled over the final stages.
Was taken back from a wide barrier to race in 2nd last position. Was carried wide approaching the home turn and was checked soon after. Plugged away in the run to the wire.
Raced 2 deep with cover, midfield. Obtained runs through the field in the straight and strode away for a relatively easy victory.
Slow to begin and raced behind midfield the fence. Worked into the clear after the 250 M, and got home well.
Settled behind midfield. 2-wide with cover. Ranged up out wide as a chance in the straight but ended its run well short of the post.
Raced with the backmakers 1 off. Commenced to improve near the 500 M however was hampered shortly afterwards. One paced in the final stretch.
Raced midfield the fence. Made some ground in the straight although was one paced over the concluding stages.
Weakened quickly in the straight after being taken on in the lead from the early stages.
Raced in last position, about 13L from the lead. Ran home soundly after being checked near the 200 M.
Was ridden along during the early and middle stages to race outside and just to the front of the leader. Compounded in the run home.
Drifted back and raced behind midfield. Towards the rear on straightening. Made up some ground in the straight.
Settled behind midfield. Widest making home turn and ran on without threatening.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Better than midfield early stages and was wide without cover. 3-wide and a length off the lead turning for home. Kept chasing in the straight but unable to threaten winner.
Raced 3-wide at midfield. Unable to quicken in the straight and ran on same pace.
Niggled forward from a wide draw and raced behind the leader. Unable to keep pace after straightening and weakened thereafter.
Better than midfield. Behind the leader rounding home turn but unable to turn up a notch in the home straight.
Gradually dropped back to rear section. Near last on straightening, showed nothing in the straight and finished tailed out. (Lame.)
Off slowly and stumbled after clipping heels. Raced in rear section until home straight. Rallied and closed the race off strongly.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
2-wide and no better than midfield. Lacked a response when asked making home turn and remained on same pace thereafter.
Taken back and crossed to the fence. Ridden along to get to midfield. 2-back on the fence turning in. Kept on same pace in the straight.
Settled behind midfield. Switched out making home turn. Rallied in the straight and was closest at finish.
Ridden hard to take the lead. Opened up a clear advantage on straightening. Kept on well and was never threatened in the final stages.
Taken back from wide gate, 7Ls back in 12th at halfway, widest (5-wide) turning for home, one-paced to wrap up.
3-back on fence in midfield about 4Ls at halfway, same margin behind turning in, stayed on well in the straight without catching the winner.
One from rear about 8Ls from pace at 1000 M and even further back off last corner, ran on past a few spent rivals in the straight.
Made all, bounced straight to the front and pinched 3Ls on the field at top of home straight, kept up to his work in last section to score. (Questioned for improved performance.)
2-wide and 2Ls back in 5th at 1200 M, much further back on straightening, never at all likely to place.
Always worse than midfield at least 7Ls or so from the pace, niggled at halfway and tame performance overall.
Raced 1L behind pace at 1200 M but dropped out sharply from around 900 M out, pulled up in straight. (Bled.)
3-wide with cover in midfield at 1200 M, 6Ls behind the speed entering home stretch, posed little danger thereafter.
9Ls last at 1200 M and no closer into final 400 M, never really on terms.
4Ls back out 2-wide in midfield at 1200 M, pressured to try and get closer off last bend, lacked acceleration.
Trapped 3-wide no cover throughout and tended to over-race through early splits, extra work took its toll in the final quarter.
Box-seated 2Ls off pace in 4th at first, 3Ls back in 2nd swinging in, had every chance to fill quinella but couldn't quicken, comfortably held 3rd.
Difficult to load, 4-back on fence about 5Ls from speed in middle stages, could not recover much ground in the straight and always held.
Slowly away, 4-wide no cover throughout, 3Ls off pace at halfway, struggling to lie up well before last bend, eased down.
Raced at winner and pacesetter's quarters until the 200 M, outpaced by quinella pair in final furlong and missed a place.
One from rear about 5Ls behind early speed, pressured to maintain that same proximity at halfway, never on terms with main players.
Towards rear about 3Ls from the speed at halfway, couldn't live with the principals in final section.
Slowly away, under pressure early on in rear, 7Ls last at halfway, never a factor.
Awkward break, towards far in midfield at first, very weak through final 300 M.
Tracked runner-up from stand's rail in midfield until the 200 M when 2Ls back in 4th, didn't have much hope with quinella pair but comfortably held 3rd.
Travelled well enough in midfield about 2Ls from the speed at halfway, outpaced late on and stayed in midfield.
In touch in midfield at first but began to struggle at halfway and faded out rapidly in final 300 M.
Midfield or better about 2Ls behind the speed through to final 400 M, very one-paced to conclude.
Around midfield about 2Ls from the speed through to final 200 M, ran on past a few tired rivals in closing stages.
Disputed early speed, began to lose touch from the halfway point and eased down late when all chance had gone.
No better than midfield about 3Ls from the speed until halfway, lost further ground late on.
1L off the early pace vying for 2nd on stand's side, a neck down in 2nd at the 200 M, had every chance but couldn't overhaul the winner.
Over-raced a little early on and let stride to the front to lead by 1L or so at 600 M, always holding a slender margin from runner-up in final 200 M.
Eased to sit in front of midfield along the fence, 3Ls off the good pace, lacked turn of foot, just held ground in straight.
Pushed to obtain the box seat, travelled nicely, ran on until 200 M flattened.
Shared lead easily at good pace 2-wide, ran on until 300 M dropped off.
Pushed early, 7Ls off the good pace at back, trapped 3 to 4-wide throughout and lost ground, progressed steadily 250 M to secure 3rd.
Pushed to take the rail and shared the lead at good pace, hung on strongly until 100 M overhauled, finished 2nd without other threats.
Pushed to occupy a midfield spot, 3Ls off the good pace, trapped 3-wide throughout, just held ground in straight.
Eased to rear, 8-1/2Ls off the good pace 2-wide, ran on fairly in final stages and passed several weakened runners. (Questioned.)
Prominent, no cover early, 2Ls off the good pace 2-wide, raced keenly, ran on until 250 M weakened.
Pushed early, never better than midfield.
Slow away, never competitive at rear and tailed out.
Eased to sit behind midfield, 5Ls off the good pace, trapped 3-wide throughout and lost ground, weakened 300 M.
Slow away, hard ridden to keep up in midfield, 5Ls off the good pace along the fence, checked 800 M, flattened in straight.
Settled in midfield on the rails, 5Ls behind the good pace, progressed steadily 300 M, drifted away 100 M to win.
Began with others. Soon settled behind midfield. Went wide into straight. Found nothing under pressure.

Began well. Restrained to race in 2L 3rd far side. Moved up to one-out-one-back position approaching home bend, disputing lead into straight. Responded well to gain a commanding break 200 M out. Convincingly.
Quickly taken to rear from wide barrier. Hampered on rails approaching home turn. No clear run on inside the length of straight and not tested.
Broke farily and ridden along to hold prominent position, settling one back on rails in 2nd or 3rd. Similar turning in but could only keep on at the same pace without quickening under pressure.
Broke well from widest draw. Soon allowed to drift back to rear. Held up for a run in straight until after 200 M. Fought on well late to be nearest at finish.
Very slowly away as usual. Trailed the field throughout. Made no show.

Began with others but soon taken back to midfield. Raced slightly keenly on rails when pace slackened approaching home bend. In box-seat run turning in. Could only produce moderate late headway close to home.

Began awkwardly. Quickly ridden to recover to better than position, settling in 4th within 3Ls of pace. 5th around home bend. Taken time to switch out for a run after straightening. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Began with others. Soon took up running and crossed for rails run. Led the field and joined into straight. Gradually faded after straightening.

Slightly slow out and in rear early. Gradually picked up ground before settling in rear of midfield. Badly baulked for a run until after 200 M. Finished off race well between runners to do best work late. Not fully tested.
Settled 3-wide in midfield. Came under reminders turning in but had nothing to give.
Raced keenly and wide without cover in forward of midfield down far side. In slightly closer order rounding home bend with just 2Ls to make up turning in. Gradually faded after straightening.

Bounced out, pressed on to take up the early running under a steady tempo, lost 1L when checked near 800 M, had to switch out for daylight inside 300 M, chased hard but just failed to catch winner by a diminishing short head.
Slowly away, travelled towards the rear 4Ls back, came wide rounding home turn, lacked finishing kick, soon outpaced, weakened 200 M out.
Began with rest, parked along the fence in mid-division not far off the pace, checked near 800 M and shuffled back, made even progress down the inside to be closest on the line.
Jumped well, restrained to travel towards the rear 4Ls behind leader, eased out inside 400 M, threatened with a strong run down the outside, kept giving until weakening inside 100 M.

pressed forward from the start, eased back approaching home turn to sit behind leading pack, 3-wide and no cover on turning, held every chance but didn't respond in straight, dropped out inside 150 M.
Taken back on jumping, settled in rear trailing 6Ls behind leader, used little in running, held up early in straight, no clear run until 200 M, made up some lost ground thereafter.
Away in line, always prominent in front, led field as they turned, quietly ridden inside 400 M but responded well, kept on finding enough to hold off the eventual runner-up at the finish.
Reasonable jump, ran a shade keen early before settled in a spot better midfield 2Ls off the pace with cover, into clear 300 M, ran on steadily to finish 3rd.
Average jump, unable to slot in and had to settle 3 wide in mid-division, ridden out 300 M, gave little response and could pass tired runners only.
Average break, guided to a midfield position 3Ls back, hindered by the slow pace in middle stages, ran on one-paced in straight without threats.
Slightly slow out, taken to a position in midfield 3Ls back, travelled 3-wide with cover, ridden along 400 M out, didn't get the clearest of runs but stayed on strongly once into clear 150 M out.
Jumped well from the outside barrier, rolled forward to take the lead near 1000 M, pressed by runner on outside, under pressure 400 M out, unable to quicken, faded gradually inside 150 M.
Taken back on jumping, taken up a spot behind midfield 4 to 5Ls behind leader, 3-wide turning for home, picked up fairly on straightening, no extra inside 100 M.
Standard break, ran a shade keen early, travelled in mid-division 2-deep from the fence with cover, under pressure rounding the bend, found nothing in straight and gave ground from 300 M.
Awkwardly away, moved forward gradually to race one out one back from leader, enjoyed the slow sectionals, kept on strongly in straight, hit front 250 M, looked a winner but was caught close home.
Well enough away, eased off in search of cover, gradually shuffled back towards the rear, forced wide on turning and struggled early in straight. (Jockey questioned about his ride.)
Overcame a wide barrier to settle in a handy position close to the pace, ready to strike going into straight, ran on steadily but effort just flattened out inside 100 M.
In rear, difficult to settle down the back straight, hampered by the slow pace, had plenty to do turning in, couldn't pick up instantly on straightening but stayed on OK towards the finish.

Jumped well, taken to a position better than midfield about 3Ls back, 3-wide and no cover turning home, came with his challenge 350 M out, quickened up nicely to take a creditable 4th, pulled well clear from the rest.

Held up patiently behind midfield, travelled along the rail 4 to 5Ls behind leader, always looked comfortable, short of room early in straight but ran on strongly once a gap opened up near 200 M, weaved through horses to win.
Away with them, driven forward to race prominently behind leaders, pressed on rounding home turn, dug deep inside 200 M to finish a close 3rd.
Reasonable jump, drifted back to the rear trailing 6Ls behind, peeled out to challenge approaching home straight, gave limited response and could pass tired runners only.
Began in line, crossed to fence and led field at a slow tempo, had 1L advantage coming off the bend, headed near 250 M, faded gradually in run to line.
Drawn low, had a ground-saving trip along the rail in mid-division, did little in running, eased out approaching home straight, delivered a one-paced finish to line.
Standard jump, moved forward to take closer order not far off from leaders, into clear 350 M out, ran on well under pressure but was momentarily checked near 100 M.
Taken back on jumping, parked in a position behind midfield 5 to 6Ls off the pace, switched out on straightening, made some progress down the outside without threatening.
Lacked early speed and had to be hard ridden to stay in mid-division, struggled on turning, found nothing in straight, dropped out rapidly inside 150 M.
Slightly slow out, settled towards the rear 7 to 8Ls back, switched wide entering home straight, made some late impression down the outside.
Well enough away, ridden early to maintain a spot in mid-division 5Ls off the pace, 3-wide turning in, made steady progress down the outside without troubling the first two.
Broke well from the inside barrier, beaten for early pace and was shuffled rearward, saved ground on turning, ran on one-paced in the finish. No impression.

Away with them, pressed on to race prominently on the fence just behind leader, eased out approaching home straight, picked up well to take charge near 250 M but was unable to fend off the winner. Posted a solid effort in defeat.
Shot out of the stalls, unable to slot in from the wide barrier and was wide on turning, 2Ls down going into straight, battled on gamely to take a non-threatening 3rd, hung in late.
Pressed forward after jumping, taken alongside leader approaching home turn, led briefly in straight was soon headed, weakened rapidly inside 200 M. (Blood in trachea.)
Away awkwardly, hard ridden but didn't muster speed, soon trailed in rear by 9Ls, picked up well on straightening but was given too much to do.

Jumped well, taken to a midfield position along the fence 4Ls back, had a smooth trip to bend, showed a good turn of foot when switched to make his challenge inside 350 M, won going away with plenty to spare.
Blundered on jumping, assumed a position behind midfield 6Ls away, not asked in running, picked up OK and made up plenty of ground down the inside.
Bounced out, showed customary early speed to take up running under a steady tempo, pressed by runner on his outside turning in, couldn't sustain effort in straight, faded entering 200 M.

Awkwardly away and lost ground, travelled in rear trailing 10Ls to leader, difficult to settle and used up energy, unable to keep up with them as pace quickened, soon dropped out and was beaten a long way.
Slowly away, ended up racing in the rear 6Ls back, remained there to turn, switched out on straightening, responded only fairly and was one-paced in the finish.
Standard break, driven to the front and led field at a steady tempo, hung out under pressure on straightening, kept on until weakening inside 100 M.
Slowly away and failed to muster early speed, travelled in a rearward position trailing 6Ls to leader, came very wide on turning, unable to pick up and passed tired runners only.
Standard jump, settled behind midfield 4 to 5Ls behind leader, taken wide coming into straight, picked up strongly inside 400 M and had the race won near 100 M.
Broke well, drifted back to midfield 3Ls off the pace, raced a touch keen in early parts, into clear 400 M, made limited progress before weakened inside 100 M.
Well enough away, taken forward to sit behind the front runner who led at a steady tempo, tracked well on turning, held every chance but couldn't find the extra gear when asked.
Swiftly away, quickly taken to the rail and travelled better than midfield not far off the pace, failed to quicken when asked, checked near 200 M and never recovered from that point.
Quickly into stride, travelled close to the pace but unable to obtain cover, picked up well on straightening, briefly hit front inside 200 M but found no extra over the concluding stages.
Began in line, gradually crept up to take closer order behind leaders, peeled out to challenge inside 400 M, ran on steadily without seriously threatening.

Broke well from the inside barrier, drifted back to settle in a position behind midfield, travelled well enough to bend, had a dream run against the rail, kept on strongly but had no chance with the winner.
Awkwardly away and took time to muster, settled behind midfield 4 to 5Ls off the pace, showed little dash and hung out under pressure. Never likely.
Even break, settled in a position behind midfield 4 to 5Ls back, came very wide rounding the home turn, struggled early in straight and could make no impression.
Taken back on jumping, unable to settle in the early parts and used energy, had 6Ls to make up turning home, found nothing under pressure and simply plugged away to line.
Away with them, assumed a spot on the fence in mid-division 3Ls back, made steady progress from 400 M but showed tendancy to hang in under pressure.
Camped on the back of the speed from a wide stall, 1 out 1 back early before settling 3Ls off the pace. Peaked on run in the closing stages.
Raced 3-wide with cover close to midfield. Peeled to the outside early in the run home and once balanced sprinted strongly to finish over the top of its rivals.
Lost ground at the start when bumped, settling at the rear 4-wide no cover. Finished off gamely.
Began awkwardly and took up a position towards the tail of the field, 2 deep with cover. Never likely.
Was ridden along to obtain a forward position from an inside draw eventually settling 3 back the fence. Had no excuses.
Worked forward and crossed to the lead near the 800 M. Hung out in the middle stages and faded in the run home.
Slow to begin and raced with the back markers 2-3 deep with cover. Made some ground in the straight before ending its run before the post.
Led early before being crossed near the 800 M, then shifted to the 1 out line soon after. Was in front by the 200 M, however was claimed in the run to the wire.
Settled with the rear division 3 deep with cover. Had to be steadied on the home turn but was never a threat.
From the outside gate was able to slot in to be 2 to 3-wide with cover behind the speed. Was in contention at the 200 M, but weakened over the concluding stages.
Travelled midfield on the fence. Took runs through the field in the straight and battled away soundly.
Settled on the fence towards the back of the field. Plugged away in the run home.
Jumped awkwardly and for the major part of the event raced greenly behind midfield along the fence. Kept to the inside in the straight but failed to run on.
Bounded in the air at the start and lost ground settling 3 to 4-wide without cover behind midfield. Ran on strongly in the straight despite hanging in and bumping another runner near the furlong.
Niggled along early and raced in a forward spot. Took the lead into the back straight. Held a narrow advantage turning for home but was swamped final 200 M.

Ridden to take the early lead. Took a sit behind the pace 1300 M out. Boxed-seated making home turn but was held up for some distance after straightening. Quickened nicely once finding daylight and ran down rival inside final 50 M
Raced along the fence at midfield. Switched out making home turn but unable to quicken in the straight. Weakened final stages.
Settled in a rearward spot. Trailed field rounding home turn and found nothing in the straight.
Raced in rear section. Took a wide turn home and showed nothing in the straight.
Off slowly and raced behind midfield. In rear section turning for home stayed on same pace thereafter.
Better than midfield. 2-back on the fence turning for home. Ran on same pace in the straight.
Showed no early speed and raced behind midfield. Made up ground from a wide spot rounding home bend. Unable to sustain after straightening and gradually faded.
Dropped back from a wide draw and trailed field. Steadily made up ground after 700 M and was within 3Ls of the leader turning for home. Kept on same pace in the straight.

Slow into stride and raced in front of midfield. Made up ground after 1000 M and was racing alongside the leader making home turn. Took the lead inside 300 M but unable to find enough to hold off winner in the final stages.

Jumped only fairly and failed to muster speed to be in front. Travelled 2-wide in midfield. Steadied and lost a bit of ground at 600 M and had trouble keeping pace rounding home turn. Never picked up in the straight.
2-wide and better than midfield. 4-wide and a length off the lead turning for home. Kept on well in the straight for a minor placing.
Jumped well and raced 3-wide among early leaders. 2-wide and raced behind the pace back straight. 3-wide disputing lead turning for home. Kept on fairly but unable to turn up a notch in the straight.
Jumped awkwardly and raced towards the rear. Near last on straightening and made up ground over beaten runners.
3-back on rails about 3Ls behind early pace in 5th, held up from top of home straight to the 200 M, couldn't rally again once clear along rails.
One from rear about 10Ls from the lead at the 1400 M, 6Ls away entering final section, no impression.
Quick to lead on the rails, between 1L and 2Ls clear until the home straight when headed, still a neck 2nd at the 200 M, lost a place final 100 M.
Slow to muster early pace and always niggled along towards rear about 8Ls from the pace, always chasing the majority of the field.
3Ls behind pace out 2-wide in 6th at 1000 M and similarly placed off last turn, lacked the turn of foot to improve his position.
2-wide and 1L down in 2nd at 1200 M, ridden along to remain in touch off last bend, slipped further out of contention.
Taken back, 9Ls behind pace in 11th at 1400 M, still well behind in 12th off last bend, found little under pressure. (Blood in trachea.)
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Squeezed up at start, went back to 11Ls last at 1400 M, still last 7Ls adrift off last bend, ran on well for a place despite hanging in late. (Questioned.)
Slow to muster early pace, 8Ls back in 10th on fence at 1400 M, 5Ls back entering home straight, stayed on best of the rest for 2nd.
5Ls off leader on the fence at 1000 M in 8th, tracked winner's move to be closer turning for home, had his chance to place.
Keen and without cover early on despite exiting gate 4, 2Ls back in 4th at halfway, faded out tamely from top of home straight.
8Ls off pace in 9th at 1200 M, ridden along to be 4Ls back in mid-division spinning for home, finished off at the one pace.
Midfield about 4Ls behind initial pace, advanced out deep from 800 M to lead at top of home straight, driven out to always just hold a break.
Keen down the back when 2-wide in around 9th place, 5Ls adrift off last turn, no further impression.
Slowly away, 3-back the fence in 7th or so about 4Ls from the speed through to final 400 M, had every chance to place but lacked late dash.
One from rear about 7Ls behind the initial tempo, still rearward and 7Ls behind off last turn, never dangerous. (Tactic questioned.)
Disputed lead out 2-wide at 1200 M, settled into 'one-out- one-back' slot from 800 M to home turn, soon outpaced. (Blood in trachea.)
Bumped at start, rushed forward to dispute pace out 2-wide at 1000 M, struggling to remain in touch at top of home straight, soon surrendered. (Tactic questioned.)
Caught 3-wide without cover throughout, 3Ls back in 5th turning for home, extra work soon took its toll.
Box-seated in 4th on rails at 1000 M, 2Ls back in 2nd at last turn, had little hope with the winner but ran on best of the pursuers for 2nd.
Slow to muster pace, 4-back along the rails at halfway, steadily dropped out of the reckoning about 600 M out. (Bled.)
Taken back from wide gate, 8Ls last in middle stages, 6-wide (widest of all) taking final turn, never likely to take a serious hand in the finish.
2-wide and 3Ls down in 6th down back straight, close enough into final quarter, briefly hindered at the 300 M but lacklustre run for odds-on favourite.
Awkward break, towards rear 6Ls from the speed at halfway, edged closer off last turn and all out to nick a remote 3rd.
Pinged to lead by 1L at the 1400 M, 2Ls to the good off last bend, pulled further clear for an impressive success.
Midfield with cover about 5Ls down at halfway, closer and with place prospects at top of home straight, couldn't sustain the bid.
Always worse than midfield, about 7Ls away down the back and not much closer into final 400 M, never a factor.
Hard ridden early to keep up in midfield, 6-1/2Ls off the good pace on the rails, made ground steadily 300 M.
Eased at start to take rail at rear, 10Ls off the good pace, no dash in straight, lacked room 200 M.
Hard ridden to take the rail and led at good pace, pressured 1200 M, dropped off quickly 400 M.
Eased to sit in midfield, 5-1/2Ls behind the good pace 2-wide, momentarily held up 400 M, made ground when clear and grabbed 3rd.
Pushed forward and crossed, 4Ls off the good pace 2-wide, raced keenly, lacked turn of foot, just held ground in straight.
Eased to sit in midfield, 6-1/2Ls off the good pace, trapped 3-wide no cover throughout, ran on ok in final stages.
Eased back, 8Ls off the good pace, trapped 3-wide throughout, progressed steadily 300 M.
Slowly away, behind midfield, 7Ls off the good pace 2-wide, no progress.
Eased back and crossed towards rail steadily, 8-1/2Ls off the good pace, dashed fairly in straight.
Eased back, bumped early, 10Ls off the good pace 2 to 3-wide, ran on ok in last quarter.
Eased to sit in front of midfield along the fence, 5Ls off the good pace, made ground 400 M, run ended 100 M.
Pushed early but failed to muster, then eased to cross at rear, 9Ls off the good pace 2-wide, ran on fairly in final stages.
Crossed easily in front of midfield towards 2-wide, moved up steadily 1200 M to share the lead at good pace, drew away rest of the field 600 M, led and dominated final 400 M.
Hard ridden forward and took rail, then eased and settled in box seat at good pace, closed the race off nicely to finish 2nd without much threat to winner.
Moderate jump. Settled just better than midfield on rails within 3Ls of pace. Similar turning in but soon dropped out tamely.
Slow out. Gradually joined rear of field. Remained last into straight. Never nearer.
Began in short reins and soon taken back to rear. Remained there to straight. Kept on well for a nice impression at the finish.
Began well to lead. Unable to cross until after 1000 M. Held a length's advantage rounding home bend and early in straight. Unable to sustain effort and swamped inside final 150 M.
Held rails run in 2nd far side. Found cover approaching home bend. Angled out for a run turning for home but failed to quicken under pressure.
Never far off or better than 3 off the rails. Ran on steadily in straight but failed to answer winner's late surge close to home.

Moderate start. Soon settled in better than midfield position. In box seat on heels of leaders turning in. Sustained progress in straight despite a tight run down inside before forced to steady at 100 M. Could be closer.
Began with others from widest draw. Remained very wide in midfield down far side. Circled field making home bend. Unable to sustain effort after straightening and dropped out tamely. (Questioned.)
Settled just worse than midfield. Ran on steadily between runners in straight to be nearest at finish.
Hampered shortly after start. Travelled wide behind midfield to straight. Made no impression down centre of track. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Settled in midfield. Came under pressure after straightening to challenge leaders down centre of track. Fought on under pressure to just get up on line.
Settled in midfield. No clear run in straight until after 150 M. Finished off race well.
Slightly slow out but soon picked up to last few. Remained in rear of field but produced good late impression inside final 200 M.
Began with others from a wide draw. Travelled wide without cover in prominent position. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.

Average break, ridden to maintain a position in midfield 4Ls back along the fence, had a smooth run throughout, waited with until last 200 M, made a strong run down the inside to get there just in time.

Eased back on jumping from the wide barrier, assumed his usual position at the back about 9Ls off the pace, travelled comfortably going into straight but made no progress down the outside. (See Racing Incidents.)
Struggled from the beginning, commenced to give ground from 1000 M and raced detached in rear, never in contention. (Lame next day.)
Even break, pushed along to maintain a midfield position about 4Ls back, taken wide on turning, ran on OK in straight but didn't pose a threat to the leaders.
Bounced out, sat behind leaders never far off the pace, brought with a challenge inside 400 M, ran on strongly to hit front inside 100 M, looked a winner but was caught right on the line.
Slow out, taken across to fence, raced in a rearward position but unable to settle, couldn't quicken up when placed under pressure and simply plugged away to line.

Slightly awkward away, didn't muster speed and travelled in an unexpected position near the rear, had plenty to do coming off the bend, made some headway down the outside but was overall disappointing. (Lame next day.)
Broke well, soon settled in a handy position behind fast running leaders, into clear 350 M, responded positively when asked for effort, kept on well to line for a creditable 4th.
Began with best, parked in a 2-wide position behind midfield 6Ls back, niggling along turning in, gave limited response when asked and ran home one-paced.
Taken back on jumping, soon parked on the fence and raced in a rearward position, trailed 8Ls to leader down the back straight, made even progress down the inside without seriously threatening.

Away with them, unable to cross and was forced wide on the first turn, slowly crept forward to race prominently behind leaders, unable to sprint with them under pressure, gradually faded inside 200 M.

Took advantage of the low draw and quickly shot into the lead, set a fast tempo, pressed by outside runner down the back straight, struggled to keep up approaching home turn, dropped out rapidly inside 250 M.
Quickly into stride, rolled forward to share lead under a fast tempo, showed a tendancy to hang in, pulled 2Ls clear going into straight, ket on but weakened inside 100 M.
Began well, positioned nicely 3Ls back behind pace trio, travelled evenly to bend, didn't quicken when asked at 300 M and stopped quickly inside 200 M. Eased down late.
Checked soon after jump and was at rear on settling, was 10Ls from top end in mid-section but helped by solid speed, still sharing rear turning, made some even progress in straight.
Moderate beginning and didn't muster, ended up further back than usual 10Ls or so off pace, shared rear on bend, made a brief effort 3 wide leaving bend, never really fired.
Moderate jump, ridden up to race 9Ls away in 2 wide line, always in rear division and aided by strong pace, in impossible spot turning, made many lengths in straight to be nearest on line.
Standard jump and was ridden along to hold position 5Ls away on rails, helped by strong speed on, well back turning, made no real impression.

Began in line, ridden forward soon after start to take up spot outside leader, did work in mid-section with genuine tempo, levelled up turning, drifted out under pressure at 300 M, tired when run ended 200 M.
Jumped only fairly, ridden along but became gradually detached, continued to struggle throughout and was beaten a long way.
Fast away, took spot behind leader 2Ls away, travelled well on solid pace to bend, gained split turning and went to fron at 250 M, established a break and went on to win with ease.
First out, allowed to relax behind pace 3 to 4Ls away on rails, had ideal trail off solid speed, eased clear on turning, chased hard to run down winner but could do no better inside 200 M.
Began with rest, forced to angle into midfield to be in 2 wide line, raced 5Ls off solid pace, in clear running from 350 M, closed gradually without threatening.
Began evenly positioned 4Ls back in running line, 3 wide on bend, struggling turning in, failed to produce and was beaten a long way in straight.
Amongst first to jump, went forward to take up running, set a solid speed in front, challenged on bend, kept kicking to 250 M, but couldn't respond and dropped off thereafter.
Standard jump, ended up 8Ls back in running line, helped by solid pace in mid-section, saved ground turning, closed race off best late to take placing.
Away in line, ended up 5Ls away in midfield on rails, not used in run and took short cuts to bend, kept coming nicely along inside final 200 M to make frame.
Began with purpose and travelled more prominently 1L away outside leader, used some reserves with pace on, hit lead soon after turning and held on to 100 M before others took over.
Began with first few, took a sit 3 wide with cover 4Ls back, 2Ls down and ridden along turning, showed nothing. (Irregular heart beat.)
Standard jump, ended up 5Ls back in 2 wide line, not helped when pace steadied, back between horses turning, never really saw daylight and not properly tested.
Began nicely, pressed on to battle for early lead used a bit with fast speed and topped 3 wide without cover, still there turning but faded soon after hard run.
Ordinary jump, in rearward division early, forced wide when pace steadied, posted 5 wide 6Ls away without cover, gradually improved very wide on bend, peaked on run at 200 M and stopped soon after.
Standard jump, posted 3 wide in early stages, pressed on 4 wide without cover when pace slackened, did work to be 1L down on bend, hard work took toll and stopped inside 200 M.
No early pace and soon back with last few, proved difficult to settle in mid-section 6Ls back on circle, hung in straight and difficult to ride, kept coming final 200 M to match frame.
Amongst first few to break, took ideal position 1 out 1 back behind pace, travelled well to bend, into clear and challenged at 300 M, hit lead inside 200 M but lacked dash to go with first two late.
Began with them, took a spot 3Ls back on fence, had soft run in mid-section, held up for a considerable distance 200 M, took inside run and dashed sharply to soon be in control, scored well.
Taken back from an outside alley, raced 7Ls away at rear, had a fair run to bend, weaved between horses and made some ground to 100 M before run ended.
Out in line, outpaced early, had to be content with spot 4Ls away on rails, shuffled back when pace steadied, no run turning in and was not fully tested.
No early pace, ridden along to be 6Ls off pace on rails, back at tail when pace steadied, came out and round upon turning, closed hard from rear running down well but winner.
Showed usual pace early, elected to take a sit behind leader, travelled fairly after early burst, still there on turning but offered little and dropped out steadily.
Began with more purpose, showed good speed to lead, did work in first half of the event, held a 1/2L lead turning, stuck on to 250 M, lost advantage soon after and dropped off.
